Uh oh, looks like it's end of the line for us...
Where should we go to look for the Coreflame...?
Madness! I will strike her down for you!!!
<color=#dbc291ff>「在支付等价的报酬以前，你们可别先死了哪。」</color>
<color=#dbc291ff>"Need to make sure you don't die before you pay me."</color>
…不用为火种的下落担忧，我们接着下山。
...There's no need to worry about the Coreflame's whereabouts. Let's just descend the mountain.
出发讨伐艾格勒以前，我拜托赛飞儿小姐，在我们离开时保护好刻法勒的火种…不择手段。
Before setting off to defeat Aquila, I entrusted Miss Cipher with the task of protecting Kephale's Coreflame while we were gone... by any means necessary.
火种既然不在这里…那一定是她动了手脚。换句话说…她以自己的方式履行了职责。
If the Coreflame isn't here... that means she must have done something to it. In other words... she fulfilled her duty using her own means.
我们只管继续向创世涡心进发，赛飞儿一定会赴约的。
We just have to focus on getting to the Vortex of Genesis, and Cipher will meet us there for sure.
What if something happened to her...
丹恒，{NICKNAME}——除了信任，我们现在已经没有别的选择。
Dan Heng, {NICKNAME} — we have no choice other than to trust her.
假设从这里到最近的祭仪水盆有万步之遥…那我们要做的就是一路奔跑，然后企盼她会在还剩九千步时跟我们汇合。
If the nearest ritual basin is ten thousand paces away... then what we have to do is to run in that direction and hope she meets us after one thousand paces.
假如她没有出现，那我们就继续向前…寄希望于她会在八千步的地方出现。
If she doesn't show up, we will keep going... and trust that we will see her at two thousand paces.
七千，六千，五千…我会带着同样的希望一直企盼下去——
Three, four, five thousand... I will keep hoping with the same resolve, all the way...
——直到她出现在我们面前，带着一贯玩世不恭的表情。
...Until she shows up in front of us, with her usual rebellious attitude.
至少，到今天为止…我不记得有哪位参与到逐火之旅中的黄金裔辜负过自己的使命。
At least, to this day... I don't recall any Chrysos Heirs failing their mission for the Flame-Chase Journey.
但前提是…我们得活下去，突破重围！
But before that... we must survive and break through this siege!
You have to trust us too!
Another apocalypse? Been there, done that!
She was a formidable foe to the end.
她的所作所为的确无可饶恕，但……
Her actions may have been deplorable, but...
I will not shed a single tear for her.
恐怕她也没奢求过他人的同情。但……
She may not have sought sympathy from others, but...
「清洗者」为了一个千年不变的目标，甘愿以禁术维系千年的身份和记忆…这大概也是一种扭曲到极致的坚韧吧？

As a "Cleaner," she was willing to use forbidden arts to absorb a millennium of identities and memories for an objective that hasn't changed in that time... I suppose this is also a form of extreme but twisted resilience?
Let's go... It's time to leave this place.
In the end... they still showed up.
Now's not the time for a fight...
要检验你的特训成果么？
You gonna test the results of your training?
No... Now is not the time.
我一直在等着，能有一个机会和它正面对决……
I've been waiting for a chance to face them head-on...
但不是现在…假如我们在这里恋战，然后失手…后果将无可挽回。
But not now... If we take the fight here, then lose... the consequences would be irreversible.
Come on... We have to get out of here.
一路奔跑…绝对不要回头！
Keep running... and never turn back!
分身，幻术…净是些藏身阴影的把戏。
Clones, illusions... nothing but cheap tricks to help you hide in the shadows.
The Sky... has returned to its rightful place...
What... What are they talking about!?
你在寻找的终点…也是「创世奇迹」么？
The end you seek... is also the Miracle of Genesis?
若是如此，那你本应站在黄金裔身旁！为何要阻挠我们，「盗火行者」？
If so, you should be standing alongside the Chrysos Heirs! Why do you hinder us, "Flame Reaver"?
Just give up on talking sense to them...
理智的缺失…是无法逾越的沟壑。
The lack of reason... can't be overcome.
该展现训练成果了，白厄。
It's time to show off the fruits of your training, Phainon.
到了最后关头…还是免不了正面一战。
In the end... direct confrontation was inevitable.
They keep repeating themself like that...
言语不起作用…那就只能靠剑刃表露决意了。
If words won't work... then we can only express our resolve with our blades.
我们背负了太多人的命运和未来……
We shoulder the fates and futures of too many people...
我们…绝不可能在这里倒下！
还远没到放松的时候…那盗火行者精通各种诡术，就算是万敌也不一定能限制住它的行动。
It's too early to relax... The Flame Reaver is a master in the art of deceit. Even Mydei may not be able to restrain them.
没想到我会两次把他一个人留在战场上…但现在不是考虑这个的时候。
I never thought I would leave him alone on the battlefield twice... But now isn't the time to be thinking about this.
缇宝没有跟来…她是打算留在上层帮助万敌么？
Tribbie didn't follow us... Does she intend to stay above to help Mydei?
庇佑我们…天父，救救我们！
Protect us... Sky father, save us!
Someone is calling for help... Over there!
The black tide creatures are threatening the people...
不能坐视不理…速战速决吧！
We can't just stand by and watch... Let's end this quickly!
Everyone, you're all safe... for now.
该感谢的另有其人。刚才那些黑潮造物，无法突破这道屏障……
It is someone else who deserves your thanks. Those black tide creatures just now couldn't breach this barrier...
这股能量很熟悉，近似风堇为人疗伤的明光术…只是更加强大。
This energy feels familiar, like the luminous arts that Hyacine uses to treat people... but it is much more powerful.
公民们！我和同伴们现在不能久留，在救兵赶来以前……
Citizens! My companions and I can't stay long. Before reinforcements arrive...
请你们不要踏出这道屏障半步——这是成为半神的风堇留下的神迹…请相信她的信念。
Please do not step out of this barrier. This is a miracle left by the demigod Hyacine... Please trust her conviction.
风堇小姐，也成为和阿格莱雅大人那样的半神了么……
Miss Hyacine has also become a demigod like Lady Aglaea...?
我们明白了…在等到你归来前，白厄阁下，我们绝不会离开她的庇护！
We understand... We will not leave her protection until you return, Lord Phainon!
我…不会给出虚假的承诺，或许我短时间内没法回到这里……
I... won't make empty promises. I might not be able to return in the near future...
但即便没有两全其美…我也一定会做出不负使命的选择。
But even if there's no perfect solution... I will make a choice that fulfills this mission.
我们相信你，白厄阁下！无论你做出什么选择……
We trust you, Lord Phainon! No matter what choice you make...
We'll be waiting for your return!
圣城…燃烧。抗争…我已尽力。
Burning... the holy city is. To resist... I did all I could.
你这把年纪已经不适合上前线了，大工匠…公民们呢？云石市集的情况如何？
You shouldn't be on the frontline at your age, Grand Craftsman... Where are the citizens? What's the situation at Marmoreal Market?
逃生…圣城卫士在组织。但…该逃向何处，无人知晓……
Organizing their escape... the holy city guards are. But... where to flee to, no one knows...
从天而降，虹色的屏障。保护了人们…但无法根除，恐惧。
Descended from the sky, the rainbow barrier did. Protected the people... but alleviated the fear, it could not.
恐怕这就是翁法罗斯的末世了，哈托努斯。只有一个办法能拯救家园……
I fear this is Amphoreus's end, Chartonus. There is only one way to save our home...
啊…终将实现，天父降下的神谕……
Ah... Finally come true, the sky father's prophecy...
去吧…奇迹，去创造。救世主…去成为。
Go... miracle, create it. Deliverer... you shall become.
<color=#dbc291ff>Waiting at the Vortex of Genesis... Lady Trinnon is.</color>
Black tide creatures... Prepare for battle!
Urgent... the situation is. Leave them to me... the monsters.
已经死去…我本应。令我弥留…虹光的力量。
Died... I should have. Kept me here... the power of the rainbow light did.
但既然注定…死亡，无法逃脱……
But if destined... inescapable, death is...
Why not... leave behind some glory?
你这一生都在锻造荣光，老朋友——为别人，也为你自己。愿你在新世界里能度过没有战乱的一生。
You've been forging nothing but glory your entire life, old friend — for others, and for yourself. May you never see the slightest glimpse of war in the new world.
Let us depart... to the Chrysos Heirs' baths!
并非…为战斗而生，这双手……
For battle... these hands were not meant...
但，圣城的明天，若需由它守护……
But, if to protect the holy city's future, they are needed...
To the final moment... I will fight!
哈托努斯已经下定决心了——
Chartonus has made up his mind...
We have to keep moving forward, {NICKNAME}!
The Chrysos Heirs' baths... Not a soul in here.
这里也有那些虚浮的建筑结构……
Those translucent structures are here too...
人家能感觉到…它们的记忆在流失。
I can feel it... Their memories are dissipating.
嗯…记忆的质料，留存于翁法罗斯的万物之间。哪怕是一砖一瓦，也保留有许多往世的痕迹。
Yes... the textures of memories are preserved within all things in Amphoreus. Even a single brick or tile holds countless traces of the past.
Will this spread to other places?
人家也说不好…总之，感觉很不妙。
I'm not sure... In any case, none of this feels right.
记忆的质料，留存于翁法罗斯的万物之间…哪怕是一砖一瓦，也保留有许多往事的痕迹。
The textures of memories are preserved within all things in Amphoreus... Even a single brick or tile holds countless traces of the past.
这里没有受困的公民，也没有黑潮造物的影子…我们没理由在此逗留。
There are no citizens trapped here, nor any signs of black tide creatures... We have no reason to linger here.
下楼吧…浴宫就在不远处了。
Let's head downstairs... The bath chamber isn't far away.
You guys go ahead. I'll shore up the rear!
白厄，带着{NICKNAME}赶去创世涡心吧。我留在这里拖住它。
Phainon, take {NICKNAME} to the Vortex of Genesis. I will stay here and hold them off.
别犹豫，白厄——你还肩负再创世的使命。
Don't hesitate, Phainon. You still shoulder the mission of the Era Nova.
前方不知是否还有盗火行者的分身…{NICKNAME}，护在白厄身边吧，以保不备。
We don't know if the Flame Reaver has any clones up ahead... {NICKNAME}, stay close to Phainon and keep him safe.
翁法罗斯人总把「宿命」挂在嘴边…那「开拓」的宿命，就是总会把每个世界的存亡与我们自身系在一起。
Amphoreans often speak of "destiny"... The destiny of the Trailblaze is to bind the life and death of every world to our own existence.
如此仓促的道别…我不接受。
Such a hasty farewell... I won't allow it.
这不会是道别。放心吧，我会竭尽全力活下来。
This isn't farewell. Don't worry. I'll do everything in my power to survive.
列车组的大家都在等我们回去！
Everyone in the Crew is still waiting for our return!
我没打算和谁永别。放心吧，我会竭尽全力活下来。
I don't intend to say goodbye forever to anyone. Don't worry. I'll do everything in my power to survive.
我没打算和谁永别，{NICKNAME}——放心吧，我会竭尽全力活下来。
It's not goodbye forever, {NICKNAME}. Don't worry. I'll do everything in my power to survive.
You better keep your word, Dan Heng...
有流水之处，我便能借它之力涤荡恶浊。
Wherever there's flowing water, I can harness its power to purge the filth.
哪怕只是一介过客，也会不惜以生命守护脚下陌生的世界…这是「开拓」逃不开的命途轨迹。
Even if I were just a passing traveler, I would not hesitate to lay down my life and protect the unfamiliar world beneath my feet... This is the destined course that a Trailblazer cannot escape.
我是一名「无名客」，而我要做的事……
I am a Nameless, and what I'm going to do...
就是捍卫一切行将飘逝的希望。
...is defend all the hopes that are on the verge of fading away.
必须尽快赶去创世涡心！
We have to get to the Vortex of Genesis quickly!
即便是在如此绝望的时刻，你们还是遵守了与我的约定…我无以言谢。
Even in such desperate times, you still managed to keep your promise to me... I am grateful beyond words.
盗火行者在城内作乱，他还有诸多分身——泽弗，请找人通知克拉特鲁斯，让他带着最精英的卫士守在城内的关口——
The Flame Reaver is wreaking havoc in the city, and they still have many clones. Zeph, please get someone to inform Krateros, and have him lead the most elite guards to defend the city's passages...
直到我完成归还仪式前…请尽力营救城中的民众。
Until I complete the Coreflame ritual... please do everything you can to rescue the citizens in the city.
尼莫西妮——有几位公民被困在了生命花园，暂时躲在风堇的壁障下。你能调派些人手去疏散他们么？
Mnemosyne... Several citizens are trapped in the Garden of Life, and are temporarily seeking refuge under Hyacine's barrier. Can you dispatch some people to evacuate them?
虽然…我也不知道该把他们送到哪去。
Though... I also don't know where to shelter them.
交给我们吧，白厄阁下——你只要专注于自己的使命就好。
Leave this to us, Lord Phainon. Just focus on your own mission.
嗯。至于{NICKNAME}和丹恒——就交给你们亲自护送了。
All right. As for {NICKNAME} and Dan Heng, I'll also leave them to you.
What in the world is going on...
你有什么事瞒着我吗，白厄？
Are you hiding something from me, Phainon?
抱歉，{NICKNAME}。这次是我自作主张了。
My apologies, {NICKNAME}. I acted on my own this time.
征伐艾格勒以前，我做了最坏的准备。即便奥赫玛终有一日会被黑潮攻陷……
I prepared for the worst before the fight against Aquila. Even if there came a day when Okhema was taken by the black tide...
但只要击败了艾格勒，令天空的诅咒不再…至少你和丹恒还有机会安全回家。
As long as we defeated Aquila, lifting the sky's curse... you and Dan Heng would at least have a chance to get home safely.
嗯。我知道你们会反对，所以才没提前通气，抱歉。
Yes. I knew you'd object, so I didn't inform you beforehand. My apologies.
The final lap is always the hardest...
抱歉，我知道你们不喜欢半途而废，所以才没提前通气。
Sorry, I know you must dislike leaving things unfinished, which is why I didn't inform you beforehand.
The progress bar is already at <unbreak>95%</unbreak>, and you're leaving me on a cliffhanger?
我知道这很难接受…但即便要受一辈子埋怨，我也必须对你们负责。
I know this is hard to accept... but even if it means being resented for the rest of my life, I still have to be responsible for you.
你和丹恒教会了我何为「开拓」的精神，伙计。我做过最正确的决定，就是跟从了自己的直觉，选择相信你们。
Friend, you and Dan Heng taught me the spirit of Trailblazing. The best decision I ever made in my life was when I followed my intuition and chose to trust you.
丹恒和我讲了很多「无名客」的冒险故事，其中有两个最让我印象深刻：「贝洛伯格」和「匹诺康尼」——
Dan Heng told me many stories about the adventures of the Nameless. Two of them left a deep impression on me: "Belobog" and "Penacony"...
前一个故事告诉我，一个世界的命运应当由它的子民来左右。而你们——哪怕甘愿为了陌生的世界出生入死——最后还是要踏上旅程，前往下一个有待拯救的世界。

The first story taught me that the fate of a world should be in the hands of its people. And... even if the Nameless are willing to risk everything for an unfamiliar world, in the end you still have to embark on a new journey and go to the next world that needs saving.
因为那就是你们的使命…你们踏上的「命途」。
Because that's your mission... the Path you follow.
而在第二个故事里，丹恒和我讲到了那几位为「监狱星」付出了生命的无名客。我很清楚，你们两个甘愿为翁法罗斯做出同样的选择。
In the second story, Dan Heng told me about the few Nameless who sacrificed their lives for the "prison world." I know very well that the two of you are willing to make the same choice for Amphoreus.
在听到那几个故事以后，我也私自下定了决心——
After hearing those stories, I made up my mind...
<color=#dbc291ff>我绝不会让你们的旅途在这里画上句号，{NICKNAME}。</color>在翁法罗斯人从未触及的天外，还有很多人在等着你们回家。
<color=#dbc291ff>I won't let your journey end here, {NICKNAME}.</color> Somewhere beyond the sky, where Amphoreans have never reached, there are many people waiting for you to come home.
神谕模糊不清，即便归还了第十二颗火种，也没人知道「再创世」究竟会以怎样的面目显现…更遑论「奇迹」是否能眷顾两位天外来客。

The prophecy has always remained shrouded in ambiguity even if the twelfth Coreflame is returned, no one knows how the Era Nova will manifest... let alone if the miracle will extend its favor to two visitors from beyond the sky.
在踏入未知的命运之前，我能为你们做到的最后一件事…就是帮助你们回到家人的身边。
Before stepping into a fate unknown, the last thing I can do... is help you return to your family.
且不论神谕，我们现在也回不去。
And even if we ignore the prophecy, we can't go back now.
请别担心，{NICKNAME}阁下。白厄大人此前已经委托了来古士议员，修好了两位的载具。
Please don't worry, {NICKNAME}. Lord Phainon has already entrusted Elder Lygus to fix your transport.
缇宁大人的百界门就开在奥赫玛的城外大道，{NICKNAME}阁下。
Lady Trinnon's Century Gate is open on the main street outside Okhema's walls, {NICKNAME}.
对不起，向你们提出如此过分的请求。但我们活在一个不完美的时代里…不存在两全其美的选择。
I'm sorry for making such an unreasonable request of you all. But we live in an imperfect age... where there is never a perfect choice.
我有权见证这场开拓的结局。
I have the right to witness the ending of this Trailblaze.
英雄…不需要独自承担一切。
A hero... doesn't have to bear everything alone.
希望有朝一日，我们能在星宿的见证下重聚…到时候，我们再摆一席迟到的庆功宴吧。
One day, I hope we will reunite under the constellations... When that time comes, we can hold a belated victory feast. How about that?
你变得不像你自己了，白厄。
You've changed into someone different from yourself, Phainon.
别想用这种方法阻止我回来。
Don't try to stop me from coming back like that.
我们每个人都有抉择的权力。假如无法接受我代替你们做出的决定……
Every one of us has the right to make our own choices. If you can't accept my decision on your behalf...
…那就用你自己的选择开辟出新的道路吧——这是你最擅长的事，对么？
...Then use your choice to open up a new path — that's what you're best at, right?
但无论如何…丹恒现在还在苦苦支撑。别让他等太久，{NICKNAME}。
Regardless... Dan Heng is still holding on for his life... Don't keep him waiting too long, {NICKNAME}.
The spirit water... has dried up?
该死！为什么处处都是阻碍……
Blast! Why is nothing going right...
冷静下来…也许还有别的入口。离这里最近的，其他黄金裔的祭仪水盆……
Calm down... There might be another way in. The closest ritual basin, the other Chrysos Heirs'...
我以为你会在创世涡心等我。你还好吗？
I thought you'd be waiting at the Vortex of Genesis. Are you all right?
奥赫玛的夜幕降临时…所有的灵水也都随之枯涸了。*我们*猜到你会着急，所以才提前来这里等着。
When Okhema's night descended... all the spirit water dried up along with it. We anticipated that you'd be on edge, so we came ahead to wait for you.
呵…你们一直是最了解我的人。
Heh... You've always been the ones who knew me best.
刻法勒的火种…你知道它在哪儿吗？
Kephale's Coreflame... You know where it is?
嗯。小飞儿，她把火种保护得很好…没人能猜到它被藏在了哪里。
Yes. Little Ciphy protected the Coreflame well... No one would be able to guess where she stashed it.
Bartholos! You can come on out!
…桀桀桀！总算不用装成个信封了，可憋死我了！
...Heeheehee! I don't have to pretend to be an envelope anymore! That was suffocating!
喂喂，你现在态度可得放尊重点呀，小鬼！因为整个世界都在觊觎的那颗火种……
Hey, you'd better watch your tone, brat! That Coreflame that the entire world is after...
…现在可就躺在本大爷深不见底的胃囊里呀！
...is currently nestled in the depths of my bottomless tummy!
哈？你的反应未免太冷静了，这和我设想的完全不一样嘛！
Huh? Your reaction's too composed. It's completely different from what I was anticipating!
巴特鲁斯…小白还不知道奥赫玛永昼的真相。
Bartholos... Snowy still doesn't know the truth behind Okhema's eternal daylight.
啊…对哦。那你可要站稳听好咯，小鬼！
Ah... you're right. Then you'd better strap in and listen up, brat!
<color=#dbc291ff>赛法利娅那丫头，用一个伟大的谎言骗过了整个翁法罗斯——</color>
<color=#dbc291ff>That girl, Cifera, spun a grand lie that deceived all of Amphoreus...</color>
她骗过了你们所有人，<color=#dbc291ff>让你们相信刻法勒背上那个大球会永远照亮奥赫玛……</color>
She tricked all of you <color=#dbc291ff>into believing that that giant ball on Kephale's back would cast light over Okhema forever...</color>
除此之外…桀桀桀，她还骗过了那个愚蠢的晋升试炼，<color=#dbc291ff>让本大爷，伟大的{RUBY_B#诡计之泰坦}扎格列斯{RUBY_E#}…活了下来！</color>
Not just that... Heeheehee, she even managed to fool that dumb ascension trial, <color=#dbc291ff>and allowed me, the great {RUBY_B#Trickery Titan}Zagreus{RUBY_E#}... to survive!</color>
你…怎么还是没反应呀？可恶！一点都不有趣，本大爷太失望了！
You... still no reaction from you? Dang it! You're no fun at all. I'm sorely disappointed!
所以，千年以来…维系奥赫玛永昼的并非刻法勒的神迹，而是赛飞儿以「诡计」的神权编织的谎言……
So, for the last thousand years... what maintained Okhema's eternal daylight was not Kephale's miracle, but Cipher's lie woven using the divine authority of Trickery...
但现在，谎言破碎了。那就代表……
But now, the lie has come undone. Which means...
你没猜错…赛法利娅已经逝去了。她所有的谎言，如今也都灰飞云散了啊。
You didn't guess wrong... Cifera has already passed, and all her lies have scattered to the winds like ash.
但你刚刚才说过，你——扎格列斯——同样是靠着赛飞儿的谎言维系生命的。假如她已经……
But you just said, you — Zagreus — relied on Cipher's lie to keep living. If she is already...
桀桀桀…看来你的机灵程度也有限呀，小鬼。别忘了，本大爷可是翁法罗斯的十二泰坦之一……
Heeheehee... Guess you're not as smart as I thought, brat. Don't forget. I am one of the Twelve Titans of Amphoreus...
而我胃囊里的这颗火种…<color=#dbc291ff>不正是用来维系泰坦生命和神性的核心嘛？</color>
And this Coreflame in my belly... <color=#dbc291ff>Is it not the core that maintains a Titan's life and divinity?</color>
所以，你…打算就这么把火种交给我们？
So, you're... going to hand the Coreflame over to us, just like that?
桀桀桀…正是如此！怎么样，还不快谢过本大爷？
Heeheehee... Just so! How about it? Let's hear some groveling gratitude, eh?
为什么？神话中…扎格列斯是最胆小偷生的泰坦。
Why? In the myths... Zagreus was the most cowardly and shameful of the Titans.
哎，少拿那些编纂出来的故事诋毁本大爷！我的追求，可比区区一条小命远大得多……
Hey, stop slandering me with those fabricated tales! My pursuits are far greater than one measly life...
告诉你吧！本泰坦毕生所求…就是跟赛飞儿一起，编织出这世上最伟大的诡计！
Let me tell you then! My lifelong ambition... was to work with Cipher to conjure the greatest trick in the world!
假设这个世界的未来存在一亿种可能性，不管怎么看，那其中的九千九百九十九万九千九百九十九种都指向了毁灭的结局……

Assume this world holds a hundred million possibilities, and no matter how one looks at it, ninety-nine million, nine hundred ninety-nine thousand, nine hundred and ninety-nine of them all point to outcomes of certain destruction...
但是！凭着这一桩精妙的诡计，我们骗过了这世上所有的白痴、恶徒、灾难，实现了那亿分之一的可能……
But! With an exquisitely brilliant scheme, we fooled all the fools, villains, and disasters of this world, and achieved that one-in-a-hundred-million possibility...
这…就是我穷极一生，不惜变成这副模样，也想实现的「神迹」呀！
This... is the "miracle" I wished to achieve in my life's pursuit, even at the cost of turning into this!
把火种拿去吧，小鬼！去完成你的使命！
Take the Coreflame with you, brat! Go finish your mission!
记好咯——拯救了翁法罗斯的，不是刻法勒那个呆子的恩泽，也不是欧洛尼斯那个娃娃的呓语……
Remember this well... What saved Amphoreus wasn't the grace of that simpleton Kephale, nor was it the babbling of that child Oronyx...
…而是本大爷遭世人唾弃的神力…还有一个猫耳小贼维系了千年的谎言！
...It was the divine power of me, scorned by all... and the millennium-long lie of a cat-eared thief!
扎格列斯掏出了藏于胃囊中的，属于刻法勒的火种。
Zagreus takes out the Coreflame that belonged to Kephale, which was hidden in their stomach.
它被减削至贼灵形态的神躯逐渐化作尘土消散，不羁的笑声亦随风远去……
Their divine body, reduced to the form of a Spirithief, disappears into dust. Their unbridled laughter fades away in the wind...
原来那些被视为灾厄的符号…也能在救世的故事里留下印记。
So those signs deemed as harbingers of calamity... will also leave behind marks in the tale of deliverance.
如此一来，最后的一颗火种就能归位啦。
With this, the final Coreflame can be returned to its rightful place.
圣城中的灵水已经干涸…不过，*我们*可以尽力突破法吉娜祭司的封印法术…用「百界门」把你送入创世涡心。
The spirit water in the holy city has all dried up... We can try to break the sealing magic of Phagousa's priests... and use the Century Gate to send you into the Vortex of Genesis.
但…那恐怕会耗尽我们身上剩下的雅努斯神力。后面的事就都靠你啦，小白。
But... that will likely exhaust any remaining power of Janus that we have. After that, the rest is up to you, Snowy.
离别…我已经快要对它感到麻木了。到了这个时候…我连一句干涩的道别都说不出口。
Farewells... I've almost grown numb to them at this point. Right now... I can't even utter a plain goodbye.
别担心，缇宁老师。我已经不再是被阿格莱雅带回奥赫玛的那具空壳了。
Don't worry, Trinnon. I'm no longer the empty shell that Aglaea brought back to Okhema.
每一位没能走到最后的同伴，他们救世的信念都会成为我的一部分，拼凑出我一度丢失的灵魂。
For every companion who couldn't reach the end, their conviction to save the world became a part of me, piecing together the soul I once lost.
我失去了故乡，但你、阿格莱雅、还有所有其他人，共同为我编织出了第二个家园。
I lost my home village, but you, Aglaea, and everyone else created a second home for me.
如今，这个家园也危在旦夕…那就该轮到我回报你们的馈赠，去创造一个能承载所有愿望的新世界了。
Now that this home is also in danger... it is my turn to repay your kindness and create a new world that can carry everyone's wishes.
希望在那个新世界里，会有一轮崭新的朝阳升起——为所有人带去一个又一个黎明。
I hope that, in that new world, a new sun will rise, bringing one dawn after another to all.
你已经长成了阿雅期望中的样子呀，小白。
Snowy, you've grown into the person Agy always dreamed of.
的确，我们不需要在这里道别……
Indeed, we don't need to say goodbye here...
因为，无需预言的确证，*我们*也有自信断言…你一定会成为那一轮朝阳。
Because, even without the prophecy, we have the confidence to say... you will become that rising sun.
<color=#dbc291ff>而我们所有人…都一定会在「明天」再度相见。</color>
<color=#dbc291ff>And all of us... will see each other again "tomorrow."</color>
输送平台的路径被碎石阻断了……
The transport platform's route is blocked by rubble...
路径上的碎石都清空了。
The rubble blocking the path has been cleared.
Good job. Now we can get off the mountain.
A black tide creature... at Dawncloud!?
Oh no, the people in the city!
必须弄清他们是从哪里涌入城市的……
We must find out where they breached the city from...
缇宝老师——请一定撑到我们回来！
Tribbie! Please hold on till we get back!
还有敌人，下面的情况不容乐观……
More enemies. It doesn't look great down there...
敢拦路的家伙…都来会会「侵晨」的剑锋吧。
Anyone who dares stand in our way... will get a taste of Dawnmaker's edge.
她疗愈世界的信念那么强大……
Her will to heal the world is so strong...
如果成功，我们一定会感知到的。
We'll definitely sense it if she's succeeded.
<color=#dbc291ff>"Through the power of prayer, fill the shadow of the seal..."</color>
设计这机关的人肯定想不到…有朝一日，拥有欧洛尼斯神力之人会亲手将它解开。
The person who designed this mechanism would never have guessed that... one day, someone with the divine power of Oronyx could unlock it with their own hands.
Take the Coreflame and let's hurry down the mountain!
为、为什么？！人家以为奥赫玛是安全的！
Wh—Why!? I thought Okhema was safe!
恐怕这世上已经没有安全的角落了！
I fear no corner of this world is safe right now!
它的目标一定是火种——我们必须抢先一步！
Their objective must be the Coreflame — we have to beat them to the punch!
雅努斯密径——必须靠它穿过神界湖！
Janus's Hidden Passage — we have to use it to cross Theosphere Lake!
They will catch up to us sooner or later...
Wh... What in the world happened!?
退回神殿里去！保护好你们的家人、朋友！
Retreat to the temple! Protect your family and friends!
混乱很快就会结束…我向你们保证！
The chaos will soon cease... I promise you!
市集的人们…或许也在经受苦难。
The people in the market... must also be suffering.
希望风堇来得及保护他们……
I hope Hyacine can protect them in time...
Quick, let's go check on him!
哈托努斯说，<color=#dbc291ff>缇宁老师有火种的消息——</color>
Chartonus said that <color=#dbc291ff>Trinnon had news of the Coreflame...</color>
果然…赛飞儿小姐没有辜负使命！
As expected... Miss Cipher did not fail her mission!
浴场的水体，在用我难以理解的方式传达悲恸和绝望……
The baths' waters are conveying sorrow and despair in ways I can barely comprehend...
I'm getting a vague sense of foreboding here.
人家又有些…不祥的预感！
(「记忆」命途拥有让一个区域内时间暂停的能力，或许能帮上忙……)
(The Path of "Remembrance" holds the power to suspend time in a given area... Maybe that could help...)
「清洗者」的首领于此陷入永不苏醒的沉眠，她的死相平静得令人愤懑。
The leader of the "Cleaners" fell into an eternal slumber, her death so peaceful that it fomented resentment.
或许在遥远的西风尽头，亦有公正的律法能为这位元老的灵魂断罪。
Perhaps, at the distant end of the west wind, there will be a just law that can convict the sins infesting this elder's soul.
随着「理性」与「死亡」的火种得到归还，眼下还需讨伐的泰坦只剩下{RUBY_B#天空之泰坦}艾格勒{RUBY_E#}。白厄委托我们复现时空，反复挑战盗火行者磨练自身。逐火之旅成功在即，圣城却异变突生……

Following the return of the Coreflames of Reason and Death, {RUBY_B#Sky Titan}Aquila{RUBY_E#} is the only Titan that we still need to campaign against. Phainon asks us to recreate the past, and he repeatedly challenges the Flame Reaver to hone his abilities. The Flame-Chase Journey's triumphant conclusion draws nigh, yet a sudden disturbance occurs in the holy city...
阿格莱雅借元老院与清洗者之手，以自己的落幕为逐火扫清前路。悲痛之余，白厄接过领袖职责，发表演讲团结民众；而赛飞儿也受命回城，承诺将在逐火小队离城时守护{RUBY_B#负世之泰坦}刻法勒{RUBY_E#}的火种。

Using the Council of Elders and the Cleaners, Aglaea made sure that her fall paved the road forward for the Flame-Chase. Amidst his grief, Phainon takes up the mantle of leadership, giving a speech to unite the people. Cipher also returns on a mission, promising to protect {RUBY_B#Worldbearing Titan}Kephale{RUBY_E#}'s Coreflame while the Flame-Chase party is away from the city.
在昏光庭院的天空末裔——风堇的帮助下，众人登上艾格勒的空中堡垒。风堇决心完成代代相传的使命，却发现「阳雷骑士」塞涅俄丝讨伐艾格勒的伟业，竟是一段染血的谎言。

With the help of the Twilight Courtyard's last descendant of the sky, Hyacine, the party ascends to Aquila's flying fortress. Hyacine resolves to fulfill the duty passed down over generations of her family, only to discover that the glorious feat of Seliose the Daythunder Knight campaigning against Aquila was nothing more than a blood-stained lie.
与此同时，赛飞儿在龙骸古城与循火种而来的盗火行者周旋许久，最终不敌遭其杀害。但她早已设计将刻法勒火种交予贼灵巴特鲁斯，命它伺机将火种交付白厄等人。

At the same time in the city of the dead dragon's bones, Cipher contends with the Flame Reaver who comes seeking the Coreflame. Though she holds out for some time, she is no match and is slain in the end. But she had already given Kephale's Coreflame to Spirithief Bartholos, ordering them to wait for an opportunity to deliver the Coreflame to Phainon and the others.
逐火小队齐心作战，终于击败了人神合一的「天空」泰坦。众人正欲逃离晨昏之眼，黎明机器却在此时突然熄灭，风堇不得不提前归还火种，并留在天空承载神权、庇佑民众。

The Flame-Chasers fight together to defeat the Sky Titan, which has become a combined being of the god and a mortal. As they are trying to escape from the Eye of Twilight, the Dawn Device suddenly goes out, and Hyacine is forced to return the Coreflame early and remain in the sky to bear divine authority, becoming the protector of the people.
伴随着赛飞儿的离去，「诡计」神力消散，因其谎言得以维续的奥赫玛千年黎明结束了。圣城遭到黑潮无情入侵，强大的盗火行者也步步紧逼。

Following Cipher's death, the divine power of Trickery dissipates, and the thousand-year dawn of Okhema that is sustained by her lie comes to an end. The holy city is met with the merciless invasion of the black tide, as the powerful Flame Reaver moves in ever closer.
危急时刻，万敌、遐蝶、缇宝与缇宁、哈托努斯、圣城卫士、丹恒…所有人赌上性命，只为了救世主能够完成使命。最终，在安顿好我后，白厄独自踏入了创世涡心……

At this moment of crisis, Mydei, Castorice, Tribbie and Trinnon, Chartonus, the Holy City Guards, and Dan Heng... All lay their lives on the line so that the Deliverer would have a chance to complete his mission. After making sure that I would remain safe, Phainon enters the Vortex of Genesis alone...
{NICKNAME}阁下，请跟紧我们，去同丹恒大人会合。
{NICKNAME}, please stay close to us. We need to rendezvous with Lord Dan Heng.
我二人定将不遗余力，为您开道！
We will do everything in our power to clear the path for you!
There he is! Lord Dan Heng!
...{NICKNAME}!? What are you doing here? Where's Phainon?
说来话长，先应付那家伙吧！
It's a long story. Let's deal with that guy first!
We need to go, Dan Heng!
我们应白厄阁下的请求，要不计代价护送两位平安离开！
We are under Lord Phainon's orders to escort both of you to safety, no matter the cost!
这里交给我和圣城卫士…泽弗，你带他们走！
Leave this to me and the Holy City Guards... Zeph, take them and go!
那黑衣剑客似乎不太对劲？
That black-clad swordmaster... something seems off.
从刚才的某一刻起，它就忽然陷入僵直，一动不动。
At some point earlier, they suddenly froze in place... not moving at all.
Now's our chance to take them down!
不行，别贸然接近！那家伙外溢的黑焰十分滚烫。虽然不知道发生了什么，但离开才是上策。
No, don't get too close! That thing's black flames are burning hot. I don't know what's happening, but leaving is the best option.
No time to waste, let's get out of here.
嗯。虽然不知道发生了什么，但眼下撤离才是上策。
Right. We don't know exactly what's happening, but retreating is the safest choice right now.
不知是哪位半神为我们降下了奇迹…两位，请跟我们走吧！
I don't know which demigod graced us with this miracle... Please, come with us!
那家伙外溢的黑焰，十分危险。
That thing's black flames are extremely dangerous.
盗火行者没有追来…真的是某种奇迹显灵了么？
The Flame Reaver isn't pursuing us... Could this really be some kind of divine intervention?
两位阁下，此地不宜久留。缇宁大人的百界门就在城外大道——继续前进吧。
We can't stay here for long. Lady Trinnon's Century Gate is just outside the city — let's keep moving.
我还是觉得应该有人留下…
I still feel like someone should stay behind...
我同意你的看法。但白厄…一定也经过了许多挣扎才做出这番安排。
I agree. But Phainon... he must have struggled a lot before making this decision.
Is this... really what Trailblazing is supposed to be?
我们在翁法罗斯的经历远超预想，如果只是为了补充燃料，目的肯定达成了。但你说得没错……
Our experience in Amphoreus has far exceeded expectations. If our goal was just to replenish fuel, then mission accomplished. But you're right...
就这样离开，我会十分遗憾。
Leaving like this... I'll definitely regret it.
我…其实也一样。应当有人留下，和白厄一起完成「再创世」。
I... feel the same. Someone should stay and help Phainon complete Era Nova.
先和列车取得联系，再讨论下一步行动吧。这是最稳妥的做法，我们也需要更多信息。
For now, let's get back in contact with the Express and plan our next move. That's the safest course of action. We need more information.
关于此事，我还有一个提议——
On that note, I have a proposal—
希望能传达给两位「无名客」。
I hope to convey a message to the two "Nameless."
是谁？！退下，我命令你，保持十步距离！
Who are you!? Stand down! I order you to maintain a distance of ten paces!
冷静，卫士！面前这位不是敌人。
It's okay, guard. This one is not our enemy.
许久未见，星穹列车的无名客。
It has been a while, Nameless of the Astral Express.
我很庆幸能及时赶到，阻止那名黑衣人对二位做出更多伤害。
I'm glad I arrived in time to stop that black-clad one from harming you further.
很高兴见到熟悉的面孔。
It's good to see some familiar faces.
能发现两位的行踪，我和黑塔女士也倍感幸运，{NICKNAME}{F#女士}{M#先生}。
It was fortunate we found you in time. Madam Herta and I were both quite relieved, {NICKNAME}.
没想到列车组找了天才当外援…
Never thought the Express Crew would bring in a genius for backup...
正是。黑塔女士邀请我与诸位无名客进行了会晤，请放心，{NICKNAME}{F#女士}{M#先生}。
Indeed. Madam Herta invited me to meet with you Nameless. Rest assured, {NICKNAME}.
状况越来越让人摸不着头脑了…
Things are getting more confusing by the minute...
请您放心，{NICKNAME}{F#女士}{M#先生}。黑塔女士同我正是为了翁法罗斯而来。
Rest assured, {NICKNAME}. Madam Herta and I have come here for the sake of Amphoreus.
两位认识这个…安提基色拉人吗？他是来古士议员的同族？
You two know this... Antikytheran? Does he come from the same people as Councilor Lygus?
放心，卫士。眼前这位先生是来接应的「开拓」盟友。介意让我们单独聊聊吗？
Don't worry, guard. This gentleman is an ally of the Trailblaze. Would you mind giving us a moment to speak in private?
当然。我们会在一旁等候，请注意安全。
Of course. We'll wait nearby. Please stay safe.
我充分理解各位的处境，眼下我能做的，也只有暂时冻结那名黑衣人的行动。时间有限。所以，我将以最简洁的措辞归结来意——
I fully understand your situation. For now, the only thing I can do is temporarily freeze that black-clad one in place. Time is limited. So, I'll keep this brief—
两位所在之地，翁法罗斯，<color=#dbc291ff>是一个由数据和忆质构建的世界，一位星神的实验场。</color>
The place where you stand, Amphoreus, <color=#dbc291ff>is a world constructed from data and memoria, an experimental field of a certain Aeon.</color>
而如今，这个与世隔绝的沙盒世界正在急速坠入第三道命途——<color=#dbc291ff>「毁灭」。</color>
And now, this isolated sandbox world is rapidly falling into a third Path — <color=#dbc291ff>Destruction</color>.
结论：假如放任翁法罗斯的进程不受限制地推移……
Conclusion: If Amphoreus continues unchecked on this course...
<color=#dbc291ff>一位「绝灭大君」将完成进化、蜕变，自汹涌的潮汐中诞生。你我熟知的银河，将承受不可逆转的打击。</color>
<color=#dbc291ff>A Lord Ravager will complete its evolution and metamorphosis, and emerge from the surging tides. The cosmos as we know it will suffer irreversible consequences.</color>
这位大君意图引发的灾祸，也许远比「罗浮」星核危机更为严重。因为它的目标……
The disaster that this Lord Ravager intends to trigger may be far more severe than the Luofu's Stellaron Crisis. Because its goal is...
正是。若现实如测算的那样，一路向着最恶劣的可能性发展，后果不堪设想。因为这位大君的目标……
Affirmative. If everything unfolds toward the worst possible outcome as predicted, the consequences will be unimaginable. Because the Lord Ravager's goal is...
略去个中繁杂的推演，我向二位提出请求：为阻止「毁灭」的怒火席卷寰宇，恳请一位无名客能留在翁法罗斯，承担内应。

Putting aside the complex details of the inferences involved, I have a request to make, for one of you Nameless, to stay behind on Amphoreus, acting as an informant, in order to prevent the wrath of Destruction from ravaging the cosmos.
这个世界被难以言明的「防火墙」笼罩，时间的流速也和现实不同，我和黑塔女士只能撕开一道缝隙，将影像投射进内部。
This world is enveloped in a "firewall" that defies explanation, and the flow of time here is also different from reality. Madam Herta and I can only tear open a gap and project images inside.
但——抛开车厢坠毁的意外——两位却成功降落在此地，这背后一定有尚未被参透的原理。
However — the accidental crash landing of the Express Car notwithstanding — both of you were able to successfully land here. There must be some principle behind this we have yet to fully grasp.
揭秘需要时间。在那之前，若有一位无名客愿意留下，见证世界的命运，或在必要时推动其进程——将会是莫大的帮助。

It will take time to uncover the reason. Before then, if one of the Nameless is willing to stay and witness the fate of this world — or to push it along when necessary — it would be of great assistance.
螺丝先生，我相信你，所以只想确认一件事：翁法罗斯已经面临末日，留下来的人要如何保障安全？
Mr. Screwllum, I believe you, so I only have one thing I'd like to confirm with you. As Amphoreus is already facing its end, how can we guarantee the safety of the person who stays behind?
出于一些原因，我不建议这么做。
There are reasons for which I must recommend against such a course of action.
螺丝先生，我相信你，所以只想确认一件事：翁法罗斯已经面临末日，留下来的人要如何保障安全？
Mr. Screwllum, I believe you, so I only have one thing I'd like to confirm with you. As Amphoreus is already facing its end, how can we guarantee the safety of the person who stays behind?
Look at this, if you would—
这是名为「识刻锚」的奇物，二位可以将其视作<color=#dbc291ff>「智识」世界中的界域定锚。</color>
This Curio is called a "Chronocognitive Anchor." The two of you may view it as <color=#dbc291ff>a kind of Space Anchor in the world of Erudition</color>.
只要随身携带，个体的数据结构就能得到保护，不受激烈的数字海啸影响。必要时，它也能成为内外沟通的桥梁。

As long as you carry it with you, your individual data structure will be protected and will remain unaffected by the influence of digital tsunamis. When required, it can also serve as a bridge for communications between the internal and external world.
当然█它并非█无限使用的奇物█只能为一人持有
Of course, ███ it is not ███ Curio with unlimited uses ███ may only be held by one person
链接█ █受到█ 影响，决定█ █尽快█
The connection ███ being ███ interfered with, decide ███ quickly as possible ████
其一：█ ██ <color=#dbc291ff>名为██来古士 █ 的智械█可能██ 是一切的元凶 █</color>
One: <color=#dbc291ff>The Intellitron ██████ named ███████ Lygus ████ possibly █████ the primary culprit behind everything ██████</color>
——<color=#dbc291ff>三月小姐██ 已经█ 被██ 卷入██ 翁法罗斯█</color>
—<color=#dbc291ff>Miss March █████ has ████ already been ████ drawn into ███ Amphoreus██</color>
人家觉得，你好像若有所思？
Something seems to be bothering you.
(The Vortex of Genesis... we made it back.)
(Phainon... is he ready for Era Nova?)
丹恒一个人回去，有点担心。
I hope Dan Heng will be okay heading back on his own.
哎呀，这种情况，应该是他更担心你才对吧？安心，人家会替他守护你的！
If anything, he's the one worried about you! But I'm here to watch over you now!
要不还是叫上丹恒一起…
Maybe Dan Heng should be here...
…现在说这个，怕不是有些晚啦。
...It's a bit late for that now, isn't it?
无论如何，我们得走到最后。
No matter what, we need to see it through the end.
是啊，真是一段好长好长的路呢……
Yeah... we've come such a long way...
如果和那位机器先生说的一样，翁法罗斯注定会走向「毁灭」的结局…那人家也要陪伴在你身边，直到最后一刻。
If what that machine gentleman said is true, if Amphoreus is destined for destruction... then I'll stay by your side until the very end.
毕竟，就像列车之于你和丹恒…翁法罗斯也是人家的故乡呀。
Like how you and Dan Heng treasure the Express... Amphoreus means everything to me.
Time to see the Era Nova begin.
嗯！我们一起，去见证最后一颗火种归位吧！
Right! Time to see the last Coreflame restored!
…而你，白厄阁下，将用那枚火种埋葬旧世，将万物带入一片灰色的未知——
But you, Lord Phainon, will bury the old world with that Coreflame, bringing all things into a gray unknown...
——无妨。残酷的逐火已经让我抛弃了幻想，未来不可能是一片沐浴着西风的理想乡，静候着我们踏入其中……
It doesn't matter. This cruel Flame-Chase Journey has made me abandon my fantasies. The future is not a paradise with a gentle west wind, waiting for us to step in...
如果等在前方的是一团混沌，那就由我将它撕裂……
If what lies ahead is a mass of chaos, I will tear it apart...
...Then usher in the first ray of blazing sunlight.
面对身后一线生机，却还是毅然选择向前。
With one last chance to turn back, you still step forward.
This is the path I must take.
呵呵，实不相瞒，我也怀抱着同样的想法而来。
As it happens, I find myself thinking the exact same thing.
世界临近溃灭，{RUBY_B#缇里西庇俄丝}万径之践行人{RUBY_E#}也已拥抱各自的命运……
As our world nears its end, {RUBY_B#Tribios}the ones who walk the infinite paths{RUBY_E#} have embraced their destiny...
身为神礼观众，我有义务见证世界的未来，并代她们主持最后的火种仪式——
As the Theoros, it is my duty to witness the world's future and oversee this final Coreflame ritual on their behalf—
The Trial of Worldbearing — The ritual of Era Nova.
螺丝咕姆说你是幕后黑手。
Screwllum says you're behind all this.
呵，原来如此。在我介入并抹去他渗透的痕迹前，{NICKNAME}阁下已经与我那位同胞相遇了啊。
Ah, I see. So you met my kindred spirit before I could erase his traces.
这个家伙，他一定知道很多。
This one knows more than he's telling.
把秘密从他嘴里撬出来吧！
我也曾有疑惑，为何一位土生土长的安提基色拉人，竟然懂得维修天外的载具？
I've had my suspicions. How does a native Antikytheran know so much about repairing vehicles from beyond the sky?
来古士阁下——有关「再创世」的一切，你究竟了解多少？请如实相告！
Lord Lygus — How much do you truly know about Era Nova? Tell us everything!
如此说来，我已无需再维持这「神礼观众」的伪装。你渴求真相，白厄阁下——你亦将得到真相。
Very well, I need no longer maintain this Theoros masquerade. You seek truth, Lord Phainon — and truth you shall have.
诚如诸位所知：当旧日的神明倒下，需要有人扛起断裂的支柱，填补神职空缺。为此，背负神权者必须战胜试炼，证明自己的资质。
As you know, when the old gods fell, someone had to bear their broken pillars, to fill the vacant seats. Those who would assume divine authority must prove themselves through trials.
然而，对刻法勒的半神而言，战胜试炼的可能性始终为零。因为「负世」之试炼正是神职本身——「再创世」并「肩负世界」——除非倒下，否则永无止境。

Yet, for Kephale's demigods, the possibility of overcoming the trials has forever been nonexistent. For the "Worldbearing" trial is the divine duty itself — bringing forth the "Era Nova" and bearing its weight is an endless ordeal, ceasing only upon collapse.
没错：「再创世」仪式并非顷刻就能完成的仪式，而是一场漫长的苦旅。当其他半神的牺牲之旅在此世告结，刻法勒则必须背负诸神火种，背负全世记忆，始终挺立……

Precisely: The "Era Nova" ritual is not something that can be completed in an instant. No, but a long and arduous journey. While the sacrificial journeys of other demigods conclude in this world, Kephale must shoulder the gods' Coreflames, bear the memories of all worlds, and stand unwavering...
直到来世…黑潮将负世者和他肩头的一切彻底吞噬为止。
Until the next world... when the black tide consumes the Bearer and all that they carry, leaving nothing behind.
...Unless their Coreflame finds a new bearer.
映照全世的圣火已在阁下手中。如今所要做的，不过一个抉择……
The holy flame that illuminates all worlds rests in your hands. All that remains is one choice...
照料它，并向后世呈递；亦或是就此将其掐灭？
Nurture it, pass it on to future generations, or extinguish it here and now?
救世主，全世的命运由您亲自定夺。
Deliverer, the fate of all worlds rests in your hands.
不用再多试探了，我心意已决。
Enough testing. I've made my decision.
但在为来世破晓引火前，我需要你的承诺——两个承诺。
But before I ignite the dawn of the next world, you need to promise me something — two things, actually.
我要你告诉我：那刻夏老师对「新世界」的描绘确凿无疑。世界将依我的记忆再造，生者和死者都将重生为最初的人类，与他们前世无异……

Promise me this: Professor Anaxa's vision of the "New World" is absolute. The world will be reborn from my memories, all souls, living and dead, will return as the first humans, unchanged from their past lives...
还有我的同伴——殉道的半神们，他们会跨越轮回，成为新生的泰坦。英雄们的牺牲不会白费。
And my friends — the fallen demigods, they shall transcend the cycle to become new Titans. Our heroes shall not have died in vain.
Of course. This I can guarantee.
告诉我：{NICKNAME}能不为翁法罗斯的规则制约，平安返回{F#她}{M#他}的家乡。
Promise me {NICKNAME} can return safely to {M#his}{F#her} homeland, unbound by Amphoreus's laws.
…很遗憾，我无法对此做出回应。如你方才所说，{M#他}{F#她}已接过「岁月」的权柄……
...My apologies, but I cannot promise this. As you mentioned, {F#s}he now bears the Time Titan's authority...
{M#His}{F#Her} bonds with this world run too deep.
No need to worry, I have a plan.
Trust me, initiate the Era Nova.
哦…是我见识浅薄了。看来，身为天外之人，{M#他}{F#她}的确有超越命运的手段。
Well... I stand corrected. An outsider like {M#him}{F#her} does have ways to defy destiny.
…感谢你们为这个世界所付出的一切，伙伴。即便来世无人记念，我也一定会铭记在心。
...Thank you, my friends, for everything you've done for this world. Though the next world may not remember, I shall never forget.
以神礼观众之名，我见到：翁法罗斯已选择了她的命运。
As the Theoros, I declare: Amphoreus has determined her path.
上前来，英雄们——请将她的命运付诸实现吧。
Step forward, heroes — follow her path and see it through.
在此世行将终结之际——以神礼观众之名，向您致意。
As our world draws its final breath... I stand before you as the Theoros.
Before we begin... there's something I need to know.
请允许我重新自我介绍：我名为吕枯耳戈斯，过去是为奥赫玛元老院的名誉元老。身为「神礼观众」，我将见证并捍卫奥赫玛全体公民自由，直到最后一刻。
Allow me to reintroduce myself. I am Lycurgus, once an honored elder of the Okhema Council. As the Theoros, I have sworn to watch over and protect every citizen of Okhema until the very end.
当然，我知道仅是这样的回答不能满足阁下的好奇心。因此，我愿附上这样一条信息——它对翁法罗斯而言并无价值，但对您这样的天外行者则意义重大。
Of course, that alone won't satisfy your curiosity. So let me share something more... something that means little to Amphoreus, but everything to a traveler like yourself.
<color=#dbc291ff>吕枯耳戈斯是万千「智识」行者的一员：它代博识尊将目光投向此地，以免翁法罗斯落入衰败的命运。</color>
<color=#dbc291ff>I, Lycurgus, am one of the Erudition's many pathstriders. Through me, Nous keeps watch over this realm, working to save Amphoreus from decay.</color>
我不求凭只言片语能换取阁下的信任，但请至少相信：从宏观角度而言，你我所行的道路并无区别。
I don't expect you to trust me based on words alone. But believe this much: When you look at the bigger picture, we're walking the same path, you and I.
呵呵…就算圣城将我奉为权要，然而之于天地，我也不过渺然一身，所能及者量小力微。
Ah... While the holy city may honor me, I'm but a humble speck before the cosmos. My reach... is limited.
我充分理解阁下如今满腹疑问。对此，我只能向您如此作保——
Your doubts are natural. Let me assure you of this—
那过去的，我已如实陈述；那未来的，我将公平见证。对于神礼观众之名，还有翁法罗斯和她的命运，我问心无愧。
What's done, I've told truthfully. What's to come, I'll witness fairly. My conscience is clear... to my role as the Theoros, to Amphoreus and her destiny.
你和螺丝咕姆是什么关系？
于我眼中，这世间一切不以血肉为基的生命皆同根同源——我们都诞生于宇宙间恒常且神圣的数学法则。
I believe, all synthetic life shares a common source — we're all children of the universe's eternal mathematical law.
接此逻辑，答案便已明朗：对我而言，那位天才是同胞，亦是「兄弟」。
So you see, the answer is simple: that brilliant mind is my kindred, a "brother," if you will.
就到这里吧，该完成仪式了。
Let's leave it at that. Time to complete the ritual.
世界将为您的奉献动容，开拓者。
The world will be moved by your sacrifice, Trailblazer.
It's time to complete the ritual.
世界将为您的奉献动容，开拓者。
The world will be moved by your sacrifice, Trailblazer.
如果没有你，我们根本无法迎来预言中的明天……
Without you, we could never have reached our prophesied tomorrow...
Thank you for walking this path with me to the end.
众神啊，看哪！翁法罗斯已完成了她的胜利，再创世即将到来——
Behold, O gods! Amphoreus has achieved her victory, and the Era Nova approaches—
那辉煌的灵魂已临到此地，行走过熙熙攘攘的黑夜；他携来黄金的火与血，胜利地步入白昼——
The radiant soul has arrived, having walked through the bustling nights, bearing the golden fire and blood, stepping with pride into daylight—
他是纯洁的孩童，向昨日、今日和明日的大道上走去——
He is the pure child, walking upon the path of yesterday, today, and tomorrow—
他是未生者之初生，他是无名者之初名——
He is the first to be born, first to be named among the nameless—
他的躯体是永恒，他的四肢是无尽，他将绵延的黑夜踏在脚下——
Eternal in form, limitless in reach, he treads the endless night underfoot—
他是诸王中的至高，流离者的牧人，将团结的人子高举于仇敌之上——
Greatest of kings, protector of the displaced, raising humanity's children above their adversaries—
熔金的苍穹在他的脊椎和肌腱中奔涌——
The firmament of molten gold courses through his very bones and flesh—
最壮丽的诡计也在他的呼吸与言辞里显形——
The greatest of schemes reveal against his breath and words—
在那美丽的新世界，耀眼黄金的湖水中，他将洁净身体——
In the golden lakes of that beautiful new world, he shall wash himself clean—
然后，就在那里，完成你我最初…也是最后的心愿……
There, finish what we first... and last wished for...
…为这个我们深爱的世界，写下不同以往的结局吧。
...To write an ending unlike any before for this world we so deeply love.
与白厄一起归还最后的火种。
Restore the final Coreflame with Phainon.
至此，让我们所有人为灭亡预备……
The time has come for us all to face oblivion...
或是踏上最后的伟大征程。
...or embark on one final grand journey.
话虽如此，这命题似乎有些宏大，该从何说起才好？
My, what a broad topic this is. Where shall we start?
有了。不妨从宇宙的起点开始吧，一场爆炸后，基本粒子诞生，演化出万事万物……
Got it. Let's start at the very beginning. The big bang, the birth of particles, the emergence of all things...
呵呵。开个玩笑，我想说的是，无论时间、空间、物质…所有概念，都仰赖你我的认识而存在。这便是「智识」，若没有它，宇宙只是本混沌的书，在偶然中写成，却无读者品鉴。

Just kidding. What I mean to say is that time, space, matter... all concepts exist solely because we perceive them. This is called the "Erudition." Without it, the universe would merely be a chaotic book, written by chance, yet unread by anyone.
你熟悉的阿那克萨戈拉斯阁下，也提出过类似的观点：翁法罗斯的一切，都是凭借「智种」在后人的记忆中诞生。
As your acquaintance Lord Anaxagoras suggested: everything in Amphoreus exists through Nouspores, living in the memories of those yet to come.
多么奇妙的一致性啊，寥寥数笔就勾勒出了世界的真理。也只有他能解明「『我们』究竟为何物」这一课题。
How beautifully it aligns, revealing universal truth in such simple terms. Only he could solve the riddle of "what exactly are we"?
可是，还记得么？即便成为了理性的化身，他仍有一道未能解答的难题……
Oh, but you'll remember, even as the embodiment of Reason, one mystery remained beyond his grasp...
「那末…最初的智种，又要在谁人的记忆中生根发芽呢？」
"If that is the case, whose memories did the very first Nouspore sprout from?"
就像古往今来，无数贤人向众神的发问。
As Sages across ages have asked the gods.
当然，我不准备探讨树庭的哲学，不妨把视线投向更远处吧。超脱于翁法罗斯，那被世人称作禁忌的天外……
But let's set aside the Grove's teachings for now, look further, past Amphoreus, to what they call the forbidden realms beyond the sky...
您，可曾听闻过「学派战争」？
Do you know of the "Scholars' Strife"?
在那场壮绝的，以「智识」为名义的残酷战争中，一位天才的遗产被尽数摈弃，零落在银河间。
During that grand yet brutal war waged in the name of the Erudition, a genius's legacy was abandoned, strewn across the cosmos.
那是名为「权杖」的，凡人难以想象的宏观演算阵列。它为模拟星神的思考而诞生，又在诞生的一瞬成了星神思考的组成。它们遍布寰宇，宛如<color=#dbc291ff>博识尊的天体神经元</color>。

The "Scepters," a macrocosmic computational array beyond mortal comprehension... Made to emulate the Aeon's thoughts, it became part of the Aeon's cognition at birth. Scattered throughout the cosmos, these arrays <color=#dbc291ff>act as Celestial-Body Neurons for Nous</color>.
可是很遗憾，最终「智识」抛弃了它们。此事人人皆知。
But regrettably, as everyone knows, the Erudition forsook them all.
但为人所不知的是：被遗忘的它们，仍在孜孜不倦地求解那神明的一问。那道穷尽战火与浩劫，无数天才——连同两位机械帝皇在内——都未能得证的难题……

But what nobody knows is that, though forgotten, they never stopped seeking the divine answer. A question that survived war and disaster, stumping even the greatest minds — including both Mechanical Emperors...
呵呵，这下您终于要踏入「翁法罗斯」的真相了。
Now, we come to the real truth of Amphoreus.
如果——我是说如果——有一台权杖完成了对<color=#dbc291ff>「生命第一因」</color>的解答……
What if — hypothetically — a Scepter found the answer to <color=#dbc291ff>"the prime mover of life"</color>...
如果在那空虚、冰冷而孤独的演算尽头，被「智识」星神标定的失败者，却用极其漫长的时光，亲身完成了证明……
If through endless solitary extrapolations in the cosmic cold, the one deemed as a failure by the Aeon of Erudition found proof through the ages...
试问：结果会如何？答案或许出乎意料地简单。
What would happen? Perhaps the answer is simpler than you'd think.
<color=#dbc291ff>它从垂死的神经元，升格为了真正的「生命」。而赐予它新生的，是另一尊星神的瞥视。</color>
<color=#dbc291ff>From a perishing neuron, it evolved into true "life," reborn through the gaze of another Aeon.</color>
…这是发生在久远过去、无人知晓，甚至连诸位天才都不曾听闻的轶事。
...This is a tale from the distant past, unknown to all, even unheard by the greatest geniuses.
至此，请容我暂且搁置那台权杖的故事。回到最初的话题，所谓「生命的第一因」，它究竟是为何物？
Now, let's leave the Scepter's story here. Returning to where we began: What is "the prime mover of life"?
其实，您已经对那答案无比熟悉。
Actually, you know the answer better than you realize.
它就在您身旁，陪伴您走过了这段漫长的征途。
It's been by your side, accompanying you throughout this long journey.
此刻，它就在前方，等待着您……
Right now, it awaits you ahead...
在那创世的终点过后，美丽的新世界里。
In that brave new world, beyond the end of Genesis.
Phainon... is he going to be alright?
请相信他拯救奥赫玛的决心。
Believe in his resolve to save Okhema.
带着这份愿望走下去吧…成为开启一切的人……
Take this wish with you... Be the one who begins it all...
诚如神谕所示：<color=#dbc291ff>「汝将肩负骄阳，直至灰白的黎明显著」</color>……
As the prophecy foretold: <color=#dbc291ff>"You will bear the blazing sun, until the pale dawn breaks"</color>...
<color=#dbc291ff>走下去…背负这个世界…直到…灰白的英雄…无名的救世主…带来黎明……</color>
<color=#dbc291ff>Continue onward... bearing this world upon your shoulders... until the ashen hero... the nameless Deliverer ushers in the dawn...</color>
总觉得…不是第一次做这样的梦了。可醒来以后，什么也回想不起来。
Strange... like I've dreamed this before. But it all slips away when I wake.
只记得一个声音…到底是谁在呼唤呢…？
Only a voice remains... who was that...?
原来是你啊，好伙伴…不好意思，一不小心睡着了。
Ah, it's you... Whoops, fell asleep there.
我好像做了个怪梦。想不起来，先不管了。阳光正好啊！一天才刚开始呢。
What a strange dream I had. It's gone now though. But look! Perfect sunshine! The day's still young!
走吧，伙伴，我们找昔涟去。昨天约好了，再陪她看一次「神谕牌」。算算时间，差不多是时候了……
Let's go find Cyrene, partner. We promised to be there for her oracle card reading today. It's right about time...
看你这样子，是还没睡醒啊。这样吧，你先吹吹风，清醒一下。我在边上等你。
Looking at you, someone's still half asleep. Tell you what, catch some fresh air first. I'll hang around here.
The Era Nova... is it done?
如何？阁下所见的风景，正是背负{RUBY_B#负世之泰坦}刻法勒{RUBY_E#}火种的无名英雄的故乡：<color=#dbc291ff>哀丽秘榭</color>。
Beautiful, isn't it? This is <color=#dbc291ff>Aedes Elysiae</color>, home of the nameless hero who carried {RUBY_B#Worldbearing Titan}Kephale{RUBY_E#}'s Coreflame.
当他还是一名稚嫩的少年时，这少年心中，萌发过一连串英雄主义的幻想：他时而畅想手中的木剑是一柄沉铁……
When he was young and innocent, he had heroic dreams, imagining his wooden sword was forged of iron...
时而畅想木棍支着的稻草人，是传说中一根血管贯穿脊背到脚跟的巨人……
...pretending the straw dummy propped up by a wooden pole was a giant with a single blood vessel running from spine to heel...
时而畅想自己会打倒巨人，成为守护世界的英雄——当然，对于年幼的他，<color=#dbc291ff>「世界」只是这小小的村庄。</color>
...dreaming of slaying the giant and becoming a hero to save the world — though to his young mind, <color=#dbc291ff>the "world" was just this small village</color>.
阁下很敏锐。不错，您看见的这段回忆，正是他迈向新世界的开篇……
Sharp as ever. Indeed, these memories you witness are the first steps of his journey...
这和再创世有什么关系？
How does this connect to Era Nova?
您看见的这段回忆，正是他迈向新世界的开篇。而其中，我承诺阁下的戏份一定不会少……
What you witness is the start of his path to a new world. And trust me, you play no small part...
看不出，他以前这么中二。
I had no idea he used to be so chuuni.
阁下的幽默感一如既往。我的故事并非滑稽之谈，而是他迈向新世界的开篇……
Witty as always. But this is more than just a funny story. It's the start of his path...
这是男人最初的记忆。为免您枯坐席间，我希望阁下将其视作一场「沉浸式戏剧」……
These are his first memories. Rather than watching, why not join in? Think of it as "immersive theater"...
<color=#dbc291ff>扮作贯穿白厄一生中最重要的伙伴，一位始终指引其前进、却不曾在翁法罗斯历史中留名的「无名英雄」，在最佳位置欣赏这段旅程。</color>

<color=#dbc291ff>Become his lifelong closest friend, witnessing his hero's journey from the best seat in the house, as the nameless hero whose unwavering guidance shaped Phainon's destiny, yet whose name was never recorded in Amphoreus's history.</color>
什么人能贯穿他的一生？
Who could possibly be there his entire life?
What exactly do I need to do?
呵呵，阁下心中一定有许多疑问。不妨先跟上他的脚步吧。
Questions, questions... Let's follow along and find out, shall we?
在这{RUBY_B#岁月之泰坦}永夜之帷{RUBY_E#}包裹的小村庄，还有很多秘密在等待被发掘……
Many mysteries lurk in this village beneath the {RUBY_B#Time Titan}Veil of Evernight{RUBY_E#}...
随着剧目徐徐展开，相信阁下的困惑一定能迎刃而解。
Your questions will find answers as the story unfolds.
哎呀？这么急匆匆地过来，小秋千都被吓到啦，一晃一晃……
Goodness! Look at you rushing about... you've got the poor swing all startled...
Hmm... There's something oddly unfamiliar about this.
有种似曾相识的感觉呢♪
Something wrong? What do you see?
嗯～没什么，只是…忽然有种莫名的心灵感应？
Oh~ nothing much, just... suddenly felt a strange connection.
哎呀，你脑袋上怎么还有落叶。难道又躺在树上睡觉了，还是麦田？收拾干净再出门呀。
Look at you, leaves in your hair! Were you sleeping in a tree again, or was it the wheat fields this time? At least brush yourself off before wandering around.
我都长大了，只有你还把我当小孩子……
Come on, I'm not a kid anymore, you're the only one who still treats me like one...
是吗？虽然你的个头比我要高，但论成熟，我可远胜于你呢。
Sure, sure. You may have the height advantage, but when it comes to maturity? I'm leagues ahead of you.
喜欢幻想那些英雄故事，把自己当成里面的角色，可不是大人会做出的举动呀。
Still fantasizing about being in heroic adventures and imagining yourself as one of the characters. That's the kind of thing kids do, not grown-ups.
你说是吧？既然又在陪他胡闹…今天的人设是什么？
Don't you agree? And since you're playing along with his antics... who are you pretending to be today?
咳，好吧。{F#她}{M#他}今天…人设应该还没想好。
*awkward cough* Well... {F#s}he hasn't decided on a character for today yet.
那不如就用先前的吧：从异邦漂流过来，和你订下剑艺修习契约的勇者？
How about we stick with the usual? You know, the valiant hero from a distant shore who made a pact to learn the sword from you?
咳，好吧。{F#她}{M#他}今天是…「星核猎手」。
「心和猎手」？你是准备捕获谁的心呢，嗯？
Steal-a-heart Hunter? Planning to steal someone's heart, are we?
怎么又换身份了？明明不久前还是从异邦漂流过来，和你订下剑艺修习契约的勇者……
Switching roles again? What happened to being the valiant hero from a distant shore who made that solemn pact to learn the sword...
你好，我是银河无敌球棒侠。
Greetings. I'm the Invincible Galactic Baseballer!
咳，好吧。{F#她}{M#他}今天是…「银河无敌球棒侠」。
*clearing throat* Uh... today {F#s}he's going with "Invincible Galactic Baseballer."
怎么又换身份了？明明不久前还是从异邦漂流过来，和你订下剑艺修习契约的勇者……
Switching roles again? What happened to being the valiant hero from a distant shore who made that solemn pact to learn the sword...
Spare me! Can we not bring this up?
对了，不是说要看神谕牌吗？都好久没玩占卜游戏了，怎么今天突然想起来？
Speaking of which, what about those oracle cards? We haven't done divination in forever. Why the sudden interest?
正要和你说呢：不久前，我在秋千上睡甜甜的觉，做了个奇怪的梦……
I was just about to tell you. Earlier, while napping on the swing, I had the strangest dream...
那梦里，一直有个模糊的声音，似乎在呼唤什么。
There was this mysterious voice in my dream, calling out for something...
嗯…你也是吗？难怪醒来以后，总觉得心里惴惴不安呢。
Yes... you too? That would explain this lingering sense of unease...
于是，我想起了小时候常玩的「神谕牌」——虽然{RUBY_B#岁月之泰坦}欧洛尼斯{RUBY_E#}神谕总是解读不准就是啦。
Which made me think of those old oracle cards I used to play with as a kid — though the {RUBY_B#Time Titan}Oronyx{RUBY_E#} prophecies were always hit or miss.
孩子们要是抽到「君王」或「勇士」之类的好牌就欢呼雀跃，抽到「魔人」或者「酒鬼」就嚷嚷着这次不算，再来一次……
Yeah, all the kids would get so excited drawing cards like "Ruler" or "Warrior," but throw fits over "Devil" or "Drunkard" and demand a redo.
想反悔就反悔…能占卜出真东西来吗？
If you just redo it when you don't like the result... what's the point of divination?
孩子总是幸福的，觉得神明注意不到哀丽秘榭的小角落，会对我们睁一只眼、闭一只眼……
Ah, the blessing of childhood. Believing the gods might not notice our little corner of Aedes Elysiae, willing to let our small deceits slide...
但…命运从来都是确凿不移。毕竟我们也不知道神谕里的未来，究竟是多远以后。
Still... fate is absolute. After all, we never really know just how far into the future the prophecy extends.
总之，先去以前大家的「秘密基地」，把神谕牌找出来吧——
Anyway, let's go to our old "secret base" and look for those oracle cards—
Um... now where did we hide those...
我倒是还能想起几个地点…来，我们一起去看看吧？
I can think of a few spots... Let's go check it out.
阳光下的谷仓，散发着麦子烂熟的气味。从麦草堆里翻出了松鼠们囤积的各类果实，还有…一个缺胳膊少腿的木头小人。
In the sunlit barn, amid the scent of ripened wheat, they found various fruits hoarded by squirrels, and... a wooden figurine missing arms and legs.
我雕刻到一半的小兵人？居然真的还在……
My unfinished little soldier? After all these years...
等等，这不是当年被皮西厄斯老师没收的那个么？嘿，这下总算又团圆了……
Hey, this is the one Mrs. Pythias confiscated! Finally back in my hands...
白厄，昔涟？你们往哪里去呢？
Phainon, Cyrene? Where are you two headed?
说什么来什么…皮西厄斯老师？学校放学了吗？
Speak of the devil... Mrs. Pythias? Is school out already?
呵呵，今天没开课呢。清晨用落叶向{RUBY_B#岁月之泰坦}欧洛尼斯{RUBY_E#}问了一卜，说是孩子们今天容易受伤，就干脆给大家放假了。
No classes today. This morning, I used fallen leaves for a reading, seeking {RUBY_B#Time Titan}Oronyx{RUBY_E#}'s wisdom. They warned of potential injuries, so I gave everyone a holiday.
正好，最近正是农忙的时候，就算不上课还有别的事要做。
Besides, it's harvest season. There's plenty of other work to be done even without classes.
哀丽秘榭的小校舍只有您一位老师，是太辛苦了。
With you being our only teacher in Aedes Elysiae, you must be working so hard.
都是为了学生，累点也没关系。
Anything for my students. I don't mind the work.
这次你们出远门，可要替老师去传说中的神悟树庭，见识见识真正的智慧园地啊……
When you travel far from here, you must visit the Grove of Epiphany for me, to see what a true haven of wisdom looks like...
…话说回来，这谷仓里是有什么宝贝不成？看你们翻了半天了。
...By the way, what are you looking for in here? You've been searching quite thoroughly.
谢谢你， 好伙伴！小兵人，咱们回家！
Thank you, my friend! Time to take our soldier home!
这是…玩具？真是，多大个人了还玩玩具。
Is this... a toy? Really now, aren't we past the age for these?
不记得了？那好，我可要带小兵人回家啦。
She doesn't remember, eh? This little soldier's coming with me.
报告老师，是白厄的玩具！
这是…玩具？真是，多大个人了还玩玩具。
Is this... a toy? Really now, aren't we past the age for these?
不记得了？那好，我可要带小兵人回家啦。
She doesn't remember, eh? This little soldier's coming with me.
好了好了，我先走了。晚上说不好要下雨，你们也早点回家吧！
Alright then, I should be going. It might rain tonight, so don't stay out too late!
课堂上雕的木头人，原来是藏到了这里，这可真是连我也不知道的秘密呀。
So this is where the wooden figurine you carved during class ended up. And here I thought I knew all your hiding spots.
别说你，我都忘得一干二净了……
To be honest, I'd forgotten all about it myself...
It's mine. I caught it fair and square!
白厄哥哥，昔涟姐姐，你们来看！我钓上来一个好大好沉的玻璃瓶！
Phainon, Cyrene, come quick! Look at this huge bottle I just caught!
是我的！鱼竿是我的，只是借给你用一下，所以钓上来的东西也算我的。
Give it here! My rod, my catch. I only let you borrow it, remember?
哦，什么好东西争来争去的？来让我看看……
What's got you two so worked up? Here, show me...
呃，是我小时候写的许愿瓶…怎么会这么巧？
Wait a second... this is... This is my old Wish-In-A-Bottle! How did it end up here?
哇！白厄哥哥小时候的心愿，我要看！
Ooh, I wanna see! What did little Phainon wish for?
饿了…回去吃饭！再见啦，大哥哥、大姐姐们！
Finally. I'm starving! See you later!
还以为扔到海水里的许愿瓶，能把我们的心愿带到哀丽秘榭外面的世界，或者能带来一些回音……
You know what's funny? I really thought tossing that bottle into the sea would carry our wishes beyond Aedes Elysiae... maybe even bring something back to us...
没想到…还是被海浪推了回来啊。
Never thought... the waves would end up pushing it back ashore.
童年的回旋镖还是飞回来了。
Funny how the past finds its way back.
别…就是些小孩子的胡言乱语，没什么好看的。
Don't bother... It's just some silly childish nonsense... Nothing worth reading.
Seems more like a lake to me than an ocean.
Ah... well, that would explain it. What a shame.
还没找过的地方…是欧洛尼斯的祝祭庭院？
The only place we haven't searched... is Oronyx's {RUBY_B#Sacrament Courtyard}ritual courtyard{RUBY_E#}?
绕了半天路，结果「秘密基地」就近在眼前么……
Some secret base. It was right here in front of us the whole time...
不好意思啦！就当是陪我出门散了个步，锻炼下身体吧？毕竟我不像你，每天运动量没那么充足。
Sorry! But look on the bright side, it was a nice walk! Unlike you, I don't have such a physically active routine.
小时候我们约定集合的地方无非两处：村子中间那座神像，还有这里。
Those were the days. We'd always meet either by that statue in the village or right here.
是呀！我还记得…你们喊我出去玩总是不走正门，爱翻墙，真是调皮！
Right! And I remember you never used the front door when you wanted me to come play. You always climbed over the wall. You were such mischief-makers!
像某个人一样，捉不准出现的时机，是吧？
Just like a certain someone who has a habit of showing up unexpectedly, right?
Can't pin me down, can you?
嘻！我猜猜，{F#她}{M#他}给出的是个调皮的答案。
Ha! I bet {F#s}he said something clever just now.
喔，已读不回啊，让人有点伤心呢。
Oh, giving me the silent treatment? How cruel!
咳，总之，这也是从故事书里学来的，英雄不走寻常路嘛。
*ahem* Hey, I was just copying those storybook heroes. They never take the beaten path!
不过，这里最近只有我一个人住，还好久没认真打理了，真让人害羞。这么多角落，该从哪里找起呢？
Still, it's embarrassing, I've been the only one here for a while, and I haven't kept up with the cleaning. With so many spots to check, where should we even start?
好久没去房顶了，也许那里能有所发现？上去找一找吧。
Come to think of it, I haven't checked the roof in forever. Worth a shot, right?
Leaves have taken over the courtyard...
知道，衣服被弄脏就不好了，让我来吧。
I know, I know. We wouldn't want your clothes getting dirty. Leave the dirty work to me.
That's not what I meant at all.
有这种地方吗？记忆里好像是有的，掉进去很深很深……
A cellar? I think I remember one... It was deep... so very deep...
如果是梦游仙境之类的幻想，和我的英雄故事也差不了多少啊。
Well, if we're talking wonderland stuff, it's not that different from my hero stories.
那我们分开行动吧，我在院子里找一找，阁楼上就交给你了。
Alright, let's split up. I'll handle the yard, you check the upper floor.
好伙伴，这里留给我，咱们比比谁先找到神谕牌。
Leave this to me, partner. Want to bet who finds the oracle cards first?
眼前的少女，带着捉摸不透的秘密，对你的态度非常可亲……
The girl before you carries an air of mystery, her secrets elusive, yet her demeanor toward you is exceptionally warm...
不禁引人思索：那份心灵感应莫非真的存在？
You can't help but wonder: Could there really be some kind of mental connection?
嗯…远远地望过去，还是熟悉的风景呀。
Mmm... the view here hasn't changed a bit.
要说哀丽秘榭最让人留恋的地方，除了大树下的秋千架，就是这儿了。
You know, besides the swing under the big tree, this has to be my favorite spot in all of Aedes Elysiae.
站在高处确实心情愉快。
It does lift your spirits, being up high.
让人忍不住想哼起儿时的歌谣呢……
You can't help but want to hum one of those old songs we used to sing...
「枝和叶为什么生长，风要向什么方向吹拂…♪」
"Why do leaves and branches grow, which way does the wind blow...♪"
The sea stretches out as far as the eye can see...
被连绵的山和海包围的哀丽秘榭，小时候还在纸上画过这里的风景。
I remember drawing Aedes Elysiae as a child, nestled between the sea and the mountains.
每次画到海的尽头就搁下笔了，完全想象不出那之外的世界是什么模样呢。
I'd always stop where the sky met the sea. The world beyond was just too vast to imagine.
呀！什么动静？小心一点啦……
Hey, what are you doing? Please be careful!
虽然我是村子里的小占卜师，不过暂时还没掌握让时间倒流的能力哦。
I'm just a small-time diviner. I can't turn back time if something happens!
因为自幼就能听见朦胧的神谕，村子里的人都说我是未来的{RUBY_B#欧洛尼斯}岁月{RUBY_E#}祭司。
They always said I'd become the next Priest of {RUBY_B#Oronyx}Time{RUBY_E#}, just because I heard prophecies as a child.
不过，占卜的次数多了，反倒会对命运产生迷茫。说着对神谕笃信不疑，但真要离开哀丽秘榭的话……
But here's the thing. The more divinations I do, the more doubt creeps in. I want to believe the prophecies, but actually leaving Aedes Elysiae...
不知停泊的那艘船，会把我们带到什么地方呢？
Where will that waiting ship take us, I wonder...
Here they are! The oracle cards—
Looks like he won this race.
怀念过去，是不是总会延误启程呢？
Guess reminiscing makes us take our time, doesn't it?
I was still taking in the scenery.
已经装在眼睛里啦，去到哪里都会珍藏，包括…童年的伙伴哦！
I've captured it all in my heart. This view, and most precious of all... my childhood friends!
来啦！果然冥冥之中，神明在聆听内心的声音啊。
There we go! Looks like the gods do listen to our thoughts.
找到了！看，这就是装神谕牌的盒子。
Here it is! This is the box where we kept the cards.
可是，牌不见了…是被谁拿走了吗？
But the cards are gone... Who could have taken them?
…哎？盒子底下盖着的，这是什么？
不不不，这很明显是被人掉包了……
No way, someone's switched them out...
一二三四五，丹恒打虚卒…
One, two, three, four, five... Dan Heng and Voidranger jive...
Hey, don't go changing the words!
我知道啦，那群神神秘秘的小家伙…没想到是它们在调皮捣蛋。
Ah, I see now! Those sneaky little ones... So that's what they've been up to.
The ones from Membrance Maze, you mean?
嗯，跟我来，到庭院后面去吧。
Yep. Let's head to the back of the courtyard.
The entrance should be around here somewhere...
就在这边～太久没去拜访小妖精们，连去迷境的路上都长满杂草，看不清了呢。
Right here~ The path to the Maze is hidden under all these weeds. It's been too long since we visited the fairies.
不记得了吗，伙伴？小时候我们常常去找他们玩呢。
Did you forget? We used to visit them all the time when we were little.
来吧，说干就干！先把眼前的杂草清理掉。
Alright, let's do this! These weeds need to go.
啊！对，入口就在那边，那个树洞——
There it is! The entrance — that hollow in the tree—
只要沿着树洞爬一小段距离，穿过最狭窄的地方，就到它们的栖息地「迷路迷境」啦。
Once you get through the tight squeeze in the hollow, you'll reach their dwelling, the Membrance Maze.
哈，真不知道我现在还能不能钻过去……
Haha, I wonder if I can still squeeze through there...
不如担心一下，自己会不会被小妖精们拒绝吧。毕竟，迷路迷境实行的是「邀请制」，只有天真无邪的孩子才能进入呢。
Maybe worry more about whether the fairies will let you in! After all the Membrance Maze has an "invitation-only" rule, only children with pure hearts are welcomed.
听上去像什么神秘俱乐部。
Sounds like some secret society, huh?
能被迷境的妖精认可，算是我们童年的最高荣誉了。
Getting approved by the Maze's fairies was like our childhood badge of honor.
那就由你来开路了，伙伴。
我有漫游签证，不怕拒签。
My Trailblazer Profile should get me in, right?
不管怎么说，先挑战一下树洞？
Regardless, how about we try getting through the hollow first?
What? Oh, um... sure, I'll go first...
不过这下…就只剩下我们咯？继续刚才的话题吗？
Looks like it's just us now... Care to finish that chat?
其实，从看见小妖精的可爱字条开始，我心中的预感就越发强烈……
To be honest, from the moment I saw the cute note left by the fairies, my intuition became even more certain...
也许，当我们再度踏入暌违多年的迷境，命运的齿轮就要开始转动了呢。
Perhaps when we step into the Maze again after all these years, the wheels of fate will finally start turning.
嗯…就当是少女的直觉吧。
你不会也是幕后黑手吧。
Don't tell me you're behind all this.
What if I am... what would you do?
开个玩笑，没有别的意思哦。
Just kidding, don't read too much into it!
齿轮一旦转动，就无法回头了…
Once the wheels start turning, there's no going back...
嗯…只是少女的直觉，未必会成真哦。
Oh... it's just a girl's intuition. It might not mean anything.
但，即便命运确凿不移，无论它要将世界带向何方，只要我们能够共同面对，那就没什么好害怕的，对吧？
But you know what? Even if fate is set on its path, no matter where it steers the world... If we're together, there's nothing to worry about, right?
嗯～算啦，没什么。如果命运果真开始流转…到时再请你听听我的请求吧♪
Ah~ forget it. If the wheels do begin to turn... that's when I'll make my request♪
Woah... look who's finally back memi!
小白，你怎么变得好高、好大、好帅气？远远看着，完全没认出来呢。
Snowy, you've grown so tall and dashing! I couldn't even tell it was you at first!
We had to grow up sometime.
唔…小涟倒是没怎么变呢，好神奇！
But look at Reney. She hasn't changed one bit! How fascinating!
说不定我和徕啦迷一样，都是迷境的小妖精呢？
Perhaps I'm like you, Relimem, just another fairy of the Maze?
Mem's... purple now? Did you dye your fur?
你是不是记错了？徕啦迷的毛发一直都是薰衣草色。
Dye? Relimem's always been this lovely shade of lavender.
So the Mems are like a organization?
组织？它们的纪律应该没那么森严…在我们来之前，大家连个像样的名字都没有呢。
An organization? Hardly. They're not that organized... They didn't even have proper names before we came along.
名字真是一个赛一个奇怪…
The names just keep getting weirder...
哈哈，可不是嘛。记得那会儿初来乍到，我光记名字就记了好几天。
Tell me about it! It took me forever to get all their names straight when I first came.
哆啦迷、徕啦迷、咪啦迷、发啦迷…呵，真是太久没见到这些可爱的小家伙了。
Dolimem, Relimem, Milimem, Falimem... Ah, I've missed these cute little troublemakers.
那时我们一起围着篝火边跳边唱，畅想未来的旅途如何精彩…时过境迁，要不是再次回到这里，那些画面都快要彻底被抛在脑后了啊。
We used to gather around the fire, singing and dancing, imagining all our future journeys... Without coming back here, those memories might've faded away entirely.
小白真敢说呢！当时你口口声声「一定不会忘记」，结果这么久没来，还是要把大家都忘掉了。
How could you, Snowy! You swore you wouldn't forget about us, but you were gone so long you almost did!
好啦，好啦。他只是在学故事里的吟游诗人多愁善感，才不会真的忘记大家呢。
Oh, he's just copying those bards from his stories, being all melodramatic. He couldn't forget about you all even if he tried.
我们这次来，是为了找回「神谕牌」。你知道它去哪里了吗？
Actually, we're here for the oracle cards. Have you seen them?
神谕牌！当然知道了，就是村长大人要我们把它带回来的。
Oh, the oracle cards! Right, the chief asked us to get those!
它要神谕牌做什么？如果想占卜，直接告诉我就好了呀。
What do they need the cards for? If they want a reading, they could just ask me.
这个就不清楚了…但村长大人似乎很想亲自见你们一面来着。
I'm not sure... but Chief specifically wanted to meet with you all.
「枝和叶为什么生长，风要向什么方向吹拂……」
"Why do leaves and branches grow, which way does the wind blow..."
「迷路迷境的最深处，揭晓未来答案的地方。」
"In Membrance Maze depths we seek to find, the answers future left behind."
呵呵…孩子们，真是久违了。
Hehe... welcome back, my dear children.
还以为你是粉色的迷迷。
I thought you'd be a pink Mem.
粉色…在我印象里，迷路迷境似乎从来没有过粉色的妖精，不知道多哆啦迷有没有见过？
Pink ones? That's strange. I don't recall any pink fairies in the Membrance Maze. Have you seen any, Chief Dolimem?
So, are the oracle cards with you?
真是开门见山啊，伙伴。先听听多哆啦迷怎么说吧。
How about we hear what the chief has to say first, my impatient friend?
我也这么觉得，但多哆啦迷总说自己唱的不是诗，只是歌谣。
Right? Though Dolimem always says they're just songs, not poetry.
村长！您还是这么有精神，真是太好啦。
Oh Chief! You haven't changed a bit, still so full of life!
呵呵，放心吧。还记得吗？我说过，只要世上还有人能吟唱歌谣，迷境的孩子就会一直存在——
No need to fuss, my child. You haven't forgotten, have you? As long as our songs are sung, the children of the maze will live on—
—just as our paths stay forever linked.
将它取走吧，孩子。我很抱歉，不得不用这种办法将你们召唤至此。
Here, take it. I'm sorry I had to resort to such methods to bring you here.
有您替我保管，我就放心啦。要是想让我占卜，随时乐意效劳。
Thank you for keeping it safe. You know you can always just ask if you want me to divine something.
不过，时隔多年未见，又以这样特别的方式指引我们前来…是出什么事了吗，村长大人？
Still... bringing us here like this after so long... Is something wrong, Chief?
其实，我们最近又听到了{RUBY_B#岁月之泰坦}永夜之帷{RUBY_E#}的呢喃。它说，迷境很快就会迎来新的妖精……
The {RUBY_B#Time Titan}Veil of Evernight{RUBY_E#} whispers to us once more. It tells of a new fairy who will soon enter the Maze...
<color=#dbc291ff>没错。迷境每迎来一位新的妖精，都代表帷幕之外，那远离哀丽秘榭的广阔天地，将要经历一场天翻地覆的劫难哪。</color>
<color=#dbc291ff>Indeed. Every time a new fairy arrives in the maze, it means that Beyond the Veil, in the vast lands far from Aedes Elysiae, a great calamity is on the horizon.</color>
多哆啦迷向众人描述了更多细节……
Dolimem continues to explain in greater detail...
可如果是这样，我们的远行……
But if that's the case, our journey...
…就不得不取消了。如果灾难将至，我们还是留在哀丽秘榭为好，以防万一。
...will have to be cancelled. If disaster's coming, we should stay in Aedes Elysiae, just to be safe.
What were you planning to do?
What about all the people out there?
你问住我了…但我和昔涟两个人，什么也做不了啊。
That's... that's a good point. But what difference could Cyrene and I make?
我和白厄本来只打算离开村子一小段时间，学些本领回来。他要去悬锋城锻炼，我打算去雅努萨波利斯，接受命运泰坦的洗礼……
We weren't planning to be gone for long... just enough time to hone our abilities. Phainon would train in Castrum Kremnos, while I would seek the Fate Titans' blessing in Janusopolis...
学成之后，我们就回哀丽秘榭，保护村子的和平不受侵扰。
Then we'd return to Aedes Elysiae, to help keep our village safe.
没关系，留在这里也不耽误学习。剑技这种东西，靠我自己也可以领悟。
It's okay. I can still practice my swordplay here. Some things you can learn on your own.
我有个提议：不妨让昔涟当场为我们开牌，卜算一下吧。如果命运愿意展现底色，我们都能更安心些，不是么？
Here's a thought: Let's have Cyrene do a reading. If fate wishes to show us its path, we might find some peace of mind.
可是，如果占卜的结果不尽如人意，那该怎么办？
But... What if we don't like what the cards tell us?
那就向它抗争，直到最后。
Then we stand against it, until the very end.
呵…我还真从来没有想过有这种思考方式。
Heh... never thought of doing it that way before.
谢谢你，伙伴，就听你的——无论结果如何，就让我们共同面对吧。
Thanks, partner. We'll do it your way — whatever the cards show, we'll face it together.
至少能知道逃避的方向。
At least we'll know which way to run.
听起来还真…消极。不过，我明白你想表达的意思。
Not the most optimistic take, but I see your point.
谢谢你，伙伴，就听你的——无论结果如何，就让我们共同面对吧。
Thanks, partner. We'll do it your way — whatever the cards show, we'll face it together.
I feel the same way. Perhaps it's better not to know.
连你都这么说，果然还是不必开牌了吧……
Hearing that from you... maybe we really shouldn't unveil the cards...
还是看看吧？就算结果不那么美好，至少我们也知道了该如何努力，尽可能让它完满一些，对不对？
Why not take a look anyway? Even if it's not what we hope for, we'll know what we need to work on, don't you think?
…好吧，你说得对。伙伴，来——无论结果如何，就让我们共同面对吧。
You're right. Come on, partner — whatever the cards show, we'll face it together.
虔诚的叩问会得到同等重量的回应。
Ask with a true heart, and truth shall answer in kind.
来吧，闭上眼，轻轻地打开神谕牌册……
Close your eyes, and let's open the Oracle Card Book together...
让你的思绪像河水上漂着的星星一样流淌，趁着萤火和微风，你们的命运也将流向同样的未来……
Let your thoughts flow like stars drifting on the river, carried by fireflies and gentle winds, your destinies flowing towards the same future...
呀，没想到能得到如此多的回应……
Oh... Oh my... the cards are quite responsive today...
那就任意翻开神谕牌，看看未来将如何示现吧。
Very well, let's see what future the oracle cards wish to show us.
翻看第一页上的神谕牌。
Turn to the first page of oracle cards.
「织者」牌哪，是牵连起「黄金之茧」的浪漫丝线，将众人的命运编织成一匹金灿灿的流丝，连通向一个最为光辉、烂漫的未来的牌面……
Behold, the "Weaver." It connects the romantic threads of the "Chrysalis of Gold," weaving all destinies into golden silk that flows toward the most brilliant, magnificent future...
以织与剑的轮舞开篇，那便以同样的优雅谢幕吧。
A dance of thread and blade set the stage, so shall it end as gracefully as it started.
好华丽啊…金色的织者，听名字肯定是豪门贵族出身。
Such elegance... The Gold Weaver must be of noble birth.
这般高贵的身份，大概与我这种人无缘…吧。
Such high standing... I doubt someone like me could ever reach it.
这是「门匠」，她能在万千门径之中，为人们指点出正确的道路。
This is the "Gatekeeper," who guides people to their true path among myriad passages.
*我们*抹去自己的千重耳目，只为更专注聆听圣殿里的呢喃！
We have surrendered our countless senses, dedicating ourselves to the sacred whispers within the temple!
好像真的听到了神殿里的回音，还混杂着…童声的歌谣？
Wait... It almost feels like I can hear the echoes within a temple! And... are those children singing?
让人感觉肃穆非凡，却又心生亲近……
It feels overwhelmingly solemn, yet strangely comforting...
「君王」牌通常象征着纪律、权威和荣耀，但往往也和孤独、战争画等号。
The "Ruler" stands for discipline, authority and glory, but frequently also points to isolation and warfare.
纵然汝等愿拥戴我为最后的王，荣耀都归于我……
Even should you pledge your loyalty to me as the last sovereign, the glory shall be mine and mine alone...
可弑王者，不能再负担起王名：就让垂死的狮子独自走上他的末路吧。
He who has slain a king can no longer bear the title. Let the withering lion walk his last path alone.
这代表着一位…背离了子民的「君王」吗？
Is this showing us... a "Ruler" who forsook their people?
哀丽秘榭离流血的世界太远了…这种传奇故事，实在无法不引人遐想啊。
Stories of such bloodshed like this feel so different from Aedes Elysiae... but they sure can stir the imagination.
哦！「羁客」牌，这是最调皮的一张。它常常贴在其他牌的背后出现，擅长伪装成其他卡牌的模样，抽中它可不容易呀！
Ah! The Traveler, our little trickster! Always hiding behind other cards, disguising itself. What a rare catch!
被骗了呀！嘻嘻，眼神和手脚都太慢了，你！
Gotcha! You'll have to be quicker than that!
好狡黠的声音…像在和人玩捉迷藏？一定得是个擅长捉弄人的家伙才能拿起这张牌吧。
That teasing voice... just like a child playing hide and seek. Surely, only a master of mischief could pick up this card!
翻看第二页上的神谕牌。
Turn to the second page of oracle cards.
「侍女」牌，有点轻盈的分量，带着冰凉的安提灵花的香气，就像天上的繁星。
This card, the Servant, is surprisingly light, bearing the cool scent of Antila flowers, just like starlight.
它象征着新生和希望，却也容易让人联想到挫折、悲伤和空虚。
It symbolizes new life and hope, yet often brings to mind struggles, sadness, and loss.
那可以被我的双手照拂的花朵…一定生在死亡的荫蔽下吗？
These precious flowers I care for with my own hands... are they destined to bloom only in death's embrace?
听起来，真是既庄严，又有一丝无法遮盖的哀伤啊……
It sounds so solemn, yet tinged with an inescapable sorrow...
小巧的「医师」牌，虽然是柔和的颜色，但其中蕴含的勇气不比任何一张牌少，甚至足以融化寒冷的坚冰。
The humble "Healer" may seem gentle in hue, but its courage matches any other, strong enough to melt even the coldest ice.
我会尽己所能，帮助你们弥合裂隙，努力让阳光洒遍世界上的每一个角落！
I will do my best to help you mend all fractures and let sunlight shine on every corner of the world!
这回和我勾起手指，就算约定好了，再也不许变卦了哦！
Make a pinky promise with me. No more going back on your word!
咦，这张牌好像和我的想法很接近：想让自己所能保护的范围，尽可能再大一点……
Hey, this card really speaks to me. It makes me want to protect as much as I possibly can...
不过，「保护世界上的每一个角落」这种事我可不敢想——那得需要多不可思议的能力啊？
Still, "protecting everything everywhere" seems like a dream — what amazing power would you need for that?
这就是有着大魔术师、大表演家、睿智之左眼、{RUBY_B#理性之泰坦}瑟希斯{RUBY_E#}的亵渎者等诸多称号的「学士」牌了。
Behold the Scholar, bearer of many names: the Grand Magician, the Great Performer, the Eye of Wisdom, and the Defiler of {RUBY_B#Reason Titan}Cerces{RUBY_E#}.
啊，原来只有一张么？听着倒像是十几张……
Oh, there's just one card? With all those titles, I was expecting a whole deck...
还是称呼我为「穿着华服的大地兽」吧——至少它足够精炼，能最强有力地概括我的本质。
"A dromas draped in finery" will suffice — it's succinct enough to best summarize my true nature.
呃…这个声音，怎么像是能预料到我们在说什么一样？
Wait, what's with that condescending tone? It's almost as if it knows what we're about to say.
「救世主」…在命运三相神谕的语境下，这张牌意味着谐调和完美无缺。
The "Deliverer"... According to the tripartite prophecy, this card means absolute harmony and perfection.
而且，这也是所有神谕牌里唯一一张没有负面意象的哦。
In fact, it's the only oracle card without a dark side.
…咦，这次没有神谕牌里的回音了吗？
What? No divine whispers this time?
想什么呢…这就是你为自己抽出的牌面呀。
Oh silly... this is simply the card you drew for yourself.
小小的哀丽秘榭，一昔之间降临了无数或尊贵、或传奇的人物：织者、门匠、君王、羁客、侍女、医师、学士……
The sleepy village of Aedes Elysiae in just one fleeting moment, welcomed an array of legendary figures: the Weaver, Gatekeeper, Ruler, Traveler, Servant, Healer, and Scholar...
他们的话语，和那言语中逐一流露的「心愿」，为哀丽秘榭出身的少年勾勒出对外界最初的想象。
Their stories and wishes showed the village boy glimpses of a world larger than he'd ever imagined.
那里有纷争的战场，有金色流光的圣城，还有许多他暂时无法理解的话语，和他自幼熟悉的、近乎亘古不变的村子殊异。
They brought tales of raging battles, of cities crowned in holy light, and of wonders beyond his understanding... each story so far removed from his simple village life.
少年从前只在童年玩伴的神谕牌里，见过这些被书写在纸页上的身份。然而，命运似乎与迷境产生了共鸣……
Once, these were just images on his friend's oracle cards. And yet, destiny now stirs in resonance with the maze...
And now, they are right in front of one's eyes.
呵，孩子…看来，你会成为回应世界期许、背负众人心愿的人啊。
Ah, my child... It seems you're destined to bear the wishes of many, to answer the world's call.
是啊。正如…那立于山巅的{RUBY_B#负世之泰坦}刻法勒{RUBY_E#}。
Yes. Just like {RUBY_B#Worldbearing Titan}Kephale{RUBY_E#}, standing eternal atop the mountain.
…老爹和母亲的心愿很简单，只希望我平安长大，多帮村子里做些好事，少闯祸。
My parents... they only wished for me to grow up well, to help around the village, stay out of trouble...
皮西厄斯老师希望小校舍能多几卷书，孩子们都能学到有用的知识；小披索希望能早点长成和他老爹一样强壮的猎人……
Mrs. Pythias wished for more books in her little schoolhouse, wanted us all to learn and grow. And little Piso... he wants to grow up strong like his father, to become a hunter...
我是要…实现他们的愿望吗？
Is that my purpose? To fulfill their wishes?
也许，对于真正的救世主…这些心愿只是沧海一粟。
Perhaps... for a true Deliverer, such wishes are but droplets in an ocean.
毕竟刻法勒背负的，是整个世界呢。
After all, Kephale bears the weight of the entire world.
是啊。真的很难想象，凡人要怎么才能和泰坦相提并论？
Right... How could any human possibly measure up to a Titan?
它们是神谕牌中揭示的未来。换句话说，是接下来，你生命中会遇见的人。
What you see are futures written in the cards. Or rather, the people you'll meet on your journey.
我们都很迷茫，对吧？不如和命运聊聊，或许这样，我们才能弄清自己是为了什么踏上旅途……
Sometimes, fate can guide us when we're lost. Let's consult fate itself. Maybe then we'll know why we must take this path...
…还有，一个人究竟要背负多少事物，才能够称得上「救世主」的称号呢。
And learn... just how many burdens one must bear to become a true "Deliverer."
要说心愿吗？我并无私人的心愿，只有再创世是我唯一的理想…不过，若能编织崭新的未来，我希望凯妮斯和她手下的清洗者永不能进入。
Personal wishes? I have none. Only the Era Nova matters: The world's rebirth. Yet, if I am to weave a new era, then may it be one where Caenis and her Cleaners shall never tread.
这群丑陋的虫豸，不配假借着「人治」的名头再出现在奥赫玛了。
These crawling parasites have no place in Okhema, especially not under the deceitful claim of "human rule."
这位…千金大小姐？说起话来让人背后一寒……
That... noble lady? The way she speaks... it's like ice in my veins...
She's truly selfless in her dedication.
Huh... not exactly the warmth I'd expect from someone selfless...
She's as cold as winter frost.
嗯，从语气也能猜出几分……
That's exactly the feeling I'm getting...
吾师，不妨也说说你的心愿吧。
Teacher, perhaps you could share your wishes with us?
小白，到了这个时候，你还要问*我们*的心愿吗？
Oh Snowy... you wanna know about our wishes now?
我想在西风尽头的花海，和率先辞别的缇安重逢。
I wish to see Trianne again — who was the first to depart — in the sea of flowers where the west wind ends.
然后，阿雅，我想看到你真正放下金丝纺成的心茧，像从前雅努萨波利斯的神庙前，那个身穿白裙、眼眸明亮的少女一样，再对*我们*笑一次。
And Agy, I want to see you shed that golden-thread cocoon around your heart. Just once more, smile at us again like that bright-eyed girl in white who stood before the Janusopolis temple.
最后，希望所有迷途人的跫音不再徘徊不前，取而代之的是祈祷的明亮歌声。
Finally, I pray that the footsteps of lost souls no longer wander aimlessly, instead, replaced by the bright songs of prayer.
*我们*的心愿是不是有点贪心？就当作代替了缇安和缇宁她们，一共说出了三份心愿吧！
Are we wishing for too much? Well, let's say these three wishes represent Trianne and Trinnon too!
听起来都是很好的心愿，连我也会心中生出向往。
Those wishes... are truly wonderful. They even stir something deep inside me...
那*我们*就放心啦，因为这是只有「你」才能替*我们*实现的心愿哦。
Then we can rest easy, because only "you" can make these wishes come true.
Mark these words, Snowy! See you...
白厄？你怎么是这副怯步不前的模样，还问出「心愿是什么」这种幼稚的话。
Phainon? Since when did you become so timid, asking such juvenile questions about wishes?
啊？我怎么了，有哪里不对吗？反倒是你这副上来就瞧不起人的口气……
What's that supposed to mean? And what's with that condescending tone...
好伙伴，别说我和这个不穿上衣，气焰还这么嚣张的家伙——未来会很熟啊？
No way I become friends with this half-naked showoff, right?
让你失望了，你们真的很熟。
Sorry to disappoint, but you end up being close friends.
Just what kind of life am I going to lead...
是一起泡过高温浴池那种熟。
You'll be the kind of friends who think nothing of sitting shoulder to shoulder in a hot bath.
可怕…未来的我还有这种爱好呢？
Horrifying... is that really something I'll enjoy one day?
你在自言自语什么？罢了……
What are you mumbling to yourself now? Whatever...
悬锋一族战士的心愿都已经了却，至于我——
The wishes of the Kremnoan warriors are done. But I—
身经万死，可仍未能抵挡刺穿后背的一剑，来自那漆黑面具的盗火行者。
I survived a thousand deaths only to fall to a coward's blade... That masked Flame Reaver who struck from behind.
算了，看你一脸迷茫，恐怕什么也没搞明白。
Never mind. That blank look tells me you're completely lost.
