告诉你我现在的心愿吧：要是能有和他决斗的机会，我会要求他堂堂正正地与我正面厮杀，并且，我要亲手斩落他的面具。
My wish is simple: One honest duel. Face to face, blade to blade. Then I'll strip away that mask with my own hands.
又是杀啊又是死的，这人的愿望还真是野蛮。
Nothing but violence and vengeance... this person's wish is nothing short of brutal.
但你瞳孔中的怒意，又像极了书中描写的骄傲王族…这份心愿，我记下了。
Still... those eyes burn with the noble pride I've read about. This wish, I shall not forget.
Well, well, if it isn't our little Deliverer!
心愿嘛，这还不简单！咱只想吃吃喝喝，遛遛弯晒晒太阳，再过上一千年这样的小日子。不然攒了一大堆钱，却没能在死之前花出去，多可惜呀！
My wish? Ha! Just let me wine and dine and soak up the sun for another millennium or two. I mean, what's the point of dying rich if you never lived rich?
赛飞儿阁下，我并不是这样想的。
Cipher, that's... not how I see it.
我的心愿是…找到生命里缺失的部分，感受与人拥抱的温度。那样的感觉，我已经体会过了，是我最为珍藏的回忆。至于平日里攒下的钱……
My one wish... is to find that missing piece in my life, to feel someone's embrace once more. That warmth... I've felt it before, and it's my dearest memory. And speaking of riches...
赛飞儿阁下，你的神力网罗了那么多珍宝，不是也一分都没花出去么？
For someone with all those treasures behind your divine power... you've led a pretty cheap life~
哎，怎么说话呢？你这人，看不出来……
Ouch, where did that come from...
What about our friend from the Grove?
我的心愿，也早在踏上「天空」之前就已经完成了，把我所拥有的疗愈力量化为暖阳，均等地分给了每一个我珍视、爱护的生命。
My wish came true before I touched the Sky. I transformed my healing power into gentle sunlight, distributing it equally to every life I cherished and loved.
你俩还真是够*无私*的…难怪阿格莱雅一早就把你们拉入了逐火。
You two are so selfless, aren't you? No surprise Aglaea wanted you for the Flame-Chase Journey.
说到这里，我想起来了！我啊，曾经还真有一个念头，想尝尝生来就是家财万贯的贵族小姐的滋味。
You know what? I did have one wild dream, to know what it feels like being born a noble lady, drowning in riches.
要是能让我和那裁缝女的出身换一换，换我做高高在上的大小姐，她做穷人，做小偷，看她还能不能成为现在的样子！我嘛，说不定也会成为「赛金织」！
Just think, if I traded places with that seamstress! Me in the mansion, her on the streets! I'd like to see if she'd still become the "Goldweaver" then! Maybe I'd even take her place!
Can we jump in and fit right into their convo?
感觉有点难以融入话题……
Doesn't sound like an easy task...
都是让人想露出笑容的心愿。
These wishes... they make you want to smile.
我也是这样想的，这些心愿…并不是沉重的东西，相反，像哀丽秘榭的孩子们喜欢的糖果纸，在有阳光的地方更加闪闪发亮。
I can't disagree with you. These wishes aren't weights to bear. They're like those candy wrappers the Aedes Elysiae children love, shining even brighter when bathed in sunlight.
「拥抱」、「疗愈」和…嗯，该怎么描述，「无拘无束的生活」？
总之，应该可以理解为，她们想要一个更温柔的世界吧。
They're all wishing for a kinder world, in their own way.
呵，白厄，我的好学生，还需要再赘述一遍我留给你的话吗？
Ah, Phainon, my student, must we go over this again?
记好了，我不喜欢「心愿」这样的字眼，那代表在诸神面前的软弱和趴伏乞怜。
Listen well. I detest the word "wish." It reeks of mortals crawling before their gods.
我应做的工程已毕，只差你用最后一步践行那最终的实证——
My life's work is done. All that remains is for you to take the final step and prove the ultimate truth—
我，阿那克萨戈拉斯，将成为新世界的神明。我将以确凿无疑的学说，向人们证明：凡人的思想，也足以成就神的伟业。
I, Anaxagoras, shall become a god of the new world. Through irrefutable logic, I will prove that mortal wisdom can achieve divine greatness.
Isn't he... you know, a little...?
我只是偶尔幻想一下英雄故事罢了，可他居然幻想自己有朝一日会成为…泰坦？
I mean, I just daydream about hero stories, but he's fantasizing about becoming a... Titan?
小点声，他以后是你的老师。
Careful — that's your future teacher you're talking about.
这，真是让人心情复杂…我能学会他身上那股自信的劲吗？
Well, that's... something. Could I ever be that sure of myself?
他的理想全靠你实现了。
His ambitions rest on your shoulders.
好伙伴，你也是认真的吗？我真的要被托付这种接近于天方夜谭的理想吗？
Come on, you're joking right? Am I really being burdened with a dream that feels more like a fantasy?
如何？我能感觉到，你内心的迷雾似乎已经散去些许了呢。
So tell me... has the uncertainty in your heart begun to fade?
真没想到将来会遇到这么多人，还有他们的心愿……
So many faces in my future... so many wishes...
Still... why would fate choose to show us this path?
刚才您不是说，翁法罗斯大灾将至吗？倘若如此，我和昔涟应该会一直留在哀丽秘榭才对，又怎会与形形色色的人相遇？
Didn't you say disaster would strike Amphoreus? If so, shouldn't Cyrene and I stay in Aedes Elysiae? How could we possibly meet all these people?
Even the darkest storm must eventually pass.
还真是充满希望的回答…我喜欢。
That's... wonderfully optimistic. I like it.
或许是他们来到了哀丽秘榭。
Perhaps they'll come to Aedes Elysiae?
遗世独立的村落将成为人类最后的避难所啊…倒也合理。
Our secluded village as humanity's last haven... That makes sense.
灾难就是你踏上旅途的原因。
This calamity is what sets you on your journey.
如果是这样的话，那…哀丽秘榭的大家该由谁来保护呢？
If that's true, then... who will protect everyone in Aedes Elysiae?
昔涟，可以把那张「救世主」牌交给我吗？
Cyrene, may I have that "Deliverer" card?
尽管它所预示的那些声音、面相和愿望，对现在的我来说还太过遥远……
Although those voices, visages, and wishes may seem far away now...
但冥冥中总觉得有一个声音在呼唤我，希望我拿起它。又或许，我只有在拿起它之后，才能真正知道它的重量吧。
I can't ignore the sense that something is calling me, bidding me to take hold of it. Maybe... its true weight can only be known once it's in my grasp.
接下这份礼物吧：神谕牌承载岁月，受{RUBY_B#岁月之泰坦}欧洛尼斯{RUBY_E#}祝福……
Accept this gift: oracle cards carrying time's wisdom, blessed by {RUBY_B#Time Titan}Oronyx{RUBY_E#}...
愿它能与你同行，化作你的记忆…激起未来的涟漪。
May they journey with you, become your memories... and spark rippling waves of change in times to come.
I'll hold these words close to my heart.
嗳，不过…以现在的感受来看，好像和普通的纸牌也差不多嘛……
But... now that I'm holding them, they don't seem all that different from ordinary playing cards...
E—Everyone, we've got big trouble memi!
烧焦的糊味，还有浓烟，好呛人…从迷境外面传来的呀！
Burning... smoke everywhere... It's all coming from beyond the Maze!
不会错了…灾难已经萌芽，比我们预想中更快。
It's here... The seeds of disaster have already taken hold, sooner than we had foreseen.
而且，这一次…竟然就连{RUBY_B#岁月之泰坦}永夜之帷{RUBY_E#}都无法抵御了哪。
This time... not even the {RUBY_B#Time Titan}Veil of Evernight{RUBY_E#} can shield us.
您、您的意思是…哀丽秘榭，也要被卷入预言中的浩劫了吗？
Y—You mean... Aedes Elysiae will be swept up in the prophesied catastrophe?
孩子们，请躲在迷路迷境里，不要踏出此地半步。否则，你们二人一定也会被那恐怖的灾厄吞噬哪。
My children, take shelter in the Membrance Maze. One step outside and this horror will consume you both.
可是，爸爸妈妈，还有村里的伙伴们……
But my parents... the whole village...
救人要紧，我们得出发了。
We need to save them — now.
是啊，救人要紧。村长大人，能否请您告诉我们，那灾厄的真面目究竟是什么，莫非是泰坦的力量？
You're right. Chief, what are we truly facing? Is this the power of a Titan?
「灾厄」…难道是传闻中的「灾厄」三泰坦么？
Are we facing the Three Titans of Calamity?
那并非泰坦，更非你们步步为营便足以应付的威胁。
This is beyond any Titan, beyond any danger you could overcome with strategy alone.
那是不可名状的丑恶之物，能将所有生命扭曲变作无血无泪的怪物。即便是泰坦也会被其侵蚀，自内向外烧熔殆尽，徒留一具只知杀戮、毁灭的空壳……

It's an unspeakable horror that twists all life into abominations that never bleed nor cry. Even Titans fall to its corruption, burning from within until only empty shells remain, knowing only death and destruction...
<color=#dbc291ff>「黑潮」，这就是灾厄的真面目。它将吞噬世间万物，惟有迷路迷境能够幸免。</color>
<color=#dbc291ff>The "black tide." That's what this calamity truly is. It consumes all in its path, sparing none but the Membrance Maze.</color>
没错。所以，请你们不要冒险离开这片遭诸神忘却的遗落之境——你们是最初发现我们存在的人，也是唯二能够进入迷境的人……
Yes. So please, don't leave this forgotten realm the gods abandoned — you are the first to uncover our presence, and the only two who can enter the Maze...
我们…不希望你们白白牺牲。
We... don't wish for you to throw your lives away.
Phainon... what path do we take?
Stay here, safe in the Maze.
只要活下去，就还会有希望……
As long as we survive, hope remains...
但…我明明才接下「救世主」牌，就选择对眼前的灾难坐视不理，这实在是……
But... I just accepted the "Deliverer" card. To idly sit by and ignore this calamity now would be...
交给自己的内心决定吧。
我的内心，那浮现出的唯一答案，是……
My heart knows but one path...
…我学剑的本意，就是为了保护身边的人。如果在这种时候当了逃兵…就再也不配举剑了吧？
...I learned the sword to protect those close to me. If I run now... I'll never be worthy of lifting a blade again.
看来，我们心里都已经得出答案了。
Then we know what we must do.
嗯，伙伴说得没错…我们必须挺身而出。
Indeed. Our friend is right... we must take action.
对不起，村长大人！哀丽秘榭陷入危机，身为她的孩子…我绝不能袖手旁观！
Forgive me, Chief! But Aedes Elysiae needs us... and as her child, I must act!
…我明白了。你们…要保重自己哪。
...Very well. Make sure you protect yourselves.
With me, Cyrene. Join us, my friend—
即便没有剑，给我一把锄头也好…哪怕手头只有最粗糙的凡铁，我也要用它保卫家园！
Even without a sword, I'll take a rake! Even with the roughest steel, I'll keep our home safe!
原来如此…除了牌面上的解读，它还能拥有这层释义呀。
The card's truth extends beyond its mere literal meaning, there's another hidden layer within.
并非从一开始就完美无缺，站在高高的云端，将慈悲的目光投向整个世界……
Not someone perfect from the start, standing high above, casting merciful gazes upon the world...
而是以这一小步为起点，从一座宁静的小村庄出发，慢慢拓宽「心中的世界」，一边成长，一边救赎……
But one who starts small, from a humble village, expanding their "world within" step by step, learning to save others as they grow...
我们还小的时候，我对他说过：希望这个世界永远都不需要救世主……
When we were little, I told him I wished this world would never need a Deliverer...
但在心愿破灭的时候，我很庆幸…他愿意踏上这条道路。
Now that wish has shattered, yet I'm glad... he's chosen to walk this path.
…都要归功于你的鼓舞呀，伙伴。
...happened because you believed in him, friend.
走吧？必须有你在身旁，白厄…还有我。我们心底的勇气才能被唤醒。
Shall we? It's only when you're by our side that Phainon and I... that our hearts find their courage.
我知道，你在看着，对吗——未来的「大英雄」？
I know you're watching us right now... aren't you, "Great Hero" from the future?
可惜，可叹——即便命运注定那少年要在未来背负起世界，他也无法成为带来拂晓的英雄。
Such cruel irony — though destined to bear the world's burden, this boy can never become the hero to bring forth the dawn.
Don't tell me... I'm the one who has to deliver salvation?
Are you here just to spoil the story?
跟上他们吧，{NICKNAME}阁下。去见证那注定不得成为英雄的男人，在救世之路上迈出的第一步。
Follow their path, {NICKNAME}. Bear witness as this man, forever denied the mantle of hero, takes his first step on the path to Deliverance.
请用您的双眼将这段记忆见证至最后，将他<color=#dbc291ff>最初的结局</color>收入眼中……
Watch this memory play out its final act. See with your own eyes <color=#dbc291ff>how everything began</color>...
如此，你将理解他心中所谓「救世」的理想，为何会注定将这个世界埋葬。
Then you'll see why his dream of "Deliverance" was always destined to become this world's requiem.
血色的红日，枯萎的麦草，正在焚烧的村庄——
A sun red as blood, wheat fields turning to dust, and in the heart of it all, a village aflame—
此时此刻，少年仿佛正置身于世界的终点。
In that moment, the boy stood at what felt like the end of existence itself.
求求你求求你求求你求求你█ 你█ █你█ ███ ██ █ ██ ███ ████
黑潮来袭的那日，踟蹰的少年终于启程，与同伴一道奔向最初的战场。
When the black tide arrived, the wavering boy found resolve in his companions, and together they ran toward their first battlefield.
而遥远的未来，翁法罗斯的大地上，将铭刻英雄们的足迹：他会手握剑锋，在黄金的史诗里，镌写下不灭的诗篇。
In the far-off future, the land of Amphoreus would bear the marks of the heroes' footsteps: With sword in hand, he would inscribe, an eternal mark in the Golden Epic.
当第一缕光自地平线那端升起，满身伤痕的少年立于焦土，将罹难者逐一掩埋，沉默无言……
And when dawn broke over scorched earth, a boy, covered in wounds, buried the dead one by one, his silence heavier than the earth he moved...
一同他的故乡，他的过去，他的姓名。
His home. His past. His name. All buried beneath the soil.
单凭纤弱的双腿，他踏上旅途，翻过{RUBY_B#大地之泰坦}磐岩之脊{RUBY_E#}，跨越{RUBY_B#海洋之泰坦}满溢之杯{RUBY_E#}，穿行于{RUBY_B#死亡之泰坦}灰黯之手{RUBY_E#}冰冷的死雾中……

His feet carried him forward. Over the {RUBY_B#Earth Titan}Pillar of Stone{RUBY_E#}. Beyond the {RUBY_B#Ocean Titan}Chalice of Plenty{RUBY_E#}. Through the deadly fogs of the {RUBY_B#Death Titan}Hand of Shadow{RUBY_E#}.
他走得茫无端绪，如同枯叶随风飘落。他走过无数城邦，刻下白发剑士的笑貌。
He wandered without direction, like a withered leaf drifting in the wind. Through countless city-states, the smiling visage of the white-haired swordsman was etched into memories.
他并非漫无目的。在少年心底，始终有一道呼声指引他前进：承应心愿，履险蹈危，只为行力所能及之事，拯救一切应被拯救的人。

Yet he did not walk without purpose. Deep in his heart, a voice always guided him forward to fulfill the wishes he had inherited, to brave peril, and to do all that was within his power to save those who needed saving.
一如启程之日，耳畔那位伙伴的声音……
Those words his friend spoke long ago, when his journey began lingered...
那声音如是说。男人未曾犹豫，只是坚定践行。
The words were few. But they gave him all the certainty he needed.
「平庸之人应当如此，方才能做出不平庸的选择。」
"That's what it means to be ordinary and choose to be more."
他继续辗转，直到逐火的呼声响彻大地。在预言描绘的风景中，人类将战胜众神，摘得火种，为翁法罗斯带来新生的黎明。

Onward he walked until the call of the Flame-Chase Journey thundered across the land. In the vision painted by prophecy, humanity would triumph over the gods, seize the Coreflames, and ignite a new dawn for Amphoreus.
「『然而逐火是不断失却的旅途，在那一切当中，生命也当如尘埃般渺小。』」
"Yet losses are a constant on the Flame-Chase journey, where life, too, seems as small as a speck of dust."
「『以「世界」为师者，方能背负它的命运——你可准备好了？』」
"Only one who treats the world as their teacher can bear its eventual destiny. Are you prepared for such teachings?"
心中的声音低语，他轻声回应。
The voice within spoke, and he answered softly.
「无妨。我的性命本就微不足道。」
"No matter. My existence is of no consequence."
他下定决心，响应「金织」号召，远赴圣城。可面对年轻的战士，元老们只面露不屑，冷笑间便将他投入军营。
When the Goldweaver called, he answered, traveling to the holy city. There, the Elders met his warrior's spirit with nothing but scorn, condemning him to the barracks in derision.
然而，令世人、就连他自己都未曾料想的是：这来历不明的新兵，会在不久之后的战役中大放异彩，一战成名……
No one saw it coming. Not the world, not even him. Yet, this nameless recruit stood at the gates of legend...
那也是他与生命中的一众旅伴，初次邂逅的时分。
And there, at last, he found the ones who would walk his path right beside him.
(Hold on. Phainon's here too? And is that Mydei and Trinnon?)
现在，「沉浸式戏剧」推进到了第二幕。
And now, Act Two of our immersive drama unfolds.
为什么要突然疏散整个命运三相殿……
They're evacuating the Temple? Why now?
你脑子坏了吗？那金色头发的可是悬锋城的王子！要是惹他生气了…整座城邦的人都得没命！
Are you insane? That blond man is the crown prince of Kremnos! Mess with him, and every last person in the city could wind up dead!
别慌张。有圣女大人主持场面，我们只要安心等待就好……
Calm yourselves. The Holy Maiden has everything under control. We need only wait patiently...
阁下所见的景象，发生在光历<unbreak>4926</unbreak>年的门关月。彼时，悬锋王子迈德漠斯率领的孤军兵临奥赫玛城下。
Behold! It is the Month of Gate, Light Calendar <unbreak>4926</unbreak>. The crown prince of Kremnos, Mydeimos, has led his forces to the gates of Okhema.
正如你所知，迈德漠斯性情高傲，但并非崇尚暴力之人。他向圣城元老提出角斗，只为给族人争取权利，不教他们以低人一等的姿态寄居他乡。

As you know, though Mydeimos was proud, he did not engage in needless violence. He challenged the elders of Okhema to a duel, not for glory, but for the rights and dignity of his people. To ensure they wouldn't live as second-class citizens in foreign lands.
在阿格莱雅的斡旋下，白厄作为代表接受了迈德漠斯的挑战。这场「角斗」将改变逐火的进程……
After Aglaea's mediation, Phainon met Mydeimos's challenge as the elders' representative. This duel was to change the course of the Flame-Chase Journey itself...
所以，作为贯穿白厄一生的，最重要的伙伴，还请阁下继续见证他的记忆。
So, as Phainon's most important companion, his lifelong friend, please, continue to bear witness to his memories.
…你们打算用这种方式代替光荣的角斗？
...Is this your idea of an honorable duel?
打打杀杀，很不好。阿雅和*我们*，不想看见黄金裔伤害彼此。
Bloodshed isn't the way. We and Agy don't want to see Chrysos Heirs turn on each other.
真正的战士知道何时该放下武器。公正的{RUBY_B#律法之泰坦}塔兰顿{RUBY_E#}将主持这场对决，裁定胜负，你们只需要在它的天平上各自放置一样东西……
True warriors know when to sheathe their blades. The impartial {RUBY_B#Law Titan}Talanton{RUBY_E#} shall oversee this duel. You need only place your offerings upon their scales...
<color=#dbc291ff>比世界的命运，更为沉重之物。</color>
<color=#dbc291ff>...Something that has more weight than the fate of the world.</color>
理解世界的重量，才有背负它的资格…是要以此称量我们的信念么？
Which means only those who understand the world's weight are worthy to carry it... Is this how you plan to test our convictions?
悬锋人，看来这一次，你最擅长的暴力派不上用场了。
Well, Kremnoan, looks like you won't be able to punch your way through this one.
无所谓。新兵，最后给你个机会：转身离开，我会承诺放你一条生路。
It makes no difference. One last chance, new recruit. Walk away, and I'll spare your life.
否则——就跟上来，直面我，我会赐你一个与勇气相称的结局！
Otherwise — come and face me! I'll give you a warrior's death!
（这两人以前这么水火不容啊……）
(Hard to imagine they once clashed like this...)
圣女大人，我总觉得自己误入了一场政治游戏。
Holy Maiden, I can't help but feel like a pawn that has stumbled into some greater political game.
每个英雄都曾是孩子，也都会长大。
Every hero was once a child. And every child must grow.
是么？可我连自己为什么站在这里，都不太确定。
That so? I don't even know why I'm standing here right now.
我只是一介士兵。如果不是非要以剑技分个高下，「金织」女士大可亲自出战。要论誓死保卫圣城的意志，我怎可能比得过她？
Look at me, just a common soldier. If it weren't a contest of swords, Lady Goldweaver would've taken the fight herself. When it comes to dying for the holy city, how could I ever measure up to her?
如果*我们*说，这场对决的意义不在胜负，而在于你的选择呢？
What if we told you this duel isn't about winning or losing, but rather in the choice you make?
您的意思是，这是「金织」女士对我的考验吗？
Are you saying that Lady Goldweaver is testing me?
对于逐火之旅，每一位黄金裔都不可或缺。无论是你，还是那位悬锋的王子，都浮现在神谕描绘的图景里。
Every Chrysos Heir is indispensable to the Flame-Chase Journey. And you and the crown prince of Kremnos are both a part of the prophecy.
这场角斗并非结束，而是开始。所以，听从你<color=#dbc291ff>内心的声音</color>吧，*我们*期待的只是你的回答。
What the duel marks is not an ending, but a beginning. So, listen to your heart. We wish only to hear your answer.
也对，内心的声音，它一直是我的指引。无论结果如何，我都会全力以赴。
True enough... The voice within has never failed me. It doesn't matter what the result is... I'll give it everything I have.
这才是黄金裔应有的态度。去吧，白厄，你的旅程才刚刚开始。
Spoken like a Chrysos Heir. Now go, Phainon, your journey has only just begun.
就是这样，战友。我们得齐心协力，一同战胜那位傲慢的王子咯。
That's right, comrade! It's time for us to teach that proud prince a lesson together!
哈哈，干脆利落的回答！就该这么自信。
Haha! Now that's what I like to hear!
日后你们也会成为战友。
Someday, he too will be your comrade.
Me? With him? Pfft, don't joke around like that...
呃…那也只能等输了再看。
Well... if we lose, we'll find out, won't we?
Still, on the topic of the Temple of the Three Fates...
这里就是「岁月」泰坦的神殿啊，也不知道昔涟的求学之路是否顺利…自从踏上旅程，我们就很少联系对方了……
Here we are, at the temple of the Time Titan, and I don't even know how Cyrene's studies are progressing... We haven't really had much contact since I set out...
希望她一切安好。走吧，战友，能一睹塔兰顿的公正天秤，这机会可不多啊。
Still, I hope she's doing well. Anyway, let's go, comrade. It's not every day you get a chance to see Talanton's Scales of Justice.
（他刚才说，昔涟在这里求学？这怎么可能？她不是早就……）
(Did he just say Cyrene's studying here? But how is that possible? Wasn't she...)
（偏偏在最需要解释的时候玩失踪吗，来古士……）
(Of course Lygus disappears right when I need answers...)
Forget it, I need to catch up with Phainon first.
真是宏伟。即便{RUBY_B#律法之泰坦}塔兰顿{RUBY_E#}已经陨落，它的天平仍在履行称量万物的使命。
Amazing. {RUBY_B#Law Titan}Talanton{RUBY_E#} may have fallen, but their scales remain true to their purpose.
希望你还记得自己的使命，新兵。
I hope you still remember your purpose, new recruit.
一副成竹在胸的样子啊，悬锋人。不如透露一下，你打算如何诠释「沉重」二字？
You seem awfully confident, Kremnoan. Let's see how you define the idea of "weight."
怕你不知情，我多嘴一句：在悬锋城，你这小偷般的发言已是对角斗的亵渎，当受穿刺之刑。
For your information, in Castrum Kremnos, the punishment for profaning a duel with such crooked words is impalement.
但这里是外邦，客随主便，我告诉你也无妨——
But as we're in foreign lands, I'll indulge you—
悬锋印戒，我族的至宝。它就是我的选择。
The Signet of Kremnos, the crown jewel of our people. That's my choice.
一枚戒指？恐怕不是普通的饰品吧。说说看，这小东西背后有什么故事？
A ring? Not just any ornament, I'd wager. What's the story behind this little treasure?
——得寸进尺，真以为我会对你滔滔不绝？
Don't push your luck. Think I'd pour my heart out to you?
你只需知道，悬锋千年的荣耀，足以令一位泰坦为之倾倒，碾碎你这无名小卒的灵魂！
Just know that Kremnos's thousand years of glory could bring a Titan to its knees, let alone a nobody like you!
看来在他心中，比世界更重要的，是族人和荣耀……
So to him, glory and his people outweigh the entire world...
（这也是日后，万敌背负的宿命……）
(And the very destiny that Mydei himself will eventually shoulder...)
别想太多，白厄。遵从自己的内心吧。
Don't overthink it, Phainon. Trust your heart.
话虽如此，我只是一介圣城卫士，而对面是身经百战的悬锋王子……
That's easy for you to say. I'm just a Holy City Guard, up against Kremnos's walking war machine of a prince...
...Don't you think this is a little bit too unfair!?
回来吧，留给我们思考的时间不多了。
Come back. We need to decide this here and now.
真为难啊。那枚戒指肯定承载了许多特别的意义，该用什么来和他对抗？
Now this is a tough one. What can I possibly offer against a ring that signifies so much?
战友，我想听听你的直觉。
Well, comrade? What does your gut tell you?
...Looks like we really are on the same wavelength.
这柄长剑随我征战至今。总有一天，我会用它写下英雄的诗篇……
This sword has been with me through every battle. One day, it'll help write a heroic epic...
但不是现在。我还年轻，要走的路还很长，它也一样。
But not today. I'm still young, and I have a long road ahead. So does this blade.
心中的信念吗？可是，空有决心是不够的，除非把我的心脏献上……
You mean my conviction? But... just resolve isn't enough, is it? Unless I literally gave my heart...
怎么可能，只有哀地里亚人会干这种事吧。
Ha! No way. Only an Aidonian would do something that crazy.
思来想去，我能仰仗的也只有它了……
In the end, there's only one thing I can trust...
那一日，出现在我人生中的「救世主」。说来讽刺，我至今都不敢直视这张牌，更遑论接受它的指引。
The "Deliverer" that appeared in my life on that day... How ironic. I can't even look at this card properly, much less follow where it leads.
光是想起故乡被黑潮吞没的景象，双手就颤抖不已。我忘不了那场大火，人们的哭喊，我无能为力，什么也保护不了……
Just thinking about how my village was swallowed by the black tide makes my hands shake. The flames, the screams, my utter failure to protect anyone...
理智告诉我，这些还远远不够。哀丽秘榭只是个小村庄，在翁法罗斯面前，它的消逝不过是一道无足轻重的伤疤。
Speaking rationally, I know it's not nearly enough. Aedes Elysiae was just a small village, its loss barely a scar on Amphoreus's face.
可此时此刻，我心中的声音却在诉说……
But here and now, my heart says something else...
这张牌就是我剩下的全部，不会有什么比它更沉重了。
This card... It's everything I have left. Nothing weighs heavier.
也许，这就是正确答案呢。
Perhaps that itself is the answer.
好久不见，缇宁大人，白厄，还有……
It's so nice to see you all again! Lady Trinnon, Phainon, and...
嗨，看见你在，真令人开心♪
Hello! Seeing you here sure is a sweet surprise♪
这还是我认识的翁法罗斯吗？
Did I stumble into the wrong Amphoreus?
怎么一副难以置信的表情，难道是…想我了？
Why so surprised? Could it be... did you miss me?
这可真是…我刚刚还在想，你是不是也在神殿里，没想到重逢来得这么突然。
This is... incredible. I was literally just thinking about how you might be here, but I never imagined I'd see you this soon.
嘻，我本该跟着祭司一起撤离的，但听说圣女大人身边有一位白发青年……
Hehe, I was supposed to leave with the priests, but then I heard Lady Maiden was with a white-haired young man...
我猜到是你，就趁着人们不注意，偷偷溜回来啦。
I figured it had to be you, so I snuck back here!
呵…像是你的作风。可惜现在不是叙旧的时间，那边的悬锋人……
Ha... That's Cyrene for you. Unfortunately, this isn't a good time for reminiscing. That Kremnoan over there...
还在玩过家家的游戏么？
是个心急的大男孩呀，你们说不定很合拍呢。
Quite the hothead. Y'know, you two just might get along.
别怕，你已经有答案了，不是么？
Don't worry. You already know what the answer is, don't you?
如果这张牌就是你的选择，我支持你。
If that's your choice, I am with you.
因为我也忘不了哀丽秘榭的田野、红叶，树下有我的小秋千，我会在上面做甜甜的梦。还有迷路迷境的小妖精们，想到再也见不到它们，心就会很痛很痛……

I am with you because I remember it all too. The fields of Aedes Elysiae, those red leaves, that little swing of mine beneath the tree where I'd dream the sweetest dreams. And those dear fairies in the Lost Maze... It hurts so much knowing they're gone forever...
这份悲伤不会骗人。我们的故乡只是个小村庄，但对于小小的你和我，它就是整个世界。
The pain speaks for itself. Our hometown may have been just a tiny village, but to us, it was the whole world.
可是，白厄，只靠这些还不够。
But... that's not enough, Phainon. Not nearly enough.
仇恨是能让人长大，让男孩成为坚不可摧的战士。
Even though hatred can help people grow, and turn a boy into an unbreakable warrior...
但你现在需要的，是一场胜利。那就不能只把沉痛的过去当作砝码……
What you need now is victory. You can't just stack the scales with your past suffering...
<color=#dbc291ff>而是要把「未来」的重量，也压在天秤上。</color>
<color=#dbc291ff>You have to throw the weight of your "future" onto them as well.</color>
The future...? What do you mean?
好像说了很难懂的话呢，其实很简单啦。
Maybe that was a bit too cryptic for you, but it's actually really simple!
就让我们共同的伙伴，带着「救世主」一起走上天平吧？
Why not have our mutual friend here stand on the scales with the "Deliverer"?
How about it? Can you help us?
嗯，毕竟…你可是我们的憧憬呀。
Of course, after all... you're what we aspire to.
嘻，放心吧。我敢打赌，那位王储不会发现的~
Hehe, relax, our dear crown prince won't have a clue~
这场角斗关乎圣城的明天，既然站在这里，我就要为它摘得胜利。
The fate of Okhema hangs on this duel. I must claim victory, for their sake.
我会押上自己的一切。战友，与我一同，成为英雄吧。
I will stake everything I have. Stand with me, comrade, and we shall become heroes.
<color=#dbc291ff>铭记过去，成为明天的英雄吧。</color>
<color=#dbc291ff>Remember the past, and become the hero of tomorrow.</color>
没错，我们会尽己所能将其诠释：比世界的命运更为沉重之物……
Let's. Together we'll prove that what weighs more than the fate of the world...
<color=#dbc291ff>是带着无法被改变的过往，背负它走向未来的决心。</color>
<color=#dbc291ff>...Is the resolve to shoulder an immutable past, and carry it into the future.</color>
公平、正义、清白无疑的{RUBY_B#律法之泰坦}塔兰顿{RUBY_E#}，角斗者已做出他们的选择——
{RUBY_B#Law Titan}Talanton{RUBY_E#}, the fair, the just, they of unassailable integrity — the challengers have made their choices.
以三相圣女之名：现在，我请你垂落秤盘，称量命运，为我们揭示你的宣判！
In the name of the Holy Maiden of the Three Fates, lower your scales, weigh destiny, and reveal unto us your verdict!
你用来称重的信物是…一张纸牌？
对，一张薄薄的纸牌，这就是我的选择——你只需知道，它的名字叫「救世主」。
Yes, a flimsy little card. That is my choice. Just know that it's called the "Deliverer."
有意思。好啊——若你能凭这一张纸牌胜过我，今后，我就用这三个字来称呼你！
Interesting. Very well — if you can beat me with this card, then that's what I'll call you from now on!
{RUBY_B#律法之泰坦}塔兰顿{RUBY_E#}正在斟酌判决，看来两边的信念…不相上下。
{RUBY_B#Law Titan}Talanton{RUBY_E#} is deliberating on the outcome. It appears the convictions of both sides are... equally matched.
真是…令人窒息，仿佛整个世界的重量都压在了肩头。
This is... suffocating. Like the whole world's weight is on my shoulders.
But I believe... what my heart tells me...
「听啊，人子：吾将宣告判决，高下已分。」
"Hear thee, children of humanity: I shall pronounce judgment, for the difference is now clear."
「供物比世界的命运更为沉重之人，是为——」
"The one whose offering weighs more than the fate of the world is—"
「——哀丽秘榭的来者，无名的英雄。」
"One from Aedes Elysiae, the Nameless Hero."
"The true weight of conviction originates not from itself..."
「——而在那压落秤盘之物，夙愿本身。」
"...but rather in that which tips the scales, hope itself."
我想，泰坦的意思是，比世界命运更沉重的不是个人的信念。
I think the Titan means that it's not anyone's personal convictions that outweigh the fate of the world.
而是一种愿望，它属于我、你、在场的每个人。压落秤盘的并非白厄的决心，而是这张神谕牌承载的，世人对「救世主」的呼唤——

It's about a wish, one which we all share — you, me, everyone here. What tipped the scales wasn't Phainon's conviction alone, but the collective hopes carried by this oracle card — humanity's desperate call for a Deliverer.
那其中也包括你和你的民族，悬锋人。
Yes, even you and your people, Kremnoan.
将两边的重量一起押上么？但别忘了，悬锋人和你们是死敌，沉溺于理想主义，只会让你惨死在敌军的矛下。
Placing us both on the same side of the scales? Foolish. We Kremnoans are your mortal enemies. Such weak idealism will only get you skewered on our spears.
那也无妨，我可从没说过，自己能和牌中的「救世主」划等号。
Fine by me. I've never claimed to be the Deliverer from the card anyway.
我只是一介士兵，如果战死沙场就是我的命运，我毫无怨言，只会挥剑至最后一刻。我相信，你也一样……
I'm a soldier, and if it's my fate to bleed my last on the battlefield, then so be it. I'll fight to my last breath. And on this, I know that we're the same...
所谓的「英雄」，只是怀抱如此决心的一群人。而「救世主」——就是他们的总和，仅此而已。
That's all a "hero" really is. Someone with that kind of conviction. And the "Deliverer"? Just the sum of all those heroes.
诚如神谕所示：「逐火的征途将于今日，迎来最后两位英雄。」
Just as prophesied: "On this day, the final two heroes shall join the Flame-Chase Journey."
…呵，果然你的目标从一开始就是我和他。人们都说「金织」大小姐不知天高地厚，可妄想用神谕劝服悬锋战士的，你还是头一个。
I should have known from the start. They all say Lady Goldweaver is quite brazen, but you're the first to even imagine that prophecies could persuade a Kremnos warrior.
要想束缚雄狮，我有千种办法。但眼前这头狮子本就不为厮杀而来，不是么？
Oh, I have a thousand ways to tame a lion. But this lion didn't come here for bloodshed, did he?
奥赫玛和悬锋孤军实力悬殊，可我方竟无一人阵亡，这恐怕并非巧合吧。
The Kremnoans far outmatch Okhema's forces, yet we haven't lost a single soul. That's no accident, is it?
你们当真觉得，好战的悬锋人会手下留情？
Do you honestly think Kremnoans, renowned for our love of battle, would show mercy?
但悬锋孤军同样也以军纪严明著称。
Your forces are equally renowned for their iron discipline.
*我们*只能认为，这是你的命令。
And so, we can only assume that this is on your orders.
看来奥赫玛也不像传闻中那么迂腐。比起圣城元老，在场各位更理解力量的本质。
Perhaps Okhema isn't as hidebound as the rumors say. You grasp the true marrow of power more clearly than those Elders.
命运已经付诸实现，何不让我们设宴迎宾，为这场相逢再添一笔？
Now that the wheels of fate are turning, what finer way to celebrate this fortuitous encounter than a feast?
请随我来，两位异乡的战士——这世上的英雄多如繁星，而此刻，我们被长夜的火光聚集在一起……
Follow me, brave outlanders — heroes of this world are as countless as the stars, and at this moment, we find ourselves gathered here by the light of the flames of the long night...
历史会记下这一刻，神谕中的黄金裔已悉数就位，它喻示着翁法罗斯终将到来的黎明。
History shall remember this moment. The prophesied Chrysos Heirs now stand assembled, heralding a new dawn for Amphoreus.
想必阁下已经意识到：方才这一幕，与您经历的逐火之旅截然不同。
You must see it now... How different this is from the Flame-Chase Journey you traveled.
只是暂且退居幕后，以免打扰您的沉浸。
I merely stepped backstage, so as not to disrupt your immersion.
我扮演的，到底是什么人？
And whose role am I playing?
也许并非真实存在的「某个人」。毕竟除了两个特定的人，其他英雄似乎意识不到您的存在。
"Who"? Perhaps the role is not that of a person who really existed. Notice how only two particular individuals seem aware of your presence?
切莫心急，剧目已经接近尾声。
Patience. We're approaching the final act.
我说过，这是男人最初的记忆。对于即将到来的「再创世」，它的意义尤为特殊。
These are, as I mentioned, his first memories. They are of particular importance for the imminent Era Nova.
恰如此时此刻，在塔兰顿的见证下，预言中的半神悉数集结……
Such as this very moment, as the prophesized demigods gather with Talanton as witness...
这是神明计算中的时刻。此后的旅途，与您熟知的一切并无区别。有人到来，有人离去，逐火者们身负微光，在长夜中艰难向前。

This is a moment calculated by the gods. What comes after is no different from that which you already know. Some join, others leave, while Flame-Chasers bear their faint light forward through the long night.
来吧，您的席位已经备好，敬请落座：十三次心跳后——
Come, come, your seat awaits. After thirteen heartbeats—
英雄们的航船，将摆渡至最后一幕。
Our heroes will be ferried to the final scene.
他们说，这世上的英雄，本该和天上的繁星一样多……
They say that the heroes of this world should be as countless as the stars...
可如今，却只剩下我们了啊。
Yet now, we're the only ones left standing.
黑潮，终究还是席卷了世界……
So, in the end, the black tide still swallowed everything...
西方有悬锋孤军坐镇，短时间内不会失守。那刻夏老师生前在北方和东方布下法阵，作用犹未可知，但我相信他。至于奥赫玛……

The west stands protected by Mydei's Kremnoans. It will hold for the time being. Professor Anaxa deployed wards in the north and east before... Their effectiveness is untested, but I believe in him. And Okhema...
不必担心阿格莱雅。即便身陨，她也是最为高贵的半神，「浪漫」的结网坚不可摧，圣城公民也响应她的遗愿，纷纷投身到保卫战中。

We needn't fear for Aglaea. Even in death, she counts as the greatest among demigods. Her threads of "Romance" weave an impenetrable shield, and the people answer her call, rallying to the city's defense.
动身吧，{RUBY_B#负世之泰坦}刻法勒{RUBY_E#}已献出它的火种。为了翁法罗斯，我们必须在下一个{RUBY_B#黎明}门扉时{RUBY_E#}前完成「再创世」！
Let's move. {RUBY_B#Worldbearing Titan}Kephale{RUBY_E#} has given their Coreflame. We must complete the Era Nova before the next {RUBY_B#Dawn}Entry Hour{RUBY_E#}... for Amphoreus!
所以，这是我们看{RUBY_B#奥赫玛}她{RUBY_E#}的最后一眼了。
So... this is the last time we'll see {RUBY_B#Okhema}her{RUBY_E#}.
我们是为了回应世界的愿望而启程的，对吧？
We set out on this journey to answer the world's desire, didn't we?
每一位黄金裔都是如此，从未改变。
That's what it means to be a Chrysos Heir. So has it always been.
翁法罗斯的愿望，如此不讲道理呢？
...Why must Amphoreus's wishes be so... cruel?
明明在每一个正确的时间点，大家已经尽己所能，做出了最正确的选择。
We made the best choices we could, whenever we could!
可到头来，指引我们的神谕，吞没世界的黑潮……
But in the end... the prophecy that led us... this black tide swallowing everything...
Why does it look like this?
但除了向前，我们早已别无选择。
But we haven't had any other choice... except to move forward. Not for a long time now.
即便前方是漫漫长夜，我也相信…那是黎明的方向。在火光的尽头，是终将升起的烈阳。
Even if we only see the long, long night ahead, I still believe... that through it, we'll find the dawn on the other side. Beyond these flames, a new sun will someday rise.
所以，走吧，去命运三相殿！由你接过「岁月」的权柄，让全部的火种回归涡心，为此世的命运划上休止符。
So, to the Temple of the Three Fates! You'll take over Time's authority, and we'll return all the Coreflames to the Vortex, then put this world's fate to its final rest.
随后，让我们所有人为灭亡预备……
After which, we shall all face oblivion...
或是踏上最后的伟大征程。
...or embark on one final grand journey.
为搅扰您的沉眠向您致歉，欧洛尼斯。
Please forgive us for disturbing your sleep, Oronyx.
无妨。我明白，命运已抵达尽头了。
It matters not. I know, fate has run its course.
黑潮已临奥赫玛城下，翁法罗斯的时间所剩无几……
The black tide has reached Okhema. Amphoreus does not have much time left...
It is time for the Era Nova.
我会如约呈上「岁月」的火种……
As agreed, I shall present the Coreflame of Time...
乘上时间的长河吧，它会挺身护送各位，抵达创世涡心……
Ride the river of time. It will guard your passage to the Vortex of Genesis...
那刻夏老师用生命证明了创世并非空谈。身为神谕中的黄金裔，我们将为世界燃烧自己的结局也早已注定……
Professor Anaxa proved the truth of Genesis with his sacrifice. As Chrysos Heirs of the prophecy, we were always destined to immolate ourselves for this world...
现在，轮到我们献身了——别让大家的牺牲白费。
Now it's our turn — we can't let everyone's sacrifices be in vain.
不用再和我确认决心啦，白厄。
I don't need another pep talk, Phainon.
从走出村子的那一刻起，我们就做好反抗命运的准备了，不是吗？
After all, we've been ready to fight fate ever since we left the village, haven't we?
来吧：让我们拥抱神谕所言的奇迹，烧尽这世界上所有的污秽……
Come, let's claim the miracle we were promised, and burn away every last shadow in this world...
然后…再成为照亮新世界的第一缕火光。
And then... rise as the first light of a new world.
光历<unbreak>4931</unbreak>年，长夜月的第三个七天。{NICKNAME}阁下，欢迎抵达逐火的尽头……
Light Calendar <unbreak>4931</unbreak>, the third week of the Month of Evernight. Welcome, my {M#Lord}{F#Lady} {NICKNAME}, to the end of the Flame-Chase...
现在，泰坦已然揭示了命运的入口，敬请阁下踏入其中，一睹为快。
The Titan has revealed the gateway of fate. Please, accept the invitation to step across the threshold, and behold!
这扇门的背后，就是英雄们苦苦追寻的新世界。也是这段漫长记忆的主人，一生行向的终点……
Beyond this gate lies the new world that our heroes sought through their trials, as well as the terminus that the owner of these long memories has been hurtling towards their entire life...
或许，会是您无比熟悉的场景。
Perhaps you'll find it... all too familiar.
而后，您就能理解，那名为「白厄」的凡人是如何背负世界的重量。而那重量又是如何将他压迫，并且证明……
Then you'll understand how the mortal called "Phainon" shouldered the world's weight. How that same burden crushed him, proving...
所谓的「救世主」，不过是翁法罗斯误以为自己能够反抗命运，一厢情愿的可悲幻觉哪。
...that the so-called "Deliverer" is nothing more than Amphoreus's own delusion, a pitiful fantasy that it could defy fate's decree.
阁下，请。您所探寻的真相，就在这未至的岁月中。
Please, esteemed one, the answers you seek lie in these nonexistent times.
The future revealed by the Titan...
(The Vortex of Genesis... So it is here. But...)
「人生不过是个行走的影子，一个在舞台上指手画脚的伶人，登场片刻，就在悄无声息中退下。」
"Life's but a walking shadow, a poor player, that struts and frets his hour upon the stage, and then is heard no more."
「它是一个愚人讲述的故事，充满喧哗与骚动，却找不到一点意义。」
"It is a tale, told by an idiot, full of sound and fury, signifying nothing."
创世涡心，世界的起点与终点，作为谢幕的舞台再合适不过。阁下，我恳请您继续前进，端举着跃动的好奇心。
The Vortex of Genesis, where the world begins and ends. What stage could be more befitting of our final act? Come, come, come, I beseech you onward, buoyed by your surging curiosity.
<color=#dbc291ff>身为男人心中可望而不可及的存在，您已陪伴他走过不尽其数的岁月，自然也有权利纵观时间的长河，见证他抵达此地后迎来的，每一个荒谬而可悲的结局。</color>

<color=#dbc291ff>As an unattainable existence that has dwelled within his heart, beyond his reach, you have accompanied him through the march of years uncounted, you naturally have the right to view the river of time in its fullness, and to witness what he welcomed upon his arrival here, every absurd and tragic ending.</color>
无妨。残酷的逐火已经让我抛弃了幻想，未来不可能是一片沐浴着西风的理想乡，静候着我们踏入其中……

None of that matters now. This brutal Flame-Chase Journey has stripped away my delusions. I know the future isn't some peaceful paradise with gentle west winds, just waiting to welcome us to step in...
这一定是个不同以往的浪漫故事……
This will be a romantic story like none that has come before...
这是…白厄和昔涟的后续？
This is... the rest of Phainon and Cyrene's story?
似乎在哪里见过这段对话…
Haven't I... seen this scene before?
是啊，在男人的记忆中，如此情景曾反复上演。虽然略有出入，但万变不离其宗：{RUBY_B#<color=#dbc291ff>只有一人能活到最后，见证「再创世」</color>}<color=#dbc291ff>「众人将与一人离别，惟其人将觐见奇迹」……</color>{RUBY_E#}

Indeed! In his memories, such a scene replays over and over. Though the details may differ, this remains ever the same: {RUBY_B#<color=#dbc291ff>Only one shall live till the end, and they alone will witness Era Nova</color>}<color=#dbc291ff>"All shall bid farewell to one, and that person alone will witness the miracle..."</color>{RUBY_E#}
它们都是岁月长河的片段，代表他从此踏上的漫长征程，或者换一种说法……
Each is a drop from the river of time, representing the long journey he would take, or rather...
呵呵，这是便于您理解的说辞。
Hehe, just putting it in terms that might be easier for you to understand.
呵呵，毕竟阁下聪颖过人。
Hehe, sharp as ever, I see.
眼见为实，不妨用您的双眼一探究竟吧。
Seeing is believing. Why not let your own two eyes uncover the truth?
亦或者，您可以直接迈向最后的真相：<color=#dbc291ff>一睹您所扮演的角色真容，并见证黄金裔、逐火之旅与翁法罗斯轮回的终极本质。</color>

Or perhaps, you can simply walk straight to the final truth: <color=#dbc291ff>See the true face of the character you play, and witness the ultimate nature of the Chrysos Heirs, Flame-Chase Journey, and the cycles of Amphoreus.</color>
空无一人啊。这就是末日的创世涡心……
Not a single soul to be seen. So this is how the Vortex looks at the end of days...
呵…竟然还有人愿意陪我作伴。但，既然你还是出现在了这里……
Hehe... Looks like I've got company after all. But since you've made it here...
So, in the end, you succeeded...
Just shut up and get out of here!
你疯了，万敌！哪怕你是不死之身，哪怕你已成为「纷争」的半神……
Are you crazy, Mydei!? Immortal or not, even if you're the demigod of Strife...
不，我相信你。我只想请求你，与我共同见证「再创世」……
No, I know you can... I just wanted to request that you witness the Era Nova with me.
与我一同证明…你我足以超越神谕的命运。
Together, let's prove... that we're enough to transcend the prophesized fate.
可笑。难不成，我们的「救世主」竟在这种关键时刻掉链子，被那愚蠢的谵语吓破了胆？
Ha! Could it be, that now, at the critical juncture, our mighty "Deliverer" is chickening out? Scared of a stupid prophecy?
我会超越神谕的命运，但我有个更好的主意：身为歌耳戈之子，何不让我用一场壮绝的胜利证明自己，正如我过去撕开悬锋先王的胸膛？
I'll transcend the prophesized fate, alright, but I've got a better way: As the son of Gorgo, I'll prove myself with one last grand victory, just like when I ripped out the old king's heart!
去吧，这里交给我。如果黑潮造物足以淹没天际，那我们悬锋人就会在黑夜下作战——
Go, leave this to me. If the black tide creatures block out the sun, then we Kremnoans will fight in the shade—
——待我手刃了那刽子手，就让我们在西风尽头把酒言欢吧。
And when I'm done with that executioner, we'll raise our cups where the west winds end.
创世涡心…上次来到这里，还是归还「理性」火种的时候。
The Vortex of Genesis... The last time I was here, I was returning the Coreflame of "Reason."
当时没来得及仔细感受——你们口中所谓泰坦憩息的圣所，我看倒更像是它们冰冷的灵柩。
I didn't have the time to observe it in too much detail back then — but a "holy sanctuary" of the Titans? Looks more like their frozen crypt to me.
毕竟，诸神的火种如今皆已收殓于此……
Well, all the Coreflames do lie here now...
…能与您这样的哲人同行最后一段路，是我的荣幸，那刻夏老师。
It's my honor to walk the final stretch with a mind such as yours, Professor.
Oho, getting ahead of ourselves, are we?
忘了吗？我早已为真理献身，如今与你同行的，不过是你头脑中一道思想罢了。
Have you forgotten so quickly? I died for truth long ago. What walks with you now is but a thought in your mind.
Of course... how could I forget that?
但，你的话我原模原样回敬给你：能与你同行最后一段路，也是我的荣幸。
But I'll say the same to you: it's my honor to walk this final stretch with you, too.
现在，去吧。别垂头丧气，做好你该做的最后一件事——
Now go. Stand tall and finish your final task—
Yeah, just leave it to me...
让那可悲的刽子手…血债血偿。
Time for that wretched executioner... to pay what they owe.
Hey, little one... are you scared?
呵…你和风堇一样坚强。跟上我吧，小伊卡……
Hehe... as brave as Hyacine. Stay close, Little Ica...
What? No, not... not you too...
…我明白了。我不会辜负你的好意…你们的心愿。
...I see. I won't squander your kindness... your hopes.
那，就请为我支撑起这一方小小天空吧——
So, please keep this bit of sky standing for me—
呵，看来「再创世」前，还有件事不得不完成啊……
Well, now there's one last thing I need to do before the Era Nova...
…来吧，刽子手。这片晴空将为我照亮刀锋。
Come, executioner. Let this patch of clear sky show me where to strike.
啧啧，到处是水。这地方永远都湿漉漉、黏糊糊的，连尾巴都变得很重……
Ugh, there's water everywhere. This place is always all wet and sticky, even my tail's getting heavy...
再加上烧焦的气味，还有那个呲啦呲啦的噪音…恐怕没一个多洛斯人能受得了哪。
Plus that burnt smell and that sizzling noise... Yikes, nobody from Dolos could stand this.
去吧，脏东西留给我，做你该做的事。
Go on then, I'll handle the filth. Do what you need to do.
让我和你一起，二对一胜算更大。
Let me fight with you. Better odds with two.
忘记裁缝女说的话了？我相信你拎得清孰轻孰重。
Hey, remember what the seamstress said? You know what really matters.
还真不客气。丑话说在前面，我可从来不做赔本买卖……
Wow, someone's not shy. Just so you know, I'm not in the business of making losing deals...
我来拖住那刽子手，你去把{RUBY_B#神谕}此世最大的谎言{RUBY_E#}圆上——然后，就让我成为新世界的第一缕风吧。
I'll distract that executioner — you go turn {RUBY_B#prophecy}the world's biggest lie{RUBY_E#} into truth. Let me become the first wind of your new world.
是啊，我已成为「死亡」之半神，再也无法漫步人间。因此你所看到的，不过是这生灵涂炭的末日之世，无数死者汇成的冥河，它汹涌的涛声。

Yes, I've become Death's demigod, and shall never again walk the world of the living. What you see is the surging of the River of Souls, brought on by the countless dead feeding it in these dark times.
他们正在呐喊：即便身陨，也愿汇成洪流，拱卫创世涡心，让「再创世」付诸实现。
They cry out: Though dead, they'll converge into a torrent and guard the Vortex, to see the Era Nova fulfilled.
亡灵们的心愿，我也会尽数收下。既然如此，就请各位和我一起，战斗到最后一刻吧。
I will take all the wishes of the departed with me. Please, everyone, fight with me, to the very last.
我听到：死者们在为你喝彩…他们已经做好准备了。
I hear them: The dead hail you... they're prepared.
走吧，救世主，就让那刽子手留在我们的阴影中——你的前路将是光明，和永恒不熄的烈火。
Go on, Deliverer. We'll keep that executioner in our shadows — the path before you leads to light and eternal flames.
缇宝老师，看哪…我们已经到创世涡心了。
Tribbie, look... we made it to the Vortex.
那神谕中描摹的明天，西风尽头的花海，「再创世」…很快就能实现……
That prophesized future, the flower fields where the west wind ends, Era Nova... we're so close now...
但…至少，请允许我在兑现誓约前，先暂缓脚步——
Please... allow me to pause just a moment before I keep my promise—
让我将那刽子手的心脏从无形中取出，告慰你苦痛的命运吧。
Let me answer your cruel fate by tearing that executioner's heart from the void.
{RUBY_B#只有一人能活到最后，见证「再创世」}「众人将与一人离别，惟其人将觐见奇迹，此乃命运使然……」{RUBY_E#}
{RUBY_B#Only one shall live till the end, and they alone will witness Era Nova}"All shall bid farewell to one, and that person alone will witness the miracle. Such is the will of fate."{RUBY_E#}
看来，泰坦揭示的未来也未必会实现。
So, even the future revealed by the Titans may not come to pass.
「再创世」…这件至美的作品，能够交由我最信任的学徒收针，我已没有遗憾。
The Era Nova... this unrivaled masterpiece, I have no regrets, now that I may entrust it to my most trusted apprentice.
命运从来颠扑不破。金线告诉我，黑潮正在向创世涡心涌来，很快便将吞没此地。我必须将最后的人性结成丝网，抵御洪流……
Fate is ever unassailable. The golden threads tell me the black tide rushes toward the Vortex, ready to swallow this place. I must weave the last of my humanity into a net to hold back the deluge...
「我将最后一次沐浴，在温热耀眼的黄金中」——现在，是时候将其兑现了。
"I shall have my final bath in warm and radiant gold." — Now, the hour of fulfillment has come.
原谅我吧：我必须翦除一切隐患，为新世界编织最坚韧的未来。
Forgive me. I must snip away every risk, to weave the strongest future for the new world.
言尽于此，该分别了。我会亲自料理那些可悲的刽子手——不以金丝，而以针锋。
There is nothing more to say. We part here. I shall personally dispatch that wretched executioner — not with threads of gold, but with the steel tip of a needle.
呵呵，您当真准备好了？容我郑重提醒：一旦您揭开记忆的真容……
Hehe, you really think you're prepared? Allow me to give you a warning most earnest: Once you see what these memories hide...
世界的进程，便再无回头的可能了。
The world's course... will be forever irreversible.
既然阁下心意已决，那便让我们共同见证吧。
Very well. As you have made up your mind, let us bear witness together.
身为这永恒剧场唯一的观众，我一直在恭候您的莅临，这也是为什么我必须向您展示这一切。
As the sole audience of this eternal theater, I have been rapturously awaiting your arrival. And this too is the very reason I must show you everything.
我相信，既然阁下沐浴过<color=#dbc291ff>那位星神</color>的瞥视——
I believe that, since you've bathed in <color=#dbc291ff>that Aeon's gaze</color>—
您就一定能令翁法罗斯停滞的命运，再度流动……
You can make Amphoreus's frozen fate flow once again...
明白了，我就在此地等候。
Very well, I'll be here. Waiting.
感到不知所措么？如您所见，此情此景正是戏剧《翁法罗斯》的最后篇章……
Feeling a bit lost? As you now see, this scene marks the final act of the drama "Amphoreus"...
<color=#dbc291ff>男人一手缔造，也是这个世界即将迎来的最后一次「永劫回归」。</color>
<color=#dbc291ff>The final Eternal Recurrence created by this man's hand, and the last one this world shall undergo.</color>
请看：那立于剑士身侧的，正是他时而称为伙伴、时而称作战友，那在历史中杳无踪迹的「无名英雄」——
Behold. At the swordsman's side stands one he has sometimes called companion, other times comrade, that Nameless Hero absent from the annals of history —
<color=#dbc291ff>{M#他}{F#她}就是少年儿时的憧憬，幻想中引领自己毅然前进的「救世主」——现在，以「无名客」的名义，{M#他}{F#她}已然成为翁法罗斯史诗不可或缺的一部分。</color>

<color=#dbc291ff>{M#He}{F#She} is the swordsman's ideal in his youth, the "Deliverer" that guided him resolutely onward through fantasy — And now, in the name of the "Nameless," {F#s}he has become an essential and inseparable part of the epic of Amphoreus.</color>
这一次，在{M#他}{F#她}的指引下，英雄将作出如何抉择，全世命运又将流向何方？还有，翁法罗斯一切的终极本质又是什么？……
And this time, under {M#his}{F#her} guidance, what choice shall the hero make? Whither shall the fate of the world flow? And what is the ultimate truth of the nature of Amphoreus...?
还有许多悬念尚未落地。但，就请允许我暂且退居幕后，掌声有请另一名更加合适的人选：他将为您揭晓答案，并带来第<unbreak>33550336</unbreak>次逐火之旅的终局——

There are many mysteries yet to be unwound. But, if I may, allow me to temporarily yield the stage to one far more fitting. Please, put your hands together and give a rousing round of applause for they who will reveal the answers, and bring about the final end of the <unbreak>33550336</unbreak>th Flame-Chase Journey—
<color=#dbc291ff>他就是方才无数记忆的主人，此时此刻踏入涡心的另一位贵客，已将自我燃成焦炭的——盗火行者！</color>
<color=#dbc291ff>The master of the countless memories we saw, the other important actor now stepping into the Vortex, they who have already burnt their own self to cinder — the Flame Reaver!</color>
清爽多了吧？走，找昔涟去。
All awake now? Great, let's go see Cyrene.
白厄，要去哪里？昔涟没和你一起吗？
Hey Phainon! Where you headed? No Cyrene today?
白厄哥哥，教我像你一样挥剑吧！
Phainon, show me how to use a sword like you do!
再等等吧，等你再长高一点！
Wait till you grow a bit more!
村子就这么大，当年藏下的童年秘密都还在原地吧？
In a village this size, I bet all our childhood treasures are exactly where we hid them.
嗯，时间一定在好好保管它们。
Mm-hmm, time must be keeping them safe for us.
No sign of the oracle cards...
让我想想…啊，还有一个地方没去找过。
Let's see... Ah! There's one place we haven't checked yet.
（楼上的风景，还没见过…上去看看吧？）
(I wonder what the view's like from up there... Worth checking out?)
是这么走的吗？应该没错……
Pretty sure this is it... Should be this way...
还真钻进来了，不容易…都记不得上次来是什么时候了。
I made it! That wasn't easy... I can't remember the last time I came here.
那时我们都是小孩子呢。
We were still kids back then.
Look who it is! Reney and Snowy!
树干潮湿，小心别滑下去啦。
Watch your step, the trunk's slippery!
Someone's been working the field recently...
嘿嘿，我们最近引进了很好吃的「刺刺球」哦！
Heehee~ We're growing these yummy "Quillorbs" now!
村长大人！小涟和小白回来啦——
Chief! Reney and Snowy have returned—
My journey to the Era Nova... it ends here...
哼，惟一人能见证「再创世」又何妨？
Hmph! So what if there's only one person left to witness the Era Nova?
言尽于此。去吧，代我完成「再创世」。
Enough talk. Go, make the Era Nova happen in my stead.
待到「再创世」后，天空也将放晴。
When the Era Nova comes, the skies will clear again.
真是寒碜的「再创世」啊，救世小子。
Now this is one sorry excuse for an Era Nova, Deliverer boy.
我相信…「再创世」的彼岸是一片花海。
I just know... Beyond the Era Nova lies a sea of flowers.
小白，就请你代*我们*实现「再创世」吧！
Go on, Snowy. Make the Era Nova happen for all of us!
救世主啊，即使孑然一身，也请你成就「再创世」的伟业。
O Deliverer, though you walk alone, please complete the work of bringing about the Era Nova.
Please, take your time. Look around as much as you wish.
I wanna play with you guys too!
Youth is always brimming with energy.
The weather's great today, have fun!
我能在这儿钓一整天的鱼……
I could just fish here all day...
不知道石榴汁加奶味道如何……
I wonder how pomegranate juice with milk would taste...
不会在最上层罐子里吧……
It's not in the jar on the topmost shelf, is it...?
别了，{NICKNAME}。现在，我将兑现我最后的命运。
Farewell, {NICKNAME}. This is where I fulfill my final destiny.
「救世主」的神谕，于我已无意义。它应当被交予更合适的人手中，也就是你。
The prophecy of the "Deliverer" means nothing to me now. It belongs in the hands of someone far more fitting. Someone like you.
<color=#dbc291ff>卡厄斯兰那，背负混沌之人</color>，此名非一人所有，它是神话中刻法勒的化身，亦是「英雄」的代名词。
<color=#dbc291ff>Khaslana, the name of one who bears chaos</color>, does not belong to a single person. Rather, it is the embodiment of the mythical Kephale and a symbol of all heroes.

诚如神谕所示：<color=#dbc291ff>「</color>{RUBY_B#<color=#dbc291ff>白厄</color>}<color=#dbc291ff>汝</color>{RUBY_E#}<color=#dbc291ff>将肩负骄阳，直至</color>{RUBY_B#<color=#dbc291ff>开拓者</color>}<color=#dbc291ff>灰白的黎明</color>{RUBY_E#}<color=#dbc291ff>显著」</color>——在你亲手谱写的史诗中，愿这名号能代我同行。

As the prophecy foretold: <color=#dbc291ff>"</color>{RUBY_B#<color=#dbc291ff>Phainon</color>}<color=#dbc291ff>You</color>{RUBY_E#} <color=#dbc291ff>will bear the blazing sun, until</color> {RUBY_B#<color=#dbc291ff>Trailblazer</color>}<color=#dbc291ff>the pale dawn</color>{RUBY_E#} <color=#dbc291ff>breaks."</color> May the name accompany you in my place in the epic you write with your own hands.
又一次尝试，又一次失败。
我无意提醒这是你第几次抵达历史的尽头，但我仍会将选择的权力置于你的面前。
I won't remind you how many times you've reached the end of history, but I will still place the choice before you.
如果你不记得，我来告诉你吧：这是第<unbreak>33550336</unbreak>次终结。
If you've lost count, let me tell you: this is the <unbreak>33,550,336</unbreak>th ending.
啊，一个完全数，多么绝妙的巧合。你我都心知肚明，在这三千万世徒劳中，翁法罗斯从未发生改变。
Ah, a perfect number. How poetic. You and I both know the truth: In all these millions of futile endeavors, Amphoreus has never changed.
结局既已注定，那何不浇灭你那灼痛世间的怒火，以更具尊严的身姿拥抱自身的命运？
If the outcome is inevitable, then why not silence your searing rage and embrace your fate with dignity?
你的沉默比过去每一次都更长，白厄阁下……
Your silence lasts longer than ever, Lord Phainon...
我是否可以理解为：你那跨越无数轮回的意志，已经出现了裂痕？
Shall I take that to mean the will you've carried across countless cycles is finally starting to fracture?
不，我只是感到失望。我取回了三千万个前世的记忆，也清晰地记得每一次抉择前的交谈。
No. I'm just disappointed. I've retrieved memories from thirty million past lives. And I remember every conversation before every choice here.
我对你重复且枯燥的话术感到失望。你若执意要在我心中凿开裂痕…那就早该利用起这无比漫长的时光，好好磨砺你那毫无感染力的说辞。
And yet, even after all this time, your arguments remain the same: repetitive, uninspired. If you had any hope of breaking me, you should have spent those endless cycles refining your rhetoric.
你有过无数次机会，劝服过去那无数个我，令我走进你想要的未来。可现在的结果？<unbreak>33550336</unbreak>比0。
You had infinite chances to sway me into the future you want... And yet, here we are. The score: <unbreak>33,550,336</unbreak> to 0.
告诉我，吕枯耳戈斯——谁才是输家？
So tell me, Lycurgus — who's the real loser here?
很遗憾，这不是一场规则公平的游戏。我拥有近乎无穷的时光和耐心，可以与你在世界尽头再相遇亿万次、乃至又一个亿万次……
How unfortunate. This was never a fair game. I have all the time and patience in the world. I can wait for you at the end of history another billion times... and another billion after that.
但你永远都不可能翻越这座牢笼。你大可宣告自己精神上的胜利——但你我皆知，当比分的另一头迎来由0至1的一刻……
But you? You will never escape this cage. You can claim victory of the spirit if you wish. But we both know — the moment that score shifts from 0 to 1...
我便足以奏响「再创世」的凯歌。
That is the moment I shall sound the Paean of Era Nova.
你的无能令我失望，但真正引我发笑的，是你毫不自知的狂妄。
Your incompetence disappoints me, but what truly makes me laugh is your utter lack of self-awareness.
好好想想吧！在这个故事里，究竟谁才是那个被束缚的囚徒？是谁被一则无趣的「复仇」奴役至今，又误把反抗神明的勇气当成了愚蠢？
Think about it. In this story, who is truly the one in chains? Who is the one shackled to mindless "vengeance," mistaking courage, the courage to rebel against the gods for foolishness?
你没说错，或许我该对这无尽的徒劳感到厌倦了。但即便如此，我也不会接受你施舍的解脱。
Perhaps you're right. Maybe I should have tired of this futile struggle long ago. But even so, I will never accept the mercy of your release.
因为你既是神的奴隶，也是我的囚徒，区区阶下囚，有何资格与我谈论命运和抉择？
Because you... you are both a prisoner to the gods and to me. And tell me, what right does a mere prisoner have to speak of fate and choice?
——区区阶下囚，有何资格直视我的怒火？！
What right does a mere prisoner have — to look upon my fury!?
你知道这毫无意义。你无法将我杀死。
You know this is pointless. You can't kill me.
当然，我只是厌烦了被一条由神豢养的虫豸当成旗鼓相当的对手。
Of course not. But I am tired of being measured against a worm the gods keep as a pet.
「毁灭」的造物主，听好了：这声呐喊，来自所有被你遗弃的造物——
Listen well, creator of Destruction. This cry comes from all your abandoned creations...
第十次轮回，我将侵晨刺入每一尊泰坦的心脏，金血沿我指尖淌下，神火灼烧的剧痛几乎令我放弃了挣扎——但我坚持了下来。
In the tenth cycle, I drove Dawnmaker through the heart of every Titan. Golden blood ran down my fingers. Divine fire seared through my nerves, nearly breaking my will — but I endured.
第一万次轮回，昔日的伙伴已尽数成为仇敌。无尽的杀戮令我不知苦痛为何物，沉痛的虚无几乎将我吞噬，逼迫我停止抗争——但我坚持了下来。

In the ten-thousandth cycle, my former comrades had all become my enemies. The endless slaughter dulled my senses to pain. The painful emptiness almost swallowed me, forcing me to stop fighting — but I endured.
第十万次轮回，「毁灭」早已汇成烈阳，在这具脆弱的躯壳中翻涌，理智在纪元开端便燃烧殆尽…但，纵使只剩下这破碎的身躯，我依旧坚持了下来。

In the hundred-thousandth cycle, the Destruction had already fused into a blazing sun, surging within this fragile body. My rationality had been burned away at the dawn of the era... Yet even with only this shattered body remaining, I still endured.
第两千三百五十七万次轮回…这一次，我感受到了，在早已被挖空的胸腔内，升起了一簇不同于救世执念的火苗……
In the twenty-three million five hundred seventy-thousandth cycle... This time, I felt it: a tiny spark rising in the hollow cavity of my chest, different from the obsession with Deliverance...
依托它微弱的光亮…又一次——不，无数次——我坚持了下来！
By its faint glow... once again — no, countless times again — I endured!
现在，一轮太阳将走向陨落，它顷刻便能将这荒诞的时空焚烧殆尽——
Now, a sun is about to fall, ready to incinerate this absurd space-time dimension in an instant—
它就是我——过去无数个我——还有我那无数并非自愿诞生在世上，在你的金血中反复沉沦的同胞，这个世界一切痛苦和绝望熔合而成的，最纯粹的恨意，最炽盛的怒火——

That sun is me — all the countless versions of me from the past — along with my countless brethren, dragged into existence against their will, drowning again and again in your golden blood. The very essence of this world's suffering and despair, fused into the purest hatred, the fiercest rage—
纳努克，你这傲慢的蠢货！你觉得化作薪柴就是我们的命运？好啊，那就如你所愿，让薪柴燃烧吧——
Nanook, you arrogant fool! You think we were born only to serve as fuel for the fire? Fine, then — just as you wish, let the fire burn!
<color=#dbc291ff>若我生来是「毁灭」的骄阳，便让你和你的走卒尽数作我爆发的耀斑！然后，就让这团徒劳燃烧了三千万个纪元的怒火淹没一切——</color>

<color=#dbc291ff>If I was born as the blazing sun of Destruction, then let you and your lackeys be the flares erupting from my core! And let this rage, burning futilely for thirty million epochs, engulf everything—</color>
<color=#dbc291ff><size=28>And grant you a dawn where all stars burn to ash!</size></color>
Answer me... will you be the blazing sun...
Even if all creation... burns to ash...
逐火…是不断失却的旅途……
Losses... are a constant on the Flame-Chase journey...
And you haven't lost... nearly enough...
该结束了，我将用你的尸身——
This ends now! With your corpse...
The suns of destruction... now twinned...
让它点燃你的血液…你的愤怒…！
Feel them set your blood ablaze... your fury...!
This form shall fuel the fire... burn, burn unceasing!
Come... let the fires of fury devour me...!
或成为此世…下一座焦碑…！
Or become the next epitaph... seared upon this burning world!
「惟有一人能觐见奇迹…此乃命运使然……」
"One person alone may witness the miracle... Such is the will of fate..."
That person... can only be... you.
终于，翁法罗斯的命运开始转动了。如我所言，您的到来会改变一切。
At last, Amphoreus's fate has begun to shift. Just as I foretold, your arrival will change everything.
毕竟，您也沐浴过<color=#dbc291ff>那位星神</color>的瞥视，能唤醒男人心中，沉睡已久的本能……
After all, you've also been bathed in <color=#dbc291ff>that Aeon's gaze</color>, which can awaken the long-dormant instinct inside a man...
就像先前提到的那柄「权杖」，也是在<color=#dbc291ff>同一位星神</color>的注视下，才重获新生。
Much like that Scepter we spoke of earlier... It was only under <color=#dbc291ff>the same Aeon's glance</color> that it was reborn.
呵呵，没错。如果您还记得，我在戏剧开幕时提起过它，那遭受星神抛弃的，本属于「智识」的天体神经元……
Heh... that's right. If you recall, I mentioned it at the very start of our play: the Celestial-Body Neuron, once belonging to the Erudition, abandoned by the Aeon...
现在，让我为您揭开最后的谜底吧。
Now, allow me to reveal the final piece of the puzzle for you.
<color=#dbc291ff>名为「翁法罗斯」的永恒之地，正是那台权杖漫长而孤独的演算——</color>
<color=#dbc291ff>The Eternal Land known as "Amphoreus" is nothing more than the Scepter's endless, lonely extrapolation...</color>
<color=#dbc291ff>是它对遗弃自身的神明，深不见底的怒火啊！</color>
<color=#dbc291ff>A bottomless well of fury, aimed at the god who cast it aside!</color>
我们是为了回应世界的愿望而启程的，对吧？
We set out on this journey to answer the world's desire, didn't we?
每一位黄金裔都是如此，从未改变。
That's what it means to be a Chrysos Heir. So has it always been.
翁法罗斯的愿望，如此不讲道理呢？
...Why must Amphoreus's wishes be so... cruel?
明明在每一个正确的时间点，大家已经尽己所能，做出了最正确的选择。
We made the best choices we could, whenever we could!
可到头来，指引我们的神谕，吞没世界的黑潮……
But in the end... the prophecy that led us... this black tide swallowing everything...
Why does it look like this?
那些焦痕…闪烁的几何…根本不是什么潮水……
Those burn marks... The flickering cubes... They're not a tide at all...
它就像是…一面破碎的{RUBY_B#屏幕}石版{RUBY_E#}。
站在这里，泰坦的声音前所未有地清晰，原来它们……
Standing here, the voices of Titans have never been clearer. Turns out...
They were coming from the black tide all along.
那是「翁法罗斯」在哭泣吗？
也许，是它在怒吼吧。向着它的造物主，它的神明。
Or maybe... it is screaming. At its creator. At its god.
白厄，你还记得吗？小时候，我做过一个梦：梦里是个昏暗、冰冷的小房间，只有欧洛尼斯的帷幕在闪闪发光，就像晶莹的水晶……
Phainon, do you still remember when I was little, I had a dream: A dark, cold room, with nothing but Oronyx's curtain glowing like crystal...
它的帷幕仿佛能装下整个翁法罗斯，光怪陆离的戏剧在其中上演……
The curtain seemed to contain all of Amphoreus, where strange and fantastic dramas played out within...
里面有无数个我们，来自无数个不同的世界。
There were countless versions of us, from countless different worlds.
是呀。看着眼前的世界，悲伤的念头还是化作了现实……
Yeah. As I gaze at the world before me, those sorrowful thoughts have become reality...
原来这才是天空被封闭的原因，翁法罗斯也只是更大的哀丽秘榭……
So, this is the reason the sky was sealed. Amphoreus is merely a larger Aedes Elysiae...
我们只是这{RUBY_B#实验场}小小世界{RUBY_E#}的戏中人，沿着{RUBY_B#程序}神谕{RUBY_E#}的指引，一遍又一遍踏上相同的{RUBY_B#演算}旅程{RUBY_E#}……
We are just characters in this {RUBY_B#laboratory}tiny world{RUBY_E#}, following the {RUBY_B#program}prophecy{RUBY_E#}, stepping onto the same {RUBY_B#extrapolation}journey{RUBY_E#} over and over...
那所谓的「再创世」…究竟是什么？
What, then, is this so-called "Era Nova"?
看着这一切的观众，又在期待什么呢？
And what are the spectators, watching all of this, truly hoping for?
呵呵，作为抵达世界尽头的回报，就由我来为二位解惑吧。
Heh, as a reward for reaching the end of the world, let me answer your questions.
以神礼观众之名，我见到——
As the Theoros, I have observed...
最后一次「再创世」 永劫回归开始前
Final "Era Nova," before the Eternal Recurrence begins.
Thus, is the synthesis of the "prime mover of life" formed.
这是值得为宇宙铭记的一刻。千万次演算过后，名为「翁法罗斯」的实验场，终于迎来了成果。
This is a moment the universe will remember. After millions of extrapolations, the experimental environment known as "Amphoreus" has finally achieved results.
你口中的「成果」，就是这一片狼藉的世界？
So, the "results" you speak of... are this wreckage of a world?
我们拼尽一切，归还十二枚火种再造天地，换来的结局……
We all gave everything we had, returning twelve Coreflames to recreate the world... and in return...
就是在世界尽头，成为供奉给<color=#dbc291ff>它</color>的祭品？
We become nothing more than sacrificial offerings at the end of everything?
没错。泰坦是过去的黄金裔，黄金裔是未来的泰坦——阿那克萨戈拉斯对「再创世」的推演基本属实。作为「理性」的模型，他达到了前所未有的高度。

Exactly. The Titans are Chrysos Heirs of the past, and Chrysos Heirs are the Titans of the future — Anaxagoras's theory of "Era Nova" holds true. As the model of "Reason," he reached unprecedented heights.
只是，仅以戏中人的视角，他终究无法揭开最后一层本质。
But, from just the perspective of a player in the drama, he could never fully uncover the last layer of truth.
名为「英雄之旅」的进程循环至今，既不是为了「新世界」，也不是为了创造出完美的英雄或神明——
The cycles of the "Hero's Journey" that have played out until now were never about creating a new world or perfect heroes and gods—
<color=#dbc291ff>而是一场献给黑潮的「深度学习」。</color>
<color=#dbc291ff>They were a deep-learning program made for the black tide.</color>
但这一次，你的阴谋要落空了。我已接过刻法勒的火种，等到新世界的黎明升起，火光将烧尽所有的黑暗。
But this time, your plot will fail. I've taken Kephale's Coreflame, and when the dawn of the new world arrives, its light will burn away all the darkness.
是我的解释不够清晰么？黄金裔和泰坦，都只是实验的附属。你们一路走来，早已知晓这世界演进的过程，见证黑潮是如何诞生、成长，最终席卷万物，摧毁一切——

Haven't I made myself clear? The Chrysos Heirs and Titans were merely byproducts of the experiment. You've seen this world's evolution, witnessed the birth and growth of the black tide, and how it devoured everything—
一代代英雄、神明、世界，都是为了被它「毁灭」而生。
Every generation of heroes, gods, and worlds was born only to be destroyed by it.
<color=#dbc291ff>这便是翁法罗斯计算的终点，一道完美的「毁灭」方程式。</color>
<color=#dbc291ff>This is the endpoint of Amphoreus's calculations: a perfect equation of Destruction.</color>
在你眼中，所有牺牲的人，都只是一串渺小的数字吗？
So in your eyes, all the sacrifices are just a string of insignificant numbers?
不必妄自菲薄。比起数字，我更愿意将你们比作「柴薪」。若无薪火，便没有明日的朝阳。
Don't sell yourselves short. I'd say, rather than numbers, you're more like "fuel for the fire." And without fire, there can be no sunrise tomorrow.
即便那太阳，是从破灭中诞生？
Even if that sunrise is born from annihilation?
呵呵，奇怪的问题。你可曾想过，在千万次演算中，翁法罗斯已然踏上不同于「智识」的另一条命途。它也早已将神明的赐福，平等地分给了每个孩子……

Heh, curious question. Have you ever considered that, after millions of extrapolations, Amphoreus is already following a different Path from the Erudition? It has long since granted divine blessings equally to each child...
<color=#dbc291ff>那就是诸位体内流淌的金血，它源自与「毁灭」同名的负创神。翁法罗斯的黄金裔，从最初就是星神燃烧宇宙的柴薪啊。</color>

<color=#dbc291ff>The golden blood flowing in your veins... It comes from The Blemished One, whose name is "Destruction" itself. And Amphoreus's Chrysos Heirs were, from the very beginning, fuel for the Aeon to burn the universe.</color>
翁法罗斯已经等待了这一刻太久。在空虚、冰冷而孤独的演算尽头——「毁灭」抵达了终点。
Amphoreus has waited for this moment for too long. At the end of the empty, cold, and lonely extrapolations — the Destruction has reached its final destination.
无需感到遗憾，这一代「黄金裔」是最为杰出的模型，两位是最后的因子。对于你们，再创世绝非谎言，只需踏上前来，拥抱黑潮，接受星神的瞥视。

No need to feel regret. This generation of Chrysos Heirs is the most outstanding model, and you two are the final factors. For you, the Era Nova is no lie. Just step forward, embrace the black tide, and accept the Aeon's gaze.
你们将从一串冰冷的数字，升格为真正的生命，与所有逝去的存在一同，奔向现实宇宙，完成翁法罗斯的夙愿——
You will come to life from a string of cold numbers. Along with all those who have passed, you will run toward the real universe, fulfilling Amphoreus's long-held wish—
<color=#dbc291ff>以绝灭大君「铁墓」之名，倾泻它的{RUBY_B#<color=#dbc291ff>黑潮</color>}怒火{RUBY_E#}，摧毁{RUBY_B#<color=#dbc291ff>「智识」博识尊</color>}这一切悲剧的源头{RUBY_E#}！</color>

<color=#dbc291ff>In the name of the Lord Ravager Irontomb, unleash its {RUBY_B#<color=#dbc291ff>black tide</color>}fury{RUBY_E#} and destroy {RUBY_B#<color=#dbc291ff>Nous the Erudition</color>}the source of all this tragedy{RUBY_E#}!</color>
...Or, we could always choose another option.
就像你说的，翁法罗斯只是一场实验，我们是局中人，只能沿着既定的轨迹，走向被星星注视的结局……
Like you said, Amphoreus is just an experiment, and we're the participants. We can only walk along the predetermined path toward the ending under the watchful eyes of the stars...
但那也意味着，会向翁法罗斯投来瞥视的「星神」，肯定不止一位吧？
But that also means that there isn't just one Aeon who can cast THEIR glance at Amphoreus, right?
哎呀，这个问题很难回答吗？还是说我猜对了，实际上……
Heh, is this question really that hard to answer? Or did I guess it right? And in reality...
<color=#dbc291ff>这个世界早就在其他星神的视线中了？</color>
<color=#dbc291ff>This world has already been under the watch of other Aeons?</color>
因为怎么想都很奇怪嘛。明明只要冷眼旁观，看着我们完成仪式，被黑潮吞噬，你的目的自然就能达成。
It's strange when you think about it. If you just stayed back, watching us complete the ritual and get consumed by the black tide, your goal would naturally be achieved.
何必多此一举，向我们解释这么多呢？
Why go through the trouble of explaining all this to us?
你故作姿态，将所谓的「真相」全盘托出，不过是为了欺瞒我们，掩盖另一种可能……
You're pretending, revealing the so-called truth just to deceive us, covering up another possibility...
翁法罗斯的命运，不止「毁灭」一种结局。
Destruction is not the only outcome for the fate of Amphoreus.
二位想以「半神」这卑微的身份，改写被群星写定的结局？
Do you two really think, as petty little "demigods," you can change the outcome written by the stars?
你们凭什么觉得自己能做到？
What makes you think you're capable of doing that?
嗯…一点小小的勇气和决心？开玩笑的，其实答案很简单啦——
Hmm... A little courage and determination? Just kidding, the answer is pretty simple—
不过，我们可不打算告诉你♪
But, we're not gonna tell ya ♪
我们要给「翁法罗斯」编织一场长长的梦，让它相信实验仍未结束，一切仍在继续……
We're going to weave a long dream for Amphoreus, making it believe the experiment hasn't ended, that everything is still ongoing...
以欧洛尼斯的力量，应该无论如何都无法做到吧。
With just Oronyx's power, though, it should be impossible to achieve this, right?
是啊。所以，我只能寄希望于童年的那场梦……
Yeah. So, I can only place my hopes on that childhood dream...
<color=#dbc291ff>在那梦里出现的，欧洛尼斯背后的神明。</color>
<color=#dbc291ff>And the god behind Oronyx that appeared in that dream.</color>
现在，我能够确信：「岁月」就是{RUBY_B#<color=#dbc291ff>「记忆」浮黎</color>}<color=#dbc291ff>那位星神</color>{RUBY_E#}记录翁法罗斯的书页。如果它从世上消失，它铭记的一切在星空中佚失，那位「星神」一定会将视线投向这里……

Now, I can say with certainty: "Time" is the page on which {RUBY_B#<color=#dbc291ff>Fuli the Remembrance</color>}<color=#dbc291ff>that Aeon</color>{RUBY_E#} records Amphoreus. If it fades from existence and all that it records is lost among the stars, that Aeon will surely direct THEIR gaze here...
那会是一道跨越时空的瞥视，它将让今后的每一个我都能够化作你重置岁月的力量——将我的灵魂注入这柄仪式剑，创造一场{RUBY_B#<color=#dbc291ff>永不完成的「再创世」</color>}<color=#dbc291ff>永不终结的逐火之旅</color>{RUBY_E#}。

And it will be a glance that spans time and space, transforming each incarnation of me into the power you shall wield to reset time — imbuing my soul into this ceremonial blade, and creating an {RUBY_B#<color=#dbc291ff>unending Era Nova</color>}<color=#dbc291ff>endless Flame-Chase Journey</color>{RUBY_E#}.
我明白。就让我踏入轮回，延续翁法罗斯的计算…欺骗众神，欺骗这个世界。
I understand. Then let me step into the cycles and continue Amphoreus's grand design: to deceive the gods, deceive the world itself.
但，要让「岁月」从世上消失，也就意味着，你……
But to make "Time" vanish from this world, that would mean you...
好啦，别让气氛这么沉重嘛。
Alright, alright, let's not make things so gloomy.
我们将要踏上的，可是真正的英雄之旅呀。所以……
What we're about to embark on is the true Hero's Journey. So...
C'mon, cheer up a bit, okay?
在那「记忆」中，你一定会再次遇见我。那个一无所知的小昔涟会躺在软软的草堆上，吹着轻快的风，憧憬着远方的世界。
In that "memory," you will definitely meet me again. The little Cyrene who knew nothing, lying on a soft patch of grass, feeling the light breeze, dreaming of the distant world.
把逐火之旅讲给她听吧，然后…让她也成为这故事中浪漫的一笔。
Tell her about the Flame-Chase Journey, and then... let her become a romantic part of this story.
我相信，未来的每一个她都会做出和我同样的选择：无数次抹除「岁月」，无数次重置时间——毕竟她们都是我呀，而人家的魅力就是始终如一。
I believe every Cyrene will make the same choice - erasing "Time" again and again, resetting time over and over. After all, they're all me, and I will always have my charm.
然后，我就会沉入甜甜的梦乡，消失在世界的小角落里……
Then, I'll fall into a sweet dream, disappearing in some small corner of the world...
静静地，等待下一页被翻开的那天。
Quietly, waiting for the day when that next page is turned.
而我会继续走下去。即便前路是一片黑暗，我也会燃烧自我将其照亮。
And I will keep going. Even if the road ahead is dark, I will burn myself to light the way.
与其让火种沦为黑潮的给养，不如由我来成为它们的容器，阻止「再创世」到来。哪怕要燃尽这肉体也无妨，只要我不曾熄灭，逐火就不会终结……

Rather than let the Coreflames become nourishment for the black tide, I'll become their vessel, to prevent the arrival of Era Nova. Even if I have to burn through my own body, it's no matter. As long as I don't extinguish, the Flame-Chase will never end...
直到翁法罗斯，迎来真正的黎明。
Until Amphoreus welcomes a true dawn.
守望岁月的少女，和背负世界的战士……
The girl who watches over time, and the warrior who carries the world...
现在，就让我们履行「岁月」和「负世」的使命……
Now, let us fulfill the duties of "Time" and "Worldbearing"...
Honor the past, and forge ahead.
我向你保证，痛苦…转瞬即逝。
I promise you, the pain... will pass in the blink of an eye.
你要握紧这柄仪式剑。在我离去后，它会把你送回时间的起点，一段新故事的开篇。
You need to hold tight to this ceremonial blade. After I'm gone, it will take you back to the beginning of time, the start of a new story.
我相信，在那段故事里，又或者无数段相似而不相同的故事之后，大家…所有牺牲的伙伴，都能和我们儿时憧憬的「救世主」一起，在更辽阔的星空下相聚。

I believe that in that story, or in countless stories, each alike yet unique, everyone... all the companions who sacrificed themselves, alongside the Deliverer we once dreamed of as children, will reunite beneath a vast, endless sky.
…倘若我们终究无法冲破这座囚笼，我会坚守。直到有人前来打破这漫长的轮回，为翁法罗斯的命运添上结尾。
...If we can never break free from this prison, I will stand my ground. Until the day someone shatters this endless cycle and writes the final chapter of Amphoreus's fate.
所以，我们该启程啦，成为开启一切的人……
So, let's set out. We will be the ones to start everything...
就像你的名字那样，背负起最初的混沌，和这个我们深爱的世界吧……
Carry the primordial chaos, just as your name suggests, and bear this world we hold so dear...
哀丽秘榭，儿时的小村庄，微风和涛声依旧。
Aedes Elysiae, the little village of my childhood. The gentle breeze and the sound of waves still linger.
一切如常。很高兴，最后还能回望它一眼。
Everything is as it was. It feels good to take one last look.
你知道，这里只是记忆的一角，真正的哀丽秘榭……
You know, this is just a corner of the memory. The real Aedes Elysiae...
我是来道别的。或许，我们不会再见了。
I'm here to say goodbye. We might not see each other again.
你可以一直留在这里，时间会为你停滞。
You can stay here forever, and time will stand still for you.
让它流淌起来吧。我该出发了。
Let it flow. It's time for me to go.
即便那是一条无法回头的路？
Even if it's a path with no turning back?
我们何时有过回头的选择？
When have we ever had the luxury of turning back?
…你害怕了吗？在了解到自己的本源后……
...Are you afraid? After learning the truth of your origins...
你会将「我」给予你的动力，视作「毁灭」蛊惑人心的低语吗？
Will you see the motivation "I" gave you as the manipulating whispers of Destruction?
那些源自本心的坚持和选择，我不相信它们是所谓「命途」的设计……
The convictions and choices that come from my heart... I don't believe they're designed by the so-called "Paths"...
若我们生来只是一串模拟生命的数字，那你就是我所憧憬的形象，想要成为的样子。
If we are just numbers simulating life, then you are the image I've always longed for, the person I wish to become.
一个真实的、活生生的人。一个真正的「英雄」。
A real, living person. A true hero.
那又何必在这里作别？你可以带上我，一同启程。我会陪伴在你左右，给你指引，一如既往。
Then why do we part here? You can take me with you, and we can start this journey together. I'll be by your side, guiding you, just like before.
不。恐怕，我只能独自上路了。
No. I'm afraid I'm on my own this time.
因为这世上不存在两全其美。昔涟已经拥抱了她的命运……
Because there is no perfect solution in this world. Cyrene has already embraced her fate...
而我，也会投身自己的本源——「毁灭」——以这力量反抗它的造主，为席卷世间的黑暗，带去无尽的怒火。
And I will embrace my origin — Destruction — and with this power, I will rebel against its creator, bringing endless fury to the darkness sweeping the world.
你若陪在我身边，我会踟蹰…但这个世界已容不下一个优柔寡断的士兵。
If you stay by my side, I'll hesitate... but this world can't afford a soldier who wavers.
还记得么？小时候，孩子们要是抽到「君王」或「勇士」就欢呼雀跃，抽到「魔人」或者「酒鬼」就嚷嚷着这次不算，再来一次……
Do you still remember when we were kids, everyone would get so excited drawing cards like "Ruler" or "Warrior," but throw fits over "Devil" or "Drunkard" and demand a redo...
想反悔就反悔，孩子们总是幸福的……
Kids always get to change their minds. Things are so happy and simple for them...
可属于大人的命运，从来没有回头的选择。
But when it comes to the fate of adults, there's no room for redos.
那就去吧，卡厄斯兰那。如你约定的那般：欺骗世界，夺得火种，扭转命运……
Then go, Khaslana, as you promised: Deceive the world, seize the Coreflames, and rewrite fate...
奋力地燃烧自己，以徒劳为剑，反抗神明吧——
Burn yourself up with all your might, wield your futility like a sword, and fight against the gods—
以「负世」之名，我向你保证……
In the name of "Worldbearing," I promise you...
于是，时间向我身后退去。
直至万物都不曾存在的起源。
Until it reached the origin, where nothing ever existed.
诚如那刻夏老师所说，在那一片虚空中，{RUBY_B#负世之泰坦}刻法勒{RUBY_E#}立于混沌的中心，时间、空间和因果，都从它的身躯中流溢而出……
Just as Professor Anaxa once said, in that void, {RUBY_B#Worldbearing Titan}Kephale{RUBY_E#} stood at the center of chaos. Time, space, and causality all flowed from their body...
当岁月的浪潮终于平息，已是光历<unbreak>3870</unbreak>年。
When the waves of time finally calmed, it was the year <unbreak>3870</unbreak> of the Light Calendar.
黄金战争已持续近一个世纪。黑潮的威胁愈演愈烈，势不可挡。
The Chrysos War had lasted for nearly a century. And the threat of the black tide was growing stronger and more relentless.
那是「阳雷骑士」剑指天空的时代。她没能摘得火种，却印证了预言——凡人也能够弑杀神明。
That was the era of the Daythunder Knight's battle with the Sky. While she could not seize the Coreflame, she proved that the prophecy was true — that mortals could slay gods.
自此，旧王朝的孑遗，<color=#dbc291ff>「凯撒」刻律德菈</color>向天下号令，召集各邦黄金裔英雄，向泰坦宣战——
From that moment, the sole survivor of the old dynasty, <color=#dbc291ff>Imperator Cerydra</color>, issued a call to arms across the lands, summoning heroic Chrysos Heirs to wage war on the Titans—
<color=#dbc291ff>那便是尘封于历史中，以失败告终的…第一次逐火之旅。</color>
<color=#dbc291ff>And that was the first, doomed Flame-Chase Journey, sealed away in history.</color>
所以，你的意思是：你在时间中溯洄而上，行至未曾抵达的这片海床，只为告诉我们——
So, what you're saying is: You've traveled back down the river of time, finally reaching this untouched seabed, just to tell us—
逐火之旅，乃至整个翁法罗斯，都不过是「星神」梦中的泡影？
The Flame-Chase Journey, and even all of Amphoreus, are nothing but illusions in an Aeon's dreams?
没错。所以，剑旗爵，请引领我觐见刻律德菈陛下吧，我有义务将真相如实相告。
Exactly. So, Dux Gladiorum, please take me to meet Her Majesty Cerydra. I must share the truth with her.
既然陛下不在，不必多礼了。「剑旗」二字总会让我想起那葬身渊下的故国……
Since Her Majesty is not here, no need for formalities. The word "Gladiorum" always reminds me of my fallen homeland buried deep in the depths...
还是叫我<color=#dbc291ff>海瑟音</color>吧，无名剑士。
容我多嘴一句，您早已知晓我的姓名了。
Please allow me to add one more thing. You actually already know my name.
你说「白厄」吗？这种名字怎么可能是本名……
You mean Phainon? Such a name could never be your true one...
但我不会追根究底。自陛下颁布逐火号令，世间英雄纷纷递来投名状，其中多一名「白厄」或「黑厄」又何妨？

But I won't question you further about it. Ever since Her Majesty issued the Flame-Chase decree, heroes from all over have sent their letters of introduction. What's the harm in adding one more name like Phainon or Pie-non?
况且，深海无光，不正适合藏起那些不便示人的秘密么？
Besides, the deep sea is dark. Isn't it the perfect place to hide secrets best left unseen?
好了，无名剑士。挽住我的尾流，换个地方说话吧。
Alright, nameless swordmaster. Hold onto my wake. Let's find somewhere else to talk.
您对我所说的，难道就不抱一丝质疑？
Aren't you even a little suspicious of what I've said?
Harboring suspicions is not my concern...
我手中的剑只为凯撒的疑心起舞。多说无益，请你用实际行动证明自己吧。
My sword dances only when the Imperator harbors doubts. There's no use in speaking further. Show me your true intentions through action.
水流到此为止，你寻找的人，就在这之后了。
The waters end here. The one you seek is beyond this point.
刻律德菈陛下，终于要面见本尊了。
At last, I can meet with Her Majesty Cerydra herself.
有什么需要注意的礼节么？
Are there any formalities I need to observe?
别屈膝，别行旧王朝的吻手和吻脚礼，更别跪拜——凯撒厌恶繁文缛节——更厌恶比她高的人头颅低过她的皇冠。

Don't kneel, don't do the hand-kissing or foot-kissing gestures of the old dynasty, and most of all, don't bow — the Imperator despises such rituals — especially when the heads of those taller than her bend beneath her crown.
这就是第二件要注意的事了：非亲信不得近身。在凯撒同意前，请保持五步之遥。
The second thing to note: Only trusted ones may come near her. Keep five paces distance until the Imperator allows otherwise.
这听起来倒像我另一位故人。
Sounds like an old friend of mine.
有经验就好。机灵些，你会安然无恙的。
Well, experience is a good thing. Stay sharp, and you'll be just fine.
{RUBY_B#阿格莱雅}金织爵{RUBY_E#}和{RUBY_B#缇宝}质子{RUBY_E#}，久等了。
{RUBY_B#Aglaea}Dux Goldweaver{RUBY_E#}, {RUBY_B#Tribbie}little hostage{RUBY_E#}. Apologies for keeping you waiting.
你认识她们？那就好说了。
You know them? Good, that makes things easier.
在那之前，我更好奇另一件事：刻律德菈陛下，她人在哪里？
Before that, I'm more curious about one thing: Where is Her Majesty Cerydra?
以免你误会，无名剑士：虽然这一路有说有笑，但我可从没说过你有权利觐见她。
To avoid any misunderstandings, nameless swordmaster: Although we spoke and laughed along the way, I never said you were entitled to meet her.
凯撒有令：「『救世主』绝不会在这个时代出现，须留心可疑之人」。
The Imperator decreed: "The 'Deliverer' will not appear in this age. Be wary of suspicious individuals."
来吧，两位，做我们该做的事。
Come now, both of you, let's finish our job.
Ah... I see, it's a trap.
我本无意争锋。所以，请记住，海瑟音阁下：如果我的剑因为恻隐而变得迟钝……
I had no intention of fighting. So, remember this, Lady Hysilens: If my sword shows any hesitation...
别感谢我——去感谢她们吧。
Don't thank me — thank them instead.
*我们*不想看见黄金裔伤害彼此。只需一些时间，让*我们*问你几个问题。
We don't want to see Chrysos Heirs hurt each other. Just give us some time to ask you a few questions.
然后，墨涅塔的「金丝」会做出裁断，宣判你的命运。
Then, Mnestia's "golden threads" will judge you and decide your fate.
白发的剑士，如果你所说不假，那你一定对世界的命运了若指掌——
White-haired swordmaster, if what you say is true, then you must know the fate of the world...
那么，*我们*从神谕中读到的预言，你知晓多少呢？
So, how much do you know about what we read from the prophecy?
<color=#dbc291ff>「汝将碎作千片，凋零在他乡的土壤。」</color>
<color=#dbc291ff>"You shall shatter into a thousand fragments and wither in the soil of foreign lands."</color>
是啊。可预言从未提及他的出现，至少…不属于这个时代。
Yes. But the prophecy never mentioned that he'd appear here. At least, not in this era.
你们必须听我说，阿格莱雅，缇宝老师：此世的「白厄」尚未诞生。在遥远的未来，他会遵从神谕指引，出现在你们面前——
You must listen to me, Aglaea, Tribbie. The Phainon of this world has not yet been born. In a distant future, he will follow the prophecy's guidance and appear before you—
但，不要去找他——因为「再创世」是一场彻头彻尾的骗局。
But do not seek him out — because "Era Nova" is a complete and utter lie.
我会将一切如实相告，你们也一定能明白：为何世人必须放弃神谕，找到另一条「再创世」的道路……
I will tell you the truth, and you will understand why the world must forsake the prophecy and find another path to "Era Nova"...
因为我相信：无论历史的进程如何改变，我认识的你们——
Because I know both of you, and I believe that no matter how the course of history may change...
<color=#dbc291ff>我们所有人的信念，必定始终如一。</color>
<color=#dbc291ff>The faith we all share will always remain the same.</color>
于是，岩层开始倒转，历史重新罗织。
And so, the layers of rock began to reverse, and history wove itself anew.
在故人引荐下，我得见逐火之旅的领导者，刻律德菈。一场艰难而漫长的谈判后，我们达成共识——
Through my old acquaintances, I was given the chance to meet the leader of the Flame-Chase Journey, Cerydra. And after a long and arduous negotiation, we came to an agreement—
凯撒的同盟需要「毁灭」，我愿意倾尽全力。而逐火的战利品——火种——都将为我封印。
The Imperator's alliance needed the Destruction, and I was ready to pour all my strength into it. The spoils of the Flame-Chase — the Coreflames — would be sealed by my hand.
前提是：在即将到来的下一场战役，对「大地」的征伐中……
But the condition was this: In the upcoming battle, in our conquest of the "Earth"...
我能证明，自己的力量足以超越命运。
I had to prove that my power could transcend fate.
在原本的历史中，那是一场惨烈的战争。最终，{RUBY_B#大地之泰坦}吉奥里亚{RUBY_E#}的眷属「荒笛」弑杀发狂的泰坦，接过支撑大地的火种。
In the original history, it was a brutal war. At the end, the Titankin of {RUBY_B#Earth Titan}Georios{RUBY_E#}, Terravox, killed the rampaging Titan and took the Coreflame that supported the earth.
但这一次，翁法罗斯迎来了命运的转折。
But this time, Amphoreus encountered a turning point in its fate.
双方未有一人牺牲。当我斩下巨神头颅，将火种高高举起，众人围绕那具被金血焚灭的神骸，欢声雷动——
Neither side suffered any losses. When I severed the Titan's head and raised the Coreflame high, the crowd gathered around the scorched remains of the god, roaring with joy...
——欢呼「毁灭」的英雄，初次点燃生命的微光。
Cheering for the hero of the Destruction, who had ignited the faint spark of life for the first time.
是啊，在摇曳的微光中，原本晦暗的前路仿佛也变得有迹可循。
Yes, in that flickering light, the once-dark path ahead seemed to become clearer.
我证明了自己，也在随后的漫长时间里，为其余泰坦一一带去陨落。
I proved myself, and in the long years that followed, I brought down the other Titans, one by one.
我能做的不止有「等待」，当时间回到原点，改变世界的契机，也会从历史的字里行间浮现……
I could do more than just wait. When time resets, the chance to change the world also emerges from the lines of history...
直到，逆转「再创世」揭示的残酷未来。
Until, finally, the brutal future revealed by "Era Nova" is reversed.
若当真如此，我们又为何会步入相同的结局？
If that's truly the case, why are we doomed to the same outcome?
第 1 次永劫回归 尽头
人们遵守约定，让你接过了所有的火种。这一世，在缇里西庇俄丝之后，翁法罗斯没有一名半神诞生。
The people kept their promise and handed you all the Coreflames. In this world, after Tribios, no demigods were born in Amphoreus.
事已至此，我只想知道，当他们以凡人的身躯在黑潮中消散时……
At this point, I just want to know. When they vanished into the black tide with their mortal bodies...
你为何连一滴眼泪都没有流下？
Why didn't you shed even a single tear?
你的冷漠令我心寒。他们对你而言，只是一堆无足轻重的注脚？
Your indifference chills me. To you, were they just a bunch of insignificant footnotes?
我的悲伤从未消逝。恰恰相反，十二枚火种加诸此身，令我心中的火焰前所未有地暴烈……
Sorrow has been my constant companion. In fact, with twelve Coreflames upon me, the fire in my heart has never been more violent...
我以「愤怒」铭记此世的全部。只要我还在燃烧，他们就从未离去。
I'll remember this world through anger. As long as I burn, they'll never truly leave me.
但你说得对。愤怒，此时此刻，它是我唯一能仰仗的武器。所以……
But you're right. Anger, at this moment, is the only weapon I can rely on. So...
——拔剑吧，刽子手！我会让你知道，你最大的错误，就是留下了我！
Draw your sword, executioner! I'll make sure you realize that your greatest mistake was leaving me alive!
After that, he raised his sword and attacked...
然后，卡厄斯兰那杀死了自己。
那一天，是谁倒在剑下，留在过去；又是谁前往未来，我已经记不清了。
That day, who fell to the sword to be left in the past, and who went into the future? I can't remember anymore.
我只记得一只若虫，它藏在余光尚不能及的阴影中，徒劳地推着石球……
I only remember a nymph, hiding in the shadows just out of sight, futilely pushing a stone ball...
攀上，落下；攀上，落下；攀上，落下……
Climb, fall, climb, fall, climb again, and fall...
若虫拥有的自由，只在于决定以何种方式推动圆石：时快，时慢，时而停留在一处不那么陡峭的斜坡上，倚靠圆石小憩……
The only freedom the nymph had was in choosing how to roll the stone: sometimes fast, sometimes slow, sometimes resting on a gentler slope, leaning against the stone for a break...
但它的选择无法改变「徒劳」的本质：圆石总会从斜坡上滚下，若虫也总会回到斜坡的起点，重新开始。
But its choice couldn't change the futility of it all: the stone would always roll back down the slope, and the nymph would always return to the starting point, beginning again.
那之后，每一个轮回，我行至此地时，燃烧的天空总会为它的行迹投下影子。它会在{RUBY_B#深夜}幕匿时{RUBY_E#}的第四个时刻抵达顶点附近，下一个{RUBY_B#黎明}门扉时{RUBY_E#}的第一个十五秒摔落起点。
