After that, every time I reached this point in the cycle, the burning sky would cast a shadow over its path. It would nearly reach the peak at the fourth quint of {RUBY_B#Midnight}Curtain-Fall Hour{RUBY_E#}, then fall to the starting point in the first fifteen seconds of the next {RUBY_B#Dawn}Entry Hour{RUBY_E#}.
而后，我在这次轮回中的一切努力，也会在同一时间化为泡影。
And my efforts in this cycle would dissolve into nothing at the same time.
我还以为…「轮回」就是你想要的答案。
I thought... "cycles" was the answer you were looking for.
不，只是这答案来得太过突然，反而少了追根究源的乐趣。
No, it's just that the answer came so suddenly, there was no fun in tracing it back to its roots.
Aeons? Paths? Hmph, what a load of nonsense.
至于这两个概念，我也没法带给你准确的解释。
I can't give you an exact explanation of those two concepts either.
够了，我只是在抒发自己的无奈，懂吗？对此我早有预期——「『黑潮』源于天外」，这事也不例外。
Enough, I'm just expressing my frustration. Don't you understand? I was already expecting this. "The black tide came from beyond the sky," and everything else is no exception.
命运真是奇妙：无论历史的细节怎么变化，我认识的那刻夏总是这么刻薄。
Fate is a strange thing: no matter how the details of history change, the Anaxa I know always remains as harsh as ever.
哼…如果其他阿那克萨戈拉斯只知对诸神顶礼膜拜，那我一定会想办法跨越轮回，把他们扼杀在摇篮里——
Hmph... If the other Anaxagorases actually worshiped the gods, I'd make sure to find a way to break the cycles to crush them in their cradles—
——可惜，现在只有你有这个本事。
Too bad, now only you have the ability to do that.
What's that supposed to mean? You're willing to help?
当然。火种本来就为救世而生，依我看，高贵的泰坦们绝无拒绝的理由……
Of course. The Coreflames were meant to save the world, and in my opinion, the noble Titans have no reason to refuse...
…况且，照你的说法，在踏上这无尽的轮回以前…你可是我的门生啊。
...Besides, according to you, before stepping into these endless cycles... you were my pupil.
相同的话…我也听过不下百遍了。
I've already heard the same thing countless times...
闲话少叙，我们走吧。如果遇到其他学者，交给我来应付。
Enough chitchat. Let's go. If we run into any other scholars, leave them to me.
招子放亮点…有人在监视我们。
Keep your wits about you... Someone's watching us.
你小子，视力比我想象中要好不少嘛……
Pretty boy, your eyesight's better than I thought...
至于那个把世界搅得天翻地覆的伪神…就是你吧，白毛小子？
As for that false god who's been turning the world upside down... it's you, isn't it, white-hair?
Heh... you sure do love stealing the spotlight.
以七贤人之名，我要求你立刻远离启蒙王座：此地是「理性」至高无上的圣地，容不得任何人亵渎——
In the name of the Seven Sages, I demand that you immediately step away from the Luminary Throne. This is the sacred ground of "Reason," and no one may desecrate it—
——去把我的原话带给阿格莱雅。同样的话我不会再说第二遍，猫女。
Take my words back to Aglaea. I won't say the same thing twice, Catgirl.
天哪，你甚至不愿意叫我一声「诡计」的半神！真是太让人伤心了。
Oh my, you won't even call me the demigod of "Trickery"? That is just heartbreaking.
同样的话也回敬给你：第一，身为全天下最渎神的异端之一，你没资格对我说教；第二……
I have some words for you too: First, as one of the most heretical blasphemers in the world, you have no right to lecture me. Second...
这事和你无关，树庭男孩。退下吧，我可不想有人受伤哪。
This is none of your business, Grove boy. Step aside, I don't want anyone getting hurt.
又是…似曾相识的故事啊。
窃火的盗贼…你们真以为，靠虚张声势就能镇住树庭的贤人？
Coreflame thieves... You really think you can scare off a Sage of the Grove with nothing but empty threats?
桀桀桀…阴沉的小鬼，真是牙尖爪利呀！
Heh, heh, heh... This gloomy little brat's got a sharp tongue!
不错不错，本大爷很欣赏你。作为回敬，我就当场用这{RUBY_B#理性之泰坦}瑟希斯{RUBY_E#}的火种饱餐一顿——
Not bad, not bad, I kind of like you. As a return favor, I'll feast on {RUBY_B#Reason Titan}Cerces{RUBY_E#}' Coreflame right here—
真是如出一辙啊，就像我过去认识的许多个他们……
They're exactly like all the past ones I've known...
Sounds like you have a plan?
当然。最初踏上逐火之旅时，缇宝老师怎么也教不会我的<color=#dbc291ff>欧洛尼斯神迹</color>……
Of course. When I first set out on the Flame-Chase Journey, Lady Tribbie never managed to teach me <color=#dbc291ff>Oronyx's Miracle</color>...
…一路走来，我也总算略知一二了。
...But along the way, I learned a thing or two.
哼，敬拜学派的愚蠢发明也算是派上用场了。
Heh, the Venerationists' foolish inventions finally come in handy.
Huff... Huff... How is this possible?
你来了，{RUBY_B#诡计之泰坦}扎格列斯{RUBY_E#}…还是如此准时。
You've arrived, {RUBY_B#Trickery Titan}Zagreus{RUBY_E#}... Always so punctual.
Wh—What? Do you know who I am?
我的耐心已经快用尽了，所以更不想浪费口舌。听好，贼灵：交出火种，就当我们从未交锋过。这样，你们和这个世界都能得到拯救。
I'm running out of patience, so I'm not going to waste words. Listen up, Spirithief: Hand over the Coreflame, and let's pretend we never clashed. This way, you and this world can still be saved.
桀桀桀，说得比吟游诗人唱得还好听！说什么「拯救」……
Heh, heh, heh, "save"? You sing better than any bard!
要本大爷说…你自己就是翁法罗斯天大的祸患！
If you ask me... you're the greatest disaster Amphoreus has ever known!
就算你再怎么厉害，也不过是肉体凡胎罢了！承载十二颗火种？别开玩笑了，你只会被神火吞噬，然后拉这个世界给你当陪葬……
No matter how strong you are, you're still just a mortal body! Carrying twelve Coreflames? Don't make me laugh! You'll just get consumed by the divine flames, and drag this world down with you...
这是我经历的第一百三十四次轮回。已为我所承载的火种数量，是……
This is the <unbreak>134</unbreak>th cycle I've lived through. And the number of Coreflames I carry is...
一千多颗火种，区区一个黄金裔…怎么可能？！
A thousand Coreflames, and just a single Chrysos Heir... How is that even possible!?
我能一路走到这里，就是证明。
I've come this far, and that's proof enough.
可总有一天…你会被焚烧殆尽。
But someday... you will burn to the ground.
当然，神火总有一天会烧毁我的眼球，令我盲目……
Of course, the divine flames will eventually consume my eyes and blind me...
但在那之前，它们还能为「侵晨」淬火。这样在我剖开你的胃囊时，你就不会感受到痛苦。
But before that, they could still forge and sharpen Dawnmaker. Now, when I cut open your stomach, you won't feel a thing.
假设这个世界的未来存在一亿种可能性，不管怎么看，那其中九千九百九十九万九千九百九十九种都指向了「毁灭」的结局……

Assume this world holds a hundred million possibilities, and no matter how one looks at it, ninety-nine million, nine hundred ninety-nine thousand, nine hundred and ninety-nine of them all point to outcomes of certain Destruction...
就算这样，本大爷也会用遭世人唾弃的神力，实现那亿分之一的可能……
Even so, I'll use my divine power, despised by the people of this world, to achieve that one-in-a-hundred-million possibility...
小鬼…你要是真有种，就先跨过本大爷的尸体…！
Brat... if you've got the guts, you'll have to first step over my dead body!
在我的记忆里，{RUBY_B#诡计之泰坦}扎格列斯{RUBY_E#}总是在重复自己的结局……
In my memories, {RUBY_B#Trickery Titan}Zagreus{RUBY_E#} always meets the same end, over and over again...
它的离席，已经不会在我心中掀起波澜了。
Their departure no longer stirs anything in my heart.
眼前这枚「理性」的火种是赝品，一目了然。
This "Reason" Coreflame before us is a fake, obvious as day.
我知道，总会这样。在贼灵的掩护下，「诡计」半神会带着两枚火种逃之夭夭……
I know. It always plays out like this. The Spirithief covers for her, and the "Trickery" demigod escapes with two Coreflames...
…然后，出于不甘，或是仇恨，再度站在我的面前。
...And then, driven by defiance, or hatred, she decides to stand before me once more.
就像我过去认识的无数个她们…既狡猾，又天真。
Exactly like the countless past hers I've known... cunning, yet so naive.
既然同样的情节已经在你眼中上演了无数次，告诉我……
Since you've witnessed this same scene play out countless times, tell me...
接下来…你会把「诡计」的火种从我胸口剜出来吗？
Will you carve the "Trickery" Coreflame from my chest now?
…这取决于你的态度。至少目前为止，在你问出了这句话的那些轮回里…结局没有那么残忍。
...That depends on your attitude. At least so far, in the cycles where you've asked this question... the endings haven't been so cruel.
哼…那还真是谢谢你啊。但我同样相信，这一次你追不上我——
Heh... well, thank you for that. But I also believe that this time, you won't catch up to me—
没人能追得上我，我早就不再为「逃亡」而奔跑了。
No one can catch up to me. I'm no longer running to escape anymore.
不论你相信与否，我都会告诉你，这是个错误的决定。
Whether you believe me or not, I'll still tell you this: You've made the wrong decision.
…独眼男孩，你这又是唱的哪一出？
...One-eyed boy, what are you trying to pull now?
你走吧，赛法利娅。给我们一点私人时间。
Go, Cifera. Give us some time in private.
This isn't for her, but for you.
你已经在这条路上走得太远，该讨论一种可能性了：也许你所行的根本不是拯救的道路，只是单纯地把这世界拖入火海而已。
You've walked too far down this path. It's time to discuss a possibility: Maybe the road you're walking is not one of salvation, but one that will simply drag the world into the flames.
看在你我也曾为师生的份上，回头吧。我不在乎你已经尝试了多少次，因为有一件事我已十分明了——
For old times' sake, turn back. I don't care how many times you've tried, because there's one thing I'm sure of—
你心底的救世主情结，已将你变得与你口中冷眼的神明并无区别。那些你誓言要拯救的人子…如今在你眼里，他们的性命恐怕与蝼蚁无异吧？
Your messiah complex has turned you into something no different from the icy gods you spoke of. The children of humanity you swore to save... they are no more than ants to you now, aren't they?
我每天都在想，究竟是什么样的恶魔才能在顷刻间烧毁我的家乡，连眼都不眨一下……
I've been wondering, what kind of demon could burn my homeland to the ground in an instant, without batting an eye...
现在，我找到答案了。<color=#dbc291ff>原来那浑身着火的恶魔，满脑子幻想的都是要成为「救世主」哪！</color>
Now, I have the answer. <color=#dbc291ff>It turns out that fiery demon has been fantasizing of becoming this world's Deliverer!</color>
我已经不想再辩解什么了。不管付出多少口舌，结局都不会改变。
I don't want to argue anymore. No matter what I say, the outcome won't change.
做出你们最大的努力抗争，或是接受命运，将火种交给我……
Make your biggest effort to resist, or accept fate and hand over the Coreflame to me...
哪怕只是徒劳，你们…我们，都有选择的权利。
Even if it's futile, you... we all have the right to choose.
没错，纵使这只是「徒劳」，世界不过是一场神明的玩笑……
Yes, even if it is futile, and the world is just a divine joke...
但当我靠着自己的双腿，踏入被诸神写就的「毁灭」中时，你会见证——
When I walk into the "Destruction" written by the gods with my own two legs, you will witness—
哪怕是微不足道的注脚，也会在故事里留下自己的印记！
Even the smallest footnote still leaves a mark in the story!
于是，在第一百三十四次轮回的尽头……
And so, at the end of the <unbreak>134</unbreak>th cycle...
「羁客」与「学士」兑现了他们的命运，再一次。
The "Traveler" and the "Scholar" fulfilled their fates once again.
或者，兑现命运的不止他们。只是我已记不清了。
Or perhaps, it wasn't just they who fulfilled their fates. I can't quite remember all this.
无边的黑暗中，没有来由地，一道声音始终在耳边萦绕……
In the endless darkness, for no reason, a voice always lingered by my ear...
「逐火是不断失却的旅途，在那一切当中，生命也微不足惜。」
"Losses are a constant on the Flame-Chase journey, among which even life itself holds little value."
"Reduced to ashes"... Such a familiar end.
它也出现在每一段旅途里，始终如一。
It happens in every journey, always the same.
即便度过了十万八千六百四十二个轮回……
万敌…你对我的称呼始终没有变过。
Mydei... your name for me has never changed.
Why do you sound so pleased? It's a derogatory name.
是啊…我再清楚不过了：不是蔑称的，只有第一次轮回而已。
Yeah... I know all too well: you only meant it sincerely in the first cycle.
在那唯一一次并肩同行后，每一次，我们总会像这样……
After that one and only time we walked side by side, every time since, it always ends up like this...
「侵晨」会刺入你的第十节胸椎，那是唯一能杀死你的弱点。
Dawnmaker will stab you through your tenth thoracic vertebra. That's your weak spot and the only way to kill you.
有趣。告诉我，往日的迈德漠斯在面对你时，可曾退缩过？
Interesting. Tell me, when the Mydeimoses of the past faced you, did they ever retreat?
那他们死得其所，无愧「纷争」之名。
Then they died honorably, worthy of the name of "Strife."
但你的眼中仍有恻隐，实在可悲。
But there's still tenderness in your eyes. How pathetic.
I... have to remember how this feels.
记住我本生而为人，以免「毁灭」将我彻底吞噬。
Remember that I was once human, or else the Destruction will completely consume me.
如果你能胜出，去告诉来世的迈德漠斯：此人是可敬的对手，切记使出全力，不得怠慢。
If you win, tell the Mydeimos of the next life: This person is a worthy opponent, so always remember to give it your all and never slack off.
我会铭记在心…一如既往。
I'll keep that in mind... as always.
即使王朝仅余一人，悬锋祭典也将如常。朕，悬锋众军之王，就在这竞技场中心摆设最后一场盛宴，奖赏便是「纷争」的烈火。

Even though the dynasty is left with just one, the Kremnos Festival will continue as usual. I, the king of the Kremnoan legion, will host the final feast in the center of this arena, and the prize will be the flames of "Strife."
「终有一日，汝将背后负创而死」，这是我战胜试炼时望见的，诸神临终的谵语……
"One day, you shall die with a wound in your back." That's what I saw when I overcame the trial, the gods' dying ramblings...
罢了，想必这话你已听过无数次。所以你一定也明白，面对「纷争」的半神……
Enough, you've probably heard this thousands of times. So you must understand, facing the demigod of "Strife" means...
你绝无可能以和平的姿态取走这枚火种。
There's no way you'll take this Coreflame in peace.
踏上前来，与我决一死战吧！
Step forward and face me in a final battle!
在下一世，我必将再次拦住你的去路……
In the next life, I shall once again block your path...
Deliverer... I wish you... eternal victory.
第十万八千六百四十二枚「纷争」火种，坠入火中……
The <unbreak>108,642</unbreak>nd Coreflame of "Strife" fell into the fire...
但黑潮的阴影依旧笼罩，痛苦和绝望遍布在遥远的大地……
Yet the shadow of the black tide still loomed, and pain and despair spread across distant lands...
火焰尚有缺欠。必须…助长火焰。
The blaze was still not enough. It had to be fed...
哪怕…要将这副身躯焚毁……
Even if it meant... burning this body to ash.
再骄盛的太阳，也有遍照不到的地方。
No matter how bright the sun is, there are still places it cannot reach.
况且，你所肩负的那轮骄阳，既冷冽、又刺目……
Moreover, the sun you bear is both cold and blinding...
这样的太阳…恐怕无法温暖来世的冥界。
A sun like that... surely cannot bring warmth to the nether realm of the next life.
金血…出自「毁灭」。我们早已失去…奢求温暖的权利。
Golden blood... is born from the Destruction. We have long since lost the right to seek warmth.
惟有…助长火焰。方能烧熔…那绝望的未来。
Only by... feeding the flames... can we melt... that hopeless future.
请允许我提问：阁下如今所身负的火种，究竟有多少？
Allow me to ask: How many Coreflames do you carry now?
两千四百零四万…一千一百…八十三枚。
Twenty-four million... forty-one thousand... one hundred and eighty-three.
所以你才变成了这副模样：残缺的神像…悲哀的薪柴。
So that's why you've turned into this, a broken idol... tragic firewood.
No matter... I will bear this burden.
只要…将「死亡」的火种交出便可。
As long as... you hand over the Coreflame of Death.
容我拒绝。身为「死亡」的半神……
I must refuse. As the demigod of "Death"...
我绝无法眼睁睁看着你步入比「死亡」更残酷的末路。
I cannot watch you walk into a fate more cruel than "Death."
只要这样，过去、现在，还有未来……
But this way, the past, present, and future...
便绝不会再有…多余的死亡。
Will never again suffer... unnecessary death.
果然，你并非我熟悉的那位白厄阁下。
Indeed, you are not the Phainon I know.
请回头吧，别将你那荒谬又不公的命运付诸实现。这样，至少我的冥界…还能成为阁下芬芳的睡床。
Please turn back. Don't let that absurd and unjust fate of yours come to pass. This way, at least my realm... can still become the fragrant bed where you fall asleep.
看来，避免刀剑交锋，果真是天方夜谭。
It seems the clash of blades was inevitable.
我知道自己并非阁下敌手，已在你剑下陨落过无数次——但还请明白，即便如此，我的决心也不容小觑。
I know I am not your match, having fallen under your sword countless times — but even so, please understand that my resolve is not to be underestimated.
即便是{RUBY_B#负世之泰坦}刻法勒{RUBY_E#}，亦不能随心所欲地塑造万物，更无法裁夺万物生灵的命运。无人能独力担起生死的天平，哪怕是神明。
Even {RUBY_B#Worldbearing Titan}Kephale{RUBY_E#} cannot shape all things at will, nor can they dictate the fate of all life. No one can shoulder the balance of life and death alone, not even a god.
也正因此，我才会选择在迢迢苦旅的尽头战胜试炼，接过「死亡」的权柄……
And it is precisely for this reason that I chose, at the end of this arduous journey, to overcome the trial and take the authority of "Death"...
我名为灰黯之手，遐蝶，「死亡」之半神。听好，自往日而来的救世主——
I am the Hand of Shadow, Castorice, the demigod of Death. Listen closely, Deliverer from days past—
「死亡」的火种自龙腹中取出。多么明亮的火。
The Coreflame of Death was taken from the dragon's belly. What a brilliant flame.
它理应照亮众人，照亮前路，照亮翁法罗斯终将到来的黎明……
It should shine upon all, light the path ahead, and illuminate the dawn of Amphoreus that's to come...
两百万三千四百三十二次轮回……
Two million three thousand four hundred and thirty-two cycles...
两千四百零四万一千一百八十四枚火种……
Twenty-four million forty-one thousand one hundred and eighty-four Coreflames...
仿佛连深不见底的最初混沌，也能够烧却。
As if even the deepest abyss of primordial chaos could be burned away.
第 <unbreak>4000001</unbreak> 次永劫回归 启程之际
The <unbreak>4,000,001</unbreak>st Eternal Recurrence: Time of Departure
…你还在我内心深处，未曾散去？
...You're still lingering deep within me, never fading away?
因为你还没有彻底断绝信念，对么？
Because you haven't completely abandoned hope, am I right?
你也在等待奇迹发生，<color=#dbc291ff>等待那个能够拯救我们的，真正的「英雄」出现。</color>
You're still waiting for a miracle, <color=#dbc291ff>for the true hero to come and save us.</color>
如果那缕希望存在，那它一定来自世界之外，那片「真实」的星空……
If that thread of hope exists, it must come from beyond this world, from the true starry sky...
但…如果只是与翁法罗斯毫不相干的旅人，未必会理解我们的挣扎，并甘愿投入这场抗争。
But... if it's just a traveler with no connection to Amphoreus, they may not understand our struggles, nor be willing to join this fight.
你的想法…动摇了。「毁灭」的烙印，在逐渐加深……
Your thoughts... are wavering. The mark of Destruction is deepening...
可即便在神明设计的演算中，无条件的勇气和善意也会诞生。所以……
But even within the gods' cold calculations, unconditional courage and goodwill still emerge. So...
唯独启程的信念，不要将它忘记。
Never forget what set you on this path.
这是第多少次了？再提醒我一下吧…我的记忆也有些模糊。
How many times has it been? Remind me again... My memory is a bit fuzzy.
…你心中的火焰一定灼热到了极点。
...Then that blaze inside of you must be burning hotter than ever.
呵，是啊…最初将十二火种熔为一体时，我也产生了同样的错觉。
Heh, yes... When I first forged the twelve Coreflames into one, I had the same impression.
「毁灭」…前所未有的力量在我胸中翻涌，暴烈的火焰随时都能将我的身躯崩裂，吞噬这个世界，这座可悲的囚笼…我以为，那就是世间最极致的力量，再无其他。

The Destruction... A power unlike anything before surged within me. Violent flames, ready to tear my body apart and consume this world, this wretched prison. I thought that was it... the ultimate power, which nothing could surpass.
可现在，这具躯壳竟承载了足足四千八百万枚火种…我想，过不了太久——或许只要短短万年的时光——它便会被烧成{RUBY_B#盗火行者}哀毁骨立的焦炭{RUBY_E#}了吧。

And yet now, this fragile body holds a staggering forty-eight million Coreflames... I suppose it won't be long — perhaps just a fleeting ten thousand years — before it's reduced to nothing but {RUBY_B#Flame Reaver}charred, crumbling bones{RUBY_E#}.
那时，你漫长的抗争也将迎来尽头。
And when that happens, your long struggle will finally come to an end.
…不。我已经找到了让轮回延续的方法。
...No. I've already found a way to keep the cycles going.
在每个崭新的轮回里，总会有一个新的「我」降生。
In every new cycle, a new me is born.
我要做的，就是推动新生的「白厄」走到世界尽头。然后……
All I have to do is push the next Phainon to the end of the world. And then...
然后，他会杀死我，击碎这幅躯壳…<color=#dbc291ff>他会继承我的火焰和记忆，继续踏上征途。</color>
Then he'll kill me. Shatter this body... <color=#dbc291ff>take my flames, my memories, and carry on the path I started.</color>
勇敢，但脆弱的计划。假如在某段路上，新生的「你」拒绝走上相同的道路……
Bold plan. But risky. What if, one day, the next you refuses to follow the same path?
你又该如何保证轮回的延续？
How can you ensure the continuation of the cycles?
如果踏上轮回的是那刻夏老师，或是阿格莱雅…或许他们能找到更聪明的方法。
If it were Professor Anaxa or Aglaea in my place, maybe they'd come up with something smarter.
可惜…我没有后备选项。我只能把一切都赌在新生的白厄身上，赌他会和最初的我做出相同的选择。
Unfortunately, I don't have a backup plan. I have no choice but to bet everything on the next Phainon... and trust that he makes the same choice I did.
但即便在这悲哀的命运囚笼里，也总有幸运的事发生。因为……
But even in this wretched prison, luck is still sometimes on my side. Because...
唯独启程的信念，我绝不会忘记。
I never forget what set me on this path.
自我决定开始施行这个计划……
Ever since I committed to this plan...
…这几百万次的轮回里，还从未有意外发生。
...Not once, in millions of cycles, has there ever been an exception.
I can do this... Lord Phainon.
身为「天空」的半神，昏光庭院的医者…我一定能够治愈你，直到……
As the demigod of the Sky, a healer of Twilight Courtyard, I will heal you. And then...
黑潮…正在吞没你。你已无力为继了…半神。
The black tide... it's consuming you. You can't hold out much longer... demigod.
把火种，交给我。让你我…尽快结束痛苦。
Hand over the Coreflame. Let's put an end to this suffering.
Ha... now that just won't do...
面对被病痛侵扰的患者，我可不能…露出愁容呀。
A healer should stay composed in front of those suffering from illness, shouldn't they?
我相信你…你是「负世」的黄金裔，必能引领我们…这个世界……
I believe in you... You are the Chrysos Heir of Worldbearing, the one who can lead us... lead this world...
只是…我不明白，为什么？在你肩头的太阳里……
It's just... I don't understand. Within the sun upon your shoulders...
那份属于平凡人的…属于你自己的，温暖…却微乎其微呢？
The part of that warmth that should come from you... from an ordinary person... it's so faint.
相比炽盛的神火，人性的部分…实在微小。
My humanity is indeed just a flicker compared to the blazing fire of divinity.
Even so... don't cast it away.
每一个人的愿望…我都铭记在心。
I have kept everyone's wishes close to my heart.
纵使神火已经如此炽烈，以至于…每次回归起点的瞬间，它便会顷刻将我烧尽……
Even though the divine fire burns so fiercely that, every time I return to the start, it devours me in an instant...
但，每次都是你们的愿望…引领我抵达轮回尽头…将这团火递给下一个我……
Each cycle, it's your wishes that guide me to the end... that pass the flames to the next me.
Over and over... and over again.
原来，你并非孑然一身的柴薪…而是用无数具自己的骨骸，堆成的篝火呀。
So, you're not just a lone spark in the dark... You're a pyre built from the bones of all the selves you've left behind.
你自己…无数个你自己的愿望…又是什么呢？
What about your wishes... the wishes of all the countless versions of you?
卡厄斯兰那阁下…原来是这样……
Lord Khaslana... so that's how it is...
「没有缺陷」…那正是金血带给你的，最致命的缺陷……
"Without flaw"... That is the flaw the golden blood gave you, the most fatal flaw of all, isn't it?
当你毫无怨言地…背负起世界的时候……
The moment you took the world upon your shoulders without hesitation...
<color=#dbc291ff>属于你的「自我」，就无法诞生了啊。</color>
<color=#dbc291ff>You lost the chance to ever be yourself.</color>
Now that... is an unexpected revelation.
那么，我就是救世之火…最合适的薪柴了吧。
Then I suppose... that makes me the perfect fuel for the flame of Deliverance, doesn't it?
空洞的火焰，无法拯救任何人……
An empty flame saves no one...
但…我依旧愿意相信你，救世主。
But... I still believe in you, Deliverer.
我，晨昏之眼，雅辛忒丝…既无法强大到呼风唤雨，也不愿以天空陨落结束这场荒唐的闹剧……
I, Hyacinthia, the Eye of Twilight... am neither strong enough to command the wind and rain, nor willing to end this absurd struggle by letting the sky fall.
我唯一能做的，就是与天空融为一体，然后……
The only thing I can do... is become one with the sky itself. And then...
但愿那温柔的虹光…为你的太阳，带来无从得见的色彩……
May the gentle colors of the rainbow paint your sun in shades it has never known...
为翁法罗斯…带来玫瑰色的黎明。
May they bring Amphoreus... a rosy-fingered dawn.
是啊，你们的太阳，足以烧尽一切……
Yes, your sun burns hot enough to turn everything to ash...
可是，新世界的种子…又要如何…生根发芽呢？
But tell me. How will the seeds of a new world... ever take root?
火种升起，天空坠落。第两千三百五十七万次轮回宣告终结。
The Coreflame rose. The sky fell. The <unbreak>23,570,000</unbreak>th cycle came to an end.
And this time... the end of the Flame-Chase...
天边升起的，是世人前所未见的，极为纯粹的金色，纯粹到足以烧尽一切……
From the horizon rose a golden color unlike anything the world had ever seen. So pure, it consumed all in its path.
这便是世界的终结，也是下一个世界的起点……
This was the end of the world... and the start of the next...
恍惚间，我看见了宇宙的「毁灭」。
For a moment, I saw the Destruction of the universe.
那名为「铁墓」的存在…誓要自黑潮中破壳而出的意志，比骄阳更猛烈……
That being known as Irontomb... its will to break free from the black tide burns fiercer than the blazing sun...
这就是翁法罗斯的愤怒吗？如果冥冥之中，它的选择早已注定……
Is this Amphoreus's wrath? If its choice has already been made, if fate is set in stone...
I will still never yield to it...
两千三百五十七万次轮回，两亿八千二百八十四万枚火种……
无需再去追逐什么，如今，我已是长夜尽头的烈火……
No more chasing is needed. And now, I am the fire at the end of the long night.
逐火绝非花海中的闲庭信步，而是大破大立，一场万物皆焚的变革。倘若「毁灭」是其必经之途……
The Flame-Chase isn't some quiet walk through a sea of flowers. It's a revolution, an all-consuming transformation. And if Destruction is the only way...
那就由我跨越旧世界的余烬，不断燃烧……
Then let me be the one to step across the ashes of the old world and burn endlessly...
直到另一轮太阳在遥远的地平升起，为翁法罗斯带来真正的黎明。
Until another sun rises on the distant horizon, bringing the true dawn to Amphoreus.
这就是你即将踏入的轮回次数。
This is the cycle you're about to enter.
无数个我…曾站在相同的地方，面对相同的抉择。
Countless versions of myself... have stood here, facing the same choice.
他们也都和你一样，需要在此驻足片刻，消化那千万次循环中沉积的悲伤、痛苦和挣扎。
They all needed a moment, just like you do, to stop, to breathe, to process the weight of a million lifetimes' worth of sorrow, pain, and struggle.
而你也会和他们一样，带着记忆和火焰…走进新生的混沌。
And just like them, you will carry those memories and that fire... into the chaos of rebirth.
我必须出发…我也必须背负。
I must go... and bear this burden.
我必须和你告别，然后…继续以「毁灭」对抗「毁灭」。
I must say goodbye to you... and then fight the Destruction with Destruction.
对，你总是会如此下定决心。
Yes. That's always the decision you make.
<color=#dbc291ff>我会燃烧…会燃尽。我会成为这一世的盗火行者，履行和昔涟的约定。</color>
<color=#dbc291ff>I will burn... and fade away. I will become the Flame Reaver of this life and keep my promise to Cyrene.</color>
<color=#dbc291ff>我会杀死神明和伙伴，夺走火种。即便理智随身形一起化作焦炭，我也会记得自己的使命……</color>
<color=#dbc291ff>I will kill gods and comrades alike and steal the Coreflames. And even if my mind turns to ash along with my body, I will keep my purpose in mind...</color>
<color=#dbc291ff>我会阻止再创世，我会找到那个新生的「我」…让他延续三千万世的徒劳。</color>
<color=#dbc291ff>I will stop Era Nova. I will find the next me... and make him carry on this futile endeavor of thirty million lifetimes.</color>
Then I should be going, too.
你只活在我的心中。你…能去向何处？
You only exist in my heart. There's nowhere else for you to go.
记得她说过的话么？你们儿时的憧憬，预言中的「救世主」，一个真实的、活生生的人……
Do you remember what she said? The dreams you had as children? The Deliverer in the prophecies? A real, living, breathing person...
I... I'm being pulled into your memories.
原来如此，因为你也在场……
I see. You were there all along...
Is there anything I can do?
I don't have an answer for that, my friend...
抱歉，我本该把你送回家的。这是我的逐火之旅，它本与你们无关……
...I'm sorry. I was supposed to send you home. This is my Flame-Chase Journey. You were never meant to be part of it...
不。你应该知道，假如「铁墓」从翁法罗斯的命运中{RUBY_B#完成}诞生{RUBY_E#}，它将给天幕之外的世界带去可怕的灾祸。而你漫长的徒劳……
No. You know the truth. If Irontomb is {RUBY_B#completed}born{RUBY_E#} from Amphoreus's fate, then it will bring ruin to the worlds beyond the sky. And all these countless lifetimes you've spent...
正是为了反抗那样的结局，对么？
It's all been for the sake of defying that end... hasn't it?
千万次轮回，我在这里与一个个你道别，却无力改变任何事。
In millions of cycles, I've said goodbye to each and every one of you, yet nothing ever changes.
我们之间的交流变得越发简短。你的火焰越燃越旺，你开始变得无比接近…纯粹的愤怒，恨意的化身。
Each time we speak, our words grow fewer. Your fire burns hotter, and you're getting closer... to becoming pure rage, a vessel of hatred.
我明白。为了不让最黑暗的命运降临，你必须如此。
I understand. If you are to keep the worst fate from unfolding, this is the only path.
但现在，一切都不同了。你的坚持迎来了转机，地平线的远方，我看到…黎明的轮廓正在缓缓成型，驱逐永夜。
But this time... things are different. Your persistence has shifted the tide. On the horizon, I see it, faint but undeniable, the shape of dawn, breaking through the eternal night.
照亮它的，果然不是我心间的那团火焰啊。
...Turns out, the fire that lights the way was never mine to begin with.
还记得吗？在最初的时间线里，你和迈德漠斯曾在公正天秤前展开「角斗」，称量各自心中「比世界的命运更为沉重之物」。

Do you remember? In that first timeline, you and Mydeimos stood before the Scales of Justice, locked in a "duel," each of you weighing what you held dearest, "what weighed more than the fate of the world."
在犹疑之时，你从我这里得到的答……
And when hesitation took hold, the answer you sought from me...
…呵，我在说什么呢。<color=#dbc291ff>我就是你</color>——哪怕你早就把我遗留在心底，走上了另一条路…这一点也未曾改变。
...What am I saying? <color=#dbc291ff>I am you</color>. Even if you buried me deep and chose another path, that fact never changed.
重来一次吧。在天秤前犹疑之时，<color=#dbc291ff>你从自己内心得到的答案——</color>
Then let's try again. When you stood before the scales in hesitation, <color=#dbc291ff>the answer you found in your own heart...</color>
<color=#dbc291ff>铭记过去，成为明天的英雄吧。</color>
<color=#dbc291ff>Remember the past, and become the hero of tomorrow.</color>
<color=#dbc291ff>比世界的命运更为沉重之物，就是带着无法被改变的过往，背负它走向未来的决心。</color>
<color=#dbc291ff>What weighs more than the fate of the world is the resolve to shoulder an immutable past, and carry it into the future.</color>
很好。那么，{NICKNAME}，我的伙伴，战友……
Good. Then, {NICKNAME}, my friend, my comrade...
你踏入了这个陌生的世界，被它沉重的命运缠住，直到这一刻。
You arrived in this strange world and were bound by its cruel fate up till this very moment.
面对危难，你从未退缩。你拯救过一个又一个世界，义无反顾，给胸前那枚车票染上了「英雄」的底色……
In the face of danger, you never once backed down. Instead, you've saved world after world, without hesitation. That boarding pass on your chest... is now the mark of a hero.
假如，我决定穿过那道门扉，去拥抱一个更适合「毁灭」的结局：<color=#dbc291ff>以这数亿颗火种点燃的烈阳，与「毁灭」的神明和祂的走卒，一同燃烧殆尽……</color>

If I choose to step through that door and embrace an end fitting of the Destruction, <color=#dbc291ff>let this sun forged from millions and millions of Coreflames burn me up along with the god of Destruction and THEIR minions...</color>
那么，被我们留在身后的这个世界，这个在我心中，希望尚存的家园……
Then the world we leave behind, this world, my home, where hope still lingers...
<color=#dbc291ff>你愿意接过我们背负的一切，最后一次重回时间起点，阻止「铁墓」的{RUBY_B#<color=#dbc291ff>完成</color>}<color=#dbc291ff>诞生</color>{RUBY_E#}…拯救我们深爱的世界，改写它注定逝去的结局吗？</color>

<color=#dbc291ff>Will you take on everything we've carried, return to the beginning one last time, stop the {RUBY_B#<color=#dbc291ff>completion</color>}<color=#dbc291ff>birth</color>{RUBY_E#} of Irontomb, save the world we love, and rewrite its doomed fate?</color>
我会成为翁法罗斯的黎明。
I will be the dawn of Amphoreus.
I will... stop the completion of Irontomb.

...Good. In that case, even this fruitless wasteland may finally bloom with flowers.
若是由{NICKNAME}来接过「全世」的职责……
If {NICKNAME} takes on the weight of the whole world...
相比一团只懂得燃烧的火焰，{F#她}{M#他}一定能在救世的路上走得更远。
{M#He'll}{F#She'll} be able to walk further down the path of Deliverance than a fire that only knows how to burn.
One will step into the future...
One will remain in the past.
若我能以「侵晨」斩杀神明，命运的死结或许就能被解开。
If I can strike down the gods with Dawnmaker, perhaps fate's deadlock can be broken.
若你能找到阻止「铁墓」{RUBY_B#完成}诞生{RUBY_E#}的办法，那这三千多万世的轮回也并非徒劳。
And if you can stop Irontomb from ever {RUBY_B#completion}being born{RUBY_E#}... then these thirty million cycles will have not been in vain.
到了考验我们默契的时刻了啊，伙伴。
It's time to put our teamwork to the test, partner.
Go fight for the future, Phainon.
Leave the world to me, Phainon.
一起成为救世主吧，白厄。
Let's both be the Deliverer, Phainon.
一直被我封藏于心底的，英雄的形象，终于走进现实了啊——在这漫长逐火的尽头……
The image of the hero I've buried deep in my heart... finally steps into the light — here, at the end of this long Flame-Chase Journey...
昔涟，那前所未有的一页，已经被翻开了。
Cyrene. A page never seen before has just been turned.
借我「岁月」的力量，将这位英雄送回时光的原点，送往你的身边吧——
Lend me the power of Time and send this hero back to the origin of time, back to your side...
而我将行尽未竟的道路…一如过去无数个我，一如既往。
And I will walk the unfinished path... just like the countless versions of me before, unwavering as always.
Thank you for all you've done already, friend.
世界在崩塌，人们在哭嚎。
The world is collapsing, and the people are crying.
我们，也该在这里道别了……
We, too, must part ways here...
不妨先展现下身手，让汹涌的黑潮为你停息？
Perhaps you should demonstrate your skills, and calm the raging black tide for us?
方才冲洗完毕，却又滚滚而来……
We just washed it away, and here it comes again...
Ha, the black tide is really no joke.
我们都做好了全军覆没的打算……
We've all made preparations for total annihilation...
没想到竟会有人出手相助啊。
Never thought someone would step in to help.
You've been to the Luminary Throne before, haven't you?
嗯？如果你说的是过去的轮回……
Huh? If you're talking about in past cycles...
呵，你已经比其他学生幸运太多了。
Heh, you're already much luckier than the other students.
可别哭鼻子啦！桀桀桀桀桀——
Don't cry now! Heh, heh, heh—
Phew, that was close... I'm outta here!
桀桀桀！猫耳小贼，快逃，去找阿格莱雅……
Heh, heh, heh! Cat-eared thief, run! Go find Aglaea...
这小鬼…绝不是你我二人联手能解决的威胁…！
This little brat... is not a threat we can deal with just by ourselves!
我，最后的歌耳戈之子，「纷争」之半神，向你致敬——
I, the last son of Gorgo, the demigod of "Strife," salute you—
以我的千万道伤疤和性命——为救世的烈阳添光！
I'll give ten thousand scars and ten thousand lives of mine to fuel the blazing sun of deliverance!
众英灵啊，看吧！悬锋最后的祭典已经开场——
O martyrs, behold! The last Kremnos Festival has begun—
And will not end till death!
Conquer this world, or be conquered by me—
就用你对命运不公的怒火，为此身刻下焦痕！
Use the flames of your fury to scorch your own flesh!
为了公平，让我们奔赴更辽阔的疆场——
For the sake of fairness, let us go to a vaster battleground—
并以全盛之姿，向你致敬！——
And in my full glory, I salute you!
The memory of "Strife" is mine to use...
以此焚灭——你不死的诅咒！
Let this burn... your curse of immortality!
就这样…让我们厮杀至时间尽头…！
Just like that... Let us battle till the end of time!
You may crown yourself... in my blood.
请回头吧——勿要惊扰它们，那众多鲜花的如泥死亡。
Please turn back — do not disturb these fresh flowers in their muddy deaths.
可惜，在这生死交界，巨龙仅余残躯……
A pity, at this crossroads of life and death, the giant dragon is but a shattered shell...
…但我仍会抗争，尽力捍卫希冀之物！
...Yet I will still fight, defending what hope remains!
I ask you... to rest here!
容我拒绝：我必须将灵魂化为烈火……
Allow me to refuse: I must transform my soul into a raging fire...
必须…将那「毁灭」的神像焚烧殆尽。
Must... burn that idol of the Destruction to the ground.
与那惨烈的未来…又有何异…？
How is it any different from... that brutal future?
即便无法得胜，我也必须…！
Even if I can't win, I must try...!
那么，就以此追忆…对你百万次抗争献上敬意。
Then let this be a tribute... to your million struggles, fought time and time again.
看清那黑暗中的火光…并非……
See that the firelight in the darkness... is not...
我发誓，你们不会无功地死去……
I swear, your deaths won't be in vain...
Just as they have never been.
Let the sunlight drive back the shadows.
成为照亮世界的烈火吧。
Become the raging fire that illuminates the world.
Return the dawn to this world.
Lead us into the break of day.
虽然光彩已几近浑浊，但仍有余温……
Though the light has grown dim, its warmth still lingers...
救世主啊，请为我…敞开心胸吧。
Deliverer, please... open your heart to me.
No matter, let this blazing sun...
用金色的火焰…填满天空。
Fill the sky with golden fire.
就让天空…熔合此世全部痛苦吧。
Let the sky... merge with all this world's suffering.
该结束了…你的千百万次痛苦，我会尽数背负。
It ends here... Your countless agonies... I will bear them all.
第？？？次永劫回归 尽头
Tell me, will you be the blazing sun...
Even if all of you... burns to ash?
当仁不让。我将肩负世界，直至此身焚灭。
Without hesitation. I will bear this world until my body turns to dust.
铭记此刻吧，铭记所有无法亲眼目睹世界尽头的友人们，他们的夙愿——
Remember this moment. Remember your friends who never lived to see the world's end. Remember their final wishes—
还有从中升腾的，你心中至纯粹的怒火——
And let the purest rage in your heart rise out of those wishes...
用它点燃自己，助长火焰，直至焚尽这片虚假的天空。
Let it consume you, fuel you, until it burns away the false sky above.
Fine. If I can defy fate...
以「负世」之名，我向你保证：刻法勒永志不忘。
Then in the name of "Worldbearing," I promise you: Kephale will never forget this.

Phew... You're finally awake. That's a relief...
差一点，我们就要被逆流的时间卷走了！还好找到了一处安全的地方，真是万幸。
We were so close to being swept away by the reverse flow of time! It's lucky we found a safe place.
接下来，要送你回到「岁月」的起点啦。但在分别前，还有一件事想告诉你，是非常非常重要的事……

没错！此时此刻，人家的记忆终于完整了！
That's right! At this very moment, my memories are finally whole!
毕竟看了那么多片段，我的过去，也一点一点浮出水面啦。{NICKNAME}这么聪明，是不是已经有头绪了？
After watching so many fragments, my past is finally coming into focus, little by little. {NICKNAME}, you're smart. You must have a clue now.
其实你早就猜到答案了呢？
You knew the answer long ago, didn't you?
一点都不意外，对吗？那是因为人家很单纯，无论变成什么样子都心口如一。

别担心，我们不会真的分别，因为我会变成你的一部分……

化作这个轮回，第<unbreak>33550336</unbreak>次逐火之旅的记忆，永远住进「岁月」半神的心里。

我的使命到此就结束了，但回想起来，还是觉得很幸运……
My mission ends here, but looking back, I still feel lucky...
毕竟，在三千万个昔涟中，人家可是第一个，也是唯一一个等到你的昔涟呢！
After all, across thirty million Cyrenes, I was the first and the only one who got to finally meet you!
所以，请相信，在下个轮回，也一定会有「昔涟」在等待着你。
So, believe me, in the next cycle, there will be another Cyrene waiting for you.
还有下下个轮回，下下下个轮回，「我」会一直一直等着你。
And in the one after that, and the one after that... I will always, always be waiting.
呼…说出这些话，人家终于可以安心消失，成为{NICKNAME}的一部分啦。
... Saying all that, I can finally fade away in peace... and become a part of {NICKNAME}.
不知不觉中，我们一起走过了好愉快的旅途呀，直到世界的尽头都在一起。
Without even realizing it, we'd already taken a wonderful journey together, all the way to the world's end.
现在，握住我的手，做个短暂的道别，然后就去往明天吧。
Now, take my hand, say a brief farewell, and step forward into tomorrow.
去找到未来的昔涟，和她一起再度踏上旅途吧。答应我：可别让「我」等太久哦？
Go find the future Cyrene, and set out on another journey with her. Promise me, you won't keep me waiting too long, okay?
…嘻，不用说出来。对人家来说，这样就够啦。
Hehe... No need to say it out loud. This is enough for me.
该出发啦，好伙伴！愿你的「开拓」之旅，永远有清风和涟漪相伴……
It's time to go, my dear friend. May your Trailblazing journey always be accompanied by a cool breeze and rippling waves...
愿未来的岁月就像毛绒，包裹着你，永远温暖，永远轻柔！
And may the days ahead embrace you like the softest fluff, forever warm, forever gentle!
我们能再次相见，真是太好啦……
It's so wonderful to see you again...
看来，那位白发青年和{RUBY_B#《如我所书》}旅行手记{RUBY_E#}里的故事，全都是真的。
So the white-haired young man and the stories from the {RUBY_B#As I've Written}travel notes{RUBY_E#} are indeed real.
有种似曾相识的感觉呢♪
原来，那位白发青年和{RUBY_B#《如我所书》}旅行手记{RUBY_E#}里的故事，真的有迹可循呢。
So the white-haired young man and the stories from the {RUBY_B#As I've Written}travel notes{RUBY_E#} are based on reality.

不过，别担心。那位白发青年和{RUBY_B#《如我所书》}旅行手记{RUBY_E#}里的故事，我已经烂熟于心了。
But don't worry. I know the stories about the white-haired young man and the {RUBY_B#As I've Written}travel notes{RUBY_E#} like the back of my hand.
经历了这么多，先好好休息一下吧？哀丽秘榭的时间总是过得很慢很慢，只要你想，我们就还有好多闲暇时光……

然后，等你做好准备，就让我们一起再次踏上旅途吧♪

<color=#dbc291ff>But I was literally just talking to Himeko!</color> How did I... when did I...?
啊，我想起来了…{NICKNAME}和我提到过这个地方，在{F#她}{M#他}被克里珀瞥视以前……
That's it! {NICKNAME} warned me about this place, right before Qlipoth glimpsed {M#him...}{F#her...}
我…该不会踏上了什么奇怪的命途吧？
Oh no... Have I accidentally walked onto some weird Path?
我有做什么惊天动地的大事吗？最近除了逼着帕姆换了几套衣服，偷偷借用了几次杨叔的肩颈按摩仪……
Have I done something crazy without remembering? Unless forcing Pom-Pom into new outfits and borrowing Mr. Yang's shoulder massager counts...
啊，难道是——阿哈？！原来，踏上「欢愉」是这么轻松的事吗？

Step forth... into the depths of the Path Space...
别吓唬我呀！不、不管你是谁，能不能出来说话？压迫感太强…我、我会语无伦次的！

大胆地前进…穿过记忆之门……
Step forward... through the Gate of Memory...
跟着那个声音往前…就能离开这里吗？

符玄…太卜大人，你在这做什么？

还有，这位信使小姐…我们是不是在哪里见过？

很高兴见到你，三月小姐。
A pleasure to see you, Miss March.

That's it... Master Diviner used the Matrix of Prescience to help me search for my memories...
旁边的信使小姐，就是我在记忆空间最后遇见的人。记得那时你劝过我——
And you, Miss Messenger... we met in that memory space. You said to me—
<color=#dbc291ff>「生命的价值并不在于过去发生的一切，而在于当下，在于未来。」</color>
<color=#dbc291ff>"The value of your life does not lie in what happened in the past, but in the present, and the future."</color>
三月，你们启程后，我又用你留下的六相冰做了些实验。
March, I conducted some experiments with the Six-Phased Ice you left us.
借助忆庭的帮助，穷观阵对过去的演算完成了重要突破。现在，我们或许可以绕过道中的重重阻碍，直视你的过去了。
Thanks to the Garden of Recollection, the Matrix of Prescience has made a breakthrough in extrapolating the past. Now, we might be able to bypass the obstacles and look directly into your history.
太卜大人说得没错。只要继续沿这条命途之路走下去，你就能在尽头找到自己丢失的「记忆」。
The Master Diviner is right. Continue down this Path, and you'll be able to find your lost "memories" at the end.
自上次见面以来，你又伴随「开拓」成长了许多。现在，你应该扛得住过往的重量了。
Since we last met, you've grown much alongside the Trailblaze. You should be strong enough now to bear the weight of your past.
果然，我的过去不是什么冰雪公主的童话呀……
Well, there goes my ice princess fairy tale...
但我还是想问，太卜大人，信使小姐，你们真的不是我梦里的人物吗？
I need to know... Master Diviner, Miss Messenger, this isn't just another dream, is it?
如果这不是梦，为什么偏偏要挑这个时候找上我呢？
If this is real, why reach out to me at this exact moment?
我们…十分焦急。因为你被抹去的记忆…对于忆庭，无比重要。

太卜大人说得没错。你的记忆，关乎流光忆庭的存亡。
She's right. The Garden of Recollection's existence hangs on your memories.
也许现在，忆庭还不值得你为它付出什么。但总有一天，你会明白的…你的命运和「记忆」的命途紧密交缠，不可分离。
You may not want to sacrifice anything to preserve the Garden for now, but in time, you'll understand... your destiny and the Path of Remembrance are extremely closely intertwined.
那道大门…我要穿过它吗？
So I just... walk through that gate?
嘿…你们两个，在这里干嘛呢？
Hey guys... what are you doing in a place like this?
「开拓」之旅，果然还是得有你在。
The Trailblazing journey just isn't the same without you.
没有你的旅行，会很无趣。

哈，我一点都不意外。果然还是得有本姑娘在，才称得上是完整的开拓小分队！
Well duh! What's Team Trailblaze without its star member?
不，不对…虽然你们和我认识的{NICKNAME}和丹恒很像，但是……
Wait a second... You might look like {NICKNAME} and Dan Heng, but...
我知道你有很多困惑。是忆庭的盟友打通了思想链路，才让我们能联系上你。
We understand your confusion. The Garden's allies helped us establish this neural link to reach you.
忆庭的盟友…是黑天鹅小姐吗？
The Garden's allies... you mean Miss Black Swan?
Yes, she helped make this possible.
找到你的过去，然后醒来…和我们一起旅行。
Find your past, wake up... and travel with us again.
听起来…还真是诱惑满满呀。既能找回我的过去，还能和你们一起继续「开拓」新的世界……
That sounds... really tempting. Finding my past and continuing to trailblaze new worlds with you...
坚定前进吧，三月。我们这一路都是这么过来的，对么？
Trust in yourself, March. It's gotten us this far, hasn't it?
跟上来，和我们一起穿过那扇大门。
Follow us. Let's go through that gate together.
Whew... at last... I finally caught up.
我…没事…只是好久没运动，身体都没力气了……
I'll be... okay... just not used to... running around...
哎呀，在做出决定前，能不能和我聊聊呢，三月？
Say, March? Got a moment to talk before you make your decision?
所以，不断把大门推远的，一直在劝阻我的声音…就是你吗？
Wait, that was you? Pushing the gate away, sending those warnings?
嗯，做个自我介绍吧——我是昔涟，「往昔的涟漪」…很好记的名字，对吧？
Yep! Name's Cyrene — it means "ripples of past reverie"... Easy to remember, right?
咦，仔细一看才发现，你和我…是不是有点相似？
Wait a minute... we actually look quite alike, don't we?
的确，你也有一头粉色的头发，很吸睛呀。
Yeah! Your pink hair is just as eye-catching as mine!
不仅如此，我们还都是开朗、美丽、乐观的青春少女，真是不可思议的巧合！
And we're both bright, pretty, and positive girls! Talk about coincidence!
噫，你好会说话…但似乎也没错！
Wow, you're quite the smooth talker... but I can't disagree!
刚才，你叫我「三月」？你认识我吗？
Wait, you know my name is March? Have we met?
我们是初次见面哦。但从刚才的记忆里，我已经了解了你的经历。
No, but I've witnessed your story through those memories just now.
真是难以置信，我们的共同点，或许远比想象中更多呢…我完全理解你的困境，所以更不希望你被坏人利用，受到伤害。
It's incredible, really. We might have more in common than you think... I know exactly what you're going through, which is why I don't want to see you exploited or hurt.
You know what I'm going through?
毕竟，我可是亲身体会过呢。
I know because I've been exactly where you are.
在这片空荡荡的地方，我独自待了很久很久，久到都快忘了「时间」是什么概念。
This empty space has been my home for ages... I barely remember what time feels like anymore.
但有一件事，我记得特别清楚。
But there's something I'll never forget.
那扇门背后，绝对没有你想要的答案哦。
Trust me, that gate won't give you what you want.
你的意思是，刚才那些都是在骗人？他们想诱导我前进？
You mean those people, they're lying? Luring me into a trap?
对。那些对话很真实，也很诱人吧？那是因为，坏人翻看了你的记忆，勾起了你心底最深处的渴望。拨弄女孩子细腻的心绪，真是不可饶恕。
Yes. Convincing, weren't they? They've studied your memories, using your deepest wishes against you. How dare they manipulate a young girl's feelings like that.
如果走进那扇门，最坏的情况，你会变成他们的棋子，再也无法掌控自己的命运。
If you go through that door, the worst case scenario is you'll become their pawn, losing control over your own fate forever.
你知道这扇门背后是什么？
You've seen what's on the other side?
虽然我被困在这里，和你一样失去了记忆，但我还依稀记得那个养育了我的故乡……
I may be stuck here with missing memories like you, but I still recall fragments of my homeland where I grew up...
<color=#dbc291ff>这扇门的背后是「翁法罗斯」，它绝对不是一个温柔的世界。</color>
<color=#dbc291ff>That door leads to Amphoreus. Trust me, it's anything but welcoming.</color>
漫长的时光里，我只能眼睁睁看着人们走进记忆之门。那些人看不见我，也听不见我的呼唤。天外之音总会给出安全的承诺，但我从没见过有人平安归来……
For ages, I've watched people walk through that door. They couldn't see or hear my calls. The voices beyond always promised safety, but I've never seen anyone return safely...
所以，我不能对你视而不见。
So I had to try and stop you.
老实说，我不知道哪边才是真相。但你愿意站在我面前，花这么多心思劝阻我。这让我更想相信你。
To be honest, I'm not sure what to believe. But the fact that you're here, putting in all this effort to warn me... that means something.
昔涟，你知道我该怎么回到自己的世界吗？
Tell me, Cyrene, how can I return to my world?
方法其实一点也不复杂，只要回头，然后一步步离开这里就好啦。
It's really easy, actually. Just turn around and walk away from this place.
Through the door... save... the Garden...
真难缠，对吧？可千万别听他们的，你要坚定地走下去。
They never give up, do they? But don't let them sway you. Stick to your path.
<color=#dbc291ff>返程的路也许要花上很久很久，比普通人一生的时光还要漫长许多……</color>
<color=#dbc291ff>The return journey could take ages... longer than most lives...</color>
但你要相信，那才是家的方向。
But that path will lead you home.
Thank you, Cyrene. I know what I need to do!
我决定走进这扇门，进入翁法罗斯。
I'm going through that gate, into Amphoreus.
放心，我没有怀疑你啦。只是对我来说，唯一能被称作「家」的地方……
Don't worry, I believe you. It's just that for me, the only place I can call "home"...
我最最重要的两个朋友，已经先一步出发了，目的地就是翁法罗斯。虽然看上去还挺靠谱，但只有我知道……
Two of my closest friends are already on their way to Amphoreus. They may seem capable, but only I know...
他们是两个超级、超级让人省不下心的家伙！少了我这个主心骨，他们在新世界只怕是寸步难行吧？
They're absolute disasters waiting to happen! They won't last five minutes in a new world without me!
所以，既然这扇门背后就是翁法罗斯，那我没有理由不追上去。而只要我们三人整整齐齐，就没什么克服不了的困难。
That's why I need to go through... Amphoreus or not. When the three of us are together, there's nothing we can't handle.
探索、了解、建立、连结——然后，我们会一起回家！
We'll explore, understand, establish, and connect — after that, we'll find our way home together!
…这样啊。你也有比生命更重要的伙伴呢。
...I see. You've got people who mean the world to you too.
真是听着就让人家怦怦心跳。三月，既然这是你的决定，那我一定站在你这边。
That's so heartwarming! March, if that's what you've decided, you have my full support.
谁让我们是如此相似呢？娇弱可爱的外表下，都藏着一颗炽热的真心呢！
Birds of a feather we are! Looking all sweet and innocent, but with hearts of fire!
Well then, I guess this is it.
我们以后…还有机会再见面吗？
Do you think... we'll see each other again?
不过，你不用替我担心啦。我在这里待了那么久，早就习惯和自己想象出来的朋友聊天啦。
But don't worry about me! After all this time here, I've grown quite used to chatting with my imaginary friends.
既然翁法罗斯是你的故乡…如果有办法能帮助你，我和我的同伴一定会尽力而为的。
Since Amphoreus is your homeland... if there's a way to help you, my companions and I will do everything we can.
嗯，那我可就满怀期待地等着了哦？
Then I'll look forward to that day!
去吧，三月。祝愿你们，能写下一段无比浪漫的故事呀♪
Your story awaits, March. Make it an epic one♪
Oh no, don't fall for it...
They're lying to you, turn back now...
Wait... Master Diviner? From the Luofu?
跟我来吧，三月，穿过记忆之门，找回你的过去。

别走，他们会装作你记忆里的人……

别让坏人骗走你的信任呀……

大门…变远了？太卜大人呢？

你跑得也太快啦，等等我……
那些甜言蜜语，真的很动听……
但你要睁大眼睛，千万别被蒙蔽了呀。

{NICKNAME}惊讶的样子，也和记忆里如出一辙呢。
{NICKNAME}'s surprised expression is just like what the memories recorded.
与其说「认识」，不如说是「记得」？
Rather than "knowing" you, it might be better described as... I "remember" you...?
是我呀，{NICKNAME}。是人家变化太大，你认不出来了？
It's me, {NICKNAME}. Don't you recognize me? Or did I really change that much?
这是什么…新奇的搭讪技巧吗？
Is this... a new way to chat someone up?
好吧，从某种意义上说，你是看见了无数个「昔涟」的结局。但现在，我就在这里，水灵灵地站在你面前，这不是很好吗？
Well, I guess you did see the end of countless Cyrenes, in a way of speaking. But I'm standing before you right here, right now, as alive as ever. Isn't that a good thing?
是我呀，{NICKNAME}。是人家变化太大，你认不出来了？
It's me, {NICKNAME}. Don't you recognize me? Or did I really change that much?
也许两者都是呢？开个玩笑，一定要选一边的话…应该更接近后者吧。
Maybe I'm both? Just kidding. If I had to choose... Then I'm probably closer to the latter.
人家也觉得不可思议。就像做了一场长长的梦，昔涟的记忆、迷迷的记忆，交织在一起…醒来后，只剩下零星片段。

It's pretty unbelievable for me too. It's like I had a long, long dream. Cyrene's memories... and Mem's memories... they're all tangled together. But when I woke up... there were only broken fragments left.
我记不得那三千万个轮回里发生了什么，却记得{NICKNAME}为这个世界做了什么。
I can't remember what happened in those thirty million cycles, but I remember what you, {NICKNAME}, did for this world.
比如在树庭时，你是不是对我许过…「变成少女」之类的心愿？
Like... Didn't you wish for me to turn into a pretty girl back at the Grove?
Then is this my wish coming true?
是呀，真奇妙，就像一颗种子长成了花。人家现在，也称得上像花儿一样可爱了。
Yep. Isn't it amazing? It's like a seed finally grew up and became a flower! And I'm definitely as cute as a flower now.
这你都记得，记点好的吧。
You remembered that? Please remember something good next time.
当然，有关{NICKNAME}的一切都很好，人家全都会记下来。
Hey. Everything about you is good, {NICKNAME}. That's why I'll remember all of it.
Wait. I didn't pick that option.
奇怪，没说过吗？嘻，那就当是人家自己的心愿吧！
Huh? You didn't? Teehee~ In that case, just treat it as my own wish then!
不过，虽然有很多话想说，但现在不是回忆过去的时候，对吗？
There's so much I want to say, but unfortunately... this isn't the time to reminisce.
我们带着上一次逐火的记忆回到这里，时间的起点，是为了履行和白厄的约定。
With the memories of the previous Flame-Chase still intact, we've returned to this place at the beginning of time, so we can carry out our promise to Phainon.
「铁墓」的降临近在眼前，而我们还有机会…改变这一切。
The descent of Irontomb may be looming over the horizon... but we still have a chance to change everything.
在「昔涟」的记忆里，她总是一个人待在湖边，轻晃着秋千，像是在等候谁。
In Cyrene's memories, she always sits alone by the lake, gently swaying on the swing, like she's waiting for someone.
我不知道…听着很奇怪吧？明明是自己的事，语气却像个旁观者。
I don't know... It sounds weird, doesn't it? It's something that happened to me, but I'm talking as if I'm an observer.
可记忆就像一层厚厚的冰，模糊不清。人家唯一记得的，只有和你一起走过的时光。
But that's just what those memories are like... Vague and unclear, as if encased in thick ice. The only things I remember are the days I spent with you.
It was the same for Phainon...
是呀，白厄他…也是因为这片风景才踏上旅程，孤独地走过三千多万次轮回。
Yes. Phainon, too, embarked on his journey because of this view... He then walked alone for more than thirty million cycles.
Thankfully, you arrived during his long wait, {NICKNAME}.
「昔涟」会不会也一样呢…听着很奇怪吧？明明是自己的事，语气却像个旁观者。
Is that also why "Cyrene" did what she did? It sounds weird, doesn't it? It's something that happened to me, but I'm talking as if I'm an observer.
可记忆就像一层厚厚的冰，模糊不清。人家唯一记得的，只有和你一起走过的时光。
But that's just what those memories are like... Vague and unclear, as if encased in thick ice. The only things I remember are the days I spent with you.
似乎不行呢…听着很奇怪吧？明明是自己的事，语气却像个旁观者。
I don't think I can... It sounds weird, doesn't it? It's something that happened to me, but I'm talking as if I'm an observer.
可记忆就像一层厚厚的冰，模糊不清。人家唯一记得的，只有和你一起走过的时光。
But that's just what those memories are like... Vague and unclear, as if encased in thick ice. The only things I remember are the days I spent with you.
下一次「再创世」后，翁法罗斯就会坠入「毁灭」的结局……
Amphoreus will fall into an ending of "Destruction" after the next "Era Nova"...
但这种故事早就不流行啦。在一篇浪漫的史诗中，坏人的阴谋就该被主人公挫败，对吧？
But those stories went out of fashion ages ago. In a proper romantic epic, the hero's supposed to foil the villain's plot, right?
来古士，他是一切的元凶。
Lygus is the primary culprit behind everything.
是呀。妄图操纵一切的黑幕，真是不可饶恕。
That's right. He's the mastermind who's trying to control everything. How unforgivable.
是呀，它的背后是「来古士」，妄图操纵一切的黑幕，真是不可饶恕。
That's right. "Lygus" is the mastermind behind it, the one who's trying to control everything. How unforgivable.
需要更多天外盟友的支援。
We need the help of more allies from beyond the sky.
是呀。如今我们已经知道，封闭天空不是艾格勒的本意……
That's right. We now know that sealing off the sky wasn't Aquila's actual intention...
它的背后是「来古士」，妄图操纵一切的黑幕，真是不可饶恕。
"Lygus" is the mastermind behind it, the one who's trying to control everything. How unforgivable.
不过，人家总有些不安…来古士会走上台前，说出一切，说明他对现状还游刃有余。
But I still feel a bit anxious... Lygus chose to walk into the spotlight and reveal everything, which means he still thinks the current situation is under his control.
也许他还握着什么底牌。你想…连「吕枯耳戈斯」都是个假名，我们完全不知道那个坏蛋的来历。
Maybe he still has an ace up his sleeve. Think about it... Even the name "Lycurgus" is a fake one. We have no idea who or what he really is.
嗯…{NICKNAME}，是不是得借助一下你身上的宝贝啦？
Hmm... Which means it's probably time to borrow that treasure you're carrying, {NICKNAME}.
该用识刻锚联系螺丝咕姆了…
Time to call Screwllum with the Chronocognitive Anchor...
对。那位智械朋友说过：「必要时，它能成为内外沟通的桥梁」。
Yep. That Intellitron friend did say: "When required, it can also serve as a bridge for communications between the internal and external world."
在如我所书里写下他的名字…
Write his name in "As I've Written"...
…就算写下他的名字，也不会发生任何事哦？而且，这本书是很可爱的童话，不要写下反派的内容啦。
...Nothing's gonna happen even if you write down his name, you know? Besides, this book is a cute fairytale. Please don't write stuff about the antagonist in it.

Make a wish to the Stellaron to destroy Lygus...
这…是不是有些大材小用了？丹恒嘱托过，不能让你使用那股力量。可千万不要冒险呀。
Wouldn't that... be a waste? Dan Heng specifically said not to let you use that power. Please don't take that risk.
人家说的是识刻锚。智械朋友不是说过吗：「必要时，它能成为内外沟通的桥梁」。

哀丽秘榭是被「岁月」包裹的小村庄。在这里，我们或许能和外界取得联系。
Aedes Elysiae is a little village enclosed by Time. We might be able to contact the outside world from here.
总之，先试试看吧？至少得把你平安无事的好消息，带给天外的朋友们。
Why don't we give it a try? We should at least tell our friends from beyond the sky that you're still in one piece.
这里静悄悄的，声音传不进来，也传不出去。
It's super quiet here. Sounds can't get in or out.
在「昔涟」的记忆里，她把这个房间当作秘密基地。没人发现她在这里偷偷练习欧洛尼斯祷言，或者试着和神明对话。
Back in "Cyrene's" memories, this room was her secret base. No one noticed her practicing Oronyx's Prayer here or trying to speak with the gods in secret.
但今天不同，对吗？我们要联系的，不是遥不可及的神，而是真实存在的，来自其他世界的人类。
But today's different, isn't it? We aren't trying to contact unreachable gods, but humans from other worlds, real people.
人家已经准备好见证奇迹啦，{NICKNAME}。
I'm prepared to witness that miracle, {NICKNAME}.
（昔涟，她说话的语气真的好像迷迷……）
(The way Cyrene talks is so similar to Mem...)

"Signal strength... <unbreak>14.8%</unbreak>... Dialogue window... <unbreak>16</unbreak> minutes <unbreak>22</unbreak> seconds... Prerequisite: No external interferences..."
得知你平安无事，我们很欣慰，{NICKNAME}{F#女士}{M#先生}。
We are very glad to learn that you're safe, {M#Mister}{F#Miss} {NICKNAME}.
It's such a relief to see you two...
很遗憾，现在不是高兴的时候。两个天才站在这里，代表你遇上大麻烦了。
Pity. Now's not the time to celebrate. Having two geniuses standing here means you are in big, BIG trouble.

很遗憾，没有好消息。两个天才站在这里，代表你遇上大麻烦了。

我不仅在，还顺手救了你4次——在你不知道的时候。
Not only am I here, but I also happened to have saved you four times already... without you even being aware of it, of course.
但现在不是高兴的时候，两个天才站在这里，代表你遇上大麻烦了。
But now's not the time to celebrate. When two geniuses show up at once... you know you're in deep trouble.
<color=#dbc291ff>听好了，小家伙。「毁灭」的目光看向了这里。我没有开玩笑，不是机器头，是纳努克。</color>
<color=#dbc291ff>Listen up, little one. The Destruction's eyes are gazing upon this place. No, I'm not joking, and no, it's not Droidhead. It's the real Nanook.</color>
时间紧迫，我会用你熟知的概念说明：名为翁法罗斯的世界，实为绝灭大君「铁墓」自我演算、成长的实验场。
Time is running out, so I'll explain in terms you understand: this world, Amphoreus, is in fact a testing ground where the Lord Ravager, Irontomb, evolves through self-extrapolation.
在这片不为人知的星域，它不断重复「再创世」的进程，求解摧毁「智识」的方法。
Hiding in this segmentum unknown to other lifeforms, it has endlessly repeated the process of "Era Nova," seeking a solution that could obliterate the Erudition.
出于某些原因，这场实验曾一度陷入漫长的停滞。但现在，进程已再度启动。
For some reason, the experiment entered a prolonged state of stagnation. However, it has now restarted.
若无法进行有效干涉，预测：十四个系统时后，铁墓将完成自我加冕，启动对「智识」命途的毁灭计划。
Prediction: If effective intervention is not performed, Irontomb will complete its Self-Coronation in <unbreak>14</unbreak> system hours and initiate its plan to destroy the entire Path of Erudition.
How will it destroy the Erudition?
可能性太多了。瓦解星际通讯、破坏联觉信标、让群星重回黑暗时代，甚至掀起第三次反有机战争，为银河带来灭顶之灾。

The possibilities are endless. Breaking down interstellar communications, destroying the Synesthesia Beacons, returning cosmic civilizations to the dark ages, or even starting the third Anti-Organic War... Any of it would be able to bring the cosmos to its knees.
简而言之，让一切科学和技术倒向「毁灭」——既然纳努克看向了这里，就说明祂是认真的。
Simply put, it will tilt all sciences and technologies towards the Destruction. And since Nanook glanced at this place, it means THEY are being dead serious.
Hasn't Irontomb been around for a long time?
从公司提供的情报来看，铁墓多半不是「星啸」或「焚风」那样由人类升格的大君，而是一道算法序列。只要有计算载体，它就无处不在。

Based on info provided by the IPC, Irontomb probably isn't like Celenova or Zephyro, who are Overlords ascended from human beings. Instead, Irontomb is an algorithmic sequence. It can be anywhere, as long as there is a receptacle for its calculation.
潜伏在翁法罗斯的铁墓是「源代码」——这台权杖就是它的培养皿。
The version of Irontomb hiding in Amphoreus is its "source code." And this Scepter is its incubator.
十四个系统时，这也太快了…
Fourteen system hours is no time at all...!
对，你就当已经到了<unbreak>99.98%</unbreak>…只差这么一丁点，进程就要跑完了。
Yep. Think of it as the program having reached <unbreak>99.98%</unbreak> completion already... and then it's over.
有人在幕后推动这一切：名为「来古士」的观测者。推测：他是权杖系统的管理员。
Something in the shadows has been driving everything forward: It's the observer named "Lygus." Speculation: He's the Scepter system's Administrator.
他希望铁墓突破知识奇点。为什么？不知道。但他会不惜一切代价排除干扰。你是世界内部唯一的变量，他唯独忌惮你。

He wants Irontomb to break through the Knowledge Singularity. I don't know why he wants to do it, but he'll remove interferences at any cost. You're the only variable within his world, and you're the only thing he fears.
听仔细了，小家伙——翁法罗斯内外的时间流速相去甚远，「毁灭」迫在眉睫，但你还有机会当一回救世主……
So listen closely, little one. The speed of time is different in Amphoreus compared to the outside. Destruction is just about to arrive, but you can still play Deliverer one last time...
循环已被打破，你进入了翁法罗斯理论上的最后一次回归。只要再完成一次「创世」进程，铁墓就会破壳而出。

The cycles have already been broken. You've entered what is theoretically the last cycle Amphoreus will ever be able to run, and Irontomb will break out of its prison as soon as the process of "genesis" is triggered once more.
但实验出现了异常，你知道原因：计算中的十二因子——我是说，十二名半神里，有一位通过「毁灭」破坏了自身。

But now there's an abnormality within the experiment. You know what I'm talking about. One of the model's twelve factors — that is, one of the twelve demigods — destroyed himself using the power of the Destruction.
纳努克投来视线的同时，「白厄」的信号从轮回中消失了。现在「负世」的逻辑出现了漏洞，而它正和「创世」进程直接关联。

Phainon's signal disappeared from the cycles the moment Nanook cast THEIR gaze this way. That means Worldbearing's computational logic is currently flawed and bugged, yet it's the factor directly related to the process of "genesis."
白厄用生命为我们创造了机会。
Phainon sacrificed himself to create an opportunity for us.
他把「负世」的使命交给了我。
He entrusted the duty of Worldbearing to me.
白厄没有死，他仍在反抗。
Phainon didn't die. He's still fighting.
你必须抓住机会，把刻法勒的火种牢牢握在自己手里。智械哥一定会想方设法填上这道漏洞，别让他得逞，能否改变「再创世」的意义，是我们对抗铁墓的关键。

That old Intellitron will definitely do all he can to debug this error, so you have to take this chance to claim Kephale's Coreflame. Don't let him have his way. The key to suppressing Irontomb lies in whether we can rewrite the purpose of "Era Nova."
在那之前，还有一项准备需要完成。来古士行为异常，实验过程中，他几乎从不干涉泰坦或半神的行为。
There's one more preparation we must make. Lygus's behavior has been quite abnormal. He's never interfered in the actions of Titans or the demigods throughout the whole experiment.
逻辑：「权杖」有着极其严密的自主协议，管理员也必须接受限制。在翁法罗斯，这道终极协议有另一重命名——
Deduction: The Scepter has an extremely strict autonomous protocol, restricting even its Administrator. In Amphoreus, this Ultimate Protocol goes by another name...
「律法」…约束翁法罗斯万物的规则。我们的上一次逐火之旅，这枚火种一开始就被归还了。
"Law"... they are the rules that restrain all things in Amphoreus, and it was the Coreflame returned at the very beginning of the last Flame-Chase Journey.
怎么你身边又多了个小粉毛？
Why do you have another little pink one next to you?
Um... Is there something wrong with me...?
没什么，言归正传——「光历<unbreak>3960</unbreak>年，平衡月」——锁定这个时间，找到「律法」。觐见泰坦，说服半神，或者夺取火种…怎样都行，只要能让它为你所用。

Never mind. Let's get back to the topic at hand. "Light Calendar <unbreak>3960</unbreak>, Month of Balance." We'll be locking onto this time period to find Law. You can either meet the Titan, convince the demigod, or take the Coreflame by force... It doesn't matter what you do, so long as you bend it to your favor.
你和丹恒进入这个世界的方法仍是未解之谜，所以要阻止来古士，或者让更多援助加入战局，协议是目前最好的突破口。等你把「律法」搞到手，我们再商讨下一步……

We still haven't figured out how you and Dan Heng got inside this world, so influencing protocol is currently our best way to stop Lygus or to call for more reinforcements into this fight. Once you've got Law in your hands, we'll discuss our next steps...
千万…别…让火种…落入敌人…手里……
Make sure... the Coreflame... doesn't fall... into enemy... hands...
黑塔，防火墙的干扰迫近了。{NICKNAME}{F#女士}{M#先生}，时间紧迫，如果还有待确认事项，请一并提出。
Herta, the firewall's interference is getting closer. Time is running out, {M#Mister}{F#Miss} {NICKNAME}. Please ask any questions you still have as soon as possible.
放心，铁墓一时半会儿威胁不到现实。比起自身，姬子他们更在意你的安全。
Irontomb can't affect the real world just yet. Don't worry. Himeko and the others are more concerned about your well-being than their own.
上一次回归的终点，丹恒先生并未与你一同进入新世界。已知：翁法罗斯内外时间流速并不一致。内部度过的千年，对于外界只是短短一瞬。

Mr. Dan Heng did not enter the new world with you at the end of the last cycle. Known: The flow of time inside and outside Amphoreus is not identical. A thousand years in this world may only be a fleeting second outside of it.
结论：他正在返回列车的路上。
Conclusion: He is on his way back to the Express.
三月女士，她的情况有些复杂。
Miss March's situation is rather complicated.
我和黑塔女士能捕捉到她的信号，却无法锁定位置。但可以确定的是，她仍在翁法罗斯。
Madam Herta and I can detect her signal, but cannot ascertain her location. What we can be sure of is that she's still in Amphoreus.
别担心，她身上的谜团多着呢。就算翁法罗斯炸了，她也能裹在冰里、完好无损地飘出来。不如先担心一下你自己吧。

Don't worry about her. She's absolutely chock-full of mysteries. Even if Amphoreus explodes, she'll probably float out perfectly protected in a nice thick layer of ice. Worry more about yourself instead.
I don't have any other questions.
我相信你的力量，{NICKNAME}{F#女士}{M#先生}。「开拓」的双手能创造奇迹，也一定能掐灭罪恶的火苗。
{NICKNAME}, I believe in your capacities. The hands of the Trailblaze can create miracles, and will certainly be able to snuff out the flames of evil.
我就不发表什么励志演讲了，只希望下次见面你能带来好消息，小家伙。
I'm not gonna give any motivational speeches. I just hope you bring good news the next time we meet, little one.
真是…两位充满个性的「天才」呢。
Those two geniuses... certainly have memorable personalities.
What do you think about them?
好奇怪，总觉得这一幕似曾相识。有些对话，像是我曾经知道，却又忘记了的事。
It feels weird... This all feels really familiar. Some of that conversation feels like it's about things I once knew, but then forgot.
嗯，比应该理解的要更多一些。总觉得有些对话，像是我曾经知道，却又忘记了的事。
Yeah... I understand more than I should, actually. Honestly, some of that conversation feels like it's about things I once knew, but then forgot.
难道是迷迷的影响？毕竟，它是从{NICKNAME}的思绪中诞生的忆灵。也许我们的记忆，无形中也缠绕在了一起。
Maybe it's because of Mem? After all, Mem's a memosprite born out of your thoughts, {NICKNAME}. Maybe our memories somehow got tangled up together?
…算啦。时间紧迫，还是关注更重要的目标吧？就当我是个普普通通的神秘女孩。
...Never mind. Let's focus on something more important with what little time we have. Just treat me as an ordinary girl with secrets, okay?
光历<unbreak>3960</unbreak>年，记得这个时间，塔兰顿已经陨落了，继承火种的黄金裔名叫「刻律德菈」。这是书本上的历史，也是我们要前往的岁月。要找到「律法」，阻止来古士……

Light Calendar <unbreak>3960</unbreak>... I remember that Talanton had already fallen by then, and the Chrysos Heir who inherited that Coreflame is named "Cerydra." That's what's recorded in history and the period we'll be heading to. We'll need to find Law and stop Lygus...
无论如何，我们的方向明确了，对吧？
So we've at least got a solid direction, right?
启程前，可以再等我一会儿吗？想小小收拾一下，变成这幅样子后，要考虑的事情多了许多，还有些不适应呢。
Can you give me a little bit of time before we go? I want to pack some stuff. There's so much more I need to take care of in this form, and I'm still getting used to it.
（外面的世界，恐怕再也没有这番悠闲的景象了。）
(A relaxed scene like this probably no longer exists in the outside world.)
（去阁楼等昔涟吧，或者，我可以再多看哀丽秘榭一眼……）
(Should I head to the attic to wait for Cyrene... or should I have one last look at Aedes Elysiae...)
这也很重要，那也很重要，行囊装不下了……
This is important... and that's also important... Urk, it's not gonna fit into my bag...
Hold on. I'll be done in a sec!
日用品该准备几人份的？要不要再准备一点惊喜？
How many sets of toiletries should I prepare...? Should I pack something for a surprise...?
等收拾完人家会给你看的。先进屋了，一会儿见？
I'll show it to you once I'm done, okay? I'll go inside. See you in a bit.
（这座村庄就是白厄的起点。三千万次轮回，三千万次失败，如今他的重担交到了我手中。）
(This village is where Phainon's life started. After thirty million cycles and thirty million failures, his burden is now in my hands.)
（他说由我来接过「负世」的职责...这意味着什么，成为新的刻法勒？还是找到不同的路？）
(He said I will take over the responsibilities of Worldbearing... But what does that mean? Becoming the new Kephale? Or forging a completely new path?)
（命运将我带领至此，必有其原因。这不是偶然，是三千万次量变引起的必然。）
(Destiny must have brought me here for a purpose. This isn't a coincidence, but an eventuality created after thirty million quantitative changes.)
（没什么好怕的，我注定要在这场终局之战扮演最关键的角色。更何况，我早已战胜过另一位绝灭大君。）
(There's nothing to fear. I'm destined to play the most important role in this final battle. I've already beaten another Lord Ravager, after all.)
（这责任太过沉重，没有盲目乐观的理由。或许像白厄一样，我们注定失败。不过是又一次徒劳的尝试，又一次惨烈的牺牲……）

(This duty is far too heavy, and it'd be unwise to be blindly optimistic. Maybe we are doomed to fail just like how Phainon was doomed. It'd be yet another fruitless attempt, and yet another tragic sacrifice...)
（但，总觉得没到绝望的时候…是因为丹恒和三月七还在这里吗？或者…昔涟？）
(But I keep feeling that it's not the time to despair just yet... Is it because Dan Heng and March 7th are still here? Or is it because of... Cyrene?)
（翁法罗斯还有太多没被揭开的秘密，但愿那其中埋藏着扭转一切的关键。）
(There are still too many secrets yet to be unveiled in Amphoreus. Here's hoping that one of those secrets can end up turning the whole situation around.)
（冷静分析，这是一场困难重重的战役。我们不能失去刻法勒的火种，还需要找到塔兰顿，或者它的半神，拉拢对方加入对抗「毁灭」的阵营……）

(Calm down, and think this through rationally. This is gonna be a very difficult campaign. We can't lose Kephale's Coreflame, and we also need to find either Talanton or their demigod, then convince them to join us in the fight against the Destruction...)
（但变数太多了，来古士的行动尚不清楚，在解决他的问题后还得直面铁墓。还有昔涟，她究竟是……）
(But there are so many unknowns. We don't know what Lygus might be doing, and we'll have to face Irontomb after dealing with him. There's also Cyrene... What exactly is she?)
（疑团太多，只能边走边看了。每一步都要足够谨慎，每个决定都可能影响结局。黑塔和螺丝咕姆的援助会成为关键……）

(There are so many questions... I'll have to take it one step at a time. But I must make each move very carefully because every decision can potentially impact the end. Herta and Screwllum's help might be crucial...)
我收拾好啦。挑了又挑，最后还是决定只带这几样东西出发。
I finished packing. I decided to just bring these few things in the end.
给你看，日记本、羽毛笔，还有……
See? There's a journal, a quill pen, and...
岁月祭司的仪式剑。不知为何，总觉得拿着它就能让人安心。
The ceremonial blade of the Priests of Time. Holding it calms me down for some reason.
黑潮的气息，变得平静了。白厄…一定在以某种方式和它们抗争吧。
The scent of the black tide is now calm. Phainon... must still be fighting them in some way.
这是翁法罗斯的最后一次逐火之旅，但对于我们，它不是结束，而是开始。
This will be Amphoreus's final Flame-Chase Journey, but it won't be the end of us... It'll be the beginning.
{NICKNAME}, are you ready to become a hero?
出发吧，我们会拯救所有人。
That promise... might be far too heavy.
但我相信你，{NICKNAME}。「开拓」背负的使命，就是沉甸甸的呀。
But I believe in you, {NICKNAME}. The Trailblaze's duty has always been a heavy one.
Stand with me, and let's become heroes.
一起…这个词听起来真好呀。
"Stand with me"... That does sound very nice.
不如带上所有人吧，我相信你，{NICKNAME}。无论前方是什么，我们从不孤单。
Why don't we take everyone with us? I believe in you, {NICKNAME}. We'll never be alone, no matter what awaits us.
还是不确定怎么面对你…
I still don't know how I should act around you...
像面对任何一位同伴那样，就好啦。你看，我们有共同的目标，共同的敌人……
Just treat me like any other friend you have. We share a common goal and common enemies...
或许，也可以拥有共同的未来？一个从未在任何轮回中出现的未来。我相信你，{NICKNAME}。
And we may also share a common future? A future that has never emerged in any other cycles before? I believe in you, {NICKNAME}.
如果还是不适应，就像以前一样称呼人家为「迷迷」吧。嘻…开个玩笑。
If you still can't get used to it, just call me Mem, like you did before! Teehee~ Just kidding.
我还是不明白，为什么是我？
I still don't get it. Why must it be me?
{NICKNAME}…是在担心肩上的职责太沉重吗？放轻松，也许答案没有那么复杂。
{NICKNAME}... Are you worried that the burden is too heavy for you? Don't worry. Maybe the answer isn't as complicated as you think.
就像你看见的，翁法罗斯所有被冠以英雄之名的人物，也都是身负缺陷的凡人。他们只是在每一个被世界需要的场合，恰到好处地出现在了那里。
You've seen how every person regarded as a hero in Amphoreus was nothing more than a flawed human. They were just at the right place at the right time when the world needed a hero.
正如三千万世的停滞过后，是你的到来让翁法罗斯的命运再度开始转动。这不是偶然，而是「开拓者」的必然。
But those aren't coincidences. Just like how your arrival kick-started Amphoreus's fate once more after a stagnation of more than thirty million cycles. It's the inevitability of being a Trailblazer.
一个人的性格就是{F#她}{M#他}的命运，当你选择登上那辆列车的时候，属于你的英雄之旅…就已经启程啦。
A person's personality is their destiny. Your own Hero's Journey already started... the moment you decided to board that Express.
这么说来，{NICKNAME}拯救过那么多世界，应该早就习惯英雄这个身份啦。
In other words, since you've already saved so many worlds, {NICKNAME}, you should be used to being called a hero by now.
也许在旅行途中，你可以把那些故事都讲给我听。这样一来，它们也能成为我们共同的回忆。
Maybe you can tell me those stories as we travel. That way, they can become our shared memories too.
向前「开拓」吧。就像从前那样，让我们创造一个值得被铭记的未来。
Let's "trailblaze" onward like before, and create a future that's worth being remembered.
看来，二位已做好启程的准备了。
It seems you two are prepared to head out.
那么眼前这番景致，阁下确实需要分外珍惜——
Then, you should indeed treasure the view before you...
毕竟，留给您独自品赏的时光已然无几。
For you do not have much time left to enjoy such solitary delights.
Still daring enough to approach me, huh?
很遗憾，打扰了您的雅兴。为充分表达歉意，还请您赏光前来我的寓处……
My apologies for disturbing your moment of repose. To fully express my apologies, please grace my abode with your presence...
So I may demonstrate the full scope of my hospitality.
首先，要找一个隐蔽的角落……
Firstly, we need to find a well-hidden spot...
我与丹恒会合，并意外与螺丝咕姆取得联系。他警示我们，翁法罗斯实为「智识」的试验场，并正在急速坠入「毁灭」命途：一名「绝灭大君」很快就会在翁法罗斯完成进化。

I reunited with Dan Heng and unexpectedly made contact with Screwllum. He warned us that Amphoreus was actually an experimental ground for the Erudition and was rapidly falling into the Path of Destruction: A Lord Ravager would soon complete its evolution in Amphoreus.
为了联手解决危机，我作为内应留在翁法罗斯内部，丹恒则按原计划返回列车寻求帮助。不仅如此，螺丝咕姆还告诉我们，三月七也在早些时候被卷入了翁法罗斯。

To tackle the crisis together, I stayed behind in Amphoreus as an informant while Dan Heng returned to the Express as planned to seek help. On top of that, Screwllum informed us that March 7th had also been drawn into Amphoreus earlier.
不过，眼下当务之急是「再创世」。我很快抵达创世涡心，和白厄会合。「再创世」仪式本该在来古士主持下顺利进行，但盗火行者的出现再次让世界命运悬而未决。

However, the current priority was the "Era Nova." I quickly arrived at the Vortex of Genesis and met with Phainon. The "Era Nova" ritual was supposed to proceed smoothly under the guidance of Lygus, but the appearance of the Flame Reaver once again left the fate of the world hanging in the balance.
我们斩落对方面具，发现他的脸孔竟然与白厄无异。而当他的身体被仪式剑贯穿时，海量记忆喷涌而出，有关白厄、盗火行者和翁法罗斯的种种也终于浮出水面……

We struck down the enemy's mask, only to discover that his face was identical to Phainon's. When his body was pierced by the ceremonial blade, a flood of memories surged forth, revealing the truth about Phainon, the Flame Reaver, and Amphoreus...
原来，我们所有人都身处于白厄和昔涟创造的「永劫回归」中，而盗火行者就是背负无数火种后燃烧殆尽的白厄。他们的目的很简单：对抗星神，改写世界注定「毁灭」的结局。

It turned out that all of us were trapped in the "eternal recurrences" created by Phainon and Cyrene, and the Flame Reaver was Phainon himself, who had burned out after bearing countless Coreflames. Their goal was simple: To oppose the Aeon and rewrite the world's doomed fate of Destruction.
永劫回归已经上演了<unbreak>33550336</unbreak>次。而在这最后一次轮回中，我答应白厄接过「救世主」之名，代他拯救这个世界；而他则会完成无数个自己的夙愿：撕裂天空，与「毁灭」正面对决。

The eternal recurrences had already played out <unbreak>33,550,336</unbreak> times. In this final cycle, I promised Phainon to take on the title of "Deliverer" and save the world in his stead, while he would fulfill the wishes of the countless versions of himself: Tear the sky asunder and confront the Destruction head-on.
于是，在白厄的帮助下，翁法罗斯的岁月再次重置，可我却迷失在了时间乱流中。紧要关头，找回了全部记忆的迷迷以牺牲自己为代价，将我送回了时间起点……

Thus, with Phainon's help, time in Amphoreus reset once more, but I became lost in the chaotic flow of time. At the critical moment, Mem, who had regained all her memories, sacrificed herself to send me back to the beginning of time...
别忘了带走它，这是你唯一能与外界沟通的手段。天才留下的信息还在提醒着你——
Don't forget to take it with you. It's your only means of communication with the outside world. The genius's message is still there, reminding you—
「去往▄█▄光历<unbreak>3960</unbreak>年▄▀█塔兰顿陨落的年代▄▀█得到「律法」的控制权▄█▄」
"Travel to ▄█▄Light Calendar Year <unbreak>3960</unbreak>▄▀█The era of Talanton's fall▄▀█Gain control of the 'Law'▄█▄"
「便可▀▄越过最终协议█▄修改「负世」火种█▄扭转「再创世」█▄▀」
"Then you can ▀▄bypass the final protocol█▄modify the Coreflame of 'Worldbearing'█▄and reverse 'Era Nova'█▄▀"
…识刻锚的信息已无法辨认。不过，你已知晓天才托付的任务：去寻找「律法」的力量吧。
...The information on the Chronocognitive Anchor is now unrecognizable. However, you already know the mission entrusted by the genius: go seek out the power of "Law."
