你试着触碰这面屏幕，一股诡异的感觉瞬间流遍全身……
As you reach out to touch the screen, an eerie sensation instantly courses through your entire body...
此地是翁法罗斯与现实宇宙的交界，是鄙人观察这场实验的观众席，您亦可称之为…<color=#dbc291ff>「神话之外」。</color>
This is the intersection between Amphoreus and the real universe, the audience seat where I observe this experiment. You can also call this location... the <color=#dbc291ff>"Exomyth."</color>
阁下眼前所见，正是褪去「史诗」的伪装后，「永恒之地」与十二半神真实的样貌。
What you see is the true form of The Eternal Land and the twelve demigods after they've shed their disguise of "legends."
很美妙，不是吗？翁法罗斯正如银河的缩影，人们总爱描摹星空的浪漫，却在言语间遗忘了另一种更为真实的宇宙。

Doesn't it look marvelous? Amphoreus is like a microcosm of the cosmos. People love to portray the romance of the starry skies, but their tales often forget a different and far more truthful type of universe.
当古老的安提基色拉人在沙滩上绘制几何图形，用羊皮纸记录下最初的数字符号，宇宙便化作一道沉默的方程，出现在这群孜孜不倦的破译者笔下。

The moment ancient Antikytherans sketched geometric shapes on the sandy beach and recorded the first numerals and symbols on parchment, the universe turned into a silent equation flowing under the pen of these relentless decoders.
「智识」——它曾是造物主的母语，是上帝之笔，也是自由意志最早写下的抒情诗。
The Erudition... it was once the mother tongue of the Creator, the pen of divinity, and the first lyrical verse ever written by free will.
少装腔作势，直接说重点。
Enough purple prose. Get to the point.
呵呵，看来此刻您并无心情闲谈。无妨，我只希望阁下理解：我无意与您敌对。
Heh, seems like you are not in the mood for an idle chat. That is fine. I simply wish for you to understand that I have no intention of being your enemy.
这和你先前的主张背道而驰。
That's the exact opposite of what you asserted before.
呵呵，我只希望阁下理解：我无意与您敌对。
Heh. I simply wish for you to understand that I have no intention of being your enemy.
在漫长的时光中，我潜心呵护权杖的演算，企盼「原动力」能从中萌芽。
I have devoted myself over the long years to nurturing the Scepter's extrapolations, hoping that the Primum Mobile would bud from within it.
如今，我的目标几近达成。凭借愤怒，「Neikos<unbreak>496</unbreak>」已跨过智能奇点，尽管他仍秉持反抗的执念，压制了这一世的黑潮，但沉沦只是时间问题。

And now, my goal is almost complete. Neikos<unbreak>496</unbreak> had exceeded the Intelligence Singularity through his rage, and though he still retains his obsessive defiance and managed to suppress the black tide of this cycle, it's a matter of time before his will crumbles to dust.
<color=#dbc291ff>铁墓终会完成。</color>这无关我的布局，无关你的反抗，无关两位天才的智谋——这是确凿无疑的事实，一如博识尊计算中的时刻。

<color=#dbc291ff>Irontomb will be completed.</color> That will not be affected by my plans, your resistance, or the schemes of the two geniuses. It is an irrefutable fact, just like the Instants in Nous's calculations.
所以，只要你愿意停止干涉，让最后一次「再创世」自然发生。我会保证…列位无名客毫发无损，顺利返航。
In other words, as long as you are willing to stop interfering and let the final "Era Nova" carry out its natural course... I'll guarantee the safety of all Nameless and ensure you return unscathed.
选择权始终在你手中，{NICKNAME}阁下。
You've always had a choice, my {M#Lord}{F#Lady} {NICKNAME}.
接受我的坦诚——或承担违抗它的代价。
You can either accept my sincerity or face the consequences of defying it.
翁法罗斯的人们会怎么样？
What will happen to the people of Amphoreus?
他们本就是实验产物，自然也会随实验场的终结一同逝去。
They've always been the product of the experiment, so naturally, they will perish when the experiment ends.
这是早已注定的结局，所以我不会粉饰这一令人遗憾的结论。
That outcome was predetermined long ago, so I will not embellish such a regrettable conclusion.
我还有一位同伴在这里。
I still have a friend stranded here.
哦，我知道那位女士的去向……
Ah. Yes. I am aware of that esteemed lady's whereabouts...
她的身份…非同凡响。若阁下选择接受我的诚意，我定会献上绵薄之力，将她也送回您的身边。
Her real identity... is quite astounding. If you decide to accept my proposal, then I will do all I can to send her back to you.
铁墓降临，没人能毫发无损。
When Irontomb descends, no one will escape unscathed.
呵呵，您果然在担忧自己和同伴的安危。
Hehehe, you are indeed worried about your safety and that of your companions.
但大可放心：同为这条命途的行者，纳努克的注视早已在您的灵魂中刻下一道烙印，您体内寄宿着「毁灭」的种子……
Rest assured: As a fellow pathstrider of this Path, Nanook's gaze left a brand on your soul long ago. You harbor the seed of Destruction within you...
但您需要知道，该如何正确地使用它。这关键的知识也是我与您谈判的筹码：毕竟，世间掌握此道的人屈指可数……

But you need to learn how to use it in the right way. That vital knowledge is also my bargaining chip in this negotiation between us, for there are few in this world who are truly capable of such a feat...
<color=#dbc291ff>And I happen to be one of them.</color>
星核是祸种，只会带来不幸。
The Stellaron is a seed of ruin and will only bring misfortune.
星核？不，相信我，您对命途的理解还停留于表面……
The Stellaron? No. Believe me, your understanding of Paths has yet to reach any true depth.
一个在星间漂泊的人。一个绝望渴求答案的人。仅此而已。
Someone who wanders the stars. Someone who seeks answers with abject despair. That is all I am.
斯事体大，还请慎重权衡。毕竟摆在您面前的选择……
This matter is of grave importance, so please, do not make your decision lightly. After all, the choice before you...
<color=#dbc291ff>将有三分之一概率，令您擢升为银河独一的存在。</color>
<color=#dbc291ff>...Bears a one-in-three chance of elevating you to an unparalleled existence among the stars.</color>
我从没想过追求什么独一。
I've never thought of becoming unparalleled.
不能放任银河被「毁灭」摧残！
I will not allow the Destruction to tear through the cosmos!
I cannot trust any promises you make.
不依靠你，我同样能独尊银河。
I will rule over the cosmos even without your help.
独一和独尊有着微妙的不同，不过……
"Ruling over" is not exactly the same as "unparalleled." That being said...
阁下言语中的决绝，我已充分感知。
I now see the full scope of the determination in your words.
You may now continue your travels.
What kind of tricks are you pulling?
I'll defeat you right here, right now.
So why did you drag me here...?
呵呵，看来阁下尚未察觉。
Hehehe. It seems you haven't realized something about this place.
「神话之外」是「智识」的领域，在这里，您无法对我进行任何物理干涉，反之亦然。
The Exomyth is the Erudition's domain. You cannot physically interact with me in any way in this place, and vice versa.
既然谈判破裂，我们便没有继续留在观众席的必要性了。请返回剧目中，在翁法罗斯与鄙人再会吧。
As negotiations have broken down, there's no more need for us to remain in the audience's seat. Let's return to the theater called Amphoreus, where you will meet me once again.
当然，这场会晤并非全无价值。您的到访为「神话之外」留下了一行新的注释。
Of course, this meeting was not without merit. Your presence has inscribed a new footnote in the Exomyth.
至于它的意义——待到你我重逢之时，再由我为您细细揭示吧。
As for its purpose, allow me to reveal it to you in detail the next time we meet.
「别了，阁下。愿我们…在新世界再会。」
"Farewell, then. May we... reunite in the new world."
「众人将与一人离别，惟其人将觐见奇迹……」
"All shall bid farewell to one, and that person alone will witness the miracle..."
「黎明机器的光芒永不熄灭…刻法勒的庇佑没有尽头！」
"The light of the Dawn Device never fades... Kephale's protection has no end!"
「渡河之后，将是人世间的悲剧；但不渡河，则是自身的沦亡。」
"After I cross this river, it will be a tragedy for mankind. But if I do not cross, then it will be the end of me."
第<unbreak>33550337</unbreak>次永劫回归 光历<unbreak>3960</unbreak>年
「一百年前，战火点燃了奥赫玛。」
"One hundred years ago, the flames of war consumed Okhema."
「异邦联军踏破了黎明。贪婪裹挟着金血，敌人与刻法勒的长眠一同袭来，将圣城的墙垣染成鲜红。」
"The outland forces broke through the dawn. Golden blood flowed with greed, and enemies descended with Kephale's eternal slumber, painting the holy city's walls in scarlet."
「将军不知所踪，元老跪地匍匐。人们祈求全世之座的庇护，可它缄默无言……」
"Its generals had vanished, and the Elders prostrated on the ground. The Throne of Worlds kept silent to the pleas of the people..."
「直至天崩地裂，众人的乞求终于得到回应。但那并非神明，而是一支分血海而出的军团。」
"Until the heaven and earth cracked open... not the gods answering the people's prayers, but a legion rising from the sea of blood."
「云崖大殿在硫磺雨中坍塌，军团的统帅立于破碎的神像之上，向众生宣告——」
"Dawncloud's spires fell in the sulfur rains, and the Legion's commander stood atop the broken idols and roared..."
同胞们哪！勿要再跪拜残暴的恶敌，勿要再跪拜已死与将死的神明！
Compatriots, no more kneeling! Not to brutal tyrants, and not to dead or dying gods!
那些逆贼曲解神谕，燃起战火，为的是锻造你们的怯懦！
Those rebels have twisted the prophecy and ignited the flames of war in order to stoke fear in your hearts!
「她也是一名黄金裔。金色的神血淌入大地，熄灭了她足下的战火。」
"A Chrysos Heir she stood. Divine blood soaked into the earth, quelling the flames beneath her feet."
他们的金血书写了悲惨的命运——但，我的金血会将这命运逆转！
Their golden blood wrote of a tragic fate. Mine shall overturn it!
「她的冠冕燃起辉光，比燃烧整座城邦的火更夺目。她高举权杖，人们朝她所指的方向望去——」
"Her crown burned bright, outshining the fires consuming the entire city. She raised her scepter high, and the people gazed in the direction she pointed..."
我已将金血分给你们。现在，英勇的同胞，跟随我，成为命运的主人！
My blood flows in you now! Heroic compatriots, follow me, and we'll seize the reins of fate!
去把敌人赶出刻法勒洒下的黎明，去用他们的尸身扑灭他们亲手扬起的火焰！去赢得光荣，赢得和平，让后人永远铭记你们伟大的壮举！——
Drive the enemy from Kephale's dawn! Smother their flames with their own dead! Win glory! Win peace! Let history sing your deeds!
「那紧随其后，率先起舞的，是一名身姿如游鱼的少女，穿梭于无边血海。」
"The first to dance was a maiden following closely behind, weaving through carnage like a fish in the sea."
「愤怒的人民随她汇成巨浪，汹涌澎湃。千万敌军如死水枯涸，灰灭无余。」
"The people full of wrath surged with her, forming a colossal wave, and the enemy hordes, drained of life, vanished into nothing."
去吧！去云石天宫，去黎明云崖！去向所有的恶徒和懦夫，和这泥古不化的时代宣告——
Onward! To Marmoreal Palace! To Dawncloud's heights! Announce to all the wicked and cowardly, announce to this stagnant age...
「在史书中，这场战役被称作『第一次奥赫玛围城战』。据说，战争过后，人们在城中发现，被火烧过的每一处都显现出了同样的铭文。」
"History remembers this as the 'First Siege of Okhema'. It is said that after the flames died, people found identical inscriptions in every place in the city that had been scorched by fire."
「那是一个名字。它属于奥赫玛最初，亦是最后的僭主：『凯撒』刻律德菈。」
"It was the name borne by Okhema's first and final sovereign: the 'Imperator' Cerydra."
…真是的。明明是你说要复习一遍历史的，怎么自己睡着了呢？
...Honestly. You were the one who insisted on reviewing history, yet here you are, dozing off?
快醒醒呀，要是再不起来，人家只能……
Wake up! Otherwise, I'll have to...
…醒了呀，那就不对你使用唤醒的魔法了。
...Awake at last? I guess I won't have to use my "wake up" magic on you then.
Memories are the prelude to dreams...
在说什么，你的思绪怎么也回到过去啦？
What are you murmuring? Still lost in the past?
我们到目的地啦。熟悉的地点，命运三相殿。如果不出意外，现在应该是塔兰顿陨落后不久……
We've arrived. A familiar place... the Temple of the Three Fates. If everything went according to plan, it should be shortly after Talanton's fall...
同时，也是第一次逐火之旅的尾声。
And also the end of the first Flame-Chase Journey.
嗯。第一次逐火以「律法」的试炼作结，我们要在火种被归还前找到半神，取得对方的信任。
Indeed. The first Flame-Chase ended with the trial of Law. We must find the demigod and gain her trust before the Coreflame is restored.
别担心，时间刚刚好。第一次逐火以「律法」的试炼作结，我们要在火种被归还前找到半神，取得对方的信任。
Perfect timing, actually. The first Flame-Chase ended with the trial of Law. We must find the demigod and gain her trust before the Coreflame is restored.
任务有些艰巨呢，得加快脚步啦。先想办法到奥赫玛去吧。那里人来人往，方便打听消息……
It'll be tricky, so let's pick up our pace. To Okhema first. We can learn more from the crowds there...
暴君！带着你的刽子手滚出去，这里不欢迎你们！
Tyrant! You and your butchers are not welcome here! Get out!
Careful. Sounds like someone's in there.
住口！你勾结悬锋，意图谋反，其罪当诛——
Hold your tongue! Conspiring with Kremnos and plotting rebellion are crimes punishable by death...
还不止一个人呢。气氛也很紧张，要是被卷入其中就麻烦了……
There are multiple voices, and things seem tense. Let's not get caught up in any trouble...
{NICKNAME}，我们先找个隐蔽的角落，躲起来观察下状况吧？
{NICKNAME}, why don't we find a place to hide and observe from the shadows?
你们这些流着金血的恶徒，曲解神谕，妄图弑神……
Golden-blooded defilers! Perverting the prophecy and trying to slay gods!
<color=#dbc291ff>什么天外的群星，创造泰坦的神明…看看这世道，被你们的暴行糟蹋成了什么样子！</color>
<color=#dbc291ff>Stars beyond the sky? Gods who created the Titans? What kind of nonsense! Look at this broken world, and see what your atrocious acts have done!</color>
什么？他…是不是提到了<color=#dbc291ff>天外的群星</color>？
What? Did he... just mention <color=#dbc291ff>the stars beyond the sky</color>?
断锋爵，我们来是为了迎见<color=#dbc291ff>「天外的救世主」</color>，别做多余的事。
Dux Fragoris! We're here to welcome the <color=#dbc291ff>Deliverer from beyond the sky</color>. Stand down.
疯了，真是疯了！除了伟大的塔兰顿，还有谁能拯救世人于水火之中——
Heretic! No one but the great Talanton can deliver this world from misery.
——倘若旧律完美无缺，又怎会被我轻易踏碎？
If the old laws were so perfect, why did they crumble beneath my feet?
塔兰顿已死。现在，我即是「律法」——
Talanton is long gone. Now, I am the Law...
挑战我，或服从我的判决。
Challenge me, or submit to my judgment.
断锋爵，将这人的骨灰收起来，撒到神殿和人群中去。
Dux Fragoris, take the ashes of this man and scatter them in the Temple among the crowds.
告诉人们：大祭司长利欲熏心，妄图夺回凯撒赋予众人的公民权，因而落得了凄惨的下场。
Tell them that the high priest attempted to take away the rights granted to the people by the Imperator. Thus, he met his fate.
至于这两位误入法场的「客人」……
我就知道，又是这种开局。
不错，但并非两位熟知的那位凯妮斯。
Correct, but not the Caenis you know.
此人是这个时代的「清洗者」首领。自黄金战争起，他们就以抹杀黄金裔为己任，即便如今我已扫合诸邦，这群虫豸也始终在阴影中蠢蠢欲动，妄图阻挠逐火征程……

This is the leader of the "Cleaners" in this era. Since the start of the Chrysos War, they've made it their mission to wipe out the Chrysos Heirs. Even now, even after I've united all the city-states, these vermin still lurk in the shadows, hindering the Flame-Chase Journey...
不仅如此，我还知道，其人第二十七名传承者和你们有不少过节，险些断送了第二次逐火之旅……
Moreover, I know that the <unbreak>27</unbreak>th person to inherit this role bore many grudges against you and nearly doomed the second Flame-Chase Journey...
所谓「敌人的敌人就是朋友」——为表敬意，我将此人尸首作为见面礼，献给二位。
The enemy of my enemy is my friend, so out of courtesy, I present to you this corpse as a gift.
你知道第二次逐火之旅？
You know about the second Flame-Chase Journey?
小心，我们先静观其变。她…恐怕是在给我们下马威呢。
Careful. Let's wait and see what happens. She's probably trying to scare us.
为尊卑有序，世人为我写下许多名号：止战的「燃冕者」、云崖的「独裁官」、圣城的「女皇」、逐火的「凯撒」。但鉴于两位的特殊身份，我准许你们直呼本名——

For the sake of order, I am known by many titles: "Flamecrowned" who ends wars, "Tyrant" of Dawncloud, "Empress" of the holy city, and "Imperator" of the Flame-Chase. But in light of your unique identities, I'll allow you to address me by my real name...
<color=#dbc291ff>刻律德菈</color>，谨代表我的土地和人民，向「救世主」致意。
<color=#dbc291ff>Cerydra</color>. On behalf of my people and this land, greetings, "Deliverer."
恕我僭越，您…知道{F#她}{M#他}的身份？
If I may... how do you know {M#his}{F#her} identity?
不错。诚如{RUBY_B#缇宝}质子{RUBY_E#}神谕之所见：「『救世主』将自未来天外而来」。
As the little {RUBY_B#Tribbie}hostage{RUBY_E#} prophesied: "The Deliverer shall come from the future beyond the sky."
灰发、金眸、善使锤矛，于今日降临雅努萨波利斯，不会有错。
Gray hair, golden eyes, skilled in wielding a mace. They would arrive in Janusopolis on this day. There's no mistake.
缇宝预见了我们的到来？
什么情况，这和历史完全不同…
班师回朝。派斥候向各邦代表传急讯，逐火同盟会议提前召开。
We return triumphant. Send an urgent message to all delegates: The meeting of the Flame-Chase Alliance will convene early.
至于二位——奥赫玛知道你们所求为何物。待回圣城，你我再从长计议。
As for you two, Okhema knows what you seek. We'll confer in the holy city.
想必两位有许多疑虑，但此地不宜闲谈，还请跟上我们的步伐。
Doubtless you have many questions, but save them for later. Please follow us.
这可真是…完全出乎意料的展开啊……
This is... not what I expected at all...
本该苦苦寻找的半神，竟然在等待我们的到来。而且，她不仅知道「天外」，还提到了…{RUBY_B#创造泰坦的神明}「星神」{RUBY_E#}？
The demigod we needed to find was just waiting for us. And she knows of things "beyond the sky"... even {RUBY_B#Gods who created the Titans}"Aeons"{RUBY_E#}?
怎么会这样，和过去三千万个翁法罗斯完全不同…是谁改变了历史？
How could this be so different from the previous thirty million Amphoreus cycles... Who altered history?
虽然不愿承认，但这种可能性确实存在……
人家也希望是这样。只是，现在还不能排除其他可能……
I wish. But other possibilities remain...
莫非是我们搅乱了世界线…
Maybe we messed up the timeline...
这种事应该不会发生。我想，多半是有第三者插足，扰乱了局势……
Unlikely. I think it's probably a third party interfering...
岁月的流向变得好奇怪。无论是谁带来的影响，那位凯撒都是有备而来，反倒是我们陷入被动了呢……
The currents of time have become twisted. Regardless of who caused this, that "Imperator" came prepared. We're the ones at a disadvantage now...
…{NICKNAME}，现在不妨将计就计，先跟着他们回圣城吧。
...{NICKNAME}, we might as well dance their dance. Let's go with them to the holy city.
因为你的特殊性，我们成了凯撒的贵宾，这是好事，奥赫玛人肯定会对你尊敬有加。只要好好运用这层身份，再加入一点你的经验和人格魅力……

We've received the Imperator's favor because of your unique background. As a result, the people of Okhema will certainly respect you more. Just put that to good use, and add a bit of your experience and charm...
不会比上一次更难，对吧？弄清楚这个轮回发生了什么，我们一定能反客为主，取回主导权。
Should be easier than last time, right? If we figure out what happened in this cycle, we'll be able to turn things back in our favor.
圣城也有许多逐火的同伴。
And old Flame-Chase companions await in the holy city.
对。缇宝、阿格莱雅…算算时间，这会儿说不定还有小赛飞儿呢。
Exactly. Tribbie, Aglaea... maybe even little Cipher.
Trailblaze: The Sequel — we always find a way.
就是这样，进退有度，从容自信。这才是人家熟悉的{NICKNAME}。
Calm and confident. That's the {NICKNAME} I'm familiar with.
Can't do without your charm either.
原来关键在我吗？既然{NICKNAME}都这么说了…那人家必须全力以赴啦。
So I'm the key? Since you insist, {NICKNAME}... I'll give it my all!
Trailblaze: The Sequel — we always find a way.
就是这样，进退有度，从容自信。这才是人家熟悉的{NICKNAME}。
Calm and confident. That's the {NICKNAME} I'm familiar with.
The journey to save the world starts with a single step...
看，人家没说错吧。这么大的阵仗，都是为了欢迎你呢。
Told you. You're the headline act. All this spectacle is for you.
有劳诸位镇守圣城。近况如何？
Guards, your service to the holy city is appreciated. How have things been?
报：悬锋城再度向边境发起进攻，「冬霖爵」已率军将敌寇击退。
Castrum Kremnos once again struck the border. Dux Brumalis led her troops to repel the enemy.
城内反对逐火的暴民仍在活跃。他们先前在云石市集闹事，砸毁周边店铺。戍卫队现已羁押主犯，留待问讯。
The agitators against the Flame-Chase are still active in the city. They smashed the shops around Marmoreal Market, but the Garrison already arrested the culprits, and now they await interrogation.
乌合之众而已，不必理会。就算{RUBY_B#「大地」的半神}荒笛{RUBY_E#}已亲身弥合了分裂的大地，他们也能找到千百种借口寻衅。
They are merely a disorderly mob and do not warrant any attention. Even though {RUBY_B#demigod of Earth}Terravox{RUBY_E#} personally mended the fractured earth, it still didn't silence these fools.
两位天外的贵客，无需在意这些琐事，先随剑旗爵前去安顿吧。
Guests from beyond the sky, worry not about these trivial matters. Dux Gladiorum will take you somewhere to settle down for now.
为两位献上迟来的自我介绍：我名为海瑟音，是宣誓效忠凯撒的「剑旗爵」，奥赫玛盟军的骑士统领。
Please allow me to belatedly introduce myself. My name is Hysilens, and I am the Dux Gladiorum who swears fealty to the Imperator, as well as the Knight Commander of the Okheman Alliance.
晚些时候，凯撒将邀请两位出席同盟会议，与各邦代表共谋逐火征程。正是阁下的到来令我们确信，神谕许诺的未来确凿无疑。在凯撒的统领下……

Later on, the Imperator will invite you to attend the meeting of delegates to discuss the Flame-Chase Journey. Your arrival has convinced us that the future promised by the prophecy is certain. Under the Imperator's command...
<color=#dbc291ff>翁法罗斯必将挣脱束缚，走向天外之界。</color>
<color=#dbc291ff>Amphoreus shall break its chains and reach the world beyond the sky.</color>
恕我冒昧，但各位对我们，还有「天外」…了解到什么程度呢？
With all due respect... what exactly do you know about us and what's "beyond the sky"?
身为人臣，我不便自作主张，随意表态。还望两位谅解。
As a humble subject, I cannot freely express my own views to you. Please forgive me.
I knew it wouldn't be that easy...
时不我待。两位还是请先随我来，在会议前稍作歇息吧。
Time waits for no one. Please come with me and rest now before the meeting later.
凯撒治下的奥赫玛…完全走出了战火的阴影呢。
Okhema under the Imperator's rule... is no longer in the shadow of war.
正是。黎明云崖是众英雄的行宫，为使各位免于战事辛劳，凯撒为这座宫殿花了许多心思……
Indeed. Dawncloud stands as the heroes' residence. The Imperator put much thought into its design, in order for it to serve as a sanctuary from the burdens of battle...
…至于个中细节，就请两位亲身体会吧。待凯撒驾临，我便会前来传唤各位。
...Please experience its marvels firsthand, heroes. When the Imperator arrives, I shall come to summon you.
海瑟音小姐…真不愧是骑士统领。
Hysilens... No wonder she's the Knights' Commander.
Her lips are sealed tighter than armor.
刻律德菈一定是这么想的…但对我们来说，就不太方便啦。
I'm sure that's what Cerydra thinks, but it's inconvenient for us.
没关系，终于等到自由行动环节了。距离同盟会议还有段时间，我们可要开始行动咯？看那边……
Alright, we finally have some freedom to ourselves. Since there's still some time before the alliance meeting, let's explore a bit. Look over there...
虽然不是你熟知的她们……
Not the ones you're familiar with...
虽然不是我熟知的她们…
Not the ladies I'm familiar with...
但要相信，每一个轮回的英雄们，都始终如一，从未变过呀。
But the hearts of heroes stay the same in every cycle, never changing.
阿雅，你今天也没什么精神……
Agy, you're still so listless today...
Did you have trouble sleeping again?
*我们*知道。泰坦为你送来了神谕…如果你希望，随时可以和*我们*聊聊，就像小时候那样。
We know. The Titans' prophecy haunts you... If you want, you can talk to us, just like when you were young.
无论发生什么，*我们*都不会离开你。
No matter what, we'll always remain by your side.
我知道，也明白命运从来颠扑不破。所以，我忧心的不是未来……
I know. I also understand that fate cannot be changed. It is not the future that I worry about...
昨夜彻夜未眠，只是在为难民们编织衣衫和浴巾罢了。黄金战争出于不义，粉碎了他们的尊严，但人们有权维持生活至细微处的体面。
I spent all last night weaving clothes and linen for the refugees. The Chrysos War is born of injustice and has shattered their dignity. They deserve at least some basic decency.
如果有一天，翁法罗斯连这些都能抛弃…那，无论是普通人、黄金裔，还是泰坦诸神，恐怕都与野兽无异了吧。
If Amphoreus one day abandons this... then all of us, commoners, Chrysos Heirs, Titans, become no better than beasts.
哦？有客人来了。二位好，我是阿格莱雅，爵名「金织」。
Oh? We have guests. Welcome. I am Aglaea, the Goldweaver.
…这身行头可配不上「救世主」的名号。呵，看来得尽快为你们准备一身礼服了。
...These rags on you are not worthy of the title of "Deliverer." I must prepare some proper attire for you.
怎么了？你的眼神似乎有些陌生。
What is the matter? Your gaze seems somewhat unsure.
Hello. Nice to meet you for the first time.
是吗？你的眼神似乎不是这么说的。
First time? That's not what I gather from your eyes.
难道你认识的「阿格莱雅」，同我相比十分不同吗？
Does your "Aglaea" differ so much from me?
你好，天外的救世主。*我们*是雅努萨波利斯的缇宝，很高兴认识你们……
Greetings, Deliverer from beyond the sky. We are Tribbie of Janusopolis. It's very nice to meet you...
话虽如此，应该不用多做自我介绍啦。*我们*知道，你见证过逐火之旅的「未来」——远比我们眼中的预言更加清晰。
Although introductions are probably unnecessary. We know you've witnessed the future of the Flame-Chase Journey, even more clearly than we have.
见证过逐火的未来？这…也是神谕的内容吗？
Witnessed the future of the Flame-Chase Journey? The prophecy also told you about that?
是呀，<color=#dbc291ff>欧洛尼斯</color>凭借这一道神谕彻底改变了翁法罗斯。不过，其中关于「救世主」的部分，除了你的外貌和降临时间，就没有更多细节了。
Indeed! <color=#dbc291ff>Oronyx</color> reshaped Amphoreus through the prophecy. Although, regarding the Deliverer... there were not many details beyond your appearance and the time of your arrival.
所以，千万不要有负担，请放松放松再放松。
So, please don't worry. Feel free to relax and relax some more.
正是欧洛尼斯告诉人类，「天外的救世主」会降临在翁法罗斯。
It was Oronyx who told mankind that the Deliverer from beyond the sky would descend upon Amphoreus.
刻法勒也降下过神谕。但只有欧洛尼斯告诉过人类，「天外的救世主」会降临在翁法罗斯。
Kephale issued prophecies too, but it was Oronyx who told mankind that the Deliverer from beyond the sky would descend upon Amphoreus.
不仅如此，它还揭示了与「再创世」截然不同的未来。
More crucially, they revealed a future entirely different from the Era Nova.
虽然都需要挑战诸神，但在「岁月」的神谕中，我们不会步入新世界，而是前往<color=#dbc291ff>真正的星空</color>……
Though we still must challenge the gods... in the Time Titan's prophecy, this path leads not to a new world but to the <color=#dbc291ff>true starry skies</color>...
这也是凯撒大人的毕生所求。你们的到来，更是印证了这一点呀。
This is also what the Great Imperator has been striving for all her life. Your arrival further confirms everything.
连你们都觉得意外吗？命运…真是捉摸不透呀。
Even you find this surprising? Fate... really is unpredictable.
或许在接下来的同盟会议上，还会有更多不可思议的事发生吧。
Perhaps the upcoming meeting will hold even more surprises.
天外之人已至，命运逐一应验。想来，「浪漫」的试炼也近在眼前了……
The one from beyond the sky has arrived, and destiny continues to be fulfilled. The Trial of Romance is also close at hand...
不要难过…让*我们*唱首童谣吧！阿雅乖乖，把心门开开……
Please don't worry... We'll sing you a lullaby! Little Agy be a good girl and open your heart...
...I outgrew nursery rhymes long ago, Teacher.
救世的英雄…要怎么和他们说话，他们会不会很咄、咄咄逼人？
How are we supposed to talk to the heroes of Deliverance... What if they're really... intimidating?
维吉妮娅，没什么好怕的，你只要把吟诗的气场拿出来——啊，两位英雄已经来了？
Verginia, don't be so nervous. Once they hear your poetry... Ah! Heroes, you're already here?
幸会，我是「曳石爵」阿波罗尼，是神悟树庭的五贤人之一，逐火军的参谋。
Greetings. I am Apollonius, the Dux Helkolithist, one of the Five Sages of the Grove of Epiphany, advisor to the Flame-Chase Army.
这位是来自悬锋城的「吟风爵」维吉妮娅，凯撒大人的御用史官。
This is Verginia of Castrum Kremnos, the Dux Carminum and imperial scribe of the Great Imperator.
你、你们好，我叫维吉妮娅，我会吟风…啊不，吟、吟诗。
H—Hello! I'm Verginia... I compost... I mean, compose! I compose poetry.
我是哀丽秘榭的昔涟，这位是救世主{NICKNAME}。很高兴认识二位。
I'm Cyrene from Aedes Elysiae. This is the Deliverer, {NICKNAME}. Nice to meet you both.
{M#他们}{F#她们}好像确实没有流言中的那么…可怕。
They're not as frightening as the rumors claimed.
这是我们第一次踏上凯撒治下的土地。好惊人，奥赫玛比想象中还要宏伟好多…要是没有各位一路关照，我们恐怕早就晕头转向啦。
This is our first time in the Imperator's realm. Okhema is even more magnificent than we imagined... If you all weren't here to look after us, we'd be completely lost and confused.
呵呵，诸位想象中的奥赫玛已经是过去式了。在凯撒的治理下，这座城邦已经迎来新生，成为名副其实的「世界之都」。
Hehe, the Okhema you imagined is long gone. Under the Imperator, this city has been reborn as the "Capital of the World."
好好享受她自由的风吧，两位。任何人…只要为凯撒尽到应尽的义务，这风便会永远为他驻足。
Bask in her free-spirited winds. For anyone who fulfills their duties to the Imperator, these winds shall forever remain at their service.
忠诚之人从来不思考背叛的下场。但如果诸位实在好奇，不妨去湖边看看吧——
Those who are loyal do not need to consider the consequences of betrayal. But if you're curious, why not head to the lake and take a look?
那些沉尸水底的元老，就是忤逆凯撒者最好的表率。
Those Elders who lie at the bottom of the lake are the best example of what happens when you disobey the Imperator.
但别担心，凯撒很看重你们。假以时日，定会让维吉妮娅也给二位写几首赞美诗呢！
Fear not, the Imperator favors you. Verginia will write songs in your honor!
阿波罗尼总是这样，说话一点都不诗意……
…「冬霖爵」，凯撒大人刚刚找出了主谋，将他当众处刑——看到那混账被烧得连渣都不剩，估计这群刁民也不敢再放肆了。
...Dux Brumalis, our Great Imperator found the mastermind and executed him in public. Seeing that scoundrel burned to nothing should deter these miscreants from being so brazen again.
哼，凯撒大人也不怕脏了自己的手…可笑的排场。
Tch, so the Great Imperator isn't afraid of getting her hands dirty... What a ridiculous display.
你懂什么？子民犯下再大的罪孽，也是凯撒的子民，当然需由凯撒亲手审判——
What do you know? No matter what sins the people commit, they are still the Imperator's people, and it's only right that they be judged by the Imperator's own hand.
我叫拉比努斯，你这贵客！
这位「冬霖爵」好像没那么向着凯撒，又身居高位。旁边的「断锋爵」…语言系统也有些特别……
This "Dux Brumalis" doesn't seem to like the Imperator very much, but she holds a high rank. As for this "Dux Fragoris," his way of speaking seems rather unusual too.
Let me see what I can get out of them...
我是哀丽秘榭的昔涟，这位是{NICKNAME}！我们初来乍到，人生地不熟，想向您请教一件事……
I'm Cyrene of Aedes Elysiae. This is {NICKNAME}. We're new here and wanted to ask you...
这城中是否还有像{M#他}{F#她}一样，来自天外的客人？那是我们的挚友，此行前来……
Does this city host any other visitors from beyond the sky? We're looking for our dear companions...
哼，拙劣的谎言就不必再续了。但这城中确实有人对天外了如指掌……
Hmph, drop the charade. But yes, there is someone in this city who is all too familiar with the world beyond the sky...
住口！你疯了？凯撒有令，那位大人的行踪务必严格保密！
Silence! The Imperator ordered us to keep that Lord's whereabouts a secret!
得了吧，哈巴狗！你就连要用狗嘴吠出什么声调，都得请示那该死的凯撒吗？
Enough, you pathetic lapdog! Do you need to beg for permission from that cursed Imperator even just to bark?
对天外了如指掌，还被称作「那位大人」，难道是…？
Someone who is all too familiar with the world beyond the sky and is referred to as "that Lord"... Could it be...?
我来斫断你这无礼之徒的冰碴子！
Insolent brat, I'll shatter that ice of yours!
我来冻上你这愚忠之人的脑瓜子！
Groveling fool, I'll freeze that brain of yours!
天外之海的鱼儿们，在湖中歇息得如何？
Little fish from beyond the sky, did you rest well?
凯撒与城邦代表们即将入场，若准备妥帖，便随我一同游去议会吧。
The Imperator and the delegates are about to arrive. If you are ready, please follow me to the meeting.
天外之海的鱼儿们，在湖中歇息得如何？
Little fish from beyond the sky, did you rest well?
距离会议开始还有些时间，与其去听城邦代表们的嘁嚓细语，不如先认识下未来的战友吧。
There is still some time before the meeting begins. Rather than listening to the whispers of the delegates, why don't you get to know your future comrades first?
那就来吧，凯撒已为你们留好了席位。
Then come. The Imperator reserved seats for you.
同盟会议…感觉有些紧张起来了呢。
I'm starting to feel a bit nervous about the meeting.
既然是刻律德菈主持的会议，想必是个了解「律法」动向和当今时代的好机会…我们可都要竖起耳朵，好好听哦？
Since Cerydra is presiding over the meeting, it'll be a good opportunity to learn about the Law's inclinations and the current era. Let's keep our ears open, okay?
我是奥赫玛的骑士统领，逐火军的大将，也是凯撒的近侍——
I'm the Knight Commander of Okhema, General of the Flame-Chase Army, and the Imperator's servant...
除却这些刻着繁复名号的鳞片，我只是凯撒身侧的一尾游鱼，一柄剑旗。
But beneath these shiny scales engraved with complicated titles? I am just a swordfish at the Imperator's side.
如你所见，她是奥赫玛的女皇，黄金战争的终结者，黄金裔的领袖。
As you've witnessed, she is the empress of Okhema, the one who ended the Chrysos War, and the leader of the Chrysos Heirs.
其余更多，我身为臣子不便妄议。
As merely a humble subject, I cannot say more beyond this.
在这里的黄金裔，皆是逐火军中的佼佼者——
The Chrysos Heirs here constitute the elite among the Flame-Chase Army...
「曳石爵」阿波罗尼与「吟风爵」维吉妮娅，他们是逐火军的参谋与史官，一人为凯撒出谋献计，一人将她的无上功绩书作诗篇。

"Dux Helkolithist" Apollonius and "Dux Carminum" Verginia serve as the army's advisor and historian, respectfully. One offers advice and counsel to the Imperator while the other writes verses of her supreme glory.
「断锋爵」拉比努斯与「冬霖爵」塞涅卡，他们是逐火军中强大的战士，用剑刃与风暴扫清逐火的前路。
"Dux Fragoris" Labienus and "Dux Brumalis" Seneca are both formidable warriors, clearing the way for the Flame-Chase with steel and storm.
「命运爵」，知晓神谕的圣女，现在城中只有名为缇宝的这一位。为统合天下神谕，凯撒曾将她们掳作质子…不过，她们如今是奥赫玛重要的先知。

Dux Fatorum, the Holy Maiden who interprets the prophecy... Only the one named Tribbie remains in the city. The Imperator once took them as hostages in order to unify the prophecies of the world... But they are now Okhema's most vital prophets.
「金织爵」阿格莱雅…呵，她不喜欢被人背后议论，你还是亲自去认识她吧。
"Dux Goldweaver" Aglaea... Well, she dislikes it when people talk about her behind her back. You should get to know her in person.
抱歉啦，让我们再逛逛这个美丽的地方吧～
Apologies. We want to explore this beautiful place some more~
好吧，请别让凯撒等太久。
Very well, just don't keep the Imperator waiting.
既然还有时间，就让我们再认识一下这里的朋友吧～
Since there's still some time, let's get to know our new friends here~
帕福斯的兄弟，你说这凯撒提前召开会议，又要干什么？我的家乡可经不起折腾了……
Good sir from Paphas, what do you think the Imperator is planning, calling this meeting so early? My homeland can't endure anymore...
谁知道呢。先说要狩猎泰坦，又说有什么更大的灾厄…我看她的疯病才是最大的灾厄。
Who knows? First she wants to hunt Titans, now she says there are even greater calamities... Her madness is the greatest calamity.
哼，可不是吗！又是黄金裔，又是「救世主」…我们这些凡人在她眼里到底算什么？
Exactly! Chrysos Heirs, "Deliverers"... What about us ordinary folk? How much are we worth in her eyes?
记得史书上说，凯撒当年是靠着三门火炮，瞄准黎明云崖，让所有城邦代表乖乖听话的。不知在这个轮回，历史会不会重演呢？
The history books said that the Imperator aimed three cannons at Dawncloud to make all the delegates obey her. Will history repeat itself in this cycle?
凯撒确实做过类似的事，而且不止一次。不过，至于历史是否会重演…二位稍后便会明白了。
Yes, similar acts have occurred, and not just once. However, whether history will repeat itself... you'll soon see.
那是留给二位的特等席，敬请落座。
Those are the two spots reserved for you. Please take your seats.
诸君，请肃静。凯撒已驾临她忠诚的议会，同盟会议即将开始。
Ladies and gentlemen, silence please. The Imperator has arrived before her faithful council, and the alliance meeting is about to begin.
全体起立！以{RUBY_B#律法之泰坦}塔兰顿{RUBY_E#}与{RUBY_B#负世之泰坦}刻法勒{RUBY_E#}之名，奥赫玛同盟向诸神宣誓——
All rise! In the names of {RUBY_B#Law Titan}Talanton{RUBY_E#} and {RUBY_B#Worldbearing Titan}Kephale{RUBY_E#}, the Okhema Alliance swears upon the gods...
不必多此一举了。凯撒不向败者祈祷。
Cease the pageantry. I pray not to the vanquished.
刻法勒自不必多说。两日前的{RUBY_B#黎明}门扉时{RUBY_E#}，斥候本应准时抵达奥赫玛，为诸位带来「律法」已被征服的捷报……
Kephale, of course, needs no further explanation. As for the subjugation of the "Law," at the {RUBY_B#dawn}Entry Hour{RUBY_E#} two days past, a scout should've brought the news to all of you...
但令人遗憾的是，戍卫在城外不远处的乱石堆中发现了他的遗体。
Unfortunately, guards found his corpse among the rocks not far from the city.
不仅如此，还有一柄帕福斯弯刀给那可怜人做了陪葬。我实在难以想象，这位忠诚的战士临死前受了多少折磨……
Moreover, the poor soul was buried with a Paphas curved blade. It pains me to imagine what agonies this loyal warrior endured before his death...
帕福斯代表，你对此有何高见？
Delegate from Paphas, do you have any insights?
什、什么？我从未得知此事……
铁证如山，不必白费口舌了。不过，这场审判先按下不表——
The evidence is irrefutable, so there is no need to waste your breath. However, let us set this trial aside for the time being...
诸君已经看到了：在这世上最神圣、最庄严的议院中，就在我们之间，竟有人想要将屠刀挥向对方，公然挑衅同盟，摧毁来之不易的团结与和平……

Witness! Even within the most sacred and dignified Council, there were those among us who wished to draw their blades, brazenly challenging the alliance, seeking to shatter our hard-earned peace and unity...
不幸中的万幸，我发现了这一切。现在，为了守卫这座美丽城市和她的人民，凯撒的军团已经做好准备——
Fortunately, I uncovered this plot. Now, to protect this beautiful city and her people, the Imperator's legions are ready...
——各位将会在他们的护送下，迁往命运三相殿，并在那里接受同盟最高规格的保护。
They will escort each of you to the Temple of the Three Fates, where you will receive the highest level of protection the alliance can offer.
而后，军团的勇士将随我一道，踏上讨伐{RUBY_B#海洋之泰坦}法吉娜{RUBY_E#}的征程。
Then, the legions' warriors will join me in embarking on the campaign against {RUBY_B#Ocean Titan}Phagousa{RUBY_E#}.
This... this is clearly a trap!
凯撒！你叫我们前来，只是为了践踏盟友的尊严么！
Imperator! Did you summon us here just to trample on the dignity of your allies!?
场面变得焦灼起来了呀……
Things are starting to get pretty intense...
同胞们，你们都看清她的嘴脸了！依照奥赫玛旧律，只有经三分之二多数元老同意，军团才能执行总帅的命令……
Comrades, you've all seen her true face now! According to the ancient laws of Okhema, only with the consent of two-thirds of the Elders can the legions carry out the commander's orders...
呵，旧律！你们不早就把它毁了么？你们在奥赫玛第一次围城战时临阵倒戈，在重组元老院的决议中全部投下赞成票，还在昨天亲手用染血的刀锋亵渎了它——

Heh, the ancient laws! Didn't you destroy them long ago? You defected during the First Siege of Okhema, voted unanimously in favor of the Council of Elders' restructuring, and just yesterday, you desecrated them with a blood-stained blade...
——腐朽的旧律已随着{RUBY_B#律法之泰坦}塔兰顿{RUBY_E#}一同陨落，不再配得尊敬。但，倘若诸位还坚持标榜自己捍卫「律法」……
The decaying old laws fell with {RUBY_B#Law Titan}Talanton{RUBY_E#} and are no longer deserving of respect. But, if you still insist on proclaiming yourselves defenders of the "Law"...
那便就此噤声，向我手中这枚火种献上最高的敬意。
Then be silent, and offer up the highest respect to this Coreflame in my hand.
That really is the Coreflame of "Law" in her hand...
既然在场诸位均无异议…那么，本次会议的原定议题——「讨伐法吉娜」——也视同通过。
Since there are no objections... then the original agenda of this meeting — "the campaign against Phagousa" — is hereby passed.
逐火军对海洋泰坦的狩猎，即日开始。限同盟诸邦于长夜月内交出军权，并缴齐战税，以便筹备战事。

The Flame-Chase Army's hunt for the Ocean Titan begins today. In order to prepare for war, all allied city-states must surrender command of their militaries and pay all war taxes by the end of the Month of Evernight.
以此契机，并请各位见过我同盟新至的贵客——
At this moment, I would also like to introduce to everyone the newest honored guest to join our alliance...
「岁月」神谕中揭示的「救世主」，{NICKNAME}，已从天外降临。我等将在救世主的助力下，击碎满溢之杯——
The "Deliverer" revealed in the prophecy of "Time," {NICKNAME}, has descended from beyond the sky. With {M#his}{F#her} aid, we shall shatter the Chalice of Plenty...
令法吉娜的火种，归于圣城！
And return Phagousa's Coreflame to the holy city!
什么天外的救世主，这一切都和那弑神的神谕一样…是你用来滋养权力的谎言！
A Deliverer from beyond the sky? This is just like that prophecy about slaying gods... It's a lie you've used to grow your power!
拉冬已经牺牲了无数将士…还要我将更多同胞交由这暴君役使吗？
Ladon has already sacrificed countless soldiers... And now you want me to send even more of my brothers and sisters to be used and discarded by a tyrant?
还有哪位盟友有异议吗？
Then, I bid you all farewell... Meeting adjourned.
我还有要事与二位商议。
I still have important matters to discuss with the two of you.
方才的会议犹如闹剧，见笑了。
I apologize for that farce of a meeting.
每天要和这么多人打交道…凯撒大人真是辛苦呀。
It must be tiring, dealing with so many people every day, Great Imperator.
部署棋局、左右下注，这运筹帷幄的游戏，反倒能为此世沉重的命运平添一抹亮色，就像统治和征服本就伴随着牺牲。
Moving chess pieces, placing wagers... this game of strategy adds a dash of color to our heavy fates, much like how rule and conquest are always accompanied by sacrifice.
和泰坦的战争，也算是牺牲的一部分吗？
Is the war with the Titans also part of that sacrifice?
呵，在我窥见此世…不，天外的秘密以后，翁法罗斯的神权早已无足轻重。
Hah, after I glimpsed the secrets of this world... no, the secrets beyond the sky, the divine authority of Amphoreus no longer held any significance.
我问你，救世主：于这翁法罗斯的天幕之外，存在名为「星神」的宏伟神祇——此事为真？
Let me ask you, Deliverer: Is it true that, beyond Amphoreus's sky, there are magnificent deities called "Aeons"?
啊…「事实」二字，从未如此令人迷醉。
Ah... the word "fact" has never been so intoxicating.
祂们的权能比泰坦强大万倍。
THEIR powers are a thousand times greater than the Titans'.
Ah... that certainly captivates my interest.
Where... did you hear this from?
Ah... so THEY do indeed exist.
那么，请再告诉我：你将如何运用此种伟力，引领世人……
Then, please tell me more: How will you use this great power to guide the people...?
在你描绘的未来中，我们逐火的征程将通向何方？
In the future you envision, where will our Flame-Chase Journey lead?
翁法罗斯才能挣脱「毁灭」。
Only then can Amphoreus break free from "the Destruction."
…哦？你们当下需要的…是「律法」的力量？
...Oh? What you require now... is the power of "Law"?
正是。诚如神谕所示，{NICKNAME}是来自天外的救世主。不仅如此，{F#她}{M#他}还有可靠的盟友。
Exactly. Just as the prophecy foretold, {NICKNAME} is your Deliverer from beyond the sky. And {F#s}he also has reliable allies.
如果能让他们介入翁法罗斯的「律法」，就有机会改变未来的命运，扭转这个世界注定的结局。
If they can intervene in Amphoreus's "Laws," we may have a chance to alter this world's impending fate and reverse its destined end.
很好，救世主，你很有胆识！明知「律法」的继承者就站在你眼前，竟还敢如此放肆——
Very good, Deliverer, you have courage! To say such presumptuous things, even knowing that the inheritor of the "Law" stands before you...
换做从前，若有人胆敢觊觎凯撒神权，多半只会落得碎尸万段的下场。但如今，我们的视线已能越过这片苟延残喘的大地……
In the past, anyone who dared to covet the Imperator's divine authority would have met a gruesome end. But now, we can see beyond this dying world...
<color=#dbc291ff>我们的征程…也不应再被这顽固的天幕制约。</color>
<color=#dbc291ff>Our journey... should no longer be confined below this stubborn sky.</color>
无奈，那反复无常的海洋泰坦阻断了通往创世涡心的灵水，给我的晋升之路徒增阻碍。若「律法」火种不能归还，你们指明的救世之路亦无法实现……

Alas, that fickle Ocean Titan has obstructed the spirit water leading to the Vortex of Genesis, hindering my ascension. If the Coreflame of "Law" cannot be returned, your path to Deliverance will never be realized...
事至如今，我们也该再起停滞的征程…令拦路的浪潮退去了。
Now that things have come to this, we must resume our once-stagnant journey... and force the waves that block our way to recede.
所以…您答应与我们合作了？
So... you agree to cooperate with us?
合作？恕我直言，我从来不和任何人*合作*……
Cooperate? Forgive me, but I never "cooperate" with anyone...
但，我允许诸位以王臣的身份与我踏上征程——随我铸就最完美的「律法」。
Though, I will permit you to join me as subjects and together, we will forge the most perfect "Law."
「逐火铭牌」，逐火军的身份象征。奥赫玛每位王爵都持有此物。
The "Flame-Chase Medallion," a symbol of the Flame-Chase Army. Every noble in Okhema carries one.
见到此牌就等于见到凯撒本人，你们可以在城中随意行动。启程征伐海洋泰坦前，两位就在奥赫玛暂时休憩吧。

This medallion represents the will of the Imperator herself, and you may act freely within the city with it. Before we embark on the crusade against the Ocean Titan, you should rest in Okhema for a time.
小心一个叫来古士的人，凯撒。
Be wary of someone named Lygus, Imperator.
Thank you for your trust, Imperator.
所谓信任和忠诚，于我耳中皆为虚言。
So-called trust and loyalty are but empty words to me.
今后就用行动证明自己吧。只要不行僭越之举，我会充分尊重臣子一切选择。
From this moment on, prove yourself through your actions. As long as no boundaries are crossed, I fully respect the choices of my subjects.
愿您的征途踏尽漫天繁星，凯撒大人。
May your journey reach that sky full of stars, Great Imperator.
呵，你这位跟班着实懂得如何讨人欢喜啊。
Hah, your attendant certainly knows how to curry favor.
去吧，先沐浴一番。你们身上…咳，有一股海潮的腥味。
Go now, take a bath first. You two... ahem, reek of seawater.
现在，或许您愿意听取我的谏言了？
Now, perhaps you're willing to hear my counsel?
如欧洛尼斯说的那般，那两人来了。也正如你所说，他们展现出了对「律法」的渴求……
Those two arrived just as Oronyx described. And just as you said, they showed a thirst for "Law"...
至少，这证明我的判断没有错：<color=#dbc291ff>留你一命是正确的选择。</color>
At least, this proves that my judgment was right: <color=#dbc291ff>Sparing your life was the correct decision.</color>
呵呵，您再次证实了凯撒的英明并非空谈。
Heh, you've once again confirmed that your wisdom is no empty boast.
如今，又一个选择摆在您的面前：该与何人协作，让「律法」的天秤偏向哪方——<color=#dbc291ff>我，抑或那位「救世主」？</color>
Now, another choice lies before you: With whom shall you ally to tip the scales of "Law": <color=#dbc291ff>me, or that "Deliverer"?</color>
再提醒我一次吧，安提基色拉人——在你的视野里，这两条路分别通向何种未来？
Remind me again, Antikytheran, what kind of future do these two paths lead to, in your view?
您有权明白，那位来自天外的「救世主」并非十恶不赦之人。不过从一开始，{M#他}{F#她}的立场就与翁法罗斯全然不一。
You are entitled to know that the "Deliverer" from beyond the sky is not a wholly wicked being. But from the very start, {M#his}{F#her} stance has been completely at odds with Amphoreus.
{M#他们}{F#她们}选择的道路将掩埋翁法罗斯的宏愿：这座行于「毁灭」命途的世界，必会远离它本应享有的荣光……
The road they have chosen will bury Amphoreus's grand aspirations: This world which follows the Path of "Destruction" will inevitably stray far from the glory it was meant to enjoy...
而在我为您揭示的道路上：翁法罗斯的众生将以凯撒之名弑杀造物尊神，征服天外万界。
But on the path I have revealed to you, the people of Amphoreus will slay their Creator in the name of the Imperator and conquer the worlds beyond the sky.
<color=#dbc291ff>您将驱使名为「铁墓」的巨兽，为宇宙带去伟大的战潮与征服——寰宇众生都将拜于座前，对您俯首称臣。</color>

<color=#dbc291ff>You will command the mighty beast known as "Irontomb," bringing waves of war and conquest to the universe. Beings across the cosmos will bow before you, offering their allegiance.</color>
代价微不足道。只需将那脆弱、残缺的人性于「毁灭」中献祭——
The price is insignificant. All that is needed is for you to sacrifice that fragile, incomplete humanity to the Destruction...
身为神谕中的黄金裔…您早已决定将它舍弃了，不是么？
As a Chrysos Heir of the prophecy... you have already chosen to abandon it, have you not?
退下吧，神礼观众。我心中已有定数。
Off you go, Theoros. I have already made my decision.
待我点亮「律法」的火种，焚尽旧日陈腐的规则……
Once I ignite the Coreflame of "Law" and burn away the old, outdated rules...
<color=#dbc291ff>届时，翁法罗斯必能踏上遍布群星的征程。</color>
<color=#dbc291ff>Amphoreus will embark on a journey across the stars.</color>
那位凯撒，真是咄咄逼人…完全不给我们提问的机会。
The Imperator is quite... forceful... She didn't give us any chance to ask questions.
而且，她显然有所隐瞒呢。{NICKNAME}，你怎么看？
And she's clearly hiding something. {NICKNAME}, what do you think?
至少她允许我们自由行动…
At least she allows us to move around freely...
眼下疑点重重，这算是为数不多的幸运。只是……
There are many uncertainties right now, but this is one of the few blessings. Still...
她蛮横的作风…让人难以接受。
Her bossy way of doing things... is hard to stomach.
是啊。城邦代表们也颇有微词。还好她允许我们自由行动，这算是为数不多的幸运。只是……
Yeah. Even the city-state delegates have complaints. Thankfully, she allows us to move around freely, which is a small blessing. Still...
该和天才们商议下现状了。
We should consult with the geniuses about the current situation.
Looks like we're on the same wavelength.
奥赫玛的气氛…好陌生。不光逐火同盟，全城上下都在议论「天外世界」……
The atmosphere in Okhema... is so unfamiliar. It's not just the Flame-Chase Alliance talking about the "world beyond the sky" but the whole city...
我们也该和天外的朋友讨论下目前的收获了。接下来…嗯？
We should also discuss our findings with our friends from beyond the sky. Then... Huh?
接下来，就该去享受圣城声名远扬的沐浴文化，好好放松一下啦！这一路上，人家最期待的就是这个了！
Then, we should go enjoy the renowned bathing culture of the holy city and relax! It's the thing I've been looking forward to most on this journey!
Is this really the best time for a bath...
劳逸结合可是很重要的。你看，大家都是这么想的，对吧？
Work and rest are both important. You see, everyone agrees, right?
真是一刻都不能放下戒备呀。借着泡澡的名义，我们去找个合适的小角落，把目前的进展告诉黑塔和螺丝咕姆阁下。
Can't let our guard down for a second. Let's use taking a bath as an excuse to find a quiet corner to update Madam Herta and Screwllum on our progress.
顺便还可以再探探城中虚实——会议结果刚传开，人们一定议论纷纷……
We can also check out what's happening in the city. Since the outcome of the meeting was just announced, people must be gossiping...
这就叫一石三鸟，出发吧。
We can kill three birds with one stone. Let's go.
听说了吗？同盟会议上，拉冬代表愤然离席……
Did you hear? At the Alliance Meeting, the delegate from Ladon stormed out in anger...
正常。凯撒一手遮天，哪次不是闹得鸡飞狗跳？
As expected. The Imperator is always hiding things from everyone. When has it not caused a ruckus?
要不是凯撒大人，你们早该跟着那帮元老蛀虫一起沉进湖里吃泥了，还能有命在这儿乱嚼舌根？
If it weren't for the Great Imperator, you'd have sunk into the lake with those corrupt Elders already, and you wouldn't even be alive to speak like this!
Oh no, it's the Imperator's loyal dog...
走、走！千万别当着这家伙的面……
Let's go! We can't talk in front of this guy...
哦？两位贵客，又见面了。看来散会后想来浴场散心的，不止我一个啊。
Oh? Honored guests, we meet again. Looks like I'm not the only one who came to the baths to unwind after the meeting.
为了接下来的征伐，请务必好好休息。鄙人「断锋爵」，凯撒大人的得力干将，愿与「救世主」一同冲锋陷阵。
For the upcoming campaign, please make sure to rest well. I am "Dux Fragoris," a trusted officer of the Great Imperator, willing to fight alongside the "Deliverer" in the coming battles.
哦？我记得你们，是擅闯法场…不，神谕中的贵客！
Oh? I remember you. The trespassers... No, the distinguished guests of the prophecy!
还没来得及向二位正式作个自我介绍：鄙人「断锋爵」拉比努斯，凯撒大人的得力干将。愿在下一场征伐中，与「救世主」一同冲锋陷阵。

I didn't get the chance to properly introduce myself: I am Labienus, the "Dux Fragoris," a trusted officer of the Great Imperator. I look forward to fighting alongside the "Deliverer" in the upcoming battles.
又要打仗了吗…凯撒入主奥赫玛后，我们就没个安稳日子过。
Another war? Ever since the Imperator took control of Okhema, we haven't had a day of peace.
气氛有些紧张呢。城里满是流言，您一定很困扰吧？
The atmosphere is a bit tense. With rumors flying around the city, you must be troubled.
见笑了。每次同盟会议结束后，城中难免有些虫豸坐不住。
My apologies. After every Alliance Meeting, there are always some pests in the city who get restless.
我只求眼不见心不烦。地生的虫豸到底碍不得天空分毫，只敢在荫蔽处抱怨烈日刺眼。
I prefer to ignore them. Pests on the ground don't affect the sky in the slightest. They just complain from the shadows that the sun's light is too harsh.
况且，神礼官已对凯撒许诺了命运，这些跳梁小丑迟早会认识到自己的愚蠢……
Besides, the Theoros has already promised the Imperator her fate, and these clowns will eventually realize their foolishness...
May I ask, who is this <color=#dbc291ff>"Theoros"</color>?
凯撒有令，那位大人的行踪务必严格保密。
The Imperator has ordered us to keep his lordship's whereabouts a secret.
去去，别瞎打听了，让我一个人清净清净！
Ah, stop trying to get things out of me. Leave me alone!
嘻…人家都没开口试探呢。五大三粗的「断锋爵」，还真是什么都瞒不住。
Hee-hee... I didn't even need to try. Big and strong "Dux Fragoris" really can't hide anything.
神礼官…真是不妙的名字啊……
呀，不好…他一直盯着我们看呢，先去别的地方吧。
Ah, bad news... he's been staring at us the whole time. Let's move to another place for now.
去去，别瞎打听了，让我一个人清净清净！
Ah, stop trying to get things out of me. Leave me alone!
什么同盟会议…不过是流着黄金血的禽兽们张牙舞爪的兽圈！
Alliance Meeting... More like a cage where creatures with golden blood claw at each other!
止战的「燃冕者」？分明是个德不配位的暴君！
And "Flamecrowned" who ends wars? Clearly, a tyrant who doesn't deserve such a title!
说得太对了！趁着凯撒的鹰犬还在围猎其他家伙，多过过嘴瘾吧。
You're absolutely right! While the Imperator's hounds are still hunting down others, let's let out our grievances.
你…我认得你，你是那暴君的走狗！怎么，来替那小矮子堵我的嘴吗？
You... I know you. You're that tyrant's lackey! What, here to shut me up for that little imp?
呵呵，你慌了？别紧张，我不在乎别人怎么评说凯撒，她更不会在乎。
Heh, panicking now? Don't worry, I don't care what others say about the Imperator, and she certainly doesn't either.
哦？「神谕之子」…呵呵，稀客啊。
Oh? "Children of the Prophecy"... Hehe, such rare guests.
二位，幸会。我是「冬霖爵」塞涅卡，昏光庭院的战士。比起凯撒的臣子，我更愿意自称…合作伙伴。
It is an honor to meet you both. I am the "Dux Brumalis," Seneca, a warrior of the Twilight Courtyard. I prefer to call myself... a partner of the Imperator, rather than a subject.
哦？「神谕之子」…呵呵，稀客啊。
Oh? "Children of the Prophecy"... Hehe, such rare guests.
你们也是来浴场放松的？今日水温合适，务必尽情享受。为了下一场战役，好好养精蓄锐。
Are you here to relax in the baths as well? The temperature is just right today, so be sure to enjoy it. You should rest well for the next campaign.
什么「神谕之子」…呵，又是凯撒穷兵黩武的借口吧！
What "Children of the Prophecy"...? Hah, another excuse for the Imperator's reckless warmongering!
口无遮拦。你真该庆幸自己没有在同盟会议上桌的权利。
No filter, huh? You should be glad you don't have a seat at the Alliance Meetings.
啊，对了。几位若是还想入浴，就抓紧时间吧……
Ah, by the way, if you still want to bathe, hurry up...
等到那条掠食的鱼儿汇入水流，将<color=#dbc291ff>质疑「天外之界」的愚氓</color>尽数抹去…可就没法享受这恰到好处的水温咯。

Once that predatory fish joins the flow of water and eliminates all <color=#dbc291ff>the fools questioning the "world beyond the sky"</color>... you won't be able to enjoy this perfect water temperature anymore.
冬霖爵…似乎话里有话啊。
Seems like there's more to Dux Brumalis's words than meets the eye.
几位若是还想入浴，就抓紧时间吧。
If you still want to bathe, hurry up.
吼吼吼，今天的客人真多呀，瞧瞧又是谁来了？
Roarrr, so many guests today! Let's see who's here now!
两位神谕中的贵客，一位英雄伶俐可爱，另一位英雄…也是颇具英雄风范啊！
Two distinguished guests of the prophecy, one a clever and adorable warrior, the other... also quite heroic!
两位英雄，想不到这么快又能见面，真是太巧了。
Heroes, I didn't expect to meet you again so soon. How fortunate!
很高兴再见到你们，「曳石爵」、「吟风爵」！两位还真是形影不离呢。
It's a pleasure to see you again, Dux Helkolithist and Dux Carminum! You two are inseparable, aren't you?
两位英雄…就是凯撒所说的神谕之子吧？此前未能向两位致意，不周之处还请见谅。
You two heroes... must be the Children of the Prophecy that the Imperator spoke of? I didn't get a chance to greet you earlier, my apologies.
我是「曳石爵」阿波罗尼，是神悟树庭的五贤人之一，逐火军参谋。
I'm Apollonius, the Dux Helkolithist, one of the Five Sages at the Grove of Epiphany, advisor to the Flame-Chase Army.
这位是「吟风爵」维吉妮娅，来自悬锋城，是凯撒大人的史官。
This is Verginia from Castrum Kremnos, the Dux Carminum and historian of the Great Imperator.
很高兴认识你们，「曳石爵」、「吟风爵」！两位还真是形影不离呢。
Nice to meet you, Dux Helkolithist and Dux Carminum! You two are inseparable, aren't you?
噢，是她想要找人一同为新作采风。
Oh, she wants to find someone to help with research for her new work.
吼吼吼，本狮可是奥赫玛的千里眼、顺风耳，街头巷尾流传之事，全都逃不过本狮的视听，可谓绝佳的采风伴侣……
Roarrr, I'm the far-seeing eye and all-hearing ear of Okhema. I see and hear every single thing that happens in the streets and alleys of this place. I'm the perfect partner for research...
吼、吼吼…闲话少叙，就按两位要求，奥赫玛今天最新的讯息来咯——
Roarrr, enough small talk. Here's the latest news from Okhema, as you requested...
神谕之子降临圣城，凯撒独断褫夺兵权；同盟会议不欢而散，恐有血腥风波……
The Children of the Prophecy arrived in the holy city, and the Imperator unilaterally seized military power. The Alliance Meeting ended in discord, and there may be bloody upheaval...
总觉得…你是不是为了关注度，悄悄添油加醋了？
I get the feeling... you might've embellished a bit to keep people's attention.
以本狮坚硬的鬃毛起誓：绝无此事！不过，如果诸君想平息这道恐怖的要闻，不妨用更劲爆的话题来……
I swear on my stone mane, I would never do such a thing! But if you wish to quell this terrifying news, perhaps a more explosive topic would help...
…罢了。虽然流言的影响可以降低，但凯撒大人雷厉风行，以近乎威胁的方式收拢兵权，已是不争的事实。
...Never mind. While the influence of rumors can be minimized, the fact remains that the Great Imperator did swiftly consolidate military power in an almost threatening way. It's undeniable.
两位英雄，我知道凯撒的行事风格在旁人看来有些独断。但很快，你们便能在战场上见证<color=#dbc291ff>凯撒的刀锋</color>为敌人起舞……
Heroes, I know the Imperator's way of doing things may seem a bit autocratic to outsiders. But soon, you will witness <color=#dbc291ff>her blade</color> dance with enemies on the battlefield...
<color=#dbc291ff>她</color>的忠诚出自什么，我不便评述。但那利刃出鞘之际，聪慧如二位…一定能看清凯撒表象下的深思。
I can't comment on the source of <color=#dbc291ff>her</color> loyalty. But when that blade is drawn, you two, as bright as you are... will surely see the deep thoughts beneath her exterior.
「凯撒的刀锋」…是在说海瑟音小姐吧。
The "Imperator's Blade"... Is he talking about Miss Hysilens?
曳石爵阁下的话里，似乎有些不安的情绪。看来，凯撒和海瑟音小姐的关系要远比其他人密切啊……
I sense some unease in Dux Helkolithist's words. It seems the Imperator and Miss Hysilens share a much deeper bond than the others do...
…不管哪里都耳目众多，就没有人少一点的地方吗？
...There are eyes and ears everywhere. Is there any place where we can have some privacy?
我相信聪慧如二位，一定能看到凯撒隐于表象下的深思。
You two, as bright as you are, will surely see the deep thoughts hidden beneath her exterior.
现在，还是想想办法，避免流言扩散吧……
For now, let's think of ways to prevent the rumors from spreading...
这里…原本是你的「私人浴宫」，正适合避人耳目。不知现在有没有人使用？
This place... was originally your private bath chamber, perfect for avoiding prying eyes. I wonder if anyone is using it now?
哦？是灰色的小鱼苗，还有粉色的小海兔啊。
Oh? The little gray fry and pink sea hare.
一声不响地闯入此地，是无意踏错洋流，还是…有意与我共浴？
You barged into here without warning. Was it an accident, or... did you wish to bathe with me?
有什么不对吗？云石天宫本就是我栖身的岩礁。
What's wrong? The Marmoreal Palace is the reef where I rest.
是吗？但你眼睛的光泽比珍珠还亮呢。
Is that so? But your eyes shine brighter than pearls.
分不清过去与未来的水域了吗？这里可一直是我的居所。
Can't tell the difference between past and future waters? This has always been my home.
抱歉抱歉，我们不是有意打扰您沐浴…我们这就离开！
Sorry, sorry! We didn't mean to disturb your bath... We'll leave now!
无伤大雅，不必惊惶。对我而言，这种状态反而自然。陆上的人儿强求穿衣蔽体，只是为自己徒增束缚……
It's no big deal. There's no need to panic. This is the natural state for me. People on land force themselves to wear clothes, adding unnecessary constraints...
…呵，忘了吧。要是让金织爵听见这句话，又该责备我了。
...Hah, forget it. If Dux Goldweaver heard that, she'd scold me again.
好了，各位，还请随意落座，稍候片刻。待我洗去捕食的血腥，就来招待二位。
Alright, please make yourselves comfortable and wait a moment. Let me first wash off the blood of the hunt, and then I'll attend to you two.
拉冬、拉冬的代表大人遇刺了！快、快来人啊！
The... The delegate from Ladon has been assassinated! Quick, quick, someone come quick!
啊，残破的蟹壳浮出水面了。我还担心他被水流冲走了呢。
Ah, the broken crab shell surfaces. I was worried it had been washed away by the current.
只是寻常清洗，不必这么惊讶。
Just a regular cleaning, no need to be so surprised.
请便。但容我提醒：凯撒的禁卫军，奥赫玛宪兵的军团长就在你面前。
Please, go ahead. But let me remind you: The Commander of the Imperator's Imperial Guard and the Okheman Civil Guard is right in front of you.
对锋刃而言，狠毒是一种赞许。
Viciousness is a form of praise to the blade...
…原来如此。难怪还没进门时，空气中就隐隐有股铁锈的味道。
...I see. No wonder there was a faint smell of rust in the air before I even entered.
为什么？因为拉冬人不愿为逐火贡献军力，还是…单单因为他们冒犯了凯撒？
Why? Is it because the Ladonians refused to contribute troops to the Flame-Chase Journey, or... just because they offended the Imperator?
因为逐火的新时代容不得朽烂的淤血。对那些恪守旧律、短视的愚民来说，只有放血能帮他们恢复清醒。
Because the new era of the Flame-Chase doesn't tolerate stagnant blood. For the ignorant masses who cling to outdated laws, only bloodletting can wake them up.
现在，边疆叛军大有兴起的势头，没少受拉冬暗中扶持。他们大唱特唱「重返黄金世」的口号，不愿交出兵权，不过是为反叛蓄势罢了。

Right now, the rebel forces on the frontier are rising, and Ladon has been secretly supporting them. They loudly chant the slogan "Return to the Era Chrysea," unwilling to relinquish military power. They're just building momentum for the rebellion.
我还是对此持保留意见。
有点太极端了，我不能接受。
It seems a bit too extreme for me to accept.
思考是凯撒赋予公民的权利，我不会对你的想法多加干涉。
Thinking is a right given to citizens by the Imperator. I won't interfere with your thoughts.
只要不妄图扭转时代的流向…你我就都是自由的。
As long as you don't try to reverse the current of the times... you and I will both be free.
我…甚至没法从您的话里听出半点自由的喜悦。
I... can't hear even the slightest hint of joy in your words.
…因为我早已享受过最极致的自由。
很久很久以前，我曾在海中栖居。在那无光的海底，文明目不能及的地方，大鱼每刻都在吞食小鱼的生命，而在大鱼死后，它又会成为新生儿的食粮，滋养整片海洋。

Long, long ago, I lived in the sea. In that lightless abyss, far beyond civilization's reach, the great fish consumed the small, and when the great fish perished, their bodies became sustenance for the newborn, nourishing the whole ocean.
这就是文明延续的浪潮：无论何人都有可能遭到吞食，又或迎来终将陨落的命运。
This is the tide that carries civilization forward: Anyone may be devoured, or meet the fate of inevitable decay.
您是想说…最极致的自由，对生命而言反而最残忍么？
Are you suggesting... that ultimate freedom is in fact the cruelest fate for life?
我只是想说，生命若想享受尊严，就必须先受「律法」制约。
I only mean that if life wishes to preserve its dignity, it must first be bound by the "Law."
…不必多说了，小海兔。我和你的想法一致。
...There's no need for me to say more, little sea hare. We are of one mind.
凯撒的「律法」是否能够引领鱼群，引领我们游向一片真正自由的大海…就让我们共同拭目以待吧。
Whether the Imperator's "Law" can guide the schools of fish and lead us to a truly free ocean... let us wait and see.
现在，交心先到此为止——又有鱼儿循着血腥游来了。
But for now, let's pause this heart-to-heart. Another fish has come, following the scent of blood.
呵…做你的部下还真可怜，整天都要为长官随时扔下的烂摊子费神。
Heh... Being your subordinate is such a tragedy. I'm always having to worry about the messes you leave behind.
对凯撒应尽的义务罢了。
It's simply our duty to the Imperator.
欸，一瞬间就整装待发了？海瑟音小姐，真是深不可测……
Eh, all ready to go in an instant? Miss Hysilens, you truly are impossible to predict...
倒是你，一尾成日忙碌摇鳍的金鳟，怎突然有闲心来探望我？
Yet, you, a golden trout who's always busy all day, suddenly have the time to visit me?
你以为我想来么？奉劝你多烧些友邦进贡的香薰吧，别让我的作品染上鱼腥。
Do you think I wanted to come? I suggest you burn some more of the incense offered by our allies, lest my creations be tainted by the reek of fish.
我只是代凯撒来提醒你，记得为<color=#dbc291ff>宴会</color>作准备。
I'm only here on the Imperator's behalf to remind you to prepare for the <color=#dbc291ff>banquet</color>.
知道了。但我还是得驳一句，你口中的鱼腥，对我而言反倒是大海独有的馨香。
Fine. But I must retort. What you call the "reek of fish," to me, is the unique fragrance of the sea.
再说了，如果这身华服染污，你不也会赠我新衣么？
Besides, if my fine clothes get stained, won't you just gift me new ones?
你也品出同样的味道了呀。
There's a strange chemistry between them.
天外世界是这样描述友情的吗？还真是新奇呢。
Is that how friendship is described beyond the sky? Fascinating.
阿格莱雅，和过去好不一样…
Aglaea is so different from her past self...
应该说是「未来」吧。尚未掌管圣城的「金织」女士…也别具一番魅力呢。
You mean "future." The future ruler of the holy city, Lady Goldweaver, is quite captivating in her own way.
说起来，两位刚才提到了「宴会」——可否烦请展开讲讲呢？
By the way, you both just mentioned a "banquet," could you elaborate on that?
对了，你们还不知道呢。每次战前胜后，凯撒都会举办一场属于黄金裔的盛会，鼓舞士气。
Oh, right, you don't know. Every time before a battle or after a victory, the Imperator holds a grand feast for the Chrysos Heirs, to lift our spirits.
对于我们这些常年洄游在生死间的战士，那是比胜利还值得期待的时刻。
For us warriors who swim constantly between life and death, these feasts are more worth looking forward to than victory.
呵…以欢宴作为猎杀欢宴之神的序曲，以蜜酿作为祭奠蜜酿之祖的贡品，真是荒诞。
Hah... A banquet to prelude the hunt for the god of banquets, and honey brew as a tribute to commemorate the ancestor of honey brew... How absurd.
别苦着脸了。大局已定，又是为{RUBY_B#海洋之泰坦}法吉娜{RUBY_E#}摆的盛宴，何不学学泰坦，活在当下，及时行乐？

Don't look so grim. All has been decided. Since it's a banquet for {RUBY_B#Ocean Titan}Phagousa{RUBY_E#}, why not take a leaf out of the Titan's book, live in the moment and enjoy life to the fullest?
我可不似你那般自由自在。那只多洛斯小猫到处添乱，已经够让我烦心了。而且，我还得完成手上的制衣委托……
I'm not as carefree as you. That little Dolos kitten is already causing enough trouble for me, and on top of that, I still have tailoring commissions to complete...
等到火种将我的双眼点亮，可能就没法像以前一样专注了呢。
By the time the Coreflame illuminates my eyes, I might not be able to focus as I used to.
好奇这双眼眸吗？人们常将它以珠宝相比。而我已经做好决定，要向「浪漫」换取能看清一切的眼睛。
Curious about these eyes? People often compare them to jewels. But I've already made my decision to ask "Romance" for eyes that can see everything.
不知等我接过神权，这个世界会变成什么样貌？
I wonder what this world will look like when I take the divine authority?
未来的你…依旧是这世上最棒的织者。
In the future, you... will still be the finest weaver in the world.
这也是命运三相降下的预言？
Is this also a prophecy from the Three Fates?
比预言还要准确哦。毕竟，{NICKNAME}已经亲眼见证过了，对吧？
It's even more accurate than a prophecy. After all, {NICKNAME} has already witnessed it, right?
你将会织出世上最浪漫的事物…
You will weave the most romantic thing in the world...
你将为众人筑就再创世的长阶…
You will forge the long stairs to Era Nova...
你将会沐浴在希望的金光之中…
You will bathe in the golden light of hope...
「成为半神，泯灭人性」——我无数次求告神谕，换来的只有这唯一一道回应。
"Become a demigod and lose your humanity." That is the only reply I've received in the countless times I've sought wisdom from the prophecy.
但命运的片段就像针脚，在被编织成为华服前，谁也看不清它真正的美貌，不是么？
But destiny's fragments are like stitches. Before they're threaded into splendid garments, no one can see their true charm, can they?
她一直被自己所要背负的神职烦忧。但多亏你们，阿格莱雅看起来精神多了。
Aglaea has always been troubled by the divine duty she must bear. But thanks to you, she seems to be in much better spirits.
Do you know each other well?
正如她熟谙纺车如何颤动，我也能从潮湿的空气中嗅出细微的变化。至于是否能谈得上熟悉…在她仍是孩子时，我便已与她共游。大部分时候，我能读懂她心里的泡泡就是了。

Just as she knows how the spinning wheel trembles, I can sense the smallest changes in the damp air. As for whether we know each other well... I've swum beside her since she was a child. Most of the time, I can understand the whispers in her heart.
她害羞未说出口的那些话，之后就由我代为敬你们一杯吧。现在，这座浴宫就分给你们歇脚……
For those words she was too shy to say herself, I'll raise a glass to you on her behalf. Now, I leave this bath chamber to you...
…好好休息，做好准备：毕竟，我们每次把酒言欢，都可能是人生中最后的欢庆哪。
...Rest well, and prepare yourselves. After all, every time we drink and talk could be the last celebration we have in this life.
海瑟音小姐把浴宫让给我们了呢…还真是随性呀。
Miss Hysilens has given us the bath chamber... It seems she really does do whatever she wants.
可以不必总是在凯撒视线下了。
Now we don't always have to be under the Imperator's watchful eye.
是啊。不过，她随时都有可能回来——聊重要的事，还得留个心眼才行。
Indeed. But she could return at any moment. If we're having an important discussion, we must remain vigilant.
这座浴宫本来就是我的。
This bath chamber was originally mine.
好啦好啦，将来会的。但现在客随主便，她也随时都有可能回来…聊重要的事，还得留个心眼才行。
Yeah, yeah, in the future. But for now, we're at the mercy of the host, and she could return at any moment... If we're having an important discussion, we must remain vigilant.
我们应该只是她的室友…
听她的意思，确实。这也意味着她随时都有可能回来…聊重要的事，还得留个心眼才行。
It seems that way. This also means she could return at any moment... If we're having an important discussion, we must remain vigilant.
所以，抓紧机会，汇报一下目前的进展吧，别让天外的各位久等了……
So, let's seize the opportunity and report our current progress. We don't want to keep everyone beyond the sky waiting...
…第一，那个头顶上插了蜡烛的小皇冠虽然没明说，但强硬地拒绝了你们接管「律法」的诉求…嗯，合情合理。
...First, while that little empress with a candle stuck on her head didn't explicitly say it, she firmly rejected your request to take over the "Law"... Hmph, fair enough.
第二，来古士确实在这条时间线上，但他和那小皇冠有点关系，你们没办法找到他…呵，意料之中。
Second, Lygus is indeed in this timeline, but since he's somehow connected to that little empress, you have no way to find him... Hah, as expected.
Tsk tsk, the road ahead will be long and difficult...
我还没说呢，你都知道了？
I haven't even said anything, and you already know everything?
都是我猜的。怎么，猜中了？
It's all just a guess. What, did I guess right?
Next time, don't steal my lines.
…看来猜中了？下次嘛，看我心情。
...Looks like I guessed right then? Next time, it'll depend on my mood.
Tsk tsk, the road ahead will be long and difficult.
既然你没反驳，那我就默认自己都猜中了。
Since you didn't refute anything, I'll just assume I guessed it all right.
我们这也有些进展，但谈不上什么好消息。时间有限，长话短说……
We've made some progress here too, but nothing to get too excited about. Our time is short, so let me summarize...
有关智械哥的来历：他编写的防火墙，使用的是十四行代数式——在{RUBY_B#天才俱乐部#22}利尔他{RUBY_E#}发明九字算法后，银河中早就不存在这种数学逻辑了。

Concerning the origin of that Intellitron: The firewall he created uses quatorzain algebraic expressions. But ever since {RUBY_B#Genius Society #22}Aiden{RUBY_E#} invented the nine-worded formulae, this kind of mathematical logic no longer exists in the cosmos.
<color=#dbc291ff>来古士一定和天才俱乐部脱不了干系，千万提高警惕。</color>
<color=#dbc291ff>Lygus is definitely connected to the Genius Society, so stay alert.</color>
难道是某位天才的造物…
Maybe he's the creation of some Genius...
Could he be related to the emperor?
万一是博识尊的思考单元…
What if he's the thinking unit of Nous...
首先排除机器头自己，祂主打一个事不关己高高挂起，不可能会亲自下场。但这家伙究竟是什么来头，我和螺丝还在逐一排除……
We can first exclude Droidhead THEMSELF. THEY specialize in minding THEIR own business and wouldn't intervene personally. But Screwy and I are still eliminating possibilities one by one...
目前最有可能的人选，这么几个：{RUBY_B#天才俱乐部#4}「寂静领主」{RUBY_E#}、{RUBY_B#天才俱乐部#23}阿茶{RUBY_E#}…噢，{RUBY_B#天才俱乐部#27与#66}两位鲁珀特{RUBY_E#}也算，但如果是他俩就太没劲了。

Currently, the most likely candidates are these few: the "{RUBY_B#Genius Society #4}Lord of Silence{RUBY_E#}," {RUBY_B#Genius Society #23}Acha{RUBY_E#}... Oh, the {RUBY_B#Genius Society #27 and #66}two Ruberts{RUBY_E#} are also possible, but it would be too boring if it were one of them.
I vote for the "Lord of Silence."
我们暂时也这么怀疑，但还得进一步验证。
We also have the same suspicions for now, but further verification is needed.
连你们都得不出准确答案？
Even you can't come up with an accurate answer?
都说了，那家伙的技术既陈旧又复杂，还不亚于天才。但说到底，又不是星神，会搞定的。
I've told you, his technology is both outdated and complicated, no less than genius. But ultimately, he's not an Aeon. We can handle him.
总算能和大人物过过招了。
Finally, we'll get to face off with some big names.
要说的就是这些，世界内部就靠你们继续推进了。定期联系，记得别掉以轻心。
That's all I have to say. We'll depend on you to continue pushing things forward within this world. Keep in touch regularly, and remember, don't let your guard down.
黑塔阁下…真是风风火火呢。
Madam Herta is a real whirlwind.
那接下来，我们就以阿格莱雅提到的<color=#dbc291ff>宴会</color>为突破口吧。那时刻律德菈的亲信应该都会在场，也是一个和他们拉近距离的好机会。

Well then, let's use the <color=#dbc291ff>banquet</color> Aglaea mentioned as our next starting point. Cerydra's trusted followers should all be present at that time. It'll be a good opportunity to get closer to them.
要避免和来古士正面冲突。
We must avoid direct confrontation with Lygus.
We'll operate carefully when the time comes.
嗯，就这么定！凭我们的默契，无论发生什么都能顺利解决的。
It's settled then! With our great teamwork, we'll be able to deal with anything that comes our way.
今天还真是漫长啊…差不多也到休息的时候啦。
It's been a long day... We should get some rest now.
好好休息，为宴会做准备吧。
Rest well and get ready for the banquet.
嗯！好好为宴会做准备吧♪
Yes! Let's get ready for the banquet ♪
I don't feel like resting yet...
好呀，那玩累了记得回来哦，人家就在这边等你♪
Alright, when you've tired yourself out, remember to come back. I'll be waiting for you here ♪
对了，灵水盆。虽然刻律德菈说创世涡心已被封锁，但说不定…？
Oh right, the spirit basin. Even though Cerydra said the Vortex of Genesis was sealed off, perhaps...
按照记忆中重复了许多次的步骤，你将脸浸入灵水盆中，合上双目，屏住呼吸。
Following the steps you've repeated countless times in your memory, you submerge your face in the spirit basin, close your eyes, and hold your breath.
咳咳咳…人类的憋气是有极限的，而你从短暂的沉浸中学到一件事……
*cough*... There's a limit to how long humans can hold their breath, and from that brief immersion, you learned one thing...
…果然，灵水盆和涡心的连通失效了呀。
...Sure enough, the connection between the spirit basin and the Vortex of Genesis is gone.
追随凯撒远征…看来我们只有这一条路可走了呢。
It seems that following the Imperator on her expedition is the only path we can take.
也是。这种小事，她应该没理由向我们隐瞒。
You're right. She has no reason to hide such a trivial thing from us.
哼，至少悬锋人还会坚守自己的信仰…！
At least Kremnoans keep their faith...!
凯撒麾下的其他英雄也在场……
The other heroes under the Imperator's command are here too...
如果有时间，要不要也接触一下？
Since we have time, should we go meet them?
这个轮回的元老们竟然…看来先前被处以极刑的祭司不是个例呀。
The Elders of this cycle were all... Looks like that priest who was sentenced to death wasn't an isolated case.
唔，他们好像要打起来了…我们快走。
Looks like things are getting heated... Let's get out of here.
哎呀～这么多人，不愧是圣城，好热闹呀～！
Oh, so many people! The holy city is so lively~!
不知刻律德菈对我们隐瞒了多少，最坏的情况……
We don't know how much Cerydra has concealed from us. In the worst-case scenario...
我们要面对的敌人，恐怕不止一位呢。
We may have to face more than one enemy.
不过，凯撒居然会对质疑「天外之界」的人下杀手吗？
But would the Imperator actually kill those who question the "world beyond the sky"?
这一点也和我们熟悉的奥赫玛截然相反……
This is the complete opposite from what we know of Okhema...
不知道城中最近都在热议什么……
I wonder what everyone in the city is talking about lately...
嗯…要想深入了解凯撒的秘密，必须得过海瑟音小姐这关呢。
Hmm... to truly understand the Imperator's secrets, we have to get past Miss Hysilens.
What exactly is the Imperator doing...?
Another round of Flame-Chase is starting?
I get to see the Imperator again!
A world plunged into lawless darkness...
The Great Imperator is so dignified!
Long live the Imperator! Glory to the Flame-Chase Army!
这次战争我们也一定能胜利！
Did you hear? Another war's coming.
黄金裔们简直是纷争的化身……
The Chrysos Heirs are just the Incarnation of Strife...
嘘——别说这种不要命的话！
Shh! You'll get yourself killed saying things like that!
我们还是早日逃去其他城邦吧？
We better flee to another city-state while we still can, huh?
但是，在凯撒的统治下是最安全的……
But it's safest under the Imperator's rule...
又要跟泰坦开战了，真是期待……
A war with the Titans again? I can't wait...
凯撒的逐火军，未尝一败！
The Imperator's Flame-Chase Army has never lost!
有人看到救世主也来这边了！
Someone said the Deliverer showed up here too!
啊？救世主也是要洗澡的吗？

该死的拉冬人，竟敢对凯撒不敬……
Those insolent Ladonians! How dare they disrespect the Imperator...
哼，凯撒的律法一定饶不了他！
Hmph. He will receive no mercy under the Imperator's law!
两位贵客，留步。进入会场前，请交出随身携带的物品。
Honored guests, wait here for a moment. You must surrender any personal belongings you have on you before entering the venue.
嗯…每次这位英雄一登场，气氛就会瞬间冷下来呢。
Eh... This hero always brings down the vibe whenever he shows up.
凯撒身居高位，必须审慎细致。为避免不必要的误会，请两位照我说的做吧。
The Imperator's elevated position means she must always remain meticulous and careful. Please, do as I say, guests. It would avoid unnecessary misunderstandings.

只要使用得当，羽毛笔也能化作凶器。所有随身物品——「所有」——昔涟小姐。

放心吧。你们的物品，会由专人妥善保管。

"Looked after appropriately"? "Dedicated staff"? Talk about a vague choice of words...
{NICKNAME}，看来对方是冲着<color=#dbc291ff>识刻锚</color>来的呀。要怎么做？
{NICKNAME}, it seems like he's aiming specifically for the <color=#dbc291ff>Chronocognitive Anchor</color>. What should we do?
Go with their plan and hand it to him.
果然，我们心有灵犀呢！将计就计，把识刻锚交给他「保管」吧？
Nice. You read my mind! Let's go with their plan and hand over the Chronocognitive Anchor to be "looked after."
毕竟小凯撒对{NICKNAME}那么关注，我们和天才的悄悄话多半已经传进她的耳朵了。人家都能猜到接下来的发展……

After all, if the little Imperator is paying this much attention to {NICKNAME}, she probably already knows all about our whispered conversation with the Geniuses. I can pretty much guess what'll happen next...

After all, if the little Imperator is paying this much attention to {NICKNAME}, she probably already knows all about our whispered conversation with the Geniuses. I can pretty much guess what'll happen next...

不过，{NICKNAME}，听我说，这里不妨将计就计，把识刻锚交给他「保管」吧？
But listen, {NICKNAME}, why don't we go with their plan and hand over the Chronocognitive Anchor to be "looked after"?
毕竟小凯撒对{NICKNAME}那么关注，我们和天才的悄悄话多半已经传进她的耳朵了。人家都能猜到接下来的发展……

After all, if the little Imperator is paying this much attention to {NICKNAME}, she probably already knows all about our whispered conversation with the Geniuses. I can pretty much guess what'll happen next...

身为凯撒大人的史官，我负责为逐火军的各位撰写诗篇。但对于自己，我却不知该如何落笔。
A—As the Great Imperator's historian, I'm responsible for composing poems and songs for everyone in the Flame-Chase Army. But... I have no idea how I should record myself in the annals.
小维吉妮娅想请二位浅浅「透露」一下她的未来，好找到提笔的灵感。

可如果就这么回答，她恐怕会更失落…{NICKNAME}，该怎么办？

虽然不能透露太多，但人家觉得，不妨就以「未来」开篇吧？

嗯，比如…「我心怀憧憬，为自己写下明天的寓言。静静守候，直到明天又一个明天之后，它兑现如约而至的诺言」…类似这样？

…就是这个调！我、我突然文思泉涌！

Thank you so much! I feel like I can actually finish composing the Heroic Saga of Flame-Chase once we end this campaign.
阿波罗尼点了点头，对你们的回答表示赞许。
Apollonius nodded, showing approval of your answers.
不是即兴发挥哦？人家背过的，就等着在你面前显摆一下，嘻！

嘻，这就是说话的艺术，跟{NICKNAME}学的，像吗？

对了，作为交换，两位能告诉我们，凯撒在哪儿吗？

凯撒？她一般不会这么早就步入席中。按她的话说，爱臣私语的话所，君王应该保持沉默。
The Imperator? She usually wouldn't arrive this early. She believes that rulers should stay silent in places where their subjects hold private conversations.
在她登场前，不如与我们共饮一杯吧——敬含而不露的理性。

To... romance, which will surely echo.
嘿嘿，浪漫的结局…喝几罐蜜酿庆祝一下。
Hehe, what a romantic conclusion... Let me have a few jars of honey brew as a treat.
Now now, don't drink too much...
阿雅，要是你喝不惯蜜酿，*我们*就去要一口锅，给你煮些燕麦粥喝。
Agy, if you can't get used to the honey brew, we will go ask for a pot and cook some oatmeal for you.
不用啦。只是这宴会太过吵闹，有趣的人和事又太少，有些待不住罢了。
No need for that. This banquet is just too loud, and nothing and no one here is interesting. I just don't really want to be here.
骗人，明明从浴宫回来时还很精神来着。让我猜猜，是在操心谁的事，海瑟音？还是小赛飞儿？

你就是性格太认真，这样下去，以后会很辛苦的。

吾师，恐怕你最没资格说我了。
You're the least qualified to lecture me about that, teacher.

呀，两位，是来找*我们*的吗？我的意思是，找缇宝还是阿雅？
Ahh, dear guests. Are you here for us? I mean... are you here for Tribbie or Agy?
…啊，没有。只是想问问，二位见过凯撒吗？
...Ah. No. I'm just wondering whether you've seen the Imperator?
那位君主向来我行我素。她虽赐我们爵名，却不会与任何人分享行踪。
Our sovereign has always acted however she pleases. Though she gave us ranks, she'd never tell anyone her whereabouts.
或许，她的眼中只能容下棋子，还有王冠上映出的苍穹吧。
Perhaps the only thing she tolerates are chess pieces... and the sky reflected upon her crown.
两位怎么愁眉苦脸的？这副表情可不适合「救世主」啊。
Why do you two look so distressed? That's not what the Deliverer should look like.
机会难得，不如一起碰个杯吧，趁我们还有享受欢欣的时光——敬下一个千年的命运与牺牲。
Why don't we have a toast, while we still have time for pleasure? Here, to the destinies and sacrifices of the next millennium.
那*我们*就敬——解放命运的明天！

果然，比起蜜酿，还是燕麦粥更适合*我们*。
Called it. Oatmeal suits us way better than honey brew.

二位贵客，还有什么事吗？难道是想听我唠唠凯撒大人的事迹？
Is there anything else we can help you with, dear guests? Or do you want me to recount the Great Imperator's heroic deeds?
哟，拉比努斯，我从地窖里搞到了学者们私藏的蜜酿，来品品？

Hahaha... I'd never refuse to share a drink with Dux Brumalis, especially if she seeks me out first.

谢谢你的好意。不过…我们更想知道，凯撒什么时候回来？
Thank you for the offer, but... we're more interested in knowing when the Imperator will be back.
凯撒？呵，谁知道，估计又躲在什么地方想歪点子吧。要我说，她从来就没正眼瞧过我们这些为她拼命的战士……

塞涅卡，这话我可不能当作没听见。要么把它收回去，要么就和我一决高下！

Fine by me. Attendant! Bring us ten more jars of honey brew! I'm gonna make sure he can't even stand straight by the end of this!
净说大话，先小心你自己的肚皮吧！

啊？不是还有那么多泰坦没讨伐吗？
