Don't worry. I know what you've been waiting for.
来，陪我坐一小会儿吧？我有个私人的秘密想同你们分享。
Come. Sit with me for a while, will you? I'd like to share a personal secret with you.
这是<color=#dbc291ff>法吉娜的神血蜜露</color>，十二宝瓶中最为甜美的一樽。
This is <color=#dbc291ff>Phagousa's Dew of Divine Blood</color>, the sweetest of all the twelve bottles.
在这历史变革的前夜，如此奇珍，我想邀「救世主」共饮。
On the night before such a historical event, I'd like to share this marvelous drink with the "Deliverer."
{NICKNAME}，这算自带酒水了吧？果然，安检就是针对我们的。
Doesn't this count as bringing in outside food, {NICKNAME}? I knew that security check was targeted at us.
Oh! We're... simply overwhelmed by such an honor.
是担心我在蜜露中布了毒饵？那么，请让我自证清白。
Are you worried that I might have poisoned the Dew? Well then, let me prove my innocence.
海瑟音举杯饮下蜜露，故意展露出脖颈，好让你将液体流经咽喉的过程收入眼中。
Hysilens raises the goblet of Honeydew to her lips, deliberately arching her neck so you could watch the liquid's descent down her throat as she swallows.
总觉得海瑟音小姐想和我们谈些什么…先配合她吧？
I feel like Miss Hysilens wants to talk to us about something... Why don't we go along with her for now?
I want a new cup for myself.
Hah. You're a pretty sharp fish.
安心。蜜露并非酒酿，不会令人迷醉。
Worry not. Honeydew is not alcohol. It won't get you drunk.
恰恰相反，它能让你更加清醒。
On the contrary, it can make your mind... even sharper.
眨眼间，陶杯贴上了你的嘴唇。不愧是凯撒御用的锋刃，翁法罗斯最敏捷的剑士。
The clay cup touches your lips in the blink of an eye. She is indeed the imperial blade of the Imperator and the swiftest swordmaster in Amphoreus.
Would you like some too, little sea hare?
As long as you like it.
It has a... very complex taste.
时而平静、时而猛烈，这便是「海洋」的滋味。在启程面对法吉娜的波涛前，你理应先熟悉它的善变。
Calm at times, tempestuous at others... That's the taste of the "Ocean." It'll do you good to understand Phagousa's fickleness before we set off to face their waves.
就像此时此刻，两位将见证这蜜露中蕴含的秘密……
Just like how you are about to understand the secrets within this Dew...
现在，请转过头去，轻轻地——不要发出任何响动。
Now, please turn around. Very. Very. Quietly. Don't make a single noise.
Lygus! I knew he'd be here!
其余诸神的蜜露皆会引人沉醉，唯独欢宴之神的蜜露……
The Dew of other gods all intoxicate humans, but the God of Banquets' Dew...
是能将人们从海妖的迷魂歌谣中唤醒的「解药」。
Is an "antidote" that can awaken humans from a sea siren's enchanting song.
打从宴会开始，众宾客就被我的歌声催眠，他们看不见凯撒和那位神礼官。
Since the start of this banquet, all the guests have been under the spell of my song. None of them can see the Imperator and that Theoros.
但二位——我希望你们拥有清醒的视野。
But you two... I wish for you to see the truth.
Is this... also what the Imperator wants?
是我的私人请求。我…无法信任那位神礼官。
This is my personal request. I... can't bring myself to trust that Theoros.
自从他和欧洛尼斯的神谕一同降临，将群星的预言带给奥赫玛，逐火军就变了。他的低语难以抗拒，包藏祸心，令野心障目的人们一一踩入陷阱。

The Flame-Chase Army changed after he descended with Oronyx's divination and brought the prophecy of the stars to Okhema. His seductive whispers harbor something malicious within and will ensnare those of us blinded by ambition.
你们是预言中的「救世主」，对他的了解远胜过我。或许，只有你们能从其人言行中发觉一丝端倪……
You are the "Deliverers" of the prophecy and know about him far more than I do. Perhaps only you can find traces of the truth from his actions and words...
然后，为凯撒展示正确的道路。
Then, we can show the Imperator the right path forward.
可这么做…不是自作主张吗？
But... isn't this acting behind her back?
翁法罗斯已经太过脆弱，就连捍卫她的英勇行为也必须藏在水面下。身为凯撒的锋刃，我必须在暗流中为她开辟前路……

Amphoreus has become far too weak. Even heroic actions protecting her from harm must be conducted under the water's surface. I am the Imperator's blade, and I must clear the way for her while remaining concealed in the torrents...
然后，把剑指向真正的敌人。
Then, ensure I'm pointing my sword towards the true enemy.
海瑟音小姐，能答应我一个请求吗？
Can you promise me something, Miss Hysilens?
{NICKNAME}此行前来，正是为了阻止那个坏人的阴谋。我们的立场是一致的。
{NICKNAME} has in fact come here to stop that villain's evil scheme. Our goals are aligned.
但凯撒要做的选择…{NICKNAME}从无僭越之意。我们只想把知道的一切坦诚相告，毫无保留。
But as to the decision the Imperator must make... {NICKNAME} has no wish to transgress her authority. We just want to tell her everything we know.
我相信，凯撒自会明辨是非。
I believe the Imperator will be able to tell right from wrong.
当然，我从不怀疑二位的忠诚，也定会如实传达。
I never doubted your loyalty. I'll pass your words faithfully on to her.
但前提是，你我能在这场拉锯中取得优势。
...Provided we can gain the advantage in this tug-of-war, that is.
现在，回到宴会中去吧。带上这酒杯，保持距离，假装你们还沉浸在海妖的幻境中……
Now, return to the feast. Bring this cup with you and keep your distance. Pretend you are still immersed in the sea siren's fantasia...
我会控制水汽，让你们能像深海鲸兽那般听见远方的声音，听清交谈的细节。
And I'll control the moisture in the air. That way, you'll be able to listen to sounds from afar, as if you are a whale of the depths, and hear every word of their conversation.
I wish you a victory in this first skirmish.
We're too close! They'll notice us!
Let's mingle in the crowds here.
放松，放松，表现得自然些。
Relax. Relax. Try to act natural.
凯撒人呢，怎么还不现身？那小矮子，平日对谁都一副颐指气使的样子！今天我就要、就要……
Where's the Imperator? Still not here? That little imp is always acting so high and mighty towards everyone! Today, I will... I will...!
即便已被醉意战胜，此人仍不敢挑战您的权威哪。
Though she has succumbed to drunkenness, she still does not dare challenge your authority.
胆敢妄议我的身高，仅这一点就足够将她碎尸万段。
A criticism of my height is a grave enough insult already. She should be dismembered.
您时常以这种方式考验臣子的忠诚么？
Do you often test the loyalty of your subjects like this?
可笑。凯撒不需要愚忠之人，只需证明自己尚有价值，我便愿意网开一面。
You jest. The Imperator does not need blind loyalty. As long as one can prove they have value, I am willing to be lenient towards them.
说正事吧，神礼官：倘若我通过试炼，将此世「律法」执握在手。下一步，你打算怎么做？
Let's cut to the chase, Theoros. If I pass the trial and grasp this world's "Law" in my hands, what will you do then?
答案显而易见，我会将翁法罗斯与群星相连……
The answer is simple. I will connect Amphoreus with the stars...
别说废话。简洁、具体，我不会提醒第二次。
Don't waste my time. Be precise. Be specific. I won't ask a second time.
容我更正：<color=#dbc291ff>我会修正旧日「律法」中封闭翁法罗斯的条约，并将黑潮汇入再创世的涡流。</color>
Allow me to adjust my statement: <color=#dbc291ff>I will correct the regulations within the old "Law" that sealed off Amphoreus, and merge the black tide with the torrents of Era Nova.</color>
如此，我们便能痛击企图扼杀「铁墓」的天外势力，为您将要踏上的无尽征途吹响启程的号角。
Then, we will be able to decimate the forces beyond the sky that are trying to annihilate Irontomb, and sound the trumpet for the endless campaign you will then embark on.
可你分明说过，铁墓在星间无可匹敌，何人胆敢扬言扼杀？
But you previously said that Irontomb is unrivaled in power across the stars. Who would dare to annihilate it?
名为「仙舟联盟」的战舰联邦，好战、守旧；名为「天才俱乐部」的教团，松散、却极端疯狂；还有「星穹列车」，一群无法的流浪者……

There is a federation of warships named the Xianzhou Alliance, warlike and old-fashioned. A cult named the Genius Society, loosely organized but steeped in abject insanity. There's also the Astral Express, a group of lawless vagrants...
所谓「救世主」也是其中一员。这群流民误以为自己能串联群星，以同盟替代征服，然而历史早已给出当头棒喝。

That so-called "Deliverer" is part of that last group. Those vagabonds mistakenly believe they can connect the stars through alliances instead of conquest, but history has already given them a tough lesson.
诸如此类，不胜枚举。但待到绝灭大君席卷寰宇，他们都将臣服于您的「毁灭」帝国。
There are countless other organizations besides, but when the Lord Ravager sweeps across the cosmos, they will certainly all bow before your empire of Destruction.
…倘若那些文明不像你所说的这般虚弱，倒还有及锋一试的价值。
...If those civilizations are not as feeble as you describe, then they may still have some value in testing the quality of my blade.
不过，再渺小的城邦也应当为凯撒树立方尖碑，以便世人随时想起她征服时的威光。
That being said, even the smallest and weakest city-states should build an obelisk to the Imperator, so that their people can constantly recall the glory of her conquests.
随我再走几步吧，神礼官。
Walk a little longer with me, Theoros.
瞧这走向，不太妙呀。咱们这位小凯撒，好像对「毁灭」充满了兴趣……
I don't like how this is going. Our little Imperator seems fascinated by the Destruction...
灰鱼儿，小海兔，他们似乎还在商议。再靠近些吧，我会继续为你们传音……
Gray fry? Little sea hare? It seems like they're still talking. Get closer. I'll keep carrying their voices to you...
呃，好像是有点喝多了…没想到果汁也能上头。
I think I had too much... Didn't think you could get drunk on fruit juice.
真为难啊。无论如何布局，法吉娜这一战…牺牲在所难免。
What a difficult situation... No matter how we position our forces, this battle against Phagousa... will result in many casualties.
这不是你我该考虑的事。凯撒已经落子，我们只需为她冲锋陷阵，直至最后一刻。
That's not something you or I should consider. The Imperator has already placed the chess pieces. We just need to fight for her until our last breath.
令人感叹。您麾下的将领虽性格各异，却同样忠诚……
How astonishing. The commanders under you have such different personalities, yet they share the same loyalty...
呀，他往这边看了！快，随便做点什么，假装看不见他们——
Ah, he's looking this way! Quick, do something and pretend we can't see them...
Gulp down the honeydew in front of you!
Chat with the guests next to you.
…你有这么高速运转的毁灭进入翁法罗斯。
...So you have this super duper speedy rotation of Destruction into Amphoreus.
Oh, I got it. It's tha—that thing, right?
——研发这个金血的原理是哀地里亚管！
The one behind the research and development of this golden blood principle is Aidonia's manager!
坏了，伙伴…你好像遇到高手啦？
Oh dear. Seems like you've met your match, partner.
我现在充满灵感，轻轻松松啦。
I'm so full of inspiration right now! And I feel so light!
被这么热烈地盯着…人家真的会害羞的哦？
Staring at me like that so intently... it's making me feel shy.
失礼了。只是确认一下，您那两位贵客是否有异样——
My apologies. I was just checking whether everything was fine with those two distinguished guests of yours...
Heh. And it seems like all is well.
继续方才的话题吧，您麾下的将士们……
Let us continue our previous conversation. Regarding the soldiers fighting for you...
<color=#dbc291ff>他们可知为了「律法」的试炼，自己需要付出何种代价？</color>
<color=#dbc291ff>Are they aware of the price they must pay for the trial of "Law"?</color>
若我没有记错，您因为献祭不足，在与{RUBY_B#律法之泰坦}塔兰顿{RUBY_E#}的对弈中已落败过一次……
If I recall correctly, you've already lost a bout against {RUBY_B#Law Titan}Talanton{RUBY_E#} due to offering insufficient sacrifices...
你胆敢将我与「失败」二字放在同一句话里？
You dare mention my name alongside the word "lost"?
谨言慎行。你只需知道，我在试炼中胜出已是定局。
Watch your words and actions. All you need to know is that my victory in the trial is guaranteed.
为了征服，就算没有「律法」的试炼，他们也早已宣誓牺牲。所以，告诉我……
Even without the trial of "Law," they've already sworn to give their lives for my conquest. So, tell me...
若一切按约定进行，你会建议我如何处置那位「救世主」？
If everything happens according to our agreement, how would you recommend I deal with that "Deliverer"?
好问题。切勿被{M#他}{F#她}蒙骗，那天外之人体内藏着一颗{RUBY_B#星核}毁灭的种子{RUBY_E#}，定不能让{M#他}{F#她}玷污了您的光辉……

Good question. Do not let {M#him}{F#her} fool you. That {F#wo}man from beyond the sky contains a {RUBY_B#Stellaron}seed of ruin{RUBY_E#} within {M#his}{F#her} body. {M#He}{F#She} must not be allowed to tarnish your glory...
最明智的决定，便是将{M#他}{F#她}交由我来处理。
Therefore, the wisest decision would be to hand {M#him}{F#her} over to me.
你打算对{M#他}{F#她}动用私刑？
或许「实验」是更贴切的词汇。
Calling it "experimentation" would be more appropriate.
宾客们耐心不多，我打算解开幻境，前去赴宴了。
The guests' patience is running thin. I plan to remove the fantasia and head into the banquet.
我会采纳你的谏言，暂且退下吧，神礼官，回奥赫玛去。你也不想与那二人正面交锋，不是么？
I will heed your advice. Leave for now, Theoros, and go back to Okhema. You don't want to confront those two directly either, do you?
很遗憾，安提基色拉人不善饮酒。离席前，我愿以精神替代酒杯，敬您那无垠的野心。
It's a pity that Antikytherans are lightweights when it comes to drinking. Before I leave, I would like to make a toast to your boundless ambition using my spirit instead of a goblet.
果然。那神礼官的阴谋…昭然若揭。
As I expected... That Theoros's schemes have been revealed.
感谢二位英勇献身，我该解开幻境了。这是凯撒出征前的最后一次致辞，大抵也是令她回心转意的唯一机会。

Thank you for your bravery, guests. It's time for me to dispel the fantasia. This will be the Imperator's last public address before we head off and, therefore, likely the final chance to change her mind.
我会为你们争取献言的时机，也会做好准备以防不测…接下来，就看二位表现了。
I will try to get you a chance to speak, and I'll also prepare for any contingencies... The rest is up to you.
记忆的结晶必须要用凸透镜观看……
Memory Crystals must be examined with a convex lens...
…不不不好意思，刚才没认出是你。
...S—S—Sorry! I didn't realize it was you.
呃、呃呕…这蜜酿的劲…过得还真快。
Urk... This honey brew... sure wears off fast.
The Imperator! The Imperator has arrived!
不必多礼了。我因急务来迟，理应给各位赔情。
No need for formalities. I should be apologizing for my tardiness instead.
{RUBY_B#午夜}幕匿{RUBY_E#}将至，诸位也已酒过三巡，我便不再行那繁文缛节——凡与我共同征战过的勇士，早该对那些字句了然于胸。

{RUBY_B#Midnight}The hour{RUBY_E#} draws late, and I trust you have all had your fill of brews. Therefore, I will not observe the usual ceremonies. Any warrior who has fought by my side should have those speeches memorized by now.
你神志不清了吧，断锋爵？凯撒最讨厌溜须拍马之辈。
Are you out of your mind, Dux Fragoris? The Imperator hates flattery most of all.
呵，欢畅的气氛更能映衬出诸位的决心。我相信，法吉娜一役，众爵也定会和过去一样竭智尽力……
Hah, a joyous atmosphere is a better fit for showing me your resolve. I believe that you, my dukes, will do all you can to assist in the campaign against Phagousa, just as you always have...
只可惜，我从未验证各位的忠心。
However, it's a pity that I have never tested your loyalty.
因此，今日的晚宴不为鼓舞士气，而是为了确立同盟真正值得信赖的盟友——
The purpose of tonight's banquet is not to raise our morale, but to establish which allies our alliance can actually trust...
并斩下叛徒的头颅，为诸君作壮行的酒杯！
And sever the heads of the traitors as a toast to all before we march!
是啊，我们当中竟有人违弃誓言，酝酿着{M#他们}{F#她们}邪恶的阴谋！现在，听好了：这群叛徒就在光天化日之下，就在这场盛宴当中——
Yes... Some among us have discarded their vows in order to foment vile conspiracies. Now, listen! These traitors are standing right here in broad daylight...
<color=#dbc291ff>「剑旗爵」海瑟音——此人用海妖的歌谣令众人深陷幻觉，隐匿行踪。并伙同天外之人窃听机密，意图强夺火种，谋害凯撒！</color>

<color=#dbc291ff>Dux Gladiorum, Hysilens... She used the sea siren's song to immerse the crowds in an illusion and conceal her whereabouts. She then worked with those from beyond the sky to spy on confidential matters, hoping to rob the Coreflame by force and harm me, the Imperator!</color>
Now we're at a disadvantage again...
还记得吗？在我引荐下，此物主人曾在命运三相殿和诸位见过一面。
Do you remember who used to own this blade? She met you once, back at the Temple of the Three Fates.
清洗者之首凯妮斯：她是第一个将利刃刺向凯撒的人，亲身为我的敌人们做了表率。
It was Caenis, the head of the Cleaners. She was the first to draw a blade against the Imperator, and personally made herself an example for my enemies.
在橄榄树荫下，他们说奥赫玛绝不会臣服；在冰冷的死雾中，他们说哀地里亚绝不会臣服；在千门万径起点，他们说雅努萨波利斯绝不会臣服……

Under the shade of the olive groves, the people of Okhema said they would never bow to me. In the frozen lethal fog, the people of Aidonia said they would never bow to me. At the beginning of the myriad paths, the people of Janusopolis said they would never bow to me...
现在，他们无话可说。他们敬畏我如同敬畏律法：我就是刻律德菈，我就是凯撒——
But now, they all lie silent. They now fear me as they fear the law, for I am Cerydra, and I am the Imperator!
若你们还有遗言，便向凯撒悉数道来。
If you have any last words, say them to the Imperator...
「渡河之后，将是人世间的悲剧；但不渡河，则是自身的沦亡」……
"After I cross this river, it will be a tragedy for mankind. But if I do not cross, then it will be the end of me."
若你准备好了，我会随你抗争至最后一刻，「救世主」。
If you are ready, then I'll follow you and fight to the last, "Deliverer."
没有办法，我们只能刺杀凯撒。
We must kill the Imperator. There's no other way.
相信我！「捷径」已经连通了。
The "shortcut" is now open. Trust me!
现在，运用你的身份，再加入一点点经验和魅力…向凯撒证明吧，就像我们承诺的那样。
Now, use your identity, and add in a bit of experience and charm... and testify to the Imperator as we promised.
呵，妄图用唇枪舌剑代替弑君的尖刀么？
Hah. You think you can slay a king using your words instead of a sword?
可以！我倒要看看，天外的修辞学能有多少重量——是否比三条人命更加沉重？
I'll have it! Show me the weight of rhetoric from beyond the sky! Will it weigh heavier than three human lives?
从三千万世的抗争说起。
Start with the defiance that lasted thirty million cycles.
在我来到这里前…「负世」的黄金裔，是一位化名白厄的青年，他来自哀丽秘榭。
Before I arrived in this world... The Chrysos Heir of "Worldbearing" was a young man with the pseudonym of Phainon. He came from Aedes Elysiae.
为了和「再创世」的谎言抗争，让翁法罗斯免于「毁灭」的结局…他遍历三千多万次历史，只为在徒劳中找到突破口。

In order to combat the lies of the "Era Nova" and deliver Amphoreus from the ending of the Destruction... He lived through history more than thirty million times, hoping futilely to find a breakthrough.
你们所知的神谕，刻法勒口中的「再创世」…是来古士编造的，彻头彻尾的谎言。
The prophecy that you know of, the "Era Nova" spoken by Kephale... is nothing but a complete lie spun by Lygus.
为了与那谎言抗争…曾有一位化名白厄的青年踏上了三千多万次轮回，只为让翁法罗斯免于「毁灭」的结局。
To fight that lie... a young man with the pseudonym of Phainon lived through more than thirty million cycles of this world, all to save Amphoreus from the end of the Destruction.
而我身边的少女，昔涟…也同样肩负着沉重的宿命。
And Cyrene, the young woman standing beside me... also carries an equally heavy destiny.
刻律德菈聆听着你的述说，一言不发。
Cerydra listens to your words silently.
至于来古士，他根本不是你们的引路人。他不在乎翁法罗斯，更不可能在乎你们的荣誉和征程。
Lygus is not a guide at all. He doesn't care about Amphoreus, and cares even less about your glory and campaigns.
他唯一在乎的，就是把翁法罗斯的实验推进到底，让「铁墓」降临于世，彻底摧毁银河的秩序。
The only thing he cares about is completing the Amphorean experiment, making sure Irontomb is born into this world, and using it to utterly destroy the cosmic order.
「铁墓」…它是翁法罗斯命运的终点，行于「毁灭」命途的恐怖化身，根本不可能被驯服。
"Irontomb"... is the ultimate end of Amphoreus's destiny. It is an embodiment of pure horror that walks the Path of Destruction, and can never be tamed.
它是来古士唯一在乎的事物。翁法罗斯，你们的荣誉和征程…在他眼中根本不值一提。
That is the only thing Lygus cares about. As for Amphoreus? Your glory and campaigns? ...He doesn't care about any of those.
他一定会背叛你们——等到那时，我们所有人都会在「毁灭」中灰飞烟灭。
He will most certainly betray you. When that time comes, all of us will be ground to dust by the Destruction.
刻律德菈聆听着你的述说，面不改色。
Cerydra listens to your words and shows no change in emotion.
我行走在「开拓」的命途上。探索、了解、建立、连结…这是我和同伴始终遵守的信条。征服和毁灭，绝不是与它们架起桥梁的正道！

I walk the Path of the Trailblaze. My friends and I have always obeyed the creed of "explore, understand, establish, and connect"... Conquest and destruction are never the ways to build bridges between people!
我见证过许多美丽的世界。探索、了解、建立、连结，这是「开拓」选择的道路，今后也不会改变。我们还会继续旅行下去，团结整片银河。

I have seen many beautiful worlds. The road chosen by the Trailblaze is to explore, understand, establish, and connect. That will never change. We will continue our journey until we have united the entire cosmos.
所以，如果你选择了「毁灭」的道路……
Therefore, if you choose the way of the Destruction...
那我绝对会把你的野心，和来古士放在一起——用球棍砸个粉碎！
Then I'll place your ambitions into the same basket as Lygus, and smash them into pieces with my baseball bat!
当真…是一场混乱的演说啊。
That... was truly a chaotic speech.
All that needs to be said has been said.
断锋爵、冬霖爵，来！将背盟者押入地牢！
Dux Fragoris! Dux Brumalis! Escort the traitors to the prison!
今日{RUBY_B#黎明}门扉时{RUBY_E#}前，我便会给{M#他们}{F#她们}一个与叛逆相称的结局……
Before the next {RUBY_B#dawn}Entry Hour{RUBY_E#}, I will give them an end befitting of their betrayal...
凯撒大人，您的野心果然大过一切。
O Great Imperator, your ambition certainly eclipses all things.
当然。身为神礼观众，我切不可错过这一幕：见证一位无名之人的陨落。
Of course. As the Theoros, I simply cannot miss this moment: miss witnessing the fall of a nameless one.
或者，我在等待您给我一个答案：铁腕如您，何必多此一举……
Or perhaps, I am waiting for you to give me an answer. Why would someone as powerful as you...
妄图用「押送」这种拙劣的借口，保全「救世主」的安全？
...Use such a clumsy excuse as "imprisonment" to ensure the Deliverer's safety?
Hah. So you've finally tossed aside your act.
我必须指出：论演技之精湛，您也不遑多让。这场宴会从一开始就是您的布局……
I must point out that you are just as impressive an actor. This banquet was always going to be a game of chess...
只为制衡双边，意图将鄙人和{M#他们}{F#她们}都变作你手中的棋子。
Where you would try to control both sides and turn both them and me into your pawns.
Was all of this just a performance?
对。恐怕小凯撒从未信任任何人，自始至终她只想看看，究竟哪边能献上更多诚意……
That's right. That little Imperator never trusted anyone. She was always trying to see which side had more sincerity...
好啦好啦，会配合你的，给——请替我们转告凯撒：无论何时何地，她都可以信任{NICKNAME}。
Alright, alright. We'll listen to you. Here you go. Also, please pass on a message to the Imperator from us: She can trust {NICKNAME} anywhere, anytime.
但凯撒要做的选择…{NICKNAME}从无僭越之意。我们只想把知道的一切坦诚相告，毫无保留。
But as to the decision the Imperator must make... {NICKNAME} has no wish to transgress her authority. We just want to tell her everything we know.
现在，运用你的身份，再加入一点点经验和魅力…向凯撒证明吧，就像我们承诺的那样。
Now, use your identity, and add in a bit of experience and charm... and testify to the Imperator as we promised.
是我们赢了，「真诚」才是永远的捷径。
And we won. "Sincerity" will always remain the greatest shortcut to people's hearts.
倒是你，吕枯耳戈斯，明明拥有这般伟力，却要装作凡人，卑躬屈膝……
I can toss your words right back at you, Lycurgus. Why would someone as powerful as you pretend to be a mortal and kneel before me?
莫非，阿谀奉承是你的癖好不成？
...Unless you enjoy giving flattery and prostrating yourself?
您误会了。我只是力求实验自主、缜密、完美，避免节外生枝。暴力干涉只会扩大误差，低效，而又丑陋。

You are mistaken. I am only trying to ensure the experiment's autonomy, meticulousness, and perfection, thus avoiding any unexpected outcomes. A forceful intervention will only create larger errors, reduce efficiency, and introduce ugliness.
若您遵守盟约，将「律法」移交于我，并按部就班地完成「再创世」，翁法罗斯本不会偏离命运的正轨……
Had you fulfilled your promise of giving the "Law" to me and completing the "Era Nova," then Amphoreus would not have deviated from destiny's course...
但很可惜，您失约了。因此，身为管理者，我将履行义务，肃清一切失控的因素。
But you broke your promise. What a pity. In that case, I must carry out my duty as the administrator and eradicate all factors steering the experiment out of control.
什么？这声音…是{RUBY_B#岁月之泰坦}欧洛尼斯{RUBY_E#}？
What was that voice? Was it... {RUBY_B#Time Titan}Oronyx{RUBY_E#}?
I found you. I finally found you...
Be careful... This land... will face disaster...
审判之时已至。{NICKNAME}阁下，我为您建设的监牢已经竣工……
The time of judgment is nigh. My {M#lord}{F#lady} {NICKNAME}, the prison I have built for you is now complete...
<color=#dbc291ff>以「智识」之名，我将邀请您——步入与我相同的囚笼。</color>
<color=#dbc291ff>In the name of the Erudition, I invite you to step into the same cage as mine.</color>
别忘了，我的王朝只允许「人」的存在……
Don't forget. My realm only allows for the existence of "humanity."
至于动用私刑——更是视同颠覆「律法」，罪该万死。
Moreover, dealing out extrajudicial punishment equates to defying the "Law," and the culprit is to be sentenced to death.
但，您看到了：只需一次简单的合掌，我便能将生命于这世间抹除……
But you have seen how I can erase life from this world with just a clap of my hands.
您仍然没能看清自己的立场。请容我重申——
I fear you are still quite unaware of your current situation. Allow me to reiterate...
我给予您的选择，简截了当：合作，或是毁灭，再无其他。
I am giving you a simple choice: To collaborate or to be destroyed. There is no other way.
大言不惭。倘若你能，何不早早杀之后快？
Shameless behavior. If that were true, you would have killed me long ago.
因为你做不到。第一次斩下你的头颅时，我便早有预料：出于{RUBY_B#<color=#dbc291ff>终极协议</color>}<color=#dbc291ff>「律法」</color>{RUBY_E#}，黄金裔无法将你彻底消灭，反之亦然。

You, in fact, cannot kill me. I guessed it the first time I beheaded you: Because of the {RUBY_B#<color=#dbc291ff>Ultimate Protocol</color>}<color=#dbc291ff>"Law,"</color>{RUBY_E#} you cannot be completely destroyed, and the same is true of the Chrysos Heirs.
现在，你越是虚张声势，便越能印证这一事实。
The more you bluff now, the more you are proving that conjecture to be true.
卓越的眼界。我曾将您这宝贵的品质视作我必胜的信号。但如今，我不得不承认自己的错误——
What magnificent foresight. I once regarded this precious quality of yours as a sure sign of my ultimate victory, but now I have to admit that I made a mistake.
区区凡人，要如何才能与「神礼观众」抗衡？
Yet, as a mere mortal, how will you contend against the Theoros?
你我皆是傲慢的俘虏。但吕枯耳戈斯，知道我们的区别在哪吗？我不会因傲慢变得盲目。
We are both slaves to hubris, but do you know what differentiates us, Lycurgus? I will never be blinded by my pride.
If I wish to break the scales' balance...
I only need to appeal to external forces and use them for my own ends.
终于见到真家伙了啊，*前辈*。
Finally, we get to meet face-to-face... Senior Society Member.
为您过去达成的诸多成就，我向您致敬；但对于您当下的立场，我深表遗憾。
I offer sincere acknowledgements for your many past achievements, but I must deeply regret your current perspective.
请相信我，螺丝咕姆。此时此刻，深感遗憾的不止你一人。
Trust me when I say that you aren't the only one feeling regret right now, Screwllum.
看来，你二人就是救世主索求「律法」神权的原因，{M#他}{F#她}口中的天外盟友。
So you two are the allies from beyond the sky the Deliverer spoke of, and why {F#s}he demanded the divine authority of "Law."
来吧，证明你们的实力：让我见识所谓「命途」的力量。我费心尽力将这天外奇珍收入囊中，正是为了这一刻。
Come and prove your strength to me. Show me the power of these so-called "Paths." I have spent much time and effort to secure this treasure from beyond the sky just for this moment.
以螺丝星君主之名：您的盟友响应召唤而来，尊贵的凯撒。
In the name of the sovereign of Planet Screwllum, your allies have responded to your call, esteemed Imperator.
来古士阁下，请允许我指出：现在，{RUBY_B#「律法」}终极协议{RUBY_E#}的{RUBY_B#火种}读取权限{RUBY_E#}已在我们手中，掌握{RUBY_B#神权}写入与执行权限{RUBY_E#}只是时间问题。

Please allow me to spell the situation out for you, Lord Lygus: {RUBY_B#Coreflame}Permission to read{RUBY_E#} the {RUBY_B#"Law"}Ultimate Protocol{RUBY_E#} is already in my hands. It'll only be a matter of time before we acquire the {RUBY_B#Divine Authority}authority to write and execute commands{RUBY_E#} as well.
在你撕破脸皮后，逐火之旅也不可能进行下去了。你觉得自己还有赢面吗——看在俱乐部的份上，别让事情变得太难看。
There's no way the Flame-Chase Journey will continue after you've burnt your bridges so thoroughly like this. Do you really think you can still win? ...Seriously, don't embarrass the Society.
我明白：几乎必然并非必然。对我而言，它相当具有说服力……
I understand that a near-zero possibility does not equate to zero. That argument is very persuasive to me.
所以，同袍们，此原理对你们也同样适用。
Which means... the same principle also applies to you, my dear peers.
在十四行代数式构筑的世界展开攻防，你们不可能是我的对手；而至于「再创世」……
You will never be a match for me in a world constructed through quatorzain algebraic expressions. And as for the Era Nova...
试想这样一种可能性：若我将奥赫玛夷为平地，将她的人民碾作死灰，列位英雄又是否会重新觊觎半神的力量，以便与我相抗？

Why don't you entertain this possibility? What if I reduced Okhema to rubble and ground her people into minced meat? Would the heroes then once again desire the power of demigods, so they could fight against me?
听好：铁墓必将诞生。要想让「毁灭」降临，纵使身负枷锁，我也有千般方法……
Listen: Irontomb is fated to be born. You may shackle me and put me in chains, but I have thousands of ways to ensure the Destruction's descent...
而我方才所述，仅是千分之一。
And what I just mentioned is only one out of those thousands.
还有歌声呢！气氛真浪漫。
And I can even hear singing! It feels so romantic.
明明是宴会的主角，刻律德菈却不在吗？
Isn't Cerydra supposed to be the focus of the banquet? But she's not even here.
想和她说上几句话，真是困难重重呀……
Why is it so difficult to talk to her...
不过，到处都是人群。即便凯撒来了，我们也找不着她……
Actually, there are so many people... We wouldn't be able to find the Imperator even if she were here.
…有了，留意下附近有没有被垫高的座位吧。
...I know. Let's look for seats that are raised up higher than others.
等仗打完，我们就结婚吧！
Let's get married after the war's over!
Then you've got to come back alive!
That was a bit too much honey brew...
My head's so dizzy. Can you even get drunk on fruit juice?
You wanna go show off some moves?
饶了我吧，明天还要行军呢。
Spare me... We're marching to war tomorrow.
讨伐泰坦…真的有必要吗？
Is it... really necessary to campaign against the Titans?
喝蜜酿吧，小心别人听见。
Just drink your honey brew and make sure no one heard that.
Don't you feel a bit cold?
It's 'cause you haven't had enough honey brew.
请来这里，与我共享海底的奇珍吧。
Please come over and share the delicacies of the deep sea with me.
是…紧张刺激的卧底环节…！
It's... the exciting and thrilling undercover part of the adventure!
You should head back to your seats for now.
剑旗爵仍在吟唱迷人的歌声，若无她递来的佳酿，你们也会如周遭的宴客一样，沉在歌喉与舌华的浪里。
Dux Gladiorum still sings her bewitching tune. Without the fine wine she offered, you might have drowned in the tide of her honeyed voice, just like the rest of the guests.
（气氛似乎和上次不太一样，该怎么回去……）
(This doesn't feel the same as before. How should I get back...?)
自上次分别过后，我便着手将「神话之外」改造为专属于您的「观众席」。现在，您可以于此静待翁法罗斯的终幕上演了。
Since we parted ways last time, I have modified the Exomyth into an "audience area" exclusive to you. Now, you'll be able to silently wait here for the final act of Amphoreus to begin.
我理解您的愤怒，但恕我不能容许阁下继续影响演算的进程。
I understand your anger, but I cannot allow you to continuously influence the extrapolation's progress.
呵呵，看来您已经忘记了…在此处，我们无法对彼此出手。
Heh, it seems you have already forgotten... We can't hurt each other in this place.
I'm the player! Not the audience!
在命运面前，我们总会身不由己，不是么？
We always feel so powerless before fate, don't we?
对您而言，这或许是一个绝佳的机会：以观众的视角，从更为宏观的角度观察「智识」的运作。
This could in fact be a wonderful opportunity for you. From the audience's perspective, you may better observe the workings of the Erudition at a macroscopic level.
<color=#dbc291ff>在这片时间流速远慢于世界内部的空间，您将亲眼见证翁法罗斯的史诗…步入尾声。</color>
<color=#dbc291ff>In this place, where time flows far slower than within Amphoreus, you will witness... the end of that world's saga.</color>
Where time flows... slower than within Amphoreus?
没错。此地的时间流速，无限接近于你熟悉的现实宇宙。
Indeed. The speed of time here is infinitesimally close to that of the real universe you're familiar with.
我一定会想到办法出去的。
I'll definitely find a way out of here.
啊，我不怀疑您创造奇迹的能力。
Oh, I am not doubting your capacity to create miracles.
有关「生命第一因」的解答，以及……
The answer concerning "the prime mover of life," and...
Aren't you an Emanator of Erudition?
阁下将我视为祂忠诚的信徒，对么？
Do you see me as THEIR faithful disciple?
实则不然。<color=#dbc291ff>我竭心尽力促成铁墓的诞生，只为纠正「智识」这一由人亲手造就的错谬。</color>
I am certainly not. <color=#dbc291ff>I have tried so hard to ensure Irontomb's birth, just so that I can correct the error named "Erudition" that humanity crafted with their own hands.</color>
我无比怀念。在博识尊尚未诞生的年代，知识的边界就像星空，令人心驰神往，欢呼雀跃。
How I yearn to return to those days before Nous was born. Back then, the boundaries of knowledge were like the starry skies, evoking feelings of longing and delight among humankind.
可如今，「真理」二字成了觐见祂的祭品，天才会说：博识尊早已知晓。
But now... "truth" has become the sacrificial offering required to gain an audience with THEM, and the geniuses would say that Nous already knew.
那傲慢的星神，从人类求知的原动力中诞生，却亲手封锁了凡人求知的道途。我要做的，不过是砍倒一棵被我等种下的祸世之树。

That arrogant Aeon was born from the Primum Mobile of humans' desire for knowledge, yet THEY THEMSELF sealed off humanity's capacity to seek enlightenment. I am simply cutting down a tree of doom that we planted ourselves.
我必须承认，为您解惑的过程…总能令我回忆起年少求学的快意时光。但很遗憾，此刻，在翁法罗斯内部，我的正身…不得不下场应对因您而起的「意外」。

I must admit that the process of answering your questions has... reminded me of the happy days of learning in my youth. However, it is a pity that my true form must now descend into Amphoreus to deal with the "accident" that arose because of you.
不过，无需等待太久。待到落幕时分，您一定能理解我与翁法罗斯的心愿。
But you won't have to wait long. When the curtain falls, you'll surely understand mine and Amphoreus's ardent wish.
（「时间流速慢于翁法罗斯」…？如果来古士没有撒谎，那留给我的时间不多了。）
("Where time flows slower than within Amphoreus..."? If Lygus spoke the truth, then I don't have much time left.)
(But... how can I get out of here?)
这智械哥百密一疏，终于让我和螺丝抓住机会了。
That old Intellitron overlooked one little detail, and Screwy and I finally found an opportunity.
长话短说吧，你不在的这段时间——对于翁法罗斯而言的「这几年」里……
Let's keep it short. While you were gone... well, in those few years, Amphoreus...
时间膨胀、流速不统一什么的…你不是已经知道了么？
Yes. Time dilation, resulting in an uneven flow... Don't you know this already?
接着说重点。黄金裔们启动了识刻锚，帮我和螺丝咕姆打开了「防火墙」的口子。我们临时做了点操作，让他没办法出手，但也只是暂时的——

Let's stick to the main points. The Chrysos Heirs activated the Chronocognitive Anchor and helped Screwllum and me open a hole in the "firewall." We made some adjustments, so he can't attack us immediately, but it won't hold for long...
<color=#eb4d3dff>已锁定异常数据。确认为非法通信，开始处理……</color>
<color=#eb4d3dff>[Abnormal data, locked on. Unauthorized communication, confirmed. Initiating response...]</color>
啧。时间不多了，直接说结论……
Tch. Time is running out. Here's the conclusion...
直到黄金裔们完全掌握「律法」前，我和螺丝要想彻底攻破这座牢笼，恐怕还得花上相当久的时间……
It'll probably take a long time for Screwy and me to completely break this cage before the Chrysos Heirs have a full grasp of the "Law"...
保险起见：我们会持续进行旁道攻击，给你创造逃生机会；而你得抓住机会，动起来，自己想办法来个漂亮的越狱。

To be safe, we'll continue to launch side-channel attacks on the system to give you opportunities to escape. You need to seize these opportunities. Now, start moving and find a way to pull off a magnificent jailbreak.
So... how should I do that?
我们感知到…另一条…命途…的影响……
<color=#eb4d3dff>传输信道解析完毕，正在切断非法通信……</color>
<color=#eb4d3dff>[Communication channel analysis completed. Terminating unauthorized communication...]</color>
力量…相当强大…它也许能帮你……
Its power... is strong... may be able... to help...
用命途的力量…让它感知到……
Use the Path's power... Make it detect you...
（黑塔的意思是…某个派系来到了翁法罗斯，可以向他们求救吗？）
(Is Herta saying... a certain Path's faction has arrived in Amphoreus, and I can ask them for help?)
（在过去的旅途中，我掌握了不同的命途力量…好好想想，来到翁法罗斯的到底是什么势力…该用哪一种命途的力量呼唤援助……）

(I mastered the powers of different Paths in my previous journeys... Think hard, and figure out exactly which faction has arrived at Amphoreus... and which Path's power I should use to call for reinforcements...)
（这里呈现的…是我过去的记忆吗？）
（体内拥有星核的我，在空间站「黑塔」苏醒，得到了「毁灭」的力量……）
(With a Stellaron in my body, I woke up at the Herta Space Station and gained the power of the Destruction...)
（一个诞育绝灭大君的世界，一定会引来「毁灭」的关注，我肚子里的星核有大用咯。）
(A world that'll give rise to a Lord Ravager would definitely draw the attention of the Destruction. The Stellaron in my belly is gonna be super useful~)
（…但要是叫来反物质军团和泯灭帮，真的能帮上忙吗？）
(...But what if I end up pulling in the Antimatter Legion or the Annihilation Gang? Can they really help?)
Focus and resonate with the Destruction.
纳努克！借我火焰烧穿监牢。
Nanook! Lend me flames hot enough to burn through this jail!
你集中精神，尝试令心跳的节奏与那簇金焰窜动的频率共振……

I'll tell you the story of this thousand-year journey. That way, it won't just be my memories alone.
时光飞逝，距离「救世主」遭逢意外，已经过去了两百年啊……
Time flies. Two hundred years have passed since the Deliverer's fall...
为了阻止来古士，*我们*不得不归还了「律法」、「浪漫」、「海洋」三枚火种，可即便如此……
We had to return three Coreflames of Law, Romance, and Ocean to stop Lygus. But even so...
荒笛已经陨落，两位天才杳无音信，刻律德菈也拥抱了她的命运，这样下去……
Terravox has fallen, the two geniuses vanished without a trace, and Cerydra embraced her fate... At this rate...
「再创世」一定会到来，令翁法罗斯坠入「毁灭」。
"Era Nova" will come, and Amphoreus will fall into the Destruction.
看来，改写结局的关键，还是回到了「负世」的火种。
It seems the key to rewriting the end once again lies in the Coreflame of Worldbearing.
依照两位天才留下的指示，我们无论如何都要把它传到{RUBY_B#救世主}{NICKNAME}{RUBY_E#}手里。
According to the instructions left behind by those two geniuses, we must get it into {RUBY_B#Deliverer}{NICKNAME}{RUBY_E#}'s hands, no matter the cost.
不仅要找到藏匿火种的方法，还要从来古士手中争取足够多的时间……
We need to find a way to hide the Coreflame, and we must buy enough time to keep Lygus at bay...
关于这件事，小涟有个好消息。
About that... Reney might have some good news.
<color=#dbc291ff>昨晚，她又做了那个梦。在梦里，泰坦的声音前所未有地清晰……</color>
<color=#dbc291ff>She had that dream again last night, but the Titan's voice was clearer than ever this time...</color>
<color=#dbc291ff>She said: Pass the flame into the future.</color>
这是欧洛尼斯的神谕？这一次，她选择站在人类这边，藏匿一位同胞的火种？
Is that a prophecy from Oronyx? She chose to side with humanity this time and hide one of her kin's Coreflames?
…看来翁法罗斯的命运，确实未到收梢之时。
...It seems Amphoreus' fate isn't sealed just yet.
是啊。历史已经改变了，无论人类，还是泰坦，都愿意为了世界的存续拼尽全力。
You're right. History has changed. Humans and Titans are both giving their all to keep this world going.
冥冥之中，一场跨越纪元的漫长接力，或许就要开始了啊。
Perhaps a relay across the ages is finally about to begin somewhere out there.
可惜，生活永远不会一帆风顺。拉冬军队已经兵临城下，他们的领头人……
Unfortunately, life will never go smoothly. Ladon's army is already at our gates, and their commander...
那个吕枯耳戈斯，他现在就在奥赫玛门前。
That Lycurgus... he's right outside Okhema.
「光历<unbreak>3960</unbreak>年，刻律德菈以出征法吉娜为由，献祭五百名黄金裔的性命，完成『律法』试炼。这一惨剧震动了整个翁法罗斯。」

"Light Calendar <unbreak>3960</unbreak>. Cerydra, under the pretense of a campaign against Phagousa, sacrificed <unbreak>500</unbreak> Chrysos Heirs to complete the Trial of Law. This tragedy shook everyone in Amphoreus."
「同年，『凯撒』刻律德菈遇刺身亡，『金织』阿格莱雅接过统领职责。人类的第二次逐火之旅，在摇摇欲坠中开启。」
"That same year, Cerydra the Imperator was assassinated, after which Aglaea the Goldweaver took command. Thus began humanity's second Flame-Chase Journey, a path hanging by a thread."
云石天宫沦为废墟，许多凡人因你们的顽抗白白丧生。
The Marmoreal Palace lies in ruins. Countless mortals have perished because of your stubborn resistance.
是时候看清拒绝的代价了。现在，重新回答我的问题……
It's time you learned the cost of refusal. Now, answer my question again...
刻法勒的火种身在何处？
你觉得将圣城夷为平地，就可以找到它么？我看…你只能徒然落得一身尘灰。
You really think you'll find it by razing the holy city to the ground? From what I see... all you'll get is dust and disappointment.
别忘记，出于「律法」…你也无法杀死预言中的黄金裔。
Don't forget... You can't kill the Chrysos Heirs mentioned in the prophecy because of Law.
所以，我只能寄希望于奥赫玛虔诚的公民，希望他们能在各位的哀嚎声中，为我献上答案。
Which is why I now place my hope in the faithful citizens of Okhema. Perhaps they'll give me what I seek in the echo of your screams.
接下来，鄙人要将诸位的胸膛剖开，用滚烫的金血为人们施以洗礼，请容我先行致歉——就从你开始，昏盲的「金织」女士。
Now then, I'll be cutting open your chests and using your scalding golden blood to baptize the masses. Allow me to apologize in advance. We shall start with you, blind and foolish Lady Goldweaver.
这里交给我，阿格莱雅女士，快离开……
Leave this to me, Lady Aglaea. You must get away now...
不，圣女。该留下来的人是我。
No, Holy Maiden. I'm the one who must stay.
他的阴谋不会得逞，因为「浪漫」将要兑现诺言，为翁法罗斯编织一袭坚不可摧的战袍……
His conspiracy won't succeed, because Romance is ready to make good on their promise to weave an indestructible armor for Amphoreus...
它的名字是「团结」。你要全身而退，将我的死讯带给仍在抗争的战士，与他们一同继续前行。
Its name is "solidarity." You must escape with your life and carry word of my death to those still fighting, then keep going with them.
正如凯撒以死点燃了抗争的火炬，我的离去会让这一簇火苗永不凋零。
Just as the Imperator lit the torch of resistance with her death, my passing will make this flame everlasting.
呵护好它，把它带向未来…交给我们的「救世主」吧。
Take good care of it, guide it to the future, and place it into the hands of our "Deliverer."
「…五十年后，来古士再次率军进攻奥赫玛。他单刀直入圣城，摧毁云石天宫，世人称之为『第三次奥赫玛围城战』。」
"Fifty years later, Lygus led his forces once again to Okhema. He charged directly into the holy city and razed the Marmoreal Palace. History would name this battle 'The Third Siege of Okhema'."
「这场战役中，共有九万青壮为奥赫玛英勇就义，其中也包括他们无畏的领袖——阿格莱雅。」
"Ninety thousand brave souls gave their lives for Okhema that day, including their fearless leader, Aglaea."
小蝶已经下定决心。*我们*也不能辜负她的觉悟。
Since Cas has made up her mind, we can't let her resolve be in vain.
可是，留在奥赫玛等死，和去斯缇科西亚等死有什么区别？
But between staying in Okhema and going to Styxia... What difference does it make when it's death either way!
我反对<color=#dbc291ff>迁都</color>。奥赫玛有{RUBY_B#黎明机器}刻法勒{RUBY_E#}的庇佑，不比那死城安全多了？
I'm against <color=#dbc291ff>relocating</color>. With {RUBY_B#Dawn Device}Kephale{RUBY_E#}'s protection, isn't Okhema far safer than that dead city?
小蝶的计划里，可没有「迁都」这一说哦。
Cas's plan doesn't involve any "relocation" at all.
就像你说的，奥赫玛是人类的庇护所。*我们*从没打算让大家搬到斯缇科西亚去……
Like you said, Okhema is humanity's refuge. We never intended to get everyone moving to Styxia...
为「救世主」准备最后的底牌，靠小蝶、我、海瑟音三个人就够啦。
It's just on Cas, Hysilens, and me to prepare the final trump card for the Deliverer.
啊？什么底牌这么神，要你们三个半神一块儿把自己赔进去？
Wait. What kind of trump card needs all three of you demigods to throw yourselves away?
我们要铺好未来的道路，确保「救世主」回来后，能平安抵达「再创世」的场所。
We must lay down the path to the future so when the "Deliverer" returns, they'll have a clear road to reach the location of "Era Nova".
斯缇科西亚是死亡与海洋交汇的城邦。在那里，结合「海洋」和「门径」的权能，*我们*就能创造出一条通往创世涡心的洋流……
Styxia sits where death meets the ocean. There, with the combined powers of Ocean and Passage, we can summon a current that leads to the Vortex of Genesis...
而「死亡」的半神会永远看护这条密道，直到{RUBY_B#救世主}{NICKNAME}{RUBY_E#}归来。
And the Demigod of Death will forever guard that secret path until {RUBY_B#Deliverer}{NICKNAME}{RUBY_E#} returns.
谁都知道，来古士一定会把创世涡心当作目标。
We all know Lygus will set his sights on the Vortex of Genesis.
正因如此，*我们*才必须这么做。
That's exactly why we have to do this.
到底是哀地里亚的督战圣女，比我想象中有魄力多了。
Guess I underestimated Aidonia's Maiden of War. She's got way more steel than I thought.
以及，赛飞儿，*我们*希望你尽快去一趟悬锋城。不管用什么方法，一定要和「纷争」结成同盟。
And Cipher, we need you to head to Castrum Kremnos as soon as possible. By any means necessary, forge an alliance with Strife.
预言中的王储已经诞生。他将成为奥赫玛新的捍卫者，在我们离去后继续守护这片土地。
The prophesied crown prince has already been born. He shall become the new defender of Okhema, protecting this land after we leave.
关于这个，倒是不用担心……
You don't need to worry about that...
我就是从悬锋城回来的，只是比消息快了一步。
I just came back from Castrum Kremnos, only a step ahead of the news.
缇宝，有什么东西正在朝奥赫玛飞来，特别特别快——
Tribbie, something's flying towards Okhema, and it's really fast...
是悬锋人，他们的王已经来了。
It's the Kremnoans. Their king's already here.
「在缇里西庇俄丝、赛法利娅两位半神庇护下，奥赫玛挺过连番施压，但也逐渐难以为继。遐蝶决定将斯缇科西亚作为最后手段，遂完成『死亡』试炼，令淤滞的冥河尽数退去。」

"With the protection of the demigods Tribios and Cifera, Okhema endured wave after wave of warfare, though just barely. Castorice chose Styxia as the last resort and completed the Trial of Death, causing the stagnant waters in the River of Souls to recede."
「随后，缇里西庇俄丝踏上远行。同年，悬锋王欧利庞携王子迈德漠斯加入同盟，投身救世之战，为圣城保驾护航。」

"Soon after, Tribios departed on a long journey. That same year, the Kremnoan king Eurypon, along with his son, prince Mydeimos, joined the alliance to safeguard the holy city in the battle of deliverance."
B—But... it's gonna hurt! A lot!
痛苦会带来漫长的折磨，但它绝无可能摧毁我。
Pain brings endless torment, but it can never destroy me.
我相信，当*你*跨越万径之门，跃下悬崖时，一定怀抱着同样的想法。
I believe that you were thinking the same thing when you stepped through the Gate of Infinity and jumped off that cliff.
就现状而言，这也是奥赫玛拥有的唯一选择。照我说的做吧……
In the current situation, this is the only path Okhema has left. Just do as I say...
<color=#dbc291ff>将我的灵魂裂成五份，为我打造不朽的躯壳……</color>
<color=#dbc291ff>Split my soul into five pieces, forge me an immortal vessel...</color>
<color=#dbc291ff>令「纷争」的锋刃永远高悬，同它的敌人厮杀到世界尽头！</color>
<color=#dbc291ff>Let the blade of Strife hang forever overhead, locked in battle with their enemies to the world's bitter end!</color>
不必忧伤，缇里西庇俄丝女士。我们已向那预言中的明天前进许多了，不是么？
There is no need to be sad, Lady Tribios. Haven't we already taken great strides towards that promised tomorrow?
这一世，我的族人不必再沉沦于虚伪的指引。悬锋的命运已经洗去血污。
In this life, my people no longer have to drown in false guidance. Kremnos has washed the blood off its fate.
翁法罗斯不再需要名为「纷争」的神。所以，也让我砸毁旧律，令「天谴之矛」重新变作捍卫世界的武器吧。
Amphoreus no longer needs a god named Strife. So let me shatter the former laws and turn the Lance of Fury back into a weapon that protects the world.
另外，能再帮我一个忙么？
By the way, can you do me another favor?
神悟树庭七贤人已踏上行程，不日将逐批抵达，投身抵抗事业。在他们中，有一位名叫阿那克萨戈拉斯的学者……
The Seven Sages from Grove of Epiphany are already en route. They'll arrive in waves to join the resistance in a couple of days. Among them is a scholar named Anaxagoras...
此人眼界超凡，无畏牺牲。这场「裂魂仪式」不仅是我的决断，更源于他的谏言。他的智谋必将成为翁法罗斯存续的中坚力量——
He has extraordinary insight and fears no sacrifice. This Soul-Rending Ceremony wasn't just my decision. It was his counsel. His wisdom will surely be the backbone of Amphoreus' survival.
照看好他。然后，代我将这不熄的烈火传递下去。
Watch over him. Carry on this everlasting flame for me.
「经由阿那克萨戈拉斯的仪式，『纷争』半神将自己的灵魂分为荣耀、勇气、坚韧、牺牲、理性五份，封入血晶，投身战场……」
"Through Anaxagoras's ritual, the Demigod of Strife split his soul into five: Courage, Honor, Tenacity, Sacrifice, and Reason, each sealed in blood crystal and cast into battle."
「世人为神王的陨落举行了为期十日的盛大葬礼，而他用牺牲——为人类换来了两百年和平的时光。」
"The people held a ten-day funeral to mourn their fallen God-King. And through his sacrifice, humanity was granted two hundred years of peace."
真没想到，最后的布局要你我联手完成。
Never thought we'd be the pair to finish this final setup.
要捉住那铁皮人，没你的小把戏可不行。况且，这是咱们最后的机会了，没什么可挑剔的，是吧？
Can't catch that Tin Man without your little sleights. Besides, this is our last shot. Not the time to be picky, right?
别把事情想太简单，来古士刚发现奥赫玛过去五十年都是座空城，想必一定气急败坏，什么事都做得出来。
Don't oversimplify it. Lygus just found out Okhema's been an empty shell for the past fifty years. He's bound to be furious. At this rate, he could've done anything.
哈，要的就是这个！愤怒能蒙蔽人的双眼，管他是什么「天才」，道理同样适用。等他深入议院，和我对峙的时候……

Ha, that's exactly what we want! Rage blinds even the brightest minds. Doesn't matter how much of a genius he is, the principle still holds. Once he storms into the Council and confronts me head-on...
你就「嘭」地发动炼金术，把他变成笼中困兽。
You trigger your alchemy with a BOOM and turn him into a caged beast.
且不论你要如何把自己伪装成「救世主」，还不能让任何人发现……
Easier said than done. You still have to pass yourself off as the Deliverer without anyone catching on...
妄想用人类的炼成阵，囚禁堪比神明的存在？痴人说梦。
And you really think a human alchemical array can bind a godlike being? That's just nonsense.
你是怂了，还是不相信「诡计」半神的含金量？
What, getting cold feet? Or you just don't believe in the almighty worth of the demigod of Trickery?
简单点，直接告诉我：能不能做到？
Just tell me straight: can you do it or not?
Hmph. Of course I can. And it'll be child's play.
但有两个附加条件。这是最后一战，要做就做绝，别留余地。
But I've got two conditions. Since this is the final act, if we're doing it, we go all in. No half-measures.
一、把战场移动到创世涡心，于情于理，{NICKNAME}出现在那边都更有说服力。
First, shift the battlefield to the Vortex of Genesis. It would be more convincing if {NICKNAME} were to appear there.
而且，涡心本就是与世隔绝的禁地——换句话说，全翁法罗斯最适合当监狱的地方。
Besides, the Vortex is cut off from the world. No place in Amphoreus makes a better prison.
你来这么一出，咱们的「救世主」回来后，不就必须和来古士正面对决了？
If you pull that, wouldn't our Deliverer have to face tank Lygus as soon as they come back?
这一战本就不可避免，我们只能为{M#他}{F#她}创造更多机会，而这正是第二个条件……
That clash is inevitable. All we can do is create more chances for {M#him.}{F#her.} And that's the second condition...
还记得么？涡心本就归{RUBY_B#海洋之泰坦}法吉娜{RUBY_E#}所有，而世上为数不多的幸存者里，恰好还有一位「海洋」的半神。
The Vortex belongs to {RUBY_B#Ocean Titan}Phagousa{RUBY_E#} in the first place, remember? And there happens to be a Demigod of Ocean among the few survivors in the world.
<color=#dbc291ff>把计划告诉海瑟音，让她也加入战局。我会提前将自己炼成贤者之石，写入术式……</color>
<color=#dbc291ff>Loop Hysilens in. Let her join the final act. I'll transmute myself into a Philosopher's Stone and embed myself into the formula...</color>
<color=#dbc291ff>届时，她要将我打碎，将尘砂撒入涡心的海洋。</color>
<color=#dbc291ff>And when the time comes, she needs to shatter me and scatter that stone's ashes into the ocean within the Vortex.</color>
…呵，树庭男孩，人们都说你疯，我看这话一点不假。
...Heh. I guess people weren't wrong when they said you're insane, Grove boy.
要算计一位避世的天才，我确实没有头绪；但想叫一个安提基色拉人受苦，「理性」的半神可有一万种方法。
I've got no idea how to outwit a reclusive genius... But making an Antikytheran suffer? The Demigod of Reason has ten thousand ways to do just that.
而我方才所述，仅是万分之一。
And what I just mentioned was one of them.
所以，你的术式到底有什么效果？
So what exactly does your formula do?
这可是剧目的最高潮，怎能轻易泄底？
Now that would spoil the climax, wouldn't it?
掐指一算，风堇也该完成天空一族的仪式了。
By now, Hyacine must've completed the Sky people's ritual.
既然那神礼观众和我一样喜好表演，就叫他好好期待你我献上的剧目吧——
Since that Theoros loves a good performance as much as I do, let's make sure he enjoys our show to the fullest.
至于那「救世主」要如何完成「再创世」，就不是我们需要操心的事了。
As for how the "Deliverer" will complete the "Era Nova"... well, that will no longer be our concern.
「那是世人所知的最后一战，由两名不善争斗的半神发起。」
"It was the last battle known to the world, initiated by two demigods least suited for war."
「而后，『理性』和『诡计』兑现了承诺。他们以生命为代价，将来古士封印于创世涡心，直至今日。」
"In the end, Reason and Trickery kept their word. At the cost of their lives, they sealed Lygus within the Vortex of Genesis, where he remains to this day."
「奥赫玛将永远屹立」…赛飞儿小姐的谎言，终究还是破灭了呀。
"Okhema will stand eternal." Miss Cipher's lie has crumbled after all...
但没关系。至此，我们所有人都完成了使命……
But it's alright. Because all of us have fulfilled our purpose by now...
等到「救世主」归来的那一天。无论{M#他}{F#她}身在何方，「天空」都会放晴，架起彩虹的桥梁，护送{M#他}{F#她}去往最后的战场。
When the Deliverer returns, no matter where {F#s}he is, Sky will turn clear and a rainbow bridge will rise, carrying {M#him}{F#her} to the final battleground.
涟宝，漫长的接力终于来到了尾声，命运的最后一棒，就交给你啦？
Cyrie, this arduous relay is finally nearing its end. Now I'm passing the final baton of fate to you, okay?
毕竟，这段旅途最初的星星之火，就是你和{NICKNAME}带来的呀。
After all, it was you and {NICKNAME} who lit the first spark of this journey, wasn't it?
我会把这一千年的故事都讲给你听。这样一来，它们就不再是我一个人的回忆。
I'll tell you the story of this thousand-year journey. That way, it won't just be my memories alone.
同样地，我会把和{NICKNAME}一同经历的时光讲给每个人听。这样一来，我们走过的路就会成为所有人的记忆。
And I'll share the moments I spent with {NICKNAME} with everyone. That way, the path we walked becomes a memory shared by all.
人们会知道，不必再去追逐什么，翁法罗斯早已迎来神谕中的{RUBY_B#天外的救世主}黎明{RUBY_E#}。
People will know that there's nothing left to chase. Amphoreus has already welcomed the {RUBY_B#Deliverer beyond the sky}dawn{RUBY_E#} foretold in prophecy.
就像人家说的一样，不会比上一次更难，对吧？
Just like I said, this should be easier than last time, right?
Thank you. You've all sacrificed so much.
我绝不会辜负大家的信念。
I won't let everyone's faith in me go to waste.
此时此刻，{NICKNAME}会露出怎样的表情呢？肯定和以前一样，从容、坚定，充满自信吧？
I wonder what kind of expression is {NICKNAME} is wearing right now? Probably the same as always: calm, resolute, and brimming with confidence.
如果有机会，人家也想再看一次呢。
If I have the chance... I'd love to see it again.
因为距离我们分别，真的…过去太久啦。
Because... it's really been far too long since we parted.
聪明如{NICKNAME}，走到这里，一定已经发现了吧？——这里不是现实，而是一道「岁月」的迷宫。
Someone as sharp as {NICKNAME} must've realized by now that this isn't reality, but a maze of Time.
接力的最后一环，由我回到命运三相殿，为欧洛尼斯讲述这些故事，把大家写下的每一页，都装进「记忆」的小瓶子里……
As the last link in the relay, I will return to the Temple of the Three Fates, tell Oronyx all of our stories, and bottle every page we've written into the little flask of "memories"...
然后，愿它能安然启航…与「负世」的火种一同飘过时间的长河，飘到{NICKNAME}身边，成为你回到翁法罗斯的指引。
And then... may it set sail in peace... Drift down the river of time along with the Coreflame of Worldbearing, reach {NICKNAME}'s side, and lead you back to Amphoreus.
就像我们的初遇，对不对？
Just like the first time we met, right?
虽然这一世，翁法罗斯没有「岁月」的半神，但「岁月」始终站在人类这边。
Even though this cycle has no demigod of Time, Time has always stood on humanity's side.
只有通过这种方式，我们才能确保在{NICKNAME}归来前，「再创世」一定不会发生……
This is the only way to make sure that the "Era Nova" won't happen before {NICKNAME} returns...
也只有这样，人家才能把最后一次逐火之旅，完完整整地放进「救世主」心里。
And the only way I can safely entrust the completed final Flame-Chase Journey to the Deliverer's heart.
毕竟，新世界会从你的「记忆」中诞生。故事的主角…可千万不能缺席呀。
After all, the new world will be born from your "memories," and the protagonist of this story... mustn't be absent.
走吧，该去完成「再创世」了。
Let's go. It's time to complete the "Era Nova."
我会将你们所有人带往新世界。
I will take all of you to the new world.
我相信，{NICKNAME}一定不会让人失望…一如既往。
I believe {NICKNAME} will never let us down... just like always.
还记得吗，白厄将我们送回起点的时候，我和{NICKNAME}也经历过离别。但最后，人家还是带着全部的过往和你重逢了。
Do you remember when Phainon sent us back to the beginning? When {NICKNAME} and I got separated? But in the end, I returned to you, carrying all that we've been through.
「记忆」就是这样的。在时间的长河里，它可能会磨损，会消散，但它不会离开。当内心的小角落被唤醒，回忆一定会以更美的形式再度浮现。

That's what "memory" is. It may wear down and fade in the river of time... But it never truly leaves. When that hidden corner of the heart is stirred, the past returns even more beautiful than before.
所以，不要担心。让「第<unbreak>33550337</unbreak>次逐火之旅」也成为{NICKNAME}的一部分吧。有了上一次的经验，人家也熟练许多啦。
So don't worry. Let the <unbreak>33,550,337</unbreak>th Flame-Chase Journey become part of {NICKNAME}, too. I've gotten a lot better at it with the experience from the last time.
接下来，{NICKNAME}就要前往斯缇科西亚，找到由「海洋」半神守卫的涡心入口，然后奔向决战的舞台啦。
Next, {NICKNAME} will head to Styxia and find the Vortex's entrance guarded by the demigod of Ocean, before charging toward the final battlefield.
别担心，人家会与你同在。我们所有人，连同白厄一起…都会和「救世主」同在。
Don't worry. I'll be with you. All of us will. Even Phainon. We'll stand with the "Deliverer."
做个短暂的道别，然后就出发吧，像我们启程时约定的那样……
So say a short goodbye, then set off, just like we promised at the start...
扔下多余的烦恼，把笑容和决心一起打包，带向明天♪
...Toss away all unnecessary worries and troubles, and bring our smiles and determination into tomorrow ♪
Look, the scenery of the past... has resurfaced.
「永恒圣城」…其永恒何以企及诗篇所述？
The "Eternal Holy City"... What part of that eternity ever lived up to its descriptions in poetry?
前进吧。冰消雪释时，花会盛开，你会找到我。
Go. When the frost melts and the snows give way, the flowers will bloom again. You'll find me there.
照你的意思，蜗居公主…是再也回不来了么？
So what you're saying is... Princess Homebody... is never coming back, is she?
Go on... and see you tomorrow!
如果将我斫裂，就能让这世界多活一秒——那就这么做。
If breaking me apart buys this world even one more second... Then so be it.
前进吧，以我血为你铸就前路。
Keep moving forward. My blood will pave the road ahead for you.
前进吧，小小灰——我们明天见！
Keep moving forward. Little Gray, see you tomorrow!
一个谎言要用更多谎言维系，裁缝女这话果然不假哪……
That seamstress wasn't wrong when she said a lie needs more lies to keep it together...
前进吧，完成那未竟的大功业。
Go forth. Finish the greatness left undone.
别想那么多啦！前进吧，只要跑起来就足够！
Quit overthinking! Just run. Keep running, and that'll be enough!
最后一棒…不知道你要等多久，才能交到{NICKNAME}手中呢？
The last baton... I wonder how long you'll have to wait before passing it on to {NICKNAME}?
多久都没有关系哦？毕竟，等待是人家最擅长的事情嘛。
No matter how long it takes, it's okay. Waiting is what I do best.
历经三千万世，{NICKNAME}才降临在我们身边…那，再多等片刻，又有何妨呢？
After all, it took <unbreak>33</unbreak> million cycles for {NICKNAME} to arrive in our world... What's a few moments more?
小家伙，看得到吗？别急着说话，这是一段预录制影像。
Hey kiddo, can you see me? Don't bother responding, this is a pre-recorded video message.
多亏那小皇冠开放了终极协议的权限，你不在的时候，我和螺丝对「再创世」的进程进行了…改写。
Thanks to that little empress granting access to the Ultimate Protocol, Screwy and I... rewrote the progress of "Era Nova" while you were away.
我猜你现在没多少时间听那些难懂的原理，那就归结成几句任谁都能听懂的人话吧——
My guess is you don't have much time to listen to all those complicated principles right now, so let me break it down into simple terms that anyone can understand...
翁法罗斯在「毁灭」的命途上狂飙了太久，「再创世」的底层逻辑已经彻底被污染了。我和螺丝花了很多力气，也只能勉强覆写其中的一小段逻辑……

Amphoreus has been racing down the Path of Destruction for too long, and the underlying logic of "Era Nova" has been completely corrupted. Screwy and I put in a lot of effort, but we could barely manage to overwrite a small portion of its logic...
还是拿进度条举例吧。铁墓现在的进度条处在<unbreak>99.98%</unbreak>的位置，通过这次被改写的「再创世」，我们有信心能让它回退到<unbreak>96%</unbreak>…咳，保守点，<unbreak>97%</unbreak>吧。

Let's take the progress bar as an example. Irontomb's progress bar is currently at <unbreak>99.98%</unbreak>, and through this rewritten "Era Nova," we're confident we can push it back to <unbreak>96%</unbreak>... Hmm, let's be conservative, say <unbreak>97%</unbreak>.
事关重大，权杖的内部结构太不稳定，我们也不知道会不会突发什么岔子。最理智的做法，就是抓紧时间重置一次演算，给银河再多争取些时间。

This is a critical matter. The internal structure of the Scepter is too unstable, and we don't know what complications might suddenly arise. The most rational course of action is to quickly run another extrapolation to buy the cosmos a bit more time.
等你把那智械哥的麻烦解决了，别犹豫，立刻开启新一轮的演算吧。螺丝说了，「再创世」才不是瞬间完成的进程，权杖受到保护的节点恐怕只有在重启的时分才最脆弱——

Once you've dealt with that troubling old Intellitron, don't hesitate and start the next cycle of extrapolation right away. Screwy said that "Era Nova" isn't a process that happens in an instant, and the protected nodes of the Scepter are probably at their most vulnerable only during the reset—
——只有先开启这个进程，我们才有机会借机施展拳脚。靠你了，「救世主」。
Only by initiating this progress first can we seize the opportunity to make our move. It's all up to you now, "Deliverer."
（这是…斯缇科西亚？怎么变成了这样……）
(Is this... Styxia? What happened to this place...?)
（我要找到「海洋」半神守护的涡心入口…海瑟音，她还在这里吗？）
(I need to find the entrance to the Vortex guarded by the demigod of Ocean. Hysilens... is she still there?)
一代又一代黄金裔英雄或甘愿四分五裂，或在孤寂中独守，披肝沥胆，妄图征服命运……
Generation after generation of Chrysos Heir heroes have tried to defy fate with their blood and tears, either voluntarily shattering their souls or waiting in eternal solitude...
但很遗憾，命运不会落败。
But alas, fate can never be defeated.
「理性」与「诡计」囚禁了我的身躯，但我的意志并不会因此沉寂。
Reason and Trickery may bind my flesh, but my will shall never fall silent.
于是，「海洋」的半神，剑旗爵海瑟音，妄图用歌声令我陷入幻境，试图让一位天才沉沦……
So, the demigod of Ocean, the Dux Gladiorum, Hysilens, sought to bring me into a fantasia with her voice and drown a genius in slumber...
可惜，这只是痴心妄想。这位典狱官先因时光的磨损陷入了迷醉，而她的囚徒安然如故。
But alas, it was all a hopeless dream. That warden fell before I did due to erosion of time, while her prisoner remained unchanged.
但现在，你仍被困在此处。
And yet, here you are, bound to this place.
可是，你还没有得到自由。
But you have yet to taste freedom.
呵呵，我无法离开这里，但那又如何？
Heh, true. I can't leave this place, but what of it?
你应该听过这样一则寓言——「在一座幽暗的洞穴中，有一群人：他们自出生起便被缚住双腿和脖颈，无法环顾、互望，或是看到自己。」

You should have heard of this fable. "In a shadowed cave lived a people, imprisoned from childhood and chained so that their legs and necks are fixed, forcing them not to look around at the cave, each other, or themselves."
「在他们身后是一团火，面前则是洞穴的岩壁。火光为他们留下投影，而岩壁向他们投射回声……」
"Behind them is a fire, and before them loomed the stone wall of the cave. The flames cast shadows, while the rocky surface threw back echoes..."
「这在我们看来虚假的一切，就是他们世界的全部。」
"To them, that false play is the whole world."
我被困在了洞穴之中，但我知晓这一切只是须臾幻梦。我不必在梦中挣扎，只需等待。
Yes, I'm trapped in the cave, but I know it's all just a fleeting illusion. I don't struggle in dreams. I wait.
现在，我等到了我的解脱者——若想彻底战胜我，拯救这个本与你无关的世界，就必须唤醒此处的歌者，打开名为创世涡心的囚笼……
And now, my deliverer has come. To defeat me and save this world that never owed you anything, you'll need to awaken the singer here and unseal the prison called Vortex of Genesis...
你将亲手解开我的镣铐，促成洞穴的坍塌。
You'll be the one to unshackle me and bring the cave crashing down.
当然，我也不介意再多等片刻，带你穿过前方的迷梦——来自那位典狱长的追忆。
Of course, I don't mind waiting a little longer. Let me guide you through this next illusion, one last memory from that prison warden.
希望你能静静观赏幻境中的故事。于理，「救世主」有义务将此世的全貌尽收眼底；于情，眼前这出回忆正是翁法罗斯所有人命运最好的写照……

I hope you'll watch the stories of this fantasia closely. Logically, the Deliverer must see the world for what it truly is. Emotionally, this memory captures the fate of everyone in Amphoreus better than anything else...
只有对其感同身受，你才能理解我的观点：
Only by feeling it for yourself can you understand my point of view:
而我会亲自毁灭你的野心。
And I'll be the one to bring destruction to your scheme.
I don't need to understand you.
向您澎湃的决心致敬。那么，在踏上最后的舞台前，请允许我基于先前的寓言向你发问——
To your unshakable resolve, I salute you. But before we step onto the final stage, let me ask you this, in the spirit of that fable I told you just now...
<color=#dbc291ff>「洞穴中的囚徒是否能够识别投影和回声，而非将其错认为真正的世界？」</color>
<color=#dbc291ff>"Can the prisoners in the cave learn to see the shadows and echoes for what they are, and stop mistaking them for reality?"</color>
漆黑的浪潮在海中漫溢，我们的王国危在旦夕……
The dark tides flood the sea... And our kingdom teeters on the edge...
莫要焦急，我们的女王已奔赴边境，亲自将灾厄平息。
Fear not. Our queen has gone to the borderlands. She'll quell this calamity herself.
这一幕是「海洋」黄金裔诞生时的历史…曾经，她是名为「海妖」的泰坦眷属。
This is the scene when the Chrysos Heir of Ocean was born... She was once of a Titankin race named "sea sirens."
彼时，卡厄斯兰那压制了黑潮的蔓延，但无法根除铁墓的苗床。黑潮仍在世界深处涌动，正是海妖的国度最先拥抱了「毁灭」。

At that time, Khaslana had suppressed the black tide's rise, but he was unable to remove Irontomb from its roots. The black tide still roiled in the depths of the world, and the kingdom of sea sirens was the first to embrace the Destruction.
快听，我听到了海列屈拉的歌声，她在呼唤我们！
Listen, I heard Helektra's voice! She's calling to us!
我们走吧，她的歌声，等同女王的敕令。
Let's go. Her voice carries the queen's command.
我的姊妹！你们终于游来了。
当然，海列屈拉，我们被你曼妙的乐音所牵引。
Of course, Helektra. Your beautiful melody drew us here.
她的真名是「海列屈拉」——那是过去的她，在不甘中回望的残影。
Her true name is Helektra. This is a reflection of her former self, clinging to the past with aching defiance.
女王在召见我们。想必她已精疲力尽，黑潮终将流入边境。
The queen summons us. She must be near exhaustion... The black tide will soon enter our borders.
那该如何是好？我们的海域，难道也要沦为漆黑的惨景？
Then what do we do? Will our seas fall to darkness and terror as well?
不必担心。我们会代她捧起承接黑潮的杯，一同护国佑民。
Don't worry. We shall lift the chalice in her stead to catch the black tide, and stand together to safeguard our realm and its people.
渺小的泰坦眷属，以为自己能阻挡真理的浪潮，多么天真……
Such tiny Titankins... thinking they can stop the tide of truth. How naive...
这份天真，就是苦难的因。
And that naivety... is the root of all suffering.
哦，{RUBY_B#海洋之泰坦}法吉娜{RUBY_E#}，高贵的女王！我们已响应您的召唤而来。
Oh, {RUBY_B#Ocean Titan}Phagousa{RUBY_E#}, our noble queen! We've come at your call!
我的小鱼们，你们游动的身姿多么欢欣，让我不忍宣读王国的不幸……
My little fishlings... you swim with such joy. It pains me to speak of the kingdom's sorrow...
我曾以为，我能将黑潮一饮而尽。但再深邃的酒杯也终会满溢，我已无法容纳更多泥泞。
I once believed I could drink the black tide dry, but even the deepest chalice must one day overflow... and I can hold no more of this filth.
我的母亲，不必忧心。我们都是海洋的孩子，会为您分担宿命。
Mother, worry not. We're all children of the sea. Let us bear your fate together.
我们会接过您的职责，驱散黑色的潮水。
We'll take up your mantle and drive back the black currents.
我们会修好您的圣杯，接下诅咒的污秽。
We'll mend your sacred chalice and take in the cursed filth.
鱼儿们！待到「纷争」的长矛降临，你们便可隐退。
My little fishlings! When the spear of Strife falls, you may retreat in peace.
我向你们允诺，地上的城邦会为你们举办一场无休的宴会……
I promise you: On the surface, the city-states will hold a feast without end in your honor...
这便是，我能给予你们最后的恩惠。
This is the last gift I can give you.
法吉娜在深渊中沉沦，杯身破碎——她的醉意注入黑潮，为翁法罗斯带来了最初的疯狂。
Phagousa sank into the abyss, with the chalice shattered, their intoxication spilled into the black tide, birthing the first madness in Amphoreus.
海妖们前赴后继，寻找泰坦的碎片，直至身躯腐败，化作枯骨，只为能迎来允诺中的欢宴。
Sea sirens followed one after another, hunting for the Titan's fragments... until their flesh decayed and their bones crumbled, all for the promised final feast.
继续观赏吧。小心：往后的舞台年久失修，一如她破碎的命运。
Keep watching. But tread carefully, for the stage ahead is crumbling with age... just like her shattered fate.
姐妹们，不要放弃，别忘了女王许诺的欢宴——那座名为斯缇科西亚的城邦！
Sisters, don't give up. Remember the queen's promise of a feast... in the city called Styxia!
我没有忘记，每一晚，它都会出现在我们的梦中……
I haven't forgotten. It visits me in dreams every night...
梦见城中是多么美丽，灯火穿透幽暗的海底……
I dreamed of a shining city, its lights piercing the deep gloom of the seabed...
梦见孩童将花环戴上我们的骨角，诗人传唱着海妖护世的功绩……
I dreamed of children placing garlands on our bone horns, and poets praising the sea sirens for shielding the world...
只是可惜…我们已无法前行，请你代我们给人类歌唱，歌唱深海的传奇……
But what a shame... we can go no further. Please, sing to the humans for us. Sing of the deep sea's legend, in our place...
海妖们被「毁灭」侵蚀，血肉腐败，成为了此世的黑潮造物。
The sea sirens were tainted by the Destruction, their flesh rotted away. They became the Black Tide Creatures of this cycle.
…再见了，姐妹。我会完成最后的使命，再来布置你们的宴席。
...Farewell, sisters. I'll finish this last task, then return to prepare your feast.
于是，海床间只剩下一尾清醒的海妖。海瑟音，她在海中孤独地洄游，送葬自己的同胞，寻找满溢之杯的碎片……
And so, only one sea siren remained among the sea floor... Hysilens, swimming alone through the seas, burying her kin, and searching for the fragments of the Chalice of Plenty...
不过，其中大多时间皆是徒劳…何不让我们用「岁月」的神力飞跃至旅程终点？
Though most of that journey was in vain... why not let us use the power of Time to leap ahead toward the journey's end?
终于，满溢之杯重归完整，天谴之矛也踏出冥河，神明重拾起抵御黑潮的职责。
At last, the Chalice of Plenty is whole again. The Lance of Fury emerges from the River of Souls, and the gods reclaim their duty to hold back the black tide.
我摆脱了漫无止境的劳役，奔赴斯缇科西亚的典仪……
I am freed from endless toil and now walk toward the rites at Styxia...
我背负姊妹的愿景，化作曼妙的人形，期待着岸上有万民欢庆。
I bore my sisters' dreams upon my back, took on a graceful human form, and hoped to find a grand celebration on the shore.
我的尾鳍化作双腿，鳞片化作肌肤，体表的泡沫化作闪光的裙摆。
My fins became legs, my scales became skin, and the sea foam on my body became a shimmering gown.
可当我踏上陆地，却发现那里没有蜜酿泼洒的庆典，也没有诗人拨动竖琴——
But when I stepped onto land, there were no festivals with honey brew, nor poets plucking harps...
——只有沉默的死亡，在冥河里静静流淌。
...Only silent death, drifting gently along the River of Souls.
当她终于遂愿，却发现斯缇科西亚重蹈前世的覆辙，已被「死亡」吞没……
When she fulfilled her wish, she only found Styxia to have already repeated the mistakes of previous cycles and was swallowed by Death...
期许、诺言，皆是如梦泡影。
Hopes and promises are nothing but the foam of dreams.
身为海妖的我，生来便是潮汐的容器。既然使命完结，承诺又无法兑现……
I am a sea siren, a vessel born to contain the tides. Now that my task is done, and the promise is broken...
那我…又该以何种方式，生存在漆黑的世间？
How... am I to go on? In a world drowned in shadow?
法吉娜，高贵的女王，她用迷醉逃避我的追问，她说，大地之上总有我渴求的欢宴……
Phagousa. My noble queen... she evaded my questions with drunken stupor. She told me a grand feast awaited me in the surface world...
于是，我开始漫无目的地游弋，在黑暗中摸索……
So I wandered, lost, groping through the dark...
在岸上徘徊许久后，迷茫的海妖邂逅了来日的共犯……
After wandering the surface for ages, the lost sea siren met her future conspirator...
你孤身将战事平息，令「纷争」退行。这柄号令千军的剑旗，是为何人效命？
You quelled the wars alone and forced Strife into retreat. This swordfish that commands thousands of legions... whom does she serve?
This was the moment they met.
没错。还未成为凯撒的刻律德菈，早已满怀雄心。
Yes. Cerydra, long before she became the Imperator, was already burning with ambition.
践行神谕的王，我并非谁人的剑旗。我只是彷徨的鱼，在杀戮中寻求清醒。
Sovereign who follows prophecy... I am no one's sword. I am just a wandering fish, seeking clarity through bloodshed.
那不如让剑为我而舞，让琴为我而鸣——
Then how about letting the sword dance for me, and letting the violin sing in my name...
Tell me. What is it you seek?
我…只要一处能令我容身的宴席。
All I want... is a feast where I might belong.
以王的权柄，置酒设宴不值一提。我将令你在胜后尽兴，与我的将士开怀畅饮……
Such a demand is trivial with the sovereign's authority. I'll grant you a banquet worthy of conquest, and comrades to toast beside you...
但是，骑士，你要献上你的心。
But, knight, you must offer me your heart.
没错，一颗绝对赤诚的忠心。
Yes. A loyal heart that will generate no betrayal.
你受尽神的诓骗，沉溺海的黑暗。而现在，我会令你前行，成为你的光明。
You were deceived by gods and drowned in the ocean's darkness. But now, I will lead you forward and be your light.
无妨，尊贵的王。您宣告的「律法」，将是我生命的纲领……
So be it, noble monarch. The Law you proclaim shall govern my every breath...
无妨，尊贵的王。不过又一次成为他人的器物，接纳被赋予的使命。
So be it, noble monarch. I am simply becoming someone else's vessel once again, and accepting a duty given to me.
于是，她在空虚的漫游中终于找到了新的目标，如同天光直射深海。
And thus, in her hollow drift, she finally found a new purpose, like sunlight piercing the deepest trench.
尊贵的王！我已遵您指令，将征程上的污秽清洗。
Noble monarch! I've cleansed the foulness from the road, as you commanded.
我的锋刃，你已助我加冕登基，大可尽情讨要馈遗。
My blade, you've helped me ascend and take the crown. Ask, and you shall have your reward.
我之所求，一如往昔。只是一场宴席。
What I desire is the same as before. A feast.
哈哈——看，我已为你备好晚宴，带来了最好的蜜酿与贡品！
Haha! Look, I've prepared you a grand banquet! The finest honey brew and tributes await!
游鱼天性趋光，因为海渊昏暗苍茫……
Fish are drawn to light by nature, for the deep sea knows only gloom...
现在，我找到一团火光。即便过于灼热滚烫，却也是唯一的明亮。
Now, I've found a flame. It may scald and burn, but it's the only light.
让我们也加入宴会吧，前行的门扉，或许就藏在席间。
Come, let us join the feast. Perhaps the path forward lies hidden among the revelry.
臣子们，今日的宴会并非只是纪念旧日，更是为了庆贺未来——
My faithful subjects, tonight's feast is not just for the past. It's a toast to the future!
我等金血孕育出一头无往不利的{RUBY_B#铁墓}巨兽{RUBY_E#}，它将成为我们的铁蹄，踏遍天外群星！
Born from our golden blood is an unstoppable {RUBY_B#Irontomb}colossus{RUBY_E#}, our iron beast to trample the universe!
伟大的王，我听闻星间强敌环伺，我们是否还能百战不殆？
Great monarch, I've heard the universe teems with great threats. Can we truly remain invincible?
无需多虑，在「毁灭」的棋军前，宵小之徒不过是星间尘埃。
Fear not. Before the troops of the Destruction, such rabble is no more than cosmic dust.
寰宇中定会有遍布汪洋的星球，待我攻克那里，便将它封为你的领地！
Surely there's a planet draped in oceans out there in the stars. Once I claim it, it shall be yours to rule!
还有其他人，功成之后，你们亦会得到对应的奖赏。我许诺你们一个无忧的时代！
And to the rest, your triumphs will not go unrewarded. I promise you a new age, free of fear!
现在，为征服星海举杯吧！
Now, raise your cups! To our conquest among the sea of stars!
Sea of stars! Sea of stars!
征服星海，多么伟大的愿景。但对那位海妖骑士来说，唯有欢宴值得上心……
Conquest among the sea of stars... What a grand vision. Yet, to the siren knight, only feasts still stir her heart...
敬请上前，与我一同见证，这虚妄幻境的终幕吧。
Come now. Join me. Witness the end of this futile dream.
高贵的骑士，你是一颗滚烫的火星，能与你共飨盛宴，可谓是我的荣幸。
Noble knight, you are truly a blazing spark. It's my honor to share this banquet with you.
高贵的骑士，你用剑刃换来了胜利，理应享受此刻的意兴，让我为你斟满蜜酿。
Noble knight, you have earned victory with your blade, and you have every reason to revel in this moment of triumph. Let me pour you a glass of honey brew.
高贵的骑士，王已端坐王座之上，这荣耀同样是你的功勋，让我向你举杯致敬。
Noble knight, with the sovereign now enthroned, this triumph is yours as much as hers. Let me raise a toast to you.
高贵的骑士，你的力量无穷无尽，一定要带我们征服天际，让我与你碰杯为誓！
Noble knight, your strength is boundless! Lead us to conquer the universe, and let us toast to that vow!
...Then drink we shall. Raise your glass.
在那深海，我从不知晓「火」的存在。而当我踏上岸，第一次瞥见的光…便是金血点燃的战火。
In the deep sea, I never knew what "fire" was. But when I set foot on land, the first light that I saw was the flames of war lit with golden blood.
那火灼伤了我的鳍，令我感受到痛楚，还有……
It scorched my fins, made me feel pain, and...
这种渴望在每个英雄体内摇曳，耀眼…却又灼目。
A hunger that flickers in every hero's heart, so bright, yet so blinding...
「她的一只眼睛看见光荣，另一只眼睛看见尸身。」
"One eye of hers sees glory. The other sees corpses."
「而她喜爱光荣的名字，甚于恐惧与死亡——」
"And yet, she cherishes the name of glory more than fear and death..."
「啊！正所谓，懦夫在未死之前，便死了千万次。」
"Ah, as they say: the coward died a thousand times before his end."
「而勇士一生只死一回——这自有神明为她作证。」
"But the brave face death but once, which gods stand witness."
在出征的前日，我们高唱颂歌，准备向星海启航……
On the eve of war, we sang our hymns, and set our sights to sail beyond the stars...
军团乘上那头巨兽，如洋流般漂向宇宙各地。
The legions will climb aboard the beast, riding it like currents across the cosmos.
一颗颗星球插上了王冠的旗帜，一片片疆域被战火点燃。
Planets after planets flew the flags of her crown. Realm after realm was ignited by her flames of war.
随着最后的反抗归于沉寂，一个庞大的帝国自群星间崛起——这片小小的池塘，也终于迎来了繁荣与和平。
As the final resistance fell silent, a vast empire rose from among the stars and this small pond at last embraced prosperity and peace.
这便是故事的结局，步入剧中的观赏者，你喜欢吗？
That's how the story ends. Tell me, visitor in this dream, did you enjoy the show?
毕竟，那静谧的池底，是由无数骸骨铺就……
After all, beneath that still surface lie the bones of countless dead...
的确，那不过是酒杯里闪烁的泡影……
Yes... just fake bubbles glinting on the surface of poured wine...
不确定自己该游向何方吗？没关系……
Not sure which way to swim? It's okay...
我这场醉梦，也该清醒了。
It's time for me to wake up from this drunken dream.
人们曾为我登峰欢呼…如今为陨落欢呼……
People once cheered for my ascension... and now they cheer for my fall...
银河…我无法踏足的疆场啊……
The cosmos... the battlefield that I cannot reach...
在王的征程抵达尽头之前，她的生命与野心，就已被深海埋葬。
Before the sovereign's conquest reached its end, her life and ambition had already been swallowed by the deep sea.
这便是真正的结局…她的宏图被剑锋撕裂，华贵的衣袍被金血沾满……
This... is the true ending. Her grand designs torn apart by the blade, her regal robes soaked in golden blood...
And the one who struck her down...
The one who struck her down...
理由…无需赘述，这方寸池中的鱼儿，本就无法抗拒汹涌的命运。
I... don't need to explain myself. A fish in a pond has no hope against the surge of fate.
我于岸上徘徊，终于觅见一簇火焰，又将它亲手掐灭……
I wandered the shore, found a flicker of flame... only to snuff it out with my own hand.
我不明白，如果海洋的欢宴、凯撒的愿景、翁法罗斯的存在都是虚妄…那我们的征程还有何意义？
I don't understand. If the ocean's feast, the Imperator's dream, and even Amphoreus's existence are all illusions... then what's the point of our journey?
待到「救世主」归来，就让这场荒唐的宴会结束吧。
When the "Deliverer" returns, I will let this absurd celebration come to an end.
但是，灰鱼儿，我还是忍不住会想……
But, gray fry, I can't help but wonder...
我多么希望，这场逐火的盛宴…永不散场。
How I dearly wish this feast of the Flame-Chase... would never end.
看来，她也察觉到了你的造访，幻境的根基已经开始动摇……
It seems she's sensed your presence. The fantasia's foundation is starting to crack...
让我们回到序幕，那段有关洞穴寓言的问题吧：「洞穴里的囚徒是否能够识别投影和回声，而非将其错认为真正的世界？」
Let's return to the prologue. Remember the allegory of the cave? "Can the prisoners in the cave learn to see the shadows and echoes for what they are, and stop mistaking them for reality?"
如你所见，当她卸下枷锁，终于得以环顾四周，迈开双腿，只有剧烈的痛苦袭来……
As you've seen, when she cast off her chains, finally turned to look around, and moved her legs, her reward was nothing but searing pain...
她会被光芒刺眼，因为那身后的火光从来没有直接射入眼眸；她的双腿将无比沉重，因为她从未学过迈步向前。
The light will blind her, for the fire behind her had never once actually touched her eyes. Her legs will buckle beneath her, for she had never learned to walk forward.
然后，她陷入了无尽的迷茫和恐惧，并坚信：投影和回声才是真正的世界。
And so she fell into infinite confusion and fear... and came to firmly believe that the shadows and echoes were the real world.
而银河中的我们，是否真的比她清醒？现在，无名的人、无命的人，请试想……
But we in the cosmos... Are we truly any wiser than she was? Now, nameless one, fateless one, ask yourself this:
<color=#dbc291ff>你所行走的命途，你所信仰的星神——你所亲手「开拓」的一切——是否也只是他者投下的阴影？</color>
<color=#dbc291ff>The Paths you tread, the Aeons you worship... everything you've "Trailblazed" with your own hands... could it all be someone else's projected shadow?</color>
就让我们将这个疑问留到幕后罢。当你将所有的真相尽收眼底，抵达半神们为我设下的监牢，我自会与你当面探讨……
Let's leave that question till after the curtain falls. Once you've unearthed every last truth and reached the prison built for me by the demigods, I'll speak with you face to face...
我作为「神礼观众」，走过由卡厄斯兰那背负的三千万世——
I, the Theoros, have walked the thirty million histories borne by Khaslana...
千年时光在我的尺度之下，不过细沙中的一粒分子。而翁法罗斯之于银河，又不过是长滩上的一粒细沙。
A thousand years is a mere atom in a grain of sand to me. Amphoreus, compared to the cosmos, is but that grain upon a whole beach.
鄙人立誓要为「智识」带去终结，又怎会被一粒分子磨尽心智？
I swore to bring an end to the Erudition. Would I really let a single grain grind down my mind?
现在，请用「岁月」的力量打开那扇通往海底的门。去寻找那位被忠诚折磨的典狱长吧。找到她，步入世界的涡心，然后为你我的一切恩怨作结。

Now, please use the power of Time to open the gate to the ocean's depths. Go find the prison warden tormented by loyalty. Find her. Step into the world's vortex. And once there... end everything between us.
那宫殿映照着「海洋」半神的心境：酣醉、滞缓。在那里，你也将看到救世史诗的真实开篇……
That palace reflects the heart of the demigod of Ocean: intoxicated, stagnant. There, you'll witness the true beginning of the saga of deliverance...
<color=#dbc291ff>那段被洋流洗刷、掩盖的丑恶历史——凯撒以征服之名，行血祭之实，用五百人金血铸成的登神长阶。</color>

<color=#dbc291ff>An ugly history long buried by tides and shame. A staircase of apotheosis that the Imperator forged with the golden blood of five hundred human sacrifices under the pretence of conquest.</color>
看！火光投影出了她追忆中的面容，也是这场剧目的演员。
Look! The fire projects the face from her memories: an actress upon the stage of this play.
为了不让黑潮威胁海洋，女王奉献了全部心血。
To keep the black tide from threatening the ocean, the queen gave her all, body and soul.
从女王杯中诞生的她，领受了最深的祝福，继承了无上神力……
Born of the queen's Chalice, she bore the deepest blessings and inherited supreme divine power...
女王的行宫就在前面。她曾经优美的身姿，也被污浊浸没……
The queen's palace lies just ahead. Even her once-graceful form is now tainted and drowned in dirty mire...
沉溺于过往，只会堵塞前路——何不用「岁月」架起未来的桥梁？
Clinging to the past only blocks the road forward. Why not let Time build a bridge to the future?
（吊灯还是维持不住…周围的时象仪，也许能派上用场？）
(The chandelier's still giving way... maybe the Chrono Vessel nearby can help?)
您的智慧，远超「理性」模型的边界。
Your wisdom far surpasses even the bounds of Reason's model.
（过不去…看来得借助旁边的「奇迹宝珠」了。）
(Can't get through... looks like I'll need the Miracle Orb nearby.)
结局早已写就，即使阁下也无可更改…就像这盏可怜的灯。
The ending was written long ago. Even you cannot rewrite it... just like this poor chandelier.
海列屈拉！我的尾被恶鬼啃啮，再也无法游向远方……
Helektra! The fiends have gnawed my tail! I can no longer swim to the far seas...
海列屈拉！我的鳍被黑泥浸泡，再也无法随你起舞……
Helektra! The black sludge has soaked my fins! I can't dance with you anymore...
（要想碰到灵水盆，得用上时象仪的力量……）
(To reach the spirit basin, I'll need to call upon the power of the Chrono Vessel...)
她所说的宴会…究竟在哪里？
The feast she spoke of... where is it?
伶仃的锋刃，我会赐予你所求的一切。
Lonely blade... I shall grant you everything you seek.
听说了吗，凯撒即将开启新的征程……
Have you heard that the Imperator's about to begin a new campaign...
她的伟业，将不再限于翁法罗斯之间……
Her glory will no longer be bound by the borders of Amphoreus...
(Where's the way out of this illusion...)
请快来这边，让我们一同欢庆！
我备好了佳酿，快来一起品尝吧！
I've saved the finest brew! Come, taste it with me!
Look! The monarch herself has taken her seat!
Hear that? The court sings her praises!
快来，一同歌颂她的功绩！
Come! Join us and praise her glory!
我会在世界的心脏等待你，但若要抵达此处……
I'll wait for you at the heart of the world. But to reach the place...
你必须先找到那沉醉的典狱长。
You must find the prison warden lost in her stupor.
（这道门后，就是通向创世涡心的路……）
(Beyond this door lies the path to the Vortex of Genesis...)
风堇…「天空」的半神创造的桥梁，助你横跨了空间的距离——而他们对你的信任，也横跨了时间的距离。
Hyacine... The bridge forged by the Demigod of the Sky helped you cross the chasms of space — and their faith in you spanned the vastness of time itself.
你、你们离阿波罗尼远些……
装满蜜酿的酒杯…如此香醇……
This cup of honey brew... what a sweet aroma...
曳石爵…不能在这里放弃！
Dux Helkolithist... we can't give up here!
爱浸没在死中…多么可口……
Love steeped in death... how delicious...
阿波罗尼…你看…我把敌人赶跑了……
Apollonius... look... I chased the enemy away...
但是…我可能…也没法前进了……
But... I think... I can't go any further...
对不起…维吉妮娅，让你也……
I'm sorry... Verginia... for letting you...
没关系…能死在你身边，我很幸福……
It's okay... I'm glad... to die by your side...
Ah, such an ironic twist of fate...
哪怕世界的根基早已动摇，无情的凯撒依旧做出了同过去三千万世相同的决定——
Even as the foundation of the world crumbles, the heartless Imperator still made the same decision she did in the past thirty million cycles...
第一次逐火之旅，逐火的军团攻入斯缇科西亚。数以万计的海妖自冥河中浮现，如巨浪般冲向群英……
During the First Flame-Chase Journey, the Flame-Chase legion stormed Styxia. Tens of thousands of sea sirens surged from the River of Souls, crashing toward the heroes like a tidal wave...
你面前的地狱，就是那场战役的重现。
The hell before you... is the re-creation of that very battle.
有一封信…一直没能交给你…让我念给你听吧……
There's a letter... I never got to give you... Let me read it to you...
「树影衬着智者的背影，像一颗巨石在背负年轮……」
"The shadow of a tree frames the sage's back, like a boulder bearing the rings of time..."
「鸟儿的歌是穿林的风声，却绕不过他嶙峋的裂痕……」
"The bird's song is a whisper of wind through the forest, but it cannot pass the fractures in his form..."
「他的重量…压住了鸟儿的翅膀…和萌动的心……」
"His weight... presses down on the bird's wings... and the stirring heart within..."
Heh... I always wanted to tell you...
You look... beautiful... when you read poetry.
她吟诗的声音愈发微弱，逐渐与呼吸一同消失在唇边，如缓缓平息的风。
Her voice, reciting poetry, grows ever fainter, fading with each breath until they all vanish completely at her lips, like wind slowly dying away.
Verginia... see you... in the new world...
他的身体逐渐变得僵硬，慈爱的面容仍挂在脸上，如一尊和蔼的石像。
His form grows rigid, but his kind smile remains, as if he were a benevolent statue frozen in time.
他们第一次并肩而眠，再也不会从这场梦中醒来。
They lay side by side for the first time, never to wake from this dream again.
痛苦的过去，却用歌声蒙上了快乐的面纱。
A painful past, yet hidden beneath a veil of joyful song.
啊，两簇被抛弃的数据，似乎在等待谁的归来。
Ah, two discarded data clusters. Waiting for someone's return, it seems.
重现历史吧，然后…穿过神殿的海水，来到我的身边。
Relive the history, then... pass through the temple's waters and come to my side.
What a wretched way to die.
被酣歌的鱼群蚕食殆尽的逐火军，他们如此后知后觉……
The Flame-Chase Army, devoured by warbling fish, never saw it coming...
看呐，残忍的凯撒和她的骑士统领、可怜的典狱官——多么投契的一对演算对象！她们手上都浸满了鲜血…金色的鲜血。
Look, the cruel Imperator, and her knight commander the pitiful warden... What a perfectly matched duo of test subjects! Their hands drip with blood... golden blood.
升起桥梁，渡过命运的河流吧，这段囚徒之路还远未到终点。
Raise the bridge and cross the river of fate. This path of the prisoner is far from over.
凯撒…凯撒…你看到了我的英姿吗，凯撒……
Imperator... Imperator... did you see my gallant deeds, Imperator...?
蠢货…到了这个时候还不明白吗？
You fool... How could you still not get it even now?
凭她的计谋，怎么可能会让我们陷入如此境地？她从一开始就知晓这场战役的结局……
With her schemes, do you think she'd ever let us end up like this by accident? She knew how this battle would end from the start...
暴君…我一定要亲手杀了她……
That tyrant... I swear I'll kill her with my own hands...
不…她不会让我们白白送死，她不会背叛人们的梦想…不会背叛翁法罗斯。
No... she wouldn't send us to die for nothing. She would never betray our dreams... or Amphoreus.
凯撒，我知道…我是个愚人…所以我永远相信您的旨意……
Imperator... I know I'm a fool... so I'll believe in your commands... to the very end.
请带着我的性命…完成步入群星的伟业吧……
Take my life... and finish the conquest of stars...
他破碎的战甲停止了起伏，未瞑目的眼神依旧坚毅，如锐利的断刃。
His shattered armor ceases its rise and fall. His unclosed eyes remain resolute, sharp as a broken blade.
蠢狗…唔…看来我也没办法复仇了，暴君…没有我…你的征程必将落败……
You mutt... heh... looks like I won't get my revenge after all. Tyrant... without me, your conquest is doomed...
我会在冥河中等着你蒙羞到来…砍下你顶着皇冠的头颅……
I'll be waiting for you in the River of Souls... to slice off that crown-wearing head of yours...
记住…我从未向你…和命运屈服……
Remember this... I never bowed to you... or fate...
她身侧的风暴逐渐停歇，眼角的泪伴血成滩，如金雨积作的浅潭。
The storm beside her slowly stills, tears and blood pooling at her eyes' corners like shallow ponds of golden rain.
他们第一次和谐共处，停留在永远的和平之中，再无争斗。
For the first time, they coexist in harmony, dwelling in eternal peace, with no more conflicts.
你命令我去阻断海路，清理来自后方的威胁——
You ordered me to seal the sea route and handle threats from the rear...
但你为何不等我归来…为何要让先锋军贸然出击，让他们白白牺牲？！
So why didn't you wait for me to return!? Why send the vanguard ahead and let them die in vain!?
白白牺牲？你错了——他们的金血不会白流，众爵已为我铺好了成为「律法」神明的道路。
