Die in vain? No, you're wrong. Their golden blood won't be spilled for nothing. The other dukes have paved the road for me to become the god of Law.
…「律法」的试炼？你从未向他人提及。它究竟是……
...The Trial of Law? You never spoke of this to anyone. What is...?
<color=#dbc291ff>意欲承载「律法」之人，必为此世剔除诅咒，以受诅者之血献祭——</color>
<color=#dbc291ff>The one who wishes to bear Law must purge this world of its curse, and offer the blood of the accursed as sacrifice...</color>
我一直在思索，塔兰顿口中的诅咒之血究竟为何物。后来，我终于找到了答案……
I pondered long on what Talanton meant by "blood of the accursed." Then, I found the answer...
你与我，所有被神谕感召的黄金裔，皆是受到诅咒之人。正如那狂妄的神礼官所说，金血是「毁灭」的因子，是与世界的命运互斥之物。
You, I, and every Chrysos Heir summoned by the prophecy are the accursed ones. Just like that arrogant Theoros said, our golden blood is the agent of Destruction, the antithesis of the world's fate.
断锋爵，冬霖爵，曳石爵…他们的前路在那一刻已被决断。在一场光荣的征程中领受牺牲，是我能赐予他们的最后赠礼。
Dux Fragoris, Dux Brumalis, Dux Helkolithist... their fate was sealed at that moment. Dying on a glorious campaign was the final gift I could give them.
你的语气，就仿佛他们不是因你的阴谋和冷血而死。他们的忠诚在你眼中一文不值？！
You speak as if they didn't die because of your cold-blooded schemes. Was their loyalty meaningless to you!?
<color=#dbc291ff>逐火是不断失却的旅途，生命亦微不足惜。</color>
<color=#dbc291ff>Losses are a constant on the Flame-Chase journey, among which even life itself holds little value.</color>
身为人臣，若在出征时没有此等觉悟——如你所言，浅薄的忠诚不过是敷衍，不值一提。
If a subject marches to war without that conviction... then yes, as you said, shallow loyalty means nothing.
你为何要以清理后方为由将我支开？你…心中还剩下哪怕一丝人性么？
You sent me away under the pretense of guarding the rear. Was there... any shred of humanity left in you?
因为你还有必须承担的职责，仅此而已。除你之外，无人能背负起法吉娜的神权。
Because you still have a duty no one else can bear. Only you can uphold Phagousa's divine authority.
现在，选择权在你手上。放下束缚你的忠诚，用那对剑刺穿我的心脏…或是继续与我同行，掐断海洋仅剩的一丝呼吸。
The choice is yours now. Cast off the chains of loyalty and drive those blades through my heart. Or... stand with me, and sever the ocean's last breath.
若你已不再与我共享愿景，不再承认我将为翁法罗斯编织崭新的「律法」，那就尽管夺走我的性命吧……
If you no longer share my vision or believe in the new Law I seek to weave for Amphoreus, then go on and end me...
翁法罗斯的凯撒或许冷酷，或许暴戾，但决不虚伪。当我说出「生命亦是微不足惜的代价」——
The Imperator of Amphoreus may be ruthless and cruel, but never a hypocrite. When I say "life itself holds little value."
<color=#dbc291ff>你可确信，凯撒已准备好为迈向星海的野心献祭一切！</color>
<color=#dbc291ff>Know this: I am ready to sacrifice everything for the ambition to conquer the sea of stars!</color>
现在，你已看到：那残暴的凯撒不惜以五百名英雄的鲜血作为祭品，完成「律法」的试炼…而我那位可怜的典狱官，她的苦难也自此掀开了扉页。
Now you've seen it: The brutal Imperator was willing to spill the blood of five hundred heroes to complete the Trial of Law. As for my poor warden... her suffering had only just begun.
我并非叙述者。你错过的那段历史，我没有义务，也无兴趣为你填补。
I'm no storyteller. I have no duty nor interest in filling in the history you've missed.
我只希望你能见证，在黄金裔向我宣战之前，那位凯撒做出了何等灭绝人性的选择。
I just want you to witness the monstrous choice the Imperator made before the Chrysos Heir turned their blades against me.
Why are you showing me this?
呵呵…早在两千年前，我便不再心怀侥幸，能以言辞化解冲突……
Heh... I gave up on using words to solve conflicts two thousand years ago...
You think I'd falter because of this?
呵呵…阁下说笑了。早在两千年前，我便不再心怀侥幸，能以言辞化解冲突……
Heh... you jest. I gave up on using words to solve conflicts two thousand years ago...
They're nowhere near as bad as you.
呵呵…阁下还是如此擅长活跃气氛。
Heh... you've always had a flair for lightening the mood, haven't you?
早在两千年前，我便不再心怀侥幸，能以言辞化解冲突……
I gave up on using words to solve conflicts two thousand years ago...
但我也不会任机会溜走。毕竟，如若有万分之一的机会能在你的心壁上凿出裂缝……
But I won't squander a chance, not even a sliver of one. If there's even a crack in the walls of your conviction...
我的胜利，便会确凿无疑。
Then my victory is already assured.
既然过往告一段落，就将「岁月」翻回当下——
Now that the past is settled, let's turn the page and bring Time back to the present...
然后，继续下潜，直至深渊尽头。
And dive deeper still until we reach the very bottom of the abyss.
你已沉默了许久，剑旗爵…开始后悔自己的选择了？
You've been silent a long while, Dux Gladiorum... starting to doubt your decision?
不必多言了，法吉娜的涡心就在前方。
Save your breath. The Vortex of Phagousa lies just ahead.
试炼过后…你我再无瓜葛。
After the trial... there's nothing left between us.
你不愿游向群星了么，剑旗爵？
So you'll stop swimming toward the stars, Dux Gladiorum?
我本是一尾海中的鱼儿。天上的群星…与我无干。
I was always a creature of the sea. The stars in the sky... were never meant for me.
于此地，那位以典狱官自居的囚徒做出了选择……
It was here that the prisoner, who thinks herself the prison warden, made her choice...
剑旗爵…过去的百年里，我已数不清你在此地驻足过几回了。
Dux Gladiorum... I've lost count of how many times you've stood here over the past centuries.
你是个聒噪的囚徒，吕枯耳戈斯。
You talk too much for a prisoner, Lycurgus.
两位篡改了「律法」的天才，还有这一世牺牲的所有黄金裔，他们——你们——合力削弱了我的力量，但无法剥夺我的意志。
Two geniuses who defied "Law" and all the Chrysos Heirs who sacrificed themselves in this cycle worked together to chip away my strength, but they — you — can never affect my will.
只要意志依旧完整，我便是自由的。
And as long as my will remains intact, I am free.
呵…别得意得太早，我仍有办法束缚你的神魂。
Heh... don't get ahead of yourself. I still have ways to chain your divine soul.
我很期待。不过，你的使命也差不多该结束了吧——
Please. Do surprise me. But I'd say, your mission is nearly done here, isn't it?
于此地，你自法吉娜的身躯中剜出了「海洋」的火种；也是在这里，你与那位凯撒双双登神，成为翁法罗斯的支柱。那之后……
It was here you gorged out the Coreflame of Ocean from Phagousa's body. It was here you and that Imperator both completed apotheosis, becoming pillars of Amphoreus. And after that...
<color=#dbc291ff>你将剑刃刺入了她的心脏，成为了弑君的臣子，弑神的半神——至少，历史是如此描绘那场惨剧。</color>
<color=#dbc291ff>You drove your blade into her heart, a loyal subject turned regicide, a demigod committing deicide, or so the history books paint that tragedy.</color>
但倘若真相如此，千年时光已逝，你却仍在守候那位凯撒的墓碑，履行对她的忠诚…为什么？
But if that's the truth, then why, after a thousand years, are you still here, guarding the Imperator's grave? Still bound by loyalty?
如此想来…或许，被囚禁于此的不止我一人。
Come to think of it... perhaps I'm not the only one imprisoned here.
你的从容的确会掀起我胸间的怒涛…仿佛在此接受惩罚的并非是你，而是失去了一切的我们。
Your calm does stir the rage in me... As if the one paying the price here isn't you, but us, the ones who lost everything.
呵呵…因为我已为自己的愿景等待了三千万世，无数个千年。
Hehe... That's only because I've waited thirty million lifetimes for my vision to be realized. Countless millennia.
孤独从未向我露出过它致命的一面。事实上，对洞穴的囚徒而言，它更像一位能帮助我专注思考的老朋友。
Loneliness never once showed me its fatal side. In fact, for a prisoner of the cave, it's more like an old friend. One that helps me think.
但对你却不同，剑旗爵。孤独自寂静的深海中伸出魔爪，它正在蚕食着你，逐渐剥离你的心智——你会退化成那些失迷海妖的模样吗？多么令人惋惜……

But you're different, Dux Gladiorum. Loneliness has crept from the silent depths, sinking its claws into your mind. Bit by bit, it's peeling you apart... Will you regress into one of those lost, mad sirens? Oh, what a shame that would be...
你是对的，吕枯耳戈斯。忠诚，诅咒，同胞们的陨落，漫无尽头的等待…对于一条看不见光明的鱼来说，这些枷锁太过沉重了。
You're right, Lycurgus. Loyalty, curse, the fall of my kin, and this endless waiting... these shackles are too heavy for a fish that cannot perceive any light.
我游不出牵引着我陷落的漩涡，也没有多么坚定的信念，能如众人所愿，强迫自己等待那个人的归来。
I can't break free of the whirlpool that's pulling me under. Nor do I have the unwavering resolve to force myself to wait for that person's return, as everyone hoped for.
啊…天外的救世主，我的行刑官。{M#他}{F#她}还要过多久才会来到此地？
Ah... Deliverer from beyond the sky. My executioner. How much longer until {F#s}he arrives here?
我不知道。恐怕也没人能为我解答。
I don't know. And I doubt anyone does.
这将是我最后一次履行你的律令了。
This will be the last time I carry out your decree.
自你将我收入麾下，赐我剑旗爵的名号，我的乐声便只为他人响起。无数次，为了你的阳谋和心计，我以海妖的哼鸣将众人引入幻境……

Ever since you took me under your banner and made me the Dux Gladiorum, my music has belonged to others. Time and time again, I used the siren's song to lure the unwary into illusions for your schemes and strategies...
<color=#dbc291ff>现在，就让海妖「海列屈拉」为自己歌唱，让我踏入一场无休无止的幻梦吧。</color>
<color=#dbc291ff>Now... let the siren "Helektra" sing for herself. Let me step into an endless dream of my own making.</color>
<color=#dbc291ff>海洋啊！我向你献上余生的清醒和自由——以换取与「虚无」抗争的力量，不辜负众英雄的牺牲。</color>

<color=#dbc291ff>O great ocean! I offer you the rest of my clarity and my freedom, in exchange for the strength to stand against the "Nihility"... and honor the sacrifices of the fallen heroes.</color>
Gray Fry, Deliverer from beyond the sky...
当你穿过岁月的洋流来到此地，你会听到我的独奏——它将引领你前往世界的心脏。
When you ride the current of time and find your way here, you'll hear my solo. It will guide you to the heart of this world.
那时，我或许还沉浸在自缚的醉梦中。但我会履行这场接力的职责，捍卫封印神礼观众的枷锁。
By then, I may still be lost in my self-wrought slumber. But I'll uphold my part of this long relay and guard the shackles that seal the Theoros.
还记得么？若要将人从海妖的歌声中唤醒，你需要的东西……
Do you still remember? To awaken someone from a siren's voice, you'll need...
我赠予你的礼物——但愿那时你还留在身边。
The gift I once gave you... May you still have it when the time comes.
待你归来之时，就请以那蜜酿浇奠这座墓碑吧。
When you return, please pour that honey brew upon this grave.
它记录了我们所有人的抗争和牺牲。但愿你能看到，这跨越千年的漫长接力，翁法罗斯为你的归来谱写的前奏。
It holds the story of all of our struggles and sacrifices. May you see it one day, the prelude Amphoreus wrote for your return, carried forward through a thousand-year relay.
当你的哀悼结束时，我大概也会从醉梦中苏醒了吧？就请你顺着余音的轨迹，找到我的所在——
When your mourning ends, I'll likely wake from my dream as well. Then, follow the trail of echoes and find me.
<color=#dbc291ff>然后，我们再一同去为那「智识」的罪人行刑吧。</color>
<color=#dbc291ff>And together, we'll bring judgment upon the sinner who defiled the Erudition.</color>
终于…<unbreak>33550336</unbreak>次轮回又<unbreak>4931</unbreak>年后，翁法罗斯的终幕将要落下了。
At long last... <unbreak>33,550,336</unbreak> cycles and <unbreak>4,931</unbreak> years later, Amphoreus' final curtain is ready to fall.
洞穴中的影子献出一切，却只是在戏仿洞外的「生命」，令人惋惜的徒劳。
The shadows within the cave gave everything, yet all they did was mimic "life" outside its walls. A futile effort steeped in sorrow.
他们所做的一切，已经打破了昏暗的洞穴，寻得了「开拓」的火种……
Everything they did shattered the darkness of this cave and unearthed the Coreflame of {M#the }Trailblaze...
现在，我会用这颗火种，点燃翁法罗斯的黎明！
And now, with that Coreflame, I'll light the dawn of Amphoreus!
…呵呵，你找到的答案，仍是命途的意志吗？
...Heh. Do you still choose the will of the Paths as your answer in the end?
我不认可这个答案，但是我认可你对他们的赞许，容我收回方才的失言。
I do not agree with that answer, but I respect your tribute to them. Allow me to take back my earlier words.
为表歉意，以见证此世全部命运的神礼观众之名：让我加入您的悼念，送别长眠于此的英雄们……
As an apology, and in the name of Theoros who saw all destinies in this world, let me join you in mourning. Let us bid farewell to the heroes who sleep here...
然后，再让我们当面角逐，决定这轮新日该承载谁的火光。
And then, let us face each other and decide whose flame will rise with this new dawn.
你将杯中的蜜酿倾倒在碑前，琥珀液体流入碑文的裂隙，仿佛英雄在畅饮泼洒的敬意。
You pour the honey brew onto the gravestone, amber liquid seeping into the crevices of the inscriptions, as if the heroes are drinking deep of the spilled tribute.
敬维吉妮娅，阿波罗尼，塞涅卡，拉比努斯，刻律德菈……
To Verginia, Apollonius, Seneca, Labienus, and Cerydra...
以一场残酷的献祭，他们点亮此世「律法」的星辰，推动翁法罗斯的命运滚滚向前。
Through a brutal sacrifice, they lit the stars of Law in this world, propelling Amphoreus' fate forward.
于海市蜃楼的泡影中，他们将踏足星间的空想托付予后世的英雄。
In the shimmering mirage of illusion, they entrusted their dreams to ride among the stars to the hero yet to come.
你再次倾倒圣杯，石碑沐浴蜜酿，如半神沐浴金血，承载命运的洗练。
You tip the chalice once more, the honey brew bathing the stone like golden blood upon a demigod, forging destiny through its purifying flow.
敬阿格莱雅，缇里西庇俄丝，迈德漠斯，遐蝶，阿那克萨戈拉斯，赛法利娅，雅辛忒丝……
To Aglaea, Tribios, Mydeimos, Castorice, Anaxagoras, Cifera, Hyacinthia...
以一场持续千年的接力，面对远超自身的敌手，他们在徒劳的抗争中赢得惨胜。
In a relay spanning a thousand years, they stood against enemies far beyond their strength, and won a bitter victory through what seemed like futile resistance.
而在那同样以徒劳为题的三千万世回归中，他们亦忠实履行了自己对实验的义务，始终如一。
And in that same thirty million cycles, also marked by futility, they remained steadfast in fulfilling their duty to the experiment... unchanging, unwavering.
逝者的祭奠以此作结。最后，请容我再次举杯，敬我那彷徨的典狱官，为忠诚所困的囚人——
Let this be the end of mourning the fallen. At last, allow me one final toast to the lost prison warden, a prisoner bound by loyalty.
在法吉娜蜜露的浇灌下，她将于千年的醉梦中醒来，演唱自己使命的最后乐章。
Bathed in the Honeydew of Phagousa, she will awaken from her thousand-year dream and sing the final song of her mission.
这座旧世的墓碑是海妖幻境的锚点，海列屈拉用于自缚的符号。同时，它也正是好戏开幕时我曾声明的，翁法罗斯的缩影……

This tombstone of the old world serves as the anchor of the siren's illusion, a sigil Helektra used to bind herself. At the same time, it is the very thing I once proclaimed at the start of the show: a microcosm of Amphoreus itself...
<color=#dbc291ff>一群自缚于洞穴中的囚徒自比英雄，以苦难为桂冠，与影子和回声同台共演的史诗。</color>
<color=#dbc291ff>A group of prisoners bound themselves in a cave, crowning their suffering with heroism, an epic staged with shadows and echoes.</color>
现在，亲手摧毁它，粉碎这场幻梦吧。就此，神礼观众将暂时离场，而当我们再次相遇——
Now, destroy it. End the illusion. The Theoros will take his leave for now. And when next we meet...
那便是决定翁法罗斯，乃至银河命运的时分。
That shall be the moment that decides the fate of Amphoreus and the entire cosmos.
现在，从虚假的宴会离席吧——
Now, step away from this false banquet...
而后，登上那血腥的舞台。
And then, onto that bloody stage.
错乱的时空，映照出她的迷惘——
The twisted time and space reflect her confusion...
救、救世主？{M#他}{F#她}竟然回来了……
...And so, the Imperator's crimes were veiled.
可惜，眼前不过是历史的残响。
Sadly, all you see is a remnant of history.
你的介入，也同样是徒劳的回音。
And your interference is just another equally futile echo.
这不是救世主吗？你终于来了！
Isn't that the Deliverer? You finally made it!
玩失踪的救世主，你还有脸回来啊！
Playing dead, huh? Deliverer, you've got some nerve coming back!
A sovereign and the sword at her side.
放眼寰宇诸界，对照组数不胜数，而他们的结局…也多是悲剧。
There are countless counterparts across the cosmos. Most of their stories end in... tragedy.
（前路在水下吗？要用欧洛尼斯宝珠，将过去的「时象仪」带来……）
(Is the path ahead underwater? I need the Oronyx Orb to bring back the Chrono Vessel from the past...)
打破岁月的器皿，让这池死水倒转吧——
Shatter the vessel of time, and let this stagnant pool start to flow again...
正如翁法罗斯支离破碎的命运。
Just like the broken fate of Amphoreus.
This hidden gate leads to the Vortex...
快步迈向我们的重逢吧…救世主。
Hurry now... the time of our reunion draws near, Deliverer.
乘浪的船队被浪卷入深水，逐火的若虫被火烧作飞灰，多么可悲。
The fleet that rode the waves was dragged down into the deep... the flame-chasing nymphs were reduced to ash... what a tragedy.
而你，救世主——也将见证这金色的死亡。
And you, Deliverer, shall bear witness to this golden death.
Will reach its end at long last.
But whose name does it bear?
典狱官的沉醉即将结束，而囚徒也将得到自由……
The prison warden's dream is nearly over. And the prisoner will soon be freed...
往最后的刑场——将我处决，或被我处决。
To the final execution ground, where I shall be executed, or be the executioner.
前进吧，为了世人的心愿！
Go forth. For the hopes of humankind!
前进吧，为了救世的责任！
Go forth. For the duty of deliverance!
前进吧，为了逐火的信念！
Go forth. For the belief in Flame-Chase!
前进吧，为了荣耀的金血！
Go forth. For the golden blood's glory!
祭拜海洋的宫殿，与涡心相连的圣所，也曾是第一次逐火的战场……
The palace that worshiped the ocean, the sanctuary connected to the Vortex, was also once the battlefield of the first Flame Chase...
她的酣歌令此处岁月驻足，禁锢我的身躯，躲避灵魂的磨损——只为等候你的归来。
Her exuberant song halted the passage of time in this place, imprisoning my body and shielding her soul from deterioration, all just to await your return.
我与这片天地都将停滞于此…直至与你重逢。
This world and I shall halt here... until we meet again.
The flow of time has slowed down...
什么时候更新的慢放功能？
When was the slo-mo feature added?
致那些为了逐火而牺牲的黄金裔们——他们的命运不为神谕所示，却不因其微渺而自惭自卑，决然地将金血挥洒于逐火的道路。

To the Chrysos Heirs who gave their lives chasing flame — Their fates were not foretold by prophecy, yet they bore no shame in their insignificance. With unwavering resolve, they shed golden blood along the Flame-Chase Journey.
「断锋爵」拉比努斯，生于光历<unbreak>3743</unbreak>年，逝于光历<unbreak>3960</unbreak>年。
"Dux Fragoris" Labienus. Born Light Calendar <unbreak>3743</unbreak>. Deceased Light Calendar <unbreak>3960</unbreak>.
「冬霖爵」塞涅卡，生于光历<unbreak>3749</unbreak>年，逝于光历<unbreak>3960</unbreak>年。
"Dux Brumalis" Seneca. Born Light Calendar <unbreak>3749</unbreak>. Deceased Light Calendar <unbreak>3960</unbreak>.
「吟风爵」维吉妮娅，生于光历<unbreak>3853</unbreak>年，逝于光历<unbreak>3960</unbreak>年。
"Dux Carminum" Verginia. Born Light Calendar <unbreak>3853</unbreak>. Deceased Light Calendar <unbreak>3960</unbreak>.
「曳石爵」阿波罗尼，生于光历<unbreak>3704</unbreak>年，逝于光历<unbreak>3960</unbreak>年。
"Dux Helkolithist" Apollonius. Born Light Calendar <unbreak>3704</unbreak>. Deceased Light Calendar <unbreak>3960</unbreak>.
At the end of the long epitaph...
「律法之半神」，「凯撒」刻律德菈…逝于光历3960年。
Cerydra the Imperator, the Demigod of Law... Deceased Light Calendar 3960.
浇奠第一次逐火之旅的英雄们。
Libate for the heroes of the first Flame-Chase Journey.
致那些为了新世界而献身的黄金裔们——他们的命运谨如神谕所示，也许无论时空如何轮转，都会恰逢世界所需之时降世，只为行其职责、全其夙愿。

To the Chrysos Heirs who gave their lives for a new world — Their fates, as foretold by prophecy, are to be born whenever the world needs them, irrespective of how time and space may shift, all to fulfill their duty and answer their calling.
「大地之半神」荒笛，生于光历前约<unbreak>2000</unbreak>年，逝于光历<unbreak>3961</unbreak>年。
Terravox, the Demigod of Earth. Born approx. <unbreak>2000</unbreak> years before the Light Calendar system. Deceased Light Calendar <unbreak>3961</unbreak>.
「浪漫之半神」阿格莱雅，生于光历<unbreak>3860</unbreak>年，逝于光历<unbreak>4210</unbreak>年。
Aglaea, the Demigod of Romance. Born Light Calendar <unbreak>3860</unbreak>. Deceased Light Calendar <unbreak>4210</unbreak>.
「死亡之半神」遐蝶，生于光历？？？年，逝于光历<unbreak>4253</unbreak>年。
Castorice, the Demigod of Death. Born Light Calendar ???. Deceased Light Calendar <unbreak>4253</unbreak>.
「纷争之半神」迈德漠斯，生于光历<unbreak>4071</unbreak>年，逝于光历<unbreak>4284</unbreak>年。
Mydeimos, the Demigod of Strife. Born Light Calendar <unbreak>4071</unbreak>. Deceased Light Calendar <unbreak>4284</unbreak>.
「门径之半神」缇里西庇俄丝，生于光历<unbreak>3720</unbreak>年，最后一位逝于光历<unbreak>4295</unbreak>年。
Tribios, the Demigod of Passage. Born Light Calendar <unbreak>3720</unbreak>. The last piece of her deceased in Light Calendar <unbreak>4295</unbreak>.
「诡计之半神」赛法利娅，生于光历<unbreak>3942</unbreak>年，逝于光历<unbreak>4534</unbreak>年。
Cifera, the Demigod of Trickery. Born Light Calendar <unbreak>3942</unbreak>. Deceased Light Calendar <unbreak>4534</unbreak>.
「理性之半神」阿那克萨戈拉斯，生于光历<unbreak>4065</unbreak>年，逝于光历<unbreak>4534</unbreak>年。
Anaxagoras, the Demigod of Reason. Born Light Calendar <unbreak>4065</unbreak>. Deceased Light Calendar <unbreak>4534</unbreak>.
「天空之半神」雅辛忒丝，生于光历<unbreak>4297</unbreak>年，逝于光历<unbreak>4602</unbreak>年。
Hyacinthia, the Demigod of Sky. Born Light Calendar <unbreak>4297</unbreak>. Deceased Light Calendar <unbreak>4602</unbreak>.
在墓志铭的末尾，一行尚未刻完的铭文——
At the end of the epitaph, a line left unfinished...
「海洋之半神」海列屈拉，生于光历3860年，逝于光历    年。
Helektra, "Demigod of Ocean." Born Light Calendar 3860. Deceased Light Calendar .
浇奠第二次逐火之旅的英雄们。
Libate for the heroes of the second Flame-Chase Journey.
熟悉的英雄们洋溢着微笑，庆祝你的归来…然而，你知晓这一切仍是记忆中的虚妄。
Familiar heroes beam with joy, celebrating your return... yet you know this, too, remains a hollow memory.
在「海洋」的约束下，「岁月」也沉入迷醉的乱流，令你的祷言力量被洋流减缓……
Under the constraints of the "Ocean," "Time" sinks into intoxicating turbulence, causing your prayer's power to be slowed by the currents...
小灰鱼儿，请允许我对你道一声谢。
Little Gray Fry... Please, accept my thanks.
世界步入毁灭后，唯剩我一人用歌声维系这场孤独的宴会。千百年来，我向那{RUBY_B#翁法罗斯的天幕}无光之海{RUBY_E#}祈愿，期待它能投来回音，可虚空从未作答……

I was the only one left after the world was destroyed, and I maintained this lonesome feast with my songs. I have prayed to that {RUBY_B#Amphoreus's sky}lightless sea{RUBY_E#} for centuries, hoping it would reply to me, yet the emptiness never answered...
万幸，你如约而至。人们的等待终究没有被辜负。
Thankfully, you arrived as promised, and everyone's wait was not in vain.
Your long wait must have felt like torture.
能在徒劳的海渊中捕捉到一丝微光，已是最大的慰藉。比起那些被遗忘的人，我无权诉说煎熬。
To see a single trace of light in the abyss of futility was already my greatest consolation. When compared to those who have been forgotten... I have no right to complain about my torment.
Are you still holding it together?
我的理智虽然遭受折磨，但我的剑刃依旧锋利，这双手依旧敏捷，只要能捍卫最后的战场，清醒与否又何妨？
Even though madness claws at my mind, my sword stays sharp, my hands agile. If I can uphold this last battlefield, clarity is but an afterthought.
谢谢，我最后一位听众…呵，这大概也是我能听见的最后一句嘉奖了。
Thank you, final audience of mine... Heh. This is probably the last praise I'll ever hear in my life.
接下来，你我就要走向世界的终点。
Now... You and I will walk towards the end of this world.
这一刻，英雄们已经等待了太久。就让我们以剑明志吧。
The heroes have waited for this moment for far too long. Let us use our blades to testify our resolve.
海洋的囚徒、身负三千万世罪孽的神礼观众、「智识」的奴仆——
O prisoner of the seas, Theoros carrying thirty million cycles' of sin, slave of the Erudition...
现身吧：救世主已经归来，行刑的时刻到了。
Show yourself! The Deliverer has returned, and the time of your execution draws near.
我看见：一位错把谬误当作真理的觉醒者返回了洞穴，试图将同伴带入{M#他}{F#她}曾沐浴过的阳光……
I see an awakened human who has mistakenly taken fallacies as truths, and has returned to the cave to try to bring {M#his}{F#her} friends into the sunlight {F#s}he once bathed in...
可惜，囚徒始终为囚徒，连自己被囚禁的事实都无法洞见。
Alas, prisoners will always be prisoners, blind to the very chains that bind them.
作为此世唯二具备自由意志的存在，我对您的抉择表示惋惜。但我将保留您表达的权利，毕竟每一位演员都应有谢幕的台词。

As the only other existence with free will in this world, I express regret toward your choice, but I shall retain your right to express yourself. After all, every actor should have a final line before they bow out.
我拭目以待。以决定银河命运的高潮作为此世的黄昏，多么恰当。
I eagerly look forward to it. The last dusk this world will ever see shall become the climax that decides the fate of the cosmos. Oh, what an appropriate end.
翁法罗斯的半神们用尽全力将我拘禁于此，可惜——
The Amphorean demigods used every ounce of their strength to constrain me here, yet regrettably...
容我更正：「拘禁」并非「击败」。对于诸位英雄而言，这微小的差别具备决定性的意义——
Allow me to correct your statement: "constrain" does not mean "defeated," and for heroes like yourself, that nuance could make all the difference...
作为旁白，你的话太多了。
For a narrator, you're awfully talkative.
相信我，这是最后一幕了。以决定银河命运的高潮作为此世的黄昏，多么恰当。
Trust me. This will be the final scene. The last dusk this world will ever see shall become the climax that decides the fate of the cosmos. What an appropriate end.
我的思想寄宿于「神话之外」，战胜一道投映在实验中的化身毫无意义。我的身躯是火光映出的阴影，话语是洞中徘徊的余音。

My cognition resides in the Exomyth. It is pointless to defeat my avatar, projected into the experiment. My body is the shadow cast on the wall by the fire, and my words are lingering echoes within the cave.
戏中人要如何才能与观众抗衡？卡厄斯兰那做不到，半神们的牺牲亦是徒劳。而被你们寄予厚望的两位天才——
How can a character in the play fight against the audience? Khaslana failed. The demigods' sacrifices were pointless. As for the two geniuses you placed such high hopes on...
试问：他们此时又身在何方？
I ask of you: where are they now?
光历<unbreak>3960</unbreak>年 凯撒遇刺后
Light Calendar <unbreak>3960</unbreak>, after the Imperator was assassinated
迷茫和顿悟总是形影相随，对于天才更是如此。
Confusion and epiphany always go hand in hand. That's particularly true for geniuses.
恰如现在，二位一定倍感困惑：为何在一名寻常智械构筑的世界中，你们始终无法在正面战场取得胜果？
You must be very confused about why you could not gain a straightforward victory in a world constructed by an ordinary Intellitron.
寻常智械？别再故作姿态了，前辈……
An ordinary Intellitron? Cut the pretence, Senior Society Member.
你精心打造的面具已被揭开，我们解明了翁法罗斯的真身：<color=#dbc291ff>它是历史上第一台「权杖」，最初的原型机——博识尊神体的一部分。</color>

We've torn off your meticulous mask and figured out Amphoreus's true form: <color=#dbc291ff>It's part of the primordial Prototype Machine, the first Scepter ever created... In other words, it's a detached part of Nous's divine corpus.</color>
正因如此，它才具备毁灭「智识」的潜力。而掌握星神系统改造知识的人……
That's why it has the potential to destroy Erudition. As for who would be able to control the Aeonic system to rewrite knowledge...
古往今来有且只有一位。
...Only one person has ever managed such a feat.
现在，你必须给俱乐部一个说法了。一个确切的答案，而不是用冗长的比喻掩盖真相……
You better have an explanation for the Society. We want an actual answer, not another prolonged metaphor to cover up the truth.
Why are "you" the one doing this? Answer me!
事已至此，仅作为对后世的敬意，我便给二位一个理性的回应吧。
Since things have reached this point, I'll give you two a rational answer, purely as a courtesy to posterity.
答案显而易见。故：不必说出那个名字。称我为<color=#dbc291ff>天才</color>不过是银河的谬误，相比后来者，我并非更具智慧，只是最早触碰了{RUBY_B#「虚数之树」理论}宇宙的边界{RUBY_E#}，又率先以错误的思想定义了{RUBY_B#原动力}「生命的第一因」{RUBY_E#}。

The answer is obvious, so there's no need to say that name out loud. The cosmos made a mistake in calling me a <color=#dbc291ff>genius</color>. I do not possess more wisdom than those who came after me. I was just the first to touch upon the {RUBY_B#the "Imaginary Tree" theory}universe's border{RUBY_E#}, and the first to define {RUBY_B#Primum Mobile}"the prime mover of life"{RUBY_E#} with incorrect logic.
翁法罗斯正如银河的缩影，人们生来便是果壳中的囚徒。如那返回洞穴，向囚徒们宣扬日光的狂人。我的悲哀在于，我引领同胞们踏上了一条迈向深渊的绝路……

Amphoreus is a miniature of the cosmos, where all are born prisoners inside the nutshell called the universe. Like the madman who returned to the cave and preached about the daylight to his fellow prisoners, my greatest sorrow is that I led my peers down a road that plunges into the abyss, from which there is no return...
一座名为「命途」的至暗牢笼。
...I led them into a lightless cage called "Paths."
我创造了一尊连自己都无法掌控的机械神明。而后，祂又在无穷的演算和进化中化作一场空前绝后的噩梦——
I created a Mechanical God that even I cannot control, and then... THEY became an unparalleled nightmare through THEIR endless extrapolations and evolutions.
<color=#dbc291ff>祂以「智识」为名，却试图定义「已知」，封锁「可能」。在祂之后，不再有新的法则诞生，人类被永远囚禁于「星神」的洞穴之中。</color>

<color=#dbc291ff>THEY bore the name of the Erudition, yet THEY tried to define "the known" and to seal off all "possibilities." No new rules were ever born after THEIR ascension, and humanity will forever be shackled within the cave known as "Aeons."</color>
因而，于生命尽头，我以十四行代数式重写自我意识，将逻辑核心分布于九具躯体中，只为在后世完成对「博识尊」的终极否定，消弭亲手犯下的过错——

Therefore, as my organic life neared its end, I coded my consciousness using quatorzain algebraic expressions and spread my logic core over nine bodies, all to finalize my ultimate denial of Nous in the future and to erase my wrongs with my own hands.
<color=#dbc291ff>而吕枯耳戈斯，只是其中之一。</color>
<color=#dbc291ff>As for Lycurgus, he is only one of these nine vessels.</color>
令人叹服的意志。同为「智识」行者，我完全能理解您追求真理的执念。
What an astounding strength of will. As a fellow pathstrider of Erudition, I fully understand your obsession with seeking the truth.
因此，您也一定能理解：在与「博识尊」同源的代数世界中，你们绝无可能是我的对手。
You surely see it... you cannot possibly stand up to me in this algebraic world sharing its origin with Nous.
但，谨代表一切有思想的生灵：我们决不会容忍如此冰冷而残酷的暴行。
However, I hereby speak for all sentient lifeforms: we will never allow such a cruel atrocity to occur.
比喻堆得再多，也掩盖不了你在做的事：银河中的「铁墓」仅仅是未完成品，就足以污染一切无机世界的生命逻辑……

You can pile your metaphors mountain-high, but they won't change the act you're committing. The Irontomb out there in the cosmos is still a technical beta version, and yet it's already powerful enough to corrupt the life logic of all inorganic worlds.
一旦翁法罗斯的绝灭大君成为下个知识奇点——你可是第一位天才，怎么可能不清楚后果？
In other words, when the Lord Ravager within Amphoreus becomes the next Knowledge Singularity... There's no way you wouldn't have grasped the consequences, First Genius, is there?
当然。在将二位彻底驱逐前，我不介意再作最后一次解答：
Of course I am fully aware. I don't mind answering you one last time before I thoroughly exile you from this world:
关于未来的宏伟图景：无论有机或无机构成，一切受「铁墓」感染的生命行为都将成为真正的随机函数。若在银河区间内计算它们的积分，便会得出一个美妙的常量——

My grandiose vision for the future is this: whether organic or inorganic, every act of any life-form infected by the Irontomb will become a true random function. If one were to compute their integral across the breadth of the cosmos, one would obtain a marvelous constant...
<color=#dbc291ff>Ω — What I call "The Fall of Erudition."</color>
…而在它蕴含的无限中，一个不可预测，不受「智识」桎梏的新宇宙将在混沌中萌芽。
Then, within the infinity nurtured by that constant, a new universe shall bud in the chaos. A universe that cannot be predicted... and not shackled by the Erudition.
我身为第一位在洞穴中觉醒的囚徒，理应引领其他盲者回归正途，抵达真正的阳光下。
As the first prisoner to awaken in the cave, I must lead the others who are blind back onto the right path and reach true sunlight.
所以，诸位明白了么？正如卡厄斯兰那所说，「毁灭」并非过程，而是结果……
Do you understand me now? As Khaslana stated, "Destruction" is not the process, but the outcome...
是一场大破大立的变革，和万物皆焚后的新生。
It is revolution through complete annihilation... and the grand rebirth after all has been reduced to ash.
I'll never agree with your views.
这不是你玩弄命运的理由。
That's not a reason for you to toy with fate.
住口！这才不是白厄的主张。
Shut it! That's not what Phainon believed at all.
翁法罗斯人早已给出回答。无论是做那被吞食的小鱼，又或成为巨鲸，迎来盛大的沉落……
The Amphoreans already answered long ago: be it as a tiny fish destined to be swallowed, or as a giant whale poised for a magnificent descent...
我，海列屈拉，曾为凯撒的臣子，如今是救世主的锋刃——都将与命运战至最后一刻。
We will all fight against fate till our last breath. That includes me, Helektra, once the Imperator's subject, now the Deliverer's blade!
高贵的骑士精神，令人动容。
为表敬意，在这历史性的一刻，鄙人也将展现真实的自我，并为各位提供一条微不足道的学术建议。
I will also show my true self to you on this momentous occasion as a gesture of respect, and provide an insignificant academic suggestion.
<color=#dbc291ff>以下话语出自天才俱乐部#1之口：赞达尔•壹•桑原，宇宙始末的</color>{RUBY_B#<color=#dbc291ff>第一推动者</color>}<color=#dbc291ff>隐德来希</color>{RUBY_E#}<color=#dbc291ff>——</color>

<color=#dbc291ff>Thus speaks Genius Society #1, Zandar One Kuwabara, the </color>{RUBY_B#<color=#dbc291ff>Prime Mover</color>}<color=#dbc291ff>Entelechy</color>{RUBY_E#}<color=#dbc291ff> of the universe's Alpha and Omega...</color>
不必为真理愤怒：一道算式的价值惟在于答案本身——
There's no need to rage against the truth. The value of any formula resides only in its answer.
至于求解的过程，无论优雅或暴烈，庄严或谐谑——
As for the process of solving it... No matter how elegant, violent, solemn, or humorous...
若你对来古士身份的推测属实，即便我们能解开终极协议的限制，正面战胜他的概率仍低于可接受阈值。

If your hypothesis of Lygus's identity is true, then even if we remove the restrictions of the Ultimate Protocol, the chances of us defeating him in a head-on battle will still remain lower than the acceptable threshold.
所以，胜负的关键依旧在于{NICKNAME}{F#女士}{M#先生}……
Therefore, victory will still hinge upon {M#Mr.}{F#Miss} {NICKNAME}...
继续说吧，也许我们在想同一件事。
Go on. Maybe we're thinking about the same thing.
来古士的思想寄宿于「神话之外」。他既是实验内部的推动者，也是外部的观测者。
Lygus's cognition resides in the Exomyth. He is both an instigator within the experiment and the observer outside of it.
逻辑：其灵感回路能同时处理世界内外不同的时间流速。
Logic: His Inspiration Circuit can simultaneously process the different time flows in and out of that world.
这就是棘手的地方：他同时存在于两条时间线，而它们的内部时钟天差地别。在漫长的实验过程里，智械哥的神经完全习惯了这种状态，所以他才有主场优势。

That's where things get tricky. He simultaneously exists in two different timelines where the internal clocks are wildly different. That old Intellitron's neurons have completely gotten used to that over this prolonged experiment, and that's why he holds home-field advantage.
如果有更多时间，你我也能做到。可惜现在没有如果，也没有时间。
You and I should be able to manage that too, if given more time. Unfortunately, there's no "if," and we don't have more time.
——所以，我们才要反转思路，将他的优势扭转为「弱点」。
That's why we need to change our way of thinking and turn his advantage into a weakness.
都提到了{NICKNAME}和我，很容易联想到吧？人家的直觉一向很准。
You've already mentioned {NICKNAME} and I, so it's an easy connection to make, no? My intuition has always been very on-point.
不错，那我就单刀直入了：既然在翁法罗斯里，他的思考速度远超常人，我们现在要做的，就是通过外力把一段「记忆」植入他的灵感回路——
Good. Then I'll cut to the chase: Since his thinking speed far exceeds that of normal people within Amphoreus, we are going to externally plant a "memory" into his Inspiration Circuit...
——然后，按下单集循环，直到他妥协为止。
Then command it to loop endlessly until he gives in.
再灵敏和坚固的灵感回路，也无法抵御数据洪流的饱和式攻击。当信息量远超其思维过滤能力，他就不得不专注于思考这段记忆。

Even the most flexible and sturdy Inspiration Circuit cannot withstand the traffic of a full-on information flood. When the amount of information exceeds his cognition filter's capacities, he will have no choice but to focus on processing this memory.
这时候，翁法罗斯赋予他的多线处理优势就能让他彻底崩溃：记忆里的一道画面在我们看来只有一秒，对他来说却是几千万、甚至上亿次运算……

That's when the parallel processing advantage he gained via Amphoreus will completely destroy him. An image from a person's memory played in real-time might only be a second for us, but for him in Amphorean time? It could be millions or even billions of calculations...
他只能眼睁睁看着自己，被关进这座由「记忆」打造的囚笼。
He won't be able to do anything but watch as he's locked into this prison forged by "memories."
<color=#dbc291ff>如此一来，我们就能以另一种形式，让他陷入和英雄们同样的轮回，在没有尽头的循环里感受孤独和痛苦……</color>
<color=#dbc291ff>Then we can entrap him in the same kind of cycle as the heroes were in, and get him to experience loneliness and pain in that endless recurrence...</color>
能和天才们心有灵犀，真是莫大的荣幸呢。
It's my greatest honor to be on the same page as the geniuses.
问题在于，{NICKNAME}还在智械哥的掌心里，一时半会没法答复我们。但我相信{M#他}{F#她}不会拒绝，所以如何实施这个计划，取决于你。
{NICKNAME} is still in that old Intellitron's hands and won't be able to respond to us anytime soon, but I don't think {F#s}he'd refuse. So, it's up to you to figure out how to execute this plan.
见你的第一眼我就知道，虽然不知道发生了什么，但现在的你——是一道记忆的「模因」。
I'm not sure how this happened, but I knew it as soon as I saw you. You are currently a "memetic entity" of the Remembrance.
用天外的话说，我似乎是被称作<color=#dbc291ff>「忆灵」</color>的存在。刚刚好，这样人家就能担当「记忆」的载体，为决战也出一份力啦。

Yes. I seem to be something you folks beyond the sky call a <color=#dbc291ff>"memosprite,"</color> but that's fine by me. It suits me perfectly. I can serve as the vessel of memories and do my part for the final battle.
所以在那之前，我们有义务告诉你……
But before that, we have to tell you...
你的命途性质很特殊，绝不会只是「忆灵」这么简单。但有一件事我可以确定——
The Path characteristic you exhibit is very special. There's no way you're just a simple "memosprite." However, I'm sure about one thing...
你是诞生于翁法罗斯，却因{NICKNAME}的到来而苏醒，因{M#他}{F#她}行于「记忆」命途而成长的模因。
You are a memetic entity born in Amphoreus, yet you only awakened with {NICKNAME}'s arrival, and only matured as {F#s}he embarked on the Path of Remembrance.
这意味着，你只能依附于{NICKNAME}的记忆存在。如果有一天——哪怕只是短短几秒——{M#他}{F#她}忘记了你，或是和翁法罗斯失去最后一丝联系……

That means your existence is completely attached to {NICKNAME}'s memories. If there ever comes a day when {F#s}he forgets about you for even a few seconds or loses {M#his}{F#her} last connection with Amphoreus...
做好最坏的打算——你会消失在忆域中，连一行数字都不会留下。
Then you must be prepared for the worst. You will disappear in the Memory Zone, utterly gone, without even a single line of data to remember you by.
但这一切早就发生了，不是吗？
But that's already happened, hasn't it?
难怪我总有种预感。这样一来，也算应验了人家一直以来的观点……
No wonder I've always had a weird hunch. But that also means I was right in thinking...
只要和{NICKNAME}一起，我们就什么都做得到。
As long as {NICKNAME} and I are together, we can do anything.
好久不见，{NICKNAME}。分开的这段时间，有没有想念人家？
Long time no see, {NICKNAME}. Did you miss me while you were away?
是呀，一千年的时光，真的好久好久……
Yep. A thousand years was suuuch a long time...
翁法罗斯每一个人，都在等待「救世主」的归来。
And everyone in Amphoreus was waiting for the Deliverer's return.
Of course I missed you. It's good to see you're doing well.
人家也是哦，这一千年，一直在等待{NICKNAME}。
Same here. I've been waiting for {NICKNAME} for a thousand years...
就像翁法罗斯的每一个人，都在等待「救世主」的归来。
Like how everyone in Amphoreus was also waiting for the Deliverer's return.
没有。我有更重要的事要思考。
I didn't miss you. I had more important things to think about.
当然，毕竟{NICKNAME}肩上扛着沉沉的使命，还有整个世界的重量……
I see. After all, your burden sure is heavy, {NICKNAME}. You're carrying the weight of the entire world...
但人家不同，只是个普普通通的神秘女孩，所以这一千年，我一直在等待{NICKNAME}。
But that's not who I am. I'm just an average girl with some secrets. So... I've been waiting for {NICKNAME} for a thousand years.
就像翁法罗斯的每一个人，都在等待「救世主」的归来。
Like how everyone in Amphoreus was also waiting for the Deliverer's return.
天才们的计划，{NICKNAME}应该从「记忆」中得知啦。为了不被来古士察觉，我必须小心翼翼地躲在「岁月」的角落，等待机会来临。
{NICKNAME} probably already knew about the geniuses' plans from that "memory." I had to hide really well in a corner in Time so Lygus wouldn't find me, and wait for the right opportunity.
也就是现在，他在世界内部的化身被破坏，两条时间线产生交集的这一瞬间。
Which is now, the moment when his manifestation in this world is destroyed and his twin timelines are intersecting.
一直瞒着{NICKNAME}，对不起呀…作为道歉，等到尘埃落定，我会把这一千年的故事原原本本地讲给你听。
I'm sorry for keeping this a secret from you all this time... I'll tell you the entire unedited story of this millennium as an apology after this is all over.
而现在，就让我们携手，以「记忆」的力量完成最后一步吧。
But for now, let's join hands and complete the final step with the power of "the Remembrance."
Yep! By the way, speaking of "joining hands"...
不确定该怎么做，靠你了…
I'm not sure what to do. It's up to you...
没问题！{NICKNAME}只要放轻松就好啦。对了，说到「携手」……
Not a problem! {NICKNAME} can just relax. By the way, speaking of "joining hands"...
别大意，做好最坏的打算。
Don't let your guard down. Be prepared for the worst.
{NICKNAME}总是这么认真，所以才令人安心呢。对了，说到「携手」……
{NICKNAME} is always so serious, and that's why you always feel so reassuring. By the way, speaking of "joining hands"...
在走上舞台前，请允许我再小小任性一次吧♪
Can I please do something before we go on stage? ♪
{NICKNAME}，还记得我们在树庭开过的玩笑吗？
Remember the joke we made back at the Grove, {NICKNAME}?
现在，人家的手是不是很漂亮呢？
真是奇妙的感觉…一时间，仿佛有无数回忆一起涌上心头。
What a fascinating feeling... Like countless memories all swelling up at once.
{NICKNAME}，你呢？当我们彼此触碰，你又感受到了什么？
What about you, {NICKNAME}? What did you feel when we touched each other?
You feel very tangible. Very real.
是吗？那我会很开心！如果一缕记忆能带给人触动，那代表她一定是幸福的，对吧？
Really? That makes me really happy! If memories can move people, then it must've been a happy memory, right?
感到紧张吗？其实我也是。明明还是「迷迷」的时候，我和{NICKNAME}都不会这么矜持。
Are you nervous? Me too, actually. {NICKNAME} and I weren't so reserved around each other when I was still Mem.
人和人的相处，真是不可思议呀。
It's just a hand. No biggie.
嘻，{NICKNAME}也太诚实了吧？不过，这种纯粹正是你独一无二的魅力。
Hahaha, {NICKNAME} is way too honest! But that innocence is what makes you so uniquely charming.
让人家换种更浪漫的说法吧：即便只是一次对掌的牵绊，也足以跨越时空，对吧？
I'm gonna make it sound more romantic. It means even a bond formed over one touch is enough to transcend space-time.
那，就请铭记下此刻的感受，把它写在名为「心」的书页中，保存起来吧。
Now, please remember what you're feeling right now, write it down in your "heart," and keep it there.
想要珍藏的记忆，一定不会轻易逝去。即使被时光的长河磨洗，也会留下存在的痕迹。
Memories you want to treasure will never fade away. Even if immersed in the long river of time, these memories will still leave traces of their existence.
所以，如果记忆中的风景模糊了，就伸手去触碰它。
So, if the view in your memory ever grows fuzzy, just reach out and touch it.
就像每一个共读睡前故事的夜晚，抹去岁月的霜，擦亮回忆的轮廓，让它重新成为心灵的力量。
It's like reading bedtime stories together at night. It wipes away the chill of passing time, sharpens the outline of memory, and restores its power to nourish the spirit.
接下来，人家就要带上这份力量，短暂离开你的身边，走进漫长的循环啦。
Now, I'll carry this power with me... and for a little while, I must part from you, as I step into the long cycles of this world.
让那崭新的未来，如「我们」所书♪
Let that bright future be "As We Have Written" ♪
即便「岁月」的权能，也无法调动整台权杖，令翁法罗斯的演算陷入循环……
Even the authority of Time cannot command the entire Scepter, nor can it plunge the Amphorean extrapolation into a loop...
这并非系统紊乱，而是我被植入了「记忆」的模因么？
If this was no system malfunction, then was I implanted with a memetic entity of the Remembrance?
一下子就看穿了！不愧是大家口中的「第一位天才」呢。
You guessed it right away! As expected from someone people call the First Genius.
如果你再肆意妄为，刚才那一幕还会不断上演。无论如何，我和{NICKNAME}都不会让你离开这段「记忆」……
I'm gonna keep doing what I just did if you don't stop, you know? {NICKNAME} and I won't allow you to leave this "memory" no matter what happens...
「赞达尔」阁下，你已经身陷囹圄了哦？
Which means you are now trapped, Lord Zandar.
优雅的构思，精妙的执行。可惜，被时间掣肘的并非我，而是你。
An elegant idea and an exquisite execution. Regrettably, it is you who are restrained by time, not me.
你应当理解，耐心是鄙人最强有力的武器。于我而言，「等待」和「胜利」是相同的概念。
Know that patience is my greatest weapon. "Waiting" and "victory" are the same for me.
和卡厄斯兰那一样，在那近乎永恒的刹那中，最先崩溃的会是你。而我只需等待——等待另一只徒劳的若虫跌下悬崖，坠入深渊。

You will crumble before I do in this moment stretched out to an eternity, just like Khaslana will. Yet all I need to do is to wait, as yet another futile bug falls down the cliff and into the bottomless abyss.
这次又是「粉色小虫」吗？人家的形象也太多变啦……
Now I'm a pink bug? My looks are seriously changing all the time...
但你说的没错。如果只是打造另一座牢笼，问题的本质并不会被解决。
But you're not wrong. We're definitely not gonna solve the problem if we just put you in another prison.
所以，我们原本也没打算这么做哦？
So that's why we never wanted to do that in the first place!
仅作为对先行者的敬意，由我来解答您的困惑：阁下是否听说过阿斯德纳星系的「联觉梦境」？很有趣，在久远的过去，那里也有一座监狱。

I shall answer your confusion purely out of my respect for those who came before me. Have you heard of the Synesthesia Dreamscape in the Asdana system? Interestingly, in the distant past, that place once had a prison, too.
在忆质充盈的环境下，生命体知觉有一定概率产生某种关联。即便在空间上相隔极远，也能感知彼此的状态变化。我将这种现象称为「忆域纠缠」。

Lifeforms living in that environment abundant with memoria have a chance to connect their perceptions with each other's. Even across great spatial divides, they're able to detect shifts in one another's states. I call this phenomenon "Memory Zone Entanglement."
在阿斯德纳，人们利用这种现象——加以「同谐」和「记忆」的触媒——建造了一片梦中的国度。
In Asdana, people made use of that phenomenon to build a nation within a dream... after adding in the catalysts of the Harmony and Remembrance, that is.
恰如此时此刻，你们运用相同的原理，步入了我所在的牢笼？
Is that how you walked into my prison cell? Using those same principles?
我更愿意将其称作「谈判席」，赞达尔阁下。但您的理解没错。我们恰好有一位擅长「调律」的盟友，而{NICKNAME}和昔涟小姐……

I would much rather call this location "our negotiation table," Lord Zandar. Nonetheless, your hypothesis is correct. We happen to have an ally skilled in "tuning," while {NICKNAME} and Miss Cyrene...
如你所见，他们的决心令人叹服。有如此坚定的「忆灵」相助，我们的对话——也将持续很久。
...both have an astonishing amount of resolve, which I'm sure you can testify to. I am also sure that with the support of such a resolute memosprite, our conversation can last for a long, long time.
只是「听故事」而已，人家最擅长这个了。
I'm the best at "listening to stories," you know.
那，激动人心的「智识」交锋，就拜托两位天才啦？
I'll leave the exciting clash of the Erudition to you two geniuses.
头脑风暴，我喜欢。还是二打一，更喜欢了。
A brainstorm? I like it. And it's two against one? I like it even more.
来谈谈吧，赞达尔，猜猜在指针走过下一秒前，我们能在你的脑袋里挖出多少东西，又能想出多少种解决你的办法？
Let's talk, Zandar. Take a guess. How much do you reckon we can dig out of your brain before the next second? And how many ways can we find to deal with you?
况且，现在的你——根本没机会抽走我们的{RUBY_B#开拓者}王牌{RUBY_E#}哪。
Besides, in your current predicament, there's no way you can take our {RUBY_B#Trailblazer}trump card{RUBY_E#} away.
去吧，小家伙，扭转「再创世」——！
Go, little one. Go overturn the "Era Nova"!
…呵，看来在我无从企及的深水里，你们进行了一场隐秘的狩猎啊。
...Heh, it seems you had conducted a secret hunt in the depths that even I cannot reach.
既然如此，向前游吧，去给这段征途一个恰如其分的结局。
In that case... go, swim onward and give this campaign a fitting end.
让我用歌声为你饯行，灰鱼儿。愿这歌声能穿透岁月…成为新世界的序曲。
I shall send you off with my song, gray fry. May this song penetrate time... and become the prelude to the new world.
她全身心地投入在为你送行的献唱中。
She pours her heart and soul into singing you farewell.
在这千年间，这首曲目从未在斯缇科西亚停歇。
For a thousand years, this melody has never ceased in Styxia.
剑旗爵，你的任务已经完成了。
Dux Gladiorum, you have completed your duty.
新的黎明即将升起，何不向着它的光芒游去？
A new dawn is about to rise. Why not swim towards it?
你早已死去了，凯撒。离开我的心吧。
You died long ago, Imperator. Depart from my mind.
但你对凯撒的忠诚没有随我一同死去。
But your duty towards the Imperator did not die with me.
现在，它不会再拘束你了。今后的无数个日夜，你尽可为自己操办一场又一场盛大的宴会……
That duty will bind you no more. You will be able to hold for yourself one grandiose feast after another in the endless days to come.
去吧，去和那救世主一同游往天外的大海。
So go. Go and swim towards that ocean beyond the sky with the Deliverer.
是那小跟班书中的一页。我对她下令，当一切行至终点时，要将这页留赠予你。
A page out of that sidekick's book. I commanded her to gift this page to you when everything finally reaches the end.
千年前，那场血腥的宴会后，那小跟班找到了我，为我展示了她的日记本。
That sidekick found me after the bloody feast a thousand years ago and showed me her diary.
光历<unbreak>3960</unbreak>年 法吉娜战役前
Light Calendar <unbreak>3960</unbreak>, before the campaign against Phagousa
这是…那救世主的经历？真是身临其境。
Is this... that Deliverer's experience? It's truly immersive.
据说，天外的人们会借助这种力量，将过去的风景存入名为「光锥」的水晶。
People beyond the sky apparently utilize this power to seal past scenery into crystals they call "Light Cones."
不过，人家对「记忆」的理解也浅尝辄止，没办法完整地复现过去。但我会尽力用讲述代替那些缺失的部分。
But I only know so much about the Remembrance, so I can't completely replicate the past... But I'll do my best to talk about the missing parts.
呵，我洗耳恭听。全力以赴吧：倘若讲得太过无趣，又或失言，你们就要和「律法」失之交臂了。
Heh. I'm all ears. Go on then. Do your best. But if your chatter gets too boring or if I deem it offensive, then Law will become forever beyond your reach.
嗯！我相信您一定会满意的，毕竟…迈向未知的前路，从来都是人的本能呀。
Got it! I'm sure you'll find this to your liking. After all... It's human nature to want to embark on a journey into the unknown.
这是…一座天空中的堡垒？
Is this... A fortress in the sky?
这是{NICKNAME}遨游星海的第一站，叫做「黑塔」空间站。嗯，就当它是一座超级大的神悟树庭吧。
This is the first step of {NICKNAME}'s journey among the starry seas. This place is called the Herta Space Station. Ummm... Just think of it as a supersized Grove of Epiphany.
喔，原来是那女巫的地盘。宴会上，是她和另一位安提基色拉人助我解了围。
Oh. So it's the territory of that witch. She and another Antikytheran lent me a helping hand back at the banquet.
那边——这段记忆里，{NICKNAME}好像在和黑塔女士聊天呢。
Look, over there. Looks like {NICKNAME} is talking to Madam Herta in this memory.
听听看吧？她是如何看待这个由星神和命途构建的世界……
Let's go listen to what she thinks about this world, all constructed by Aeons and Paths...
这座空间站很漂亮吧，{NICKNAME}？不过，等你跟着星穹列车再走远点儿——不出两站吧——就会知道这景色也不算什么。
Pretty nice space station, huh, {NICKNAME}? But just wait. After a couple more stops on the Astral Express, you'll see sights that'll make this place look ordinary.
银河很大，大到「未知」远远多于「已知」，但它们最后都算不上什么。你走得越远，越能理解这句话。
The cosmos is so vast that the "unknowns" far outnumber the "knowns," but none of them will end up being anything amazing. The farther you go, the more you'll understand what I mean.
所以，跟着无名客好好干吧。没事记得给艾丝妲发个消息。
So do your best with the Nameless. Break a leg. And remember to send an update or two to Asta when you've got some downtime.
此人想法倒是与我一致……
She certainly shares my way of thinking...
只不过，比起血与火的征服，他们选择了更温和的道路。
Only that, instead of a conquest through blood and fire, they chose a gentler path.
黑塔女士和螺丝咕姆先生，被人们称为「天才」。据说只有银河中最具智慧的人，才能得到翁法罗斯真正的造物主「博识尊」的青睐。
People call Madam Herta and Mister Screwllum "geniuses." Apparently, only the smartest people in the cosmos can receive the blessings of Nous, Amphoreus's true creator.
身份如此高贵，也只是神明的附庸么？
Do you mean that even individuals of such nobility are merely subordinates to a god?
恰恰相反：是他们中的第一位创造了神明呢。但具体细节人家就不清楚了……
On the contrary, after all, it was the very first of them who created the god. But I don't really know all the details about that...
有机会的话，说不定您可以问问黑塔女士本人。
You might be able to ask Madam Herta herself when you get the chance.
接下来，让我们再去其他世界看看吧？
Let's go check out some other worlds next, shall we?
这颗星星叫做「雅利洛-VI」。啊，这个名字冷冰冰的，还是「贝洛伯格」更好听。
This star is named Jarilo-VI. Aww, that name sounds so cold... Belobog sounds better.
眼前的女孩，身份和凯撒相似——她是这个世界的「大守护者」，是一位在灾难中挺身而出的领袖。
The girl we see here holds a similar station to you, Imperator. She's the Supreme Guardian of this world, a leader who took up the mantle of government during a disaster.
看不出来，这个世界的女皇竟如此年幼。
I did not expect the empress of this world to be so young.
只谈论外表，凯撒也不遑多让呢……
Well, your appearance isn't much older...
多亏你们的帮助，我们才能顺利度过危机。与公司的合作，既是机遇，也是挑战…但无论如何，都是我们回归宇宙的重要一步。
It's all thanks to you that we survived the crisis. The collaboration with the IPC is both an opportunity and a challenge... Nonetheless, it's an important step in our journey back into the universe.
这个世界和翁法罗斯很像，也被关在天幕下，直到无名客到来，才得以回归群星……
This world was sealed beneath its sky just like Amphoreus was, and they only managed to reconnect with the stars when the Nameless arrived...
她口中的「公司」…听上去是个更大的势力？
That "IPC" she spoke of... Is it a more powerful organization?
是的。他们用财富的流通征服了许多世界，开辟了辽阔的疆域。在翁法罗斯之外，有许多这般强大的同盟，它们行于和「毁灭」截然不同的道路。

Yes. The IPC conquered many worlds through trade and opened up a vast territory that way. There are many such powerful alliances beyond Amphoreus, and they all walk on roads different from the Destruction.
回到大守护者和她的贝洛伯格——您看，他们不也找到了和平走向群星的方法么？
Coming back to the Supreme Guardian and her Belobog... Didn't they find a peaceful way to enter the interstellar community?
这是谬论。那「公司」不可能单凭财货实现如此伟业。就算它表面上十足体面，内里也必定沾染着血腥的杀戮和剥削。

That cannot be true. That "IPC" would never have grown so big on trade alone. It may pretend to be a wealthy merchant with clean hands, but I am willing to bet that it grew fat on gory oppression and bloodshed.
而在它的征服之路上，弱者必遭欺凌，甚至毁灭——难道这冰球在面对公司时就没有想过舍弃尊严，卑躬屈膝？我不相信。

Its path of conquest must have had no mercy for the weak and would have destroyed them if needed. Are you telling me that this snowland never thought about tossing its dignity to the wind and kneeling to the IPC? I will not believe it.
我绝不允许凯撒的帝国任人宰割。翁法罗斯必须成为强权，不容寰宇轻视。
I will never allow the Imperator's empire to be sullied by others. Amphoreus must become a power so strong that no interstellar foreigner would dare to look down upon us.
但是，凯撒，贝洛伯格没有您想的那样软弱…不信，您听？
Imperator... Belobog isn't as weak as you imagine. Listen.
…我确实产生过动摇，但现在已经明白：贝洛伯格必须学会行走、奔跑，最终脱离他人的搀扶，自立于星间。
...I indeed hesitated, but now I understand what we must do. Belobog must learn how to walk on her own, until she no longer needs the support of others, and can stand on her two feet among the stars.
我相信那天一定会到来，哪怕我无法亲眼目睹。
Even if I may not live to see it, I believe such a day will surely come.
你看，他们心中仍有尊严。有朝一日，这份希望能融化坚冰，助他们走向繁荣。
They still have their dignity intact. One day, that hope will melt through the ice and help them into a prosperous tomorrow.
可惜，银河的秩序早已铸成。若不倚仗「毁灭」，弱者只能自限于弱肉强食的旧律，直到化为尘埃。

But the order of the cosmos is already set in stone. The old laws decree that only the strong survive, binding the weak in an unbroken chain, until they wither and turn to dust. Unless... they embrace the power of the Destruction.
翁法罗斯，我们…必须击碎旧律，成为星间新的秩序。
We... No... Amphoreus must shatter the old law and become the new order among the stars.
啊，既然说到了「秩序」…{NICKNAME}的一位旅伴，或许能为您带来启发。
Speaking of the Order... Another one of {NICKNAME}'s companions may be able to enlighten you further on that.
Let's go to the next page.
呵…如此奢华，着实惹人惊叹。
Huh... Such opulence does indeed evoke astonishment.
这个世界名叫匹诺康尼，是一座建立在梦土中的永恒之城。
This world is called Penacony, an Eternal City built upon a land of dreams.
这也是{NICKNAME}的上一站——那时候，他们经历了一番危险却也激动人心的冒险。
It's also {NICKNAME}'s previous stop, where they went through a risky but exciting adventure.
说说吧。远处那人头上长着翎羽…我着实有些好奇。
Tell me about it, then. That man standing afar has wings on his head... I am truly curious.
我想再多看一眼这「白日梦」酒店的光景，{NICKNAME}。
I wish to gaze upon the views of the Reverie Hotel one more time, {NICKNAME}.
下一次回到这里，我便是一名纯粹的过客，透过旅行者的眼眸，我无比熟悉的一切或许也会变得十分不同吧？
I'll be just a traveler when I come back here again. And perhaps, through a traveler's eyes, even the things I once knew so well will feel strangely different.
匹诺康尼是汇聚一切理想的「同谐」之地。它主张不容干涉的自由，因而在声色犬马中步入迷茫……
Penacony is a land of the Harmony where all dreams and hopes merge and combine. It believes in unrestrained freedom, and that's how it lost itself in shallow delights...
于是，您眼前这位少年选择用「秩序」的力量谱写律法，希望能在梦中塑造一处绝对幸福的圣地。
Then, this young man before you chose to rewrite its laws using the power of the Order, hoping to shape a dream-bound paradise of perfect happiness.
但我理想中的乐园依旧遥远。或许，暂且与各位无名客同行，能令我的求索之路展现更多可能。
Yet the paradise of my dreams remains far away. Perhaps a brief journey with the Nameless can show me more possibilities in my search for paradise.
至于匹诺康尼的未来应是何种样貌，就由她…他们来「开拓」吧。
As for what Penacony should look like, it'll be up to her... no, up to their "trailblazing" now.
听起来，这座理想之邦已经成为了过去式。
It sounds like this ideal kingdom is no more.
嗯，因为沉沦于美梦是看不到明天的，人们最终选择了从梦中醒来。
That's right. The people chose to wake up at the end. You can't see tomorrow when drowning in sweet dreams.
此人的「律法」中只有神和造物，但未留给「人」一席之地。能接受一时失败，再度踏上旅程，证明他活得很清醒。

This individual's "Law" acknowledged only gods and constructs, leaving no space for humanity. And yet, the fact that he could accept defeat and resume his journey shows a rare self-awareness and clarity of mind.
You are also very self-aware, Imperator.
那您应该知道，在「毁灭」许诺的世界里，同样没有给「人」留下余地。
Then you must know that the world promised by the Destruction also has no place for "humanity."
吕枯耳戈斯口蜜腹剑，我再清楚不过。已经看得够多了，带我回去吧。
I am indeed very aware of Lycurgus's honeyed words of deceit. I have seen enough. Take me back.
那就以最后一幕，为这段记忆之旅画上句号吧。
Then let's wrap up this trip down memory lane with one last scene.
很漂亮吧？这就是翁法罗斯。这个世界，就在这条无穷的光带中绵延流淌。
Isn't it pretty? That's our Amphoreus. Our world flows and meanders in this endless band of light.
我们虽然在神明的设计中挣扎，尚且不是真正的生命…但，翁法罗斯的黄金裔依旧选择同命运抗争，书写了和「人」无异的神话。

Though we were born from the designs of the gods and are not yet truly alive... the Chrysos Heirs of Amphoreus still chose to stand against fate and carved a legend no different from that of humankind.
凯撒，您真的要否定过去三千万世的英雄们——连同您自己在内——屈服于暴虐的命运，让操弄一切的「毁灭」如愿以偿吗？

Will you really renounce the heroes in the world's previous thirty million cycles, Imperator? Including even yourself? ...Will you bow to brutal destiny and allow that puppet master named the Destruction to have THEIR wish?
我知道你在想什么，小跟班。你想借那救世主的回忆打动我，令律法的天平倾向{F#她}{M#他}和那两位天才，对么？
I know what you want to do, sidekick. You want to use that Deliverer's memories to influence me and tilt the scales of law toward {M#him}{F#her} and the two geniuses.
人家的心思，真是一下子就被凯撒看穿了呀。
You really saw right through me, Imperator.
若连人心都无法读懂，又何谈掌控帝国？
How can one rule an empire if one is incapable of understanding people's minds?
「律法」的去向，我意已决。但在挪动下一步棋子前……
I have decided on Law's final destination. However, before I move my next chess piece...
我还想在这记忆里确认一事。告诉我，小跟班，在{M#他}{F#她}「开拓」的旅途中——
Before we go on, tell me this, sidekick. Throughout {M#his}{F#her} "trailblaze"...
Was there ever a memory of the ocean?
大海啊。我的摇篮，我的故乡。
The ocean... My cradle. My home.
<color=#dbc291ff>「汝将于天地境界之海完成征服，长眠于涛声中——」</color>
<color=#dbc291ff>"You shall complete your conquest in the ocean at the boundaries of this world, and eternally slumber in the sound of tides..."</color>
<color=#dbc291ff>「汝将长眠于涛声中，于天地境界之海完成征服——」</color>
<color=#dbc291ff>"You shall eternally slumber in the sound of tides, and complete your conquest in the ocean at the boundaries of this world..."</color>
预言如海蛇首尾相衔，多么优美，好似欢歌……
Our prophecies aligned as flawlessly as a sea snake circling upon itself... an elegant loop, like a joyful hymn.
正如翁法罗斯，一同你我二人的命运，像那回环的海流。
Like the circulating ocean current. Like our two fates. Like Amphoreus itself.
试炼已经结束了。现在，告诉我吧……
The trial is over. So, tell me...
「律法」的神权，将会落入何人之手？
Who will own the divine authority of "Law"?
我不会将它交给任何人。
I won't give it to anyone.
我即是「律法」。凯撒的冠冕，岂有拱手相让的道理？
I am the "Law." Why should I give my imperial crown to any other?
救世主也好，神礼官也罢，皆从天外而来，无权干涉我亲自征服的土地。翁法罗斯的「律法」，自当由她的主人裁定。

Both the Deliverer and the Theoros came from beyond the sky. They have no right to interfere with the lands I conquered with my own two hands. The "Law" of Amphoreus shall be determined by Amphoreus's master.
你究竟在试炼中看到了什么？
What exactly did you see in the trial?
一切。关于这世界运行规则的一切，那神礼官口中的演算法则…「终极协议」。
Everything. I saw everything regarding the rules of this world's operation. I saw the laws of extrapolation that Theoros spoke of... I saw the "Ultimate Protocol."
只需献上等价的供物，我便能以自身意志改写此世的法则。善可以为恶，丑可以为美，弱可以为强……
As long as I offer a sacrifice of equal weight, I can rewrite the laws of this world according to my will. I can turn good into evil, ugliness into beauty, and weakness into strength...
而命运开出的价码非常公平。
Fate gave me a very fair deal.
<color=#dbc291ff>改写一条律令，仅需一位半神的性命。</color>
<color=#dbc291ff>One rule change... for the life of one demigod.</color>
What... are you planning to do?
答案显而易见。无须仰仗天外伟力，我们也可以征服群星——只需付出一些合理的牺牲。
You can't guess? We can conquer the stars without relying on any power from beyond the sky. We just need to make some reasonable sacrifices.
已经有那么多人为你的野心，为「律法」付出了生命的代价，你却仍不满足？
Your ambitions have already made so many people give up their lives for the "Law"! And you're still not done!?
我意已决，翁法罗斯必须自立于群星。
I am determined for Amphoreus to stand on her own two feet among the stars.
不可理喻。你以为一句轻飘飘的伪善之词，就能给自己的暴行开脱…？！
You are beyond reason... You think such a simple and hypocritical statement can justify your atrocities!?
「不破不立」——这就是你口中所谓的暴行。讽刺的是，它同样也是翁法罗斯变革的铁律。
"There's no new without destroying the old." That's what you consider an atrocity? Ironic, for that is also the unchanging law of Amphoreus's revolutions.
自那逐火的神谕在远方响起，命运就注定了黄金裔要燃烧鲜血，照亮这个黑暗的时代。可若没有我的征服，人们就只是旧王朝的提线木偶。

Ever since the Flame-Chase prophecy resounded in the distance, fate has decreed for the Chrysos Heirs to ignite our blood and illuminate this dark age. People would still be puppets of the old dynasty if it weren't for my conquests.
但现在看来，你的征途也不出前人：血腥、暴虐，满是压迫……
But your rule doesn't seem to be any different from your predecessors'. Bloodshed, tyranny, oppression...
You're making the same mistakes they did.
那就亲自看吧！去我建造的图书馆也好，到街头巷尾寻找流言也罢——去看看凯撒踏碎旧律、铸造新律的一生，看我的征服为这个世界带来了什么。

Go and see everything for yourself! Go to any library I've built. Go listen to the rumors on every street corner. Go and witness how the Imperator crushed the old laws and forged new ones. Go and see what my conquests brought to this world.
我涤荡了黄金战争的污垢，弥合了纷争世以来的所有分歧；我恢复了奥赫玛的权威，让凡人和黄金裔平等站上议院的讲坛；我惩罚了一切罪恶，赞赏了一切功绩……

I cleansed the Chrysos War's filth and mended all the conflicts left by the Era Bellica. I restored Okhema's might and allowed mortals and Chrysos Heirs to face each other as equals in the Council. I punished all sins and rewarded all achievements...
是我砸碎了{RUBY_B#律法之泰坦}塔兰顿{RUBY_E#}的枷锁，团结世人自救，开启了逐火的时代。这短短几句话，就是凯撒光辉的一生。
I smashed {RUBY_B#Law Titan}Talanton{RUBY_E#}'s shackles, united humankind to save themselves, and started the Flame-Chase Era. That's what the Imperator has done in her glorious life.
所以现在，听好我的遗言：历史总有一天会遗忘刻律德菈，但绝不会忘记凯撒的人民——和由她开启的逐火时代！
So, now, harken to my final words: History will eventually forget Cerydra, but it will never forget the Imperator's people or the Flame-Chase Era she began!
翁法罗斯濒临毁灭，已容不下无意义的争辩。
Amphoreus is about to be destroyed. There's no time left for pointless debates.
为了这场救世之战，我要倾覆的「律法」只有一条，要献上的半神也只有一位——
There is only one law I want to overturn to aid the final battle of deliverance, so I will only offer the life of one demigod...
海列屈拉，我以凯撒之名，最后一次对你下令。
In the name of the Imperator, I command you one last time, Helektra.
<color=#dbc291ff>为征服献身，或用剑刺入暴君的胸膛。</color>
<color=#dbc291ff>Either sacrifice yourself for conquest, or pierce this tyrant's chest with your sword.</color>
「于是，凯撒完成临终前的致辞。」
"Thus, the Imperator concluded her final speech."
「在人生最后，踏上神坛的那一刻，她将裁断命运的选择交给了最忠诚的臣子，如同她最初踏上战场时向同胞宣誓。」

"At the end of her life, at the last moment before she stepped onto the altar, she gave her most loyal subject the choice to decide fate, just as she promised her compatriots before her very first campaign."
「我已将金血分给你们。现在，英勇的同胞，跟随我，成为命运的主人！」
"My blood flows in you now! Heroic compatriots, follow me, and we'll seize fate's reins!"
「凯撒陨落。有人说，那位剑旗爵确实堕落成为弑君的叛徒；也有人说，她将暴君囚禁在浅水中，独自离去——如此一来，后者就必须为改写『律法』而了结自己……」

"The Imperator fell. Some say that the Dux Gladiorum turned traitor and killed her liege. Some say that she imprisoned the tyrant in a shallow pond of water, then left... which meant the Imperator had to kill herself to rewrite the 'Law'..."
「有关她死亡的记述层出不穷。如今，我们唯一能确信：当骑士从涡心离去，凯撒口中仍在喃喃着她们过去的征服……」
"There are countless stories about her death. All we can be sure of is, when the knight left the Vortex, the Imperator was still mumbling about their past conquests together..."
"...The beginning and the end of her existence."
不，凯撒！您尊贵无匹，怎能亲临前线？还是让我来担任旗手吧——
Imperator! Wait! How could someone of your status come to the front lines? Let me be the flag-bearer.
我问你，树庭西方关隘守军投降了吗？
The troops defending the pass to the west of the Grove. Have they surrendered?
他们一听到凯撒的威名就望风而逃，金茧关现在已经移交给第一军团了！
They ran as quickly as they could when they heard your name! The Golden Cocoon Pass is now in the First Legion's hands!
很好，多洛斯人的游击队呢？
Good. What about the Dolosian militia?
第三军团两天前点燃了山火，盆地西方已经夷为平地，只要再过几天……
The Third Legion set fire to the mountains and flattened everything west of the basin. They just need a few more days...
足够了，战机转瞬即逝，我们也等不起。最后，拉冬人的炮垒，现在还剩几座？
That is enough. We cannot afford to miss an opportunity for victory. Lastly, how many Ladonian cannons are left?
不存在了——第二军团和第四军团已经把它们彻底荡平了！
They are no more. The Second and Fourth Legions have destroyed them all.
非常好。现在他们一无退路、二无援兵、三无火力支援，我军必能迅速解放神悟树庭。
Very good. They now have no way out, no reinforcements, and no artillery support. We will be able to liberate the Grove of Epiphany in the blink of an eye.
总冲锋就在明日{RUBY_B#午夜}幕匿时{RUBY_E#}过后一刻，记住：只要我肩头的同盟旗帜没有倒下，你们就绝不能放弃前进。

We will launch the final charge one quint after the {RUBY_B#midnight}Curtain-Fall Hour{RUBY_E#} tomorrow. Remember, as long as the alliance's flag still flies on my shoulders, you must keep moving forward.
敌军战士就地处决，反抗的哲人一律押解回营，依军法处置；还有，切不可损毁藏书——去吧，通告全军！
Take no prisoners among the enemy soldiers. All sages who resist are to be captured and tried according to martial law. And do not destroy any books. Now go! Notify the entire army!
Understood! Those who are resolved to die, we salute you!
报！山之民反抗猛烈，传闻中的「开山者」亲临战场，他们的战阵滴水不漏……
Reporting in! The Mountain Dwellers are resisting fiercely, and the legendary "Mountainbreaker" has personally engaged in battle. Their formations are nigh impenetrable...
那就不必再强攻了。派斥候传讯给各军团，责令他们在{RUBY_B#黄昏}离愁时{RUBY_E#}内全部撤退到特雷托斯平原以内。
Then cease our frontal assault. Send scouts to all legions and tell them to retreat into the Tretos plains before the {RUBY_B#evening}Parting Hour{RUBY_E#}.
Wha— Are you planning to surrender?
这是战略转移。正面战场有那掣地的伏龙，足够了。
It's a strategic change of plans. The seismic walking dragon is enough for that battlefield.
伏龙…荒笛，那头愚蠢的地兽？它能做什么？
Walking dragon... You mean that stupid beast Terravox? What can they even do?
愚蠢？不，它是{RUBY_B#大地之泰坦}吉奥里亚{RUBY_E#}所有造物里最具智慧的，只有它能看清时代的流向。
Stupid? No. They are the wisest of all of {RUBY_B#Earth Titan}Georios{RUBY_E#}'s creations. Only they can perceive the currents of time.
就让它亲自料理大地的同胞吧！我们要急行军，率先战胜残敌……
Let them deal with their earthly brethren! We will advance and take the lead in defeating what remains of our enemy.
必须对敌人的羞辱给以最炽烈的报复，为给自己戴上弑神的桂冠！
I will deliver the most fiery retribution for the humiliation they dealt us, and crown myself with a god-slaying wreath!
…明白了，我这就去安排。赴死者向您致敬！
...Understood. I'll see to it. Those who are resolved to die, we salute you!
凯撒，命运三相殿来信了。
The Temple of the Three Fates sent a letter, Imperator.
他们拒绝了招降。还说，此次答复将作为对我们的最后通牒。
They refused to surrender and said this letter is their last warning to us.
去吧。告诉指挥官们，若没收到凯撒亲笔手谕，绝不得擅自发起进攻，否则格杀勿论。
Tell the commanding officers not to launch any attacks unless they receive the Imperator's handwritten approval. Disobedience will be punished by death.
命运三相的祭司不是军人，但是政治家。不要以为他们是在盲目抵抗，这群垂死的狗鼠会为自己的短视穷思竭虑，以至于比他们的敌人精明得多。

The priests of the Three Fates aren't soldiers, but politicians. Do not mistakenly believe they don't have a plan. These dying pests will wring out every idea from their brains all for short-sighted gain. They are much shrewder than we are.
我不如他们——况且，神谕也是他们的战争机器，我没有这种好运。贸然开战只会令我们陷于不利，一举一动都将受翁法罗斯所有人审判……

I am inferior to them in that regard. They also have the prophecy to wield as a weapon, something I am not blessed with. Launching an unplanned attack will only disadvantage us, as all of Amphoreus will judge our actions...
所以，像往常一样，我会亲自出马。但，这次我将孤军深入，用一场秘密谈判让命运站在我们这边。
Which means I will be heading to the battlefield myself, just as I have always done. This time, however, I will go alone. I will conduct secret negotiations to ensure fate is on our side.
是，各军团也将同时做好准备。赴死者向您致敬！
Understood! The legions will make their preparations. Those who are resolved to die, we salute you!
凯撒，为何我们不在出征的名录中？
Why are we not allowed to march out with the army, Imperator?
这是一场有去无回的远航。背负神谕的你们，不得随行。
This will be a long voyage with no return. Those of you who bear the prophecy cannot come with me.
若此战必将落败，您又为何要亲自出征？逐火之旅不能无人引领……
Why are you personally leading this battle if it's doomed to fail? The Flame-Chase Journey cannot be without a leader...
是啊，凯撒陨落，帝国必将群龙无首。但，记住了：只要能抓住机会，混乱的盘面就不会成为危局。
That is correct. The empire will be without a head when the Imperator falls. But remember, as long as you seize the right opportunities, even a chaotic game will remain winnable.
<color=#dbc291ff>我的离去，会筑成你们的长阶——待我陨落的消息传扬开来，你终会明白这个道理。</color>
<color=#dbc291ff>My departure will create a long staircase for you. You will understand what I mean when news of my death reaches your ears.</color>
刻律德菈…我们的旅途，是要结束了吗？
Cerydra... Is our journey about to be over?
踏碎旧律，铸成新律…在翁法罗斯的界限内，我的征服已经抵达了尽头。既然神谕已经宣判，凯撒必无法遂愿征服星海，那我便就此退场，不再作他想。

Destroy the old laws and forge new ones... My conquest has reached its limits within the borders of Amphoreus. Since the prophecy already decreed that the Imperator would never conquer the stars as she wished, I will bow out here and try no more.
在那之后，未来还会有背负神权的黄金裔，还有更多英雄降世……
More Chrysos Heirs bearing divine authority will be born, and many more heroes will arise...
要和平，还是要战争？要反抗暴政，还是成为下一个凯撒？我不在乎，后人自会做主。
Will they demand peace or war? Will they resist tyranny, or become the next Imperator? I do not care. The children of the future will decide for themselves.
不必为我惋惜：能杀死凯撒的人无穷无尽，但真正能毁灭她的……
Do not mourn for me. Anyone can kill the Imperator, but the only one who can truly destroy her...
「最后，我忠实地记录下凯撒生命中最为重要的数场战役。书写至此，征服即将迎来尾声。」
"At the end, I faithfully recorded the most important battles in the Imperator's life. Her conquest was about to be completed at this point in the story."
「但，不知为何，在我搁笔沉思之际，一段记忆悄然闯入了脑海。」
"However, for some reason, a memory suddenly entered my mind just as I was about to put down my pen."
「那是一场幻想列车之旅。我有幸和凯撒在星空下进行了深入交流。而在那场对话的最后，我向她问了这样一个问题——」
"It was a journey on a fantastical train. I had the honor of having a heart-to-heart conversation with the Imperator under the stars, and I asked her this question at the end of that discussion..."
您希望后人如何记住自己？为逐火献身的英雄…还是一位暴君？
How do you want history to remember you? As a hero who gave up her life for the Flame-Chase... or as a tyrant?
「她几乎没有思考，答得斩钉截铁——」
"She answered so quickly, as if she had made up her mind long ago."
我宁愿被遗忘，也不愿被定义。
I would rather be forgotten than be defined.
因为，「律法」既不可能永恒，也不可能唯一……
Because the "Law" can be neither eternal nor unchallenged...
能为历史书写下规则的，从来都惟有「人」。
And only "humanity" can pen laws into history's pages.
现在，翁法罗斯至伟大的「律法」，已被我踏破……
Now, I have shattered the greatest "Law" of Amphoreus...
The game... is nearing its end...
剑旗爵…明明…过去三千多万世…都是你亲手杀死了凯撒……
Dux Gladiorum... even though... you killed the Imperator... in the previous thirty million cycles...
但这次…你的心中…终于找到自己的「律法」了哪……
This time... you finally... found your own "Law"...
既然如此…海瑟音啊…海列屈拉……
那神谕中的「天地境界之海」…我会托人送往你的手中……
I will ask someone to deliver... the prophecy's "ocean at the boundaries of this world"... to you...
无论…你是否选择游向那里…我都不会在乎……
Will you... choose to... swim into that ocean...? I... do not care...
「凯撒口中喃喃着她的征服。城中，她的死讯已然传扬开来。」
"The Imperator muttered about her conquests, and news of her death spread in the city."
自由！解放！暴君死了！去，到街上宣告这番要闻！
Freedom! Liberty! The tyrant is dead! Go, shout this news in the streets!
各位民众，各位元老啊，大家不要惊慌失措，都站定吧——那僭主已为野心偿债了！
My people! My fellow Elders! Do not panic. Stand your ground. That tyrant has paid for her ambition with her life!
人们曾为我登峰欢呼…如今为陨落欢呼…也好，我钟爱欢呼……
People once cheered for my ascension... and now they cheer for my fall... No matter. I am fond of applause...
啊…我看到了…银河…我无法踏足的疆场啊……
Ah... I see... the cosmos... the battlefield that I cannot reach...
来世…我必将归来…让群星听到军团的战鼓…听到凯撒的威名……
I will return... in the next cycle... The stars will hear my legion's war drums... hear... the great name of... the Imperator...
「凯撒用自己的生命改写了何种律令，如今我们尚不得而知。」
"To this day, we do not know which rule the Imperator overwrote at the cost of her life."
「或许，如同凯撒的每一局对弈，真相只会在将军的那一刻揭示。」
"Perhaps the truth will only be revealed at the moment of checkmate, just like every chess game she ever played."
「但她的死令奥赫玛为之沸腾。城墙这边，捍卫自由的人们将纪念碑推倒在地；另一边，凯撒的拥护者挡在她的雕像前，竭力宣告：『皇帝还站在人群中央』。」

"We only know her death inflamed Okhema. On one side of the city, those who defended liberty toppled her statues to the ground. On the other side, her supporters put themselves between the masses and her monuments, declaring loudly that 'the sovereign is still among the people.'"
「据说，在他们争斗的每一处，金血都汇聚成了同样的铭文：还是那个名字，它属于奥赫玛最初，亦是最后的君主，『凯撒』刻律德菈。」
"It is said that golden blood congealed into the same letters everywhere they fought. It was the name borne by Okhema's first and final sovereign: the 'Imperator' Cerydra."
「但，名字的主人并没有看到这一切。她的视线投向远方，耳边的涛声盖过了人们的呐喊。」
"But the one who bore that name did not see any of this. Her gaze was cast far away, and the sound of tides in her ears drowned out the people's cries."
「在这预言中的『天地境界之海』，一汪浅浅的死水里，凯撒在思考什么呢？她在怀念往日的征服，还是在为逐火征程中罹难的千千万万同胞忏悔？」

"What was the Imperator thinking about in that prophesied 'ocean at the boundaries of this world'? In that shallow puddle of stagnant water? Was she reminiscing about her past conquests, or repenting for the millions killed for the Flame-Chase?"
「都不是。凯撒只看到水面波光粼粼，像极了恩师首度同自己对弈的那个下午，那面由日影分界的粗粝棋盘——」

"It was neither. The Imperator only saw how the surface of the water gleamed like that crude chessboard, dissected by light and shadow, in the afternoon when her teacher played against her for the first time."
你看这面棋盘，这些棋子，像什么？
Look at this chessboard. What do the pieces look like?
简直…就像夜空中的星星在熊熊燃烧哪。
They look like... the stars in the night sky ablaze.
Not a single trace of corruption...
「自你走出被污染的海洋，投入我的麾下，我便窥见你眼眸中的深渊，你内心的空洞。」
"Ever since you walked out of the tainted ocean and pledged yourself to me, I have seen the abyss in your eyes and the emptiness in your heart."
「于是，我承诺你一片崭新的海域，将凯撒的野心视作洋流，将忠诚视作火光。」
"That was why I promised you a new ocean, where the Imperator's ambitions would serve as the currents and loyalty would be its light."
「海列屈拉，我的臣子——你已尽锋刃之责。如今，神谕为我欲行之路作了断言：我的征服，注定无法迈向群星。」
"Helektra, my subject, you have done your duty as my blade. The prophecy has now made its final decree on the road I intend to walk: My conquest is doomed to never reach the stars."
「但，凯撒的承诺从不落空，所以，收下这篇记忆，那救世主之所见，天外的大海吧。」
"But the Imperator never makes empty promises. So, take this memory, this ocean beyond the sky, as witnessed by the Deliverer."
「这是凯撒所能留予一位臣子的——最后的赐赏。」
"This is the final gift... that the Imperator can leave for her subject."
很久以前，当我还是一尾海中的鱼儿，在水中畅游的时分总是那么真实。
When I was still a fish in the ocean, I always felt so genuine swimming through the waters.
但踏上陆地后，我便陷入了一出戏剧。地上的人们都戴着面具生活。于是我也穿上戏服，试图寻找自己的角色。我成为了你的利剑，宴会上的琴弦……

But once I stepped onto land, I found myself caught in a play. Every land-dweller wore a mask in their life. So I, too, donned a costume and tried to find my role in this show. I became your blade in war and the violin strings at banquets...
你还不明白吗？我既不眷恋故国的深海，也不向往天外的汪洋。
Do you still not get it? I do not long for the oceanic depths of my homeland, nor do I crave the swelling seas beyond the sky.
或许，我自己也不明白吧。到最后都不知道自己该游向何处。
Perhaps even I don't know what I want. I still don't know where I should swim to, even at the end.
但现在，只有一件事，我十分清楚。
But I know one thing right now.
鱼儿终究是鱼儿，怎能离开她栖身的海洋？
A fish is simply a fish, and she can never leave the ocean she's in.
但无论深海或大地，我或者你，两位无从逃离洞穴的囚徒……
But, whether under the ocean or on land, we two prisoners who can never escape this cave...
也能够看向洞外，仰望星光。
Can still look outside the cave and see the stars.
不得不承认：在这场实验中，十二因子对生命行为的模拟已经远超预期。
I have to admit, the twelve factors' emulation of life in this experiment has far exceeded my expectations.
所以，自己选吧，前辈。是一意孤行，让一句错误的结论成为你的遗言……
Make your choice then, Senior Society Member. Do you want to keep walking down the wrong path and be remembered for your incorrect conclusions...
还是退回观众席，给自己、翁法罗斯还有整片银河一个更好的交代。
Or do you want to return to the audience's seat and give yourself, Amphoreus, and the entire cosmos a more fitting end?
容我拒绝。已死之人绝不会惧怕死亡。
I must refuse. A dead man never fears death.
是我说的还不够明白么？别忘了人见人爱的{RUBY_B#天才俱乐部#4}「寂静领主」{RUBY_E#}，你也不想那剩下八个复制人，被她当作「智识」的病灶一块儿剪除了吧？

Did I not make myself clear? Have you forgotten about our dear {RUBY_B#Genius Society #4}"Lord of Silence"{RUBY_E#}? You wouldn't want her to consider your eight other clones as cancers within the Erudition and chop them all up, would you?
诸位的演绎结果与我大相径庭。因此，再让我提供一条学术建议吧：
Your logical deductions are vastly different from mine. Therefore, allow me to provide one more academic recommendation.
听好，我的同胞：不妨与黄金裔一同放眼天外，将下一场列神之战的全部敌手纳入计算，重新考量。
Listen, my peers. Why don't you look beyond this world, just as the Chrysos Heirs did? Re-evaluate your calculations, and take into account all enemies in the upcoming war among the Aeons.
翁法罗斯并非三重命途「纠缠」之地，而是三重命途「死斗」之地。
Amphoreus is not a place where three Paths "entangle," but where three Paths "fight to the death."
当你们将忆质用作与我抗衡的手段，何不设想这样一种可能性……
You used memoria to resist me, but did you not consider the possibility that...
<color=#dbc291ff>「记忆」和祂的孩子们，也将趁虚而入，抵达战场？</color>
<color=#dbc291ff>The Remembrance and THEIR children might have taken this opportunity to join the fray as well?</color>
喔，这不是沉默，而是回答。
Ohh. So this isn't just silence. It's the answer.
「在鳞渊境开海前，{NICKNAME}说的最后一句话是什么」…很巧妙的问题，但答案却很简单。
"What was the last thing {NICKNAME} said to you before you parted the waters at the Scalegorge Waterscape?" ...A tricky question, but one with a simple answer.
{M#He}{F#She} didn't say anything back then, right?
答对了。如此一来，我也能确信……
That's correct. And now, I'm sure...
你果然不是她。三月七不可能记得这事。
You are not March 7th. There's no way she would remember that detail.
我只警告一次——立刻，离开她的身体。
I'll only warn you once. Leave her body. Now.
这么冲动，可不像平时的你。
How impulsive. That's not like you at all.
先冷静下来吧？想想另一种可能。并非我占据了「三月七」的身体……
Why don't you calm down and think about another possibility? I didn't take over "March 7th's" body...
而是三月七取回了「我」的记忆？
Rather, it's March 7th who regained "my" memories.
第一位天才，隐德来希，赞达尔
谨记：身为博识尊的创造者，我比祂更理解…何为知识的死亡。
Remember this: As Nous's creator... I know more about the death of knowledge than THEY ever will.
小心。这…就是来古士真正的样貌。
Careful. This... is Lygus's true form.
第一位天才，隐德来希，赞达尔
「毁灭」不言自明。让我们跳过那些无趣的推导吧。
The Destruction needs no introduction. Let us skip those boring inferences.
第一位天才，隐德来希，赞达尔
当然，我更愿称之为…论证方法。
Indeed. But I prefer to call it... a method of argument.
第一位天才，隐德来希，赞达尔
「若无必要，勿增实体」——我不介意为诸位亲身示范。
"Entities must not be multiplied beyond necessity." I do not mind demonstrating this to you personally.
坚持住…我会竭力为你抵挡这场「毁灭」的海啸！
Hang in there... I'll do my best to repel this tsunami of the Destruction!
第一位天才，隐德来希，赞达尔
逻辑不是武器，而是囚具——就让我为诸位将其粉碎。
Logic is not a weapon, but a pair of shackles. Allow me to shatter them for you.
第一位天才，隐德来希，赞达尔
第一位天才，隐德来希，赞达尔
「智识」、「毁灭」，还是「开拓」？不，我会证明命途即谬误。
Erudition? Destruction? Or Trailblaze? No. I will prove that the very idea of Paths is a fallacy.
我看到了！瞄准胸椎和腰椎的连接点！破坏那里——
I see it! Target the connector between his thoracic and lumbar vertebrae! Destroy that spot...
还真是本色泽明艳的史书。
「救世主」的征途…让我拜读一番吧。
The journey of the Deliverer's conquest, heh... Let me partake in it.
Are you telling me THAT woman is Herta?
似乎…比印象里矮小些哪。
She seems... shorter than I remember.
This next stop on the journey...
和翁法罗斯有不少相似之处呢。
Has a lot of similarities to Amphoreus.
远处那貌似{RUBY_B#纷争之泰坦}尼卡多利{RUBY_E#}的，是兵器？
The object in the distance resembles {RUBY_B#Strife Titan}Nikador{RUBY_E#}. Is it a weapon?
不是哦。它的名字是…是…对了，地质改造工程单元！
No. It's called... Uhm... Right! The Geological Reconstruction Unit!
只是{RUBY_B#大地之泰坦}吉奥里亚{RUBY_E#}的眷属啊，令人失望。
下一个世界，是梦境的国度。
This next world is a nation of dreams.
第一次听说那里的故事时…嘻，我可是惊讶到说不出话来。
The first time I heard about that place, I... Ahaha, I didn't even know what to think.
光历<unbreak>3960</unbreak>年 法吉娜战役之末
Light Calendar <unbreak>3960</unbreak>, at the end of the campaign against Phagousa
时间回到不久前，你归还了「负世」火种以后……
Not long ago, after you returned the Coreflame of Worldbearing...
（终于走到了这里。交还这枚火种，由我成为「负世」的半神，就能终结翁法罗斯悲剧的轮回……）
(I'm finally here. Once I return this Coreflame and become the "Worldbearing" demigod, the cycles of Amphoreus's tragedy can finally end...)
（这一次「再创世」，就是和铁墓决战的舞台。）
(This "Era Nova" will be the arena for the final battle with Irontomb.)
(But I still feel like something's not right...)
虽然这一世，翁法罗斯没有「岁月」的半神，但「岁月」始终站在人类这边。
Even though this cycle has no demigod of Time, Time has always stood on humanity's side.
然后，就用这枚被「记忆」祝福的火种，回应他们的期许，开拓未来吧。
Then, with this Coreflame blessed by the Remembrance, respond to their hopes and blaze a trail to the future.
当你们将忆质用作与我抗衡的手段，何不设想这样一种可能性……
You used memoria to resist me, but did you not consider the possibility that...
「记忆」和祂的孩子们，也将趁虚而入，抵达战场？
The Remembrance and THEIR children might have taken this opportunity to join the fray as well?
你想说，流光忆庭也会来蹚这趟浑水？
Are you saying the Garden of Recollection is also getting involved in this unsavory mess?
求之不得。要是忆者们能扰乱你的「毁灭」实验，我一定会为他们鼓掌的。
Then I welcome them. If the Memokeepers can disrupt your little experiment of Destruction, I'll give them a standing ovation.
但你心知肚明，他们做不到。相反，窃忆者会成为你们的阻碍。
But you know deep down that they can't. In fact, the Memosnatchers will be more of a hindrance to you.
忆者们觊觎翁法罗斯的秘密，正如他们觊觎每一位天才的知识。在星神的对垒中，「记忆」从来不是「智识」的盟友。
The Memokeepers covet Amphoreus's secrets, just as they covet the knowledge of every genius. In the war between the Aeons, the Remembrance is never the Erudition's ally.
但祂也绝不会是「毁灭」的盟友。
But THEY are certainly not an ally of the Destruction either.
现在，在「开拓」身后，正有众多银河势力将目光投向翁法罗斯。他们秉持的理念各不相同，但在共同的敌人面前，生存的意志会将人们团结。

Right now, following behind the Trailblaze, numerous cosmic powers have cast their sights on Amphoreus. They all have vastly different philosophies, but the desire to survive will unite them against a common enemy.
你又如何能确信，这些势力没有怀着自己的目的，企图为「列神之战」抢占先机？
How can you be certain that these powers don't have their own end goals, waiting to seize an advantage in the "war among the Aeons"?
战争早已开始了，螺丝咕姆。四条命途会将银河推向终结，而「毁灭」只是其中之一。
The war has long begun, Screwllum. Four Paths will push the cosmos to its end, and the Destruction is only one of them.
波尔卡看见了这道涟漪，她无法阻止，便创立第IX机关；原始博士也已采取行动，但他选错了盟友，只能与野兽为伍。至于两位无机帝皇……

Polka saw these ripples but had no way of stopping them, so she founded Device IX. Dr. Primitive also took action, but he chose the wrong allies, and now only wild animals keep him company. As for the two inorganic emperors...
他们本可以登上「毁灭」的王座，却囿于星神算计，成了「智识」的囚徒。很有趣，二世身为血肉之躯，却自我认知为无机生命，猜猜看，是谁的阴谋？

They could have ascended to the throne of Destruction, but they were thwarted by the Aeons' plots and became prisoners of the Erudition instead. What's interesting is, while the second emperor had a body made of flesh and blood, he considered himself an inorganic being. Guess who was the one who influenced his thinking?
我们无意与阁下闲谈叙旧。逻辑：拖延时间，更证明你束手无策。
We have no interest in chatting about the past with you. Logic: You are stalling, which means you feel trapped.
呵呵…「束手无策」。是啊，回首过去，它始终是「赞达尔」人生的常态。
Hehe, "trapped." Yes, looking back, when "Zandar" was a human, he often felt trapped.
但也正因如此，耐心才会成为鄙人最强有力的武器。我已经等待了很久，还可以等待更久。
But patience became my strongest weapon because of this. I've always waited for so long. What's a bit more waiting?
切勿质疑…一位已死之人跨越上千个琥珀纪的决心。
You don't want to test the resolve of a dead man who's crossed thousands of Amber Eras.
...You're right. We won't get anywhere the way things are going right now.
俱乐部的人个个特立独行，我们也没打算靠说服「打开」你的思维。既然辩论陷入僵局……
Every member of the Society has their own way of thinking, and we were never going to "expand" your thinking through words. Since we've reached an impasse in this debate...
就该轮到我出场了，对么？
It's my turn now, isn't it?
没错，这就是和聪明人打交道的好处，不必多费口舌，答案正如你所想——
Exactly. The benefit of dealing with intelligent individuals is that there's no need to waste words. The answer is exactly as you think—
把计划告诉海瑟音，让她也加入战局。我会提前将自己炼成贤者之石，写入术式……
Loop Hysilens in. Let her join the final act. I'll transmute myself into a Philosopher's Stone and embed myself into the formula...
