March's room... I haven't heard a single peep from her this whole time.
我和{NICKNAME}出发时，她的状态就不太好。就算只是个梦，我也该进去探望她。
March already wasn't feeling very well when {NICKNAME} and I set out. Even if this is a dream, I should still check on her.
This isn't a dream after all...
「依照黑塔女士的说法，丹恒已经踏上了返程……」
"Based on what Madam Herta said, Dan Heng should already be on his way back..."
「但列车却始终没有发现他的踪迹。」
"But the Express hasn't detected any traces of him."
这些黑色的浮游物，我仿佛在哪里见过……
I feel like I've seen these floating black things somewhere before...
"Or he's already returned to the Express."
「却陷入了别有用心者的陷阱。」
"But fell into the trap of someone with ulterior motives."
不，我一定在哪里见过它们……
No, I've definitely seen them before...
窃忆者的迷因，真是无处不在。
The Memokeepers' memetic entities are truly everywhere.
「别担心，寻常忆者奈何不了那条小龙。只要他足够清醒，就一定能顺着指引找到出口。」
"Don't worry. Normal Memokeepers can't do anything to that little dragon. As long as he's awake enough, he'll find a way out."
「他需要的，只是一些专注、耐心和坚定。」
"All he needs is a little concentration, patience, and resolve."
「听你这么说，反倒令我放心了。因为丹恒那孩子……」
"Hearing you say that makes me feel much better. Dan Heng..."
"Has all of the qualities you mentioned."
我不清楚你们有什么目的。
I don't know what your intentions are.
但作为星穹列车的护卫，面对举止可疑的不速之客……
But as the guard of the Astral Express, I must ask...
我必须请各位——离开此地！
Any suspicious and uninvited guests to leave!
如此一来，陷阱就解除了吧？
Is the trap now taken care of?
虽然，只是以「精神折跃」的形式……
Even if it's just through a "spirit warp jump"...
嗯。多亏了指引的声音，我才能穿透忆质的壁垒。不过……
Yes. It was thanks to your voices that I could pierce through the memoria barrier. Although...
让来历不明的忆者上车，果然不是什么明智的决定。
It was not a wise decision to let a Memokeeper of unknown origins board the Express.
翁法罗斯事发后，黑天鹅小姐一直站在列车组这边。可以信任她。
Miss Black Swan has been on the Crew's side ever since things started going wrong in Amphoreus. We can trust her.
令人迷惑的事层出不穷，我甚至不知该从何问起。说来惭愧，没能带回好消息……
So many baffling things kept happening one after another, I don't even know where to begin. I wish I could've returned with better news...
别自责。你们平安无事，这就足够了。
Don't blame yourself. You're all safe and sound, and that's good enough for me.
Are {NICKNAME} and March 7th really safe and sound?
事实上，在你返程途中，翁法罗斯又出现了一些状况。
As a matter of fact, while you were on your way back, Amphoreus's circumstances changed once again.
恰好，和你提到的这两位有关。
And these circumstances have something to do with the two you just mentioned.
黑天鹅将{NICKNAME}的遭遇告知了丹恒……
Black Swan told Dan Heng what happened to {NICKNAME}...
你说，{NICKNAME}被身份不明的「记忆」行者挟持了？
Are you saying that {NICKNAME} has been kidnapped by an unidentified Remembrance pathstrider?
并且那位神秘人的样子，和三月七如出一辙。
So you're saying that person's appearance is identical to March 7th?
这么说并不妥当，我没能亲眼看见，只是在忆域中察觉到了相似的气息。
It's too early to say that as I haven't seen her with my own eyes. I've only detected a similar aura in the Memory Zone.
三月七经历了什么，我们不得而知。但我能肯定，倘若在那位「三月小姐」的忆潮中陷得太深……
We have no way of knowing what March 7th has experienced. But I can assure you, if we sink too far into the memoria tide of that "Miss March"...
在场各位都会被撕成碎片。
Everyone here will be torn to pieces.
…但我也同样相信「开拓」的伙伴。这绝不会是三月的主观意愿。
...But I also trust in our Trailblazing companions. I know this isn't what March would want.
无论其中有什么隐情，我们都会不遗余力找到那位「三月七」，带回{NICKNAME}，和我们熟悉的三月。
No matter what secrets are buried within, we'll do whatever we can to find that "March 7th," and bring back {NICKNAME} and the March we all know.
「智识」和「毁灭」的信息，我大致理解了。不过，「记忆」的搅局者在翁法罗斯扮演的又是什么角色？
I mostly understand what we've learned about the Erudition and the Destruction, but what roles do the Remembrance's intruders play in Amphoreus?
关于这一点，在黑塔女士的帮助下，我倒是有些新的发现。
I made some new discoveries related to that with Madam Herta's help.
作为交易的一环，介意我与二位分享吗？
As part of the deal, do you mind if I share them with you?
真是的，都不知道距离我上次出场已经过去多久啦！
It's really been too long since I last appeared!
这位…朋友，是黑塔女士的得力助手。就是它帮助你完成了「精神折跃」。
This... friend here is Madam Herta's very capable assistant. They were the one who helped you complete the "spirit warp jump."
此外，也是多亏了它，我才得以知晓那群极端忆者的秘密。
Additionally, it was thanks to them that I was able to learn the secrets of that group of extremist Memokeepers.
承蒙夸奖，举手——呃，举镜之劳！
I appreciate the praise, but I didn't have to lift a finger — I mean, mirror!
You did this through a mirror?
忆庭对采集「记忆」有着严格的律令，但并非所有忆者…都像我一样得体。
The Garden has strict rules for collecting memories, but not all Memokeepers are as... proper as I am.
空间站「黑塔」经常迎来不速之客，而「量力而行」从来不是他们的美德。这群窃忆者被悉数清理，关押在第四面镜中。
Herta Space Station often has uninvited guests, and they never seem to know their limits. That group of Memosnatchers has been taken care of, and they are now trapped in the Fourth Mirror.
数字是…提醒我一下吧？有些记不清了。
How many of them are there? I can't quite remember.
…我也没数那么清啦。就当四十二个吧？再多来点，我也吃得下！
...I didn't really count carefully either. Maybe around forty-two? There's still room for more!
我细细破译这些「同僚」的记忆，就单一个体而言，每个人的目的都微不足道。但当我将他们的思绪拼凑到一起……
I carefully dissected the memories of these "colleagues" of mine. Individually, their goals are not worth mentioning, but when you piece them all together...
…就得到了一句不容忽视的结论。
...You come to a conclusion that can't be ignored.
流光忆庭，在暗中打捞<color=#dbc291ff>「命途消失的记忆」。</color>
The Garden of Recollection is secretly salvaging the <color=#dbc291ff>memories of a Path disappearing</color>.
或者换一种说法…他们的目标是<color=#dbc291ff>「神殒的记忆」。</color>
In other words... their goal is to gain the <color=#dbc291ff>memories of a God's death</color>.
星神陨落的瞬间？站在记录者的角度，的确是空前绝后的奇观。
The moment an Aeon falls? That would indeed be a spectacular sight for someone dedicated to recording these things.
问题正在于此。他们似乎对「毁灭」的行径早有察觉，但缺乏决定性的力量，无法穿透笼罩翁法罗斯的防火墙。
That's exactly the problem. They seem to have been aware of the Destruction's movements early on, but they lacked a decisive power and had no way to penetrate Amphoreus's firewall.
So what did they decide to do?
隐瞒事实，伺机而动。现在看来，让忆者们引导合适的人来到这里，也是计划的一环。
Hide the truth and wait for an opportunity. Now it seems that letting Memokeepers guide the right people here was also part of the plan.
这也印证了我的担忧：忆庭内部已经遭到渗透。
This also confirms one of my suspicions: They have already infiltrated deep within the Garden.
为了打捞记忆，不惜与「毁灭」为伍…难道是「焚化工」？
They would not hesitate to associate with the Destruction in order to salvage memories... Could they be The Cremators?
我不知道。也许其中还有更深的纠葛……
I don't know. Perhaps there are even deeper things at play here...
绝大多数忆者都相信，当宇宙不可避免地走入熵增的末路，浮黎将以包容世界的「记忆」重塑银河……
The majority of Memokeepers believe that when the universe inevitably reaches its death, unable to sustain increasing entropy, Fuli will use the "memories" of everything to reforge the cosmos.
翁法罗斯，一柄权杖，从某种意义上可以被视作一个微观的「宇宙」，这也是窃忆者们频繁光顾「黑塔」的缘由。
Amphoreus, as a Scepter, can be viewed as a mini "universe." This is why Memosnatchers have been frequenting the Herta Space Station.
毫无疑问，这些极端分子打算完整记录下铁墓毁灭「智识」的因果。也许是想借此预演宇宙的末日，或是探寻星神深不可测的意志……

Without a doubt, these extremists wish to record the cause and effects of Irontomb's destruction of the Erudition. They may want to use it to simulate the end of the universe, or to probe into the unfathomable will of the Aeons.
是「开拓」打破了封锁，让他们有机会趁虚而入；而现在，这些人一定会不择手段，阻止外部势力干扰翁法罗斯。
The Trailblaze broke the seal around Amphoreus, giving these people the opportunity to enter. Now, they'll do anything to prevent outside powers from interfering.
因为你们的介入会切实影响到「铁墓」的结局。
Because your involvement will certainly influence Irontomb's final outcome.
三月，你说她和「记忆」息息相关。她在做的事和这些人有关吗？
You said that March is closely linked to the Remembrance. Is what she's doing related to these Memosnatchers?
我不认为「三月小姐」和他们站在同一战线。
I do not believe that "Miss March" is on their side.
事实上，当降落用的车厢和翁法罗斯产生接触时，曾闪过一道剧烈的记忆湍流。结合现状，有理由怀疑，那道力量来自……

In fact, when the Car you used for landing first made contact with Amphoreus, a violent surge of memories flowed past. Combined with what we know now, I have reason to suspect that the flash of power came from...
对，那位少女。<color=#dbc291ff>她率先被「记忆」劫持，却用忆质中和了防火墙，让你们二人得以进入翁法罗斯。</color>
Exactly. <color=#dbc291ff>She was the first to be hijacked by the Remembrance, but she used memoria to neutralize the firewall, allowing you two to enter Amphoreus</color>.
眼下，我们和{NICKNAME}失去了联系，只能依靠两位天才的耳目了解世界内部。
At present, we've lost contact with {NICKNAME}. Our only choice now is to rely on the eyes and ears of those two geniuses to understand the situation within Amphoreus.
过度焦虑也无济于事，丹恒。当务之急，是先找到那节车厢的下落。
There's no use in agonizing over this, Dan Heng. Our top priority now is to find where that Car landed.
丹、丹恒乘客！你，你终于找到回家的路了帕！
Passenger Dan Heng! Y—You finally found your way back home!
我回来了，列车长。只不过……
Yes, conductor, I'm back. It's just...
对，我知道帕！我过来，就是为了把好消息带给你们！
Pom-Pom knows! Pom-Pom came over to bring you good news!
瓦尔特乘客发来消息，他们找到丹恒乘客和{NICKNAME}了帕！
Passenger Welt says they've found those two passengers!
瓦尔特——还有螺丝咕姆先生。
你的状态明显好些了，姬子。
Himeko, you seem to be feeling much better now.
能和你说上话真是太好了，丹恒。我们又欠了黑塔女士一个人情。
And Dan Heng, it's great to be able to talk to you. Once again, we owe Madam Herta a huge favor.
黑塔女士虽不偏重人情世故，但她一定会享受来自诸位的赞誉。
Madam Herta doesn't care much for favors, but she'll be happy to receive everyone's praise.
言归眼下，丹恒先生——我们对翁法罗斯天体周边进行了通彻的有机信号排查，终于发现了您与{NICKNAME}{F#女士}{M#先生}的肉身。

Back to the topic at hand... Mr. Dan Heng, we did a sweep of the area surrounding Amphoreus's celestial body for organic signals, and we finally discovered the bodies of you and {M#Mr.}{F#Miss} {NICKNAME}.
两位十分幸运。你们的躯干受到了保护，生命体征尚存，且机能完整。
The two of you were very fortunate as there was something protecting your bodies. All vital signs are still present, and your functions are all intact.
三月…是她保护了我们么？
初步判定，在真空中包裹两位的「气泡」是由近似忆质的物质构成。猜测：该种物质与失联的三月小姐有关。
Our preliminary determination is that the "bubble" enveloping you two in the vacuum is made of a substance similar to memoria. Conjecture: This substance is connected to the lost Miss March.
将你们的身体带回列车需要花些功夫。先好好休息吧。
It will take some effort to bring your bodies back to the Express, so you should get some rest first.
我们和翁法罗斯内部，完全失联了么？
Have we completely lost contact with the inside of Amphoreus?
意外接连发生。「律法」被修正后，我们本已攻破来古士的防火墙——
There have been several unforeseen circumstances. We broke through Lygus's firewall after the "Law" was amended...
但现在，翁法罗斯被剧烈的「记忆」命途包裹，再次阻断了外来者的渠道。
But now Amphoreus is enveloped by the fierce Path of Remembrance, once again cutting off all channels of communication for outsiders.
而我们也没有任何办法能和{NICKNAME}联系上。
So we have no way of contacting {NICKNAME}.
把时间流速的差异考虑进去，在外面耽搁的每一分钟，对{F#她}{M#他}来说都是以年为计的漫长等待……
If we take into account the difference in the flow of time, every minute we delay here could be a year of waiting for {M#him...}{F#her...}
Dan Heng... What are you thinking?
如果那时是三月的加护帮助我们穿过了防火墙……
If it was March who helped us get past the firewall initially...
那是否意味着，现在只有我和{NICKNAME}身上带有翁法罗斯的「通行证」？
Then does that mean only {NICKNAME} and I have the "travel permit" for Amphoreus right now?
这是合乎逻辑的推理，丹恒先生。
That is a logical inference, Mr. Dan Heng.
螺丝咕姆先生，你有办法将我的精神信号发射回翁法罗斯吗？
Mr. Screwllum, do you have a way to transmit my spirit signal back to Amphoreus?
你想回去？这…未免太过冒险了。
You want to go back? That is... far too risky.
就算身体和精神都顺利回归，我在这里能做的事也有限。
Even if my body and spirit are able to return without a hitch, there's not much I can do here.
我们不想再失去你一次了，丹恒。
We can't lose you again, Dan Heng.
如果找不回{NICKNAME}和三月，姬子小姐……
Miss Himeko, if we can't get {NICKNAME} and March back...
How is that any different from losing me?
也对。我该想到你会这么说的。
You're right. I should've known you'd say something like that.
呵…看来想劝阻你是白费力气了。
Hah... Well, I suppose there's no point in trying to dissuade you.
瓦尔特先生，姬子小姐，我会不遗余力地促成列车组的团聚——
Mr. Yang, Miss Himeko, I will do everything in my power to bring the Express Crew back together—
No one will be left behind.
声音…是从客房车厢传来的？
Are the voices coming from the Passenger Cabin?
终于轮到我出场啦？哎呀呀，真是隆重！
It's finally my turn to shine? Ooh, this feels like such a grand occasion!
他们的投影，就在观景车厢帕！
Their projections are in the Parlor Car!
这座迷宫，弥漫着遗忘的气息……
This maze is full of... memory loss...
你的声音不像平时，好奇只留下了三分……
Your voice sounds different from usual. I only hear a hint of curiosity...
剩下七分都是恐惧呢，美丽的忆者。
The rest is all fear, beautiful Memokeeper.
当然，我理解你的恐惧从何而来。「长夜」是模因的天敌，只需我动动手指，它们就能将你吞没。
I know exactly where that fear comes from. The "evernight" is a memetic entity's natural nemesis... They will swallow you whole with just a flick of my pinky finger.
而我——是忆庭的敌人，我从不掩饰。
I am the Garden's enemy. I have never denied that fact.
不得不说，你选择「守护」的方式别具一格，长夜月小姐……
I have to say, Miss Evernight... you've certainly got a unique way of "protecting" people.
（至少，她还愿意交流，是因为我违抗了忆庭的律令？也许，我还有机会……）
(At least she's still willing to talk. Is it because I disobeyed the Garden's rules? Maybe I still have a chance...)
…窥视别人的内心，可算不上优雅的行为。
...It's not very elegant to spy on someone's thoughts, you know.
那，在处置这位「美丽的忆者」前，至少为我解开几个疑惑吧。
Well, before you get rid of this "beautiful Memokeeper," the least you could do is answer some of my questions.
想为自己多争取些时间，好给同伴通风报信？
Why should I do that? So you can buy more time and send a message to your companions?
他们的一举一动，不都在你的监视下么？
And here I thought you were already watching my companions' every move.
嗯。「大地」的躁动平息了。他们战胜了荒笛，正在赶往这里。
I am. Earth's stirrings have ceased. They have defeated Terravox and are heading here as we speak.
别告诉我，这也在你计划之内。
Don't tell me that's a part of your plan, too.
不在，但我会好好利用。以一己之力对抗整个世界，即便是我也会有所疏漏。但我懂得随机应变。
It's not, but I'll make good use of it. Fighting alone against an entire world, even I might miss something. But I know how to adapt to the circumstances.
就像现在，放你一马…是因为我很中意你，鸟儿。和窃忆者不同，你对「记忆」的向往依旧纯粹。
Just like right now, how I've decided to let you go. I like you, little bird. Your longing for "memories" remains pure... unlike those Memosnatchers.
尚未被忆庭的黑暗面沾染，是你最宝贵的品质。
Your most precious quality is how you've yet to be tainted by the Garden's dark side.
我权当这是褒奖，收下了。
I'll take that as a compliment.
但我仍不理解，你将我挟持来这里，究竟是为了什么？
But I still don't understand why you've kidnapped me here.
眼见为实，不如陪我走走吧。
Well, seeing is believing, so why don't we take a stroll together?
这座深埋在地底的遗迹，在「智识」的语言中，被称作内核层。但我为它取了个更亲切的名字……
This ruin buried deep underground is called the "kernel" in the language of Erudition, but I gave it a friendlier name...
翁法罗斯的心脏——<color=#dbc291ff>无名泰坦大墓。</color>
The heart of Amphoreus, <color=#dbc291ff>the great tomb of the nameless Titan</color>.
你会亲眼看见，「记忆」在这个世界扮演着何其重要的角色……
You'll see with your own eyes just how important the Remembrance has been in this world...
<color=#dbc291ff>而我们，又将如何掀起「忘却」的浪潮，扑灭一位星神的野心♭</color>
<color=#dbc291ff>And how we will stir up the waves of "Oblivion" to douse an Aeon's ambition. ♭</color>
You've been hiding here all this time?
没错。好奇我是如何发现的？
That's right. Curious about how I discovered this place?
没那么复杂。刚才这段路，正是三月七「翁法罗斯之旅」的起点。
It's actually not all that complicated. The road we just walked was the beginning of March 7th's "journey in Amphoreus."
还记得么？三重命途缠绕翁法罗斯，有三位比肩「令使」的存在在这个世界留下过痕迹。
Do you still remember how Three Paths are said to intertwine in Amphoreus? That three entities, each comparable to an Emanator, left their marks in this world?
对，属于「记忆」的答案，至今仍未浮出水面。
That's right. To this day, there have been no signs of the entity corresponding to the Remembrance.
流光忆庭，他们也想得到答案。于是窃忆者花费漫长的时光，凿开一条细小的信道，企图窥探这个世界。
The Garden of Recollection was curious about that, too. So the Memosnatchers spent an unimaginably long time chiseling out a tiny channel to peek into this world.
但忆域中，始终有一股力量将他们隔绝在外。
But there was always a power in the Memory Zone that kept them out.
<color=#dbc291ff>在三月七的精神遭到挟持时，是一阵「记忆」的涟漪保护了她，将她送进了这里。</color>
<color=#dbc291ff>And when March 7th's consciousness was seized, it was a ripple of the Remembrance that protected her and sent her in here.</color>
可否理解为，这位假设中存在的「记忆」令使，一直在抵御这个世界不受忆庭窥视——直到星穹列车来临？
Can I assume, then, that this hypothetical Emanator of Remembrance was consistently protecting this world from the Garden's eyes... until the Astral Express arrived?
That's correct. You're a smart one.
自己去看吧，鸟儿。一切都在回忆中。
Go see for yourself, little bird. The memories contain everything.
纹丝不动。怎么上来就吃了闭门羹……
Didn't move at all, huh. I just got here, and I'm already locked out...
千里之行，止于大门？也太凄惨了吧！
A journey of a thousand miles stopped at the door? That's terrible!
继续看吧，有趣的事才要发生。
Keep watching. The fun stuff is just ahead.
<color=#eb4d3dff>>>> Warning: Object does not have access permission.</color>
什么动静，我碰到什么了？
What? Did I touch something I shouldn't have?
这、这是在干什么？格式化？！

呃…不知道你在说什么，咱们还是别打哑谜了，要不…先来个自我介绍？

我叫三月七，{NICKNAME}的同伴。误打误撞地闯进这里，真是不好意思……
I'm March 7th, and I'm {NICKNAME}'s companion. Sorry, I accidentally ended up barging in here...
通信？哦哦，总算能联系上活人了！本姑娘急需场外支援……
Communications? Oh, does this mean I finally get to talk to someone real? I really, really need outside help right now...
欸…欸欸？！怎么回事——我的身体——？！
H—Huh!? What's going on! My body—
再醒来时，她已经躺在了命运重渊，被欧洛尼斯称作「母亲」。
She was already lying in the Abyss of Fate the next time she woke up, and Oronyx was calling her "mother."
也许是它对「记忆」行者的统称吧，就像它管浮黎叫做「天父」。
Maybe that's just how the Titan calls all Remembrance pathstriders, like how they call Fuli "sky father."
所以早在启程之初，三月七就和这个世界的内幕擦肩而过。记忆中的警告声，想必是权杖的安全协议吧。
So March 7th had already brushed against the inner workings of this world at the beginning of her journey. That warning in her memories must have been the Scepter's safety protocol.
但，它为什么会提到{NICKNAME}？三月七进入翁法罗斯，应当远远早于{NICKNAME}和丹恒。
But why did it mention {NICKNAME}? March 7th should have entered Amphoreus long before {NICKNAME} and Dan Heng did.
难以解释的矛盾，就先搁置吧？协议没有杀死三月七，反把她丢进了演算内部。
An inexplicable contradiction, isn't it? Let's put that aside for now. The protocol didn't kill March 7th. Instead, it threw her deep into extrapolations.
后来的<unbreak>97</unbreak>天，她——我们一起，一边躲避{RUBY_B#「智识」}监管者{RUBY_E#}的追捕，一边以迷因状态「开拓」翁法罗斯。
Over the next <unbreak>97</unbreak> days, she — no, the two of us — "trailblazed" through Amphoreus as memetic entities as she evaded the {RUBY_B#The Erudition}administrator's{RUBY_E#} pursuit.
对她而言，想必是段艰难且孤独的旅程……
It must have been a difficult and lonely journey for her...
是啊。没人能看见三月七，她不存在于翁法罗斯的「记忆」，就像个透明的影子，只能旁观这个世界。
Yes. No one could see March 7th. She didn't belong to Amphoreus's "memories." She could only watch this world from the sidelines like a transparent shadow.
所以，你又是何时出现的？
在她无计可施的那一天。
On the day that she ran out of options.
为了同伴，三月七做出了许多努力，但种种尝试，也只为翁法罗斯徒增了几篇野史。
March 7th tried so many things to help her companions, but the only outcome of her efforts was a few Amphorean folk tales.
最后，她只剩下一个选择。如她所愿，以「忘却」的力量——我抹去了一切。
In the end, she had only one option left. Just as she wished... I erased everything using the power of "Oblivion."
<color=#dbc291ff>并为{NICKNAME}和丹恒施以保护，让他们在突破封锁的同时，免于被窃忆者挟持。</color>
<color=#dbc291ff>Then I protected {NICKNAME} and Dan Heng and made sure that they were spared from the Memosnatchers' clutches when they broke through the seal.</color>
那之后，你就一直潜伏在暗处，操纵「岁月」，与「大地」合谋…直到现在。
And you've been hiding in the shadows ever since, while manipulating "Time" and colluding with "Earth"... all the way till now.
千里之行，始于足下。有关「记忆」的故事，这才刚刚开始。
A journey of a thousand miles starts with a single step. The story of the Remembrance has just begun.
何不一起踏入其中？你有资格与我同行，将这扇门背后的秘密尽收眼底……
Why don't we step into it together? As someone qualified to walk with me, you can now take in all the secrets behind this door...
<color=#dbc291ff>见证空白的「岁月」里，另一场延续三千万世的徒劳，是如何被世界遗忘。</color>
<color=#dbc291ff>And witness how, in a blank space of Time, another futile journey across thirty million lifetimes was forgotten by this world.</color>
本以为「长夜月」会出手阻拦，但这一路倒是风平浪静。
I thought Evernight would have done something to stop us, but it's been smooth sailing the whole way through.
准备好了么，{NICKNAME}？我要开门了。
Are you ready, {NICKNAME}? I'm going to open this door.
一片寂静，感受不到任何气息。
Absolute silence. I can't sense anything at all.
Be careful. This could be a trap.
我明白。有任何异常，就往我身后靠。
I know. Duck behind me if anything happens, okay?
<color=#eb4d3dff>>>> Warning: Object does not have access permission.</color>
安全协议…在「神话之外」也见过。
A safety protocol... I saw it in the Exomyth too.
That means we're in the right place.
没权限，只能暴力闯入了。
We don't have permission. Looks like it's brute-force time.
权杖出手阻拦，证明我们来对了地方。
The Scepter moved to block us. That means we're in the right place.
什么动静，我碰到什么了？
What? Did I touch something I shouldn't have?
和你无关，是权杖的安全协议。证明我们来对了地方。
It's got nothing to do with you. That's the Scepter's safety protocol. It means we're in the right place.
它说的话，我好像有印象…
What it said... sounds so familiar...
(I'm getting a feeling of déjà vu...)
Seems like the threat is gone...
(Also, I'm getting a feeling of déjà vu...)
Someone's helping us out from the shadows?
(Also, I'm getting a feeling of déjà vu...)
<color=#dbc291ff>（…第一次翻开《如我所书》的时候？）</color>
(...Like the first time I opened As I've Written.)
（还好没被「长夜月」拿走…试试看吧。）
(Thankfully Evernight didn't take that book... Let's try using it.)
封锁解除了，没想到这本书会在这里发挥作用……
The seal's gone. Didn't think this book would have a use here...
Cyrene? What are you doing here?
Of course I missed you. Where have you been all this time?
I didn't miss you. I never think about these things.
开个玩笑，这是「我」第一次来到你的面前……
I'm just messing with you. This is the first time "I" have met you...
...And it looks like it'll also be the last.
不对劲，她没在跟我们说话。这不是你认识的「迷迷」……
Something's wrong. She's not talking to us. She's not the "Mem" you know...
Could she be a... "Cyrene from the past"?
既然时间有限，就赶快开始吧？
Since we don't have all day, let's get started, shall we?
一如既往，我会把这本书念给你听。
As always, I'll read this book to you.
这样一来，它就不再是「昔涟」一个人的回忆。
That way, it won't just be "Cyrene's" memories alone.
这一次，该从哪一页讲起呢？让我看看……
Where should I start this time? Lemme see...
有啦。就从「曳石贤人」迈德漠斯……
There. Shall we start with the meeting between...
和「王翼冠军」{RUBY_B#那刻夏}那霎{RUBY_E#}的相遇开始吧？
The "Helkolithist Sage" Mydeimos and the "King's Aegis" {RUBY_B#Anaxa}Anaksa{RUBY_E#}?
你听见了么？她刚才说的……
Did you hear that? She just said...
过去的昔涟，应该早就牺牲了…
All the Cyrenes from the past should have died long ago...
这里空空如也，她在和谁说话？
There's no one else here. Who's she speaking to?
显然，那不是你我熟知的历史。也许是三千万世的某一种可能，但……
This is obviously not the history we know. It might be one of the possibilities in the thirty million cycles, but...
昔涟理应在每次轮回的开端就死去了，为何会出现在这里？她又在和谁对话？
Cyrene should have died at the start of every recurrence, so why is she here? And who was she talking to?
很有可能。刚才，那道门也对它产生了反应。
That's very likely. That door reacted to the book as well.
Let's try copying what she did.
果然是它。《如我所书》…与这座大墓密切相关。
That's it. As I've Written... is definitely connected with this great tomb.
多半就是「永劫回归」，也印证了此前的猜想：这里超脱翁法罗斯的轮回。
Probably referring to the Eternal Recurrences. It also proves the previous hypothesis that this place is outside of Amphoreus's cycles.
Do all these runes represent Titans?
《如我所书》共十二章，分别对应十二位半神。
There are twelve chapters in As I've Written, corresponding to the twelve demigods.
或许，「无名的追忆」正和这些符文一一对应。先接触看看吧。
Maybe the Nameless Recollections match these runes. Let's try linking them first.
原来如此， 这本《如我所书》……
I see. This As I've Written book...
<color=#dbc291ff>是被「记忆」修饰过的信息终端</color>么？
<color=#dbc291ff>Is a data terminal that has been modified by the Remembrance</color>.
昔涟看似在讲述故事，实则是在进行「信息传送」。
It might have looked like Cyrene was reading a story, but she was actually carrying out a "data transfer."
多半是这座大墓深处的存在。细节…暂时还不明朗。
It's probably the entity deep within this tomb. The details... aren't clear yet.
So it's actually a portable hard drive...
Right. That's a more direct way to think about it.
难怪这些设施会有反应。这本书——本身就是一把「钥匙」。
No wonder these facilities are reacting to it. This book is a "key."
但昔涟不可能对权杖的真相了如指掌。她是从哪儿得到它的……
But Cyrene could never have known about the truth regarding the Scepter. So where did she get this key...?
这座大墓应该与「赞达尔」无关。
"Zandar" likely has nothing to do with this tomb.
虽然很相似，但昔涟记忆中的神谕牌册……
The oracle cards in Cyrene's memories do resemble the book...
仔细想想，外观并不一样。
But their external appearances are not exactly the same.
还记得么？在短暂的人生中，昔涟曾和<color=#dbc291ff>某位星神</color>有过一面之缘。
Do you remember? During her brief existence, Cyrene once encountered <color=#dbc291ff>a certain Aeon</color>.
是啊。所以，我只能寄希望于童年的那场梦……
Yeah. So, I can only place my hopes on that childhood dream...
<color=#dbc291ff>在那梦里出现的，欧洛尼斯背后的神明。</color>
<color=#dbc291ff>And the god behind Oronyx that appeared in that dream.</color>
欧洛尼斯和浮黎有关联——这件事不是秘密。在你遇见迷迷的时候，祂也出现了。
It's no secret that Oronyx and Fuli are related. That Aeon also appeared when you encountered Mem.
这位星神在翁法罗斯扮演的角色尚不得而知。但如果昔涟无意间踏上了「记忆」的命途，她的「牺牲」就不止是为了重置轮回，还有其他意义……

We still don't know the role THEY play in Amphoreus, but if Cyrene accidentally stepped onto the Path of Remembrance, then her "sacrifice" wasn't just for resetting the cycle. There was another purpose...
如果我没猜错，刚才那一幕——还会不断上演。
If my hypothesis holds, then the scene we just saw will replay many more times.
如此庞大的存储阵列，简直能与「电子圣狱」因奴庇斯相媲美……
So many countless storage arrays... This would even rival the Cyber Prison of Inupeis...
在这个古典的世界里，也有这样一座充满「未来」色彩的宫殿。
Even this classical world contains a "futuristic" palace like this.
哀丽秘榭再过几千年，也会变成这样吗？
Would Aedes Elysiae end up looking like this after a few thousand years?
哎呀，它也总是这么准时，从不迟到……
Aw. It's always so on time, never late at all...
没关系，我明白，它只是想提醒我：时间宝贵。
It's okay. I get it. It's just trying to remind me how precious time is.
这一次，我想和你分享个小故事：来这里的路上，我看见一只小小的若虫。它停在一根倒下的麦穗上，在阳光下闪闪发光。
I want to share a story with you this time. I saw a little nymph on my way here. It was on a fallen wheat stalk, and it glowed under the sunlight.
不可思议，那一瞬间，我忘记了所有疼痛，就只是…出神地望着它。
It was incredible. I forgot all my pains at that moment and just... stared at it in a trance.
我在想，过去的每一个「昔涟」，会不会也觉得它很美呢？
I wonder... did every "Cyrene" in the past feel that the nymph was beautiful?
她们也会把这一幕记录下来，写入永恒的诗篇吧？
Would they also have recorded that scene into the eternal saga?
所以，再多给我一些时间，好吗？我还想为「未来」留下更多「记忆」……
So... could you give me more time, please? I want to leave behind more "memories" for the "future"...
As I expected. The answer is the Remembrance.
一位星神出现在她的梦里，缠绕翁法罗斯的三重命途，再加上忆庭不顾一切的入侵行动……
An Aeon appearing in her dreams, Three Paths intertwining in Amphoreus, and the Garden trying to infiltrate this world at all costs...
有理由怀疑，在权杖彻底坠入「毁灭」前，浮黎的目光曾一度掠过这个世界。
I have reasons to suspect that Fuli's gaze once swept over this world before the Scepter completely fell into Destruction.
而昔涟，沐浴了那道瞥视。
And that Cyrene basked in that divine gaze.
祂明明知道，却纵容「毁灭」？
THEY knew what was going on, yet still allowed the Destruction to thrive?
人无法以人类的常识揣度星神。自诞生起，「记忆」就一直是寰宇的旁观者。
Humanity cannot judge Aeons based on our own common knowledge. The Remembrance has always been an observer of the universe ever since THEIR birth.
But the Garden knew nothing about her.
这很正常。派系只是星神的追随者，而浮黎…从来不是一位亲人的神明。
That's to be expected. The various factions are only followers of their Aeons, and Fuli was never known to be friendly with humanity.
不过，有件事我也不理解：根据黑天鹅的说法，忆庭内部并不团结，有一股势力贪图「神殒的记忆」，行事不择手段。

But there's still something I don't understand: According to Black Swan, the Garden is internally fractured, and there is a party that craves the "Memory of an Aeon's Fall." They would do anything to achieve that goal.
但总感觉，那群窃忆者并没有阻拦我们的意思。相反，他们一直在试图掩盖些什么。
Yet I feel as though those Memosnatchers didn't try to stop us at all. Instead, it feels like they were trying to cover something up.
沐浴瞥视会变成令使吗？
Would basking in an Aeon's gaze turn someone into an Emanator?
多数情况下，这只是一种自然现象。有些命途行者将之视作荣誉，但令使…必须拥有星神赐福的伟力。
Most of the time, a gaze is simply a natural phenomenon, though some pathstriders regard it as a supreme honor. An Emanator, however, must possess power granted by an Aeon's blessing.
我知道你在想什么，那位理论中的「记忆」令使，行踪依旧成谜。但事到如今，我更倾向于，忆庭之镜映照出的…是浮黎留下的某种「神迹」。

I know what you're thinking. That theoretical Emanator of Remembrance remains a mystery, but now I'm leaning towards the idea that what the Garden's mirror reflected... was a kind of "miracle" that Fuli left behind.
所以昔涟的三千万次牺牲…
Yes. We're thinking the same thing.
传闻浮黎禅坐于无漏净土，为宇宙播撒下「记忆」的种子。等到银河终结，诸界将在祂的苗圃中新生。

Legend says that Fuli sits in meditation in the Anāsrava pure land, spreading the seeds of Remembrance across the universe. And when the cosmos ends, all the different realms will be reborn in THEIR garden.
如果这个封闭的世界也在祂的视线中，不难想象，浮黎需要一种机制，在「智识」看不见的角落将海量的记忆保存下来。

If this sealed-off world is also within THEIR gaze, then it's not too big of a stretch to surmise that THEY need a mechanism to save these incredible amounts of memories, and store them somewhere out of the Erudition's sight.
过去，这道机制是「岁月」和它的半神。但在翁法罗斯进入死循环后……
This mechanism was previously the Time Titan and their demigod, but after Amphoreus entered an endless loop...
Cyrene acted on their behalf instead?
如我所书是「记忆」的载体…
"As I've Written" became the Remembrance's medium...
现在，我能够确信：「岁月」就是{RUBY_B#<color=#dbc291ff>「记忆」浮黎</color>}<color=#dbc291ff>那位星神</color>{RUBY_E#}记录翁法罗斯的书页。如果它从世上消失，它铭记的一切在星空中佚失，那位「星神」一定会将视线投向这里……

Now, I can say with certainty: "Time" is the page on which {RUBY_B#<color=#dbc291ff>Fuli the Remembrance</color>}<color=#dbc291ff>that Aeon</color>{RUBY_E#} records Amphoreus. If it fades from existence and all that it records is lost among the stars, that Aeon will surely direct THEIR gaze here...
那会是一道跨越时空的瞥视，它将让今后的每一个我都能够化作你重置岁月的力量——将我的灵魂注入这柄仪式剑，创造一场{RUBY_B#<color=#dbc291ff>永不完成的「再创世」</color>}<color=#dbc291ff>永不终结的逐火之旅</color>{RUBY_E#}。

And it will be a glance that spans time and space, transforming each incarnation of me into the power you shall wield to reset time — imbuing my soul into this ceremonial blade, and creating an {RUBY_B#<color=#dbc291ff>unending Era Nova</color>}<color=#dbc291ff>endless Flame-Chase Journey</color>{RUBY_E#}.
每一次轮回的开端，仪式剑将昔涟「杀死」。每一次旅程的终点，它承载的演算记忆被昔涟的「灵魂」带走，沉入大墓。

The ceremonial blade "killed" Cyrene at the start of every recurrence. And at the end of every journey, Cyrene's "soul" took the extrapolated memories stored within the blade and buried them in this great tomb.
以这种方式，翁法罗斯的「记忆」超脱循环，被源源不断地保存下来。而权杖则因为逻辑丢失，陷入一次又一次进程回退。
That's how the "memories" of Amphoreus transcended the loop and were continuously stored, while the Scepter had to revert its progress over and over again, because of loss in its logic.
只要这个过程一直在继续，浮黎的庇佑就不会消失。
Fuli's blessing will not disappear as long as this process keeps going.
「只要我把故事的每一页都记录下来，为你讲述……」
"As long as I record every page of this story and tell it to you..."
昔涟与星神的目光邂逅，将之视作延续世界的希望。所以，一次又一次，她不惜化作白纸，也要为祂献上「记忆」。

Cyrene encountered the Aeon's gaze and regarded THEM as the hope to continue her world. That's why she offered THEM "memories" over and over, even if she had to turn herself into nothingness every time.
至于为何要以人形，通过「讲述故事」的形式……
As to why she insisted on keeping her human form and offering the memories through "reading a story"...
可能对她而言，这是唯一能捍卫自身人性，并留下痕迹的方法。
It might have been the only way for her to maintain her sense of humanity and leave her mark in this world.
即便，只是她一厢情愿的幻想……
Even though everything was just her wishful thinking—
从地上的符文来看，先前的密钥是用在这里的。
Based on the runes on the floor, the encryption key from earlier should be used here.
总计三枚。目前，我们的进度是三分之一。
There are three keys in total. We're one third of the way through.
「虽然你从来不说话。但我知道，你在听。我讲述的每一个故事……」
"You never say anything, but I know you're listening. Every story I've told is..."
「都会像小小的钥匙，打开你心里的一扇门，对不对？」
"Is like a little key that opened a door in your heart, no?"
「于是，天空降下彩虹，对世界展露温柔的微笑。」
"Then, the sky sent down rainbows and showed the world a gentle smile."
看来，又要到分别的时候了呀。
Looks like it's time to say goodbye again.
不知不觉中，这本书记录了太多悲欢离合，每一页都变得沉甸甸的。
Before "I" was even aware of it, this book had already recorded too many emotions. Every page has become so heavy.
接过它的时候，「我」也开始感到不安……
"I" have started to feel uneasy whenever "I" take it into my hands...
最初的涟漪，究竟希望这些「记忆」被送往何处呢？
Where did the very first ripples want these "memories" to be sent to?
这是多少次啦？它忠实地履行使命，响起、格式化……
How many times has it been? It faithfully fulfills its duty, activating and formatting...
就像每一世逐火的命运，永不改变。
Never-changing, like the fate of the Flame-Chase in every cycle.
如果到头来，每一次提笔，都只能写下相同的结局。那这篇沉甸甸的史诗……
If "I" can only write the same ending every time "I" lift my pen, then is this weighty saga...
会不会，只是一场太过天真的梦呢？
谢谢…对不起呀，让你看见了难为情的一面。
Thank you... I'm sorry for making you see this embarrassing side of me.
所有人都在努力，如果我独自落泪…这一点都不浪漫，对不对？
Everyone's still working so hard. If I'm the only one who's crying... that wouldn't be romantic at all, would it?
谢谢你，愿意一直做人家的听众。那，我们继续吧？
Thank you for listening to me all this time. So... shall we continue?
无休止的轮回影响了她。即便昔涟，也无法抵抗永恒不变的绝望。
The endless cycle took its toll on her. Even Cyrene could not resist despair when faced with eternal stasis.
和卡厄斯兰那一样，她也开始怀疑这一切只是「徒劳」。
Like Khaslana, she started to wonder whether everything was "futile."
但他们不会放弃，我们也不会。
But they wouldn't give up. And neither will we.
但有一件事，我始终没有头绪…她到底在和谁对话？
But I still haven't figured out one thing... Who exactly was she talking to?
这段记忆里，进程发生了错误…
There was a process error in this memory...
你也发现了。她到底在和谁对话？
So you noticed it too. Who exactly was she talking to?
过去的昔涟，她到底在和谁对话？
Who exactly was the Cyrene of the past talking to?
起初我以为是星神。但昔涟的语气…怎么也不像是在向神明祈祷。
I thought it was an Aeon at first, but the way she talked... It didn't sound like praying to a god at all.
难道是她的想象？「心中」的英雄？可是，这样就难以解释「进程错误」……
Maybe she's talking to her imagination? A hero "within"? But that wouldn't explain the "process error"...
无论那位「倾听者」是谁，对权杖而言，昔涟的讲述终究只是一串数据流。
No matter who that "listener" is, Cyrene's storytelling is just a data stream for the Scepter.
但或许，在她眼里…只要不断向远方丢出漂流瓶，就一定会有被捡到的那天吧。
Maybe she thought... As long as she kept tossing drift bottles into the distance, someone was bound to pick one up someday.
访问被拒绝了。有关「纷争」的记忆，总是与不屈和抗争相伴……
We were denied access. Memories about Strife are always so defiant and resistant...
我在思考，这一路上的「记忆」，会不会是「长夜月」设置的陷阱。她始终没有出现，这点十分可疑。
I've been wondering... Could all the "memories" we've encountered on the way be "Evernight's" traps? She still hasn't shown herself. That's very suspicious.
但思来想去，似乎没有特别充分的理由……
But I can't think of a good reason for her to do that...
只能认为她还在守株待兔，或是被谁牵制住了。
I can only surmise that she's either still waiting or someone's holding her back.
继续观察吧。「记忆」的每一丝涟漪，都可能为我们揭示「长夜月」的目的。
Let's keep observing. Every ripple of these "memories" could potentially reveal to us "Evernight's" true goal.
像上次一样，上传密钥吧。
Go upload the encryption key, just like last time.
「这扇门背后会是什么呢？闪闪发光的水晶，还是一个我从未见过的美丽世界？」
"What could be behind this door? Glittering crystals? Or a beautiful world I've never seen before?"
「如果我把所有关于『明天』的故事讲给你听……」
"If I tell you all the stories of 'tomorrow'..."
「是不是下一世就能迎来『救世主』，和翁法罗斯的黎明？」
"Will I be able to finally welcome the 'Deliverer' and Amphoreus's dawn in the next life?"
昔涟，她的坚持果真没有尽头……
Cyrene... There really is no end to her perseverance...
又一次，史诗迎来了尾声。一切静悄悄的，就像此时此刻。
Once again, the saga comes to an end. Everything is deathly silent, just like this very moment.
又是一轮新的开始，一次熟悉的相逢。
It's another cycle of new beginnings, and another familiar reunion.
回想起来，过去有段时间，「我」似乎特别多愁善感呢……
Now that I look back, there was a period when "I" got really sentimental...
总是惴惴不安，尽力翻找不一样的「记忆」，希望能为一成不变的命运带来改变，找到这座迷宫的出口。
"I" was so anxious, trying to find as many different "memories" as possible, hoping to bring some change to this unchanging destiny and find the way out of this maze.
但现在，我不会这么做啦。
But I won't do that anymore now.
不必为「我」感到遗憾，好朋友。
No need to feel sorry for "me," good friend.
如果没有新的「空白」，史诗又该如何被续写呢？
If there are no new "blank spaces," how can a saga continue?
我很幸运哦，在等待「救世主」的漫长时光中，能有你这样一位从不缺席的听众。
I'm actually really lucky, you know? During the long years I've spent waiting for the "Deliverer," I've always had you here as an audience.
你看，我带来的这些「记忆」，它们存在过，闪耀过……
Look at these "memories" I've brought to you. They once existed, once sparkled under the sun...
而现在，透过你的眼睛，我看见它们依旧在闪闪发光。
And now I can see through your eyes that they are still shining bright.
这就够了，不是吗？如此一来，我也能安心地留在过去。
Isn't that already enough? Now, I can rest in peace in the past.
就拜托下一位「昔涟」继续守候啦。
I'll have to ask the next "Cyrene" to continue our watch.
Her transformation... is painful to watch.
三千万世轮回，昔涟从未缺席。在世界的反面，她以自己的方式记录下逐火之旅，将「记忆」留在这里。
Cyrene was always there during the thirty million recurrences. She recorded the Flame-Chase Journey in her own way on the reverse side of this world, depositing all the "memories" in this place.
{NICKNAME}，我越发觉得，陪伴她的「听众」是某种具象的存在。
{NICKNAME}, I'm increasingly certain that her "audience" and companion isn't some figurative entity.
翁法罗斯至深的遗迹，埋葬「全世」过往的大墓……
The deepest ruin in Amphoreus, the great tomb where the pasts of "all worlds" are buried...
该回去了，启动大墓中央的系统。
It's time to go back and activate the system in the middle of the great tomb.
金血忆灵？已经渗透到这里了么……
Ichor memosprites? They've even reached this place...
所幸，终点也近在眼前了。
Thankfully, our destination is right ahead.
第三枚密钥，也是最后一块拼图……
The third encryption key... and the final piece of the puzzle.
拨开迷雾，带我们前往世界的最深处吧。
I pray that you can dispel all the mysteries and lead us into the deepest bowels of this world.
曾有人告诉最初的「我」，一切都是虚假的。翁法罗斯唯一的生命，是一场以世界为因子哺育而成的浩劫。
Someone once told the very first "me" that everything was false, that the only life in Amphoreus was a great catastrophe nurtured using the world as a factor.
但，世上怎会有如此真实的梦呢？所以，我不同意他的看法。
But how could a dream feel so real? That's why I didn't agree with him.
好朋友，<color=#dbc291ff>第<unbreak>33550335</unbreak>次…</color>我会把这本书念给你听。
My good friend, I'll read this book to you... for <color=#dbc291ff>the <unbreak>33,550,335</unbreak>th time</color>.
这样一来，它就不再是「昔涟」一个人的回忆。
That way, it won't just be "Cyrene's" memories alone.
就连它也不再让人家觉得冰冷了呢。就像一种仪式性的收尾，为每一世的「讲述」画上句号。
It doesn't even make me feel cold anymore. It's like a ceremonial conclusion, ending every cycle's "narration" with a full stop.
然后，又会有新的「我」，带着新的「记忆」回到这里。
Then, there will be a new "me" returning here with new "memories."
不知不觉中，这座与你共筑的宫殿，已经不再是「昔涟」独自沉醉的梦境。
Before I knew it, this palace we built together was no longer a dream that "Cyrene" alone indulged in.
它是你、我，所有逐火的人们共同谱写的史诗，是我们期待着「明天」，微弱却不绝的祈愿。
It's now a saga composed by you, me, and all the Flame-Chasers. It's our weak but endless prayer for "tomorrow."
总有一天，会有人翻开这近乎「永恒」的一页……
There will come a day when someone turns over this nearly "eternal" page...
唤醒所有尘封的「记忆」，让它们以更美的样子，被世界重新想起。
And awakens all the dust-covered "memories," so they can be recalled by the world in a more beautiful form.
就像花开花落，我讲述，你聆听。
I'll read, and you'll listen, like how flowers always bloom then wither.
我迎来自己的收梢，成为下一朵花绽放的养料。
I shall welcome my own decay, becoming nourishment for the next flower's bud.
而你会守候在这里，呵护这座「记忆」的苗圃。
And you shall continue to wait here, protecting this garden of "memories."
这样一来，等到「救世主」降临，最先映入眼帘的就是一片无垠的花海啦。
That way, when the "Deliverer" arrives, the first thing they'll see is an endless sea of flowers.
而我们的故事，会静静地躺在花丛中，一如「记忆」的每一道涟漪……
And our stories will be lying silently among the flowers like every ripple of "remembrance"...
And they shall become the epic known as As I've Written.
记忆的质料，被保存在数之不尽的支柱中……
The texture of memories is preserved in countless pillars...
跨越三千万世，为了将所有被遗忘的轮回保存下来，她倾尽了一切。
She gave everything to record all the forgotten recurrences across thirty million cycles.
这座大墓，就是「记忆」的种子…
This great tomb is the seed of Remembrance...
漫无止境的等待，将由我们打破。
We will put an end to this endless waiting.
带上所有的往昔，一同走向新世界吧。
Let's march into the new world with all the past.
好啦，别让气氛这么沉重嘛。
Alright, alright, let's not make things so gloomy.
最初的涟漪启程时，也曾像这样为同伴加油打气。这是一句饱含祝福的话语，所以，我也想送给你……
The very first ripple cheered up her friend like this before she set off. It's a sentence full of blessings, so I want to say it to you as well...
C'mon, cheer up a bit, okay?
「迷失的人迷失了，相逢的人会再相逢。」
"Those who are lost remain lost, while those who have met will meet again."
多么感人的一幕呀。世界的最深处，正适合作为「开拓」重逢的地点。
What a touching scene. The deepest place in this world is exactly the ideal location for the Trailblaze to reunite.
要和我们重逢的人不是你，「长夜月」。
You're not the one we want to reunite with, "Evernight."
但现在，你必须给出一个解释：关于这座大墓，还有「第十三位泰坦」——
But you'd better explain everything to us: this tomb, and the "Thirteenth Titan"...
你有点太紧张了，丹恒。对于你们，我向来坦诚。
You're too on edge, Dan Heng. I've always been honest with the two of you.
所以在谈论翁法罗斯的命运前，何不让我们先放下嫌隙……
Before we talk about Amphoreus's destiny, why don't we lay aside our differences...
一同为残酷的「真相」哀悼？
And take a moment together to mourn for the cruel "truth"?
看来，你们还没意识到呀。
So you still haven't figured it out.
再仔细看看吧，环顾四周。你们一定会好奇：最后的泰坦身在何方？
Take another moment to look around. Look closely. You must be curious as to where the final Titan is located, right?
真是个好问题。因为我也很好奇呢……
What a good question that is. I, too, am curious...
<color=#dbc291ff>除去冰冷的虚空，这里明明空无一物啊。</color>
<color=#dbc291ff>Because there is absolutely nothing here, except a cold, empty void!</color>
你的意思是，昔涟受到了欺骗。
没错。浮黎在她心中种下虚假的希望，让她相信自己是特别的，而翁法罗斯仍有一线生机。
Indeed. Fuli planted a false hope in her heart, making her believe that she was special and that Amphoreus still had a chance.
于是，那可怜的女孩心甘情愿，一次又一次走进大墓，将自己奉献给「记忆」。
Then, that poor girl walked into the great tomb over and over again and willingly offered herself to the Remembrance.
你以为祂会像昔涟祈祷的那样，拯救这个摇摇欲坠的世界？
Did you really think THEY would just save this crumbling world in the way Cyrene was praying for?
别天真了，忆者。在这场神明对弈的游戏中……
Don't be naive, Memokeeper. In this game between Gods...
<color=#dbc291ff>The Remembrance chose to stand with the Destruction.</color>
以你对忆庭的敌意，我很难相信你的一面之词。
Given your evident hostility towards the Garden, I find it hard to take anything you say at face value.
难道窃忆者的行动还不够证明吗？他们竭力促成「铁墓」完成，绝不是为了虚无缥缈的记忆。让我告诉你真正的原因吧……

Aren't the Memosnatchers' activities enough evidence? They did everything they could to help Irontomb reach completion, and it wasn't just to obtain some fanciful memories. Let me tell you the real reason...
<color=#dbc291ff>铁墓是一艘完美的航船</color>，若能暗中埋下种子，在「智识」被它引爆的瞬间，「记忆」也将遍布寰宇的每个角落。

<color=#dbc291ff>Irontomb is a perfect ark</color>. If a seed can be planted within, then the moment the Lord Ravager blows the Erudition to pieces, the Remembrance will be spread to every corner of the cosmos.
一条无主的命途，被两位星神平分。浮黎——将以此吞并「智识」。
That masterless Path will be equally split between two Aeons. Fuli... will devour the Erudition.
明白了么？列神之战早就开启了。
Do you understand now? The war among Aeons started long ago.
浮黎投来瞥视，不是要救翁法罗斯，而是要一丝不剩地榨干它，将它变作一页最凄美的悲剧诗。
Fuli did not glance this way to save Amphoreus. THEY will drain this world dry and turn it into a most poignant and tragic poem.
所幸，那女孩的牺牲不会白费。因为我会给她另一种可能。
But fortunately, that girl's sacrifices won't be wasted. I will give her another possibility.
我对{NICKNAME}承诺过，要重新编纂世界的因果，创造出一个无瑕的翁法罗斯。
I promised {NICKNAME} that I would re-create the cause and effect of this world, and form a flawless Amphoreus.
而对于这样一个无法回头的世界，「无瑕」唯一的定义……
But the only way for a world that can't be turned back to be considered "flawless"...
<color=#dbc291ff>Is to burn it with a raging fire until nothing remains.</color>
你打算…牺牲昔涟保存至今的「记忆」？
You plan to... destroy all the "memories" Cyrene has ever recorded?
没错，烧尽所有的故事、悲欢、徒劳…让忆庭的阴谋化作泡影。
That's right. I'll set fire to all the stories, all the emotions, all the futility... I'll turn the Garden's conspiracy to dust.
以如此巨量的质料为柴薪，足以彻底摧毁权杖的运行逻辑。铁墓将失去孵化的土壤，而翁法罗斯…也能真正迎来解脱。
Setting fire to this much material will be enough to completely annihilate the Scepter's operating logic. Irontomb will lose the soil upon which it grows, and Amphoreus... will be truly set free.
你口中的「解脱」，无异于「毁灭」。这个世界的一切将彻底从演算中消失，再也无处寻得。
The "freedom" you speak of is no different from Destruction. Everything this world ever was will disappear from the extrapolations, never to be regained.
而你自身的「记忆」，也一定无法幸免。
That would also include your "memories," by the way.
没错，鸟儿。所以我才需要你的协助。这一路同行，让我更加确信……
That's right. That's why I needed your help, little bird. The more we walked together, the more I was convinced...
你拥有一具美丽的法身，它与我十分相称。
...That you have a beautiful dharmakāya. It fits me very much.
难怪，这才是你挟持我的理由……
So that's why you took me here...
<color=#dbc291ff>你的真身，是一道深不见底的执念。</color>
<color=#dbc291ff>Your true form... is a bottomless obsession.</color>
真聪明，你果然没有让我失望。
Smart girl. You haven't disappointed me.
这具化身不过是被烛火映出的倒影，舍弃也不足为惜。必须被留下来的，惟有「愿望」——
This avatar is but a shadow cast by the candlelight. Discarding it invokes no feelings within me. What I must preserve is only my "wish"...
<color=#dbc291ff>My wish to kill the Path of Remembrance.</color>
如果不能将祂和祂狂热的党羽铲除，「三月七」将永远无法得到安宁。
"March 7th" will not find peace as long as THEY and THEIR fanatical henchmen exist.
前路漫漫，必须有一位守护者陪伴在她身旁。而你…无疑是最佳人选。
The road ahead is still long, and she needs a guardian to stand by her side. You... are my best choice.
恕我拒绝，这份职责似乎过于沉重了。
Allow me to refuse. That duty seems far too heavy.
反抗也是徒劳，我的小鸟。我会亲手把自己植入你的内心。等到安抚好{NICKNAME}和丹恒……
Resistance is pointless, my darling birdie. I will personally plant myself into your heart. And once I've calmed down {NICKNAME} and Dan Heng...
我就会去现实中，找到「真正的你」。
I will head into reality and find the "true you."
So... That wasn't enough to fool you.
一位天才的镜子戏法，和一道「智识」的保护机制，对么？
A genius's mirror trick and a protective mechanism of the Erudition. Is that right?
这层层保障，的确让人难以下手。
Those layers of security do make things a little difficult.
很可惜，那两位无名客已经来到了门外。你的计划…要出些小小的意外了。
But unfortunately, those two Nameless are already right outside the door. Your plan... is about to encounter a few mishaps.
所以，伙伴们，还是不愿和我一起吗？挽救美丽的银河，甚至不留下一道伤疤。
Will you still not stand with me, my companions? We'll save the beautiful cosmos, and we won't leave even a single scar behind.
We are confident that we can defeat Irontomb.
也许可以，但那要付出多少代价？
Perhaps you can. But what will that cost?
I'll never agree to your means!
谁是你伙伴，把三月七还回来！
I'm not your companion! Give March 7th back to us!
别被感性裹挟了，亲爱的{NICKNAME}。这个世界的英雄之旅，只是「记忆」美化过后的叙事。
Don't get caught up in your emotions, my dear {NICKNAME}. The Hero's Journey in this world is just a narrative embellished with "memories."
它的本质？终究是一串冰冷的数字。
Its essence is nothing but a string of zeros and ones.
为了你们，还有「三月七」——在我看来，这抉择十分合理。
For your own sake, and for the sake of "March 7th," I think my choice is a very reasonable one.
来吧，「负世」的火种就在我手中。只需安然睡去，银河便能得到拯救。
Come. I hold the Coreflame of Worldbearing. Just fall asleep, and we'll save the cosmos.
如果你真心认为我们有赞同的可能……
If you honestly thought we would agree with you...
那证明你一点也不了解三月七。
That just proves you don't understand March 7th at all.
像你那样与人相处，我果然做不到呢……
Seems like I really can't get along with people like you do...
但，为了让你还能拥抱明天，继续这段无忧无虑的旅程……
But in order to make sure you can still embrace tomorrow and continue this carefree journey...
总有些「记忆」——是不得不被焚烧的代价呀♭
Some "memories"... must be set on fire as the sacrifice ♭
（先把这个扇区的符文收集完整后再继续前进吧……）
(I should collect all the runes in this sector before moving on...)
（每一次轮回的牺牲都意味着沉重的决心…）
(Each sacrifice in every cycle represents a heavy resolve...)
你的视线仿佛温柔的风拂过那些轮回的记忆，不忍与哀悯紧紧揪住你的心。
Your gaze, like a gentle breeze, drifted across those memories of countless cycles, as reluctance and sorrow clutched tightly at your heart.
倘若她的离去是在循环之内，那么或许每一次的轮回，遐蝶都会照顾好这枚纯净的灵魂。
If her departure was part of the cycle, then perhaps in every reincarnation, Castorice would take care of this pristine soul.
但是她选择了超脱循环，「灵魂」不会去往西风尽头，而是沉入大墓，将希望延续下去。
But she chose to break free from the cycle. The 'soul' will not journey to where the west wind ends, but will descend into the Great Tomb, to carry on hope.
她在轮回中的无数死亡赋予了此地更为神圣的意义，既然你们已经来到了这里，定不会辜负她的决心。
Her countless deaths within the cycle have endowed this place with an even greater, more sacred meaning. Since you've already come here, you surely won't let her resolve be in vain.
果然，信息流汇入了中央的晶体。
As expected. The data stream flew into the crystal in the middle.
它在以这种方式，收录书本中的「记忆」。
It's absorbing the "memories" in the book in this manner.
如此荒芜、破败，这座遗迹究竟是……
This ruin is so desolate... What exactly is it...?
嗯？终端上有个凹槽，大小…正好能放进这本书？
Hmm? There's a notch in the terminal that's... just the right size for this book?
小心，到处都是「长夜月」的眼线。
别离我太远，「识刻锚」会保护我们。
Don't get too far from me. The Chronocognitive Anchor will protect us.
难以想象，这还是翁法罗斯么？
It's hard to believe... Is this still Amphoreus?
扎格列斯之手，看来这里会用到它。
The Hand of Zagreus... Seems like we'll need it here.
也许要将模块嵌入凹槽中，符文才会完整。
Maybe the rune will only be completed after the modules are inserted into the slot.
Nice. Let's go encapsulate the encryption key.
回去吧。用密钥开启新的道路。
Let's go back and use the encryption key to open a new path.
第三枚密钥属于「海洋」…动身吧。
The third encryption key belongs to the "Ocean"... Let's get going.
这一次，记忆没有出现么……
巨大的风扇，用边上的时象仪让它停下。
It's a huge fan. Use the Chrono Vessel over there to stop it.
符文在风扇上，得先用时象仪让它停下。
The rune is on the fan. We need to use the Chrono Vessel to stop it first.
成功了。接下来，再将扇叶旋转到合适的位置……
That's it. Now, turn the fan blades to the right position...
最后一枚密钥，带走它吧。
That's the last encryption key. Take it with you.
「我告别这美丽的世界，只为在你的回忆中，以我渴望的方式重逢。」
"I bid farewell to this beautiful world, so that we can reunite in your memories in the way I want."
「你会在往昔的涟漪里，看见我留下的足迹。」
"You will see the footprints I left behind in the ripples of past reverie."
「在这记忆之外，我不曾拥有其他命运。」
"I have never had any other fate beyond this memory."
「请用『爱』铭记我，就像所有逝去的诗篇里，唯一不变的尾注。」
"So, please remember me with 'love', like that eternal footnote in all the faded sagas."
"I'll be waiting for you in the past."
刻律德菈，她如何改写「律法」，世人始终不得而知…但我相信，它一定是翁法罗斯对命运的决胜一着。
The world never learned how Cerydra rewrote the Law... But I believe it was Amphoreus's decisive move against destiny.
「岁月」的故事，你应该再熟悉不过啦。就把篇幅留给英雄们吧？
You must be very familiar with the story of Time now, so why don't we leave some pages for the heroes instead?
三千万次启程，三千万次分裂，然后，是三千万世逐火的起点。命运辜负了缇里西庇俄丝，但世人绝不辜负。
Thirty million departures. Thirty million shatterings. And the beginning of thirty million Flame-Chase Journeys. Fate betrayed Tribios, but she was never betrayed by humanity.
每一世，大地兽之王都会为反叛付出沉重的代价，但它的低吼中从未有过悔意。
The Dromas King paid a heavy price for their betrayal in every life, but there was never regret in their deep roars.
又一世，遐蝶为「死亡」献上了最后的拥抱。自此，便是另一段孤独的看护。如果有人能真正抱一抱她，该多好呀。
Once again, Castorice offered her final embrace to Death, and from then on, she started another lonesome watch. How wonderful would it be for someone to give her a real hug...
狡黠的猫儿，欺世的「诡计」…无论身份如何变换，她总会成为圣城坚守千年的支柱。
A devious cat, the Trickery that fooled the entire world... No matter how her identity changes, she will always end up being a pillar that stands tall for the holy city for a thousand years.
迈德漠斯的「纷争」之路，再次抵达了光荣而孤独的尽头…一如既往。
Mydeimos's road of Strife once again reached its glorious and lonely end... as always.
最后，温柔的彩虹遍布「天空」。无论往世、此世或来世，雅辛忒丝都会点亮人们心底里的微光。
In the end, the gentle rainbow covered the Sky. Whether in the past, present, or future, Hyacinthia will always illuminate the glimmering light in people's hearts.
再一次，阿那克萨戈拉斯用生命完成了证明。他的答案已经如此完备，只剩下最后一道来自天外的变量。
Anaxagoras once again completed the proof with his life. His answer was so complete... All he was missing was a last variable from beyond the sky.
「负世」…这柄神权是如此沉重，我不知道该如何述说才好。
Worldbearing... This divine authority is so heavy that I do not know how I can even tell its story.
在温热的黄金中，「浪漫」铸成了世人的长阶。如果她能亲眼见证黎明到来，该有多好呀。
Romance, in warm gold, forged the long staircase for humanity. How wonderful it would be if she could witness the dawn with her own eyes.
最后，鱼儿回到了「海洋」，她一无所有的家乡。在深海的尽头，她为后世坚守涡心，直到最后一刻。
In the end, the fish returned to the Ocean, her home where there was nothing left. For the sake of the future, she guarded the Vortex at the end of the deep sea until the very last moment.
这扇门后，就是那位「倾听者」的居所。
Look. That symbol at the end of the room...
它属于第十三位泰坦，无人知晓的、孑然的神明……
It belongs to the Thirteenth Titan. The unknown solitary god...
「新的生命若要萌芽，它的种子须是死的。」
"If a new life is to be born, its seed has to be dead."
唯有舍弃，唯有「忘却」…灵魂才能在空无中走向新生。
Only through abandonment and "Oblivion"... can souls walk from emptiness towards rebirth.
在哀丽秘榭，我与昔涟相遇，并联系到了螺丝咕姆和黑塔。他们指出必须在新的世界循环中取得「负世」的火种，但来古士将成为我们的阻碍，要依靠「律法」的力量与之抗衡。

In Aedes Elysiae, I crossed paths with Cyrene and reconnected with Screwllum and Herta. They revealed that the Worldbearing Coreflame must be secured in the world's next cycle, but Lygus would stand in our way. Only with the power of the Law could we hope to oppose him.
我们回到了第一次逐火之旅的时代，与曾经的逐火英雄们相识，包括掌权的「律法」黄金裔刻律德菈，以及为她效命的「海洋」黄金裔海瑟音。

We returned to the era of the first Flame-Chase Journey, where we met the Flame-Chase heroes of old, including the monarch Cerydra, the Chrysos Heir of Law, and Hysilens, the Chrysos Heir of the Ocean, who served her.
要点亮「律法」，必须先战胜封锁涡心的法吉娜。但在战前的宴会中，我们却发现来古士已与掌权的刻律德菈达成合作。我在争执中被驱逐至世界之外，刻律德菈也因此与来古士决裂。

To ignite "Law," we needed to overcome Phagousa, who had sealed the Vortex. However, we discovered at the rallying feast before the battle that Lygus had already forged a pact with the reigning Cerydra. During our clash, I was cast out of this world, and Cerydra broke her alliance with Lygus.
在黑塔的提示下，我得到了流光忆庭的帮助，离开了来古士的囚笼。而在命途空间中，与三月七样貌相同的神秘来客「长夜月」带来了「负世」的火种，并将我送回了翁法罗斯。

Guided by Herta's hints, I obtained the Garden of Recollection's aid and left Lygus's cage. Within the Path Space, a mysterious guest bearing the likeness of March 7th — "Evernight" — appeared with the Worldbearing Coreflame and sent me back to Amphoreus.
在我离去的时间里，翁法罗斯的历史流逝千年。昔涟在荒废的奥赫玛城留下了过往的记忆：黄金裔与来古士进行了漫长的战争，付出了巨大的牺牲，为我铺就了再创世的道路。

While I was away, a thousand years had passed in Amphoreus. Amidst the desolation of Okhema, Cyrene left behind memories of a long war between the Chrysos Heirs and Lygus. Their sacrifices laid the groundwork for my return, and with it, the Era Nova.
在斯缇科西亚的幻象中，我得知了海瑟音的故事与第一次逐火之旅的过往。在海中守候的海瑟音带我来到了涡心，而来古士也就此现身，揭露了真身——天才俱乐部#1，赞达尔。

In the illusions of Styxia, the tales of Hysilens and the first Flame-Chase Journey were unveiled to me. Hysilens, who had been waiting in the ocean's depths, led me to the Vortex. There, Lygus emerged, revealing his true identity — Genius Society #1, Zandar.
我与海瑟音难以抗衡赞达尔的力量，但天才们与昔涟及时出手，依靠「记忆」的力量令他退场。我成功扭转了再创世，减缓了铁墓诞生的进程，但似乎也有另一股势力蠢蠢欲动……

Hysilens and I couldn't stand against Zandar alone. But the geniuses and Cyrene acted just in time, wielding the power of the Remembrance to drive him back. I successfully reversed the course of the Era Nova, delaying the birth of Irontomb. However, another force now seems to be stirring...
把「三月七」还给我们，停止这场无意义的争端。
Return "March 7th" to us and end this pointless conflict.
你还要旁观到什么时候？
How long are you going to stand there and watch?
无名客从来都是自己上阵。
The Nameless always fight their own battles.
别想多了。我只是需要一点时间，来解决不必要的麻烦……
Don't get the wrong idea. I just need some time to deal with some unnecessary trouble...
天才们编写的密钥——现在已经失效了哦♭
The encryption key written by those geniuses is already invalid♭
先来玩个游戏吧，亲爱的{NICKNAME}？
How about we play a game, dear {NICKNAME}?
放心，用不了多长时间。只是一道简单的选择题，A或者B。
Don't worry. It won't take long. It's a simple multi-choice question. A? Or B?
我能理解，将黄金裔们当作演算的数据，对你而言太过困难。那不妨先假设他们是活生生的人……
I understand it's too difficult for you to treat the Chrysos Heirs as extrapolated data. Then, why don't we assume for now that they're living, breathing humans...
现在，银河将要面临一场空前的浩劫，你的选择关乎无数星球的存亡。
Now, the cosmos will face an unprecedented catastrophe, and your choice will determine the fate of countless planets.
一边是与你同舟共济的伙伴：他们竭力抗争，争取到1%的胜算。但如果选择那1%，无论结果如何，都将伴随巨大的牺牲。

On the one side are companions who've weathered every storm with you. They fought with everything they've got and obtained a 1% chance of victory. However, should you choose that 1%, there'll be massive sacrifices no matter the outcome.
另一边，则是一个简单的按钮：<color=#dbc291ff>「忘却」会烧尽他们存在的痕迹，你对这段旅途全部的记忆。</color>但它能令酝酿中的灾祸骤停，让宇宙免于「毁灭」。

On the other side, there's a simple button: <color=#dbc291ff>The "Oblivion" will burn away all traces of their existence, as well as your entire memory of this trip.</color> But it will also halt the brewing catastrophe, and spare the universe from Destruction.
对于你要做出的决定，被牺牲的人们将完全知情，不掺杂任何隐瞒或欺骗……
Those who are to be sacrificed will be fully aware of the decision you need to make. There will be no concealment or deception...
Tell me, what will you choose?
别想用电车难题糊弄我。
Don't try to trick me with that trolley problem.
过时的话题，没必要讨论！
Such an outdated theme. Not worth discussing!
你偷换的概念可不止一条。
You're twisting more than just one concept here.
你说得对。这个选择没有意义，也不重要。唯一有趣的……
You're right. This choice is meaningless and unimportant. The only interesting thing...
<color=#dbc291ff>Is the number of people making that choice.</color>
与此同时，我向丹恒提出了同样的问题。答案无关紧要，让我瞧瞧——「开拓」的精神，是否真如你们声称的那般一心同体。
I've just posed the same question to Dan Heng. The answer doesn't matter. Let me see... Is this Trailblaze spirit truly as unified as you all claim it to be?
Now, why don't you prove it to me?
激动人心的「英雄救美」…再度上演！
还觉得自己能做什么吗，粉色的小忆灵？
Still think you can do something, little pink memosprite?
除了还算伶俐的口齿，你有什么能和我抗衡的武器？
What weapons do you have to stand against me besides your somewhat witty words?
可别把人家看扁了呀？除了口才和魅力——
Don't underestimate me! Besides my charm and eloquence I can—
<color=#dbc291ff>"—and stir up ripples of past reverie!"</color>
关键时刻，我们才不会滔滔不绝呢！
We don't have time for endless chatter at crucial moments like this!
大意是你的软肋，长夜月。
Carelessness is your greatest weakness, Evernight.
按下快门！人家——坚持不了太久！
Take the shot! I can't hold on much longer!
Do I take a photo of you?
怎么可能！当然是…「长夜月」小姐！
Of course not! Take a photo... of Miss Evernight!
Do I take a photo of her?
M—Make sure you get the focus right!
这里是，用某人的「记忆」制成的光锥……？
This is... a Light Cone made from someone's "memories"...?
Ah, and there's a harmony entwined within it.
看来，有人在我看不见的角落付出了许多努力呀……
Hmm... Looks like someone's been busy behind my back.
虽然知道你是诚心诚意在夸我……
I know you mean that as a compliment...
但「天真」这两个字，还是还给你吧？
But as for the word "naive"... I think I'll give you that one back.
欢迎来到哀丽秘榭，{RUBY_B#岁月之泰坦}永夜之帷{RUBY_E#}包围的小村庄。现在，这道回忆也属于你……
Welcome to Aedes Elysiae, a small village shrouded by the {RUBY_B#Time Titan}Veil of Evernight{RUBY_E#}. Now, this memory will also belong to you...
以彼之道，还治彼身。我以故乡为灵感打造的「迷宫」，长夜月小姐，希望你喜欢。
Let's give you a taste of your own medicine. With my home as the inspiration, I've created this "maze"... Hope you like it, Miss Evernight.
悟性很高呢，小忆灵。但只凭你和「同谐」的小鸟——想困住我，多少有些勉强了呀？
Quite perceptive, little memosprite. But with just you and that Harmony's little birdie... thinking you could trap me? That's a bit of a stretch.
所以，和我说说吧，「你」又在其中发挥了什么作用？
So, tell me, what role did "you" play in all of this?
是啊，真没想到…另一个「我」居然强得这么不像话……
I really didn't think that... this other "me" would be THIS strong...
还好还好，至少在「头脑」方面，咱还算占了上风！本姑娘的绝妙计策，完全超出你的想象。
But at least when it comes to brains, I've still got the edge! My brilliant plan? Bet you never saw it coming!
在你我易换身体的瞬间，你用稍纵即逝的最后一丝心识……
In that split second when we switched bodies... with your last flicker of consciousness...
将{RUBY_B#<color=#dbc291ff>空无的精魄</color>}<color=#dbc291ff>自己</color>{RUBY_E#}藏进了泰坦的帷幕啊。
You hid {RUBY_B#<color=#dbc291ff>empty spirit</color>}<color=#dbc291ff>yourself</color>{RUBY_E#} within the Titan's veil.
呀，怎么一下子就被猜出来了…真没悬念！
Huh? You got it already? No suspense at all?
但我的计划可一点也不脆弱！没人比我更懂{NICKNAME}和丹恒。既然约好了，他俩就不会食言——
But my plan was super thought-out! I know {NICKNAME} and Dan Heng better than anyone. A promise is a promise for them. They never go back on their word!
无论史书、日记，还是留影石机，都是「记忆」绝佳的触媒。
History books, diaries, and photostones are all perfect catalysts for "memories."
没错！当我听见{NICKNAME}按下快门的声音，就算精神只留下一点点残余……
That's right! So when I hear {NICKNAME} press the shutter... even if there's just a teeny bit of my consciousness left...
也会「咻」地一下，自己钻进相机里去！
可这样看来，巧合的成分…是不是还挺大的？
But if you put it like that... Aren't you leaving a lot to chance?
怎么会！既然说了要给我拍照，{NICKNAME}肯定会在翁法罗斯四处按下快门。我总有机会等到{F#她}{M#他}。
No way! {NICKNAME} will definitely be snapping away all over Amphoreus because {F#s}he promised me to take photos! I'm guaranteed to run into {M#him}{F#her} eventually.
「长夜月」小姐，以我现学现卖的本事，想困住你当然不现实。
Miss Evernight, let's be real, my amateur skills aren't enough to keep someone like you contained.
但如果「三月七」也在场，局面就不一样了……
But if "March 7th" were here, that would be a different story...
因为你无论如何都无法忽视她，对吧？
Because there's no way for you to ignore her, right?
可以，那让我拭目以待。绕了这么远的路，你接下来打算怎么做？
Fine. Lay it on me then. After going on such a long detour, what exactly do you want to do now?
首先，我要谢谢你保护了{NICKNAME}和丹恒。但后来，你做的事就太过火了……
First, I want to thank you for protecting {NICKNAME} and Dan Heng. But what you did later went way too far...
趁一切还来得及，我必须让你回心转意才行！
So, while there's still time, I've got to make you change your mind!
有一件事的确令我困惑……
There IS something that truly puzzles me...
在献出一切「记忆」，化作空无的精魄后，你是如何找回自我的？
How did you find yourself again after giving up all your "memories" and becoming an empty soul?
看来你也不是全知全能嘛？
Looks like you aren't so omnipotent or omniscient after all, huh?
答案很简单：这一路上，「我」一直沉睡在相机里，陪着{NICKNAME}走完了全程。
The answer is simple. "I" have been dozing inside the camera all along, and I accompanied {NICKNAME} during {M#his}{F#her} entire journey.
而这一世，在{F#她}{M#他}和昔涟讲述星际旅行的时候，那些与列车同行的回忆也钻入了我的脑海……
So when {F#s}he told Cyrene in this cycle about {M#his}{F#her} interstellar travels, those memories of journeying with the Express entered my mind as well...
虽然还远远称不上「完整的三月七」，但用来和你对峙…这些「记忆」足够了。
I may still be far from the "complete March 7th"... but these "memories" were more than enough to fight you.
所以，前因后果你都知道，对吗？
So, you know what led up to this and what followed, right?
那就说说看吧，你有信心说服我的理由。
Go ahead. Tell me. Let's hear why you're so confident you can sway me.
理由什么的，不是再简单不过了吗？
Why? Isn't the reason super obvious?
哪怕只是透过镜头，我也知道，发生在翁法罗斯的爱、恨、挣扎，跟活生生的人没有区别。
Even through a camera lens, I know that the love, hate, and struggles that happened in Amphoreus were the same as what real living people experience.
话题又绕回了原点呢，我已经让{NICKNAME}做过一次选择了。
Same old topic. I already got {NICKNAME} to make a choice.
天秤两端的配重，相差太过悬殊。在「毁灭」的威胁面前，追求两全其美…只会两害得兼。
The weights on each side of the scale are far too unequal. When Destruction looms, trying to preserve everything... only means sacrificing everything.
可是，在提出这个问题前……
Well, take a step back. Before we ask this question...
你有想过吗？我们…有什么资格替别人做出决定呢？
Have you ever really thought about it? What right do we really have... to make choices for others?
假如银河是一座更大的奥赫玛，里头住着一位「凯撒」，那她也许可以替所有人做主，称量天秤两端的重量。
If the cosmos were nothing more than a bigger Okhema, ruled by a so-called "Imperator"... maybe then she'd have the right to weigh both sides and decide for us all.
但别忘了，我们只是一群「无名客」——
But the truth is... We're just a bunch of Nameless.
就算被人口口声声「救世主」、「救世主」地叫着，我相信{NICKNAME}也没有忘记过……
Even with everyone calling {M#him}{F#her} "Deliverer," I believe that {NICKNAME} hasn't forgotten...
「开拓」的意义是「探索、了解、建立、连结」，是与无数世界同行，而不是高高在上的「拯救银河」。

That the meaning of Trailblaze is to "explore, understand, establish, and connect." It's not about standing above the cosmos as some kind of savior. It's about walking alongside every world within it.
所以，别想用什么「牺牲在所难免」来绑架我，列车组对这些毫无根据的指责是免疫的！
So don't try to guilt-trip me with stuff like "necessary sacrifices." The Express Crew is immune to these baseless accusations!
况且——我只是打个比方——只要黑塔女士愿意，她随时可以掏出虚数武器，把这台「权杖」炸个灰飞烟灭。
Besides — and this is just an example — if Madam Herta wanted to, she could have whipped out her Imaginary weapon any time and blasted this "Scepter" to bits.
用你的话说，跟一位绝灭大君可能造成的威胁相比，区区几个无名客的命又算得上什么呢？
Because, according to your logic, the lives of a few Nameless are nothing compared to a Lord Ravager's potential threat.
但她没有这么做，而你，也不会同意这件事，对吧？我早就发现了，你也有一项致命的弱点……
But that's not what she did. You wouldn't have liked it either, would you? I figured you out a long time ago... you've got a fatal flaw.
A weakness in the shape of <color=#dbc291ff>"me."</color>
明明拥有这么蛮不讲理的力量，却还是遵守了对我的承诺。我只能认为……
You've got such incredible powers, but you still kept your promise to me. That only means...
你所有行动的「原动力」，只是为了让「我」能继续旅行下去。
The "sole motivation" behind everything you do was just so "I" can keep travelling.
你好像，确实没有那么天真呢。
You're... not as naive as you seem, are you?
既然如此，我可以向你证明。
In that case, I can prove it to you.
不是替别人——而是替「自己」给出回答。
I won't answer for someone else, but for "myself."
细究的话，现在它才算是我的本体。
If you want to seriously think about it, this thing actually counts as my body right now.
构成它的记忆，全部来自相机中的照片，也就是我一路以来的「开拓」。
Its memories are all drawn from the camera's photos, in other words, from my journey of Trailblazing.
我醒着的时候，你一直都在沉睡。泛泛而谈，在你听来多半没有实感……
While I was awake, you were always sleeping, so talking about this probably doesn't feel real to you...

And what of it? This body is soaked in filthy golden blood...
<color=#dbc291ff>「大地」饿了，只有「不朽」能填满它的胃袋！</color>
<color=#dbc291ff>The "Earth" is hungry, and only the Permanence can satisfy it!</color>
The mists of the past shall drift away.
罢了，我毕竟是你要背负的重责……
After all, I am the heavy burden you must bear...
How could I be so easily forsaken?
持明蜕生本该遗忘前尘旧事，但龙师们当年从中作梗，让「我」残留在你心识深处……
Vidyadhara are supposed to forget the past during hatching rebirth, but the Preceptors interfered back then and allowed "me" to remain deep in your consciousness.
若不愿提起那染血的旧名，唤我「忘却的记忆」也好。
If you do not wish to use that bloodstained name, you may call me "Obliviated Memory."
…不必了。纵使早已分道扬镳，我也不会忘记你。
...That's not necessary. Though we've long parted ways, I won't ever forget you.
翁法罗斯「大地」的半神。他本该站在我们这边，却受人蛊惑，意图夺取化龙之力。
That is Amphoreus's "Earth" demigod. He should be on our side, but he was led astray and intends to seize the power of dragon transmutation.
龙临大地，万类仰止。寰宇生灵皆贪图「不朽」，你我再清楚不过。
The dragon descends upon the earth, and all beings look to it in reverence. You and I know that all life in the universe covets Permanence.
你想说，我会重蹈你的覆辙？
Are you trying to say I'll end up like you?
总有一天，你会的。依我见，此行终点离那时分相当近了。
One day you will, and as I see it, that day won't be far from the end of this journey.
结束这个话题吧。我不打算评判「丹枫」，更无意再与他产生纠葛。
Let's move on to another topic. I have no intention of passing judgment on "Dan Feng," and I have even less desire to become entangled with him again.
现在，我只关心一件事，那就是让伙伴们平安归来。
I only have one concern right now: bringing my companions back safely.
要么帮我抵御孽物，要么就退回记忆的阴影里去，丹枫。
You can either help me deal with these abominations or return to the shadows of memory, Dan Feng.
也罢。忆潮残秽仍在肆虐，有我陪同，你在这废墟中也能多一道助力。
Alright. The filthy remnants of the memoria tide still run rampant. Let me accompany you through these ruins. You could use the help.
那渴求龙之力的巨人，想必也不会善罢甘休。
And presumably, that giant who craves the power of dragons won't just let things rest.
Do as you please. I'm moving ahead.
嘿咻，这下就好了，{RUBY_B#门径之泰坦}雅努斯{RUBY_E#}祝福满满，密径可以重新使用啦！
Phew, it's all good now. {RUBY_B#Passage Titan}Janus{RUBY_E#}'s blessing is full, and the Hidden Passage can be used again!
这样一来，凯撒陛下的军团就可以从树庭发动奇袭了。
Now, the Imperator's legions can launch a surprise attack from the Grove.
不知道荒笛那边能不能成功呀……
Who knows if Terravox will be able to succeed...
缇里西庇俄丝女士。是我，{NICKNAME}的同伴，丹恒。
Lady Tribios, I am Dan Heng, {NICKNAME}'s companion.
丹恒？初次见面。{NICKNAME}的伙伴，原来不止小昔涟吗？
Dan Heng? Nice to meet you. I didn't realize {NICKNAME} had more companions in addition to little Cyrene.
我看，不必多费口舌了。她们和我一样，不过是你的一簇记忆。
There is no need to elaborate further. They are merely a collection of your memories, just like me.
不对。倘若是我的记忆，她们理应认得我才是。
No. If they were my memories, they would recognize me.
虽然*我们*不认识你，但这里马上要发生一场可怕的战斗，还是快去安全的地方吧！
Even though we don't know you, we'll still ask you to get somewhere safe. A terrible battle is about to break out here.
海瑟音…唔，「剑旗爵」就在前面不远，疏散工作快要完成了。快去吧，不然可能会赶不上。
Hysilens... I mean, "Dux Gladiorum" is not far ahead. The evacuation efforts are almost over, so go now, or it might be too late.
明白了，我这就去找她。谢谢你们。
I see. In that case, I'll go look for her now. Thank you.
不客气！*我们*还得去传递讯息，先走了——你要保重喔，丹恒！
No problem! We need to go deliver some messages, so we'll be off. Please take care, Dan Heng!
Memory's crazed ramblings. What do you think?
暂时不成结论，但这道回忆显然不属于我。
It's too early to reach a conclusion, but this memory is most definitely not mine.
两种可能性：它属于<color=#dbc291ff>「荒笛」</color>，或是你苦苦追寻的{NICKNAME}。
There are two possibilities: This memory either belongs to <color=#dbc291ff>Terravox</color>, or it belongs to {NICKNAME}, the person you're desperately looking for.
但后者的概率，微乎其微。
But the probability of the latter is very low.
你应该比我清楚，那场决战过后，就连第一位天才都无法断定{F#她}{M#他}何去何从。
You should know better than I do. After that final battle, even the First Genius couldn't determine where {F#s}he went.
不错。但刚才的对话给了我启发。
Correct, but the conversation I just had gave me an idea.
且不论「长夜月」。在创世涡心，还有个人和{NICKNAME}一道失去了音讯。
Let's forget "Evernight" for now. In the Vortex of Genesis, there was someone else who went missing along with {NICKNAME}.
我还有机会和<color=#dbc291ff>她</color>取得联络。
I still have a chance to make contact with <color=#dbc291ff>her</color>.
And the way I'll do it... is right here in the Grove.
就是这里，是时候唤醒我们要找的人了。
We're here. Now it's time to awaken the person we're looking for.
原来如此，你准备和这个世界的水域共鸣。
I see. You plan to resonate with the waters of this world.
和我故乡的洋流相比，翁法罗斯的水体要更…不羁。驯服它的过程有些艰难，还好我已大概摸清了其中的门路。
Compared to the currents of my home, the waters of Amphoreus are... rather untamed. Subduing the waters wasn't easy, but I've gotten the hang of it now.
「于它狂欢的舞步之下，以盛会的喧嚣……」
"Under the raucous steps of their frenzied dance, the roar of celebration..."
翁法罗斯竟还有生者——此人还懂得唤水之术。
There are still survivors in Amphoreus, and this one even knows how to use the arts of water.
很高兴见到您，「海洋」的半神，海瑟音女士。
It's nice to meet the "Ocean" demigod, Lady Hysilens.
青色的龙鱼…是丹恒？我应该没有记错你的名字。
A green dragonfish... Are you Dan Heng? I hope I've remembered your name correctly.
鳞渊境是你的家乡，对么？在{NICKNAME}的记忆中，我看见你们并肩而立。
Scalegorge Waterscape is your home, isn't it? In {NICKNAME}'s memories, I saw you two standing side-by-side.
万幸，这样也能免去自我介绍，直接表明来意了。
That's fortunate. It means I won't have to introduce myself. I can get straight to the point.
请告诉我，「长夜月」和{NICKNAME}如今身在何方？
那位陌生人在我眼前掠走了「救世主」。我号令众水奔涌追逐，却被层岩阻断了流向……
The stranger snatched away the "Deliverer" right before my eyes. I commanded the waters to surge after them, but layered cliffs blocked the water's current...
务必小心，「大地」背离了逐火的使命。荒笛依然在世，它绝非「开拓」的盟友。
You must be careful. "Earth" has abandoned the Flame-Chase mission. Though Terravox still lives, they are not an ally of the Trailblaze.
不意外。那坠入疯狂的半神已和我交过手了。
That's no surprise. I've already exchanged blows with that mad demigod.
没想到…最坏的状况还是发生了。
I didn't think... the worst would still come to pass.
不仅如此，他还意图染指{RUBY_B#「不朽」}危险的力量{RUBY_E#}。身为战友，或许你知道他的目的是什么？
He also intends to get his hands on a {RUBY_B#the power of Permanence}dangerous power{RUBY_E#}. As his comrade-in-arms, do you know what his goal is?
荒笛眼里，从来只有自土地中诞生的生命。贪图天外的不可名状之力，我想动机也不外如是。
Terravox has only ever cared for life born from this soil. If they covet powers from beyond the sky, I suppose it's out of the same care.
可即便如此，它的举止…也太异常了。
Even so, their behavior is... far too unusual.
想来，若非油尽灯枯，它也不必如此破釜沉舟。
I presume they wouldn't have made such a drastic and irreversible decision if they had not exhausted all other means.
但拥抱「不朽」，恐怕只会落得更不幸的下场。
But embracing the Permanence may result in even more misfortune.
这位半神的意志值得尊敬，但我的立场不会变。
While I admire that demigod's willpower, my position has not changed.
看来，要找到「长夜月」，与「大地」一战无可避免。既然对方已沦为害兽……
It seems that if I want to find "Evernight," I will have to confront Earth. Since my opponent has already turned into a vicious beast...
也正好免去我的心理负担。
What I do won't weigh on my conscience.
…那么，丹恒阁下，请允许我的分身一同随行。作为见证此世末路的半神……
...Then allow my specter to accompany you, Lord Dan Heng. As the demigod who witnessed the end of this world...
至少，让我亲自为最后一位战友送去挽歌。
At least let me sing an elegy for my last comrade.
That doesn't sound like something you would normally say.
「正好免去我的心理负担」——言外之意，我能猜到一二。
"What I do won't weigh on my conscience." I can certainly guess what you mean by that.
为了同伴，我不会有分毫犹豫。
I will never hesitate for my companions.
我是一名「无名客」，而我要做的事……
I am a Nameless, and what I'm going to do...
就是捍卫一切行将飘逝的希望。
Is to defend all the hopes that are on the verge of fading away.
星穹列车的「护卫」…理应如此。
That is exactly how the "guard" of the Astral Express should act.
相比刚才，这里静得有些出奇了。
It's unusually quiet here compared to before.
别大意，忆潮变得更汹涌了……
Don't let your guard down. The memoria tide has become even more violent...
…你脑海中遗留的过往，远比我想的更多。
...Your mind retains far more of the past than I had imagined.
这场战前告别，我不止一次在梦中见过。
I've seen this farewell more than once in my dreams.
对于新生的持明，前世只是一场幻戏。你明白这是「你」的记忆，但无法感同身受。
The previous life is just an immersia to a newly-born Vidyadhara. You know rationally that these are "your" memories, but it doesn't feel like you experienced them yourself.
为一己私欲，擅用化龙之力，让昔日亲友化作仇敌……
I used dragon transmutation for selfish reasons, and close friends turned to enemies.
你一定会问我：如此代价，是否值得？
You probably want to ask me if it was worth it.
军务厅对此次「玉阙」之战颇为重视，「曜青」急急召她回去执行斥候任务。
The Military Affairs Office is placing more importance on the Yuque's battle this time, and the Yaoqing called her back for a patrol mission.
有些人就是血里有风，停不下一时半刻。无妨，她那份我来喝就好！
Some people are born with adventure in their blood and can't stop for even a moment. No matter, I'll drink her portion for her!
怎么就要举杯了？不等等丹枫吗？
We're already toasting? Why don't we wait for Dan Feng?
龙尊大人，自然是有无休无止的龙师会议要开，一时半刻散不了场。不等他了。
As always, the high elder has endless meetings with the Preceptors that he can't get away from. Let's not wait on him.
我转述她的原话：战事当前，贪杯误事，我就先在这儿放一瓮塔拉萨水晶宫的涌泉。
I'll relay her exact words: It is a mistake to drink too much before a battle, so I'll leave a jar of spring water from Thalassa's crystal palace.
她说，酒要在凯旋后喝才有滋味。
She said that wine only has flavor after a triumphant return.
我本来不想的，奈何她非要看看你喝下第一口的表情。
I didn't want to go along with her, but she insisted on seeing your expression after your first sip.
水也好、酒也罢，若是朋友所赠，便是同等醇厚。
Any gift from a friend, whether it is water or wine, is rich in flavor all the same.
你每句话都要上价值的旧疾还没痊愈吗？
I see you still speak as if every sentence must add something of profound value.
来得正好，大家都在等你呢。要不你自罚三杯吧！
You're just in time! The punishment for making us all wait should be three cups of wine.
饶了我吧，我在古海边喝的苦水还少吗？
Spare me, please. I've already suffered enough next to the ancient sea.
我已说服龙师们，这一战将有持明云吟士亲赴前线，与我军并肩作战。
I've convinced the Preceptors: Vidyadhara cloudhymn magi will join the battle on the frontlines, and our armies will fight side-by-side.
看来，你那对付「计都蜃楼」的计划可以实行了，景元。
It seems like you can now carry out your plan for dealing with the "Ketu Mirage," Jing Yuan.
Thank you for standing your ground against the dissenters, Dan Feng.
没想到那些龙师真会松口。此役之后，定然……
I never thought those Preceptors would ever relent. After all of this, countless Vidyadhara...
定然会有无数持明族有去无回，再无机会蜕鳞重生。这一点每个人都清楚。
Countless Vidyadhara will lose their lives, with no chance at a molting rebirth. We all understand this.
但是，若不同甘共苦，持明便不能成为联盟命运的一员，而只是他人苦难的旁观者。
But the Vidyadhara cannot become a part of the Alliance's destiny if we do not share in its joys and sorrows. We would only be bystanders to everyone else's suffering.
这一点，我们每个人同样清楚。
That is something we all understand as well.
这便是我们相聚在此的理由。来吧，举杯吧，诸位。这一杯不是为我们彼此饯行……
That is also why we've gathered here. Come, raise your cups. This toast is not for bidding farewell to each other...
而是敬那些不再归还的征人，敬我们的同伴。
But for honoring the soldiers who will not return, for honoring our companions.
你每句话都要上价值的旧疾还没痊愈吗？
I see you still speak as if every sentence must add something of profound value.
抱歉，我那乱来的计划一定让你背了很大压力。
Apologies, my reckless plan must have put a lot of pressure on you.
如果立场转换，不管我的计划多么乱来，你也一定会支持我的。不是吗？
If our positions were flipped, you'd support me no matter how reckless my plan was, right?
当然。但还是别太乱来吧。
Of course. But let's try not to be too reckless.
做出这样的决定，总有人会问你「值得吗？」…而你也会反复诘问自己。
When you make a decision like this, people will always ask, "Was it worth it?"... And you will also forever question yourself.
面对这种问题，你知道该如何回答吗？
Do you know how you will answer that question?
I won't answer it. I will prove it.
That's right. My sword is my answer.
谢谢你，丹枫！谢谢你，景元！谢谢你，镜流！谢谢你，不知道跑到哪里去了的白珩！
Thank you, Dan Feng! Thank you, Jing Yuan! Thank you, Jingliu! And thank you, Baiheng, wherever you've run off to!
你这酒鬼，喝些泉水也能喝醉吗？
Ridiculous, how did you get drunk from spring water?
哼，我只是觉得痛快！好似打造出一件良工神兵般畅快！
Hmph, I'm just full of joy! It feels like I've just forged a divine weapon with masterful craftsmanship!
「宁如飞萤赴火，不作樗木长春」…过去，我打心底里一直这么觉得。但，多亏遇见了你们，我从未像现在这样，切实地感到自己正在活着。
"I'd rather leave this world in a blaze than live until the end of time..." That's what I always firmly believed in the past. But I never truly felt like I was alive until I met all of you.
我从没这么想要多活片刻——不成，这话可说不得！
Now I wish more than anything that I could just live a bit longer. No, pretend I didn't say that!
这五人后来的命运，你也一清二楚。
And you know exactly what happened to these five afterward.
所以，在{NICKNAME}和三月七也离你而去的当下，你能理解了么？
So, can you understand it now, after both {NICKNAME} and March 7th have left you?
失去休戚与共的挚友，绝对称不上胜利，那只是一场折磨终生的失败。这种命运，我绝不接受。
Losing a dear friend with whom you've shared so much can never be considered a victory. It's a failure that torments you for the rest of your life. I could never accept that kind of fate.
使用化龙妙法的，是我。发誓要将白珩带回世间的，是我。
I was the one who used the Transmutation Arcanum. I was the one who swore to bring Baiheng back to life.
令一切走向无可挽回的，也是我。
And the one who brought everything past the point of no return... that was also me.
丹枫，你心中可有一丝悔意？
Do you have any regrets, Dan Feng?
就算光阴能够倒转，我也不会做出第二种选择。
Even if I could reverse time, I would not choose differently.
倘若战死的是镜流、景元…乃至应星，我的答案亦是如此。
And if it had been Jingliu, Jing Yuan... or even Yingxing who died in battle, I'd still choose to do the same thing.
因为只有我能做出选择，能捍卫这一切。现在，为了同伴，为了与你同行的那两人……
Because only I could make that choice and protect all of this. Now, for the sake of your companions, for the sake of those two who walk alongside you...
丹恒，你愿意做出多少牺牲？
How much are you willing to sacrifice, Dan Heng?
Your answer does not surprise me.
{F#她们}{M#他们}不止是我的同伴，也是我来时所经的路，引我至此。
They are more than just my companions. They are the path I took that led me to where I am now.
所以，{F#她们}{M#他们}也会成为我迷失时的路标，通向未来，直到下一个「轮回」。
So they will also be beacons for when I am lost, leading me to the future, until my next "reincarnation."
那就让我看看，你要如何贯彻这道信念吧。
Then let me see how you'll carry out your convictions.
不出所料，有人已恭候我们多时了。
As expected, someone's been waiting for us.
「不朽」的龙裔，还有…你昔日的战友。
A Scion of Permanence... and your old comrade-in-arms.
我的老友，荒笛…尽情享用吧。
Terravox, my old friend... Indulge yourself.
Let this memoria tide swallow everything.
丹恒阁下，该做好最坏的准备了：眼前这位山之民，绝不可小觑……
Be prepared for the worst, Lord Dan Heng. This Mountain Dweller must not be underestimated...
<color=#dbc291ff>「开山者」吉奥刻勒斯…大地的龙骑士，好久不见。</color>
<color=#dbc291ff>Geocles the Mountainbreaker... Earth's Dromas Rider, it's been a while.</color>
我记得你，鱼儿，还有你卑劣的主人。
I remember you, little fish, and your despicable master.
I didn't think you were still alive.
对于山之民，死亡只是回归大地。多亏了「长夜月」的恩赐……
Death is just a return to the Earth for Mountain Dwellers. Thanks to Evernight's gift...
我才能重返人间，守望我的挚友——那为逐火的阴谋白白牺牲的「大地」半神。
I was able to come back to the mortal realm and keep watch over my dear friend, the "Earth" demigod who was sacrificed to the Flame-Chase plot in vain.
龙裔，你是这场献祭中最重要的供物：再坚韧的意志也终将被忆潮吞没，届时，你，还有{RUBY_B#化龙妙法}你承载的力量{RUBY_E#}，便能为我等所有……

Long's Scion, you are the most important offering in this ritual sacrifice. No matter how strong your will is, it will eventually be swallowed by the memoria tide. When that time comes, you and {RUBY_B#Transmutation Arcanum}the powers you bear{RUBY_E#} will serve us...
用「不朽」唤起坠落的巨龙，令「大地」长出不灭的血肉！
We will use the Permanence to awaken the fallen Giant Dragon and give the "Earth" an everlasting body!
原来如此，你假称自己是荒笛……
I see. So you pretended to be Terravox...
是为了让我们追击至此，步入陷阱。
In order to lead us here into a trap.
如果没有凯撒可耻的诡计，「荒笛」之名——本该为我们共有。
If it weren't for the Imperator's tricks, the name "Terravox" would be shared between us anyway.
为了翁法罗斯的明天，它做出了正确的选择。
They made the right choice for Amphoreus's tomorrow.
但你们口中的明天，从来只有「人」的位置。
But the tomorrow you speak of only ever had a place for "humans."
我将再度扬起山火，烧毁那束缚你我的枷锁！
I will once again start a fire that burns away the chains that shackle us!
这里交给我吧，丹恒阁下。用那道<color=#dbc291ff>密径</color>到对岸去，{NICKNAME}或许就在更深处——
