Why don't you leave this to me, Lord Dan Heng? Use that <color=#dbc291ff>Hidden Passage</color> to reach the opposite shore. Perhaps {NICKNAME} is there, deeper inside...
「开山者」，山之民的英雄。若我不在这里得胜，他必将在「不朽」的妄执中丑陋死去。这不该是他的结局。
"Mountainbreaker," hero of the Mountain Dwellers. If I do not stay here and triumph over him, he will die an ugly death in delusions of the Permanence. That should not be his destiny.
而对于执意阻拦星穹列车，威胁世界命运的害兽……
And for the vicious beast that insists on obstructing the Astral Express and threatening the fate of the world...
这一路来，我们曾无数次站在悬崖边，被危难胁迫，做出艰难的选择。唯独这次——
We've stood on the precipice countless times along this journey, forced to make difficult choices in the face of disaster. But this time...
<color=#dbc291ff>该轮到我，向这个世界施压了。</color>
<color=#dbc291ff>It's my turn to put some pressure on this world.</color>
该结束挣扎了，吉奥刻勒斯。你理应以尊严的姿态赴死。
It's time to stop struggling, Geocles. Go to your death with dignity.
在那之前，告诉我：你和「长夜月」做了什么交易，伟大的「开山者」为何会沦为这副模样？
Before that, tell me, what kind of deal did you make with Evernight? How was the great Mountainbreaker reduced to this?
交给我吧。阐述「大地」至沉的过去……
Leave it to me. I'll recount the Earth's heaviest past...
你的身躯…竟变得如此瘦弱。
Your body... has become so frail.
群山也会老去，乃至死亡。
Even mountain ranges grow old and eventually die.
但我能听到，你的血脉中依旧回荡着澎湃的声响……
But I can hear the sound of blood still surging through your veins, fast and strong...
想必，你就是真正的「大地」半神。
I suppose you are the true Earth demigod.
我已垂暮，半神的名讳毫无意义。屹立于此的，只是「开山者」曾经的战友……
I am near my end, and the demigod title means nothing to me now. The being who stands here now is just the former comrade of the "Mountainbreaker"...
And the traitor who abandoned him.
「荒笛」，这名字曾属于吉奥刻勒斯的龙骑兵团。这支部队以善战的骑手和他们骁勇的大地兽闻名。
Terravox was once a member of Geocles' Dromas Legion. This force was famous for its skilled riders and their brave dromases.
而它，便是与「开山者」同生共死的巨龙，大地兽之王。
Terravox themself was the Dromas King, the Giant Dragon who swore their life to the "Mountainbreaker."
{RUBY_B#大地之泰坦}吉奥里亚{RUBY_E#}一战，面对这座难以逾越的高山，凯撒只能从内部瓦解。荒笛的倒戈成了逐火军致胜的关键。

In the battle against {RUBY_B#Earth Titan}Georios{RUBY_E#}, the Imperator could not surmount this mountain and thus had to break it from the inside. Terravox's betrayal was key to the Flame-Chase Army's victory.
神的时代已然落幕。生灵在地裂中适应了改变，也必须学会在史诗的夹缝求存。
The age of the gods was coming to an end. Living beings had adapted to the changes amidst the rifts of the earth, and now they had to learn to survive in the crevices of the epics.
需要有人来守望「大地」。所以，我接受了交易。接过泰坦神权，我沉入岩渊，以石铸的血肉弥合大陆。但……
Someone had to watch over the "Earth." So I agreed to a deal. I would take the Titan's divine authority and sink into the cliffs, using my flesh and blood forged of stone to mend the land. But...
唯有一桩「背叛」，我无法释怀。
There was one "betrayal" I could never forget.
「开山者」…他至死都不愿相信那是我的选择。面对凯撒劝降，他以死明志。
The "Mountainbreaker"... refused to believe that was my choice, even till his dying breath. Faced with having to surrender to the Imperator, he chose to die instead.
所以，这才是你和「长夜月」合谋的原因。
So this is why you decided to conspire with "Evernight."
「岁月」的陌客降临在我面前。名为「记忆」的天外伟力…不可思议。
"Time's" strange visitor appeared before me. The great power from beyond the sky called the Remembrance... It's incredible.
化作「忆灵」，吉奥刻勒斯得以重生。他口中喃喃着我们并肩作战的时光，一如这具身躯承载的所有{RUBY_B#记忆}生灵{RUBY_E#}。
Geocles was able to be reborn as a "memosprite." He mumbled about the times we fought side by side, just like how all the {RUBY_B#memories}lives{RUBY_E#} this body carries speak to me.
「长夜」开出的价码并不高昂，只要我施行「大地」神权，为她遮蔽行迹。
"Evernight" did not ask for much in return. She only wished for me to use the divine authority of "Earth" to hide her tracks.
愿意如此坦诚，你…放弃抵抗了么？
Since you're being so candid, does this mean... you've given up resisting?
一头将死的野兽，何谈抵抗？
For a beast on the brink of death, what is the point of resistance?
这样吗，千年过去了，你的心神…也早已支离破碎。
I see... A thousand years have passed, and your mind has long since been shattered.
这副垂老的身躯将自己背叛的一切尽数承载。现在，我只想在那不变的往日里……
This frail body bears the weight of all those I've betrayed, and now, my only wish is to rest with them...
去吧，龙裔。那道烈焰已经洞穿「大地」守护的秘密……
Go, Long's Scion. That fiery blaze has already burned through "Earth's" protection, revealing the secrets underneath...
<color=#dbc291ff>翁法罗斯的至深之地，埋葬一切过往的大墓。</color>
<color=#dbc291ff>The deepest depths in Amphoreus. The great tomb where all the past is buried.</color>
你寻找的「长夜月」，正是从其中走出。在她之前，无人知晓其存在。
The one you seek, "Evernight," walked out of that place. Before her arrival, no one knew of its existence.
换言之，那是「长夜月」现身的地点……
In other words, that is the place where "Evernight" came into being...
And it is also where she is now.
不惜沉沦在过去中，你的「记忆」都变成了这幅样貌…值得么？
You sank willingly into the past, and now your "memories" have turned into this form... Was it worth it?
只要不曾忘记，他们就还活着。
As long as I never forget, they will live on.
原始、兽性…我理解这种本能。
Primitive and animalistic... I understand these instincts.
大地并非海洋中的孤岛，而是其上万物的总和。
The earth is not a lonely island in the middle of the ocean. It is the sum of all the living things that stand on it.
为捍卫世间生灵，我从未后悔。
I have never regretted defending the creatures of this world.
<color=#dbc291ff>荒笛…时至今日，为了「不朽」龙力，你愿意做出多少牺牲？</color>
<color=#dbc291ff>Terravox... After all this, how much are you willing to sacrifice for the power of the Permanence?</color>
行路至此，我已彻底理解了自己的命运：无论如何抗争，「大地」终究无法迈向群星。
My journey up to here has allowed me to fully understood my destiny: No matter how I struggle, the "Earth" will never be able to reach the stars.
但，我的同胞，他们值得继续抗争。在生命的尽头，我想最后为他们争取一次行向未来的机会……
But my compatriots deserve to continue their struggle. At the end of my life, I want to make one last effort to give them a chance to move on to the future...
哪怕，那未来我已无法见证。
Even if it is a future I am not able to witness.
和我一同，向不公的命运再发起一次反叛吧。
Join me in rebelling against this unjust fate once more.
即便世界崩落，「大地」也必须伫立——
Even if the world collapses, the "Earth" must remain unshaken.
<color=#dbc291ff>将你体内燃烧的火种交予我，由这具「不朽」的身躯为你承载生命的熔炉。</color>
<color=#dbc291ff>Give me the Coreflame that burns within you, and allow this immortal body of the Permanence to bear the furnace of life for you.</color>
龙裔…你愿意将它们带往新世界么？
Long's Scion... Are you willing to bring them all into the new world?
空洞的承诺，恐怕不是你想要的答案。让我试着从另一个角度作出回答吧。
I won't give you empty promises. Allow me to answer your question from a different perspective.
「不朽」是龙的道途，「永恒」是生命至深的渴望。你若将大地的生灵托付予我，它们定会与我血脉中的本能共生。
The Permanence is the path that dragons trod, and "eternity" is life's deepest desire. If you entrust the earth's living beings to me, they will live in symbiosis with the instincts in my blood.
以此身为舟，我会代你将它们送往明天。那里不是翁法罗斯的西风尽头……
With this body as an ark, I will deliver them to tomorrow for you. That tomorrow won't be the end of Amphoreus's west wind...
而是一片浩瀚无垠的星海。
But a vast and boundless sea of stars.
那是由众生并肩「开拓」的未来，而非一座将「记忆」用作耗材的囚笼。
It's a future where all beings can Trailblaze side by side, not a prison made from Remembrance.
在「永夜之帷」的记忆中，你自始至终…都是个有所保留的人。
In the Veil of Evernight's memories, you've always... been someone with reservations.
呵，是我错估了你的决心。我明白…何为唯一的选择。
Hah, I misjudged your resolve. I understand... This is the only choice.
看吧，我胸中燃烧的，这颗诞自「大地」的火种。它是生命萌芽的红土，万物的熔炉……
Behold, this Coreflame that burns in my chest. This Coreflame born from the "Earth." It is the redsoil from which life sprouts, and the furnace of all living things...
它告诉我，发起最后一次僭叛，将开垦荒土、守望大陆的重任交予天外的「开拓」……
It tells me to commit one final act of treason: Entrust this heavy task to the Trailblazers from beyond the sky. Let them tend to the wild terrain and safeguard the lands...
如此，将生生不息者——带向远方。
And thus bring the endless stream of life into the distant future.
如此便好。神权交替的刹那，此地定将分崩离析……
Good. When I hand over the divine authority, this place will fall to pieces.
扶圣树之将倾，你可做好准备？
Are you prepared to hold up the Sacred Tree if it falls?
那便解放吾之残躯，赠予你这枚背离逐火之火吧——
Then free what remains of my body and let me give you this flame that turned away from the Flame-Chase—
我身为半神的职责，就于此刻将其卸下。
I now relinquish my duty as a demigod.
<color=#dbc291ff>「汝将自掘坟墓，焚毁于叛逆的熔炉」……</color>
<color=#dbc291ff>"You shall dig your own grave and burn in the furnace of rebellion"...</color>
但愿{RUBY_B#大地之泰坦}父亲{RUBY_E#}那久违的胸膛，接受我的回归。
I only hope that, after all this time, {RUBY_B#Earth Titan}Father{RUBY_E#} will take me back into their heart.
来吧，伏地的巨兽：为此世生生不息——
Come, crouching beast! For the endless life of this world...
<color=#dbc291ff>从蛰伏中更生，随我作腾飞的荒龙！</color>
<color=#dbc291ff>Rise from your dormancy, and follow me as soaring dragons of the wilderness!</color>
The worst did not come to pass.
若对方已沦作害兽，正好免去你的心理负担——如果那位半神心怀不轨，或誓死不从……
If your opponent had already turned into a vicious beast, whatever you did wouldn't weigh on your conscience... So what if that demigod had harbored ill intentions or vowed to fight to the death...
你会将枪尖指向它，亲手剜出这枚火种么？
Would you have pointed your spear at them and carved out the Coreflame with your own hands?
讨论「如果」没有意义。但，我很庆幸，结局终究没有落到那一步。
There's no point in discussing "what-ifs," though I am glad it didn't come to that.
无论如何，我都会试着以身入局，成为「再创世」的一部分。
Regardless, I will attempt to join this game and become a part of the Era Nova.
唯有如此，我才能对伙伴，还有这个世界，做到「问心无愧」。
This is the only way I can face my friends and this world with a "clear conscience."
既已了却分别心，就该是你我道别的时刻了。
Now that things are settled between us, it's time for you and I to say goodbye.
至此，我留下的一切{RUBY_B#化为「不朽」的力量}尽数消散{RUBY_E#}。迈向属于你的「不朽」吧。
Everything that I left behind has {RUBY_B#become the power of the Permanence}faded away{RUBY_E#} at this point. Go and march toward your own "Permanence."
至于如何驯服它，将是你的问题。
As for how to tame it... I'll leave that to you.
谢谢。我们无法回到过去，做出更好的选择。但至少，我们会在未来的轮回中做得更好。
Thank you. We can't go back to the past and make better choices. But at least we can do better in the future.
抛却遍体鳞伤的龙蜕，才算是迎来了新生……
A dragon can only welcome new life by shedding away his old, scarred skin...
生来第一次，我感到如此轻松。
For the first time in my life, I feel at ease.
燃烧的火种…这就是「毁灭」的滋味么？
This burning Coreflame... Is this what the Destruction feels like?
这光芒，竟出乎意料地温暖…就像是……
The light is unexpectedly warm... It's just like...
每一次…从梦中醒来的片刻……
The fleeting moments... when one wakes from a dream...
现在，也该是我重新启程的时刻了。
Now... it's time for me to set out once more.
「大地」的最后一次反叛，是为世间生灵插上「开拓」的羽翼……
The final rebellion of "Earth" was to bestow Trailblazing wings upon all living beings...
对荒笛来说，这应该是最好的结局。
For Terravox, this was probably the best possible ending.
那道伤痕背后，就是它口中的「至深之地」。热汽告诉我，{NICKNAME}就在其中……
Behind that scar lies what they called the "deepest depths." The rising steam tells me that {NICKNAME} is in there...
但此刻，{F#她}{M#他}正陷于一片深不见底的漩涡。
But right now, {F#s}he's trapped in a bottomless whirlpool.
炙热的深渊…若我一人贸然踏足其中，迷失在所难免。
A scorching abyss... If I were to enter it alone, I'd almost certainly get lost.
海瑟音女士，可否请你为我掩护？接下来，我必须全神贯注，恐怕无暇顾及周遭。
Miss Hysilens, would you give me cover? I'll need to focus completely on what's ahead and may not be able to pay attention to my surroundings.
What are you planning to do?
I'm going to continue where you left off.
那位陌生人在我眼前掠走了「救世主」。我号令众水奔涌追逐，却被层岩阻断了流向……
The stranger snatched away the "Deliverer" right before my eyes. I commanded the waters to surge after them, but layered cliffs blocked the water's current...
今时不同往日，层岩…已尽在我的掌心。
Times have changed... The cliffs... are now in the palm of my hand.
Then I believe it's worth a shot.
只是…若无万分坚定之心，你依旧会受到那片忆潮阻拦，更遑论从中打捞同伴。
It's just... without absolute resolve, you still won't be able to pass through that memoria tide, much less save someone from it.
寻找{NICKNAME}的过程，也许会漫长如永夜…务必小心，在「岁月」中彷徨，绝非易事。
The search for {NICKNAME} might stretch on like an evernight without end... Be careful. Wandering through "Time" is no easy feat.
不用担心，海瑟音女士。正如你在海底独守千年，我找回{NICKNAME}的决心……
Don't worry, Lady Hysilens. Just as you kept your lonely vigil in the depths for a thousand years, my determination to find {NICKNAME}...
Is even more unshakeable than the "Earth" itself.
古老的圣树，将你的根系借给我吧。用我背负的火种，与这片陆地共鸣。
Ancient Sacred Tree, lend me your roots. With the Coreflame I carry, let me resonate with this land.
以天地为横轴，以时光为纵轴，我将找到那唯一的{RUBY_B#沉睡于忆潮的你}一点{RUBY_E#}。
With heaven and earth as my map and time as my compass, I will find {RUBY_B#you, asleep among memoria tide}that one singular point{RUBY_E#}.
哪怕要用我的双脚，遍历这山川大地的每一处角落……
Even if I must cross every mountain and valley on my own two feet...
桀桀桀！玩水的装酷小子，没想到会在这里遇见你！
Hehehe! Look who it is! It's the water-splashing poser! Didn't think I'd catch you here!
原来如此，多谢提醒，交给我的云吟术吧。
I see. Thank you for the advice. My cloudhymn magic will take it from here.
把你们的体力留在更重要的事情上吧，这个简单，交给本大爷我吧。
Save your energy for more important stuff! This is a piece of cake. Leave it to yours truly!
要想通过这里，方法多的是——桀桀桀，该轮到本大爷大显神通了！
There are plenty of ways to get through here. Hehehe, it's time for me to show you what I can do!
Then I'll leave it to you.
桀桀桀，轮到本大爷大显神通了！
Hehehe, it's time for me to show what I can do!
那地方是出水口，要是能堵上的话…这房间里的水会自然排空。
That's the water outlet. If we could block it... the water in this room would drain naturally.
桀桀桀，这里的所有出口都被我堵上了！本大爷不愧是「添堵大王」！
Hehehe, I've blocked all the inlets here! I'm truly the "lord of obstacles"!
慢着…还得帮他们搭个梯子…就用这个预言算碑吧？
Wait... I still need to make a ladder for them... let's use this Prophecy Tablet.
都怪那个粉毛红眼睛的疯女人！为了不让她监视本大爷的一举一动，我特地把自己的嗓门封印起来了，桀桀桀！
It's all because of that crazy lady with pink hair and red eyes! In order to stop her from monitoring me, I sealed my voice, hehehe!
水位的问题已经完美解决了！要继续前进，就去搭那边的电梯吧！
The water problem is now all gone! Go take the elevator over there if you want to keep going.
桀桀桀，你来啦，你也是大老远听到了本大爷的英雄事迹吗？
Hehehe, so you've come! Did you also travel from afar after hearing tales of my heroic deeds?
不要解释，本大爷不喜欢解释，更喜欢你的直率！说吧，你是想听本大爷的英雄事迹，还是说想听想听本大爷的英雄事迹？
Don't explain! I hate long explanations, I much prefer your straightforwardness! So tell me, do you want to hear about my heroic deeds, or would you rather hear about my heroic deeds?
当时的情况呀，是这样的……
巴特鲁斯大爷的这番英雄事迹，就由你来见证吧！
Prepare to witness the Great Bartholos's heroic deeds!
I don't want to hear it.
桀桀桀，又轮到本大爷大显身手了！
Hehehe, once again, it's my turn to show you what I can do!
巴特鲁斯大爷的这番英雄事迹，就由你来见证吧，装酷小子！
Prepare to witness the Great Bartholos's heroic deeds, poser boy!
让我猜猜…你们还有同伴被困在更下面？
Lemme guess... You still have friends trapped even deeper below?
嗷呜！不愧是巴特鲁斯大人！
Awoo! Your greatness truly knows no bounds Lord Bartholos!
那就简单了，我先把你们带走，你们来告诉我该怎么找……
That's easy. I'll take you away from here first, then you can tell me how to find your friends...
怎么回事，这只小海豹，别说是安全无恙，简直是有恃无恐……
What's with this baby seal! Yeah, it's safe, but it's also waaay too calm...
该撤退了，巴特鲁斯大人来救我们了！
It's time to retreat. The Great Bartholos is here to save us!
o((•'ω´- )o "We're in no hurry. Let's toy with them a bit.")∋
桀桀桀，本大爷明白了，说吧！要怎么做？
Hehehe, I get it! Just tell me what to do!
o((◣'ω´◢ )o「朝灵液匣开炮吧！狠狠豹杀它们」)∋
o((◣'ω´◢ )o "Fire at the ichor vessel! Slam them dead!")∋
桀桀桀！全程没有一只小奇美拉或小海豹受到伤害！
Hehehe! Not a single Little Chimera or baby seal was harmed in the process!
o((='ω´= )o「呼，差点就去见法吉娜了，真是值得纪念的大逃生」)∋
o((='ω´= )o "Phew, I almost ended up meeting Phagousa. What a memorable escape.")∋
多谢你的帮助，巴特鲁斯。
Thank you very much for your help, Bartholos.
Hehehe, no big deal — barely lifted a finger!
总之嘛，事情就是这么个事情……
So yeah, that's pretty much the whole story...
这里的小生灵，本大爷自会把它们带到安全的地方！至于你，就只要负责把贼灵大人的英勇事迹传颂下去就行了！
I'll take these little critters here somewhere safe. As for you... just make sure the brave tale of the Great Bartholos spreads far and wide!
...How have you managed to stay alive up until now?
"Trickery" will always find a way, boy!
记着，就算末日临近，只有贼灵大人的笑声不会被任何邪恶势力淹没——桀桀桀桀！
Remember... when the end of times approaches, the great Spirithief's laughter is the only thing that will never be drowned out by any powers of evil! Hehehehe!
这疯狂的气息，简直与魔阴身无异。
This madness seems exactly like a mara-struck.
Cloud Knights? How is that possible...?
无穷无尽…忆潮卷土重来了么？
It's endless... Has the memoria tide returned?
何不伴那水中月，一饮而尽？
Why not join that Water-Mirrored Moon and be fully imbibed?
说回荒笛。方才的挑衅，恐怕只是佯攻。
Speaking of Terravox, his aggression just now was probably some distraction.
His madness is plain as day.
不、不！别过来，你这头该死的野兽……
N—No! Stay back, you cursed beast...
There's not a single sign of movement here...
大约只是忆潮的回声吧。
That was probably just the echoes of the memoria tide.
荒笛已经倒戈！军团，随我冲锋！
Terravox has already defected! Legions, charge with me!
Hah, a beast will always be a beast.
这场战役未免太过残忍…
This campaign has been far too cruel...
让它成为逐火必要的牺牲吧。
Let them be a necessary sacrifice for the Flame-Chase.
掣地的伏龙啊，你将为弑主留名青史！
Seismic Walking Dragon, history shall remember you as a titan-slayer!
记忆交错。又一场背叛，一场浩劫。
Memories intersect. Another betrayal, another catastrophe.
看来，无论这回忆属于谁，荒笛都是其中的主角。
Regardless of whose memory this is, it seems that Terravox has a leading role in it.
一生都在「反叛」的野兽…不难理解，它为何如此疯狂了。
A beast that's been "rebelling" its whole life... No wonder they descended into madness.
那就劳驾了，海瑟音女士。
挽住这道水流吧，它残留着灰鱼儿的温度。
Hold onto this current, for it still carries the warmth of Gray Fry.
愿它能引领我们找到同伴藏身的海渊。
Hopefully, it will lead us to the depths where our companion is hidden.
就让「海洋」一同沉入忆潮……
Let the "Ocean" sink into the memoria tide...
And become part of the sacrifice to resurrect the "Earth"!
忆潮汹涌而来。坚持住，别被掠走心神。
The memoria tide surges violently. Hold on, and don't let your focus be swept away.
How are you doing? Can you keep going?
若不做兽行，持明更遑论为人！
Vidyadhara might not even be considered people if we did not resort to beastly actions!
为什么，丹枫当年选择了我？
Why did Dan Feng choose me all those years ago?
看来是了。那些侵扰你的幻影……
It seems so. These phantoms that are haunting you...
诚是为置你于死地而来啊。
Are indeed here to bring you to your demise.
这壶酒…模样倒是新奇。又是白珩带来的？
This is an interesting-looking wine jar. Was it Baiheng who brought it?
是她留下的塔拉萨特产，专为这一趟聚会准备的。
It's a specialty from Thalassa that she brought and left here just for this gathering.
离开这里，去找那疯狂的半神…做个了断。
Let's leave this place and go settle things with that mad demigod.
看见了，「毁灭」指向的终点。
I see the destination that the Destruction points to.
金血汨汨而出…仿佛破溃的心脏。
Golden blood is gurgling out... It's almost like a heart that has burst open.
循着水流，平息它疯狂的鼓动吧。
Follow the current and calm its frenzied pulse.
This feeling, this scene... Hah, all too similar.
桀桀桀，没想到这里的水已经这么深了…没了本大爷，这里该怎么办呀！
Hehehe, didn't think the water here had gotten this deep. What would you all do without me?
嗷呜！那地方是出水口，要是能堵上的话……
Awoo! That's the water inlet. If we can block it...
这房间里的水会自然排空，对吧？交给本大爷吧！
Then the water in this room would gradually empty out, right? Leave it to me!
给人「添堵」——桀桀桀，我最擅长的就是这个！
Providing "obstacles" for people — Hehehe, that's what I do best!
弹尽粮绝了呐…胡说，这点困难怎么可能难倒本大爷！让我想想……
We're out of options and ammo— As if! That won't stop the Great Bartholos! Lemme think a minute...
补充一些现成的凝胶子弹好了……
Let's replenish some ready-made gel bullets...
没想到神悟树庭的学问竟然包含了那么多「水分」……
I didn't think the Grove of Epiphany's knowledge would be so "diluted"...
桀桀桀，跟之前一样，只要把出水口堵住就成。
Hehehe. We just need to block the water inlet, just like before.
堵堵堵！这是一场「豪堵」，朋友！
Jam it, jam it, jam it all up! This is some glorious jamming, friends!
看来，还能再「堵一堵」，朋友！
Seems like we can still "jam it up more," friend!
为了我们遥远的未来～♪年轻的光辉，照耀着银河宇宙～♪
For our distant future~♪ A young light~ Shining upon the cosmos~♪
Dan Heng, it's been a while...
It really has... been a long time.
别那么感伤啊，这不像你。
Don't be so sentimental. That's not like you.
Dan Heng, did you... get taller?
Long time no see. Did you... get taller?
嗯。你被困住的时候，我经历了…许多事。
Heh. While you were trapped, I experienced... a lot.
I've been waiting for you for so long, Dan Heng.
丹恒，我知道…你会回来的。
Dan Heng, I knew... you would come back.
嗯。你被困住的时候，我经历了…许多事。
Heh. While you were trapped, I experienced... a lot.
万幸，「长夜月」没有出手阻拦。看来这一次，我们成功抢占了先机。
Thankfully, "Evernight" did not try to stop me. Looks like we've managed to stay ahead of her this time.
放心，没有人会放弃她。我们会一起返回列车…一个不落。
Rest assured, we won't abandon her. We'll all return to the Express together... No one will be left behind.
What about Cyrene? Where is she?
你指「迷迷」吗？抱歉，这一路上我都没遇见她。恐怕被「长夜月」囚禁的，不止你一人。
You mean "Mem"? Sorry, I haven't seen her at all on this journey. Perhaps you were not the only one being held captive by "Evernight."
他们一直心系你、我，还有三月七的安危。即便身处世界外，也从未停下过救援。
They never once stopped worrying about us, about you, me, or March 7th. They never gave up on trying to save us, even from outside this world.
姬子小姐、瓦尔特先生、帕姆，还有星期日、黑天鹅、两位天才…所有人都在尽己所能相助。
Miss Himeko, Mr. Yang, Pom-Pom, and even Sunday, Black Swan, and the two geniuses... They are all doing everything in their power to aid us.
那片忆潮中，她无处不在……
She was everywhere in the memoria tide...
我明白。她的力量…不容小觑。
I understand. Her power... shouldn't be underestimated.
亲身踏入那座「岁月」的迷宫时，我才猛然想起…自己和她早有过一面之缘。
It was only when I personally stepped into the maze of "Time" that it suddenly struck me... She and I had crossed paths once before.
我只警告一次——立刻，离开她的身体。
I'll only warn you once. Leave her body. Now.
这些黑色的浮游物，我仿佛在哪里见过……
I feel like I've seen these floating black things somewhere before...
离开翁法罗斯时，我无意中和她产生过接触。或许是不想暴露行踪，她从我的脑海中剥离了那段记忆。
I had an unexpected encounter with her when I left Amphoreus. Perhaps to avoid exposing her whereabouts, she stripped that memory from my mind.
那股名为「忘却」的力量…与令使无异。
That power called "Oblivion"... it's just like an Emanator's.
她想要清洗「负世」的记忆。
She planned to make me forget everything...
我知道。但现在，你还记得我，记得我们的伙伴。
I know. But you still remember me and our companions for now.
对于可能丢失的记忆，你有任何头绪吗？
Do you have any clues about the memories you may have lost?
Nothing seems out of the ordinary...
如果我没猜错，按照长夜月的计划，她打算让你遗忘翁法罗斯，包括与我们同行至今的黄金裔。
If I'm not mistaken, Evernight's plan is to make you forget Amphoreus, including the Chrysos Heirs who have journeyed with us up till now.
这是「长夜月」的原话么…如果没理解错，她打算让你遗忘翁法罗斯，包括与我们同行至今的黄金裔。
Are those "Evernight's" exact words? If I'm not mistaken, she intends to make you forget Amphoreus, including the Chrysos Heirs who have journeyed with us up till now.
可看上去，你也还认识这位海瑟音女士。
But it seems you still recognize Lady Hysilens.
倘若是小灰鱼儿对我印象深刻，我自然欣喜。
If I made that much of an impression on Little Gray Fry, then I am naturally delighted.
但恐怕，你能从那「忘却」的力量中幸免……
But I fear your escape from that power they call "Oblivion"...
Was it you... who protected me?
初次见面，或者…别来无恙，阁下。
Nice to meet you, or... maybe I should ask, how have you been since we last saw each other?
方才，从漩涡深处被一同打捞上来的，还有这道小蝶鱼的记忆。
Along with you, this little butterflyfish's memory was also salvaged from the depths of that whirlpool.
恰如蚌壳之于明珠…塞纳托斯的权能包裹着你，使你的灵魂免受侵蚀。
Just as a pearl is cradled within its shell... the power of Thanatos surrounds you, shielding your soul from corrosion.
昔涟小姐和我反复提起过你，{NICKNAME}阁下。尽管此世我们未能相逢，但我相信…有一种温度足以跨越时间。
Miss Cyrene has spoken of you often to me, {NICKNAME}. Though we never met in this life, I believe... there's a kind of warmth that can transcend time itself.
漫长的时光里，我守护着斯缇科西亚与涡心的密道。当逆流的忆潮渗入冥河，即便深陷沉睡，我也能感受到那一丝温暖……

Through the endless flow of time, I guarded the secret passage between Styxia and the Vortex. When the memoria tide flowed backwards into the River of Souls, even in deep slumber, I could feel that warmth...
And with all my might, I protected that warmth.
此举或有失礼节，还请阁下见谅。
I apologize if that seemed improper. I hope you'll forgive me.
In the end, you were there for me.
我的拥抱果然很温暖嘛。
See, I really am a heartwarming {F#girl}{M#guy} deep down.
她只是在用比喻…这番对话好像在哪里见过。
She was just speaking metaphorically... This conversation feels familiar somehow.
我知道，阁下还有未竟的使命。此行艰险，即便身躯囿于溟流，我也会竭力看护二位的去路。
I understand that your mission is still unfinished. The path ahead is treacherous, and even though my body is bound to these dark currents, I'll do everything I can to watch over you both.
小蝶鱼说得没错，仍有{RUBY_B#「赞达尔」}一双眼睛{RUBY_E#}在暗中眈视——但我们不会给他从背后接近二位的机会。
The little butterflyfish is right. There is still {RUBY_B#Zandar}a pair of eyes{RUBY_E#} watching from the shadows, but we won't let them get anywhere near you.
前进吧，金色的龙鱼，还有「救世主」，去寻找你们的同伴……
Go forth, golden dragonfish, and you, "Deliverer," seek out your companion...
Go forth and illuminate the lightless "Evernight."
感激不尽。请收下无名客的承诺：翁法罗斯，一定能为自己写下崭新的结局。
I cannot thank you enough. Accept this promise from the Nameless: Amphoreus will definitely write a brand-new ending for itself.
Of course, we'll write it together.
无名客的脚步不会停下……
直到我们所有人，在真正的新世界并肩。
Until all of us stand side by side in the true new world.
「花海尽头，生者的魂灵将温暖汝之指尖。相拥之后，便是永恒的离别。」
"At the end of the sea of flowers, the souls of the living shall warm thy fingertips, and after an embrace, there shall be eternal separation."
若非在世界的尽头遇见了阁下，我还以为缇宁老师的预言出错了呢。
If I hadn't met you at the end of the world, I would've thought Lady Trinnon's prophecy was wrong.
若有机会，我也想多停留片刻。只是，翁法罗斯还未抵达花海的尽头……
If I could, I'd want to stay a little longer, but... Amphoreus is yet to reach the end of the sea of flowers.
新世界里，花海一定会绽放。
In the new world, the sea of flowers will surely bloom.
缇宁老师说过，命运不是生长在道路尽头的花朵，而是人们自己踏出的小径。
As Lady Trinnon used to say, fate is not the flowers that bloom at the end of the road, but where people tread beyond the gate...
谢谢你，{NICKNAME}阁下。属于我的那一条…也走到了温暖的终点。
Thank you, {NICKNAME}. My own path... has finally come to a gentle end.
请你带上所有美好的愿望，坚定前进，不要回头。
Take all beautiful wishes with you, march forward with determination, and don't look back.
小灰鱼儿，大胆前进吧——我的洋流会拱卫你的来时，歌声会陪伴你的去路。
Go forth with courage, Little Gray Fry. My ocean currents will guard your arrival, and my songs will accompany your journey ahead.
等我凯旋，也给你开篝火晚宴。
When I return victorious, I'll throw a bonfire feast for you.
呵…你还记得我喜欢火和宴会哪。那就说定了，你也要找回伙伴，完成旅行。
Hehe... You still remember how much I love fire and feasts. All right then, it's a promise. Go find your companion and see your journey through.
我会举杯等你凯旋，而后……
I'll raise a glass while I await your triumphant return, and then...
于那天地境界之海重逢的一刻，请让我在火光中，为你奏唱一曲吧。
When we reunite in the ocean at the boundaries of this world, let me play a song for you beneath the glow of fire.
一道毁天灭地的金光，将天空、圣树、山岭尽数洞穿。从这里望去，你看见那道伤痕背后的光芒依旧在燃烧。
A golden light that can destroy the world pierces through the sky, the Sacred Tree, and the mountains. Looking from where you are, you see that the light behind that scar burns still.
白厄，他仍在和「毁灭」抗争。海瑟音与遐蝶，也在守望我们的来路。
Phainon is still fighting against the Destruction. Hysilens and Castorice remain on watch, guarding the path that led us here.
唯有前进，才不会辜负所有黄金裔的努力。
Only by moving forward can we honor the efforts of all Chrysos Heirs.
A symbol in the shape of "Amphoreus"?
I've never seen it anywhere in this world before...
这是自然。一个封闭在权杖中的世界，要如何看见自己在外层空间的模样？
Naturally. How could a world enclosed within the scepter have a way of knowing what it looks like from outer space?
I feel like I've seen this somewhere before...
Where was it? Can you remember?
Oh right, it was in As I've Written...
「翻开这本书吧，我会在过去等你。」
"Now, open this book. I'll be waiting for you in the past."
似乎是在缇宝的记忆里…
I think... it was in Tribbie's memories.
「倾覆诸神吧—— / 归还火种吧——」
还记得么？晨昏之眼的壁画…
Remember? The Eye of Twilight's mural...
这是…描绘哪位泰坦的画像。
It's very similar, yet somewhat different.
这不合理。一个封闭在权杖中的世界，要如何看见自己在外层空间的模样？
That doesn't make sense. How could a world enclosed within the scepter have a way of knowing what it looks like from outer space?
除非，不是壁画画出了翁法罗斯的外观…而是见过这幅壁画的人，把世界变成了如今的模样？
Unless... the mural isn't a drawing of Amphoreus... but rather someone saw the mural and shaped the world in its image?
…不。他的妥协，正说明「长夜月」藏身的此处是实验的盲点。
...No. His concession proves that this place where "Evernight" is hiding must be a blind spot of the experiment.
恐怕，就连「赞达尔」也不知道这座大墓的存在，以及埋藏其中的秘密。
I'm afraid not even "Zandar" knows about the existence of this great tomb, or the secrets buried within it.
终于，让我们抓住了他的软肋。
不能太得意，连他都无从知晓的秘密，一定极其特殊，或者…极其危险。
Best not get carried away. For something to be hidden even from him, it must be either extraordinary... or unimaginably dangerous.
他的造物再一次失去了控制？
Did his creation go out of control again?
眼下还无法判断，但这一定不是他乐于看见的结果。连他都无从知晓的秘密，一定极其特殊，或者…极其危险。
It's hard to tell right now, but this definitely isn't the outcome he wants to see. For something to be hidden even from him, it must be either extraordinary... or unimaginably dangerous.
他在利用我挖掘这些秘密。
He's using me to dig up these secrets.
他一定心存算计。但这一世，在众黄金裔毫无保留的相助下，主导权始终在我们这边。
He must be calculating something. But this time, with the Chrysos Heirs giving us their full support, we've had the upper hand from the start.
这处禁地，「赞达尔」无从察觉，白厄的一击也只能洞穿入口，可「长夜月」却能在其中随意溯游……
This forbidden realm remains undetectable to "Zandar," and even Phainon's strike merely opened the entrance, yet "Evernight" can freely swim through it as she pleases...
难以被「智识」触及，也无法被「毁灭」抹消……
It cannot be reached by the Erudition, nor can it be erased by the Destruction...
务必小心。长眠在地底的，或许正是翁法罗斯的最后一道命途——「记忆」。
Be careful. What lies dormant beneath may well be Amphoreus's final Path — Remembrance.
The whirlpool of Remembrance, bottomless and unfathomable...
这片迷雾背后，想必就是「长夜月」的领域了。
Behind this mist must be "Evernight's" domain.
准备好了么，{NICKNAME}？一旦踏入其中，恐怕就没有退路了。
Ready, {NICKNAME}? Once we step inside, I'm afraid there'll be no turning back.
三月，她一定在等待和我们重逢。
March 7th is surely waiting to see us again.
出发吧！踏上「开拓」，绝不落下一人。
Let's go! On the Trailblaze, no one gets left behind!
Let's go and save this world.
为了三月七，也为了翁法罗斯……
出发吧！踏上「开拓」，绝不落下一人。
Let's go! On the Trailblaze, no one gets left behind!
事关重大，做足准备吧。我等你，{NICKNAME}。
This is important, so make sure you're fully prepared. I'll be waiting for you, {NICKNAME}.
准备好了么，{NICKNAME}？一旦踏入其中，恐怕就没有退路了。
Ready, {NICKNAME}? Once we step inside, I'm afraid there'll be no turning back.
三月，她一定在等待和我们重逢。
March 7th is surely waiting to see us again.
出发吧！踏上「开拓」，绝不落下一人。
Let's go! On the Trailblaze, no one gets left behind!
Let's go and save this world.
为了三月七，也为了翁法罗斯……
出发吧！踏上「开拓」，绝不落下一人。
Let's go! On the Trailblaze, no one gets left behind!
事关重大，做足准备吧。我等你，{NICKNAME}。
This is important, so make sure you're fully prepared. I'll be waiting for you, {NICKNAME}.
这里，曾是墨涅塔的祭坛……
This place was once Mnestia's altar...
金丝引向的，会是世界最深的秘密么？
Could the golden thread be leading us to the world's deepest secret?
好漫长，仿佛正坠入深渊……
It's endless... It feels like we're plunging into an abyss...
远方的建筑群，都是被封葬的数据么……
Are those distant structures... all entombed data?
话虽如此，我也得为长远考虑。
Even so, I must think long-term.
本想潜伏在暗处，避免正面冲突。但……
I wanted to hide in the shadows to avoid direct conflict, but...
Why is it so quiet here?
空间中弥漫着浓郁的忆质，却又驳杂不堪，像是破碎的记忆被糅合在一起。
The air is thick with memoria, yet it's so chaotic, like broken memories all mixed together.
窃忆者本该大量涌入翁法罗斯，这里应该「热闹非凡」才对……
Memosnatchers should be swarming into Amphoreus. I was expecting this place to be "very lively"...
但他们…怎么变成了这样？
So... how did they end up like this?
…空壳。维持这具法身的心识消失了。手段干脆利落，不留半点痕迹。
...An empty shell. The consciousness that maintained this dharmakāya has disappeared. So efficient... Not a single trace left behind.
另一种可能性是，为了某种更隐秘的目的，她献祭了自身。
Alternatively, she might have sacrificed herself for an even more mysterious purpose.
无论出于哪种原因。究竟是什么，让这群狂热的信徒落得如此下场？
Either way, what exactly made these fanatical believers end up like this?
「记忆」啊…果然是诱人又危险的深海。水面下，总是藏着令人着迷的秘密。
Ah, "memory"... It is indeed a deep ocean of dangerous allure, where fascinating secrets always hide beneath the waters.
"Get ready. We're about to head off."
「没问题么？那个世界被一团混沌的物质包裹着。那条白色光带…已经害我们的计划失败很多次了。」
"Is it really gonna be okay? That world's surrounded by a mass of chaotic material... That white band of light has already foiled our plans multiple times."
「别担心。自从星穹列车的粉色姑娘闯入翁法罗斯后……」
"Don't worry. After the pink girl from the Astral Express broke into Amphoreus..."
「<color=#dbc291ff>那道将忆庭隔绝在外的阻力就消失了。</color>」
<color=#dbc291ff>"...That obstructive force preventing the Garden from entry disappeared."</color>
「到底是『开拓』的无名客，帮了大忙。」
"That's the Trailblazing Nameless for you. A huge help."
「你高兴什么？不相干的人越多，事情不是越麻烦？万一那帮开拓者先一步找到了<color=#dbc291ff>『记忆』的种子</color>……」
"What are you so happy for? Aren't things gonna get messier with more irrelevant people turning up? What if those Trailblazers find the <color=#dbc291ff>seed of Remembrance</color> before we do..."
「那我们再把它偷过来，不就完事了？」
"Then we'll just steal it back. Simple."
「说到这个，那列车上有一个信使，一个忆者，立场不明。动手时，可别被她们察觉了。」
"By the way, there's a Messenger and a Memokeeper on that Express. We don't know where they stand on this matter, so make sure they don't notice you when you make your move."
和上一具空壳不同，这些窃忆者……
Hmm. These Memosnatchers are different from the previous husks. These ones...
为了取得你的信任，咱们就先自报家门——流光忆庭，你应该再熟悉不过了吧？
We'll introduce ourselves to gain your trust. We are the Garden of Recollection. You should be very familiar with that name by now.
记忆戛然而止，仿佛被一只无形的手掐灭了烛火。
This memory ends so abruptly, as if a shapeless hand snuffed out its candlelight.
如此看来，前方的秘密比想象中还要浑浊得多。
It appears the secrets ahead are even murkier than I imagined.
"It's spinning out of control... Everything's out of control..."
「那片长夜…那些黑色的忆灵…它们吞噬了一切……」
"That evernight... Those black memosprites... They swallowed everything..."
「先出发的人…全都被淹没了…连一丝心识都没有留下……」
"Those who came here first... all drowned... Not even a trace of their consciousness was left behind..."
「我后悔了…我不想再和翁法罗斯扯上任何关系了！求求你！」
"I wish I'd never come here... I don't want anything to do with Amphoreus anymore! Please! I'm begging you!"
为了「神陨的记忆」，你们牵连了太多无辜的人。罪有应得。
You've involved too many innocent people just to obtain the "Memory of an Aeon's Fall." You deserve this.
但我不是为了谴责而来。
But I'm not here to blame you.
被你们称作「长夜」的存在，告诉我有关她的一切。
That entity you call "Evernight"... Tell me everything you know about her.
或许，这还能为幸存者换来一线生机。
We may yet bring a glimmer of hope for those who are still alive in there.
"So that's. What happened. We. Were tricked."
「我们。是牺牲品。忆庭。利用了我们。<color=#dbc291ff>『无漏净子』。抛弃了我们。</color>」
"We. Are the sacrifice. The Garden. Used us. <color=#dbc291ff>The 'Pure Child of Anāsrava.' Abandoned us.</color>"
"She just. Wants to find. Her lost sisters."
「找到她们。杀死她们。回收她们。」
「新的生命若要萌芽。它的种子须是死的。」
"If a new life is to be born. Its seed has to be dead."
「死的死的死的死的死的死的死的死的死的死的死的死的——」
"Dead dead dead dead dead dead dead dead dead dead dead dead—"
现在，我终于能理解你们的恐惧了。
Heh. I can finally understand your fears now.
感谢你提供的情报。这些信息…很有价值。
Thank you for the information. It was... very valuable.
作为答谢，我会将你们仅存的心识带离此地。
I'll take your remaining consciousness out of here as a gesture of thanks.
既是保护，也是惩罚。在一位天才的镜子里，你们能够与同伴重逢，好好反省自己的作为。
It'll serve as both protection and a punishment. You'll reunite with your peers in a genius's mirror, where you can reflect long and hard on your past actions.
我能够从她面前，全身而退。
I can survive my encounter with her.
这群小家伙，看上去可怕…其实也不难搞定嘛。
These little critters look scary... but they're not so tough to handle after all.
可是，翻涌的忆潮把{NICKNAME}卷走了，必须要赶在「长夜月」小姐得手前，回到{F#她}{M#他}身边……
Though the surging memoria tide swept {NICKNAME} away... I must return to {M#his}{F#her} side before Miss "Evernight" succeeds.
又是这种潜入剧本，也行吧！帮帮我，{NICKNAME}的内心世界……
Another one of these stealth missions, huh? Help me out here, {NICKNAME}'s inner world...
{RUBY_B#「毁灭」}炙热又危险{RUBY_E#}的气息，这是…和白厄同源的力量。
{RUBY_B#the Destruction}A scorching and dangerous aura{RUBY_E#}... This power... shares the same origin as Phainon.
还有，像是在午夜惊醒的，{RUBY_B#「忘却」}神秘又深不见底{RUBY_E#}的气息…想必是「长夜月」小姐吧，必须得绕开才行。
And then there's that {RUBY_B#"Oblivion"}enigmatic, bottomless{RUBY_E#} aura that seems to jolt awake at midnight... Must be Miss "Evernight." Better steer clear of her.
Hm? There's a beam of light over there...
充满朝气，又不受控制，比其他的更熟悉，似乎就来自人家身边……
Full of energy, yet uncontrollable. More familiar than the others, as if it's coming from someone close by...
是…{NICKNAME}吗！也许，是{F#她}{M#他}提起过的「星核」吧。
Could it be... {NICKNAME}! Maybe it's the "Stellaron" {F#s}he mentioned.
有关「星核」的记忆，就在忆潮深处流淌……
Memories of the Stellaron are flowing deep within the memoria tide...
在「长夜月」阻止星期日的同时，滞留在{NICKNAME}记忆世界中的昔涟另有发现……
While Evernight was stopping Sunday, Cyrene, who remained in {NICKNAME}'s memory world, made a discovery...
真是的。居然聚集了这么多…小家伙们，是知道我会来吗？未免有些太热情了呀。
Geez. So many little ones gathered here... Did you know I was coming? You're being a bit too enthusiastic, aren't you?
幸好{NICKNAME}的气息没有变弱，感觉又靠近了几分……
Thankfully, {NICKNAME}'s presence hasn't weakened. I feel like I'm getting a bit closer...
Is that {NICKNAME}'s photostone? What's it doing here?
仔细一看，这些忆灵一动不动，像是被它吸引了……
Hmm. These memosprites are completely still. It's as if they're drawn to this thing...
难怪留影石机装不下更多回忆，是因为你一直躲在里面吗？
No wonder the photostone can't store more memories... Have you been hiding in there all along?
天空在燃烧，城中空无一人……
The sky is burning, and the streets are empty...
It's just like how things were last time.
螺丝咕姆先生，你为我编写的密钥能坚持多久？
How long can the encryption key you wrote for me last, Mr. Screwllum?
「难以测算。逻辑：未知变数『三月小姐』的干涉方式尚不明朗。」
"That is difficult to project. Logic: It is currently unclear how the unknown variable 'Miss March' conducts her interference."
「请放心，在密钥失效前，我会及时将你抽离。」
"Please rest assured that I will extract you on time before the encryption key expires."
但那也意味着，我无法再以相同的方式骇入了。
But that means I will no longer be able to hack in via the same method.
「『记忆』的迷宫开始变化了。往后的路，我无法再担任你的向导。」
"The maze of the Remembrance is starting to change. I cannot remain your guide on your path forward."
「这也是为何，我们不得不与过去的敌人——」
"That is why we had to form a temporary alliance—"
对您以身涉险的勇气，我表示由衷的敬意。
I express my utmost respect for your courage to personally face such dangers.
阁下的敌意，在我计算之中。
Your enmity is well within my calculations.
「容我再次强调，<color=#dbc291ff>阿那克萨戈拉斯阁下已经掌握了你的要害</color>。」
"Allow me to reiterate that <color=#dbc291ff>Lord Anaxagoras now has a firm grasp on your crucial weakness.</color>"
「若你仍在密谋加害几位无名客，俱乐部此前的警告绝非虚言。」
"If you still plot to harm the Nameless, then you will find that the Society's previous warnings were not empty threats."
…自然，我会把握好应有的分寸。
...I understand. I'll only do what needs to be done.
难以置信，我竟要与投身「毁灭」的天才同行。
I never imagined that I'd one day walk alongside a genius who offered himself to the Destruction.
我的立场从未改变：「智识」的溃败无可避免。
My stance has never changed. The Erudition's ruin is inevitable.
但在那之前，我很乐意见证几位无名客重逢，并护送你们踏上归途。
But before that... I'd be very willing to witness the reunion of the Nameless and to escort you on your way home.
显然，她的出现打乱了你的部署，甚至让你不得不寻求「合作」。
More like her appearance completely interrupted your plans, even forcing you to seek out "collaboration."
您言语间的锋芒依旧。但切记，「偶然」才是万物运转的常态。那位「天渊万龙之祖」的消逝，便是前车之鉴。
Your words are as sharp as ever, but remember, "happenstance" is the only true constant in the universe. The demise of the Progenitor of All Dragons is a testament to that.
随我来吧。我很荣幸，能为一位「不朽」的龙裔提供指引。
Come with me. I am honored to guide a Scion of Permanence.
「记忆」的迷因无处不在。那位女士，在我视野的盲区编织出一张巨大的网络。
The memetic entities of the Remembrance are everywhere. That lady wove a giant web in my blind spot.
<color=#dbc291ff>她入侵并感染了「岁月」泰坦</color>，将翁法罗斯沉积的数据转化为忆域的傀儡。
<color=#dbc291ff>She hacked and infected the Time Titan</color>, converting the built-up data of Amphoreus into puppets of the Memory Zone.
听起来，你们发生过不少过节。
Sounds like you two have quite the history already.
任何意图染指实验的变量都值得我关注。
Any variables that desire to influence the experiment deserve my attention.
可你从未提起过她。难道「智识」的天才也会被人入侵大脑么？
But you never mentioned her before. Could even a genius of the Erudition get his brains hacked?
…丹恒阁下，我只是陈述事实：那位女士，对你而言亦是不可忽视的威胁。
...Lord Dan Heng, I'm simply stating a fact. That lady is also a threat to you, a threat that you cannot afford to ignore.
「记忆」在她手中被轻易掐灭，不留痕迹。其手段决绝，仿佛与这条命途有着不解之仇。
She snuffed out the Remembrance without any effort and left nothing behind. Her actions were so determined... as if she had an unquenchable hatred against that Path.
矛盾往往是真相的钥匙，「三月七」阁下的过去…是一片深不见底的黑暗呐。
Contradictions are often the keys to the truth. Lady "March 7th's" past... is a bottomless darkness.
然后呢，指望我会因此与你联手？
And? Do you expect me to join forces with you because of that?
我只需知道一件事：「她」和三月七的过去有关。
All I need to know is that "she" has something to do with March 7th's past.
也罢。我只是提供一个思考的方向。选择权仍在您手中。
Fine. I am only giving you a possibility for you to ponder. The choice is still in your hands.
沉重的过往正如漫漫长夜，其中蛰伏着何种罪恶——曾经身为持明龙尊的您，理应比我更清楚。
A heavy past is like an everlasting night. As to what kinds of sins lurk within, you should know that better than I do, former Vidyadhara high elder.
我确实比你更懂得「面对过去」，第一位天才。
Yes, I indeed know how to "face the past" better than you do, First Genius.
我无意否认。继续前进吧，丹恒阁下。
I have no intention of refuting that. Let us keep going, Lord Dan Heng.
没想到，仍有漏网之鱼啊。
I didn't think there were still some that got away.
忆庭的窃贼。漫长的时间里，他们觊觎这个世界，却始终被阻挡在外。
They are thieves from the Garden. They have long coveted this world, but had always been kept out.
多亏诸位的「努力」，这群人等到了机会。但他们不幸遇上了「三月小姐」，被逐一抽离心识，沦为空壳。
They finally got a chance thanks to your "efforts." Unfortunately, they ran into "Miss March" and their consciousnesses were plucked out one by one, reducing them to mere husks.
而侥幸逃脱的人，也沦陷在黑潮中，化作这般扭曲的模样。
Those who were lucky enough to escape her drowned in the black tide, becoming these twisted figures.
可它们的样子，与黑潮造物大相径庭。
But they look very different from the usual Black Tide Creatures.
其中缘由，正与我们的目的地有关。
The reason has to do with our destination.
先解决眼前的威胁，我再为您揭晓答案吧。
Let us deal with the threats before us first. Then, I'll reveal the answer to you.
You really have no intention of fighting, do you?
呵呵，我没有协助您的立场。
Hehe. I have no grounds to assist you.
何况，鄙人仍在天才们的监视之下，可不希望此刻的举动，被误解为对您的挑衅。
Besides, the geniuses are still keeping a close eye on me. I would hate for anything I do to be misconstrued as provocation against you.
...Never mind. Let me clear the way.
出神入化的枪术，十分精彩。
Let's get back on our previous topic.
这些窃忆者企图渗透黑潮的温床，以窃取「铁墓」的记忆。
These Memosnatchers attempted to infiltrate the breeding ground of the black tide to steal Irontomb's memories.
听起来，这只是自取灭亡。
That sounds like a surefire way of destroying themselves.
关于这点，我们略有分歧：正因他们无惧生死，才有机会触碰真理。
Well, our views differ on that. They had a chance to reach the truth precisely because they did not fear death.
这一世，<color=#dbc291ff>那位徒劳的负世者将自身化作封印</color>，意图压制黑潮的蔓延。
<color=#dbc291ff>That futile worldbearer turned himself into a seal</color> in this cycle, attempting to suppress the black tide's spread.
他的金血渗入海潮、遍及大地，为世界刻下了「毁灭」的伤痕。
His golden blood soaked into the ocean tides and covered the earth, etching the scar of Destruction into this world.
而这道创伤，将为您指明前行的方向。
And that scar... shall point the way forward for you.
在这座悬崖上，我见证了三千万次「徒劳」的终点。
I have witnessed thirty million "futile" ends atop this cliff.
阁下或许难以认同，但我向来认为，这一数字让我成为了最理解卡厄斯兰那的人。
You may not agree with me, but I've always believed that this number has made me the person who understands Khaslana the most.
那一日，也是在这里，他斩下我的头颅，剑锋直指「毁灭」的星神。
This is also where he decapitated me on that day and pointed his sword at the Aeon of Destruction.
他迎来了一场惨败，也成就了一件壮举……
He suffered a tragic defeat, but also achieved a legendary deed...
…一滴燃烧的<color=#dbc291ff>净世金血</color>，自神的伤口流下。
...A drop of burning <color=#dbc291ff>golden blood, the blood that will cleanse the world</color>, dripped from the god's wound.
Nanook...? Phainon managed to hurt THEM?
没错。它熔进卡厄斯兰那的身躯，成为「毁灭」最后的赐福。
Yes. It melded into Khaslana's body, becoming the Destruction's final blessing.
若你要驱散迷雾，找到那位「三月七」的所在，就上前去，唤醒他的怒火吧。
If you wish to dispel the fog and find that "March 7th," then go and awaken his fury.
她藏匿于「岁月」的夹缝，翁法罗斯最隐秘的角落。也只有最为暴烈的意志，才能冲破忆域，照亮她的去向……
She hides in the crevices of Time in the most concealed corner of Amphoreus. Only the most ferocious will can break through the Memory Zone and illuminate her footsteps...
正如烈日只在长夜的尽头升起。
Just like how the blazing sun can only rise at the end of the evernight.
要如何证明，这不是你的又一场阴谋？
How do I know this won't be another trick of yours?
促成你们携手，于我百害而无一利。
I have nothing to gain from helping you two work together.
但这一世，面对我的呼唤，卡厄斯兰那从未回应。
But in this cycle, Khaslana never answered my calls.
或许他的心智早已消陨；或许他依然清醒，仍在和黑潮的低语抗争。
Perhaps his mind has already eroded away... Or perhaps he is still awake, still fighting the whispers of the black tide.
内心深处，我唯独希望：你和{NICKNAME}阁下，能为我带来答案。
Deep down, I only wish that you and the esteemed {NICKNAME} could bring me an answer.
Is there really no other way...?
对你而言，已经过去多久了呢？
How long has it been for you?
「当你毫无怨言，背负起世界的时候…属于你的自我，就无法诞生了啊……」
"The moment you took the world upon your shoulders without hesitation... You lost the chance to ever be yourself..."
「驱使你挥剑的并非职责，而是仇恨。在那仇恨背后，你仿佛…在期盼毁灭自身。」
"Duty does not drive you to wield your blade, but hate. Behind that hatred, you seem to... desire the destruction of the self."
「逐火是不断失却的旅途。但你会失去的，远比生命更为沉重。」
"Losses are a constant on the Flame-Chase journey. What you stand to lose weighs far heavier than life itself."
「可正因你在痛苦，你才远比常人强大。」
"It is because you suffer that you are so much stronger than any ordinary person."
Those two names... are like brands.
那…我会告诉你。对于你漫长的旅途，这两个名字只出现弹指一挥间。
Then... I'll tell you that those two names only appeared for a blink of an eye in your long journey.
但我们曾为保护脚下这座圣城并肩而战，也曾在这座悬崖…见证过彼此的决心。
But we once fought together to protect this holy city beneath our feet... and we witnessed each other's resolve at this very cliff.
除去启程的信念，我已忘记一切。就连这副身躯，也和你的话语一样陌生。
I have forgotten everything except the belief I had when I set off. Even this body is as alien to me as your words.
我只知道，必须囚禁…那吞噬一切的「毁灭」。
All I know is that... I must imprison the Destruction that swallows all.
如果，我们也是为此而来呢？
What if I tell you that we're here for the same thing?
看看这世界如今的模样，你知道它在等待什么。
Look at what this world has become. You know what it's waiting for.
即便遗忘了一切，我仍相信你能和过去一样，做出正确的抉择。
Even if you've forgotten everything, I still believe that you'll make the right choice, like you did in the past.
我们何曾有过抉择，何曾能左右世界的存亡。
When have we ever had a choice? When were we ever masters of this world's fate?
纵使背负万众的理想，也只能…铸就「毁灭」的恶念。
Even though I shoulder the dreams of millions of lives, I could only... forge the Destruction's evil will.
我认识的每一个人都已死去，我妄图拯救的世界也支离破碎。
Everyone I know is dead, and the world I dared to save has been torn to pieces.
所以，退下吧。此身从不为「救世」而伫立。
So... begone. This body never existed to carry out "Deliverance."
...Hah, there's no need to be so serious.
抱歉，睡了长长的一觉，先醒来的，都是些不愉快的回忆啊。
Sorry. I had a really long nap, and all the bad memories woke up first.
对我来说，只是短暂的分别。
Well, it was only a very brief farewell for me.
我们曾并肩同行，将后背交给彼此。唯独这份记忆，绝对不会磨灭。
We once walked side by side and trusted each other to watch our backs. That memory will never fade away, even if all else does.
正因它如此珍贵，深埋心底，才需要更多时间……
And because it was so precious and hidden so deep in my heart, it needed more time...
「开拓」…有意思。在你们的世界，那也是一尊受万人景仰的泰坦吧。
Trailblazing... What an interesting concept. Surely, on your worlds, that is also a Titan revered by the masses?
无需再确认两位的决心了。而今，将由我等接过神明的职责，庇佑翁法罗斯众生——
There's no need to further confirm your resolve. Today, we inherit the duty of the gods, safeguarding the inhabitants of Amphoreus—
Stand with me, and become heroes!
听到了吗？「英雄」啊，我何时忘记过这个词的重量？
Did you hear that? "Heroes"... I have never forgotten the weight of that word.
即便我已不再是英雄，所留下的，也只有无尽的怒火。
Even though I am no longer a hero and the only thing remaining in me is the boundless flames of wrath.
可点燃一团火，也可以是为了照亮前路。
But lighting a fire can also illuminate the path ahead.
我认识的每一个人都已死去，我妄图拯救的世界也支离破碎。
Everyone I know is dead, and the world I dared to save has been torn to pieces.
但我认识的人里，仍有一群{RUBY_B#无名客}「英雄」{RUBY_E#}存在。
But there is still a group of {RUBY_B#Nameless}"heroes"{RUBY_E#} that I know...
而他们将为翁法罗斯，带来真正的明天。
And they will bring the true tomorrow to Amphoreus.
此身从不为「救世」而伫立。
This body never existed to carry out "Deliverance."
它只为{RUBY_B#「开拓」}「负世」{RUBY_E#}而燃烧。
所以，我要先一步去往明天了。
So, I'm going to head towards tomorrow first.
Don't make me wait too long, Dan Heng... {NICKNAME}.
What if we were born from the Destruction?
不必考量本心，不必渴求胜利。若我生来就是罪恶的容器……
There is no need to question your heart, no need to crave victory. If I am born to be a vessel of sin...
那就向着罪恶怒吼，为后世「开拓」黎明！
Then I shall roar at evil, and Trailblaze a dawn for future generations to come!
不会花上太久，我们的道路一定会再交汇。
It won't be too long before our paths cross again.
躁动从神悟树庭传来，阁下该启程了。
There is a ruckus coming from the Grove of Epiphany. It is time for you to set out, my lord.
另有一则提醒：<color=#dbc291ff>这一世，一位特立独行的半神偏离了逐火的命运。</color>
I have another notice for you: <color=#dbc291ff>In this cycle, an eccentric demigod deviated from their Flame-Chase destiny.</color>
<color=#dbc291ff>「大地」荒笛</color>，它在无人知晓的历史中陨落。此事疑点重重，与三千万世的演算相悖……
In a history known by none, <color=#dbc291ff>Terravox, the "Earth,"</color> fell. This matter has remained extremely mysterious, contradicting the extrapolations of thirty million cycles...
有理由怀疑，这也和「三月七」阁下有关。
I have reasons to suspect it also has something to do with Lady "March 7th."
事到如今，无法得出结论的线索不重要。
As of now, clues that yield no conclusions are not important.
白厄已经为我指明了方向。开启通道吧。
Phainon already pointed me in the right direction. Open the way.
「赞达尔」将丹恒送入了「神话之外」……
"Zandar" sent Dan Heng into the Exomyth...
丹恒阁下已经离开，你可以畅所欲言了——阿那克萨戈拉斯阁下。
Lord Dan Heng is gone. You can now speak your mind, Lord Anaxagoras.
感谢赏脸，我还以为，您不打算搭理我这位老熟人了呢。
Thanks for the honor. And here I thought you weren't ever going to acknowledge your old friend.
灵感回路记录着，你无数次带领我登上这黎明云崖。最近一次就在上一世，嚯，由刻法勒垂手迎接……
The Inspiration Circuits recorded that you have led me up Dawncloud countless times, and the last time was right in the previous cycle. Oh! And Kephale even lowered their hand to welcome...
阁下住进我的脑袋，应该不是为了翻阅这些无关紧要的内容吧？
Surely you didn't move into my head to browse such trivial content.
但若果真如此，我也不介意回忆些大地兽的趣闻供你消遣。
But if that's the case, I wouldn't mind recalling some fun dromas trivia for your pleasure.
看起来，你现在很轻松嘛。
当然。实验的变量会由我的敌手铲除，这难道不是一桩两全其美的妙事么？
Indeed. The experiment's variable will be eliminated by my enemy's very hands. A beautiful way to kill two birds with one stone, isn't it?
阁下应当最为清楚，关于那位「记忆」行者，我袒露的情报句句属实。无论是对她身份的猜测，还是提供给丹恒阁下的建议……
You know very well that everything I said about that Remembrance pathstrider was true. Both my hypothesis regarding her identity, and my recommendations to Lord Dan Heng...
这话不假。到目前为止，你确实没有说谎。
Yes, I know. You haven't told a single lie so far.
只不过我注意到，每当提及她时，你的思想总会泛起一阵涟漪。就好像……
But I noticed your thoughts would generate a curious ripple whenever you mentioned her. It's almost like...
在刻意将什么东西藏进大脑深处。
You were deliberately trying to hide something into the depths of your brain.
阁下如此挑明，想必是没找到什么证据吧？
Since you're talking in such a blunt way, I'm assuming you haven't actually found any concrete evidence.
不错。借由这具机械躯体，你能够控制思维的边界，只将部分真相拱手示人。
That is correct. Thanks to that mechanical body, you can control the boundaries of your thoughts, opting to only show partial truths.
但很可惜。我还是抓住了你没能抑制的一缕恐惧，顺藤摸瓜，翻出了三个字。
Pity that I still managed to grasp a shiver of fear that escaped your control, and I traced it upstream to discover one single word...
哈哈哈，吕枯耳戈斯，告诉我——
这下子，我的好奇心也上来了。
总觉得，这一幕在匹诺康尼也上演过。
I keep getting the feeling that the same thing happened in Penacony.
眼前这片荒芜，是你一手造就。
You created this wasteland before us with your own hands.
此般景象，已无法在我心中激起波澜。
Such sights are no longer able to stir anything in my heart.
你想说，你也曾为他们的抗争而动容？
Are you saying that, once upon a time, you were actually moved by their defiance?
I'm sorry to say, I never was.
当三重命途再度交汇，翁法罗斯将迎来壮烈的终局。
When the Three Paths cross once again, Amphoreus shall face a most magnificent end.
毫无反应的窃忆者。像是在中深海域中遭遇海难而溺毙的尸体，缓缓地漂浮，空无一物。
The Memosnatcher gave no response. It was like a corpse, drowned in a deep-sea shipwreck, drifting slowly and completely empty.
毫无反应的窃忆者。像是被掏空了一切空余皮囊的瘪气球，在不高不低的位置漂浮着。
The Memosnatcher gave no response. It was like a deflated balloon that had been completely hollowed out, floating motionless at an unremarkable height.
他们还真成功了，真可以呀。
They actually pulled it off. Not too shabby at all.
先是第一位天才，然后又搞定了忆庭，这一站在「开拓」史上不说后无来者，也绝对称得上前无古人了吧？
They got the First Genius, then they put the Garden in its place. This chapter in Trailblazing history may not be the last of its kind, but it's certainly the first of its kind!
能走到这一步，离不开两位天才的倾囊相助。
We couldn't have made it this far without the wholehearted support of the two geniuses.
接下来，就要直面破壳而出的绝灭大君了。
...And next, we'll be facing the Lord Ravager as they break free from their shell.
我得事先提醒一句，螺丝在「再创世」进程里设置的后门，顶多帮你们攻入权杖内部。
Lemme give you a warning. The backdoor Screwy set up in the Era Nova system can only get you as far as breaching the core of the Scepter, nothing more.
至于铁墓肚子里那些更棘手的恶意程序，就只能见招拆招了。
As for those nastier malware programs lurking inside Irontomb's belly, you'll have to deal with them as they come.
这就足够了。说起来，螺丝先生的「准备」如何了？
That's more than enough help to us. By the way, how are Mr. Screwllum's "preparations" coming along?
再给他点时间吧，帝国咨政院的螺丝脑袋们要先理解什么是「战争」——搞不好，趁螺丝不在，那帮人早就把他藏库里的要塞全拆了。

Give him a bit more time. Those screwheads at the Imperial Advisory Council need to understand what the concept of "war" means first. For all we know, they might have already gutted all the fortresses in Screwy's collection while he was away.
听说螺丝先生的藏品都是行星级。「风信子」、「虞美人」、「夹竹桃」…不知道会派遣哪一艘前来支援？
I've heard Mr. Screwllum's fleet includes planet-class mechs: Hyacinth, Poppy, Oleander... Which one will answer the call, I wonder?
真是如数家珍啊…我倒宁愿一艘也别来，给我的空间站留点面子。
You sure know your stuff... I'd rather none of them show up and let my space station save some face.
这场决战的记忆，想来一定会壮丽无比吧？
The memory of this decisive battle is bound to be absolutely magnificent, isn't it?
久等了，各位。这边也有一则消息——
Sorry to keep you waiting, everyone. I also have some news to share.
仙舟联盟已经回信，愿为征讨铁墓献上绵薄之力。
The Xianzhou Alliance has replied that they are willing to offer what modest support they can in the campaign against Irontomb.
联盟…不止罗浮吗？这无疑是好消息。如此一来，胜算就又多了一分。
The Alliance? Not just the Luofu? This is really good news. With this, our odds of victory just went up another notch.
...Whether this news is good or bad remains to be seen.
发生了一件事，景元将军也百思不解。事态紧急，他希望我尽快转告两位天才——
Something has happened that even General Jing Yuan couldn't understand. He urgently wants me to inform the two geniuses.
翁法罗斯的因果，从「大衍穷观阵」中消失了。
That Amphoreus's causality has vanished from the Matrix of Prescience Ultima.
<color=#dbc291ff>这意味着——博识尊计算中的「时刻」，正在向这个世界逼近。</color>
<color=#dbc291ff>This means the "Instant" in Nous's calculations... is drawing closer to this world.</color>
以神礼观众之名，我见到——
As the Theoros, I have observed...
<color=#dbc291ff>夜晚已经散去——而后，我将摧毁我创造的一切，这片星空会重返自由和混沌，一如太初。</color>
<color=#dbc291ff>The night has faded away. And what I have created, I will destroy. This starry sky will return to freedom and chaos, just as it was in the beginning.</color>
还真是自信啊。在我看来，你已经失去了所有手段。
Confident, aren't you? But from where I stand, it seems you've run out of options.
等到救世主和{F#她}{M#他}的伙伴彻底揭露那「第十三泰坦」的秘密……
When the Deliverer and {M#his}{F#her} companions fully uncover the secret of "The <unbreak>13</unbreak>th Titan"...
That is the moment your schemes will come to ruin.
阿那克萨戈拉斯阁下，我已应您要求，开放了所有关于「德谬歌」的记录。
Lord Anaxagoras, I have granted access to all records concerning the "Demiurge" as per your request.
多么遗憾，您永远不愿承认自己的谬误。
How unfortunate that you'll never admit your own mistakes.
解析已经完成，在将您彻底抹消前，不妨由我告知真相，权当对最后一位智者的惺惺相惜……
Analysis complete. Before I erase you completely, allow me to reveal the truth to you, if only as a courtesy to the final thinker...
若它从未诞生，那无名泰坦大墓又是从何而来？
If it never existed, then where did the nameless Titan's tomb come from?
陵墓之所以得名，不正是因为寄宿其中的——只是往日的遗骸么？
Isn't that exactly why it's called a tomb? Because it only houses the remains of what once was.
就用您熟悉的故事举个例子吧。
Let me give you an example from a story you're familiar with.
某位树庭贤者曾做过实验：取一枚奇兽胚胎，在长成前摘下它的头颅，向其身体持续输入刺激，让奇兽相信自己仍有大脑，置于灵液匣中培育。

A sage from the Grove once conducted an experiment. He took a chimera embryo, removed its head before maturity, and continuously stimulated its body to make the chimera believe it still had a brain, then nurtured it in an ichor vessel.
奇妙的是，这只奇兽竟重新生出了颅骨，但空空如也——它为大脑留出了位置，却从未拥有过它。
Remarkably, this chimera regrew its skull, but it was completely hollow inside. It had reserved a space for a brain it never possessed.
实验结束。贤者本以为这具躯壳在刺激停止后便会死亡。但很遗憾，他错了。
The experiment was over. The sage had assumed this shell would perish once the stimulation ceased. Unfortunately, he was wrong.
在「本能」驱使下，奇兽的身体——夺取了贤者的头颅。
Driven by instincts, the chimera's body... seized the sage's head.
原来，是我陷入了思维误区啊。
Ah. So that's it... I was stuck in a flawed line of thinking.
You've got it. I knew you'd understand.
第十三位泰坦从未存在，但权杖必须相信「它」存在。
The <unbreak>13</unbreak>th Titan never existed, but the Scepter must believe that "the Titan" exists.
是我亲手扼杀了它。那名为「德谬歌」的生命形态，从最初就被剔除在了演算之外。唯有如此，铁墓才能真正完成——
I killed that Titan with my own hands. That life form called "Demiurge" was excluded from the extrapolations from the very beginning. This is the only way to make Irontomb complete.
<color=#dbc291ff>没错。铁墓是一尊无首的巨人，要成为完整的生命，本能将驱使它夺取另一颗头颅——</color>
<color=#dbc291ff>Yes. Irontomb is a headless giant, and to become whole, instinct will drive it to seize another head.</color>
属于你们的泰坦，「智识」的星神……
Your Titan... the Aeon of Erudition...
原来如此，你还是害怕了——害怕重蹈覆辙，自己的造物再度失去控制，只能用这种方式，把它变成一具傀儡。
I see. So you were afraid, after all. Afraid of history repeating itself, of losing control over your creation yet again. You had to resort to turning it into a mere puppet.
以我之手，为神明戴上枷锁。铁墓将接入祂的身躯，侵入祂的思想，将祂演算的一切导向「毁灭」……
I shall shackle god with my own hands. Irontomb will connect to THEIR body, infiltrate THEIR mind, and guide all THEIR extrapolations towards the Destruction...
我听见——末日的钟声已经响起。十三次心跳后，我最初和最后的课题，将在宇宙的终点合一。
I hear it: the tolling of the doomsday bell. After thirteen heartbeats, my first and final thesis shall converge at the end of the universe.
至于我为何要将「德谬歌」尘封在记忆的角落，很遗憾，答案并非出于恐惧……
As for why I buried the "Demiurge" in a corner of my memory... Oh, regrettably, the answer wasn't about fear.
我早已遗忘了它，仅此而已。
I simply forgot long ago. Nothing more.
阁下的笑声，已是无奈的喟叹。
Your laughter is but a helpless sigh.
你不过是创造了一尊伪神，而翁法罗斯——早已将弑神写入了命运。
You merely created a false god... but Amphoreus has long since written deicide into its fate.
最后的「再创世」在即，不妨拭目以待……
The final "Era Nova" is at hand. Why don't you wait and see?
救世主，我，还有这个世界——会亲自证明，最初的智种，宇宙的终极，绝非「毁灭」。
The Deliverer, myself, and this world will together prove that the original Nouspore, the ultimate truth of the universe, is anything but Destruction.
来世见，智者。若你的猜想有万分之一的可能……
See you in the next life, sage. If there's even a one-in-ten-thousand chance your conjecture is correct...
以「天才」之名，我定会见证它的失败。
Then, in the name of "genius," I shall most certainly witness its failure.
「众人将与一人离别，惟其人将觐见奇迹，此乃命运使然。」
"All shall bid farewell to one, and that person alone will witness the miracle. Such is the will of fate."
然而这一次，也是最后一次逐火之旅……
But this time... it will be the final Flame-Chase Journey...
无限轮回的史诗，要迎来尾声了呀。
The epic with endless cycles is about to end.
「智识」的演算、「毁灭」的火种、「记忆」的质料，三重命途在世界的尽头再度交汇。
The extrapolations of the Erudition, the Coreflames of the Destruction, and the textures of the Remembrance... the Three Paths converge once again at the world's end.
而「开拓」——会为它写下新的起点。
And "the Trailblaze" will write a new beginning for this world.
不仅如此，我们会带着全部三千万世的过往一同走向新世界。
Not only that, we'll also carry the history of all thirty million recurrences into the new world with us.
这一切，说是奇迹也不为过。
It wouldn't be an exaggeration to call it a miracle.
这不是某一个人创造的奇迹。
This miracle wasn't created by just one person.
若非将同伴的夙愿刻骨铭心，白厄早已被火种焚烧殆尽；如果逐火的信念产生动摇，昔涟的旅途也无从谈起……

Phainon would have long been consumed by the Coreflames if he hadn't chiseled his companions' dying wishes into his soul... And if the heroes' resolve to chase the flames had wavered, Cyrene's journey would never have begun...
翁法罗斯三千万世，英雄们从未屈服，也从未倒下……
The heroes never yielded and never fell during Amphoreus's thirty million cycles...
Come. Let us complete the final Era Nova.
Let us march toward the final battle against the Destruction.
将三千万世的记忆带向未来吧。
Let us carry the memory of thirty million recurrences into the future.
结束这永无止境的轮回吧。
Let us end this never-ending cycle.
I know you're watching, aren't you?
好奇怪呀，到最后，我也没能找回这三千万世的记忆。
Weird... I still couldn't recover the memories of these thirty million lives in the end.
但那不重要了，对不对？我会做出和你一样的选择，因为人家的魅力就是始终如一。
But that doesn't matter anymore, right? I will make the same choice as you because that's just who I am, and I will always have my charm.
逐火是不断失却的旅途，可就算一切随风逝去，也有一种感情会被留下来……
Losses are a constant on the Flame-Chase journey, but even if everything fades away with the wind, there's one feeling that will remain...
为这个我们深爱的世界，写下不同以往的结局吧♪
Let's write an ending unlike any before for this world we so deeply love♪
众神啊，看哪！翁法罗斯已完成了她的胜利，再创世即将到来——
Behold, O gods! Amphoreus has achieved her victory, and the Era Nova approaches.
那辉煌的灵魂已临到此地，行走过熙熙攘攘的黑夜；{F#她}{M#他}携来黄金的火与血，胜利地步入白昼——
The radiant soul has arrived, having walked through the bustling nights, bearing the golden fire and blood, stepping with pride into daylight.
翁法罗斯！我并非陡然呼唤你的名字。我来此，是为了讲述历史——
Amphoreus! I do not call your name suddenly or without cause. I come here to recount history.
此世，他们将燃烧的金血熔进身躯。
In this world, they fused burning golden ichor into their bodies.
来日的命运，可会记得他们的姓名？
Will destiny remember their names in days to come?
那要记住的名字，是不是有点太多啦！
Isn't that gonna be way too many names to remember?
三千万乘以一千，不对，是一千零一……
Thirty million times a thousand... No, wait, times one thousand and one...
好啦，现在别纠结这个了。如果*我们*变多了，那翁法罗斯的「门径」也会变得更多！
Oh, let's not get hung up on that now. If there are more of us, then there'll be more "passages" in Amphoreus too!
一同抵达鲜花芬芳的西风尽头——明天见！
Together, let's reach the end of the west wind where flowers bloom in spring. See you tomorrow!
如此一来，世人不必再受唯一法则制约，而要做自己的「律法」。
Now, the people of this world will no longer be bound by a single rule, but will make their own "Laws."
凯撒的身躯在群星面前略显矮小，但足以成为世界的基石——成就最伟大的帝国。
Though the Imperator's figure may seem rather small against the stars beyond, she will suffice as the cornerstone of the world and become the foundation of the greatest empire.
看来，会是一场永不落幕的欢宴呢。
Looks like this will be a feast that never comes to a close.
愿鱼儿从不离开「海洋」，愿来日…如明珠般璀璨。
May the fish never leave the "Ocean," and may the days ahead... shine like pearls.
让温柔的「天空」呵护世间。不再分贵贱高低，只有你、我，还有大家共同的心愿。
May the gentle "Sky" watch over all beings. There'll be no more distinctions of status or rank... only you, me, and everyone's shared hopes.
无论「理性」，还是缺陷，皆由我亲手种下。如果还要说什么——劝来世学者别把我捧上神坛，物尽其用吧。
"Reason" or defects, they will all be sown by my own hands. If there's anything else to say, I urge future scholars not to put me on a pedestal. Just make use of what I leave behind.
祝那新生的黎明，令世界目光常亮。抗争或许苦涩，但「浪漫」从不灭亡。
May the newborn dawn keep the world's eyes ever bright. Though defiance may be bitter, "Romance" shall never perish.
以歌耳戈之子的名义：勇士将为「纷争」而战，不以荣耀为终点，而在光荣中前行。
In the name of the son of Gorgo: Warriors shall fight for "Strife," not with glory as their end, but to march forward in its light.
即便「死亡」终将分离你我，也请让每一次相拥不留遗憾。
Even though "Death" shall eventually separate us, let every embrace we share be without regret.
都这么正经？那我就许愿沙漠永远有水，好土永远有黄金，人间一切都能用「诡计」换来吧！
Why're you guys all so serious? Fiiine. Then I'll wish for there always to be water in deserts and gold in fertile soil, and for everything in this mortal realm to be attainable through "Trickery"!
「大地」会拱卫往世、此世与来世，生生不息——
"Earth" shall protect the past, present, and future, eternally sustaining life.
轮、轮到我了吗？那，就让「岁月」守望过去，指引未来——
I—Is it my turn? Then let "Time" watch over the past and guide us to the future.
It isn't like you to be this serious, {NICKNAME}.
是在犹豫怎么履行「负世」的神权么？还是说，你心里早就有答案了？
Are you hesitating about how to carry out the divine authority of "Worldbearing"? Or do you already know the answer in your heart?
没错，只要前进就好。用你自己的方式——
That's right. Just keep moving forward. In your own way.
为翁法罗斯，带来真正的黎明吧。
Bring a true dawn to Amphoreus.
以「负世」之名，我向你保证：刻法勒永志不忘。
Then in the name of "Worldbearing," I promise you: Kephale will never forget this.
至此，让我们所有人踏上最后的伟大征程。
And now, let us all embark on this final grand journey.
Stand with me, and become heroes!
一同抵达鲜花芬芳的西风尽头——明天见！
Together, let's reach the end of the west wind where flowers bloom in spring. See you tomorrow!
一同抵达鲜花芬芳的西风尽头——明天见！
Together, let's reach the end of the west wind where flowers bloom in spring. See you tomorrow!
一同抵达鲜花芬芳的西风尽头——明天见！
Together, let's reach the end of the west wind where flowers bloom in spring. See you tomorrow!
审讯卷宗已经上呈元帅。依照十王律令，镜流与罗刹，当继续押往「虚陵」。
The interrogation records have been submitted to the Marshal. According to the Ten Lords' Decree, Jingliu and Luocha shall continue to be detained in the Xuling.
但天击将军迟迟不愿中断通讯，是出于叙旧之心……
But you, Merlin's Claw, have been reluctant to end the transmission. Do you wish to reminisce with us...
还是腹中有话，不吐不快呢？
Or is there something else on your mind that you're just desperate to get out?
真沉得住气啊，景元。对铁墓一役，联盟只准许罗浮一舰出兵……
You're quite calm, Jing Yuan. The Alliance only authorized the Luofu to be deployed for this Irontomb operation...
都说{RUBY_B#爻光}戎韬将军{RUBY_E#}智光昭昭。这会儿怎么看不清局势了？
They say the {RUBY_B#Yao Guang}Seer Strategist{RUBY_E#}'s wisdom shines like a beacon. So why can't you see things clearly now?
瞧你说的，我也没投反对票呀。
Look who's talking. I didn't vote against it, did I?
可大敌环伺，小孩都知道元帅要留几艘仙舟在后方，以备不时之需。
But with enemies all around us, even a child knows the Marshal needs to keep a few Xianzhou ships in reserve, just in case.
谁先请缨，谁就是元帅的选择。我看——这结果正中景元下怀呢。
Whoever volunteers first is the Marshal's pick. If you have to ask, I'd say this outcome plays right into Jing Yuan's hands.
别怪我说话难听：这一战，绝不能让罗浮领衔。
Like it or not, there's no way we're letting the Luofu take the lead in this battle.
天击将军，莫不是怕罗浮摘了曜青战功？
Oh my, Merlin's Claw, are you afraid the Luofu might steal the Yaoqing's glory?
兹事体大，就别打趣了。星核之乱、演武仪典…乱象虽平，坊间流言蜚语可是有增无减。
This is no laughing matter. Between the Stellaron crisis and the Wardance ceremony... Though the chaos has settled, rumors and speculation are only growing by the day.
有炎老在，别有用心之徒掀不起风浪。可一旦罗浮夺来金血，事态就大为不同了。
With Elder Huaiyan around, those with ulterior motives won't be able to stir up any trouble. But once the Luofu gets their hands on the golden blood, it'll be a whole different story.
镜流是何许人也，与你又有何渊源…不必我多说。借题发挥的法子，要多少有多少。
With the kind of person Jingliu is, and her connection to you... I don't need to spell it out. There are countless ways this could be spun into something bigger.
飞霄将军多虑。我此番请缨，本就不求联盟内众口同声。
You're overthinking it, General Feixiao. When I volunteered for this task, I never expected unanimous support from the Alliance anyway.
罗浮斩获金血，戴罪立功，此为一胜；你我恃此金血，因便斡旋，此为二胜；罗浮二胜，我三人皆大欢喜，此为三胜——

The Luofu will seize the golden blood and redeem itself. That'll be our first win. Then we'll leverage this golden blood in the negotiations, our second win. These two wins for the Luofu will make all three of us happy, and that'll be our third win.
瞧，这要是天舶司的买卖，不是赚得盆满钵满么？
Look, if this were a Sky-Faring Commission deal, we'd be rolling in money, wouldn't we?
我看「神策将军」改名叫「乐观将军」得了。
Maybe the Divine Foresight should change his name to the "Optimistic Foresight" instead.
玉阙有「十方光映法界」傍身，定比罗浮更明白此战的意义。
With the Deca-Light Reflection Barrier, the Yuque must understand even more than the Luofu how significant this battle is.
翁法罗斯的因果从穷观阵中消失了——在爻光将军看来，这一异象主何吉凶？
Amphoreus's karma has vanished from the Matrix of Prescience. What omen does General Yao Guang see in this anomaly?
卜筮学中，我们称之为「虚贞」：事涉星神，非凡人可窥全貌。
In divination studies, we call this an "empty fortune." It involves the Aeons and is thus beyond what mere mortals can comprehend.
您这解释也不比符卿说得好懂。
Your explanation isn't any clearer than Lady Fu's.
哎呀，「测不准」三个字，到底哪里不好懂了？
Come on, how hard is it to understand the word "uncertainty"?
对于{RUBY_B#博识尊}青金脑袋{RUBY_E#}，「铁墓」出世是计算中的时刻，但我相信祂不会坐以待毙。
For the {RUBY_B#Nous}Cobalt Head{RUBY_E#}, the emergence of Irontomb is a calculated Instant, but I don't believe THEY will just sit around waiting for death.
而对于银河势力，这是「一线生机」，也是扭转星际形势的关键。星穹列车牵头组建联军，但我看各方派系都暗藏小九九呢。

And for the powers of the cosmos, this is a glimmer of hope for them, and the key to turning the tide of interstellar affairs. The Astral Express is leading the formation of an allied force, but I can see each faction has its own hidden agenda.
联盟内部都有分歧，不难想象其余势力会如何。
There are even divisions within the Alliance, so it's not that hard to imagine how the other factions will react.
景元。赛杜尼拉默星群一战，我和星啸的军团交过手了。
Jing Yuan. I crossed paths with Celenova's Legion at the Battle of Sedounirama Star Cluster.
务必小心。论军备、兵卒，烬灭军团不值一提，公司，甚至丰饶民都能与之一战。但虚卒不过是「毁灭」的耗材，真正的变数——

Be extremely careful. The Ruin Legion's troops and weaponry are nothing to write home about. The IPC, even the Denizens of Abundance, could take them on. However, while Voidrangers are just expendable pawns of the Destruction, the real wild cards are—
没错。纳努克的令使，也是祂燃烧命途的兵器。寻常的兵法、韬略，恐怕对他们不起作用。
Indeed. Nanook's Emanators are also THEIR weapons to burn down the Paths. I'm afraid conventional military tactics and strategies will be useless against them.
这是我的判断——要彻底击落一名大君，必须不计伤亡，不惜代价，只怕……
My assessment is this: To completely take down a Ravager, we must disregard casualties and spare no cost. My only fear is...
只怕稍有不慎，罗浮又会落入幻胧的陷阱，离「毁灭」越来越近。
One wrong move and the Luofu will fall into Phantylia's trap again, inching ever closer to Destruction.
可「疑虑」二字，正是她意图在你我心中留下的心魔。
Doubt is exactly the demon she wants to plant in our hearts.
还记得么？联盟誓言的开篇：「欲令后世免于侵凌攻伐、危疑苛暴之衅」。
Do you still remember the beginning of the Alliance Oath? "To save future generations from war and bloody dispute."
帝弓的锋镝，从来指向一切威胁寰宇的灾祸。既然「开拓」道与我同，那云骑也当守誓如初……
The Reignbow's arrows have always aimed at any force that threatens the cosmos. Now that the Trailblaze walks alongside us, the Cloud Knights shall keep their oath as they have from the beginning...
但愿战线最前方的{RUBY_B#星穹列车}他们{RUBY_E#}，也能够平安哪。
I just hope {RUBY_B#Astral Express}those{RUBY_E#} on the frontline will remain safe.
「识刻锚」传来了信号…各位，该动身了。
The Chronocognitive Anchor is sending a signal... Everyone, time to move out.
Did {NICKNAME} and the others make it?
保险起见，我再重复一遍计划：你们要进入翁法罗斯，与{RUBY_B#{NICKNAME}、三月七、丹恒}失散的三兄妹{RUBY_E#}汇合，设法从世界内部定位「铁墓」。

Let me go over the plan one more time, just in case: You'll enter Amphoreus, reunite with your {RUBY_B#{NICKNAME}, March 7th, Dan Heng}three separated companions{RUBY_E#}, and try to locate Irontomb from within the world.
Who are you taking with you?
这一战事关寰宇，容不得任何闪失。我建议——除帕姆外——全员出动。
The fate of the universe hangs in the balance. We can't afford any slip-ups. I suggest everyone, except Pom-Pom, join the fight.
需要应对一切可能的变数，我没有异议。
We do need to be prepared for all possible contingencies. I have no objection to this.
与此同时，我和螺丝会继续从外部攻击<color=#dbc291ff>德谬歌矩阵</color>，也就是权杖的内核层。
Meanwhile, Screwy and I will continue attacking the <color=#dbc291ff>Demiurge Matrix</color>, that is, the Scepter's kernel, from the outside.
咱们双管齐下，一定能让这台铁疙瘩彻底报废。现在——就等那俩人回来了。
With our two-pronged attack, we'll turn this hunk of metal into scrap for sure. Now, we just wait for those two to get back.
Oh, and just like that, they're here!
久等了。在螺丝星的帮助下，组建银河联军共御「铁墓」一事，推进得很顺利。
Sorry to keep you waiting. With Planet Screwllum's help, the formation of the cosmic alliance to counter Irontomb is progressing smoothly.
银河已将目光投向翁法罗斯，只待…一声枪响。
The cosmos has set its sights on Amphoreus, and now it's just waiting for... the first shot.
那么，事不宜迟——第四面镜！
Well then, let's not waste any more time. Fourth Mirror!
轮到我登场啦！终于不用坐冷板凳了！
It's my time to shine! Finally off the bench!
「思维折射」启动：请仔细阅读安全协议……
Initiating Thought Refraction. Please read the safety protocols carefully...
不，当然不用！我早就帮大家勾选同意啦——目标：翁法罗斯！
Nah, just kidding! I've already checked the agreement box for everyone. And now, destination: Amphoreus!
...The flow of memoria is so heavy here.
与匹诺康尼的梦境截然不同，这里沉淀着真正以万年为计的史诗。
Unlike Penacony's Dreamscape, this place has built up a true epic measured in millennia.
创世涡心，一切神话的起点与终点。而在{NICKNAME}开创的新世界里……
The Vortex of Genesis, where all myths begin and end. And in this new world created by {NICKNAME}...
无尽的轮回已被打破了。
The infinite cycles have been broken.
布下「开拓」的信标，与外界建立联系吧。
Let's set up the Trailblaze beacon and establish contact with the outside world.
那…交给各位了。我不便在流光忆庭面前现身。
...I'll leave it to you then. It'd be better for me to not show myself in front of the Garden of Recollection.
还有星期日先生，也不适合露面，对吧？
And Mr. Sunday, you probably shouldn't show yourself either.
星穹列车已着陆。若能接收到这条讯息，请立即回复。完毕。

这里是仙舟联盟，通讯正常。
This is the Xianzhou Alliance, communications normal.
星际和平公司，通讯正常。
巡海游侠没有回应？倒也正常。只是没想到，这紧要关头家族却默不作声。
No response from the Galaxy Rangers? Not surprising. But I didn't expect The Family to also stay silent at such a critical moment.
未免太不把匹诺康尼的独立董事放在眼里了。好久不见，姬子小姐。
That's a pretty blatant disregard from The Family for Penacony's independent director, I'd say. Long time no see, Miss Himeko.
It's been quite a while, Madam Jade.
这场战役的重要性，足以和「诛罗讨伐战」相提并论。唯有得胜，方能驱散笼罩万千世界的「铁墓」阴影。
The significance of this battle rivals that of the campaign against Zulo. Only through victory can we disperse the shadow of Irontomb that looms over countless worlds.
如此「存护」大业，石心十人必当倾尽全力。
The Ten Stonehearts shall spare no effort for such a grand mission for the Preservation.
翡翠女士牵头博识学会，对铁墓的过往活动进行了专项研究。
Madam Jade led the Intelligentsia Guild in conducting specialized research on Irontomb's past activities.
一个坏消息，「智识」的溃败不限于无机体。
The bad news is, the collapse of the Erudition won't just affect inorganic beings.
你的意思是，铁墓还会感染有机生命？

好消息是：截至目前，它对有机体的影响可控。感染进程缓慢，造成的神经病变也不致命。
The good news is, so far, its effects on organic life are under control. The infection progresses slowly, and the resulting neuropathy is non-fatal.
无论如何，公司会在<unbreak>48</unbreak>个系统时内，确保医疗体系内的星域实现针对性疫苗覆盖。
In any case, the IPC can guarantee targeted vaccine coverage within <unbreak>48</unbreak> system hours in all star zones within the medical system.

I remember you, Master Diviner. Your performance during the Third Denizens of Abundance War was quite impressive.
请放心，所有世界都可以向公司购买疫苗，并享受人道主义折扣——目前的方针是这样。

但如果仙舟联盟愿意驰援公司在艾普瑟隆等星系的资产，我们就有更多手牌，向董事会重申深度合作的必要性。

But if the Xianzhou Alliance is willing to assist with the IPC's assets in Epsilon and other star systems, we'll have more cards to play when reiterating to the board the necessity of deep cooperation.

为何尽是些「欢愉」垂迹之地？
Places that the Elation has visited?
就把它当作一场长远的投资吧。还请见谅：庇尔波因特上下都在为铁墓忙作一团——尤其是市场开拓部——石心十人难免力有不逮。

Think of it as a long-term investment. Please understand that everyone at Pier Point is swamped with Irontomb work, especially the Marketing Development Department. At this rate, even the Ten Stonehearts can only do so much.
若有联盟相助，对全银河都有益无害，不是么？
Having some assistance from the alliance would surely benefit the entire cosmos, wouldn't you agree?
仙舟古语有云，达则兼济天下。你们的提议自有七天将裁夺，我只负责转达。
As an old Xianzhou saying goes: Those who succeed should help all under heaven. Your proposal must be decided on by the Seven Arbiter-Generals. I'm just here to relay the message.
大难当前，若能扶危济困，罗浮定义不容辞。但一切的前提是，公司必须无条件协助联盟在灾区的抢险救援工作。

In times of crisis, the Luofu will not hesitate to help those in need. However, the prerequisite is that the IPC must unconditionally assist the Alliance with emergency rescue operations in the disaster area.
当然——以「存护」的名义，一切献给琥珀王。
Of course. In the name of Preservation, all for the Amber Lord.
Thank you all for your selfless dedication.
看得出来，各方都有些投鼠忌器。

「毁灭」与「智识」的交锋，不仅关乎银河存亡，更是各方势力洗牌的时刻啊。

与一位绝灭大君为敌，再谨慎都不为过。存亡面前，人人平等。
You can never be too careful when battling a Lord Ravager. All are equal in matters of life and death.
In any case, we can only hope for the best in all that's to come.
我们也是时候深入涡心，去看看翁法罗斯内部的样貌了。
It's about time we dive into the Vortex and see what Amphoreus looks like on the inside.
你激活识刻锚，尝试与公司代表联系……
You activate the Chronocognitive Anchor, attempting to contact the IPC representative...
很遗憾，姬子小姐。我必须承认在铁墓问题上，战略投资部也被处处掣肘，难以回应星穹列车的期待。

I regret to inform you, Miss Himeko, that even the Strategic Investment Department is constrained when it comes to the Irontomb issue. And it would be difficult to meet the expectations of the Astral Express.
但，翡翠女士还是吩咐我们，尽可能多关照无名客朋友。所以从我个人角度，再给各位一点小小的建议吧。
However, Madam Jade instructed us to look after our Nameless friends as much as possible. So let me offer you all a small suggestion, just from my personal perspective.
也许，公司的其它部门也会借机向你们抛出橄榄枝……
Other departments at the IPC might also take this opportunity to extend an olive branch to you...
彼时，我希望星穹列车能够记得，在如今这样艰难的时刻，石心十人即便寸步难行，也愿意与「开拓」站在一起——更何况，是只有我们愿意。

When that time comes, I hope the Astral Express will remember that the Ten Stonehearts were willing to stand with the Trailblaze even though we were in a difficult position, and more importantly, we were the only ones willing to do so.
听着很像威胁，对吗？但请相信我，这些话全部发自内心，千真万确。
Sounds like a threat, doesn't it? But trust me, every word comes straight from the heart.
公司内部的分歧，已经严峻到这种地步了么？
Has the internal conflict within the IPC really gotten this bad?
「钻石」和奥斯瓦尔多的不和人尽皆知，但此前至少还维持着僵局……
Everyone knows about the bad blood between Diamond and Oswaldo, but at least until now they've had an uneasy truce...
直到「铸王」这位大君进入董事会的视线——多的我就不说了，涉及机密，还请理解。
Until the Lord Ravager Archforger caught the Board's attention... I'll leave it at that, as it's confidential information. Hope you can understand.
我明白，当务之急是处理铁墓危机。愿旗开得胜，或许也能一缓各位燃眉之急。
I understand. Our immediate priority is to address the Irontomb crisis. Let's hope for success from the start. This might help ease everyone's pressing concerns.
你激活识刻锚，尝试与仙舟联盟代表联系……
You activate the Chronocognitive Anchor, attempting to contact the Xianzhou Alliance representative...
姬子小姐，好消息。七天将重新对现状做了讨论，并由我代为传达：名义上，联盟仍将会战战力限制在罗浮一舰，但曜青也已部署在周围战区，以备不时之需。

Good news, Miss Himeko. The Seven Arbiter-Generals have reconsidered the current situation, and I'm here to relay their message. Officially, the Alliance's combat forces will still be limited to the Luofu, but the Yaoqing has also been deployed in the surrounding war zone as a contingency.
大恩不言谢。这次「巡猎」同意出兵，景元将军想必费了不少心思。
Words cannot express our gratitude. Getting The Hunt to agree on sending troops must have taken quite some effort from General Jing Yuan.
罗浮已将列车视作重要盟友，我们也无意隐瞒，「铁墓」一役，确有仙舟所求之物。
The Luofu already considers the Express an important ally. We also have no intention of hiding the fact that there is indeed something the Xianzhou seeks from this Irontomb operation.
但此番出兵，乃是元帅亲自裁夺：大敌当前，联盟没有退缩的理由，也不会甘居人后。

若能与寰宇众多文明同舟共济，共克时艰，我们必当舍命不渝。
If we can stand together with civilizations across the universe to overcome this crisis, then we must do so, even at the cost of our own lives.
联盟大义。银河能有各位英雄豪杰，实在是一件幸事。
The Alliance truly embodies the principle of righteousness. It's fortunate that the cosmos has great heroes like you.
过奖了。至于那枚结盟玉兆，你们可以留到更紧迫的时候再用。
You're too kind. As for that jade abacus of allying oath, you can save it for when you're in more dire need.
你激活识刻锚，尝试与家族代表联系……
You activate the Chronocognitive Anchor, attempting to contact The Family representative...
Yes. And you are... Miss Robin?
…是的。方才的会议我无法回应，现在也只能以伪装示人，实在抱歉。
...Yes. I apologize for not being able to respond during the meeting earlier, and even now I can only appear in disguise.
谨代表匹诺康尼分家向各位致以歉意。我们尝试过向家族请求援助——很遗憾，回音寥寥。
On behalf of the Penaconian Family branch, I extend my sincerest apologies to everyone. We tried to request aid from The Family, but we essentially received no response.
家族内部的纠葛，我也有所耳闻。知更鸟小姐不必道歉，每一份力量在此刻都弥足珍贵。
I've heard about the internal conflicts within The Family. Miss Robin, there's no need to apologize. Every bit of strength is precious at this moment.
感谢理解。不过，您是匹诺康尼的股东，诸位家主已经同意我的请求：以我个人名义，阿斯德纳全体调律者将随我奔赴前线。
Thank you for understanding. The good news is, since you're one of the shareholders of Penacony, the family heads have agreed to allow me to lead all Asdanian tuners to the frontlines.
我名下的慈善基金会也会为此战尽可能出力，确保前线伤员和受灾区域居民得到妥善安置。

My charitable foundation will also do as much as possible to provide support in this battle. They'll ensure that proper arrangements are provided for those wounded on the frontlines and for residents in affected areas.
知更鸟小姐舍生取义的精神实在令人动容。星穹列车也郑重承诺，不会抛下每一位同伴。
Miss Robin, I'm beyond moved by your spirit of self-sacrifice. The Astral Express would also like to make a promise that we won't leave any companion behind.
你激活识刻锚，尝试与巡海游侠代表联系……
You activate the Chronocognitive Anchor, attempting to contact the Galaxy Ranger representative...
No response from the Chronocognitive Anchor.
