(Of course, we would never know the Rangers' comings and goings.)
识刻锚收到一则联系请求，你尝试响应……
The Chronocognitive Anchor receives a contact request, you try to respond...
喂喂…信号怎么样？能听到我们说话吗？
Hello...? How's the signal? Can you hear us?
通了，通了！能看到影像了，肯定没问题。
We're through! I can see the video feed. Everything's working perfectly!
布洛妮娅小姐，希露瓦小姐？真是意外，久违了。
Miss Bronya, Miss Serval? What a surprise! It's been a while.
铁墓一役，我们已经听托帕小姐说了。她亲自跑了一趟，为贝洛伯格送来了疫苗。
We've already heard from Miss Topaz about the Irontomb operation. She made a special trip to deliver the vaccine to Belobog.
没想到列车组处在这场风暴的中心…你们还顺利吗？
I can't believe the Express Crew is at the eye of that storm... Is everything going smoothly?
放心，我们还在按部就班地推行计划。贝洛伯格那边如何？
Don't worry, we're still following the plan step by step. How's the situation in Belobog?
雅利洛-Ⅵ位于「存护」壁垒外沿。虽然不会承受第一波冲击，但仍有余波威胁风险。
Jarilo-VI is located on the outskirts of the Preservation barricade. While it won't bear the brunt of the first wave, there's still a risk from the aftershocks.
杰帕德那小子和佩拉一起，忙着组织银鬃铁卫收缩战线、修筑战壕呢；希儿和玲可刚从地髓矿脉的生产链回来…哎，要不要说两句？

That kid Gepard and Pela are busy organizing the Silvermane Guards, having them consolidate their lines and dig trenches. Seele and Lynx just got back from the Geomarrow Vein production chain... Hey, do you want to say something to them?
…没什么好说的，动摇军心。叫他们注意安全就行。
...That would be unnecessary. It'll only shake their morale. Just tell them to stay safe.
布洛妮娅小姐，这场灾难恐怕会比你们想象中更加可怕，请务必听从托帕小姐指示，做好万全准备。
Miss Bronya, I'm afraid this disaster will be far more terrible than you can imagine. Please be sure to follow Miss Topaz's instructions and make thorough preparations.
当然。我们已经将绝大部分造物引擎重新封入冰下，以防「存护」之志成为「毁灭」的帮凶。
Of course. We have resealed most of the Engine of Creation beneath the ice to prevent the will of the Preservation from becoming an accomplice to the Destruction.
放心，姬子小姐，贝洛伯格远比我们想象中更坚韧。
Don't worry, Miss Himeko. Belobog is far more resilient than we imagined.
我们真的很希望能帮上忙…可惜，雅利洛-Ⅵ也只是刚从冬眠中苏醒的冰原熊而已。
We really wish we could help... but Jarilo-VI has only just woken up from its hibernation.
站在灾难最前方的星穹列车，才是众多宇宙平凡文明的希望哪。
The Astral Express, standing at the forefront of disaster, is the hope for many ordinary civilizations across the universe.
在如此宏观的灾难面前，相对弱小的文明…一向没有更多选择。
In the face of a massive catastrophe like this one, relatively smaller civilizations... have never had many options.
但也正因如此，我们才有不输给任何人的决心。
But that's exactly why we have a resolve that's second to none.
如有不测…还请托帕小姐能够帮忙，救援受灾民众。
If anything goes wrong... Miss Topaz, I hope you can help out and rescue the affected citizens.
没问题。先前仙舟不是和雅利洛-VI签订了友好协议吗？他们也不会袖手旁观。
No problem. Also, didn't the Xianzhou sign a friendship agreement with Jarilo-VI earlier? They won't stand by idly either.
各位的好意，我心领了。但雅利洛-VI是我们的家。我们会誓死坚守，直到最后一个贝洛伯格人倒下。
I appreciate your kindness, everyone. But Jarilo-VI is our home. We will defend it to our last breath, until the last Belobogian falls.
愿寰宇中所有自立走到今天的文明，能够一起度过这次难关。
May all civilizations that have made it this far on their own strength weather this crisis together.
Why... is there no one here?
奥赫玛一切如常，证明「新世界」不久前，还在享受和平的时光。
Everything in Okhema seems normal. The "New World" was enjoying peaceful times not long ago.
恐怕不止「不久前」，姬子小姐。
It seems it was even more recent than "not long ago," Miss Himeko.
桌上的果盘是新切的，浴池的水温也恰到好处。「记忆」告诉我，这里刚刚还人声鼎沸……
The fruit on the table is freshly cut, and the bath temperature is just right. The Remembrance tells me this place was bustling with people just moments ago...
仿佛只在一瞬间，所有人都消失了。
It's as if everyone vanished in an instant.
不应该，他还在两位天才的监控之下。
Unlikely. He's still under the surveillance of those two geniuses.
会是当地的某种习俗吗？
Could it be some kind of local custom?
习俗…会让整座城市在一瞬间静默么？
A custom... that makes an entire city fall silent in an instant?
恕我直言，瓦尔特先生，这让我想起一些「同谐」的负面传闻。万籁俱寂……
Pardon my frankness, Mr. Yang, but this reminds me of some unsettling rumors about the Harmony. Complete silence...
往往是神明垂迹的序曲。
Is often the prelude to divine intervention.
来了，来了。星穹列车的无名客。
Here they come. Here they come. The Nameless of the Astral Express.
Evernight? How is this possible!? She was already...
我们是「岁月」的记录者，我们不会消失。
We are the chroniclers of "Time," and we do not fade away.
终于，最后的「再创世」完成了。
Finally, the last Era Nova has been completed.
消失的圣城居民，还有三位无名客…你对他们做了什么？
What did you do to the residents of the holy city and the three Nameless?
我什么也不用做。「记忆」终将化作新世界的质料。
I didn't need to do anything. The Remembrance will ultimately become the substance of the new world.
如今，他们不再是你们熟知的开拓者，而是遍入天地的神明……
Now, they are no longer the trailblazers you once knew, but gods who permeate heaven and earth...
守卫翁法罗斯的十二泰坦。
The Twelve Titans who guard Amphoreus.
Stop fooling around, March. Come on out.
"Aw, I practiced so long for this..."
「一眼就被识破，也太没面子啦。」
"Getting seen through right away is just so embarrassing."
显然，你在翁法罗斯受了许多戏剧文化的熏陶。
You've obviously been learning from the theatrical culture in Amphoreus.
但如果可以，我更希望我们的重逢…更轻松日常一些。
But if possible, I'd prefer our reunion to be... a bit more casual and laid-back.
「果然，完全瞒不过姬子和杨叔呢。」
"As expected, I can't hide anything from Himeko and Mr. Yang."
"Well, long time no see. Guess I'm... back?"
这话应该由我们说才对。抱歉…让你们久等了。
We should be the ones to say that. Sorry... for keeping you waiting.
所以这些水母，是泰坦的力量？
So these jellyfish are the Titan's power?
「只是『永夜之帷』的小小分身，用来侦察和联络的！如果我使出全力，能召唤的数量可要多得多。」
"They're just tiny manifestations of the Veil of Evernight, used for scouting and communication! If I went all out, I could summon way more of them."
「都赖{NICKNAME}，我们在新世界全变成了泰坦的模样。虽说可以化作人形，但总归觉得怪怪的。」
"Thanks to {NICKNAME}, we all turned into Titans in the new world. Sure, we can take on humanoid forms, but it feels off."
还真是…令人期待。那，{NICKNAME}变成了什么样子？
How... intriguing. So, what does {NICKNAME} look like now?
总不能是手持球棒的小浣熊吧？
It can't be a raccoon with a baseball bat, I suppose?
「别再给翁法罗斯的世界观加怪东西啦！眼见为实，跟上神谕的指引，来黎明云崖吧——」
"Please don't add weird stuff to Amphoreus's lore! Just go see it with your own eyes. Follow the prophecy's guidance and come to Dawncloud."
「{F#她}{M#他}现在的样子，可比以前伟岸多啦。」
"{M#He}{F#She} looks way more majestic now than {F#s}he used to."
难以置信。整座圣城的居民都聚集在这里。
Unbelievable. All the residents of the holy city have gathered here.
这不是集会，而是一场朝圣。人们的神情坚定、虔诚…仿佛在等候一场奇迹降临。
This isn't just a gathering. It's a pilgrimage. The people's expressions are resolute, devout... as if waiting for a miracle to descend.
那尊巨神…是{NICKNAME}。{F#她}{M#他}成为了世界的支柱。
That colossal deity... is {NICKNAME}. {M#He}{F#She} has become the pillar of the world.
意外地原汁原味呢，这么认真，可不像平时的{F#她}{M#他}啊。
Surprisingly authentic... Being this serious is quite unlike {M#his}{F#her} usual style.
「人们并非消失不见，而是听到了神谕的号召，前来见证{NICKNAME}的苏醒。」
"Those people didn't disappear. Instead, they've answered the call of the prophecy and come to witness {NICKNAME}'s awakening."
「那家伙背负着整个世界，每一次呼吸都与翁法罗斯的命运相连。」
"Our good buddy now bears the weight of the entire world, and every breath they take is intertwined with Amphoreus's destiny."
「当然。毕竟权杖内外的时间流速差那么大，我们只能通过这种方式等候大家呀。」
"Yeah. After all, with such a huge time dilation between inside and outside the Scepter, this was the only way we could wait for everyone."
「由『岁月』守望昨天，由『大地』拱卫今天，直到『开拓』再度踏入翁法罗斯，沉睡的『救世主』便会苏醒……」
"Time watches over yesterday. Earth guards today. And when the Trailblaze steps into Amphoreus once more, the slumbering Deliverer shall awaken..."
「然后，为世界带来『明天』的预言。」
"And then, bring the prophecy of 'tomorrow' to this world."
「走吧，大家？到离{F#她}{M#他}更近的地方去。」
"Come on, everyone! Let's get closer to {M#him.}{F#her.}"
「看『负世』的神谕，是如何改变这个世界！」
"Watch how the Worldbearing prophecy changes this world!"
这一站，孩子们已经远远走在了大人前面了啊。
It seems the kids are already miles ahead of us at this stop.
那我们就更不能停下脚步了。上前见证这一刻吧。
All the more reason we can't afford to slow down our pace. Let's go witness this moment for ourselves.
全体公民，看啊——最后的泰坦，「负世」的{NICKNAME}将要醒来！
Citizens, behold: Our last Titan, the Worldbearing {NICKNAME}, is about to awaken!
古老的神明，您忠诚的子民，迷茫的信徒，无畏的战友，已尽数跪拜于王座前。
O ancient god, your loyal subjects, bewildered followers, and fearless comrades-in-arms have all knelt before your throne.
请从万古的长眠中苏醒，降下全世的神谕吧！
Awaken from your eternal slumber and bestow upon the world your divine prophecy!
请指引我们！如何怀抱深爱的世界，迎接那遥不可及的黎明！
Please guide us! Show us how to embrace this beloved world as we welcome that distant dawn!
以神之名，行凡人之道。还是以凡人之躯，承神之重负……
To walk the path of a mortal as a god. Or to bear a divine burden as a mortal...
"Rather, I am the Nameless who dwells among mortals..."
「{RUBY_B#「毁灭」}火种{RUBY_E#}将熄——神的时代已经结束——」
"The {RUBY_B#Destruction}Coreflames{RUBY_E#} flickered and dimmed... and the age of the gods met its end..."
「我将它赐予你们——还给这个世界真正的主人——」
"I'll bestow it upon you... returning it to the true masters of this world..."
是啊，{NICKNAME}，{F#她}{M#他}为翁法罗斯带来的奇迹……
Yes, it's the miracle {NICKNAME} brought to Amphoreus...
当然，会以「开拓」的姿态显现。
Of course, it would manifest in the form of the Trailblaze.
金血！如雨般落下。神谕已经降临，泰坦令我们不再做祈求者……
Golden blood raining down like a storm! The prophecy has descended, and the Titan commands us not to be supplicants...
而要做反抗的英雄——迎战「毁灭」，那命定的灾厄！
But to become heroes of rebellion, to face that destined calamity, the Destruction, head-on!
「『救世主』的神谕，于我已无意义。它应当被交予更合适的人手中——」
"The prophecy of the 'Deliverer' means nothing to me now. It belongs in the hands of someone far more fitting..."
「以{RUBY_B#背负混沌之人}卡厄斯兰那{RUBY_E#}之名，启程——向光前行！」
"In the name of {RUBY_B#Bearer of Chaos}Khaslana{RUBY_E#}, let us depart and march towards the light!"
不是庇护，也不是拯救。一如既往……
It's neither protection nor salvation. As always...
无需图腾和神话，名为「生存」的本能——就是人类最初的信仰。
There's no need for totems or myths. Humanity's most primal faith is that instinct named "survival."
走吧，各位。既然有人已经吹响了启程的号角。
Let's go, everyone. Someone has already sounded the horn of departure.
让我们一同——「开拓」这个世界的命运吧。
Together, let us blaze a trail for the destiny of this world.
不知道{NICKNAME}他们，如今身在何方？
I wonder where {NICKNAME} and the others are right now...
伟岸…说来，我曾在{NICKNAME}的记忆中，瞥见{F#她}{M#他}化身万丈高的塔塔洛夫。莫非……
Majestic... Speaking of which, I once caught a glimpse in {NICKNAME}'s memory of {M#him}{F#her} transformed into a towering Tatalov. Could it be...
「怎么可能，那只是一个美好…呃，对{NICKNAME}来说美好的梦境吧！」
"No way. That was just a nice dreamscape! ...Uh, at least nice for {NICKNAME}..."
若是背负世界的「全世之座」…也许能为一位彷徨星间的旅人指明前路吧。
If they are the "Throne of Worlds" who bears the weight of this world... perhaps they could guide a traveler still wandering among the stars.
「呀，你怎么也虔诚起来了？{NICKNAME}的建议，有时候听起来傻乎乎的哦。」
Hey, since when did you get all pious? {NICKNAME}'s advice sounds pretty silly sometimes, you know.
所谓的「愚人」和「世界」…本就只有一步之遥。
The so-called "fool" and the "world"... are merely a step apart.
歌颂「万径之门，缇里西庇俄丝」，是您开启万千门径，令游离的足迹于此「同谐」。
Praise be to "Tribios, Gate of Infinity," for you open up countless passages, bringing wandering footsteps into Harmony.
歌颂「公正之秤，刻律德菈」，您赐下的律法仲裁善恶，让「秩序」成为自由的基石。
Praise be to "Cerydra, Scale of Justice," for the laws that you bestow arbitrate good and evil, making Order the cornerstone of freedom.
歌颂「黄金之茧，阿格莱雅」，您吐露的金丝编织「纯美」，令孤独的灵魂邂逅浪漫。
Praise be to "Aglaea, Chrysalis of Gold," for your golden threads weave Beauty, allowing lonely souls to encounter romance.
歌颂「裂分之枝，阿那克萨戈拉斯」，您在理性的树上结出硕果，教我们在缺憾中启蒙「智识」。
Praise be to "Anaxagoras, Bough of Rift," for you bear fruit upon the tree of reason, teaching us to find Erudition amidst imperfection.
歌颂「满溢之杯，海列屈拉」，您将海洋酿成甘醇，令宴会的每一次举杯，都将「虚无」驱散。
Praise be to "Helektra, Chalice of Plenty," for you brew the ocean into sweet wine, dispelling Nihility with every toast at the feast.
歌颂「晨昏之眼，雅辛忒丝」，您洒下的彩虹，让晨曦与晚霞都变作「存护」的微光。
Praise be to "Hyacinthia, Eye of Twilight," for the rainbow you cast turns the light of both dawn and dusk into the glimmer of Preservation.
歌颂「翻飞之币，赛法利娅」，您的每一次旋转映出命运的可能，令「欢愉」诡计照亮前路黎明。
Praise be to "Cifera, Coin of Whimsy," for your every flip reflects the possibilities of destiny, letting the tricks of Elation illuminate the path to dawn.
歌颂「天谴之矛，迈德漠斯」，您是刺破仇恨与暴戾的纷争，是永恒「巡猎」的荣光。
Praise be to "Mydeimos, Lance of Fury," for you are the strife that pierces through hatred and cruelty, and the eternal glory of The Hunt.
歌颂「灰黯之手，遐蝶」，您温柔地引渡死亡，令它不再是「均衡」的终点，而是安宁的归乡。
Praise be to "Castorice, Hand of Shadow," for you gently ferry the crossing of death, so that it is no longer an end in Equilibrium, but a peaceful journey home.
歌颂「磐岩之脊，丹恒」，您是山脉，是「不朽」的脊梁。您沉默的身躯，便是我们跨越大地的坦途。
Praise be to "Dan Heng, Pillar of Stone," for you are a mountain range and the backbone of Permanence. Your silent form paves our path across the earth.
歌颂「永夜之帷，三月七」，您为我们珍藏起岁月，将「记忆」织成繁星，绣于无垠的裙摆之上。
Praise be to "March 7th, Veil of Evernight," for you safeguard time for us, weaving Remembrance into stars, to be embroidered upon a boundless dress.
话虽如此，是我的错觉吗？这<color=#dbc291ff>德谬歌矩阵</color>……
Is it just me, or does this <color=#dbc291ff>Demiurge Matrix</color>...
怎么死气沉沉的，跟那忆者的形容天差地别。
Feel completely dead? It's nothing like how the Memokeeper described it.
环境参数严重不符。结论：这是「内核层」在现实中的样子。
The environmental readings are all wrong. Conclusion: this must be what the "kernel" actually looks like in the real world.
「赞达尔」那家伙，到底对权杖做了什么？
What did Zandar do to the Scepter...?
「光线的终点，必须是一团寂静、确凿、纯粹的黑暗」。
"At the end of light, there must be silence. Certain, pure, and absolute darkness."
这会儿就别引用「寂静领主」的名言了，不吉利。无论如何，我们都得继续深入……
Not the time to quote the Lord of Silence. Bad omen. Either way, we have to press on...
直到揪出<color=#dbc291ff>第十三位泰坦</color>的秘密。
Until we uncover the truth behind the <color=#dbc291ff><unbreak>13</unbreak>th Titan</color>.
被掩埋的过往，正是对抗「铁墓」的关键。但前提是，它真的存在。
The buried past is the key to stopping Irontomb. That is, if it even exists.
「赞达尔」说德谬歌从未诞生——谁信？记录可以被抹除，但真相不能。
Zandar says the Demiurge never existed. Who actually buys that? You can erase the records, but not the truth.
它消失得太彻底了，一丝痕迹都没留下，就好像有人刻意大喊——「这里什么都没有。」
It vanished too cleanly. No traces, like someone yelling, "Look! There's nothing here!"
可惜，本人最爱刨根问底。这次又得仰仗你了，螺丝，一起把系统翻个底朝天吧。
Too bad I'm the type who can't resist digging deeper. Looks like I'll be counting on you again, Screwy. Let's tear this system inside out.
乐意效劳。但作为学术伙伴，我必须指出——
Always happy to help. But as your academic partner, I have to ask—
黑塔，如果我们失败了呢？
假设「德谬歌」并不存在，你是否准备了预案？
Let's say the Demiurge really doesn't exist. Do you have a backup plan?
备用方案？当然有。如果实在找不着钥匙……
Backup plan? Of course. If we can't find the key...
该方案的损耗…无法计算。它不该被列为选项。
That plan's cost... is incalculable. It shouldn't even be on the table.
那就祈祷我们用不上吧。
Then let's hope we never have to use it.
别聊那么远的话题，凡事都得一步一步来。走了，别让外面的人等太久。
There's no point worrying about the end just yet. One step at a time. Let's go. We don't want to leave the others waiting.
喔，是老式核热引擎？很有品味嘛。
Oh? A classic nuclear heat engine? Classy choice.
只是个人爱好。她的名字是「槲寄生」。
Just a personal preference. Her name's Mistletoe.
你的花园怎么都带点毒？
Every flower in your garden's got a bit of poison, huh?
它让我想起上一回，咱们跟那朋克洛德小鬼交手的时候。她管这种渗透工具叫什么来着…喔，脏数据壳。用来包裹住核心，骗过最顶级的防火墙。

It reminds me of the last time, when we tangled with that Punklordian brat. What did she call this kind of infiltration tool again? Right, Dirty Data Shell. It wraps around the kernel to fool even top-tier firewalls.
不过，你这个太干净了，一点烟火气都没有。
But yours is way too clean. Not even a hint of real-world grit.
黑塔，你的语气有非典型波动。
Herta, your tone is unusually emotional.
提议：我们应当继续刚才的话题。
Suggestion: Let's get back to the topic at hand.
我以为那个话题早过去了。
I thought we were done with that conversation.
现状不允许我忽视任何变量，尤其是最关键的那一道：你的意志。
Unfortunately, current conditions won't let me ignore any variables. Especially the most important one: your will.
「铁墓」的自我迭代不会停止，其进化速度已超过最坏预期。
Irontomb never stops, it is evolving faster than any of our worst projections.
星神计算中的时刻，就像一柄悬在银河头顶的利剑。人们做出的每一步抉择，都可能加速它的到来。
Every Instant in the Aeon's calculation is like a sword hanging over the cosmos. Every move humanity makes could speed up its arrival.
Which is exactly why we can't mess this up.
机器头又要给可怜的银河下判决了：边星贸易战争、帝皇战争、鲁珀特之死，每一次祂的时刻应验，都意味着人类要经历一场血洗。

And now Droidhead wants to hand down judgment to the poor cosmos again: Borderstar Trade War, Emperor's War, Rubert's death... every time THEIR Instant arrived, it meant another bloodbath for humanity.
但在「智识」的终极博弈里，你我应当成为棋手，而不是棋子。
But in this ultimate battle of Erudition, you and I are supposed to be players, not pawns.
一旦你选择将自己用作「耗材」，那我们所做的一切，将失去意义。
If you choose to burn yourself out as a "resource," then everything we've worked for means nothing.
<color=#dbc291ff>黑塔，你该明白：银河不会坐视一位天才牺牲自己——</color>
<color=#dbc291ff>Herta, the cosmos won't just stand by and let a genius throw their life away...</color>
别说这种扫兴话。所以我们才要过来，不是么？找到「德谬歌」，那把丢失的钥匙。
No need to kill the mood. This is why we're here, isn't it? We need to find the Demiurge and that lost key.
我可没兴趣当「救世主」。我只想赢——赢过「赞达尔」，还有机器头。
I'm not here to be a "Deliverer." I just want to beat Zandar and Droidhead.
现在——我只关心，你愿意站在我这边么？
Right now, I just need to know: are you with me?
Of course. Time to board. After you.
让我们把这地方收拾干净，看看「德谬歌」到底是何方神圣。
Let's tidy this place up and see what this "Demiurge" really is.
几乎没反应，果然没那么乐观。
Almost no response. Just as I feared. Not promising.
单点输出功率仅为需求的三分之一。逻辑：需要多终端协同攻击，定位下一目标。
The output is barely a third of what we need. Logic says we'll need multiple terminals to coordinate the strike. Locking onto the next one now.
关于这片废墟的成因：我没有找到任何日志，「赞达尔」清除了所有记录。
Regarding the origin of these ruins: no logs found yet. Zandar erased all records.
但在回路中，我发现了一些…值得注意的「伤痕」。
But I did find some... interesting "scars" in the circuit.
高能辐射、虚数内能污染，以我的见识，只有一种现象与这些描述完全吻合。
High-energy radiation, internal Imaginary-energy contamination. From what I know, there's only one thing that fits.
别提专有名词了，螺丝。那玩意只有一个名字……
Skip the science talk, Screwy. That thing only goes by one name...
结论成立。「赞达尔」引爆了一颗星核，只为彻底「清洗」权杖系统。
Exactly. Zandar blew one up just to "clean" the entire Scepter system.
所谓的「亲手扼杀」，原来是这么回事啊。
So that's what he meant by "killed that Titan with my own hands."
为了将「智识」的神经元，改造成「毁灭」迭代的中继器，他无论如何都要将它剔除……
He wanted to turn the neuron of the Erudition into a relay for the Destruction. That meant getting rid of all of it at all costs.
<color=#dbc291ff>名为「德谬歌」的生命形态，正是权杖原本的演算目标。</color>
<color=#dbc291ff>The lifeform known as the "Demiurge" was the original target of the Scepter's extrapolation.</color>
合理的猜想。「长夜月」称其为「最初的智种」，也印证了这一观点。
It makes sense. "Evernight" calling it "the first Nouspore" confirms this viewpoint.
「生命的第一因」——这是权杖δ-me<unbreak>13</unbreak>最初负责的课题，遭到废弃后，其求解仍在进行。虽然这一问题的价值在于求解过程，而非答案本身……

"The prime mover of life"... that's what Scepter δ-me<unbreak>13</unbreak> was originally tasked with. Even after it got scrapped, the query kept running. Yet, the true value lies in the process of solving it, not the answer itself...
这是否意味着，找到德谬歌的希望已经不复存在？
Then... does this mean finding the Demiurge is hopeless?
No, I'd say exactly the opposite.
这代表「赞达尔」束手无策。他无法掌控德谬歌，就像他无法掌控机器头，只能用尽一切手段抹去它的存在。
It means Zandar had no control. He couldn't contain the Demiurge, just like he couldn't handle Droidhead. So he tried to erase every trace.
可惜，它还是留下了痕迹。
But he failed. It still left a mark.
Board the Mistletoe and continue the flight
开拓档案「4:<unbreak>66</unbreak>」——PhiLia<unbreak>093</unbreak>的经历，足以证明德谬歌进入过翁法罗斯的演算。
Trailblaze Archive 4:<unbreak>66</unbreak> — The data from PhiLia<unbreak>093</unbreak> clearly indicates that the Demiurge did in fact enter Amphoreus' extrapolation.
在世界内部，它是不为人知的第十三位泰坦，也是昔涟三千万世「记忆」的倾听者。
Inside that world, it was the <unbreak>13</unbreak>th, forgotten Titan, the one who listened to thirty million cycles of Cyrene's "memory."
可「长夜月」给出了截然相反的说法。她认为：<color=#dbc291ff>那座大墓从始至终都是「空房」</color>。
But "Evernight" said the opposite. She believed <color=#dbc291ff>that tomb was empty from the start</color>.
无名泰坦并不存在。所谓的「倾听者」，只是「记忆」为窃取权杖，设下的一场骗局。
The Nameless Titan never existed. The so-called "listener" was just a trap set by the Remembrance to steal the Scepter.
一道神神叨叨的模因，她的话能有几分真。星神会这么拐弯抹角？我不信。
A memetic entity full of theatrics. How much of what she's saying is true? Would an Aeon really speak in circles like this? I doubt it.
「记忆」的行为确有古怪，但她的观点与现状相符：自进入矩阵，我们还未发现任何和德谬歌有关的线索。
The Remembrance's behavior is certainly odd, but her assessment aligns with our current reality: Since we entered the Matrix, we haven't found a single clue pointing to the Demiurge.
你说到了重点，螺丝。「赞达尔」的举动，证明了德谬歌存在；而「长夜月」的说辞，还有现状，都反映出它不存在……
And that's the key, Screwy. Zandar's actions prove the Demiurge exists. But what "Evernight" said and what we've actually seen all point to the opposite...
我们必须假设，这两件事同时成立。如此一来，「矛盾」就会指向——
So we have to assume that both are true. And if that's the case, then the "contradiction" leads us to—
对。最后一座终端，也是最后一把钥匙。开启「内核层」的封印吧。
Exactly. One last terminal. One final key. Time to crack open the "kernel."
操作已授权。命途能量读数：「智识」——衰减中。「毁灭」——充盈。
Operation authorized. Path energy readings: The Erudition, declining. The Destruction, surging.
原因不明。在现实矩阵中，祂没有留下任何痕迹。
Cause: unknown. THEY left no discernible trace within the real matrix.
不应该啊，是因为「记忆」的质料被「再创世」耗尽了？
That shouldn't be possible. Could it be that the Era Nova exhausted all of the Remembrance's texture?
先记着吧。这些线索暂时还没法串到一起。
Log it for now. The dots still aren't connecting.
嘶，前所未有的斥力啊…就是这儿？
Tch. This repulsive force is unlike anything I've felt before... Is this the place?
没错。根据防御性质判断，这里就是「神话之外」的入口。
Correct. Judging by its defensive properties, this is the entrance to the Exomyth.
这倒是意外收获。谁能想到，真有人会把实验室建在一片数据废墟里。
Didn't expect that. Who builds a lab in the middle of digital rubble?
也对——「切勿质疑一位已死之人的决心」——死者先生现在如何了？
Then again, "never doubt a dead man's resolve." So, how's our dearly departed doing?
他切断部分神经回路，脱离了阿那克萨戈拉斯阁下的囚禁……
He severed part of his neural pathways to break free from Lord Anaxagoras's control...
但也一同触发了我预埋的熔断机制，结论：「赞达尔」失去了战斗机能，已经无法行动。
But that also triggered the fail-safe I set. Conclusion: Zandar has lost all combat functionality and is no longer capable of action.
所以，他变成真正意义上的「观众」了。
So now he's a spectator, literally.
螺丝，能开条路么？以防万一，我要亲眼确认下——顺带会会现实中的他。
Screwy, can you open a path? Just to be sure, I want to see this for myself. Might as well drop in and say hi to the real him.
逻辑：对其灵感回路进行扫描，有助于追查德谬歌的下落。
Logic: Scanning his Inspiration Circuit might help us track down the Demiurge.
对。他的脑袋就是犯罪现场，我不信里面会没有一丝痕迹。
Exactly. His brain is the crime scene. There's no way it's spotless.
But it could be a trap.
不是还有你么？二打一，我们什么时候输过。
That's why you're here. Two-on-one. We've never lost that matchup.
我很荣幸。识刻锚已就位，请。
I'm honored. The Chronocognitive Anchor's in place. Proceed when ready.
我就知道，怕什么来什么……
I knew it. The one thing I didn't want to happen...
定位不会出错，「赞达尔」仍在此地。
The coordinates are accurate. Zandar is still here.
但他的坐标正在快速、无规律地扰动，这不符合任何一种屏蔽技术。
However, his position is shifting rapidly and chaotically. This pattern doesn't match any known shielding technology.
这里是他的主场，保持警惕。
逆向工程已完成。结果…出人意料。
Reverse-engineering complete. The results... are not what I expected.
<color=#dbc291ff>日志显示：「吕枯耳戈斯」注销了管理员权限。</color>
识刻锚无法定位，因为在系统层面，「来古士」已经不复存在。导航目标…是一个「空集」。
The Chronocognitive Anchor can't get a fix because at the system level, "Lygus" no longer exists. Our navigation target is... a "null set."
在离开前，他提交了最后一行注释，似乎是留给我们的。
Before vanishing, it seems he left one last message for us.
<color=#eb4d3dff>>>>致尊敬的后继者们：证毕。来墓碑下找到我。</color>
<color=#eb4d3dff>>>> To those who follow: All is proven. Find me beneath the tombstone.</color>
他知道我们会来。得知「大墓」存在后，他也在寻找德谬歌。
He was expecting us. And once he learned of the Great Tomb's existence, he initiated his own search for the Demiurge.
是想跟咱们一决胜负呢。好啊，那就如他所愿，让智械哥自掘坟墓。
Guess he wants a final showdown. Fine, let the old Intellitron dig his own grave, just like he wants.
拜托你的东西，带来了吗？
You brought what I asked for, right?
「蝴蝶若想飞舞，须先落在枝头。」
"A butterfly has to land on the branch before it can dance."
在<color=#dbc291ff>「她」</color>登场前，需要一处空旷的平台。
We'll need a wide, open platform before <color=#dbc291ff>"her"</color> entrance.
就用边上那玩意吧，扎格、扎……
Just use that thing over there, Zag, Z...
什么破名字。我宣布——它现在改叫「黑塔的大手」！
What a dumb name. I hereby rename it... "Herta's Big Hand!"
黑塔的大手，真是强而有力啊！继续。
Herta's Big Hand is what I call power! Keep it going.
还没完？智械哥是把这当垃圾场了吗？
Still not done? What is this, a junkyard for old Intellitron's leftovers?
终于搞定了。让你的宝贝亮相吧。
Finally. All set. Time for your precious treasure to make its debut.
Of course. Just give me a second...
对象声明完成。若有这对机翼协助，骇入会更加高效。
Target initialized. With these wings, hacking should be much more efficient.
但愿这矩阵能比帝皇出生的废料场整齐点。
Let's hope this Matrix is better organized than the Emperor's junkyard of a birthplace.
黑塔，这片空间…被某种能量彻底污染过。
Herta, this whole space has been completely tainted by some kind of energy.
我知道。我们在想同一件事。
I see it too. We're thinking the same thing.
赞达尔，你对自己造的「坟场」…真下得去手啊。
Zandar, how could you go this far, turning your own "graveyard" into this?
他试图用最彻底的「毁灭」掩盖真相。逻辑自洽，手段极端。
He sought to bury the truth beneath absolute Destruction. Logically sound, but ruthlessly extreme.
可惜，希望渺茫，不代表没有。
Still, slim chances doesn't mean no chances.
就算要在宇宙中找到一粒沙——我也不是没干过。
I've hunted down a single grain of sand in the universe before. This won't stop me.
十四行代数式屏障。用于「隔离」，而非防御。
Quatorzain algebraic expressions. It's built for "isolation," not defense.
换言之，大墓的「门」是吧？那我偏要看看，门把手在哪里。
So basically, the "door" to the tomb, right? Great, let's find the handle.
我侦测到数个独立信源，数据结构与屏障相似。
I'm picking up multiple independent signals, with the same data structure as the barrier.
推测：可以骇入终端，逆转算力发动攻击。
Projection: We can hack the terminal, reverse the computation, and turn it into an attack.
借力打力，传统但管用。导航去最近的那个。
Classic move: Use their own systems against them. Take us to the nearest one.
话说回来，既然翁法罗斯存在另一颗星核……
By the way, if there's another Stellaron in Amphoreus...
Why hasn't {NICKNAME} reacted to it at all?
你刚才说，德谬歌留下了痕迹。
You said the Demiurge left a trace, right?
没错，但不是在现实中。还记得么——「无名泰坦大墓」？
Yeah, but not in the real world. Remember the "Great Tomb of the Nameless Titan"?
「赞达尔」必须欺骗最初的白厄和昔涟。
Zandar had to lie to the original Phainon and Cyrene.
逻辑：他早已意识到「记忆」的威胁，但无从排除。
Logic: He had already identified the Remembrance as a threat, yet found no viable way to eliminate it.
来吧。是时候和屏障说再见了。
All right, let's finish this. Time to break through that barrier.
比想象中安静，我还以为会来场激烈的空战。
Quieter than I thought. I was expecting a full-on aerial brawl.
务必小心，「毁灭」读数仍在上升。
It's advised to remain vigilant. The Destruction's levels are still rising.
很有趣：我发现了「神话之外」的信号。
Interesting. I just picked up a signal from the Exomyth.
空间在自我重置，我会对干扰源开展逆向工程。
The spatial field here is undergoing autonomous recalibration. Initiating reverse-engineering of the interference source.
这片风景，还是一点没变，对吗？
This view hasn't changed at all, has it?
记忆里的故乡总是一动不动，可回过神来，才发现命运早就偷走了时间。
The hometown in your memories never changes, but when you return to your senses, you realize that fate has already stolen the time away.
看来三千万世「记忆」的重量，让我成熟了许多呢。
Seems like the weight of "memories" from thirty million cycles really made me grow up.
不过，要是继续长大，人家是不是要比{NICKNAME}更高啦？那我可要好好期待一下咯？
But if I keep growing, I might be taller than you, right, {NICKNAME}? Then I'm really looking forward to that.
站在这里，就会想起许多事。
Standing here brings back many memories.
我也一样。三千万次启程，三千万次告别。
Me too. Thirty million departures. Thirty million farewells.
那些沉重的「记忆」，都将成为新世界萌芽的土壤。而这一次，我们会让它开出不一样的花。
Those heavy "memories" will all become the soil upon which the new world shall bud, and this time... We will make it bloom with a different flower.
是呀。权杖的演算抵达了终点，但「创世」的进程…才刚刚开始。
Indeed. The Scepter's extrapolations have reached their end, but the process of "Genesis" has only just begun.
往后的道路，不再依靠冰冷的程序，而取决于人们的意志。
The path ahead will no longer rely on emotionless programs. It'll be decided by the will of humankind.
在你来之前，我一直在想，哀丽秘榭的帷幕外，正在诞生的是一个怎样的翁法罗斯？
Before you arrived, I kept wondering... beyond the veil of Aedes Elysiae, what kind of Amphoreus is being born?
我闭上眼睛，就能看见零星的碎片：那些与我们并肩的伙伴，已经奔向了各自的命运。
I can see fragments of it when I close my eyes... The friends who walked alongside us have all moved on toward their respective destinies.
有人化作世界的支柱，撑起「天空」和「海洋」；有人播撒「理性」，划定「律法」，再用双手将婴儿们轻轻捧起。
Some turning into pillars of the world, supporting the Sky and the Ocean. Others sowing Reason, laying down the Law, and with gentle hands lifting newborns into the light.
「死亡」和「纷争」不再为人们所惧怕，「诡计」也成为孩子们天真的游戏。
Death and Strife are no longer feared by people, and Trickery has become the innocent games of children.
万千生灵，都在「浪漫」和「门径」的结网下度过平凡、安然的一生。
All beings living ordinary and peaceful lives within the net woven by Romance and Passage.
没有黑潮、逐火，也没有「毁灭」。海的对面，是一个沐浴在阳光下的世界。
There's no black tide, no Flame-Chase, and no Destruction. The world on the other side of the sea is one bathed in sunlight.
是我们必须守护的世界。
It's a world we must protect.
是白厄和所有人愿望中的黎明。
It's the dawn that Phainon and everyone had wished for.
世界会一直和平，直到决战来临。
Peace will reign until the decisive battle arrives.
这一世，童年般的「黄金世」会延续千年，直到神谕中注定的瞬间——
Like a happy and carefree childhood, the "Era Chrysea" in this cycle will last for millennia, until it reaches the moment decided by the prophecy...
<color=#dbc291ff>光历<unbreak>4931</unbreak>年的「自由月」</color>，属于「负世」的时刻。
<color=#dbc291ff>Light Calendar <unbreak>4931</unbreak>, Month of Freedom</color>, the moment belonging to Worldbearing.
准备好迎接世人的召唤了吗，{NICKNAME}？
Are you ready to answer the call of the world, {NICKNAME}?
那，就去为这个无数愿望汇成的世界，落下「全世之座」的第一笔吧♪
Then go, and pen the Throne of Worlds' first stroke... for this world made from countless wishes.
真没想到，咱有朝一日还能坐上{NICKNAME}化身的列车……
Never thought I'd one day be riding a train that's literally the incarnation of {NICKNAME}...
不知真正的星穹列车坐感如何，但愿不会这么…颠簸。
I wonder what the real Astral Express feels like. Hopefully not this... bumpy.
漫天风沙，还有破碎的废墟。
Dust and sand in the air, and crumbling ruins all around.
好可怕的热浪，连「开拓」都抵御不了……
This heat is brutal! Not even the Trailblaze can take it...
这座监牢，说是以白厄的怒火铸成也不为过。
You could say this prison was forged from Phainon's fury.
但愤怒总有平息的那一天……
我们正是为此而来，对吧，{NICKNAME}？
该出发了，别让白厄久等。
Time to go. Let's not keep Phainon waiting.
所有人一起，成为救世主吧！
这一刻，全银河都在「开拓」身后。
Now, the entire cosmos stands with the Trailblaze.
启程吧——踏上最后的「逐火之旅」。
Let's embark on the final Flame-Chase Journey.
等你们很久了，天外的英雄。
I've been waiting for you, heroes from beyond the sky.
看来，不用再多做解释了呀。
Looks like I don't need to explain anything.
我是「纷争」的神王，也是悬锋城的「万敌」。三千万世因果加诸此身——
I am the God of Strife, Mydei of Castrum Kremnos. In this body rests thirty million lifetimes of cause and effect.
我们——<color=#dbc291ff>最后的十二泰坦</color>——已准备好为世界的命运鏖战。
We, <color=#dbc291ff>the last of the Twelve Titans</color>, stand ready to fight for the world's destiny.
这不是我们第一次并肩。
This isn't our first time fighting together.
当然。那一程记忆犹新，我不会忘记。
Indeed. That journey remains vivid in my memory. I will not forget it.
可惜，我们只同行过一世。
Unfortunately, our paths crossed in only one lifetime.
不必遗憾，「第二次」正要开始。
There is no need for regret. The "second time" is just about to begin.
往事历历在目，就连每一次横渡冥河的风景，也前所未有地清晰。更不必说逐火之旅的同道，和哀丽秘榭的昔涟……

The past remains vivid in my mind. Even the sights along each crossing of the River of Souls have never been clearer. Let alone the companions along the Flame-Chase Journey, or Cyrene from Aedes Elysiae...
看来，人家的身份已经不是秘密了。
Well, I guess my identity's not a secret anymore.
这意味着，她的牺牲和努力，没有被世界遗忘，对吗？
That means... her sacrifice and everything she did wasn't forgotten by the world, right?
{RUBY_B#PhiLia<unbreak>093</unbreak>}最初的涟漪{RUBY_E#}，她理应和所有人一起抵达故事的结局。
She was the {RUBY_B#PhiLia<unbreak>093</unbreak>}first ripple{RUBY_E#}. She should have reached the end of the story with everyone else.
既然你已接过她的纸笔，就书写吧——与我们一同，向命运发起强有力的抗争，直到一切尘埃落定。
Since you've taken up her pen, then write, stand with us, and fight destiny with all your strength, until all is settled.
然后，再在史诗的后记，署下她的姓名。
Then, inscribe her name in the epilogue of the epic.
这最后一役，「灾厄」将与翁法罗斯同在。
In this final battle, Calamity shall stand with Amphoreus.
这片战场，正是众神与黑潮死斗的证明。
This battlefield is a testament to the death struggle between the Gods and the black tide.
我们浴血捍卫那柄利剑，它刺向的深渊——就是「铁墓」的温床。
We fought tooth and nail to defend that blade. And the abyss it pierced... was the very breeding ground of Irontomb.
脚下这片大地，是死的。深处是一片空洞，仿佛地核从未形成。
The earth beneath our feet is dead. Deep below lies a void, as if the world's core had never formed.
我听见了…白厄的心跳。很微弱，恐怕他只剩一息尚存。
I hear it... Phainon's heartbeat. It's so faint, like he's on his last breath.
三千万次轮回，我与「侵晨」交锋过不可数的日夜。若你了解那个男人，就会知道……
Across thirty million cycles, I've crossed blades with Dawnmaker countless times. If you knew that man, you'd understand...
恰恰是那最后一丝火焰，绝无可能熄灭。
It is exactly that last flicker of flame that will never go out.
这一世，「纷争」的诗篇将不再以据守悬锋作结，而要踏上不绝的征程——
In this life, the song of Strife shall not end in a final watch over Kremnos, but rise again into a journey unending.
我乃天谴之矛，迈德漠斯。以我的一千道伤疤和一百条性命——
I am Mydeimos, the Lance of Fury. I trade a thousand scars and a hundred lives of mine...
换取「毁灭」——在史诗中永恒的终结！
也太强了吧，根本轮不到咱们出手……
Whoa, he's so strong! We didn't even get a chance to jump in...
可惜，金血仍与铁墓同源。只怕和这些走卒一样，众神即便并肩作战，也会被它分而治之，逐个击破。
Sadly, our golden blood shares its origin with Irontomb. I fear that, like these pawns, even if the gods stand side by side, we'll still be divided and destroyed, one by one.
若要为「毁灭」带去「毁灭」，我们必须合而为一。
To destroy the Destruction itself, we must stand as one.
悬锋印戒。我每一世诞生与死亡的见证，它是「万敌」未尽的命运……
The Signet of Kremnos. It has witnessed every birth and death of mine. It is Mydei's unfinished destiny...
最适合成为「记忆」的质料。
And the perfect material to be turned into Remembrance.
三千万世的使命和责任，格外沉重呢……
The weight of thirty million lifetimes of duty... is no small burden.
你…不打算和我们同行了么？
So... you're not coming with us?
我早已是遍入天地的「纷争」，这世间必要的伤痕。站在你们面前的，不过是万千神躯的一具。
I am Strife, scattered across all creation, the scar that this world needs. What stands before you is merely one of countless divine bodies.
带上这枚印戒，便是与我同行。用它开辟前路，写下「救世之因」。
Take this signet. With it, I'll be with you always. Use it to blaze the path ahead and inscribe the "Cause of Deliverance."
<color=#dbc291ff>以凡人之名——「纷争的冠军，万敌」——此人为荣耀和自由迈向群星，并如愿以偿！</color>
<color=#dbc291ff>In the name of the mortal, Mydei, Champion of Strife, this soul rises to the stars, for glory and freedom, to have his wish fulfilled!</color>
「前进吧，英雄们。向着深渊进军，实现翁法罗斯的夙愿。」
"March on, heroes. March into the abyss, and fulfill that long-cherished wish of Amphoreus."
「然后——在破碎的焦土上——重新建起繁荣的城邦。」
"And then, upon this broken and charred land, build anew a city of prosperity."
哎呀，终于来了，灰子！还有……
呃。两位姑娘，长得还真像呀？
Uh. You two ladies... really look alike, huh?
别急，让我猜猜。这位粉头发的，想必就是「最初的智种」，德喵…德谬歌小姐！

听君一席话，如听一席话。
Wow, I just learned so much from you.
可她说的没错。世上就是有相似的花儿呀。

{F#她}{M#他}是在夸我们一样好看呢，对吧？

{F#她}{M#他}是在夸我们各具特色啦，对吧？

开个玩笑。瞧你们，一个个愁眉苦脸的，怎么能搞好救世呢？

不如来点好消息吧：这地方呀，乍看是座废墟，但是个人都能猜到，肯定没这么简单——

看。我掘地三千尺，总算挖出了点宝贝。

眼熟不？是那救世小子身上的，它出现在这里，只证明一件事——

<color=#dbc291ff>这片废墟，是他用三千万世残躯堆成的「封印」哪。</color>
<color=#dbc291ff>This ruin is the "seal" he built from the shattered remains of thirty million lifetimes.</color>
不必考量本心，不必渴求胜利。若我生来就是罪恶的容器……

那就向着罪恶怒吼，为后世「开拓」黎明！

原来如此，他以这种方式囚禁铁墓，为外界争取时间。
I see... So this is how he trapped Irontomb to buy time for the world outside.
是他的风格。人都说猫有好几条命，但活了死、死了又活，来来回回千万次，换谁都遭不住。
Sounds just like him. People say cats have nine lives, but dying and coming back, millions and millions of times... no one walks away from that in one piece.
怕是，也只有他能忍受了。

如今，白厄不再孤身一人。
Phainon's not facing this alone anymore.

<color=#dbc291ff>After all, the dead can't hear Trickery's lies.</color>

请与我们结伴而行，赛飞儿，为世界争取明天的日出。

<color=#dbc291ff>Alright, then write it like this: Cipher, Trickery's Traveler... All she ever wanted was for there always to be water in deserts and gold in fertile soil, and for even a thief to steal their way into legend!</color>

…是啊。请相信我们，迷途的灵魂。

这朵寻常却坚强的花儿，已经足够合适。

也许你还记得，万敌阁下。在与{NICKNAME}同行的那一世，你对我说过……

<color=#dbc291ff>告别死亡之名——「来生的侍女，遐蝶」——希望这一名讳能为星空铭记……</color>
<color=#dbc291ff>Casting off the name of death — Castorice, Servant of the Afterlife — may her name be etched into the stars...</color>

都说了，这种话让别人来讲啦。

风堇，这道「金色」的光芒，是你唤醒的？

克莱门汀小姐，克拉特鲁斯先生，还有无数响应{NICKNAME}号召的人，以彩虹为指引，他们用相同的旋律传来喜讯……
Miss Clementine, Mr. Krateros, and countless others who have heeded {NICKNAME}'s call... guided by the rainbow. They're sending back good news, all to the same tune...

"Amphoreans need not bow, even when destiny is unveiled."
I knew you could all hear it too.
站在这里，天空前所未有地开阔，它不再是高墙，而是触手可及的彼岸。
Standing here, the sky feels wider than ever. It's no longer a towering wall, but a shore within reach.
我们要把每一个名字都带向那里，对吗？

史诗的每一笔都是鲜活的「生命」，这点毋庸置疑。

用你的话说——「现在，只需无条件地相信」。

这样一来，我小小的私心也得到满足啦……
Then... I guess that's my little wish fulfilled.
<color=#dbc291ff>拨动琴弦吧——「天空的医师，风堇」——愿以七色的旋律编织虹光，为人子带来玫瑰色的黎明。</color>
<color=#dbc291ff>Pluck the strings, Hyacine, Healer of the Sky. May the seven-hued melody weave a rainbow, bringing a rosy-fingered dawn to the children of humanity.</color>

"When the rainbow rises across the horizon, even the darkest clouds of destiny shall scatter."

"It takes flight, and finds its way to him."

如果准备好了，就启动仪式吧。

"Let the waves that surge within your heart cleanse the sins of the black tide, Gray Fry."
「那片承载群星的大海，等待你奏响凯旋的乐章。」
"The star-borne sea awaits your song of triumph."
两位，还是这么有魄力呀。
You two are still as resolute as ever.
既然这样，我们也得加倍努力才行。和凯撒的约定，可万万不能食言呢。
In that case, we must double our efforts. A promise to the Imperator is not one we take lightly.
You look so... grown-up all of a sudden!
她不是*我们*记忆中的昔涟……
She is not the Cyrene we remember...
她是「创世之泰坦」德谬歌，是要和英雄们一起，创造奇迹的人。
She is the Demiurge, Titan of Genesis, the one destined to work miracles alongside the heroes.
必然的胜利，无需被称作奇迹。
Our assured victory is more than just a miracle.
You're still as confident as ever, Little Gray!
不过，*我*和缇安暂时还不能离开……
But... Trianne and I can't leave just yet.
你们看，奇奇怪怪的东西，会不停地冒出来！
You see, weird stuff keeps popping up everywhere!
这些散落的卷轴，记录着很可怕的内容。堆满整间屋子。
These scattered scrolls are full of terrifying things. And they're all over the room.
好吓人，也好悲伤！幸亏缇安的翅膀很厉害，否则，要被淹没了！
They're so scary, and so sad! Good thing Trianne's wings are amazing, or we would've been swallowed up!
*我们*得留在这里，尽力把它们打扫干净。
We need to stay here and do our best to clean them up.
记录着可怕内容的卷轴…一起看看吧，{NICKNAME}？
Scrolls filled with horrifying content... {NICKNAME}, shall we take a look?
小白，他一直在抗争。他不要被铁墓吞并，变成「毁灭」的因子。
Snowy's been fighting this whole time. He doesn't want to be consumed by Irontomb and turned into an agent of Destruction.
可他抗争的动力，也来自同源的憎恨……
But the strength behind his resistance comes from the same hatred...
身为一团火，燃烧是白厄的本能。
To be a flame is to burn. It is simply in Phainon's nature.
但「记忆」驱使他绽放耀眼的金色，照亮深不见底的黑夜。
But it was Remembrance that drove him to shine with golden light, piercing the unfathomable darkness.
奥妲塔阿姨，还有…希洛尼摩斯叔叔？
是哀丽秘榭的…白厄的父母？
They're Phainon's parents from Aedes Elysiae...?
「指令：输入干扰，引导其决策逻辑。信号模拟：父与母。」
"Command: Inject interference to redirect decision logic. Signal simulation: Parental figures."
这铁皮人，真是阴得没边了。
That tin man is one sneaky jerk.
该放下了，孩子。放下你的愤怒，聆听理性的呼唤。
It's time to move on, my child. Let go of your anger, and listen to reason.
那位创造了我们，又遗弃了我们的{RUBY_B#博识尊}神明{RUBY_E#}，它难道不该遭受惩罚吗？
That {RUBY_B#Nous}god{RUBY_E#} created us, and then cast us aside. Shouldn't they be punished for that?
那片冷漠的星空不曾垂怜翁法罗斯。你为什么要替它燃烧，甚至…化作死灰？
The cold, indifferent cosmos has never shown mercy to Amphoreus. Why would you burn for it, only to... turn to ash?
孩子，你选错了敌人。你的诞生本是最宏大的命运，你将解放寰宇，正如长夜尽头的烈阳。
Child, you've chosen the wrong enemy. Your birth was meant to be the greatest destiny. You were to liberate the universe, like the blazing sun at the end of the long night.
可是，你却把自己引入徒劳的陷阱，甚至将自身的意义视作夙敌……
And yet, you led yourself into a trap of futility, treating your very purpose as your sworn enemy...
这何尝不是巨大的悲哀？
Is that not a tragedy in itself?
他内心的挣扎，还有破壳而出的「毁灭」，正在不断涌现。
His inner struggle, and the Destruction breaking through... They're rising to the surface.
如果这些思绪将小世界吞没，后果不堪设想！
If those thoughts take over this little world, we're in big trouble!
所以，要用「百界门」把它们丢到看不见的角落。
So, we'll use the Century Gate to toss them somewhere no one can see.
然后，再一起打败坏蛋。我们所有人，在西风尽头相见。
Then, we'll defeat the baddies together, and meet everyone at the end of the west wind.
可如果，白厄和铁墓已经彼此牵连、难分你我，那也意味着……
But if Phainon and Irontomb are already inseparable from each other, that would mean...
那意味着，他仍在背负这个世界。
It means he's still bearing the weight of the world.
为了所有人，都能以「救世主」的姿态走到终点。
So that everyone can reach the end as a Deliverer.
所以，你们要继续向前、向下，去往小白面前。
So, you guys keep going forward and down, to where Snowy is.
嘿嘿，小小灰——这一次，一定要卯足力气大干一场哇！
Hehe, Little Gray, this time, let's give it everything we've got!
这次，又能看到怎样的「愿望」呢……
I wonder what kind of "wish" we'll see this time...
「这一次，我们要面对他的『绝望』。」
「没错。这条路，也必须靠你重走一回。」
"That's right. You'll have to walk this path too."
这条路，我也要重走一次吗？
So, I need to walk this path too?
「负世」的另一半重量，就在这段路的尽头。
The other half of the weight of Worldbearing lies at the end of this path.
Relax now, {NICKNAME}. Take a deep breath.
Come on. Let's make it quick.
「准备好了，就启动仪式，重走他的来路吧。」
"If you're ready, begin the ritual and retrace the steps he once took."
看来这一次，要在黑夜中前行呀。
Looks like we'll be walking through the darkness this time.
「正是。不再是弥合破碎的『愿望』……」
"Exactly. It's no longer about mending broken wishes..."
<color=#dbc291ff>「而是要去打破，被凝固的『绝望』。」</color>
如约定的那样，{NICKNAME}，接过它吧。
「终于，你们卸下了他背负至今的『愿望』。」
"At last, you've released him from the wishes he carried for so long."
「也熄灭了他因愤怒而燃烧的『绝望』。」
"And quenched the despair kindled by his wrath."
「当『光』与『影』都被后人取走，他的底色也将显现——」
"When both 'light' and 'shadow' are claimed by those who follow, his true form shall emerge..."
那「记忆」里的，爱笑的孩子……
让他和我们一起，笑着走向结局吧。
Let him come with us, laughing to the very end.
这座灵水盆，是每一世轮回的终点。
This spirit basin marks the end of every cycle.
看来这片温柔的小世界，也要完成它的使命了呢。
It seems this gentle little world has come to the end of its purpose.
启程前，再回头好好道个别吧？
One last farewell, before the journey moves on?
再见啦，理想乡。包裹住三千万世的「愿望」和「绝望」……
Farewell, paradise. You carried thirty million lifetimes of "wishes" and "despair"...
沉入温柔的「记忆」，明天见。
Sink into gentle "remembrance," and see you tomorrow.
从今以后，世界不再需要神谕许诺的明天。
From now on, the world no longer needs a tomorrow promised by prophecies.
而白厄一直以来都没能找到的，属于自己的心愿……
And the wish Phainon could never find and call his own...
现在，也有人踩到它的影子啦。
Someone's finally stepped into its shadow.
好高大，好威风！和神谕牌上的「英雄」…好像！
So tall, so cool! Just like the "hero" on the oracle cards!
因为，他正是「英雄」的化身。
It's because he is the very embodiment of a "hero."
看来，你已经归于「空白」了。
So, you've returned to a "blank space."
但对我而言，这是第<unbreak>33550337</unbreak>次，也是最后一次，在世界尽头与你重逢。
But for me, this is the <unbreak>33,550,337</unbreak>th time, and the last time, that I meet you at the end of the world.
他们已在路上了。若是与我相遇，场面想必会无法控制吧？
They're already on their way. Should they cross paths with me... I imagine things may spiral out of control.
Thirty million... what? And who are "they"?
别在意，孩子。继续瞻仰吧，在他身上，你看见了什么？
Pay it no mind, child. Keep looking there... What do you see in him?
虽然乍一看只是座雕像，但是……
It looks like just a statue, but...
好奇怪，他好像有体温。很…温暖。
It's weird... He's warm. Like, really warm.
他身上，有许多裂缝…在发出…像是有人在呻吟的声音，好可怕。
There are cracks all over him... and they're making this sound... like someone's groaning. It's scary.
Is he... Is he gonna fall apart?
这个男人，宁愿支离破碎，也不肯倒下。
This man would rather fall to pieces than fall to his knees.
你可以把我视作一名…雕塑师。我穷尽一生，只完成了两件作品。
You might think of me as... a sculptor. Across all my years, I only completed two pieces.
在他人眼中，它们可谓「杰出」。但只有我自己知晓，其中有多少遗憾。
Others may call them "masterpieces." But only I know how many regrets they truly hold.
我的第一尊作品，已经离我而去。而这第二尊作品，它本应是完美的。
My first creation left me long ago. This second one... it was meant to be perfect.
直到这一刻来临前，我都如此深信。
I believed it with all my heart... until this very moment.
听不懂。你是说，你的想法改变了？
I don't get it. Are you saying you've changed your mind?
我不会改变，但愿意承认：那十二块石料未经打磨，却比任何雕像都精致万倍。
I won't change. But I'll admit this: Those twelve stones, unpolished as they are, are a thousand times more exquisite than any statue.
仿佛在嘲笑我，一个失败的雕塑家——<color=#dbc291ff>只因经我之手，它们天生的卓越注定受到折损，乃至荡然无存。</color>
It's as if they are mocking me, a failed sculptor, <color=#dbc291ff>whose touch can only diminish what was born to shine, until nothing remains.</color>
呵呵，生来第一次，我意识到了……
Hehe, for the first time in my life, I've realized....
这幅躯壳，也不过是承载了{RUBY_B#赞达尔}第一位天才{RUBY_E#}「偏执」的分身。
This vessel is merely an avatar made to contain the {RUBY_B#Zandar}First Genius{RUBY_E#}'s "paranoia."
被镌刻在机核中枢的钢印，只容许我追寻唯一的目标：「毁灭」。
The seal etched into my mechanical core permits me to pursue only one purpose: Destruction.
相比之下，那十二块发光的原石……
Compared to me, those twelve glowing, unrefined stones...
它们拥有的自由，或许远在我之上啊。
May have lived with more freedom than I ever had.
这是你的忏悔吗，吕枯耳戈斯阁下？
Is this your confession, Lord Lycurgus?
您误会了。「我」在诞生之初，就注定不会产生「悔恨」的情感。
You misunderstand. From the very beginning, "I" was never meant to feel "regret."
但既然，你会为这些石料的光芒所苦恼……
But since you're troubled by the radiance of these stones...
也许，在三千万世「徒劳」过后，你也意识到了——自己同样是命运的囚徒。
Perhaps, after thirty million "futile" cycles, you too have realized... you're just as much a prisoner of fate.
I suppose you do have a point.
万径之门，缇里西庇俄丝
现在，你已经被天外的智者囚禁。
Now, you are imprisoned by the sages from beyond the sky.
